## Système de Renderer abstrait

### Renderer.hpp - Interface de base

```cpp
// Renderer.hpp
#pragma once

#include "Window.hpp"
#include <memory>
#include <cstdint>

namespace nk {

// Types de couleur
struct Color {
    uint8_t r, g, b, a;
    
    Color(uint8_t r = 0, uint8_t g = 0, uint8_t b = 0, uint8_t a = 255)
        : r(r), g(g), b(b), a(a) {}
    
    static Color fromFloat(float r, float g, float b, float a = 1.0f) {
        return Color(
            static_cast<uint8_t>(r * 255),
            static_cast<uint8_t>(g * 255),
            static_cast<uint8_t>(b * 255),
            static_cast<uint8_t>(a * 255)
        );
    }
};

// Rectangle
struct Rect {
    int x, y, width, height;
    
    Rect(int x = 0, int y = 0, int width = 0, int height = 0)
        : x(x), y(y), width(width), height(height) {}
};

// Types de renderer disponibles
enum class RendererType {
    Software,    // CPU rendering
    OpenGL,      // OpenGL 2.1+
    OpenGLES,    // OpenGL ES 2.0/3.0
    Vulkan,      // Vulkan
    Metal,       // Metal (macOS/iOS)
    DirectX11,   // DirectX 11
    DirectX12,   // DirectX 12
    Auto         // Sélection automatique selon la plateforme
};

// Configuration du renderer
struct RendererConfig {
    RendererType type = RendererType::Auto;
    bool vsync = true;
    int multisampling = 0; // 0 = désactivé, 2/4/8/16 = samples
    bool hardwareAcceleration = true;
};

// Interface abstraite du renderer
class RendererImpl {
public:
    virtual ~RendererImpl() = default;
    
    // Lifecycle
    virtual bool initialize() = 0;
    virtual void shutdown() = 0;
    
    // Frame management
    virtual void beginFrame() = 0;
    virtual void endFrame() = 0;
    virtual void clear(const Color& color) = 0;
    virtual void present() = 0;
    
    // Primitives de dessin
    virtual void drawPoint(int x, int y, const Color& color) = 0;
    virtual void drawLine(int x1, int y1, int x2, int y2, const Color& color) = 0;
    virtual void drawRect(const Rect& rect, const Color& color) = 0;
    virtual void fillRect(const Rect& rect, const Color& color) = 0;
    virtual void drawCircle(int x, int y, int radius, const Color& color) = 0;
    virtual void fillCircle(int x, int y, int radius, const Color& color) = 0;
    
    // Informations
    virtual RendererType getType() const = 0;
    virtual const char* getName() const = 0;
    virtual bool isHardwareAccelerated() const = 0;
};

// Classe principale du Renderer
class Renderer {
public:
    Renderer(Window& window, const RendererConfig& config = RendererConfig());
    ~Renderer();
    
    // Pas de copie
    Renderer(const Renderer&) = delete;
    Renderer& operator=(const Renderer&) = delete;
    
    // Lifecycle
    bool isInitialized() const;
    
    // Frame management
    void beginFrame();
    void endFrame();
    void clear(const Color& color = Color(0, 0, 0, 255));
    void present();
    
    // Primitives de dessin
    void drawPoint(int x, int y, const Color& color);
    void drawLine(int x1, int y1, int x2, int y2, const Color& color);
    void drawRect(const Rect& rect, const Color& color);
    void fillRect(const Rect& rect, const Color& color);
    void drawCircle(int x, int y, int radius, const Color& color);
    void fillCircle(int x, int y, int radius, const Color& color);
    
    // Informations
    RendererType getType() const;
    const char* getName() const;
    bool isHardwareAccelerated() const;
    
    Window& getWindow() { return m_window; }
    const Window& getWindow() const { return m_window; }
    
private:
    Window& m_window;
    std::unique_ptr<RendererImpl> m_impl;
    bool m_initialized;
};

} // namespace nk
```

### RendererSoftware.hpp - Implémentation CPU

```cpp
// renderers/RendererSoftware.hpp
#pragma once

#include "../Renderer.hpp"
#include <vector>

namespace nk {

class RendererSoftware : public RendererImpl {
public:
    RendererSoftware(Window& window, const RendererConfig& config);
    ~RendererSoftware() override;
    
    bool initialize() override;
    void shutdown() override;
    
    void beginFrame() override;
    void endFrame() override;
    void clear(const Color& color) override;
    void present() override;
    
    void drawPoint(int x, int y, const Color& color) override;
    void drawLine(int x1, int y1, int x2, int y2, const Color& color) override;
    void drawRect(const Rect& rect, const Color& color) override;
    void fillRect(const Rect& rect, const Color& color) override;
    void drawCircle(int x, int y, int radius, const Color& color) override;
    void fillCircle(int x, int y, int radius, const Color& color) override;
    
    RendererType getType() const override { return RendererType::Software; }
    const char* getName() const override { return "Software Renderer"; }
    bool isHardwareAccelerated() const override { return false; }
    
private:
    Window& m_window;
    RendererConfig m_config;
    
    // Framebuffer CPU
    std::vector<uint32_t> m_framebuffer;
    int m_width;
    int m_height;
    
    // Helpers
    void setPixel(int x, int y, const Color& color);
    uint32_t colorToRGBA(const Color& color);
    bool isInBounds(int x, int y) const;
    
    // Algorithmes de dessin
    void bresenhamLine(int x1, int y1, int x2, int y2, const Color& color);
    void bresenhamCircle(int xc, int yc, int radius, const Color& color);
    void fillCircleScanline(int xc, int yc, int radius, const Color& color);
};

} // namespace nk
```

### RendererSoftware.cpp

```cpp
// renderers/RendererSoftware.cpp
#include "RendererSoftware.hpp"
#include <algorithm>
#include <cstring>

#if defined(_WIN32)
    #include <windows.h>
#elif defined(__APPLE__)
    #include <OpenGL/gl.h>
#else
    #include <GL/gl.h>
#endif

namespace nk {

RendererSoftware::RendererSoftware(Window& window, const RendererConfig& config)
    : m_window(window)
    , m_config(config)
    , m_width(0)
    , m_height(0) {
}

RendererSoftware::~RendererSoftware() {
    shutdown();
}

bool RendererSoftware::initialize() {
    m_width = m_window.getWidth();
    m_height = m_window.getHeight();
    
    // Allouer le framebuffer
    m_framebuffer.resize(m_width * m_height, 0xFF000000);
    
    return true;
}

void RendererSoftware::shutdown() {
    m_framebuffer.clear();
}

void RendererSoftware::beginFrame() {
    // Vérifier si la taille a changé
    int newWidth = m_window.getWidth();
    int newHeight = m_window.getHeight();
    
    if (newWidth != m_width || newHeight != m_height) {
        m_width = newWidth;
        m_height = newHeight;
        m_framebuffer.resize(m_width * m_height);
    }
}

void RendererSoftware::endFrame() {
    // Rien à faire ici pour le software renderer
}

void RendererSoftware::clear(const Color& color) {
    uint32_t clearColor = colorToRGBA(color);
    std::fill(m_framebuffer.begin(), m_framebuffer.end(), clearColor);
}

void RendererSoftware::present() {
    // Copier le framebuffer vers OpenGL pour l'affichage
    // On utilise OpenGL juste pour afficher le résultat du rendu CPU
    
    glDrawPixels(m_width, m_height, GL_RGBA, GL_UNSIGNED_BYTE, m_framebuffer.data());
    
    m_window.display();
}

void RendererSoftware::setPixel(int x, int y, const Color& color) {
    if (!isInBounds(x, y)) return;
    
    int index = y * m_width + x;
    uint32_t rgba = colorToRGBA(color);
    
    // Alpha blending simple
    if (color.a == 255) {
        m_framebuffer[index] = rgba;
    } else if (color.a > 0) {
        uint32_t bg = m_framebuffer[index];
        
        uint8_t bgR = (bg >> 0) & 0xFF;
        uint8_t bgG = (bg >> 8) & 0xFF;
        uint8_t bgB = (bg >> 16) & 0xFF;
        
        float alpha = color.a / 255.0f;
        float invAlpha = 1.0f - alpha;
        
        uint8_t r = static_cast<uint8_t>(color.r * alpha + bgR * invAlpha);
        uint8_t g = static_cast<uint8_t>(color.g * alpha + bgG * invAlpha);
        uint8_t b = static_cast<uint8_t>(color.b * alpha + bgB * invAlpha);
        
        m_framebuffer[index] = (0xFF << 24) | (b << 16) | (g << 8) | r;
    }
}

uint32_t RendererSoftware::colorToRGBA(const Color& color) {
    return (color.a << 24) | (color.b << 16) | (color.g << 8) | color.r;
}

bool RendererSoftware::isInBounds(int x, int y) const {
    return x >= 0 && x < m_width && y >= 0 && y < m_height;
}

void RendererSoftware::drawPoint(int x, int y, const Color& color) {
    setPixel(x, y, color);
}

void RendererSoftware::bresenhamLine(int x1, int y1, int x2, int y2, const Color& color) {
    int dx = std::abs(x2 - x1);
    int dy = std::abs(y2 - y1);
    int sx = x1 < x2 ? 1 : -1;
    int sy = y1 < y2 ? 1 : -1;
    int err = dx - dy;
    
    while (true) {
        setPixel(x1, y1, color);
        
        if (x1 == x2 && y1 == y2) break;
        
        int e2 = 2 * err;
        if (e2 > -dy) {
            err -= dy;
            x1 += sx;
        }
        if (e2 < dx) {
            err += dx;
            y1 += sy;
        }
    }
}

void RendererSoftware::drawLine(int x1, int y1, int x2, int y2, const Color& color) {
    bresenhamLine(x1, y1, x2, y2, color);
}

void RendererSoftware::drawRect(const Rect& rect, const Color& color) {
    drawLine(rect.x, rect.y, rect.x + rect.width - 1, rect.y, color);
    drawLine(rect.x + rect.width - 1, rect.y, rect.x + rect.width - 1, rect.y + rect.height - 1, color);
    drawLine(rect.x + rect.width - 1, rect.y + rect.height - 1, rect.x, rect.y + rect.height - 1, color);
    drawLine(rect.x, rect.y + rect.height - 1, rect.x, rect.y, color);
}

void RendererSoftware::fillRect(const Rect& rect, const Color& color) {
    int x1 = std::max(0, rect.x);
    int y1 = std::max(0, rect.y);
    int x2 = std::min(m_width, rect.x + rect.width);
    int y2 = std::min(m_height, rect.y + rect.height);
    
    for (int y = y1; y < y2; y++) {
        for (int x = x1; x < x2; x++) {
            setPixel(x, y, color);
        }
    }
}

void RendererSoftware::bresenhamCircle(int xc, int yc, int radius, const Color& color) {
    int x = 0;
    int y = radius;
    int d = 3 - 2 * radius;
    
    auto drawCirclePoints = [&](int x, int y) {
        setPixel(xc + x, yc + y, color);
        setPixel(xc - x, yc + y, color);
        setPixel(xc + x, yc - y, color);
        setPixel(xc - x, yc - y, color);
        setPixel(xc + y, yc + x, color);
        setPixel(xc - y, yc + x, color);
        setPixel(xc + y, yc - x, color);
        setPixel(xc - y, yc - x, color);
    };
    
    drawCirclePoints(x, y);
    
    while (y >= x) {
        x++;
        
        if (d > 0) {
            y--;
            d = d + 4 * (x - y) + 10;
        } else {
            d = d + 4 * x + 6;
        }
        
        drawCirclePoints(x, y);
    }
}

void RendererSoftware::drawCircle(int x, int y, int radius, const Color& color) {
    bresenhamCircle(x, y, radius, color);
}

void RendererSoftware::fillCircleScanline(int xc, int yc, int radius, const Color& color) {
    for (int y = -radius; y <= radius; y++) {
        int x = static_cast<int>(std::sqrt(radius * radius - y * y));
        for (int i = xc - x; i <= xc + x; i++) {
            setPixel(i, yc + y, color);
        }
    }
}

void RendererSoftware::fillCircle(int x, int y, int radius, const Color& color) {
    fillCircleScanline(x, y, radius, color);
}

} // namespace nk
```

### Guide pour OpenGL/Vulkan/Metal

```cpp
// renderers/RendererOpenGL.hpp (squelette)
#pragma once

#include "../Renderer.hpp"

namespace nk {

class RendererOpenGL : public RendererImpl {
public:
    RendererOpenGL(Window& window, const RendererConfig& config);
    ~RendererOpenGL() override;
    
    bool initialize() override;
    void shutdown() override;
    
    void beginFrame() override;
    void endFrame() override;
    void clear(const Color& color) override;
    void present() override;
    
    // ... autres méthodes ...
    
    RendererType getType() const override { return RendererType::OpenGL; }
    const char* getName() const override { return "OpenGL Renderer"; }
    bool isHardwareAccelerated() const override { return true; }
    
private:
    Window& m_window;
    RendererConfig m_config;
    
    // OpenGL specifics
    unsigned int m_vao;
    unsigned int m_vbo;
    unsigned int m_shaderProgram;
    
    // Vertex buffer pour batch rendering
    struct Vertex {
        float x, y;
        float r, g, b, a;
    };
    std::vector<Vertex> m_vertices;
    
    void flush(); // Envoyer le batch au GPU
    void setupShaders();
};

} // namespace nk
```

**Pour implémenter OpenGL/Vulkan/Metal :**

1. **OpenGL** : Utilisez un batch renderer avec VBO/VAO, shaders GLSL pour les primitives
2. **Vulkan** : Pipeline graphics avec vertex/fragment shaders, command buffers
3. **Metal** : MTLRenderPipelineState, MTLCommandBuffer, shaders MSL
4. **DirectX** : Similar à Vulkan avec HLSL shaders

Je continue avec l'implémentation complète du Renderer.cpp dans le prochain message ?

Excellente question ! Oui, il y a **plusieurs problèmes critiques** dans ce code :

## Problèmes identifiés :

1. **Durée de vie de `androidWindow`** : La variable locale `androidWindow` est créée dans `android_main`, mais son pointeur `g_androidMainWindow` est utilisé dans un thread séparé. Quand `android_main` se termine, `androidWindow` est détruit, rendant le pointeur invalide.

2. **Capture de lambda** : Le lambda `app->onAppCmd` ne capture pas `originalOnAppCmd` correctement et crée une référence cyclique.

3. **Thread ne peut pas accéder à `androidWindow`** : Le thread `mainThread` utilise `g_androidMainWindow` qui pointe vers un objet local qui pourrait être détruit.

4. **Gestion EGL dans plusieurs threads** : OpenGL ES/EGL n'est pas thread-safe par défaut.

## Solution corrigée :

```cpp
// nk.cpp (section Android corrigée)
#ifdef __ANDROID__

#include <thread>
#include <atomic>
#include <mutex>

namespace {
    std::unique_ptr<nk::WindowAndroid> g_androidWindow;
    std::atomic<bool> g_androidShouldQuit{false};
    std::mutex g_androidMutex;
}

// Handler personnalisé pour les commandes app
static void handleAndroidAppCmd(struct android_app* app, int32_t cmd) {
    std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(g_androidMutex);
    
    if (g_androidWindow) {
        g_androidWindow->handleAppCmd(cmd);
    }
    
    if (cmd == APP_CMD_DESTROY) {
        g_androidShouldQuit = true;
    }
}

// Handler personnalisé pour les inputs
static int32_t handleAndroidInput(struct android_app* app, AInputEvent* event) {
    std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(g_androidMutex);
    
    if (g_androidWindow) {
        return g_androidWindow->handleInput(event);
    }
    return 0;
}

void android_main(struct android_app* app) {
    app_dummy();
    
    // Créer la fenêtre avec un pointeur intelligent
    {
        std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(g_androidMutex);
        g_androidWindow = std::make_unique<nk::WindowAndroid>("", 0, 0);
        g_androidWindow->setApp(app);
    }
    
    // Configurer les callbacks
    app->onAppCmd = handleAndroidAppCmd;
    app->onInputEvent = handleAndroidInput;
    
    // Attendre que la fenêtre native soit créée
    bool windowReady = false;
    while (!windowReady && !g_androidShouldQuit) {
        int events;
        struct android_poll_source* source;
        
        // Polling avec timeout court
        if (ALooper_pollAll(10, nullptr, &events, (void**)&source) >= 0) {
            if (source != nullptr) {
                source->process(app, source);
            }
        }
        
        if (app->destroyRequested != 0) {
            g_androidShouldQuit = true;
            break;
        }
        
        // Vérifier si la fenêtre est prête
        {
            std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(g_androidMutex);
            if (g_androidWindow && g_androidWindow->isOpen() && app->window != nullptr) {
                windowReady = true;
            }
        }
    }
    
    if (!windowReady || g_androidShouldQuit) {
        std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(g_androidMutex);
        g_androidWindow.reset();
        return;
    }
    
    // Lancer nk_main dans le thread courant (pas de thread séparé !)
    // Android attend que android_main bloque, donc on exécute tout ici
    std::thread eventThread([app]() {
        // Thread dédié au polling des événements Android
        while (!g_androidShouldQuit && !app->destroyRequested) {
            int events;
            struct android_poll_source* source;
            
            // Polling bloquant avec timeout
            if (ALooper_pollAll(1, nullptr, &events, (void**)&source) >= 0) {
                if (source != nullptr) {
                    source->process(app, source);
                }
            }
        }
    });
    
    // Exécuter nk_main dans le thread principal
    {
        char* argv[] = {(char*)"android_app"};
        nk::nk_main(1, argv);
    }
    
    // Signaler la fin
    g_androidShouldQuit = true;
    
    // Attendre le thread d'événements
    if (eventThread.joinable()) {
        eventThread.join();
    }
    
    // Nettoyer
    {
        std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(g_androidMutex);
        g_androidWindow.reset();
    }
}

#endif
```

## Modifications nécessaires dans WindowAndroid

```cpp
// platforms/WindowAndroid.cpp (modifications)

// Rendre pollEvent thread-safe
bool WindowAndroid::pollEvent(Event& event) {
    if (!m_app) return false;
    
    // Thread-safe access à la queue
    std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(m_eventMutex);
    
    if (m_eventQueue.empty()) {
        return false;
    }
    
    event = m_eventQueue.front();
    m_eventQueue.pop();
    return true;
}

void WindowAndroid::pushEvent(const Event& event) {
    std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(m_eventMutex);
    m_eventQueue.push(event);
}
```

```cpp
// platforms/WindowAndroid.hpp (ajout)
#include <mutex>

class WindowAndroid : public WindowImpl {
    // ... membres existants ...
private:
    std::mutex m_eventMutex; // Protéger l'accès à m_eventQueue
    // ... autres membres ...
};
```

## Alternative plus simple : Pas de threading

```cpp
// Version sans threading (plus simple et plus sûre)
void android_main(struct android_app* app) {
    app_dummy();
    
    // Créer la fenêtre globale
    g_androidWindow = std::make_unique<nk::WindowAndroid>("", 0, 0);
    g_androidWindow->setApp(app);
    
    app->onAppCmd = handleAndroidAppCmd;
    app->onInputEvent = handleAndroidInput;
    
    // Attendre que la fenêtre soit prête
    while ((!g_androidWindow->isOpen() || app->window == nullptr) && 
           !app->destroyRequested) {
        int events;
        struct android_poll_source* source;
        
        if (ALooper_pollAll(-1, nullptr, &events, (void**)&source) >= 0) {
            if (source != nullptr) {
                source->process(app, source);
            }
        }
    }
    
    if (!app->destroyRequested) {
        // Exécuter nk_main dans le thread principal
        char* argv[] = {(char*)"android_app"};
        nk::nk_main(1, argv);
    }
    
    // Nettoyer
    g_androidWindow.reset();
}
```

## Modification de WindowAndroid::pollEvent pour intégrer le polling Android

```cpp
bool WindowAndroid::pollEvent(Event& event) {
    if (!m_app) return false;
    
    // Traiter les événements Android en mode non-bloquant
    int events;
    struct android_poll_source* source;
    
    while (ALooper_pollAll(0, nullptr, &events, (void**)&source) >= 0) {
        if (source != nullptr) {
            source->process(m_app, source);
        }
        
        if (m_app->destroyRequested != 0) {
            Event closeEvent;
            closeEvent.type = EventType::Closed;
            pushEvent(closeEvent);
            m_open = false;
        }
    }
    
    // Retourner un événement de la queue
    if (m_eventQueue.empty()) {
        return false;
    }
    
    event = m_eventQueue.front();
    m_eventQueue.pop();
    return true;
}
```

## Résumé des changements

**Approche recommandée** : Version sans threading
- ✅ Plus simple
- ✅ Pas de problèmes de synchronisation
- ✅ Pas de problèmes de durée de vie des objets
- ✅ Compatible avec le cycle de vie Android
- ✅ Intégration du polling Android dans `pollEvent()`

**Points clés** :
1. Utiliser `std::unique_ptr` pour la fenêtre globale
2. Exécuter `nk_main` dans le thread principal `android_main`
3. Intégrer `ALooper_pollAll` directement dans `WindowAndroid::pollEvent()`
4. Pas besoin de threading séparé

Maintenant je peux continuer avec l'implémentation complète du Renderer.cpp ?

## Renderer.cpp - Implémentation complète

```cpp
// Renderer.cpp
#include "Renderer.hpp"
#include "renderers/RendererSoftware.hpp"

// Inclure les autres renderers selon la plateforme
#if defined(_WIN32)
    #include "renderers/RendererOpenGL.hpp"
    // #include "renderers/RendererDirectX11.hpp"
    // #include "renderers/RendererDirectX12.hpp"
#elif defined(__linux__) && !defined(__ANDROID__)
    #include "renderers/RendererOpenGL.hpp"
    // #include "renderers/RendererVulkan.hpp"
#elif defined(__APPLE__)
    #include <TargetConditionals.h>
    #if TARGET_OS_IPHONE
        #include "renderers/RendererOpenGLES.hpp"
        // #include "renderers/RendererMetal.hpp"
    #else
        #include "renderers/RendererOpenGL.hpp"
        // #include "renderers/RendererMetal.hpp"
    #endif
#elif defined(__EMSCRIPTEN__)
    #include "renderers/RendererOpenGLES.hpp"
#elif defined(__ANDROID__)
    #include "renderers/RendererOpenGLES.hpp"
    // #include "renderers/RendererVulkan.hpp"
#endif

#include <stdexcept>

namespace nk {

// Fonction pour déterminer le meilleur renderer selon la plateforme
static RendererType selectBestRenderer(const RendererConfig& config) {
    if (config.type != RendererType::Auto) {
        return config.type;
    }
    
    // Sélection automatique selon la plateforme
#if defined(_WIN32)
    return RendererType::OpenGL; // ou DirectX11 si implémenté
#elif defined(__linux__) && !defined(__ANDROID__)
    return RendererType::OpenGL;
#elif defined(__APPLE__)
    #if TARGET_OS_IPHONE
        return RendererType::OpenGLES; // ou Metal si implémenté
    #else
        return RendererType::OpenGL; // ou Metal si implémenté
    #endif
#elif defined(__EMSCRIPTEN__)
    return RendererType::OpenGLES;
#elif defined(__ANDROID__)
    return RendererType::OpenGLES; // ou Vulkan si implémenté
#else
    return RendererType::Software;
#endif
}

Renderer::Renderer(Window& window, const RendererConfig& config)
    : m_window(window)
    , m_initialized(false) {
    
    RendererType type = selectBestRenderer(config);
    
    // Créer l'implémentation appropriée
    switch (type) {
        case RendererType::Software:
            m_impl = std::make_unique<RendererSoftware>(window, config);
            break;
            
#if defined(_WIN32) || (defined(__linux__) && !defined(__ANDROID__)) || (defined(__APPLE__) && !TARGET_OS_IPHONE)
        case RendererType::OpenGL:
            m_impl = std::make_unique<RendererOpenGL>(window, config);
            break;
#endif
            
#if defined(__ANDROID__) || defined(__EMSCRIPTEN__) || (defined(__APPLE__) && TARGET_OS_IPHONE)
        case RendererType::OpenGLES:
            m_impl = std::make_unique<RendererOpenGLES>(window, config);
            break;
#endif
            
#if 0 // Activer quand implémenté
        case RendererType::Vulkan:
            m_impl = std::make_unique<RendererVulkan>(window, config);
            break;
            
        case RendererType::Metal:
            m_impl = std::make_unique<RendererMetal>(window, config);
            break;
            
        case RendererType::DirectX11:
            m_impl = std::make_unique<RendererDirectX11>(window, config);
            break;
            
        case RendererType::DirectX12:
            m_impl = std::make_unique<RendererDirectX12>(window, config);
            break;
#endif
            
        default:
            throw std::runtime_error("Renderer type not supported on this platform");
    }
    
    // Initialiser le renderer
    m_initialized = m_impl->initialize();
    
    if (!m_initialized) {
        throw std::runtime_error("Failed to initialize renderer");
    }
}

Renderer::~Renderer() {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->shutdown();
    }
}

bool Renderer::isInitialized() const {
    return m_initialized;
}

void Renderer::beginFrame() {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->beginFrame();
    }
}

void Renderer::endFrame() {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->endFrame();
    }
}

void Renderer::clear(const Color& color) {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->clear(color);
    }
}

void Renderer::present() {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->present();
    }
}

void Renderer::drawPoint(int x, int y, const Color& color) {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->drawPoint(x, y, color);
    }
}

void Renderer::drawLine(int x1, int y1, int x2, int y2, const Color& color) {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->drawLine(x1, y1, x2, y2, color);
    }
}

void Renderer::drawRect(const Rect& rect, const Color& color) {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->drawRect(rect, color);
    }
}

void Renderer::fillRect(const Rect& rect, const Color& color) {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->fillRect(rect, color);
    }
}

void Renderer::drawCircle(int x, int y, int radius, const Color& color) {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->drawCircle(x, y, radius, color);
    }
}

void Renderer::fillCircle(int x, int y, int radius, const Color& color) {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->fillCircle(x, y, radius, color);
    }
}

RendererType Renderer::getType() const {
    return m_impl ? m_impl->getType() : RendererType::Software;
}

const char* Renderer::getName() const {
    return m_impl ? m_impl->getName() : "Unknown";
}

bool Renderer::isHardwareAccelerated() const {
    return m_impl ? m_impl->isHardwareAccelerated() : false;
}

} // namespace nk
```

## RendererOpenGL.hpp - Implémentation OpenGL complète

```cpp
// renderers/RendererOpenGL.hpp
#pragma once

#include "../Renderer.hpp"
#include <vector>

namespace nk {

class RendererOpenGL : public RendererImpl {
public:
    RendererOpenGL(Window& window, const RendererConfig& config);
    ~RendererOpenGL() override;
    
    bool initialize() override;
    void shutdown() override;
    
    void beginFrame() override;
    void endFrame() override;
    void clear(const Color& color) override;
    void present() override;
    
    void drawPoint(int x, int y, const Color& color) override;
    void drawLine(int x1, int y1, int x2, int y2, const Color& color) override;
    void drawRect(const Rect& rect, const Color& color) override;
    void fillRect(const Rect& rect, const Color& color) override;
    void drawCircle(int x, int y, int radius, const Color& color) override;
    void fillCircle(int x, int y, int radius, const Color& color) override;
    
    RendererType getType() const override { return RendererType::OpenGL; }
    const char* getName() const override { return "OpenGL Renderer"; }
    bool isHardwareAccelerated() const override { return true; }
    
private:
    Window& m_window;
    RendererConfig m_config;
    
    // OpenGL objects
    unsigned int m_vao;
    unsigned int m_vbo;
    unsigned int m_shaderProgram;
    
    // Vertex structure
    struct Vertex {
        float x, y;      // Position
        float r, g, b, a; // Color
    };
    
    // Batch rendering
    std::vector<Vertex> m_vertices;
    static const size_t MAX_VERTICES = 10000;
    
    // Primitive type
    enum class PrimitiveType {
        Points,
        Lines,
        Triangles
    };
    PrimitiveType m_currentPrimitive;
    
    // Helper functions
    void flush();
    void ensureCapacity(size_t count);
    void setupShaders();
    void setupBuffers();
    void updateViewport();
    
    // Conversion helpers
    void screenToNDC(int x, int y, float& ndcX, float& ndcY);
    
    // Circle tessellation
    void tessellateCircle(int x, int y, int radius, const Color& color, bool filled);
};

} // namespace nk
```

## RendererOpenGL.cpp

```cpp
// renderers/RendererOpenGL.cpp
#if defined(_WIN32) || (defined(__linux__) && !defined(__ANDROID__)) || (defined(__APPLE__) && !TARGET_OS_IPHONE)

#include "RendererOpenGL.hpp"

#if defined(_WIN32)
    #include <windows.h>
    #include <GL/gl.h>
    // Charger les extensions OpenGL modernes si nécessaire
    #ifndef GL_ARRAY_BUFFER
        #define GL_ARRAY_BUFFER 0x8892
        #define GL_STATIC_DRAW 0x88E4
        #define GL_FRAGMENT_SHADER 0x8B30
        #define GL_VERTEX_SHADER 0x8B31
        #define GL_COMPILE_STATUS 0x8B81
        #define GL_LINK_STATUS 0x8B82
    #endif
    
    // Function pointers (simplified - use GLEW or glad in production)
    typedef void (APIENTRY *PFNGLGENBUFFERSPROC)(GLsizei n, GLuint* buffers);
    typedef void (APIENTRY *PFNGLBINDBUFFERPROC)(GLenum target, GLuint buffer);
    typedef void (APIENTRY *PFNGLBUFFERDATAPROC)(GLenum target, GLsizeiptr size, const void* data, GLenum usage);
    typedef GLuint (APIENTRY *PFNGLCREATESHADERPROC)(GLenum type);
    typedef void (APIENTRY *PFNGLSHADERSOURCEPROC)(GLuint shader, GLsizei count, const GLchar** string, const GLint* length);
    typedef void (APIENTRY *PFNGLCOMPILESHADERPROC)(GLuint shader);
    typedef GLuint (APIENTRY *PFNGLCREATEPROGRAMPROC)(void);
    typedef void (APIENTRY *PFNGLATTACHSHADERPROC)(GLuint program, GLuint shader);
    typedef void (APIENTRY *PFNGLLINKPROGRAMPROC)(GLuint program);
    typedef void (APIENTRY *PFNGLUSEPROGRAMPROC)(GLuint program);
    typedef void (APIENTRY *PFNGLGENVERTEXARRAYSPROC)(GLsizei n, GLuint* arrays);
    typedef void (APIENTRY *PFNGLBINDVERTEXARRAYPROC)(GLuint array);
    typedef void (APIENTRY *PFNGLENABLEVERTEXATTRIBARRAYPROC)(GLuint index);
    typedef void (APIENTRY *PFNGLVERTEXATTRIBPOINTERPROC)(GLuint index, GLint size, GLenum type, GLboolean normalized, GLsizei stride, const void* pointer);
    
    static PFNGLGENBUFFERSPROC glGenBuffers = nullptr;
    static PFNGLBINDBUFFERPROC glBindBuffer = nullptr;
    static PFNGLBUFFERDATAPROC glBufferData = nullptr;
    static PFNGLCREATESHADERPROC glCreateShader = nullptr;
    static PFNGLSHADERSOURCEPROC glShaderSource = nullptr;
    static PFNGLCOMPILESHADERPROC glCompileShader = nullptr;
    static PFNGLCREATEPROGRAMPROC glCreateProgram = nullptr;
    static PFNGLATTACHSHADERPROC glAttachShader = nullptr;
    static PFNGLLINKPROGRAMPROC glLinkProgram = nullptr;
    static PFNGLUSEPROGRAMPROC glUseProgram = nullptr;
    static PFNGLGENVERTEXARRAYSPROC glGenVertexArrays = nullptr;
    static PFNGLBINDVERTEXARRAYPROC glBindVertexArray = nullptr;
    static PFNGLENABLEVERTEXATTRIBARRAYPROC glEnableVertexAttribArray = nullptr;
    static PFNGLVERTEXATTRIBPOINTERPROC glVertexAttribPointer = nullptr;
    
    static void loadGLExtensions() {
        glGenBuffers = (PFNGLGENBUFFERSPROC)wglGetProcAddress("glGenBuffers");
        glBindBuffer = (PFNGLBINDBUFFERPROC)wglGetProcAddress("glBindBuffer");
        glBufferData = (PFNGLBUFFERDATAPROC)wglGetProcAddress("glBufferData");
        glCreateShader = (PFNGLCREATESHADERPROC)wglGetProcAddress("glCreateShader");
        glShaderSource = (PFNGLSHADERSOURCEPROC)wglGetProcAddress("glShaderSource");
        glCompileShader = (PFNGLCOMPILESHADERPROC)wglGetProcAddress("glCompileShader");
        glCreateProgram = (PFNGLCREATEPROGRAMPROC)wglGetProcAddress("glCreateProgram");
        glAttachShader = (PFNGLATTACHSHADERPROC)wglGetProcAddress("glAttachShader");
        glLinkProgram = (PFNGLLINKPROGRAMPROC)wglGetProcAddress("glLinkProgram");
        glUseProgram = (PFNGLUSEPROGRAMPROC)wglGetProcAddress("glUseProgram");
        glGenVertexArrays = (PFNGLGENVERTEXARRAYSPROC)wglGetProcAddress("glGenVertexArrays");
        glBindVertexArray = (PFNGLBINDVERTEXARRAYPROC)wglGetProcAddress("glBindVertexArray");
        glEnableVertexAttribArray = (PFNGLENABLEVERTEXATTRIBARRAYPROC)wglGetProcAddress("glEnableVertexAttribArray");
        glVertexAttribPointer = (PFNGLVERTEXATTRIBPOINTERPROC)wglGetProcAddress("glVertexAttribPointer");
    }
#elif defined(__APPLE__)
    #include <OpenGL/gl3.h>
#else
    #include <GL/gl.h>
#endif

#include <cmath>
#include <iostream>

namespace nk {

// Shaders GLSL
static const char* vertexShaderSource = R"(
#version 330 core
layout (location = 0) in vec2 aPos;
layout (location = 1) in vec4 aColor;

out vec4 vertexColor;

void main() {
    gl_Position = vec4(aPos.x, aPos.y, 0.0, 1.0);
    vertexColor = aColor;
}
)";

static const char* fragmentShaderSource = R"(
#version 330 core
in vec4 vertexColor;
out vec4 FragColor;

void main() {
    FragColor = vertexColor;
}
)";

RendererOpenGL::RendererOpenGL(Window& window, const RendererConfig& config)
    : m_window(window)
    , m_config(config)
    , m_vao(0)
    , m_vbo(0)
    , m_shaderProgram(0)
    , m_currentPrimitive(PrimitiveType::Points) {
    
    m_vertices.reserve(MAX_VERTICES);
}

RendererOpenGL::~RendererOpenGL() {
    shutdown();
}

bool RendererOpenGL::initialize() {
#if defined(_WIN32)
    loadGLExtensions();
    
    if (!glGenBuffers || !glCreateShader) {
        std::cerr << "Failed to load OpenGL extensions" << std::endl;
        return false;
    }
#endif
    
    setupShaders();
    setupBuffers();
    updateViewport();
    
    // Configuration OpenGL de base
    glEnable(GL_BLEND);
    glBlendFunc(GL_SRC_ALPHA, GL_ONE_MINUS_SRC_ALPHA);
    
    if (m_config.multisampling > 0) {
        glEnable(GL_MULTISAMPLE);
    }
    
    return true;
}

void RendererOpenGL::shutdown() {
    flush();
    
    if (m_vbo) {
        glDeleteBuffers(1, &m_vbo);
        m_vbo = 0;
    }
    
    if (m_vao) {
        glDeleteVertexArrays(1, &m_vao);
        m_vao = 0;
    }
    
    if (m_shaderProgram) {
        glDeleteProgram(m_shaderProgram);
        m_shaderProgram = 0;
    }
}

void RendererOpenGL::setupShaders() {
    // Compiler vertex shader
    unsigned int vertexShader = glCreateShader(GL_VERTEX_SHADER);
    glShaderSource(vertexShader, 1, &vertexShaderSource, nullptr);
    glCompileShader(vertexShader);
    
    // Vérifier les erreurs de compilation
    int success;
    char infoLog[512];
    glGetShaderiv(vertexShader, GL_COMPILE_STATUS, &success);
    if (!success) {
        glGetShaderInfoLog(vertexShader, 512, nullptr, infoLog);
        std::cerr << "Vertex shader compilation failed: " << infoLog << std::endl;
    }
    
    // Compiler fragment shader
    unsigned int fragmentShader = glCreateShader(GL_FRAGMENT_SHADER);
    glShaderSource(fragmentShader, 1, &fragmentShaderSource, nullptr);
    glCompileShader(fragmentShader);
    
    glGetShaderiv(fragmentShader, GL_COMPILE_STATUS, &success);
    if (!success) {
        glGetShaderInfoLog(fragmentShader, 512, nullptr, infoLog);
        std::cerr << "Fragment shader compilation failed: " << infoLog << std::endl;
    }
    
    // Linker le programme
    m_shaderProgram = glCreateProgram();
    glAttachShader(m_shaderProgram, vertexShader);
    glAttachShader(m_shaderProgram, fragmentShader);
    glLinkProgram(m_shaderProgram);
    
    glGetProgramiv(m_shaderProgram, GL_LINK_STATUS, &success);
    if (!success) {
        glGetProgramInfoLog(m_shaderProgram, 512, nullptr, infoLog);
        std::cerr << "Shader program linking failed: " << infoLog << std::endl;
    }
    
    // Nettoyer
    glDeleteShader(vertexShader);
    glDeleteShader(fragmentShader);
}

void RendererOpenGL::setupBuffers() {
    glGenVertexArrays(1, &m_vao);
    glGenBuffers(1, &m_vbo);
    
    glBindVertexArray(m_vao);
    glBindBuffer(GL_ARRAY_BUFFER, m_vbo);
    
    // Allouer le buffer
    glBufferData(GL_ARRAY_BUFFER, MAX_VERTICES * sizeof(Vertex), nullptr, GL_DYNAMIC_DRAW);
    
    // Position attribute
    glEnableVertexAttribArray(0);
    glVertexAttribPointer(0, 2, GL_FLOAT, GL_FALSE, sizeof(Vertex), (void*)0);
    
    // Color attribute
    glEnableVertexAttribArray(1);
    glVertexAttribPointer(1, 4, GL_FLOAT, GL_FALSE, sizeof(Vertex), (void*)(2 * sizeof(float)));
    
    glBindBuffer(GL_ARRAY_BUFFER, 0);
    glBindVertexArray(0);
}

void RendererOpenGL::updateViewport() {
    glViewport(0, 0, m_window.getWidth(), m_window.getHeight());
}

void RendererOpenGL::screenToNDC(int x, int y, float& ndcX, float& ndcY) {
    int width = m_window.getWidth();
    int height = m_window.getHeight();
    
    // Convertir de l'espace écran (0,0 en haut-gauche) vers NDC (-1,-1 en bas-gauche)
    ndcX = (2.0f * x / width) - 1.0f;
    ndcY = 1.0f - (2.0f * y / height);
}

void RendererOpenGL::ensureCapacity(size_t count) {
    if (m_vertices.size() + count > MAX_VERTICES) {
        flush();
    }
}

void RendererOpenGL::flush() {
    if (m_vertices.empty()) return;
    
    glBindVertexArray(m_vao);
    glBindBuffer(GL_ARRAY_BUFFER, m_vbo);
    
    // Upload les vertices
    glBufferSubData(GL_ARRAY_BUFFER, 0, m_vertices.size() * sizeof(Vertex), m_vertices.data());
    
    glUseProgram(m_shaderProgram);
    
    // Dessiner selon le type de primitive
    GLenum mode;
    switch (m_currentPrimitive) {
        case PrimitiveType::Points:
            mode = GL_POINTS;
            glPointSize(1.0f);
            break;
        case PrimitiveType::Lines:
            mode = GL_LINES;
            glLineWidth(1.0f);
            break;
        case PrimitiveType::Triangles:
            mode = GL_TRIANGLES;
            break;
    }
    
    glDrawArrays(mode, 0, m_vertices.size());
    
    glBindVertexArray(0);
    
    m_vertices.clear();
}

void RendererOpenGL::beginFrame() {
    updateViewport();
}

void RendererOpenGL::endFrame() {
    flush();
}

void RendererOpenGL::clear(const Color& color) {
    flush(); // S'assurer que tout est dessiné avant de clear
    
    float r = color.r / 255.0f;
    float g = color.g / 255.0f;
    float b = color.b / 255.0f;
    float a = color.a / 255.0f;
    
    glClearColor(r, g, b, a);
    glClear(GL_COLOR_BUFFER_BIT | GL_DEPTH_BUFFER_BIT);
}

void RendererOpenGL::present() {
    flush();
    m_window.display();
}

void RendererOpenGL::drawPoint(int x, int y, const Color& color) {
    if (m_currentPrimitive != PrimitiveType::Points) {
        flush();
        m_currentPrimitive = PrimitiveType::Points;
    }
    
    ensureCapacity(1);
    
    float ndcX, ndcY;
    screenToNDC(x, y, ndcX, ndcY);
    
    Vertex v;
    v.x = ndcX;
    v.y = ndcY;
    v.r = color.r / 255.0f;
    v.g = color.g / 255.0f;
    v.b = color.b / 255.0f;
    v.a = color.a / 255.0f;
    
    m_vertices.push_back(v);
}

void RendererOpenGL::drawLine(int x1, int y1, int x2, int y2, const Color& color) {
    if (m_currentPrimitive != PrimitiveType::Lines) {
        flush();
        m_currentPrimitive = PrimitiveType::Lines;
    }
    
    ensureCapacity(2);
    
    float ndcX1, ndcY1, ndcX2, ndcY2;
    screenToNDC(x1, y1, ndcX1, ndcY1);
    screenToNDC(x2, y2, ndcX2, ndcY2);
    
    Vertex v1, v2;
    v1.x = ndcX1; v1.y = ndcY1;
    v2.x = ndcX2; v2.y = ndcY2;
    
    v1.r = v2.r = color.r / 255.0f;
    v1.g = v2.g = color.g / 255.0f;
    v1.b = v2.b = color.b / 255.0f;
    v1.a = v2.a = color.a / 255.0f;
    
    m_vertices.push_back(v1);
    m_vertices.push_back(v2);
}

void RendererOpenGL::drawRect(const Rect& rect, const Color& color) {
    drawLine(rect.x, rect.y, rect.x + rect.width, rect.y, color);
    drawLine(rect.x + rect.width, rect.y, rect.x + rect.width, rect.y + rect.height, color);
    drawLine(rect.x + rect.width, rect.y + rect.height, rect.x, rect.y + rect.height, color);
    drawLine(rect.x, rect.y + rect.height, rect.x, rect.y, color);
}

void RendererOpenGL::fillRect(const Rect& rect, const Color& color) {
    if (m_currentPrimitive != PrimitiveType::Triangles) {
        flush();
        m_currentPrimitive = PrimitiveType::Triangles;
    }
    
    ensureCapacity(6); // 2 triangles = 6 vertices
    
    float x1, y1, x2, y2;
    screenToNDC(rect.x, rect.y, x1, y1);
    screenToNDC(rect.x + rect.width, rect.y + rect.height, x2, y2);
    
    float r = color.r / 255.0f;
    float g = color.g / 255.0f;
    float b = color.b / 255.0f;
    float a = color.a / 255.0f;
    
    // Triangle 1
    m_vertices.push_back({x1, y1, r, g, b, a});
    m_vertices.push_back({x2, y1, r, g, b, a});
    m_vertices.push_back({x1, y2, r, g, b, a});
    
    // Triangle 2
    m_vertices.push_back({x2, y1, r, g, b, a});
    m_vertices.push_back({x2, y2, r, g, b, a});
    m_vertices.push_back({x1, y2, r, g, b, a});
}

void RendererOpenGL::tessellateCircle(int x, int y, int radius, const Color& color, bool filled) {
    const int segments = std::max(16, radius / 2); // Plus de segments pour les grands cercles
    
    if (filled) {
        if (m_currentPrimitive != PrimitiveType::Triangles) {
            flush();
            m_currentPrimitive = PrimitiveType::Triangles;
        }
        
        ensureCapacity(segments * 3);
        
        float centerX, centerY;
        screenToNDC(x, y, centerX, centerY);
        
        float r = color.r / 255.0f;
        float g = color.g / 255.0f;
        float b = color.b / 255.0f;
        float a = color.a / 255.0f;
        
        for (int i = 0; i < segments; i++) {
            float angle1 = 2.0f * M_PI * i / segments;
            float angle2 = 2.0f * M_PI * (i + 1) / segments;
            
            float px1 = x + radius * std::cos(angle1);
            float py1 = y + radius * std::sin(angle1);
            float px2 = x + radius * std::cos(angle2);
            float py2 = y + radius * std::sin(angle2);
            
            float ndcX1, ndcY1, ndcX2, ndcY2;
            screenToNDC(px1, py1, ndcX1, ndcY1);
            screenToNDC(px2, py2, ndcX2, ndcY2);
            
            m_vertices.push_back({centerX, centerY, r, g, b, a});
            m_vertices.push_back({ndcX1, ndcY1, r, g, b, a});
            m_vertices.push_back({ndcX2, ndcY2, r, g, b, a});
        }
    } else {
        if (m_currentPrimitive != PrimitiveType::Lines) {
            flush();
            m_currentPrimitive = PrimitiveType::Lines;
        }
        
        ensureCapacity(segments * 2);
        
        float r = color.r / 255.0f;
        float g = color.g / 255.0f;
        float b = color.b / 255.0f;
        float a = color.a / 255.0f;
        
        for (int i = 0; i < segments; i++) {
            float angle1 = 2.0f * M_PI * i / segments;
            float angle2 = 2.0f * M_PI * (i + 1) / segments;
            
            float px1 = x + radius * std::cos(angle1);
            float py1 = y + radius * std::sin(angle1);
            float px2 = x + radius * std::cos(angle2);
            float py2 = y + radius * std::sin(angle2);
            
            float ndcX1, ndcY1, ndcX2, ndcY2;
            screenToNDC(px1, py1, ndcX1, ndcY1);
            screenToNDC(px2, py2, ndcX2, ndcY2);
            
            m_vertices.push_back({ndcX1, ndcY1, r, g, b, a});
            m_vertices.push_back({ndcX2, ndcY2, r, g, b, a});
        }
    }
}

void RendererOpenGL::drawCircle(int x, int y, int radius, const Color& color) {
    tessellateCircle(x, y, radius, color, false);
}

void RendererOpenGL::fillCircle(int x, int y, int radius, const Color& color) {
    tessellateCircle(x, y, radius, color, true);
}

} // namespace nk

#endif // OpenGL platforms
```

```cpp
    ~RendererOpenGLES() override;
    
    // ... mêmes méthodes que RendererOpenGL ...
    
    RendererType getType() const override { return RendererType::OpenGLES; }
    const char* getName() const override { return "OpenGL ES Renderer"; }
```

La suite avec l'implémentation OpenGL ES et un exemple complet dans le prochain message ?

## RendererOpenGLES.cpp

```cpp
// renderers/RendererOpenGLES.cpp
#if defined(__ANDROID__) || defined(__EMSCRIPTEN__) || (defined(__APPLE__) && TARGET_OS_IPHONE)

#include "RendererOpenGLES.hpp"

#if defined(__ANDROID__)
    #include <GLES2/gl2.h>
    #include <GLES2/gl2ext.h>
#elif defined(__EMSCRIPTEN__)
    #include <GLES2/gl2.h>
#elif defined(__APPLE__) && TARGET_OS_IPHONE
    #include <OpenGLES/ES2/gl.h>
    #include <OpenGLES/ES2/glext.h>
#endif

#include <cmath>
#include <iostream>

namespace nk {

// Shaders GLSL ES 2.0 (compatible mobile/web)
static const char* vertexShaderSourceES = R"(
attribute vec2 aPos;
attribute vec4 aColor;

varying vec4 vertexColor;

void main() {
    gl_Position = vec4(aPos.x, aPos.y, 0.0, 1.0);
    vertexColor = aColor;
}
)";

static const char* fragmentShaderSourceES = R"(
precision mediump float;
varying vec4 vertexColor;

void main() {
    gl_FragColor = vertexColor;
}
)";

RendererOpenGLES::RendererOpenGLES(Window& window, const RendererConfig& config)
    : m_window(window)
    , m_config(config)
    , m_vao(0)
    , m_vbo(0)
    , m_shaderProgram(0)
    , m_currentPrimitive(PrimitiveType::Points) {
    
    m_vertices.reserve(MAX_VERTICES);
}

RendererOpenGLES::~RendererOpenGLES() {
    shutdown();
}

bool RendererOpenGLES::initialize() {
    setupShaders();
    setupBuffers();
    updateViewport();
    
    glEnable(GL_BLEND);
    glBlendFunc(GL_SRC_ALPHA, GL_ONE_MINUS_SRC_ALPHA);
    
    return true;
}

void RendererOpenGLES::shutdown() {
    flush();
    
    if (m_vbo) {
        glDeleteBuffers(1, &m_vbo);
        m_vbo = 0;
    }
    
    if (m_shaderProgram) {
        glDeleteProgram(m_shaderProgram);
        m_shaderProgram = 0;
    }
}

void RendererOpenGLES::setupShaders() {
    GLuint vertexShader = glCreateShader(GL_VERTEX_SHADER);
    glShaderSource(vertexShader, 1, &vertexShaderSourceES, nullptr);
    glCompileShader(vertexShader);
    
    GLint success;
    char infoLog[512];
    glGetShaderiv(vertexShader, GL_COMPILE_STATUS, &success);
    if (!success) {
        glGetShaderInfoLog(vertexShader, 512, nullptr, infoLog);
        std::cerr << "Vertex shader compilation failed: " << infoLog << std::endl;
    }
    
    GLuint fragmentShader = glCreateShader(GL_FRAGMENT_SHADER);
    glShaderSource(fragmentShader, 1, &fragmentShaderSourceES, nullptr);
    glCompileShader(fragmentShader);
    
    glGetShaderiv(fragmentShader, GL_COMPILE_STATUS, &success);
    if (!success) {
        glGetShaderInfoLog(fragmentShader, 512, nullptr, infoLog);
        std::cerr << "Fragment shader compilation failed: " << infoLog << std::endl;
    }
    
    m_shaderProgram = glCreateProgram();
    glAttachShader(m_shaderProgram, vertexShader);
    glAttachShader(m_shaderProgram, fragmentShader);
    glLinkProgram(m_shaderProgram);
    
    glGetProgramiv(m_shaderProgram, GL_LINK_STATUS, &success);
    if (!success) {
        glGetProgramInfoLog(m_shaderProgram, 512, nullptr, infoLog);
        std::cerr << "Shader program linking failed: " << infoLog << std::endl;
    }
    
    glDeleteShader(vertexShader);
    glDeleteShader(fragmentShader);
}

void RendererOpenGLES::setupBuffers() {
    glGenBuffers(1, &m_vbo);
    glBindBuffer(GL_ARRAY_BUFFER, m_vbo);
    glBufferData(GL_ARRAY_BUFFER, MAX_VERTICES * sizeof(Vertex), nullptr, GL_DYNAMIC_DRAW);
    glBindBuffer(GL_ARRAY_BUFFER, 0);
}

// ... reste des méthodes similaires à RendererOpenGL ...
// (updateViewport, screenToNDC, flush, beginFrame, endFrame, clear, present, etc.)

} // namespace nk

#endif
```

## Système de Render Commands - Architecture professionnelle

### RenderCommand.hpp - Commands pour rendu déféré

```cpp
// RenderCommand.hpp
#pragma once

#include "Renderer.hpp"
#include <memory>
#include <vector>
#include <functional>

namespace nk {

// Type de commande de rendu
enum class RenderCommandType {
    Clear,
    DrawPoint,
    DrawLine,
    DrawRect,
    FillRect,
    DrawCircle,
    FillCircle,
    DrawTriangle,
    FillTriangle,
    DrawMesh,
    SetTransform,
    PushState,
    PopState,
    Custom
};

// Structure de base pour une commande de rendu
struct RenderCommand {
    RenderCommandType type;
    
    virtual ~RenderCommand() = default;
    virtual void execute(RendererImpl* renderer) = 0;
    virtual size_t getMemorySize() const = 0;
};

// Commandes spécifiques
struct ClearCommand : public RenderCommand {
    Color color;
    
    ClearCommand(const Color& c) : color(c) {
        type = RenderCommandType::Clear;
    }
    
    void execute(RendererImpl* renderer) override {
        renderer->clear(color);
    }
    
    size_t getMemorySize() const override {
        return sizeof(ClearCommand);
    }
};

struct DrawPointCommand : public RenderCommand {
    int x, y;
    Color color;
    
    DrawPointCommand(int x, int y, const Color& c) 
        : x(x), y(y), color(c) {
        type = RenderCommandType::DrawPoint;
    }
    
    void execute(RendererImpl* renderer) override {
        renderer->drawPoint(x, y, color);
    }
    
    size_t getMemorySize() const override {
        return sizeof(DrawPointCommand);
    }
};

struct DrawLineCommand : public RenderCommand {
    int x1, y1, x2, y2;
    Color color;
    
    DrawLineCommand(int x1, int y1, int x2, int y2, const Color& c)
        : x1(x1), y1(y1), x2(x2), y2(y2), color(c) {
        type = RenderCommandType::DrawLine;
    }
    
    void execute(RendererImpl* renderer) override {
        renderer->drawLine(x1, y1, x2, y2, color);
    }
    
    size_t getMemorySize() const override {
        return sizeof(DrawLineCommand);
    }
};

struct FillRectCommand : public RenderCommand {
    Rect rect;
    Color color;
    
    FillRectCommand(const Rect& r, const Color& c)
        : rect(r), color(c) {
        type = RenderCommandType::FillRect;
    }
    
    void execute(RendererImpl* renderer) override {
        renderer->fillRect(rect, color);
    }
    
    size_t getMemorySize() const override {
        return sizeof(FillRectCommand);
    }
};

// Transformation matrix (pour 2D)
struct Transform2D {
    float matrix[6]; // 2x3 affine transform matrix
    
    Transform2D() {
        // Identity
        matrix[0] = 1; matrix[1] = 0; matrix[2] = 0;
        matrix[3] = 0; matrix[4] = 1; matrix[5] = 0;
    }
    
    void translate(float x, float y) {
        matrix[2] += x;
        matrix[5] += y;
    }
    
    void scale(float sx, float sy) {
        matrix[0] *= sx;
        matrix[4] *= sy;
    }
    
    void rotate(float angle) {
        float c = std::cos(angle);
        float s = std::sin(angle);
        float m0 = matrix[0], m1 = matrix[1];
        float m3 = matrix[3], m4 = matrix[4];
        matrix[0] = c * m0 + s * m3;
        matrix[1] = c * m1 + s * m4;
        matrix[3] = -s * m0 + c * m3;
        matrix[4] = -s * m1 + c * m4;
    }
};

struct SetTransformCommand : public RenderCommand {
    Transform2D transform;
    
    SetTransformCommand(const Transform2D& t) : transform(t) {
        type = RenderCommandType::SetTransform;
    }
    
    void execute(RendererImpl* renderer) override {
        // À implémenter dans le renderer
    }
    
    size_t getMemorySize() const override {
        return sizeof(SetTransformCommand);
    }
};

// Custom command pour extensions
struct CustomCommand : public RenderCommand {
    std::function<void(RendererImpl*)> callback;
    
    CustomCommand(std::function<void(RendererImpl*)> cb) 
        : callback(cb) {
        type = RenderCommandType::Custom;
    }
    
    void execute(RendererImpl* renderer) override {
        if (callback) {
            callback(renderer);
        }
    }
    
    size_t getMemorySize() const override {
        return sizeof(CustomCommand);
    }
};

// Command Buffer - liste de commandes à exécuter
class RenderCommandBuffer {
public:
    RenderCommandBuffer() : m_memoryUsed(0) {}
    
    ~RenderCommandBuffer() {
        clear();
    }
    
    // Ajouter une commande
    template<typename T, typename... Args>
    void addCommand(Args&&... args) {
        T* cmd = new T(std::forward<Args>(args)...);
        m_commands.push_back(std::unique_ptr<RenderCommand>(cmd));
        m_memoryUsed += cmd->getMemorySize();
    }
    
    // Exécuter toutes les commandes
    void execute(RendererImpl* renderer) {
        for (auto& cmd : m_commands) {
            cmd->execute(renderer);
        }
    }
    
    // Vider le buffer
    void clear() {
        m_commands.clear();
        m_memoryUsed = 0;
    }
    
    // Statistiques
    size_t getCommandCount() const { return m_commands.size(); }
    size_t getMemoryUsed() const { return m_memoryUsed; }
    
    // Optimisation : trier les commandes par type pour batch rendering
    void sort() {
        std::sort(m_commands.begin(), m_commands.end(),
            [](const std::unique_ptr<RenderCommand>& a, const std::unique_ptr<RenderCommand>& b) {
                return static_cast<int>(a->type) < static_cast<int>(b->type);
            });
    }
    
private:
    std::vector<std::unique_ptr<RenderCommand>> m_commands;
    size_t m_memoryUsed;
};

} // namespace nk
```

### Renderer avec Command Buffer

```cpp
// Renderer.hpp (ajouts)
namespace nk {

class Renderer {
public:
    // ... méthodes existantes ...
    
    // Mode de rendu
    enum class RenderMode {
        Immediate,  // Rendu immédiat (appels directs)
        Deferred    // Rendu déféré (command buffer)
    };
    
    void setRenderMode(RenderMode mode);
    RenderMode getRenderMode() const { return m_renderMode; }
    
    // Command buffer API
    RenderCommandBuffer& getCommandBuffer() { return m_commandBuffer; }
    void executeCommandBuffer();
    void clearCommandBuffer();
    
    // Helpers pour ajouter des commandes
    void submitClear(const Color& color);
    void submitDrawLine(int x1, int y1, int x2, int y2, const Color& color);
    void submitFillRect(const Rect& rect, const Color& color);
    // ... autres méthodes submit ...
    
private:
    RenderMode m_renderMode;
    RenderCommandBuffer m_commandBuffer;
};

} // namespace nk
```

### Architecture avancée - Support pour Ray Tracing, Rasterization, etc.

```cpp
// AdvancedRenderer.hpp
#pragma once

#include "Renderer.hpp"
#include <vector>
#include <memory>

namespace nk {

// ====================================================================
// STRUCTURES DE DONNÉES GÉOMÉTRIQUES
// ====================================================================

struct Vertex3D {
    float x, y, z;       // Position
    float nx, ny, nz;    // Normal
    float u, v;          // UV coordinates
    float r, g, b, a;    // Color
};

struct Triangle {
    Vertex3D vertices[3];
};

struct Mesh {
    std::vector<Vertex3D> vertices;
    std::vector<uint32_t> indices;
    
    // Bounding box pour culling
    struct BoundingBox {
        float minX, minY, minZ;
        float maxX, maxY, maxZ;
    } boundingBox;
};

// ====================================================================
// MATÉRIAUX
// ====================================================================

enum class MaterialType {
    Diffuse,
    Specular,
    Emissive,
    PBR
};

struct Material {
    MaterialType type;
    Color albedo;
    float roughness;
    float metallic;
    float emission;
    
    Material() 
        : type(MaterialType::Diffuse)
        , albedo(255, 255, 255, 255)
        , roughness(0.5f)
        , metallic(0.0f)
        , emission(0.0f) {}
};

// ====================================================================
// CAMÉRA
// ====================================================================

struct Camera {
    float posX, posY, posZ;
    float targetX, targetY, targetZ;
    float upX, upY, upZ;
    float fov;
    float aspectRatio;
    float nearPlane;
    float farPlane;
    
    Camera() 
        : posX(0), posY(0), posZ(5)
        , targetX(0), targetY(0), targetZ(0)
        , upX(0), upY(1), upZ(0)
        , fov(60.0f)
        , aspectRatio(16.0f/9.0f)
        , nearPlane(0.1f)
        , farPlane(1000.0f) {}
};

// ====================================================================
// LUMIÈRES
// ====================================================================

enum class LightType {
    Point,
    Directional,
    Spot,
    Area
};

struct Light {
    LightType type;
    float posX, posY, posZ;
    float dirX, dirY, dirZ;
    Color color;
    float intensity;
    float radius;
    
    Light()
        : type(LightType::Point)
        , posX(0), posY(10), posZ(0)
        , dirX(0), dirY(-1), dirZ(0)
        , color(255, 255, 255, 255)
        , intensity(1.0f)
        , radius(10.0f) {}
};

// ====================================================================
// PIPELINE DE RENDU
// ====================================================================

// Interface pour différents pipelines de rendu
class RenderPipeline {
public:
    virtual ~RenderPipeline() = default;
    
    virtual void setup(int width, int height) = 0;
    virtual void render(const Camera& camera, 
                       const std::vector<Mesh>& meshes,
                       const std::vector<Light>& lights) = 0;
    virtual void* getFramebuffer() = 0;
    virtual const char* getName() const = 0;
};

// ====================================================================
// SOFTWARE RASTERIZER (À implémenter par les étudiants)
// ====================================================================

class SoftwareRasterizer : public RenderPipeline {
public:
    SoftwareRasterizer();
    ~SoftwareRasterizer() override;
    
    void setup(int width, int height) override;
    void render(const Camera& camera,
               const std::vector<Mesh>& meshes,
               const std::vector<Light>& lights) override;
    void* getFramebuffer() override;
    const char* getName() const override { return "Software Rasterizer"; }
    
    // Méthodes à implémenter par les étudiants
    void setPixel(int x, int y, const Color& color);
    void drawTriangle(const Vertex3D& v0, const Vertex3D& v1, const Vertex3D& v2);
    void drawWireframeTriangle(const Vertex3D& v0, const Vertex3D& v1, const Vertex3D& v2);
    
    // Z-buffer
    void clearDepthBuffer();
    bool depthTest(int x, int y, float depth);
    
    // Transformation pipeline
    void projectVertex(const Vertex3D& vertex, float& screenX, float& screenY, float& depth);
    
    // Shader simulation (à étendre par les étudiants)
    Color vertexShader(const Vertex3D& vertex);
    Color fragmentShader(const Vertex3D& interpolated, const Material& material);
    
private:
    int m_width, m_height;
    std::vector<uint32_t> m_framebuffer;
    std::vector<float> m_depthBuffer;
    Camera m_camera;
};

// ====================================================================
// RAY TRACER (À implémenter par les étudiants)
// ====================================================================

struct Ray {
    float originX, originY, originZ;
    float dirX, dirY, dirZ;
};

struct HitInfo {
    bool hit;
    float t;
    float hitX, hitY, hitZ;
    float normalX, normalY, normalZ;
    Material material;
};

class SoftwareRayTracer : public RenderPipeline {
public:
    SoftwareRayTracer();
    ~SoftwareRayTracer() override;
    
    void setup(int width, int height) override;
    void render(const Camera& camera,
               const std::vector<Mesh>& meshes,
               const std::vector<Light>& lights) override;
    void* getFramebuffer() override;
    const char* getName() const override { return "Software Ray Tracer"; }
    
    // Méthodes à implémenter par les étudiants
    Ray generateRay(int x, int y);
    HitInfo traceRay(const Ray& ray, const std::vector<Mesh>& meshes);
    bool intersectTriangle(const Ray& ray, const Triangle& tri, float& t);
    Color shade(const HitInfo& hit, const std::vector<Light>& lights);
    Color traceRecursive(const Ray& ray, int depth);
    
    // Configuration
    void setMaxBounces(int bounces) { m_maxBounces = bounces; }
    void setSamplesPerPixel(int samples) { m_samplesPerPixel = samples; }
    
private:
    int m_width, m_height;
    std::vector<uint32_t> m_framebuffer;
    Camera m_camera;
    int m_maxBounces;
    int m_samplesPerPixel;
};

// ====================================================================
// OPENGL PIPELINE (Utilise OpenGL pour le rendu)
// ====================================================================

class OpenGLPipeline : public RenderPipeline {
public:
    OpenGLPipeline();
    ~OpenGLPipeline() override;
    
    void setup(int width, int height) override;
    void render(const Camera& camera,
               const std::vector<Mesh>& meshes,
               const std::vector<Light>& lights) override;
    void* getFramebuffer() override;
    const char* getName() const override { return "OpenGL Pipeline"; }
    
private:
    void setupShaders();
    void uploadMesh(const Mesh& mesh);
    void setUniforms(const Camera& camera, const std::vector<Light>& lights);
    
    unsigned int m_shaderProgram;
    unsigned int m_fbo;
    unsigned int m_colorTexture;
    unsigned int m_depthTexture;
    int m_width, m_height;
};

// ====================================================================
// VULKAN PIPELINE (À implémenter)
// ====================================================================

class VulkanPipeline : public RenderPipeline {
public:
    VulkanPipeline();
    ~VulkanPipeline() override;
    
    void setup(int width, int height) override;
    void render(const Camera& camera,
               const std::vector<Mesh>& meshes,
               const std::vector<Light>& lights) override;
    void* getFramebuffer() override;
    const char* getName() const override { return "Vulkan Pipeline"; }
    
private:
    // Vulkan objects à initialiser
    // VkInstance, VkDevice, VkQueue, VkSwapchain, etc.
};

// ====================================================================
// RENDERER AVANCÉ
// ====================================================================

class AdvancedRenderer {
public:
    AdvancedRenderer(Window& window);
    ~AdvancedRenderer();
    
    // Sélection du pipeline
    void setPipeline(std::unique_ptr<RenderPipeline> pipeline);
    RenderPipeline* getPipeline() { return m_pipeline.get(); }
    
    // Gestion de la scène
    void setCamera(const Camera& camera) { m_camera = camera; }
    const Camera& getCamera() const { return m_camera; }
    
    void addMesh(const Mesh& mesh) { m_meshes.push_back(mesh); }
    void clearMeshes() { m_meshes.clear(); }
    
    void addLight(const Light& light) { m_lights.push_back(light); }
    void clearLights() { m_lights.clear(); }
    
    // Rendu
    void render();
    void present();
    
    // Helpers pour créer des meshes de base
    static Mesh createCube(float size);
    static Mesh createSphere(float radius, int segments);
    static Mesh createPlane(float width, float height);
    
private:
    Window& m_window;
    std::unique_ptr<RenderPipeline> m_pipeline;
    
    Camera m_camera;
    std::vector<Mesh> m_meshes;
    std::vector<Light> m_lights;
};

} // namespace nk
```

### Implémentation du Software Rasterizer (squelette pour étudiants)

```cpp
// renderers/SoftwareRasterizer.cpp
#include "AdvancedRenderer.hpp"
#include <algorithm>
#include <cmath>
#include <limits>

namespace nk {

SoftwareRasterizer::SoftwareRasterizer()
    : m_width(0), m_height(0) {
}

SoftwareRasterizer::~SoftwareRasterizer() = default;

void SoftwareRasterizer::setup(int width, int height) {
    m_width = width;
    m_height = height;
    
    m_framebuffer.resize(width * height);
    m_depthBuffer.resize(width * height);
    
    clearDepthBuffer();
}

void SoftwareRasterizer::clearDepthBuffer() {
    std::fill(m_depthBuffer.begin(), m_depthBuffer.end(), 
              std::numeric_limits<float>::infinity());
}

bool SoftwareRasterizer::depthTest(int x, int y, float depth) {
    if (x < 0 || x >= m_width || y < 0 || y >= m_height) {
        return false;
    }
    
    int index = y * m_width + x;
    
    if (depth < m_depthBuffer[index]) {
        m_depthBuffer[index] = depth;
        return true;
    }
    
    return false;
}

void SoftwareRasterizer::setPixel(int x, int y, const Color& color) {
    if (x < 0 || x >= m_width || y < 0 || y >= m_height) {
        return;
    }
    
    int index = y * m_width + x;
    m_framebuffer[index] = (color.a << 24) | (color.b << 16) | 
                           (color.g << 8) | color.r;
}

void SoftwareRasterizer::projectVertex(const Vertex3D& vertex, 
                                       float& screenX, float& screenY, float& depth) {
    // TODO: À implémenter par les étudiants
    // 1. Transformation World -> View (camera matrix)
    // 2. Transformation View -> Clip (projection matrix)
    // 3. Perspective divide
    // 4. Viewport transformation
    
    // Exemple simplifié (projection orthographique):
    screenX = (vertex.x + 1.0f) * 0.5f * m_width;
    screenY = (1.0f - vertex.y) * 0.5f * m_height;
    depth = vertex.z;
}

void SoftwareRasterizer::drawTriangle(const Vertex3D& v0, 
                                      const Vertex3D& v1, 
                                      const Vertex3D& v2) {
    // TODO: À implémenter par les étudiants
    // Algorithme de rasterisation de triangles
    
    // 1. Projeter les 3 vertices
    float x0, y0, d0;
    float x1, y1, d1;
    float x2, y2, d2;
    
    projectVertex(v0, x0, y0, d0);
    projectVertex(v1, x1, y1, d1);
    projectVertex(v2, x2, y2, d2);
    
    // 2. Trouver la bounding box
    int minX = std::max(0, (int)std::min({x0, x1, x2}));
    int maxX = std::min(m_width - 1, (int)std::max({x0, x1, x2}));
    int minY = std::max(0, (int)std::min({y0, y1, y2}));
    int maxY = std::min(m_height - 1, (int)std::max({y0, y1, y2}));
    
    // 3. Pour chaque pixel dans la bounding box
    for (int y = minY; y <= maxY; y++) {
        for (int x = minX; x <= maxX; x++) {
            // TODO: Tester si le point est dans le triangle (barycentric coordinates)
            // TODO: Interpoler les attributs (couleur, UV, normales)
            // TODO: Depth test
            // TODO: Fragment shader
            // TODO: setPixel
        }
    }
}

void SoftwareRasterizer::render(const Camera& camera,
                                const std::vector<Mesh>& meshes,
                                const std::vector<Light>& lights) {
    m_camera = camera;
    
    // Clear framebuffer
    std::fill(m_framebuffer.begin(), m_framebuffer.end(), 0xFF000000);
    clearDepthBuffer();
    
    // Pour chaque mesh
    for (const auto& mesh : meshes) {
        // Pour chaque triangle
        for (size_t i = 0; i < mesh.indices.size(); i += 3) {
            const Vertex3D& v0 = mesh.vertices[mesh.indices[i]];
            const Vertex3D& v1 = mesh.vertices[mesh.indices[i + 1]];
            const Vertex3D& v2 = mesh.vertices[mesh.indices[i + 2]];
            
            drawTriangle(v0, v1, v2);
        }
    }
}

void* SoftwareRasterizer::getFramebuffer() {
    return m_framebuffer.data();
}

Color SoftwareRasterizer::vertexShader(const Vertex3D& vertex) {
    // TODO: À implémenter par les étudiants
    // Transformation et calculs au niveau des vertices
    return Color(vertex.r * 255, vertex.g * 255, vertex.b * 255, vertex.a * 255);
}

Color SoftwareRasterizer::fragmentShader(const Vertex3D& interpolated, 
                                         const Material& material) {
    // TODO: À implémenter par les étudiants
    // Calcul de l'éclairage, texturing, etc.
    return Color(material.albedo.r, material.albedo.g, 
                material.albedo.b, material.albedo.a);
}

} // namespace nk
```

Continuons avec l'exemple complet d'utilisation et le Ray Tracer ?

## Software Ray Tracer - Implémentation complète

```cpp
// renderers/SoftwareRayTracer.cpp
#include "AdvancedRenderer.hpp"
#include <algorithm>
#include <cmath>
#include <limits>
#include <random>

namespace nk {

SoftwareRayTracer::SoftwareRayTracer()
    : m_width(0)
    , m_height(0)
    , m_maxBounces(5)
    , m_samplesPerPixel(1) {
}

SoftwareRayTracer::~SoftwareRayTracer() = default;

void SoftwareRayTracer::setup(int width, int height) {
    m_width = width;
    m_height = height;
    m_framebuffer.resize(width * height);
}

// Générer un rayon depuis la caméra vers un pixel
Ray SoftwareRayTracer::generateRay(int x, int y) {
    // TODO: À implémenter par les étudiants
    // Calcul du rayon en fonction de la position du pixel et de la caméra
    
    Ray ray;
    
    // Normaliser les coordonnées de l'écran [-1, 1]
    float ndcX = (2.0f * x / m_width) - 1.0f;
    float ndcY = 1.0f - (2.0f * y / m_height);
    
    // Appliquer le field of view et l'aspect ratio
    float aspectRatio = static_cast<float>(m_width) / m_height;
    float fovScale = std::tan(m_camera.fov * 0.5f * M_PI / 180.0f);
    
    float viewX = ndcX * aspectRatio * fovScale;
    float viewY = ndcY * fovScale;
    
    // Direction du rayon (caméra -> pixel)
    // Simplifié : caméra regarde vers -Z
    ray.originX = m_camera.posX;
    ray.originY = m_camera.posY;
    ray.originZ = m_camera.posZ;
    
    // Vecteur direction (non normalisé pour l'instant)
    float dirX = viewX;
    float dirY = viewY;
    float dirZ = -1.0f;
    
    // Normaliser la direction
    float length = std::sqrt(dirX * dirX + dirY * dirY + dirZ * dirZ);
    ray.dirX = dirX / length;
    ray.dirY = dirY / length;
    ray.dirZ = dirZ / length;
    
    return ray;
}

// Test d'intersection rayon-triangle (algorithme Möller-Trumbore)
bool SoftwareRayTracer::intersectTriangle(const Ray& ray, const Triangle& tri, float& t) {
    // TODO: À implémenter par les étudiants
    // Algorithme de Möller-Trumbore pour intersection rayon-triangle
    
    const float EPSILON = 0.0000001f;
    
    const Vertex3D& v0 = tri.vertices[0];
    const Vertex3D& v1 = tri.vertices[1];
    const Vertex3D& v2 = tri.vertices[2];
    
    // Arêtes du triangle
    float edge1X = v1.x - v0.x;
    float edge1Y = v1.y - v0.y;
    float edge1Z = v1.z - v0.z;
    
    float edge2X = v2.x - v0.x;
    float edge2Y = v2.y - v0.y;
    float edge2Z = v2.z - v0.z;
    
    // Produit vectoriel: ray.dir × edge2
    float hX = ray.dirY * edge2Z - ray.dirZ * edge2Y;
    float hY = ray.dirZ * edge2X - ray.dirX * edge2Z;
    float hZ = ray.dirX * edge2Y - ray.dirY * edge2X;
    
    // Produit scalaire: edge1 · h
    float a = edge1X * hX + edge1Y * hY + edge1Z * hZ;
    
    // Le rayon est parallèle au triangle
    if (a > -EPSILON && a < EPSILON) {
        return false;
    }
    
    float f = 1.0f / a;
    
    // Vecteur de l'origine du rayon au premier vertex
    float sX = ray.originX - v0.x;
    float sY = ray.originY - v0.y;
    float sZ = ray.originZ - v0.z;
    
    // Première coordonnée barycentrique
    float u = f * (sX * hX + sY * hY + sZ * hZ);
    
    if (u < 0.0f || u > 1.0f) {
        return false;
    }
    
    // Produit vectoriel: s × edge1
    float qX = sY * edge1Z - sZ * edge1Y;
    float qY = sZ * edge1X - sX * edge1Z;
    float qZ = sX * edge1Y - sY * edge1X;
    
    // Deuxième coordonnée barycentrique
    float v = f * (ray.dirX * qX + ray.dirY * qY + ray.dirZ * qZ);
    
    if (v < 0.0f || u + v > 1.0f) {
        return false;
    }
    
    // Distance le long du rayon
    t = f * (edge2X * qX + edge2Y * qY + edge2Z * qZ);
    
    return t > EPSILON;
}

// Tracer un rayon et trouver la première intersection
HitInfo SoftwareRayTracer::traceRay(const Ray& ray, const std::vector<Mesh>& meshes) {
    // TODO: À implémenter par les étudiants
    // Trouver l'intersection la plus proche avec la scène
    
    HitInfo closestHit;
    closestHit.hit = false;
    closestHit.t = std::numeric_limits<float>::infinity();
    
    // Pour chaque mesh
    for (const auto& mesh : meshes) {
        // Pour chaque triangle
        for (size_t i = 0; i < mesh.indices.size(); i += 3) {
            Triangle tri;
            tri.vertices[0] = mesh.vertices[mesh.indices[i]];
            tri.vertices[1] = mesh.vertices[mesh.indices[i + 1]];
            tri.vertices[2] = mesh.vertices[mesh.indices[i + 2]];
            
            float t;
            if (intersectTriangle(ray, tri, t)) {
                if (t < closestHit.t) {
                    closestHit.hit = true;
                    closestHit.t = t;
                    
                    // Position de l'intersection
                    closestHit.hitX = ray.originX + ray.dirX * t;
                    closestHit.hitY = ray.originY + ray.dirY * t;
                    closestHit.hitZ = ray.originZ + ray.dirZ * t;
                    
                    // Calculer la normale du triangle
                    const Vertex3D& v0 = tri.vertices[0];
                    const Vertex3D& v1 = tri.vertices[1];
                    const Vertex3D& v2 = tri.vertices[2];
                    
                    float edge1X = v1.x - v0.x;
                    float edge1Y = v1.y - v0.y;
                    float edge1Z = v1.z - v0.z;
                    
                    float edge2X = v2.x - v0.x;
                    float edge2Y = v2.y - v0.y;
                    float edge2Z = v2.z - v0.z;
                    
                    // Produit vectoriel pour la normale
                    float normalX = edge1Y * edge2Z - edge1Z * edge2Y;
                    float normalY = edge1Z * edge2X - edge1X * edge2Z;
                    float normalZ = edge1X * edge2Y - edge1Y * edge2X;
                    
                    // Normaliser
                    float length = std::sqrt(normalX * normalX + normalY * normalY + normalZ * normalZ);
                    closestHit.normalX = normalX / length;
                    closestHit.normalY = normalY / length;
                    closestHit.normalZ = normalZ / length;
                    
                    // TODO: Interpoler les attributs (couleur, matériau)
                    closestHit.material = Material(); // Matériau par défaut
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    return closestHit;
}

// Calcul de l'éclairage (Phong shading simplifié)
Color SoftwareRayTracer::shade(const HitInfo& hit, const std::vector<Light>& lights) {
    // TODO: À implémenter par les étudiants
    // Modèle d'éclairage de Phong (ambient + diffuse + specular)
    
    if (!hit.hit) {
        // Couleur de fond (ciel)
        return Color(135, 206, 235, 255); // Sky blue
    }
    
    // Lumière ambiante
    float ambientR = 0.1f;
    float ambientG = 0.1f;
    float ambientB = 0.1f;
    
    // Couleur diffuse
    float diffuseR = 0.0f;
    float diffuseG = 0.0f;
    float diffuseB = 0.0f;
    
    // Couleur spéculaire
    float specularR = 0.0f;
    float specularG = 0.0f;
    float specularB = 0.0f;
    
    // Pour chaque lumière
    for (const auto& light : lights) {
        // Direction vers la lumière
        float lightDirX = light.posX - hit.hitX;
        float lightDirY = light.posY - hit.hitY;
        float lightDirZ = light.posZ - hit.hitZ;
        
        float distance = std::sqrt(lightDirX * lightDirX + 
                                  lightDirY * lightDirY + 
                                  lightDirZ * lightDirZ);
        
        lightDirX /= distance;
        lightDirY /= distance;
        lightDirZ /= distance;
        
        // TODO: Shadow ray (vérifier si la lumière est occluse)
        
        // Composante diffuse (Lambert)
        float dotNL = std::max(0.0f, hit.normalX * lightDirX + 
                                     hit.normalY * lightDirY + 
                                     hit.normalZ * lightDirZ);
        
        float attenuation = 1.0f / (1.0f + distance * distance * 0.01f);
        float intensity = light.intensity * attenuation;
        
        diffuseR += dotNL * (light.color.r / 255.0f) * intensity;
        diffuseG += dotNL * (light.color.g / 255.0f) * intensity;
        diffuseB += dotNL * (light.color.b / 255.0f) * intensity;
        
        // TODO: Composante spéculaire (Phong ou Blinn-Phong)
    }
    
    // Combiner les composantes
    float finalR = (ambientR + diffuseR + specularR) * (hit.material.albedo.r / 255.0f);
    float finalG = (ambientG + diffuseG + specularG) * (hit.material.albedo.g / 255.0f);
    float finalB = (ambientB + diffuseB + specularB) * (hit.material.albedo.b / 255.0f);
    
    // Clamper les valeurs
    finalR = std::min(1.0f, std::max(0.0f, finalR));
    finalG = std::min(1.0f, std::max(0.0f, finalG));
    finalB = std::min(1.0f, std::max(0.0f, finalB));
    
    return Color(finalR * 255, finalG * 255, finalB * 255, 255);
}

// Tracing récursif pour les réflexions
Color SoftwareRayTracer::traceRecursive(const Ray& ray, int depth) {
    // TODO: À implémenter par les étudiants
    // Tracer avec réflexions et réfractions
    
    if (depth <= 0) {
        return Color(0, 0, 0, 255);
    }
    
    // Tracer le rayon principal
    // HitInfo hit = traceRay(ray, meshes);
    
    // Si intersection
    // - Calculer l'éclairage direct
    // - Si matériau réfléchissant, lancer un rayon réfléchi
    // - Si matériau transparent, lancer un rayon réfracté
    // - Combiner les couleurs
    
    return Color(0, 0, 0, 255);
}

void SoftwareRayTracer::render(const Camera& camera,
                               const std::vector<Mesh>& meshes,
                               const std::vector<Light>& lights) {
    m_camera = camera;
    
    // Random number generator pour anti-aliasing
    std::random_device rd;
    std::mt19937 gen(rd());
    std::uniform_real_distribution<float> dis(0.0f, 1.0f);
    
    // Pour chaque pixel
    for (int y = 0; y < m_height; y++) {
        for (int x = 0; x < m_width; x++) {
            float accumR = 0.0f;
            float accumG = 0.0f;
            float accumB = 0.0f;
            
            // Multi-sampling pour anti-aliasing
            for (int s = 0; s < m_samplesPerPixel; s++) {
                // Offset aléatoire pour le jittering
                float offsetX = (m_samplesPerPixel > 1) ? dis(gen) : 0.5f;
                float offsetY = (m_samplesPerPixel > 1) ? dis(gen) : 0.5f;
                
                Ray ray = generateRay(x + offsetX, y + offsetY);
                HitInfo hit = traceRay(ray, meshes);
                Color pixelColor = shade(hit, lights);
                
                accumR += pixelColor.r / 255.0f;
                accumG += pixelColor.g / 255.0f;
                accumB += pixelColor.b / 255.0f;
            }
            
            // Moyenne des samples
            accumR /= m_samplesPerPixel;
            accumG /= m_samplesPerPixel;
            accumB /= m_samplesPerPixel;
            
            // Gamma correction
            accumR = std::pow(accumR, 1.0f / 2.2f);
            accumG = std::pow(accumG, 1.0f / 2.2f);
            accumB = std::pow(accumB, 1.0f / 2.2f);
            
            Color finalColor(accumR * 255, accumG * 255, accumB * 255, 255);
            
            int index = y * m_width + x;
            m_framebuffer[index] = (finalColor.a << 24) | (finalColor.b << 16) | 
                                  (finalColor.g << 8) | finalColor.r;
        }
        
        // Progress indicator (optionnel)
        if (y % 10 == 0) {
            float progress = (y / static_cast<float>(m_height)) * 100.0f;
            // std::cout << "Ray tracing progress: " << progress << "%" << std::endl;
        }
    }
}

void* SoftwareRayTracer::getFramebuffer() {
    return m_framebuffer.data();
}

} // namespace nk
```

## AdvancedRenderer.cpp - Implémentation

```cpp
// renderers/AdvancedRenderer.cpp
#include "AdvancedRenderer.hpp"
#include <cmath>

namespace nk {

AdvancedRenderer::AdvancedRenderer(Window& window)
    : m_window(window) {
}

AdvancedRenderer::~AdvancedRenderer() = default;

void AdvancedRenderer::setPipeline(std::unique_ptr<RenderPipeline> pipeline) {
    m_pipeline = std::move(pipeline);
    if (m_pipeline) {
        m_pipeline->setup(m_window.getWidth(), m_window.getHeight());
    }
}

void AdvancedRenderer::render() {
    if (m_pipeline) {
        m_pipeline->render(m_camera, m_meshes, m_lights);
    }
}

void AdvancedRenderer::present() {
    if (m_pipeline) {
        // Copier le framebuffer du pipeline vers la fenêtre
        void* framebuffer = m_pipeline->getFramebuffer();
        
        // TODO: Afficher le framebuffer
```
