# Implémentations Complètes avec Propriétés Étendues

## 1. Error.cpp - Implémentation

```cpp
// Error.cpp
#include "Error.hpp"
#include <iostream>
#include <iomanip>
#include <ctime>

namespace nk {

const char* Error::severityString() const {
    switch (severity) {
        case ErrorSeverity::Info: return "INFO";
        case ErrorSeverity::Warning: return "WARNING";
        case ErrorSeverity::Error: return "ERROR";
        case ErrorSeverity::Fatal: return "FATAL";
        default: return "UNKNOWN";
    }
}

const char* Error::categoryString() const {
    switch (category) {
        case ErrorCategory::None: return "None";
        case ErrorCategory::Window: return "Window";
        case ErrorCategory::Renderer: return "Renderer";
        case ErrorCategory::Input: return "Input";
        case ErrorCategory::Graphics: return "Graphics";
        case ErrorCategory::System: return "System";
        case ErrorCategory::Memory: return "Memory";
        case ErrorCategory::FileIO: return "FileIO";
        case ErrorCategory::Network: return "Network";
        case ErrorCategory::Shader: return "Shader";
        case ErrorCategory::Platform: return "Platform";
        default: return "Unknown";
    }
}

std::string Error::toString() const {
    std::ostringstream oss;
    
    // Format: [SEVERITY][CATEGORY] Message (file:line in function)
    oss << "[" << severityString() << "][" << categoryString() << "] ";
    oss << message;
    
    if (!file.empty()) {
        oss << " (" << file;
        if (line > 0) {
            oss << ":" << line;
        }
        if (!function.empty()) {
            oss << " in " << function;
        }
        oss << ")";
    }
    
    if (errorCode != 0) {
        oss << " [Code: " << errorCode << "]";
    }
    
    return oss.str();
}

// ====================================================================
// ERROR MANAGER
// ====================================================================

ErrorManager& ErrorManager::instance() {
    static ErrorManager instance;
    return instance;
}

ErrorManager::ErrorManager()
    : m_maxErrors(1000)
    , m_loggingEnabled(true) {
}

void ErrorManager::pushError(const Error& error) {
    // Limiter le nombre d'erreurs stockées
    if (m_errors.size() >= m_maxErrors) {
        m_errors.erase(m_errors.begin());
    }
    
    m_errors.push_back(error);
    
    // Log si activé
    if (m_loggingEnabled) {
        std::cerr << error.toString() << std::endl;
    }
    
    // Callback personnalisé
    if (m_logCallback) {
        m_logCallback(error);
    }
}

Error ErrorManager::getLastError() const {
    if (m_errors.empty()) {
        return Error();
    }
    return m_errors.back();
}

bool ErrorManager::hasErrors() const {
    return !m_errors.empty();
}

bool ErrorManager::hasErrors(ErrorSeverity minSeverity) const {
    for (const auto& error : m_errors) {
        if (error.severity >= minSeverity) {
            return true;
        }
    }
    return false;
}

bool ErrorManager::hasErrors(ErrorCategory category) const {
    for (const auto& error : m_errors) {
        if (error.category == category) {
            return true;
        }
    }
    return false;
}

void ErrorManager::clearErrors() {
    m_errors.clear();
}

void ErrorManager::clearErrors(ErrorCategory category) {
    m_errors.erase(
        std::remove_if(m_errors.begin(), m_errors.end(),
            [category](const Error& e) { return e.category == category; }),
        m_errors.end()
    );
}

void ErrorManager::printErrors() const {
    for (const auto& error : m_errors) {
        std::cout << error.toString() << std::endl;
    }
}

} // namespace nk
```

## 2. Event.cpp - Implémentation

```cpp
// Event.cpp
#include "Event.hpp"
#include <sstream>

namespace nk {

// ====================================================================
// EVENT BASE
// ====================================================================

std::string Event::toString() const {
    std::ostringstream oss;
    oss << "Event[type=" << static_cast<int>(m_type);
    if (m_window) {
        oss << ", window=" << m_window->getId();
    }
    oss << "]";
    return oss.str();
}

// ====================================================================
// WINDOW EVENT
// ====================================================================

std::string WindowEvent::toString() const {
    std::ostringstream oss;
    oss << "WindowEvent[type=" << static_cast<int>(m_type);
    
    switch (m_type) {
        case EventType::WindowResized:
            oss << ", size=" << m_data.width << "x" << m_data.height;
            break;
        case EventType::WindowMoved:
            oss << ", pos=" << m_data.x << "," << m_data.y;
            break;
        default:
            break;
    }
    
    if (m_window) {
        oss << ", window=" << m_window->getId();
    }
    oss << "]";
    return oss.str();
}

// ====================================================================
// KEY EVENT
// ====================================================================

std::string KeyEvent::toString() const {
    std::ostringstream oss;
    oss << "KeyEvent[type=" << static_cast<int>(m_type);
    oss << ", key=" << static_cast<int>(m_data.code);
    
    if (m_data.alt) oss << ", Alt";
    if (m_data.control) oss << ", Ctrl";
    if (m_data.shift) oss << ", Shift";
    if (m_data.system) oss << ", System";
    if (m_data.repeat) oss << ", Repeat";
    
    if (m_window) {
        oss << ", window=" << m_window->getId();
    }
    oss << "]";
    return oss.str();
}

// ====================================================================
// TEXT EVENT
// ====================================================================

std::string TextEvent::getUTF8() const {
    std::string result;
    uint32_t unicode = m_data.unicode;
    
    if (unicode < 0x80) {
        result += static_cast<char>(unicode);
    } else if (unicode < 0x800) {
        result += static_cast<char>(0xC0 | (unicode >> 6));
        result += static_cast<char>(0x80 | (unicode & 0x3F));
    } else if (unicode < 0x10000) {
        result += static_cast<char>(0xE0 | (unicode >> 12));
        result += static_cast<char>(0x80 | ((unicode >> 6) & 0x3F));
        result += static_cast<char>(0x80 | (unicode & 0x3F));
    } else {
        result += static_cast<char>(0xF0 | (unicode >> 18));
        result += static_cast<char>(0x80 | ((unicode >> 12) & 0x3F));
        result += static_cast<char>(0x80 | ((unicode >> 6) & 0x3F));
        result += static_cast<char>(0x80 | (unicode & 0x3F));
    }
    
    return result;
}

std::string TextEvent::toString() const {
    std::ostringstream oss;
    oss << "TextEvent[unicode=" << m_data.unicode;
    oss << ", char='" << getUTF8() << "'";
    if (m_window) {
        oss << ", window=" << m_window->getId();
    }
    oss << "]";
    return oss.str();
}

// ====================================================================
// MOUSE MOVE EVENT
// ====================================================================

std::string MouseMoveEvent::toString() const {
    std::ostringstream oss;
    oss << "MouseMoveEvent[pos=" << m_data.x << "," << m_data.y;
    oss << ", delta=" << m_data.deltaX << "," << m_data.deltaY;
    if (m_window) {
        oss << ", window=" << m_window->getId();
    }
    oss << "]";
    return oss.str();
}

// ====================================================================
// MOUSE BUTTON EVENT
// ====================================================================

std::string MouseButtonEvent::toString() const {
    std::ostringstream oss;
    oss << "MouseButtonEvent[type=" << static_cast<int>(m_type);
    oss << ", button=" << static_cast<int>(m_data.button);
    oss << ", pos=" << m_data.x << "," << m_data.y;
    oss << ", clicks=" << m_data.clickCount;
    if (m_window) {
        oss << ", window=" << m_window->getId();
    }
    oss << "]";
    return oss.str();
}

// ====================================================================
// MOUSE SCROLL EVENT
// ====================================================================

std::string MouseScrollEvent::toString() const {
    std::ostringstream oss;
    oss << "MouseScrollEvent[delta=" << m_data.deltaX << "," << m_data.deltaY;
    oss << ", pos=" << m_data.x << "," << m_data.y;
    if (m_window) {
        oss << ", window=" << m_window->getId();
    }
    oss << "]";
    return oss.str();
}

// ====================================================================
// TOUCH EVENT
// ====================================================================

std::string TouchEvent::toString() const {
    std::ostringstream oss;
    oss << "TouchEvent[type=" << static_cast<int>(m_type);
    oss << ", id=" << m_data.touchId;
    oss << ", pos=" << m_data.x << "," << m_data.y;
    oss << ", pressure=" << m_data.pressure;
    if (m_window) {
        oss << ", window=" << m_window->getId();
    }
    oss << "]";
    return oss.str();
}

// ====================================================================
// EVENT DISPATCHER
// ====================================================================

void EventDispatcher::push(std::unique_ptr<Event> event) {
    m_events.push_back(std::move(event));
}

std::unique_ptr<Event> EventDispatcher::poll() {
    if (m_events.empty()) {
        return nullptr;
    }
    
    auto event = std::move(m_events.front());
    m_events.erase(m_events.begin());
    return event;
}

bool EventDispatcher::hasEvents() const {
    return !m_events.empty();
}

size_t EventDispatcher::getEventCount() const {
    return m_events.size();
}

void EventDispatcher::clear() {
    m_events.clear();
}

std::vector<Event*> EventDispatcher::filterByType(EventType type) {
    std::vector<Event*> result;
    for (auto& event : m_events) {
        if (event->getType() == type) {
            result.push_back(event.get());
        }
    }
    return result;
}

std::vector<Event*> EventDispatcher::filterByWindow(Window* window) {
    std::vector<Event*> result;
    for (auto& event : m_events) {
        if (event->getWindow() == window) {
            result.push_back(event.get());
        }
    }
    return result;
}

// ====================================================================
// EVENT MANAGER
// ====================================================================

EventManager& EventManager::instance() {
    static EventManager instance;
    return instance;
}

void EventManager::pushEvent(std::unique_ptr<Event> event) {
    // Appeler le callback si présent
    if (m_callback && event) {
        m_callback(*event);
    }
    
    m_dispatcher.push(std::move(event));
}

std::unique_ptr<Event> EventManager::pollEvent() {
    return m_dispatcher.poll();
}

bool EventManager::hasEvents() const {
    return m_dispatcher.hasEvents();
}

} // namespace nk
```

## 3. WindowConfig.hpp - Configuration Étendue

```cpp
// WindowConfig.hpp
#pragma once

#include <string>
#include <cstdint>

namespace nk {

// ====================================================================
// STYLE DE FENÊTRE (FLAGS)
// ====================================================================

enum class WindowStyle : uint32_t {
    None = 0,
    Titlebar = 1 << 0,      // Barre de titre
    Resize = 1 << 1,        // Redimensionnable
    Close = 1 << 2,         // Bouton fermer
    Minimize = 1 << 3,      // Bouton minimiser
    Maximize = 1 << 4,      // Bouton maximiser
    Fullscreen = 1 << 5,    // Plein écran
    
    Default = Titlebar | Resize | Close | Minimize | Maximize
};

inline WindowStyle operator|(WindowStyle a, WindowStyle b) {
    return static_cast<WindowStyle>(static_cast<uint32_t>(a) | static_cast<uint32_t>(b));
}

inline WindowStyle operator&(WindowStyle a, WindowStyle b) {
    return static_cast<WindowStyle>(static_cast<uint32_t>(a) & static_cast<uint32_t>(b));
}

inline bool hasFlag(WindowStyle style, WindowStyle flag) {
    return (static_cast<uint32_t>(style) & static_cast<uint32_t>(flag)) != 0;
}

// ====================================================================
// MODES D'AFFICHAGE
// ====================================================================

enum class DisplayMode {
    Windowed,           // Fenêtré
    Fullscreen,         // Plein écran exclusif
    BorderlessFullscreen // Fenêtré plein écran
};

// ====================================================================
// ORIENTATION (MOBILE)
// ====================================================================

enum class ScreenOrientation {
    Any,                // Toutes les orientations
    Portrait,           // Portrait uniquement
    Landscape,          // Paysage uniquement
    PortraitUpsideDown, // Portrait inversé
    LandscapeLeft,      // Paysage gauche
    LandscapeRight      // Paysage droite
};

// ====================================================================
// CONFIGURATION DE LA FENÊTRE
// ====================================================================

struct WindowConfig {
    // Basique
    std::string title = "NK Window";
    uint32_t width = 800;
    uint32_t height = 600;
    int x = -1;                 // -1 = centré
    int y = -1;                 // -1 = centré
    
    // Style
    WindowStyle style = WindowStyle::Default;
    DisplayMode displayMode = DisplayMode::Windowed;
    
    // Comportement
    bool resizable = true;
    bool visible = true;
    bool decorated = true;      // Bordures et titre
    bool transparent = false;   // Transparence de la fenêtre
    bool alwaysOnTop = false;   // Toujours au premier plan
    bool focusOnShow = true;    // Focus automatique à l'affichage
    
    // Rendu
    bool vsync = true;
    uint32_t multisampling = 0; // 0, 2, 4, 8, 16
    
    // Limites de taille
    int minWidth = 0;           // 0 = pas de limite
    int minHeight = 0;
    int maxWidth = 0;           // 0 = pas de limite
    int maxHeight = 0;
    
    // Aspect ratio
    bool maintainAspectRatio = false;
    float aspectRatio = 16.0f / 9.0f;
    
    // Mobile spécifique
    bool keepScreenOn = false;
    bool hideStatusBar = false;
    bool hideNavigationBar = false;
    ScreenOrientation orientation = ScreenOrientation::Any;
    
    // Curseur
    bool showCursor = true;
    bool confineCursor = false; // Confiner le curseur à la fenêtre
    
    // Debug
    bool showFPS = false;
    bool showStats = false;
};

// ====================================================================
// CONFIGURATION DU RENDERER
// ====================================================================

enum class RendererAPI {
    Auto,           // Sélection automatique selon plateforme
    Software,       // Rendu logiciel (CPU)
    OpenGL,         // OpenGL 3.3+ (Desktop)
    OpenGLES,       // OpenGL ES 2.0/3.0 (Mobile)
    DirectX11,      // DirectX 11 (Windows)
    DirectX12,      // DirectX 12 (Windows)
    Metal,          // Metal (macOS/iOS)
    Vulkan,         // Vulkan (Multiplateforme)
    WebGL           // WebGL 2.0 (Emscripten)
};

struct RendererConfig {
    // API
    RendererAPI api = RendererAPI::Auto;
    
    // Basique
    bool vsync = true;
    int multisampling = 0;
    bool hardwareAcceleration = true;
    bool debugMode = false;
    
    // Avancé
    uint32_t maxFramesInFlight = 2;
    bool tripleBuffering = false;
    
    // OpenGL spécifique
    struct {
        uint32_t majorVersion = 3;
        uint32_t minorVersion = 3;
        bool coreProfile = true;
        bool forwardCompatible = true;
        bool debug = false;
    } opengl;
    
    // DirectX spécifique
    struct {
        bool debugLayer = false;
        bool gpuValidation = false;
        uint32_t adapterIndex = 0; // GPU à utiliser (0 = défaut)
    } directx;
    
    // Vulkan spécifique
    struct {
        bool validationLayers = false;
        std::vector<std::string> extensions;
        std::vector<std::string> layers;
        uint32_t physicalDeviceIndex = 0;
    } vulkan;
    
    // Metal spécifique
    struct {
        bool lowPower = false; // Utiliser le GPU intégré si disponible
    } metal;
    
    // Limites de ressources
    uint32_t maxTextures = 16;
    uint32_t maxUniformBuffers = 16;
    size_t maxVertexBufferSize = 64 * 1024 * 1024;  // 64 MB
    size_t maxIndexBufferSize = 16 * 1024 * 1024;   // 16 MB
};

} // namespace nk
```

## 4. Window.hpp - Version Complète

```cpp
// Window.hpp (version complète)
#pragma once

#include "Event.hpp"
#include "Error.hpp"
#include "WindowConfig.hpp"
#include <string>
#include <memory>
#include <functional>

namespace nk {

class WindowImpl;
class Renderer;

// ====================================================================
// INFORMATIONS SUR L'ÉCRAN
// ====================================================================

struct DisplayInfo {
    int index;
    std::string name;
    int width;
    int height;
    int refreshRate;
    int x;
    int y;
    bool isPrimary;
};

// ====================================================================
// CLASSE WINDOW
// ====================================================================

class Window {
public:
    // Constructeur avec configuration
    explicit Window(const WindowConfig& config = WindowConfig());
    ~Window();
    
    // Pas de copie
    Window(const Window&) = delete;
    Window& operator=(const Window&) = delete;
    
    // ================================================================
    // ÉTAT DE LA FENÊTRE
    // ================================================================
    
    bool isOpen() const;
    bool isValid() const;
    bool hasError() const;
    Error getLastError() const;
    
    // ================================================================
    // CONTRÔLE DE LA FENÊTRE
    // ================================================================
    
    void close();
    void show();
    void hide();
    void minimize();
    void maximize();
    void restore();
    void focus();
    void requestAttention(); // Flash la fenêtre pour attirer l'attention
    
    // ================================================================
    // PROPRIÉTÉS - TAILLE ET POSITION
    // ================================================================
    
    // Taille
    int getWidth() const;
    int getHeight() const;
    void getSize(int& width, int& height) const;
    void setSize(int width, int height);
    
    // Taille client (zone de rendu, sans bordures)
    int getClientWidth() const;
    int getClientHeight() const;
    void getClientSize(int& width, int& height) const;
    
    // Limites de taille
    void setMinSize(int minWidth, int minHeight);
    void setMaxSize(int maxWidth, int maxHeight);
    void getMinSize(int& minWidth, int& minHeight) const;
    void getMaxSize(int& maxWidth, int& maxHeight) const;
    
    // Position
    int getX() const;
    int getY() const;
    void getPosition(int& x, int& y) const;
    void setPosition(int x, int y);
    void center(); // Centrer sur l'écran principal
    
    // ================================================================
    // PROPRIÉTÉS - APPARENCE
    // ================================================================
    
    std::string getTitle() const;
    void setTitle(const std::string& title);
    
    void setIcon(const void* pixels, int width, int height);
    void setIconFromFile(const std::string& filepath);
    
    float getOpacity() const;
    void setOpacity(float opacity); // 0.0 = transparent, 1.0 = opaque
    
    // ================================================================
    // PROPRIÉTÉS - ÉTAT
    // ================================================================
    
    bool isVisible() const;
    bool isMinimized() const;
    bool isMaximized() const;
    bool isFocused() const;
    bool isResizable() const;
    bool isDecorated() const;
    bool isFullscreen() const;
    bool isTransparent() const;
    bool isAlwaysOnTop() const;
    
    void setResizable(bool resizable);
    void setDecorated(bool decorated);
    void setFullscreen(bool fullscreen);
    void setTransparent(bool transparent);
    void setAlwaysOnTop(bool alwaysOnTop);
    
    // Mode d'affichage
    DisplayMode getDisplayMode() const;
    void setDisplayMode(DisplayMode mode);
    
    // ================================================================
    // PROPRIÉTÉS - VSYNC ET FRAMERATE
    // ================================================================
    
    bool isVSyncEnabled() const;
    void setVSync(bool enabled);
    
    void setFramerateLimit(int limit); // 0 = illimité
    int getFramerateLimit() const;
    
    // ================================================================
    // PROPRIÉTÉS - CURSEUR
    // ================================================================
    
    bool isCursorVisible() const;
    void setCursorVisible(bool visible);
    
    bool isCursorConfined() const;
    void setConfineCursor(bool confine);
    
    void setCursorPosition(int x, int y);
    void getCursorPosition(int& x, int& y) const;
    
    // ================================================================
    // PROPRIÉTÉS - ASPECT RATIO
    // ================================================================
    
    bool isMaintainingAspectRatio() const;
    void setMaintainAspectRatio(bool maintain, float ratio = 16.0f / 9.0f);
    float getAspectRatio() const;
    
    // ================================================================
    // INFORMATIONS
    // ================================================================
    
    uint32_t getId() const { return m_id; }
    void* getNativeHandle() const;
    void* getNativeContext() const;
    
    // Informations sur l'écran
    DisplayInfo getDisplayInfo() const;
    static std::vector<DisplayInfo> getAllDisplays();
    static DisplayInfo getPrimaryDisplay();
    
    // DPI
    float getDPIScale() const;
    void getDPI(float& x, float& y) const;
    
    // ================================================================
    // ÉVÉNEMENTS
    // ================================================================
    
    // Traiter les événements système (appelé par EventManager)
    void processEvents();
    
    // Callbacks d'événements (optionnel, alternative à EventManager)
    using EventCallback = std::function<void(Event&)>;
    void setEventCallback(EventCallback callback);
    
    // ================================================================
    // CLIPBOARD
    // ================================================================
    
    std::string getClipboardText() const;
    void setClipboardText(const std::string& text);
    
    // ================================================================
    // DRAG & DROP
    // ================================================================
    
    using DropCallback = std::function<void(const std::vector<std::string>&)>;
    void setDropCallback(DropCallback callback);
    
    // ================================================================
    // MOBILE SPÉCIFIQUE
    // ================================================================
    
#if defined(__ANDROID__) || defined(__APPLE__) && TARGET_OS_IPHONE
    void setKeepScreenOn(bool keepOn);
    bool isKeepingScreenOn() const;
    
    void setStatusBarVisible(bool visible);
    bool isStatusBarVisible() const;
    
    void setNavigationBarVisible(bool visible);
    bool isNavigationBarVisible() const;
    
    void setOrientation(ScreenOrientation orientation);
    ScreenOrientation getOrientation() const;
    
    // Safe area (pour notch, etc.)
    struct SafeArea {
        int top, left, bottom, right;
    };
    SafeArea getSafeArea() const;
#endif
    
    // ================================================================
    // DEBUG
    // ================================================================
    
    void setShowFPS(bool show);
    bool isShowingFPS() const;
    
    void setShowStats(bool show);
    bool isShowingStats() const;
    
    struct Stats {
        float fps;
        float frameTime;
        int width;
        int height;
        int drawCalls;
        size_t memoryUsage;
    };
    Stats getStats() const;
    
private:
    std::unique_ptr<WindowImpl> m_impl;
    uint32_t m_id;
    static uint32_t s_nextId;
    
    EventCallback m_eventCallback;
    DropCallback m_dropCallback;
    
    friend class Renderer;
};

} // namespace nk
```

Je continue avec l'implémentation de Window.cpp et WindowImpl dans le prochain message ?

## 5. Window.cpp - Implémentation

```cpp
// Window.cpp
#include "Window.hpp"
#include "WindowImpl.hpp"

// Inclure les implémentations spécifiques
#if defined(_WIN32)
    #include "platforms/WindowWin32.hpp"
#elif defined(__linux__) && !defined(__ANDROID__)
    #include "platforms/WindowX11.hpp"
#elif defined(__APPLE__)
    #include <TargetConditionals.h>
    #if TARGET_OS_IPHONE
        #include "platforms/WindowiOS.hpp"
    #else
        #include "platforms/WindowCocoa.hpp"
    #endif
#elif defined(__EMSCRIPTEN__)
    #include "platforms/WindowEmscripten.hpp"
#elif defined(__ANDROID__)
    #include "platforms/WindowAndroid.hpp"
#endif

namespace nk {

uint32_t Window::s_nextId = 1;

// ====================================================================
// CONSTRUCTEUR / DESTRUCTEUR
// ====================================================================

Window::Window(const WindowConfig& config)
    : m_id(s_nextId++) {
    
    // Créer l'implémentation spécifique à la plateforme
#if defined(_WIN32)
    m_impl = std::make_unique<WindowWin32>(config);
#elif defined(__linux__) && !defined(__ANDROID__)
    m_impl = std::make_unique<WindowX11>(config);
#elif defined(__APPLE__)
    #if TARGET_OS_IPHONE
        m_impl = std::make_unique<WindowiOS>(config);
    #else
        m_impl = std::make_unique<WindowCocoa>(config);
    #endif
#elif defined(__EMSCRIPTEN__)
    m_impl = std::make_unique<WindowEmscripten>(config);
#elif defined(__ANDROID__)
    m_impl = std::make_unique<WindowAndroid>(config);
#else
    NK_FATAL(ErrorCategory::Window, "Unsupported platform");
    m_impl = nullptr;
#endif
    
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->setWindow(this);
    }
}

Window::~Window() {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->close();
    }
}

// ====================================================================
// ÉTAT DE LA FENÊTRE
// ====================================================================

bool Window::isOpen() const {
    return m_impl && m_impl->isOpen();
}

bool Window::isValid() const {
    return m_impl && m_impl->isValid();
}

bool Window::hasError() const {
    return m_impl && m_impl->hasError();
}

Error Window::getLastError() const {
    if (!m_impl) {
        return Error(ErrorSeverity::Fatal, ErrorCategory::Window, "Window implementation is null");
    }
    return m_impl->getLastError();
}

// ====================================================================
// CONTRÔLE DE LA FENÊTRE
// ====================================================================

void Window::close() {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->close();
    }
}

void Window::show() {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->show();
    }
}

void Window::hide() {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->hide();
    }
}

void Window::minimize() {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->minimize();
    }
}

void Window::maximize() {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->maximize();
    }
}

void Window::restore() {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->restore();
    }
}

void Window::focus() {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->focus();
    }
}

void Window::requestAttention() {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->requestAttention();
    }
}

// ====================================================================
// PROPRIÉTÉS - TAILLE ET POSITION
// ====================================================================

int Window::getWidth() const {
    return m_impl ? m_impl->getWidth() : 0;
}

int Window::getHeight() const {
    return m_impl ? m_impl->getHeight() : 0;
}

void Window::getSize(int& width, int& height) const {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->getSize(width, height);
    } else {
        width = height = 0;
    }
}

void Window::setSize(int width, int height) {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->setSize(width, height);
    }
}

int Window::getClientWidth() const {
    return m_impl ? m_impl->getClientWidth() : 0;
}

int Window::getClientHeight() const {
    return m_impl ? m_impl->getClientHeight() : 0;
}

void Window::getClientSize(int& width, int& height) const {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->getClientSize(width, height);
    } else {
        width = height = 0;
    }
}

void Window::setMinSize(int minWidth, int minHeight) {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->setMinSize(minWidth, minHeight);
    }
}

void Window::setMaxSize(int maxWidth, int maxHeight) {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->setMaxSize(maxWidth, maxHeight);
    }
}

void Window::getMinSize(int& minWidth, int& minHeight) const {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->getMinSize(minWidth, minHeight);
    } else {
        minWidth = minHeight = 0;
    }
}

void Window::getMaxSize(int& maxWidth, int& maxHeight) const {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->getMaxSize(maxWidth, maxHeight);
    } else {
        maxWidth = maxHeight = 0;
    }
}

int Window::getX() const {
    return m_impl ? m_impl->getX() : 0;
}

int Window::getY() const {
    return m_impl ? m_impl->getY() : 0;
}

void Window::getPosition(int& x, int& y) const {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->getPosition(x, y);
    } else {
        x = y = 0;
    }
}

void Window::setPosition(int x, int y) {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->setPosition(x, y);
    }
}

void Window::center() {
    if (!m_impl) return;
    
    DisplayInfo display = getPrimaryDisplay();
    int x = (display.width - getWidth()) / 2 + display.x;
    int y = (display.height - getHeight()) / 2 + display.y;
    setPosition(x, y);
}

// ====================================================================
// PROPRIÉTÉS - APPARENCE
// ====================================================================

std::string Window::getTitle() const {
    return m_impl ? m_impl->getTitle() : "";
}

void Window::setTitle(const std::string& title) {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->setTitle(title);
    }
}

void Window::setIcon(const void* pixels, int width, int height) {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->setIcon(pixels, width, height);
    }
}

void Window::setIconFromFile(const std::string& filepath) {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->setIconFromFile(filepath);
    }
}

float Window::getOpacity() const {
    return m_impl ? m_impl->getOpacity() : 1.0f;
}

void Window::setOpacity(float opacity) {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->setOpacity(opacity);
    }
}

// ====================================================================
// PROPRIÉTÉS - ÉTAT
// ====================================================================

bool Window::isVisible() const {
    return m_impl && m_impl->isVisible();
}

bool Window::isMinimized() const {
    return m_impl && m_impl->isMinimized();
}

bool Window::isMaximized() const {
    return m_impl && m_impl->isMaximized();
}

bool Window::isFocused() const {
    return m_impl && m_impl->isFocused();
}

bool Window::isResizable() const {
    return m_impl && m_impl->isResizable();
}

bool Window::isDecorated() const {
    return m_impl && m_impl->isDecorated();
}

bool Window::isFullscreen() const {
    return m_impl && m_impl->isFullscreen();
}

bool Window::isTransparent() const {
    return m_impl && m_impl->isTransparent();
}

bool Window::isAlwaysOnTop() const {
    return m_impl && m_impl->isAlwaysOnTop();
}

void Window::setResizable(bool resizable) {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->setResizable(resizable);
    }
}

void Window::setDecorated(bool decorated) {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->setDecorated(decorated);
    }
}

void Window::setFullscreen(bool fullscreen) {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->setFullscreen(fullscreen);
    }
}

void Window::setTransparent(bool transparent) {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->setTransparent(transparent);
    }
}

void Window::setAlwaysOnTop(bool alwaysOnTop) {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->setAlwaysOnTop(alwaysOnTop);
    }
}

DisplayMode Window::getDisplayMode() const {
    return m_impl ? m_impl->getDisplayMode() : DisplayMode::Windowed;
}

void Window::setDisplayMode(DisplayMode mode) {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->setDisplayMode(mode);
    }
}

// ====================================================================
// PROPRIÉTÉS - VSYNC ET FRAMERATE
// ====================================================================

bool Window::isVSyncEnabled() const {
    return m_impl && m_impl->isVSyncEnabled();
}

void Window::setVSync(bool enabled) {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->setVSync(enabled);
    }
}

void Window::setFramerateLimit(int limit) {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->setFramerateLimit(limit);
    }
}

int Window::getFramerateLimit() const {
    return m_impl ? m_impl->getFramerateLimit() : 0;
}

// ====================================================================
// PROPRIÉTÉS - CURSEUR
// ====================================================================

bool Window::isCursorVisible() const {
    return m_impl && m_impl->isCursorVisible();
}

void Window::setCursorVisible(bool visible) {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->setCursorVisible(visible);
    }
}

bool Window::isCursorConfined() const {
    return m_impl && m_impl->isCursorConfined();
}

void Window::setConfineCursor(bool confine) {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->setConfineCursor(confine);
    }
}

void Window::setCursorPosition(int x, int y) {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->setCursorPosition(x, y);
    }
}

void Window::getCursorPosition(int& x, int& y) const {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->getCursorPosition(x, y);
    } else {
        x = y = 0;
    }
}

// ====================================================================
// PROPRIÉTÉS - ASPECT RATIO
// ====================================================================

bool Window::isMaintainingAspectRatio() const {
    return m_impl && m_impl->isMaintainingAspectRatio();
}

void Window::setMaintainAspectRatio(bool maintain, float ratio) {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->setMaintainAspectRatio(maintain, ratio);
    }
}

float Window::getAspectRatio() const {
    return m_impl ? m_impl->getAspectRatio() : 0.0f;
}

// ====================================================================
// INFORMATIONS
// ====================================================================

void* Window::getNativeHandle() const {
    return m_impl ? m_impl->getNativeHandle() : nullptr;
}

void* Window::getNativeContext() const {
    return m_impl ? m_impl->getNativeContext() : nullptr;
}

DisplayInfo Window::getDisplayInfo() const {
    return m_impl ? m_impl->getDisplayInfo() : DisplayInfo{};
}

std::vector<DisplayInfo> Window::getAllDisplays() {
#if defined(_WIN32)
    return WindowWin32::getAllDisplays();
#elif defined(__linux__) && !defined(__ANDROID__)
    return WindowX11::getAllDisplays();
#elif defined(__APPLE__) && !TARGET_OS_IPHONE
    return WindowCocoa::getAllDisplays();
#else
    return {getPrimaryDisplay()};
#endif
}

DisplayInfo Window::getPrimaryDisplay() {
#if defined(_WIN32)
    return WindowWin32::getPrimaryDisplay();
#elif defined(__linux__) && !defined(__ANDROID__)
    return WindowX11::getPrimaryDisplay();
#elif defined(__APPLE__) && !TARGET_OS_IPHONE
    return WindowCocoa::getPrimaryDisplay();
#else
    DisplayInfo info;
    info.index = 0;
    info.name = "Primary Display";
    info.width = 1920;
    info.height = 1080;
    info.refreshRate = 60;
    info.x = 0;
    info.y = 0;
    info.isPrimary = true;
    return info;
#endif
}

float Window::getDPIScale() const {
    return m_impl ? m_impl->getDPIScale() : 1.0f;
}

void Window::getDPI(float& x, float& y) const {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->getDPI(x, y);
    } else {
        x = y = 96.0f;
    }
}

// ====================================================================
// ÉVÉNEMENTS
// ====================================================================

void Window::processEvents() {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->processEvents();
    }
}

void Window::setEventCallback(EventCallback callback) {
    m_eventCallback = callback;
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->setEventCallback(callback);
    }
}

// ====================================================================
// CLIPBOARD
// ====================================================================

std::string Window::getClipboardText() const {
    return m_impl ? m_impl->getClipboardText() : "";
}

void Window::setClipboardText(const std::string& text) {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->setClipboardText(text);
    }
}

// ====================================================================
// DRAG & DROP
// ====================================================================

void Window::setDropCallback(DropCallback callback) {
    m_dropCallback = callback;
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->setDropCallback(callback);
    }
}

// ====================================================================
// MOBILE SPÉCIFIQUE
// ====================================================================

#if defined(__ANDROID__) || (defined(__APPLE__) && TARGET_OS_IPHONE)

void Window::setKeepScreenOn(bool keepOn) {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->setKeepScreenOn(keepOn);
    }
}

bool Window::isKeepingScreenOn() const {
    return m_impl && m_impl->isKeepingScreenOn();
}

void Window::setStatusBarVisible(bool visible) {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->setStatusBarVisible(visible);
    }
}

bool Window::isStatusBarVisible() const {
    return m_impl && m_impl->isStatusBarVisible();
}

void Window::setNavigationBarVisible(bool visible) {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->setNavigationBarVisible(visible);
    }
}

bool Window::isNavigationBarVisible() const {
    return m_impl && m_impl->isNavigationBarVisible();
}

void Window::setOrientation(ScreenOrientation orientation) {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->setOrientation(orientation);
    }
}

ScreenOrientation Window::getOrientation() const {
    return m_impl ? m_impl->getOrientation() : ScreenOrientation::Any;
}

Window::SafeArea Window::getSafeArea() const {
    return m_impl ? m_impl->getSafeArea() : SafeArea{0, 0, 0, 0};
}

#endif

// ====================================================================
// DEBUG
// ====================================================================

void Window::setShowFPS(bool show) {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->setShowFPS(show);
    }
}

bool Window::isShowingFPS() const {
    return m_impl && m_impl->isShowingFPS();
}

void Window::setShowStats(bool show) {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->setShowStats(show);
    }
}

bool Window::isShowingStats() const {
    return m_impl && m_impl->isShowingStats();
}

Window::Stats Window::getStats() const {
    return m_impl ? m_impl->getStats() : Stats{};
}

} // namespace nk
```

## 6. WindowImpl.hpp - Interface de Base

```cpp
// WindowImpl.hpp
#pragma once

#include "WindowConfig.hpp"
#include "Event.hpp"
#include "Error.hpp"
#include <string>
#include <vector>
#include <functional>
#include <chrono>

namespace nk {

class Window;

// ====================================================================
// INTERFACE D'IMPLÉMENTATION DE FENÊTRE
// ====================================================================

class WindowImpl {
public:
    virtual ~WindowImpl() = default;
    
    // Associer à une Window
    void setWindow(Window* window) { m_window = window; }
    Window* getWindow() const { return m_window; }
    
    // ================================================================
    // ÉTAT
    // ================================================================
    
    virtual bool isOpen() const = 0;
    virtual bool isValid() const = 0;
    virtual void close() = 0;
    
    virtual bool hasError() const { return m_hasError; }
    virtual Error getLastError() const { return m_lastError; }
    
    // ================================================================
    // CONTRÔLE
    // ================================================================
    
    virtual void show() = 0;
    virtual void hide() = 0;
    virtual void minimize() = 0;
    virtual void maximize() = 0;
    virtual void restore() = 0;
    virtual void focus() = 0;
    virtual void requestAttention() = 0;
    
    // ================================================================
    // TAILLE ET POSITION
    // ================================================================
    
    virtual int getWidth() const = 0;
    virtual int getHeight() const = 0;
    virtual void getSize(int& width, int& height) const = 0;
    virtual void setSize(int width, int height) = 0;
    
    virtual int getClientWidth() const = 0;
    virtual int getClientHeight() const = 0;
    virtual void getClientSize(int& width, int& height) const = 0;
    
    virtual void setMinSize(int minWidth, int minHeight) = 0;
    virtual void setMaxSize(int maxWidth, int maxHeight) = 0;
    virtual void getMinSize(int& minWidth, int& minHeight) const = 0;
    virtual void getMaxSize(int& maxWidth, int& maxHeight) const = 0;
    
    virtual int getX() const = 0;
    virtual int getY() const = 0;
    virtual void getPosition(int& x, int& y) const = 0;
    virtual void setPosition(int x, int y) = 0;
    
    // ================================================================
    // APPARENCE
    // ================================================================
    
    virtual std::string getTitle() const = 0;
    virtual void setTitle(const std::string& title) = 0;
    
    virtual void setIcon(const void* pixels, int width, int height) = 0;
    virtual void setIconFromFile(const std::string& filepath) = 0;
    
    virtual float getOpacity() const = 0;
    virtual void setOpacity(float opacity) = 0;
    
    // ================================================================
    // ÉTAT DE LA FENÊTRE
    // ================================================================
    
    virtual bool isVisible() const = 0;
    virtual bool isMinimized() const = 0;
    virtual bool isMaximized() const = 0;
    virtual bool isFocused() const = 0;
    virtual bool isResizable() const = 0;
    virtual bool isDecorated() const = 0;
    virtual bool isFullscreen() const = 0;
    virtual bool isTransparent() const = 0;
    virtual bool isAlwaysOnTop() const = 0;
    
    virtual void setResizable(bool resizable) = 0;
    virtual void setDecorated(bool decorated) = 0;
    virtual void setFullscreen(bool fullscreen) = 0;
    virtual void setTransparent(bool transparent) = 0;
    virtual void setAlwaysOnTop(bool alwaysOnTop) = 0;
    
    virtual DisplayMode getDisplayMode() const = 0;
    virtual void setDisplayMode(DisplayMode mode) = 0;
    
    // ================================================================
    // VSYNC ET FRAMERATE
    // ================================================================
    
    virtual bool isVSyncEnabled() const = 0;
    virtual void setVSync(bool enabled) = 0;
    
    virtual void setFramerateLimit(int limit) = 0;
    virtual int getFramerateLimit() const = 0;
    
    // ================================================================
    // CURSEUR
    // ================================================================
    
    virtual bool isCursorVisible() const = 0;
    virtual void setCursorVisible(bool visible) = 0;
    
    virtual bool isCursorConfined() const = 0;
    virtual void setConfineCursor(bool confine) = 0;
    
    virtual void setCursorPosition(int x, int y) = 0;
    virtual void getCursorPosition(int& x, int& y) const = 0;
    
    // ================================================================
    // ASPECT RATIO
    // ================================================================
    
    virtual bool isMaintainingAspectRatio() const = 0;
    virtual void setMaintainAspectRatio(bool maintain, float ratio) = 0;
    virtual float getAspectRatio() const = 0;
    
    // ================================================================
    // INFORMATIONS
    // ================================================================
    
    virtual void* getNativeHandle() const = 0;
    virtual void* getNativeContext() const = 0;
    
    virtual DisplayInfo getDisplayInfo() const = 0;
    
    virtual float getDPIScale() const = 0;
    virtual void getDPI(float& x, float& y) const = 0;
    
    // ================================================================
    // ÉVÉNEMENTS
    // ================================================================
    
    virtual void processEvents() = 0;
    
    using EventCallback = std::function<void(Event&)>;
    virtual void setEventCallback(EventCallback callback) { m_eventCallback = callback; }
    
    // ================================================================
    // CLIPBOARD
    // ================================================================
    
    virtual std::string getClipboardText() const = 0;
    virtual void setClipboardText(const std::string& text) = 0;
    
    // ================================================================
    // DRAG & DROP
    // ================================================================
    
    using DropCallback = std::function<void(const std::vector<std::string>&)>;
    virtual void setDropCallback(DropCallback callback) { m_dropCallback = callback; }
    
    // ================================================================
    // MOBILE SPÉCIFIQUE
    // ================================================================
    
#if defined(__ANDROID__) || (defined(__APPLE__) && TARGET_OS_IPHONE)
    virtual void setKeepScreenOn(bool keepOn) = 0;
    virtual bool isKeepingScreenOn() const = 0;
    
    virtual void setStatusBarVisible(bool visible) = 0;
    virtual bool isStatusBarVisible() const = 0;
    
    virtual void setNavigationBarVisible(bool visible) = 0;
    virtual bool isNavigationBarVisible() const = 0;
    
    virtual void setOrientation(ScreenOrientation orientation) = 0;
    virtual ScreenOrientation getOrientation() const = 0;
    
    struct SafeArea {
        int top, left, bottom, right;
    };
    virtual SafeArea getSafeArea() const = 0;
#endif
    
    // ================================================================
    // DEBUG
    // ================================================================
    
    virtual void setShowFPS(bool show) = 0;
    virtual bool isShowingFPS() const = 0;
    
    virtual void setShowStats(bool show) = 0;
    virtual bool isShowingStats() const = 0;
    
    struct Stats {
        float fps;
        float frameTime;
        int width;
        int height;
        int drawCalls;
        size_t memoryUsage;
    };
    virtual Stats getStats() const = 0;
    
protected:
    Window* m_window = nullptr;
    
    // Gestion des erreurs
    bool m_hasError = false;
    Error m_lastError;
    
    void setError(ErrorSeverity severity, const std::string& message, int code = 0) {
        m_hasError = true;
        m_lastError = Error(severity, ErrorCategory::Window, message);
        m_lastError.errorCode = code;
        ErrorManager::instance().pushError(m_lastError);
    }
    
    void clearError() {
        m_hasError = false;
    }
    
    // Callbacks
    EventCallback m_eventCallback;
    DropCallback m_dropCallback;
    
    // Statistiques
    struct {
        std::chrono::steady_clock::time_point lastFrame;
        float fps = 0.0f;
        float frameTime = 0.0f;
        int frameCount = 0;
        std::chrono::steady_clock::time_point lastFpsUpdate;
        
        void update() {
            auto now = std::chrono::steady_clock::now();
            frameTime = std::chrono::duration<float>(now - lastFrame).count() * 1000.0f;
            lastFrame = now;
            
            frameCount++;
            auto elapsed = std::chrono::duration<float>(now - lastFpsUpdate).count();
            if (elapsed >= 1.0f) {
                fps = frameCount / elapsed;
                frameCount = 0;
                lastFpsUpdate = now;
            }
        }
    } m_stats;
    
    // Helper pour envoyer des événements
    void pushEvent(std::unique_ptr<Event> event) {
        if (m_window) {
            event->setWindow(m_window);
        }
        
        // Callback local
        if (m_eventCallback && event) {
            m_eventCallback(*event);
        }
        
        // Event manager global
        EventManager::instance().pushEvent(std::move(event));
    }
};

} // namespace nk
```

## 7. WindowWin32.hpp et WindowWin32.cpp

```cpp
// platforms/WindowWin32.hpp
#pragma once
#ifdef _WIN32

#include "../WindowImpl.hpp"
#include <windows.h>
#include <string>
#include <unordered_map>

namespace nk {

class WindowWin32 : public WindowImpl {
public:
    WindowWin32(const WindowConfig& config);
    ~WindowWin32() override;
    
    // État
    bool isOpen() const override;
    bool isValid() const override;
    void close() override;
    
    // Contrôle
    void show() override;
    void hide() override;
    void minimize() override;
    void maximize() override;
    void restore() override;
    void focus() override;
    void requestAttention() override;
    
    // Taille et position
    int getWidth() const override;
    int getHeight() const override;
    void getSize(int& width, int& height) const override;
    void setSize(int width, int height) override;
    
    int getClientWidth() const override;
    int getClientHeight() const override;
    void getClientSize(int& width, int& height) const override;
    
    void setMinSize(int minWidth, int minHeight) override;
    void setMaxSize(int maxWidth, int maxHeight) override;
    void getMinSize(int& minWidth, int& minHeight) const override;
    void getMaxSize(int& maxWidth, int& maxHeight) const override;
    
    int getX() const override;
    int getY() const override;
    void getPosition(int& x, int& y) const override;
    void setPosition(int x, int y) override;
    
    // Apparence
    std::string getTitle() const override;
    void setTitle(const std::string& title) override;
    void setIcon(const void* pixels, int width, int height) override;
    void setIconFromFile(const std::string& filepath) override;
    float getOpacity() const override;
    void setOpacity(float opacity) override;
    
    // État de la fenêtre
    bool isVisible() const override;
    bool isMinimized() const override;
    bool isMaximized() const override;
    bool isFocused() const override;
    bool isResizable() const override;
    bool isDecorated() const override;
    bool isFullscreen() const override;
    bool isTransparent() const override;
    bool isAlwaysOnTop() const override;
    
    void setResizable(bool resizable) override;
    void setDecorated(bool decorated) override;
    void setFullscreen(bool fullscreen) override;
    void setTransparent(bool transparent) override;
    void setAlwaysOnTop(bool alwaysOnTop) override;
    
    DisplayMode getDisplayMode() const override;
    void setDisplayMode(DisplayMode mode) override;
    
    // VSync et Framerate
    bool isVSyncEnabled() const override;
    void setVSync(bool enabled) override;
    void setFramerateLimit(int limit) override;
    int getFramerateLimit() const override;
    
    // Curseur
    bool isCursorVisible() const override;
    void setCursorVisible(bool visible) override;
    bool isCursorConfined() const override;
    void setConfineCursor(bool confine) override;
    void setCursorPosition(int x, int y) override;
    void getCursorPosition(int& x, int& y) const override;
    
    // Aspect ratio
    bool isMaintainingAspectRatio() const override;
    void setMaintainAspectRatio(bool maintain, float ratio) override;
    float getAspectRatio() const override;
    
    // Informations
    void* getNativeHandle() const override;
    void* getNativeContext() const override;
    DisplayInfo getDisplayInfo() const override;
    float getDPIScale() const override;
    void getDPI(float& x, float& y) const override;
    
    // Événements
    void processEvents() override;
    
    // Clipboard
    std::string getClipboardText() const override;
    void setClipboardText(const std::string& text) override;
    
    // Debug
    void setShowFPS(bool show) override;
    bool isShowingFPS() const override;
    void setShowStats(bool show) override;
    bool isShowingStats() const override;
    Stats getStats() const override;
    
    // Méthodes statiques
    static std::vector<DisplayInfo> getAllDisplays();
    static DisplayInfo getPrimaryDisplay();
    
private:
    static LRESULT CALLBACK windowProc(HWND hwnd, UINT msg, WPARAM wParam, LPARAM lParam);
    static Key virtualKeyToKey(WPARAM key, LPARAM flags);
    
    void createWindow(const WindowConfig& config);
    void setupOpenGL();
    void updateWindowStyle();
    void updateFramerateLimit();
    
    HWND m_hwnd;
    HDC m_hdc;
    HGLRC m_hglrc;
    HINSTANCE m_hinstance;
    
    std::string m_title;
    int m_width;
    int m_height;
    int m_x;
    int m_y;
    
    int m_minWidth;
    int m_minHeight;
    int m_maxWidth;
    int m_maxHeight;
    
    bool m_open;
    bool m_visible;
    bool m_resizable;
    bool m_decorated;
    bool m_fullscreen;
    bool m_transparent;
    bool m_alwaysOnTop;
    bool m_vsync;
    
    int m_framerateLimit;
    std::chrono::steady_clock::time_point m_lastFrameTime;
    
    bool m_cursorVisible;
    bool m_cursorConfined;
    
    bool m_maintainAspectRatio;
    float m_aspectRatio;
    
    DisplayMode m_displayMode;
    WINDOWPLACEMENT m_windowedPlacement;
    
    bool m_showFPS;
    bool m_showStats;
    
    int m_lastMouseX;
    int m_lastMouseY;
    
    static std::unordered_map<HWND, WindowWin32*> s_windowMap;
};

} // namespace nk

#endif // _WIN32
```

```cpp
// platforms/WindowWin32.cpp
#ifdef _WIN32

#include "WindowWin32.hpp"
#include <windowsx.h>
#include <dwmapi.h>
#include <shellscalingapi.h>

#pragma comment(lib, "dwmapi.lib")
#pragma comment(lib, "opengl32.lib")

namespace nk {

std::unordered_map<HWND, WindowWin32*> WindowWin32::s_windowMap;

WindowWin32::WindowWin32(const WindowConfig& config)
    : m_hwnd(nullptr)
    , m_hdc(nullptr)
    , m_hglrc(nullptr)
    , m_hinstance(GetModuleHandle(nullptr))
    , m_title(config.title)
    , m_width(config.width)
    , m_height(config.height)
    , m_x(config.x)
    , m_y(config.y)
    , m_minWidth(config.minWidth)
    , m_minHeight(config.minHeight)
    , m_maxWidth(config.maxWidth)
    , m_maxHeight(config.maxHeight)
    , m_open(true)
    , m_visible(config.visible)
    , m_resizable(config.resizable)
    , m_decorated(config.decorated)
    , m_fullscreen(config.fullscreen)
    , m_transparent(config.transparent)
    , m_alwaysOnTop(config.alwaysOnTop)
    , m_vsync(config.vsync)
    , m_framerateLimit(0)
    , m_cursorVisible(config.showCursor)
    , m_cursorConfined(config.confineCursor)
    , m_maintainAspectRatio(config.maintainAspectRatio)
    , m_aspectRatio(config.aspectRatio)
    , m_displayMode(config.displayMode)
    , m_showFPS(config.showFPS)
    , m_showStats(config.showStats)
    , m_lastMouseX(0)
    , m_lastMouseY(0) {
    
    createWindow(config);
}

WindowWin32::~WindowWin32() {
    close();
}

void WindowWin32::createWindow(const WindowConfig& config) {
    // Enregistrer la classe de fenêtre
    WNDCLASSEX wc = {};
    wc.cbSize = sizeof(WNDCLASSEX);
    wc.style = CS_HREDRAW | CS_VREDRAW | CS_OWNDC;
    wc.lpfnWndProc = windowProc;
    wc.hInstance = m_hinstance;
    wc.hCursor = LoadCursor(nullptr, IDC_ARROW);
    wc.hbrBackground = (HBRUSH)COLOR_WINDOW;
    wc.lpszClassName = "NKWindowClass";
    
    if (!RegisterClassEx(&wc)) {
        DWORD error = GetLastError();
        if (error != ERROR_CLASS_ALREADY_EXISTS) {
            setError(ErrorSeverity::Fatal, "Failed to register window class", error);
            return;
        }
    }
    
    // Déterminer le style de la fenêtre
    DWORD style = WS_OVERLAPPEDWINDOW;
    DWORD exStyle = WS_EX_APPWINDOW;
    
    if (!m_decorated) {
        style = WS_POPUP;
    }
    if (m_transparent) {
        exStyle |= WS_EX_LAYERED;
    }
    if (m_alwaysOnTop) {
        exStyle |= WS_EX_TOPMOST;
    }
    if (!m_resizable) {
        style &= ~(WS_THICKFRAME | WS_MAXIMIZEBOX);
    }
    
    // Ajuster la taille pour inclure les bordures
    RECT rect = {0, 0, (LONG)m_width, (LONG)m_height};
    AdjustWindowRectEx(&rect, style, FALSE, exStyle);
    
    int windowWidth = rect.right - rect.left;
    int windowHeight = rect.bottom - rect.top;
    
    // Position
    int posX = m_x;
    int posY = m_y;
    
    if (m_x < 0 || m_y < 0) {
        // Centrer sur l'écran principal
        DisplayInfo primary = getPrimaryDisplay();
        posX = (primary.width - windowWidth) / 2 + primary.x;
        posY = (primary.height - windowHeight) / 2 + primary.y;
    }
    
    // Créer la fenêtre
    m_hwnd = CreateWindowEx(
        exStyle,
        "NKWindowClass",
        m_title.c_str(),
        style,
        posX, posY,
        windowWidth, windowHeight,
        nullptr,
        nullptr,
        m_hinstance,
        nullptr
    );
    
    if (!m_hwnd) {
        setError(ErrorSeverity::Fatal, "Failed to create window", GetLastError());
        return;
    }
    
    // Associer cette instance à HWND
    SetWindowLongPtr(m_hwnd, GWLP_USERDATA, reinterpret_cast<LONG_PTR>(this));
    s_windowMap[m_hwnd] = this;
    
    // Activer DPI awareness
    SetProcessDpiAwareness(PROCESS_PER_MONITOR_DPI_AWARE);
    
    // Configurer la transparence si nécessaire
    if (m_transparent) {
        SetLayeredWindowAttributes(m_hwnd, RGB(0, 0, 0), 255, LWA_ALPHA);
    }
    
    // Obtenir le DC
    m_hdc = GetDC(m_hwnd);
    
    // Configurer OpenGL
    setupOpenGL();
    
    // Afficher si nécessaire
    if (m_visible) {
        ShowWindow(m_hwnd, SW_SHOW);
        UpdateWindow(m_hwnd);
    }
    
    // Mode plein écran
    if (m_fullscreen) {
        setFullscreen(true);
    }
    
    clearError();
}

void WindowWin32::setupOpenGL() {
    PIXELFORMATDESCRIPTOR pfd = {};
    pfd.nSize = sizeof(PIXELFORMATDESCRIPTOR);
    pfd.nVersion = 1;
    pfd.dwFlags = PFD_DRAW_TO_WINDOW | PFD_SUPPORT_OPENGL | PFD_DOUBLEBUFFER;
    pfd.iPixelType = PFD_TYPE_RGBA;
    pfd.cColorBits = 32;
    pfd.cDepthBits = 24;
    pfd.cStencilBits = 8;
    pfd.iLayerType = PFD_MAIN_PLANE;
    
    int pixelFormat = ChoosePixelFormat(m_hdc, &pfd);
    if (!pixelFormat) {
        setError(ErrorSeverity::Error, "Failed to choose pixel format", GetLastError());
        return;
    }
    
    if (!SetPixelFormat(m_hdc, pixelFormat, &pfd)) {
        setError(ErrorSeverity::Error, "Failed to set pixel format", GetLastError());
        return;
    }
    
    m_hglrc = wglCreateContext(m_hdc);
    if (!m_hglrc) {
        setError(ErrorSeverity::Error, "Failed to create OpenGL context", GetLastError());
        return;
    }
    
    wglMakeCurrent(m_hdc, m_hglrc);
    
    // VSync
    typedef BOOL (WINAPI * PFNWGLSWAPINTERVALEXTPROC)(int interval);
    PFNWGLSWAPINTERVALEXTPROC wglSwapIntervalEXT = 
        (PFNWGLSWAPINTERVALEXTPROC)wglGetProcAddress("wglSwapIntervalEXT");
    if (wglSwapIntervalEXT) {
        wglSwapIntervalEXT(m_vsync ? 1 : 0);
    }
}

bool WindowWin32::isOpen() const {
    return m_open && m_hwnd != nullptr;
}

bool WindowWin32::isValid() const {
    return m_hwnd != nullptr && IsWindow(m_hwnd);
}

void WindowWin32::close() {
    if (!m_open) return;
    
    m_open = false;
    
    if (m_hglrc) {
        wglMakeCurrent(nullptr, nullptr);
        wglDeleteContext(m_hglrc);
        m_hglrc = nullptr;
    }
    
    if (m_hdc) {
        ReleaseDC(m_hwnd, m_hdc);
        m_hdc = nullptr;
    }
    
    if (m_hwnd) {
        s_windowMap.erase(m_hwnd);
        DestroyWindow(m_hwnd);
        m_hwnd = nullptr;
    }
}

void WindowWin32::show() {
    if (m_hwnd) {
        ShowWindow(m_hwnd, SW_SHOW);
        m_visible = true;
    }
}

void WindowWin32::hide() {
    if (m_hwnd) {
        ShowWindow(m_hwnd, SW_HIDE);
        m_visible = false;
    }
}

void WindowWin32::minimize() {
    if (m_hwnd) {
        ShowWindow(m_hwnd, SW_MINIMIZE);
    }
}

void WindowWin32::maximize() {
    if (m_hwnd) {
        ShowWindow(m_hwnd, SW_MAXIMIZE);
    }
}

void WindowWin32::restore() {
    if (m_hwnd) {
        ShowWindow(m_hwnd, SW_RESTORE);
    }
}

void WindowWin32::focus() {
    if (m_hwnd) {
        SetForegroundWindow(m_hwnd);
        SetFocus(m_hwnd);
    }
}

void WindowWin32::requestAttention() {
    if (m_hwnd) {
        FLASHWINFO fwi = {};
        fwi.cbSize = sizeof(FLASHWINFO);
        fwi.hwnd = m_hwnd;
        fwi.dwFlags = FLASHW_ALL | FLASHW_TIMERNOFG;
        fwi.uCount = 3;
        fwi.dwTimeout = 0;
        FlashWindowEx(&fwi);
    }
}

int WindowWin32::getWidth() const {
    return m_width;
}

int WindowWin32::getHeight() const {
    return m_height;
}

void WindowWin32::getSize(int& width, int& height) const {
    width = m_width;
    height = m_height;
}

void WindowWin32::setSize(int width, int height) {
    if (m_hwnd) {
        m_width = width;
        m_height = height;
        
        DWORD style = GetWindowLong(m_hwnd, GWL_STYLE);
        DWORD exStyle = GetWindowLong(m_hwnd, GWL_EXSTYLE);
        
        RECT rect = {0, 0, (LONG)width, (LONG)height};
        AdjustWindowRectEx(&rect, style, FALSE, exStyle);
        
        SetWindowPos(m_hwnd, nullptr, 0, 0, 
                    rect.right - rect.left, 
                    rect.bottom - rect.top,
                    SWP_NOMOVE | SWP_NOZORDER);
    }
}

int WindowWin32::getClientWidth() const {
    RECT rect;
    GetClientRect(m_hwnd, &rect);
    return rect.right - rect.left;
}

int WindowWin32::getClientHeight() const {
    RECT rect;
    GetClientRect(m_hwnd, &rect);
    return rect.bottom - rect.top;
}

void WindowWin32::getClientSize(int& width, int& height) const {
    RECT rect;
    GetClientRect(m_hwnd, &rect);
    width = rect.right - rect.left;
    height = rect.bottom - rect.top;
}

void WindowWin32::setMinSize(int minWidth, int minHeight) {
    m_minWidth = minWidth;
    m_minHeight = minHeight;
}

void WindowWin32::setMaxSize(int maxWidth, int maxHeight) {
    m_maxWidth = maxWidth;
    m_maxHeight = maxHeight;
}

void WindowWin32::getMinSize(int& minWidth, int& minHeight) const {
    minWidth = m_minWidth;
    minHeight = m_minHeight;
}

void WindowWin32::getMaxSize(int& maxWidth, int& maxHeight) const {
    maxWidth = m_maxWidth;
    maxHeight = m_maxHeight;
}

int WindowWin32::getX() const {
    return m_x;
}

int WindowWin32::getY() const {
    return m_y;
}

void WindowWin32::getPosition(int& x, int& y) const {
    x = m_x;
    y = m_y;
}

void WindowWin32::setPosition(int x, int y) {
    if (m_hwnd) {
        m_x = x;
        m_y = y;
        SetWindowPos(m_hwnd, nullptr, x, y, 0, 0, SWP_NOSIZE | SWP_NOZORDER);
    }
}

std::string WindowWin32::getTitle() const {
    return m_title;
}

void WindowWin32::setTitle(const std::string& title) {
    m_title = title;
    if (m_hwnd) {
        SetWindowTextA(m_hwnd, title.c_str());
    }
}

void WindowWin32::setIcon(const void* pixels, int width, int height) {
    // TODO: Implémenter
}

void WindowWin32::setIconFromFile(const std::string& filepath) {
    if (m_hwnd) {
        HICON icon = (HICON)LoadImageA(nullptr, filepath.c_str(), 
                                       IMAGE_ICON, 0, 0, LR_LOADFROMFILE);
        if (icon) {
            SendMessage(m_hwnd, WM_SETICON, ICON_BIG, (LPARAM)icon);
            SendMessage(m_hwnd, WM_SETICON, ICON_SMALL, (LPARAM)icon);
        }
    }
}

float WindowWin32::getOpacity() const {
    if (m_hwnd && m_transparent) {
        BYTE alpha;
        GetLayeredWindowAttributes(m_hwnd, nullptr, &alpha, nullptr);
        return alpha / 255.0f;
    }
    return 1.0f;
}

void WindowWin32::setOpacity(float opacity) {
    if (m_hwnd && m_transparent) {
        BYTE alpha = static_cast<BYTE>(opacity * 255);
        SetLayeredWindowAttributes(m_hwnd, RGB(0, 0, 0), alpha, LWA_ALPHA);
    }
}

// État de la fenêtre
bool WindowWin32::isVisible() const { return m_visible; }
bool WindowWin32::isMinimized() const { return m_hwnd && IsIconic(m_hwnd); }
bool WindowWin32::isMaximized() const { return m_hwnd && IsZoomed(m_hwnd); }
bool WindowWin32::isFocused() const { return m_hwnd && GetForegroundWindow() == m_hwnd; }
bool WindowWin32::isResizable() const { return m_resizable; }
bool WindowWin32::isDecorated() const { return m_decorated; }
bool WindowWin32::isFullscreen() const { return m_fullscreen; }
bool WindowWin32::isTransparent() const { return m_transparent; }
bool WindowWin32::isAlwaysOnTop() const { return m_alwaysOnTop; }

void WindowWin32::setResizable(bool resizable) {
    m_resizable = resizable;
    updateWindowStyle();
}

void WindowWin32::setDecorated(bool decorated) {
    m_decorated = decorated;
    updateWindowStyle();
}

void WindowWin32::setFullscreen(bool fullscreen) {
    if (m_fullscreen == fullscreen) return;
    
    if (fullscreen) {
        // Sauvegarder l'état actuel
        GetWindowPlacement(m_hwnd, &m_windowedPlacement);
        
        // Obtenir le moniteur
        HMONITOR monitor = MonitorFromWindow(m_hwnd, MONITOR_DEFAULTTOPRIMARY);
        MONITORINFO mi = {sizeof(MONITORINFO)};
        GetMonitorInfo(monitor, &mi);
        
        // Passer en plein écran
        SetWindowLong(m_hwnd, GWL_STYLE, WS_POPUP | WS_VISIBLE);
        SetWindowPos(m_hwnd, HWND_TOP,
                    mi.rcMonitor.left, mi.rcMonitor.top,
                    mi.rcMonitor.right - mi.rcMonitor.left,
                    mi.rcMonitor.bottom - mi.rcMonitor.top,
                    SWP_FRAMECHANGED);
    } else {
        // Restaurer l'état fenêtré
        updateWindowStyle();
        SetWindowPlacement(m_hwnd, &m_windowedPlacement);
    }
    
    m_fullscreen = fullscreen;
}

void WindowWin32::setTransparent(bool transparent) {
    m_transparent = transparent;
    updateWindowStyle();
}

void WindowWin32::setAlwaysOnTop(bool alwaysOnTop) {
    m_alwaysOnTop = alwaysOnTop;
    if (m_hwnd) {
        SetWindowPos(m_hwnd, alwaysOnTop ? HWND_TOPMOST : HWND_NOTOPMOST,
                    0, 0, 0, 0, SWP_NOMOVE | SWP_NOSIZE);
    }
}

void WindowWin32::updateWindowStyle() {
    if (!m_hwnd) return;
    
    DWORD style = WS_OVERLAPPEDWINDOW;
    DWORD exStyle = WS_EX_APPWINDOW;
    
    if (!m_decorated) {
        style = WS_POPUP;
    }
    if (m_transparent) {
        exStyle |= WS_EX_LAYERED;
    }
    if (m_alwaysOnTop) {
        exStyle |= WS_EX_TOPMOST;
    }
    if (!m_resizable) {
        style &= ~(WS_THICKFRAME | WS_MAXIMIZEBOX);
    }
    
    SetWindowLong(m_hwnd, GWL_STYLE, style);
    SetWindowLong(m_hwnd, GWL_EXSTYLE, exStyle);
    SetWindowPos(m_hwnd, nullptr, 0, 0, 0, 0,
                SWP_FRAMECHANGED | SWP_NOMOVE | SWP_NOSIZE | SWP_NOZORDER);
}

DisplayMode WindowWin32::getDisplayMode() const {
    return m_displayMode;
}

void WindowWin32::setDisplayMode(DisplayMode mode) {
    m_displayMode = mode;
    setFullscreen(mode != DisplayMode::Windowed);
}

// VSync et Framerate
bool WindowWin32::isVSyncEnabled() const { return m_vsync; }

void WindowWin32::setVSync(bool enabled) {
    m_vsync = enabled;
    typedef BOOL (WINAPI * PFNWGLSWAPINTERVALEXTPROC)(int interval);
    PFNWGLSWAPINTERVALEXTPROC wglSwapIntervalEXT = 
        (PFNWGLSWAPINTERVALEXTPROC)wglGetProcAddress("wglSwapIntervalEXT");
    if (wglSwapIntervalEXT) {
        wglSwapIntervalEXT(enabled ? 1 : 0);
    }
}

void WindowWin32::setFramerateLimit(int limit) {
    m_framerateLimit = limit;
}

int WindowWin32::getFramerateLimit() const {
    return m_framerateLimit;
}

// Curseur - Continuons...
bool WindowWin32::isCursorVisible() const { return m_cursorVisible; }

void WindowWin32::setCursorVisible(bool visible) {
    m_cursorVisible = visible;
    ShowCursor(visible ? TRUE : FALSE);
}

bool WindowWin32::isCursorConfined() const { return m_cursorConfined; }

void WindowWin32::setConfineCursor(bool confine) {
    m_cursorConfined = confine;
    if (confine && m_hwnd) {
        RECT rect;
        GetClientRect(m_hwnd, &rect);
        ClientToScreen(m_hwnd, (POINT*)&rect.left);
        ClientToScreen(m_hwnd, (POINT*)&rect.right);
        ClipCursor(&rect);
    } else {
        ClipCursor(nullptr);
    }
}

void WindowWin32::setCursorPosition(int x, int y) {
    if (m_hwnd) {
        POINT pt = {x, y};
        ClientToScreen(m_hwnd, &pt);
        SetCursorPos(pt.x, pt.y);
    }
}

void WindowWin32::getCursorPosition(int& x, int& y) const {
    if (m_hwnd) {
        POINT pt;
        GetCursorPos(&pt);
        ScreenToClient(m_hwnd, &pt);
        x = pt.x;
        y = pt.y;
    } else {
        x = y = 0;
    }
}

// Aspect ratio
bool WindowWin32::isMaintainingAspectRatio() const { return m_maintainAspectRatio; }

void WindowWin32::setMaintainAspectRatio(bool maintain, float ratio) {
    m_maintainAspectRatio = maintain;
    m_aspectRatio = ratio;
}

float WindowWin32::getAspectRatio() const { return m_aspectRatio; }

// Informations
void* WindowWin32::getNativeHandle() const { return m_hwnd; }
void* WindowWin32::getNativeContext() const { return m_hglrc; }

DisplayInfo WindowWin32::getDisplayInfo() const {
    // TODO: Implémenter
    return DisplayInfo{};
}

float WindowWin32::getDPIScale() const {
    if (m_hwnd) {
        return GetDpiForWindow(m_hwnd) / 96.0f;
    }
    return 1.0f;
}

void WindowWin32::getDPI(float& x, float& y) const {
    UINT dpiX = 96, dpiY = 96;
    if (m_hwnd) {
        dpiX = dpiY = GetDpiForWindow(m_hwnd);
    }
    x = static_cast<float>(dpiX);
    y = static_cast<float>(dpiY);
}

Je continue avec processEvents et les méthodes statiques dans le prochain message, puis Android ?

## Continuation de WindowWin32.cpp - Événements et Méthodes Statiques

```cpp
// platforms/WindowWin32.cpp (suite)

void WindowWin32::processEvents() {
    MSG msg;
    while (PeekMessage(&msg, m_hwnd, 0, 0, PM_REMOVE)) {
        TranslateMessage(&msg);
        DispatchMessage(&msg);
    }
    
    // Mise à jour des statistiques
    m_stats.update();
    
    // Limitation de framerate
    if (m_framerateLimit > 0) {
        auto targetFrameTime = std::chrono::microseconds(1000000 / m_framerateLimit);
        auto now = std::chrono::steady_clock::now();
        auto elapsed = now - m_lastFrameTime;
        
        if (elapsed < targetFrameTime) {
            auto sleepTime = targetFrameTime - elapsed;
            std::this_thread::sleep_for(sleepTime);
        }
        
        m_lastFrameTime = std::chrono::steady_clock::now();
    }
}

std::string WindowWin32::getClipboardText() const {
    if (!OpenClipboard(m_hwnd)) {
        return "";
    }
    
    HANDLE hData = GetClipboardData(CF_TEXT);
    if (!hData) {
        CloseClipboard();
        return "";
    }
    
    char* pszText = static_cast<char*>(GlobalLock(hData));
    if (!pszText) {
        CloseClipboard();
        return "";
    }
    
    std::string text(pszText);
    GlobalUnlock(hData);
    CloseClipboard();
    
    return text;
}

void WindowWin32::setClipboardText(const std::string& text) {
    if (!OpenClipboard(m_hwnd)) {
        return;
    }
    
    EmptyClipboard();
    
    HGLOBAL hMem = GlobalAlloc(GMEM_MOVEABLE, text.size() + 1);
    if (!hMem) {
        CloseClipboard();
        return;
    }
    
    char* pMem = static_cast<char*>(GlobalLock(hMem));
    if (!pMem) {
        GlobalFree(hMem);
        CloseClipboard();
        return;
    }
    
    memcpy(pMem, text.c_str(), text.size() + 1);
    GlobalUnlock(hMem);
    
    SetClipboardData(CF_TEXT, hMem);
    CloseClipboard();
}

void WindowWin32::setShowFPS(bool show) { m_showFPS = show; }
bool WindowWin32::isShowingFPS() const { return m_showFPS; }
void WindowWin32::setShowStats(bool show) { m_showStats = show; }
bool WindowWin32::isShowingStats() const { return m_showStats; }

WindowImpl::Stats WindowWin32::getStats() const {
    Stats stats;
    stats.fps = m_stats.fps;
    stats.frameTime = m_stats.frameTime;
    stats.width = m_width;
    stats.height = m_height;
    stats.drawCalls = 0; // À remplir par le renderer
    stats.memoryUsage = 0; // À remplir par le renderer
    return stats;
}

std::vector<DisplayInfo> WindowWin32::getAllDisplays() {
    std::vector<DisplayInfo> displays;
    
    auto enumProc = [](HMONITOR hMonitor, HDC hdcMonitor, LPRECT lprcMonitor, LPARAM dwData) -> BOOL {
        auto* pDisplays = reinterpret_cast<std::vector<DisplayInfo>*>(dwData);
        
        MONITORINFOEX mi = {};
        mi.cbSize = sizeof(MONITORINFOEX);
        GetMonitorInfo(hMonitor, &mi);
        
        DEVMODE dm = {};
        dm.dmSize = sizeof(DEVMODE);
        EnumDisplaySettings(mi.szDevice, ENUM_CURRENT_SETTINGS, &dm);
        
        DisplayInfo info;
        info.index = static_cast<int>(pDisplays->size());
        info.name = mi.szDevice;
        info.width = dm.dmPelsWidth;
        info.height = dm.dmPelsHeight;
        info.refreshRate = dm.dmDisplayFrequency;
        info.x = mi.rcMonitor.left;
        info.y = mi.rcMonitor.top;
        info.isPrimary = (mi.dwFlags & MONITORINFOF_PRIMARY) != 0;
        
        pDisplays->push_back(info);
        return TRUE;
    };
    
    EnumDisplayMonitors(nullptr, nullptr, enumProc, reinterpret_cast<LPARAM>(&displays));
    return displays;
}

DisplayInfo WindowWin32::getPrimaryDisplay() {
    HMONITOR hMonitor = MonitorFromPoint({0, 0}, MONITOR_DEFAULTTOPRIMARY);
    
    MONITORINFOEX mi = {};
    mi.cbSize = sizeof(MONITORINFOEX);
    GetMonitorInfo(hMonitor, &mi);
    
    DEVMODE dm = {};
    dm.dmSize = sizeof(DEVMODE);
    EnumDisplaySettings(mi.szDevice, ENUM_CURRENT_SETTINGS, &dm);
    
    DisplayInfo info;
    info.index = 0;
    info.name = mi.szDevice;
    info.width = dm.dmPelsWidth;
    info.height = dm.dmPelsHeight;
    info.refreshRate = dm.dmDisplayFrequency;
    info.x = mi.rcMonitor.left;
    info.y = mi.rcMonitor.top;
    info.isPrimary = true;
    
    return info;
}

LRESULT CALLBACK WindowWin32::windowProc(HWND hwnd, UINT msg, WPARAM wParam, LPARAM lParam) {
    WindowWin32* window = nullptr;
    
    auto it = s_windowMap.find(hwnd);
    if (it != s_windowMap.end()) {
        window = it->second;
    }
    
    if (!window) {
        return DefWindowProc(hwnd, msg, wParam, lParam);
    }
    
    switch (msg) {
        case WM_CLOSE: {
            auto event = std::make_unique<WindowEvent>(
                EventType::WindowClosed,
                window->getWindow(),
                WindowEventData{window->m_width, window->m_height, window->m_x, window->m_y}
            );
            window->pushEvent(std::move(event));
            return 0;
        }
        
        case WM_SIZE: {
            int width = LOWORD(lParam);
            int height = HIWORD(lParam);
            
            window->m_width = width;
            window->m_height = height;
            
            if (wParam == SIZE_MINIMIZED) {
                auto event = std::make_unique<WindowEvent>(
                    EventType::WindowMinimized,
                    window->getWindow(),
                    WindowEventData{width, height, window->m_x, window->m_y}
                );
                window->pushEvent(std::move(event));
            } else if (wParam == SIZE_MAXIMIZED) {
                auto event = std::make_unique<WindowEvent>(
                    EventType::WindowMaximized,
                    window->getWindow(),
                    WindowEventData{width, height, window->m_x, window->m_y}
                );
                window->pushEvent(std::move(event));
            } else if (wParam == SIZE_RESTORED) {
                auto event = std::make_unique<WindowEvent>(
                    EventType::WindowRestored,
                    window->getWindow(),
                    WindowEventData{width, height, window->m_x, window->m_y}
                );
                window->pushEvent(std::move(event));
            }
            
            auto resizeEvent = std::make_unique<WindowEvent>(
                EventType::WindowResized,
                window->getWindow(),
                WindowEventData{width, height, window->m_x, window->m_y}
            );
            window->pushEvent(std::move(resizeEvent));
            return 0;
        }
        
        case WM_MOVE: {
            int x = LOWORD(lParam);
            int y = HIWORD(lParam);
            
            window->m_x = x;
            window->m_y = y;
            
            auto event = std::make_unique<WindowEvent>(
                EventType::WindowMoved,
                window->getWindow(),
                WindowEventData{window->m_width, window->m_height, x, y}
            );
            window->pushEvent(std::move(event));
            return 0;
        }
        
        case WM_SETFOCUS: {
            auto event = std::make_unique<WindowEvent>(
                EventType::WindowFocusGained,
                window->getWindow(),
                WindowEventData{window->m_width, window->m_height, window->m_x, window->m_y}
            );
            window->pushEvent(std::move(event));
            return 0;
        }
        
        case WM_KILLFOCUS: {
            auto event = std::make_unique<WindowEvent>(
                EventType::WindowFocusLost,
                window->getWindow(),
                WindowEventData{window->m_width, window->m_height, window->m_x, window->m_y}
            );
            window->pushEvent(std::move(event));
            return 0;
        }
        
        case WM_KEYDOWN:
        case WM_SYSKEYDOWN: {
            KeyEventData data;
            data.code = virtualKeyToKey(wParam, lParam);
            data.alt = (GetKeyState(VK_MENU) & 0x8000) != 0;
            data.control = (GetKeyState(VK_CONTROL) & 0x8000) != 0;
            data.shift = (GetKeyState(VK_SHIFT) & 0x8000) != 0;
            data.system = (lParam & (1 << 24)) != 0;
            data.repeat = (lParam & 0xFFFF) > 1;
            data.scancode = (lParam >> 16) & 0xFF;
            
            auto event = std::make_unique<KeyEvent>(
                EventType::KeyPressed,
                window->getWindow(),
                data
            );
            window->pushEvent(std::move(event));
            return 0;
        }
        
        case WM_KEYUP:
        case WM_SYSKEYUP: {
            KeyEventData data;
            data.code = virtualKeyToKey(wParam, lParam);
            data.alt = (GetKeyState(VK_MENU) & 0x8000) != 0;
            data.control = (GetKeyState(VK_CONTROL) & 0x8000) != 0;
            data.shift = (GetKeyState(VK_SHIFT) & 0x8000) != 0;
            data.system = (lParam & (1 << 24)) != 0;
            data.repeat = false;
            data.scancode = (lParam >> 16) & 0xFF;
            
            auto event = std::make_unique<KeyEvent>(
                EventType::KeyReleased,
                window->getWindow(),
                data
            );
            window->pushEvent(std::move(event));
            return 0;
        }
        
        case WM_CHAR: {
            auto event = std::make_unique<TextEvent>(
                window->getWindow(),
                static_cast<uint32_t>(wParam)
            );
            window->pushEvent(std::move(event));
            return 0;
        }
        
        case WM_MOUSEMOVE: {
            int x = GET_X_LPARAM(lParam);
            int y = GET_Y_LPARAM(lParam);
            
            MouseMoveEventData data;
            data.x = x;
            data.y = y;
            data.deltaX = x - window->m_lastMouseX;
            data.deltaY = y - window->m_lastMouseY;
            
            window->m_lastMouseX = x;
            window->m_lastMouseY = y;
