```cpp
// platforms/android_main.cpp
#ifdef __ANDROID__

#include <android_native_app_glue.h>
#include "AndroidWindow.hpp"
#include "AndroidEvent.hpp"
#include "../EventSystem.hpp"
#include <thread>
#include <atomic>

namespace nk {
    extern int nk_main(int argc, char** argv);
}

std::atomic<bool> g_androidRunning{true};

void android_main(struct android_app* app) {
    app_dummy(); // Nécessaire pour éviter le stripping
    
    // Créer la fenêtre Android
    nk::AndroidWindow androidWindow(app);
    
    // Attendre que la surface native soit créée
    while (!androidWindow.isValid() && app->destroyRequested == 0) {
        int events;
        struct android_poll_source* source;
        
        // Polling bloquant
        if (ALooper_pollAll(10, nullptr, &events, (void**)&source) >= 0) {
            if (source != nullptr) {
                source->process(app, source);
            }
        }
    }
    
    if (app->destroyRequested != 0) {
        return;
    }
    
    // Lancer nk_main dans un thread séparé
    std::thread mainThread([]() {
        char* argv[] = {(char*)"android_app"};
        nk::nk_main(1, argv);
        g_androidRunning = false;
    });
    
    // Continuer à traiter les événements Android dans le thread principal
    while (g_androidRunning && app->destroyRequested == 0) {
        int events;
        struct android_poll_source* source;
        
        // Polling non-bloquant
        while (ALooper_pollAll(0, nullptr, &events, (void**)&source) >= 0) {
            if (source != nullptr) {
                source->process(app, source);
            }
        }
        
        // Petit sleep pour ne pas surcharger le CPU
        std::this_thread::sleep_for(std::chrono::milliseconds(1));
    }
    
    // Attendre la fin du thread principal
    if (mainThread.joinable()) {
        mainThread.join();
    }
}

#endif // __ANDROID__
```

Je continue avec les autres plateformes (X11, Cocoa, iOS, Emscripten) ou vous voulez d'abord voir le Renderer avec accès direct au framebuffer ?

## 9. Renderer avec Accès Direct au Framebuffer

```cpp
// Renderer.hpp (refonte complète)
#pragma once

#include "Window.hpp"
#include "WindowConfig.hpp"
#include "Error.hpp"
#include <memory>
#include <cstdint>

namespace nk {

// Forward declaration
class RendererImpl;

// ====================================================================
// TYPES DE FRAMEBUFFER
// ====================================================================

enum class FramebufferFormat {
    RGBA8888,       // 32 bits (8R, 8G, 8B, 8A)
    RGB888,         // 24 bits (8R, 8G, 8B)
    RGB565,         // 16 bits (5R, 6G, 5B) - mobile
    BGRA8888,       // 32 bits (8B, 8G, 8R, 8A) - Windows
    ARGB8888        // 32 bits (8A, 8R, 8G, 8B)
};

// ====================================================================
// INFORMATIONS SUR LE FRAMEBUFFER
// ====================================================================

struct FramebufferInfo {
    void* pixels;               // Pointeur vers les pixels
    int width;                  // Largeur en pixels
    int height;                 // Hauteur en pixels
    int pitch;                  // Nombre de bytes par ligne (peut être != width * bpp)
    FramebufferFormat format;   // Format des pixels
    int bitsPerPixel;           // Bits par pixel
    
    // Masques pour extraction des composantes (format RGB565, etc.)
    uint32_t redMask;
    uint32_t greenMask;
    uint32_t blueMask;
    uint32_t alphaMask;
    
    int redShift;
    int greenShift;
    int blueShift;
    int alphaShift;
};

// ====================================================================
// CLASSE RENDERER
// ====================================================================

class Renderer {
public:
    // Constructeur
    Renderer(Window& window, const RendererConfig& config = RendererConfig());
    Renderer(); // Constructeur par défaut
    ~Renderer();
    
    // Pas de copie
    Renderer(const Renderer&) = delete;
    Renderer& operator=(const Renderer&) = delete;
    
    // Créer le renderer (si constructeur par défaut utilisé)
    bool create(Window& window, const RendererConfig& config = RendererConfig());
    
    // Vérifier si le renderer est valide
    bool isValid() const;
    
    // ================================================================
    // GESTION DE FRAME
    // ================================================================
    
    // Méthode simple : begin + clear automatique
    void beginFrame(uint32_t clearColor = 0xFF000000);
    
    // Méthode avancée : begin, clear séparé, end
    void beginFrame();
    void clear(uint32_t color);
    void endFrame();
    
    // Présenter le framebuffer
    void present();
    
    // ================================================================
    // ACCÈS DIRECT AU FRAMEBUFFER
    // ================================================================
    
    // Obtenir les informations du framebuffer
    const FramebufferInfo& getFramebufferInfo() const;
    
    // Accès direct aux pixels (lecture/écriture)
    void* getPixels();
    const void* getPixels() const;
    
    // Lock/Unlock pour accès concurrent (optionnel)
    bool lockFramebuffer();
    void unlockFramebuffer();
    
    // ================================================================
    // PRIMITIVES 2D (HELPERS)
    // ================================================================
    
    void setPixel(int x, int y, uint32_t color);
    uint32_t getPixel(int x, int y) const;
    
    void drawLine(int x1, int y1, int x2, int y2, uint32_t color);
    void drawRect(int x, int y, int width, int height, uint32_t color);
    void fillRect(int x, int y, int width, int height, uint32_t color);
    void drawCircle(int x, int y, int radius, uint32_t color);
    void fillCircle(int x, int y, int radius, uint32_t color);
    
    // Copier une région d'une autre surface
    void blit(const void* srcPixels, int srcWidth, int srcHeight, int srcPitch,
             int srcX, int srcY, int srcW, int srcH,
             int dstX, int dstY);
    
    // ================================================================
    // VIEWPORT
    // ================================================================
    
    void setViewport(int x, int y, int width, int height);
    void getViewport(int& x, int& y, int& width, int& height) const;
    
    // ================================================================
    // INFORMATIONS
    // ================================================================
    
    RendererAPI getAPI() const;
    const char* getAPIName() const;
    bool isHardwareAccelerated() const;
    
    Window& getWindow() { return *m_window; }
    const Window& getWindow() const { return *m_window; }
    
    // ================================================================
    // UTILITAIRES DE COULEUR
    // ================================================================
    
    // Convertir RGBA vers le format du framebuffer
    uint32_t packColor(uint8_t r, uint8_t g, uint8_t b, uint8_t a = 255) const;
    
    // Convertir depuis le format du framebuffer vers RGBA
    void unpackColor(uint32_t packed, uint8_t& r, uint8_t& g, uint8_t& b, uint8_t& a) const;
    
    // ================================================================
    // ERREURS
    // ================================================================
    
    Error getLastError() const;
    bool hasError() const;
    
private:
    Window* m_window;
    std::unique_ptr<RendererImpl> m_impl;
    bool m_created;
};

// ====================================================================
// INTERFACE D'IMPLÉMENTATION DU RENDERER
// ====================================================================

class RendererImpl {
public:
    virtual ~RendererImpl() = default;
    
    virtual bool initialize(Window& window, const RendererConfig& config) = 0;
    virtual void shutdown() = 0;
    
    virtual void beginFrame() = 0;
    virtual void endFrame() = 0;
    virtual void clear(uint32_t color) = 0;
    virtual void present() = 0;
    
    virtual const FramebufferInfo& getFramebufferInfo() const = 0;
    virtual void* getPixels() = 0;
    virtual const void* getPixels() const = 0;
    
    virtual bool lockFramebuffer() = 0;
    virtual void unlockFramebuffer() = 0;
    
    virtual void setViewport(int x, int y, int width, int height) = 0;
    virtual void getViewport(int& x, int& y, int& width, int& height) const = 0;
    
    virtual RendererAPI getAPI() const = 0;
    virtual const char* getAPIName() const = 0;
    virtual bool isHardwareAccelerated() const = 0;
    
    virtual bool hasError() const { return m_hasError; }
    virtual Error getLastError() const { return m_lastError; }
    
protected:
    bool m_hasError = false;
    Error m_lastError;
    
    void setError(ErrorSeverity severity, const std::string& message, int code = 0) {
        m_hasError = true;
        m_lastError = Error(severity, ErrorCategory::Renderer, message);
        m_lastError.errorCode = code;
        ErrorManager::instance().pushError(m_lastError);
    }
    
    void clearError() {
        m_hasError = false;
    }
};

} // namespace nk
```

## 10. Renderer.cpp

```cpp
// Renderer.cpp
#include "Renderer.hpp"

// Inclure les implémentations
#if defined(_WIN32)
    #include "renderers/RendererWin32.hpp"
#elif defined(__ANDROID__)
    #include "renderers/RendererAndroid.hpp"
#elif defined(__linux__) && !defined(__ANDROID__)
    #include "renderers/RendererX11.hpp"
#elif defined(__APPLE__)
    #include <TargetConditionals.h>
    #if TARGET_OS_IPHONE
        #include "renderers/RendereriOS.hpp"
    #else
        #include "renderers/RendererCocoa.hpp"
    #endif
#elif defined(__EMSCRIPTEN__)
    #include "renderers/RendererEmscripten.hpp"
#endif

#include <cstring>
#include <algorithm>
#include <cmath>

namespace nk {

Renderer::Renderer(Window& window, const RendererConfig& config)
    : m_window(nullptr)
    , m_created(false) {
    
    create(window, config);
}

Renderer::Renderer()
    : m_window(nullptr)
    , m_created(false) {
}

Renderer::~Renderer() {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->shutdown();
    }
}

bool Renderer::create(Window& window, const RendererConfig& config) {
    if (m_created) {
        NK_WARNING(ErrorCategory::Renderer, "Renderer already created");
        return false;
    }
    
    m_window = &window;
    
    // Créer l'implémentation selon la plateforme et la config
#if defined(_WIN32)
    m_impl = std::make_unique<RendererWin32>();
#elif defined(__ANDROID__)
    m_impl = std::make_unique<RendererAndroid>();
#elif defined(__linux__) && !defined(__ANDROID__)
    m_impl = std::make_unique<RendererX11>();
#elif defined(__APPLE__)
    #if TARGET_OS_IPHONE
        m_impl = std::make_unique<RendereriOS>();
    #else
        m_impl = std::make_unique<RendererCocoa>();
    #endif
#elif defined(__EMSCRIPTEN__)
    m_impl = std::make_unique<RendererEmscripten>();
#else
    NK_FATAL(ErrorCategory::Renderer, "Unsupported platform");
    return false;
#endif
    
    if (!m_impl->initialize(window, config)) {
        NK_ERROR(ErrorCategory::Renderer, "Failed to initialize renderer");
        return false;
    }
    
    m_created = true;
    return true;
}

bool Renderer::isValid() const {
    return m_created && m_impl != nullptr;
}

// ================================================================
// GESTION DE FRAME
// ================================================================

void Renderer::beginFrame(uint32_t clearColor) {
    if (!m_impl) return;
    
    m_impl->beginFrame();
    m_impl->clear(clearColor);
}

void Renderer::beginFrame() {
    if (!m_impl) return;
    m_impl->beginFrame();
}

void Renderer::clear(uint32_t color) {
    if (!m_impl) return;
    m_impl->clear(color);
}

void Renderer::endFrame() {
    if (!m_impl) return;
    m_impl->endFrame();
}

void Renderer::present() {
    if (!m_impl) return;
    m_impl->present();
}

// ================================================================
// ACCÈS DIRECT AU FRAMEBUFFER
// ================================================================

const FramebufferInfo& Renderer::getFramebufferInfo() const {
    static FramebufferInfo dummy = {};
    return m_impl ? m_impl->getFramebufferInfo() : dummy;
}

void* Renderer::getPixels() {
    return m_impl ? m_impl->getPixels() : nullptr;
}

const void* Renderer::getPixels() const {
    return m_impl ? m_impl->getPixels() : nullptr;
}

bool Renderer::lockFramebuffer() {
    return m_impl ? m_impl->lockFramebuffer() : false;
}

void Renderer::unlockFramebuffer() {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->unlockFramebuffer();
    }
}

// ================================================================
// PRIMITIVES 2D
// ================================================================

void Renderer::setPixel(int x, int y, uint32_t color) {
    if (!m_impl) return;
    
    const auto& fb = getFramebufferInfo();
    
    if (x < 0 || x >= fb.width || y < 0 || y >= fb.height) {
        return;
    }
    
    uint8_t* pixels = static_cast<uint8_t*>(fb.pixels);
    int bytesPerPixel = fb.bitsPerPixel / 8;
    
    uint8_t* pixel = pixels + y * fb.pitch + x * bytesPerPixel;
    
    if (bytesPerPixel == 4) {
        *reinterpret_cast<uint32_t*>(pixel) = color;
    } else if (bytesPerPixel == 3) {
        pixel[0] = (color >> 0) & 0xFF;
        pixel[1] = (color >> 8) & 0xFF;
        pixel[2] = (color >> 16) & 0xFF;
    } else if (bytesPerPixel == 2) {
        *reinterpret_cast<uint16_t*>(pixel) = static_cast<uint16_t>(color);
    }
}

uint32_t Renderer::getPixel(int x, int y) const {
    if (!m_impl) return 0;
    
    const auto& fb = getFramebufferInfo();
    
    if (x < 0 || x >= fb.width || y < 0 || y >= fb.height) {
        return 0;
    }
    
    const uint8_t* pixels = static_cast<const uint8_t*>(fb.pixels);
    int bytesPerPixel = fb.bitsPerPixel / 8;
    
    const uint8_t* pixel = pixels + y * fb.pitch + x * bytesPerPixel;
    
    if (bytesPerPixel == 4) {
        return *reinterpret_cast<const uint32_t*>(pixel);
    } else if (bytesPerPixel == 3) {
        return pixel[0] | (pixel[1] << 8) | (pixel[2] << 16);
    } else if (bytesPerPixel == 2) {
        return *reinterpret_cast<const uint16_t*>(pixel);
    }
    
    return 0;
}

void Renderer::drawLine(int x1, int y1, int x2, int y2, uint32_t color) {
    // Algorithme de Bresenham
    int dx = std::abs(x2 - x1);
    int dy = std::abs(y2 - y1);
    int sx = x1 < x2 ? 1 : -1;
    int sy = y1 < y2 ? 1 : -1;
    int err = dx - dy;
    
    while (true) {
        setPixel(x1, y1, color);
        
        if (x1 == x2 && y1 == y2) break;
        
        int e2 = 2 * err;
        if (e2 > -dy) {
            err -= dy;
            x1 += sx;
        }
        if (e2 < dx) {
            err += dx;
            y1 += sy;
        }
    }
}

void Renderer::drawRect(int x, int y, int width, int height, uint32_t color) {
    drawLine(x, y, x + width - 1, y, color);
    drawLine(x + width - 1, y, x + width - 1, y + height - 1, color);
    drawLine(x + width - 1, y + height - 1, x, y + height - 1, color);
    drawLine(x, y + height - 1, x, y, color);
}

void Renderer::fillRect(int x, int y, int width, int height, uint32_t color) {
    const auto& fb = getFramebufferInfo();
    
    // Clipper
    int x1 = std::max(0, x);
    int y1 = std::max(0, y);
    int x2 = std::min(fb.width, x + width);
    int y2 = std::min(fb.height, y + height);
    
    if (x1 >= x2 || y1 >= y2) return;
    
    // Remplir ligne par ligne
    int bytesPerPixel = fb.bitsPerPixel / 8;
    uint8_t* pixels = static_cast<uint8_t*>(fb.pixels);
    
    for (int py = y1; py < y2; py++) {
        uint8_t* line = pixels + py * fb.pitch + x1 * bytesPerPixel;
        
        if (bytesPerPixel == 4) {
            uint32_t* p = reinterpret_cast<uint32_t*>(line);
            for (int px = x1; px < x2; px++) {
                *p++ = color;
            }
        } else if (bytesPerPixel == 3) {
            for (int px = x1; px < x2; px++) {
                line[0] = (color >> 0) & 0xFF;
                line[1] = (color >> 8) & 0xFF;
                line[2] = (color >> 16) & 0xFF;
                line += 3;
            }
        } else if (bytesPerPixel == 2) {
            uint16_t* p = reinterpret_cast<uint16_t*>(line);
            uint16_t color16 = static_cast<uint16_t>(color);
            for (int px = x1; px < x2; px++) {
                *p++ = color16;
            }
        }
    }
}

void Renderer::drawCircle(int cx, int cy, int radius, uint32_t color) {
    // Algorithme de Bresenham pour cercle
    int x = 0;
    int y = radius;
    int d = 3 - 2 * radius;
    
    auto drawCirclePoints = [&](int x, int y) {
        setPixel(cx + x, cy + y, color);
        setPixel(cx - x, cy + y, color);
        setPixel(cx + x, cy - y, color);
        setPixel(cx - x, cy - y, color);
        setPixel(cx + y, cy + x, color);
        setPixel(cx - y, cy + x, color);
        setPixel(cx + y, cy - x, color);
        setPixel(cx - y, cy - x, color);
    };
    
    drawCirclePoints(x, y);
    
    while (y >= x) {
        x++;
        
        if (d > 0) {
            y--;
            d = d + 4 * (x - y) + 10;
        } else {
            d = d + 4 * x + 6;
        }
        
        drawCirclePoints(x, y);
    }
}

void Renderer::fillCircle(int cx, int cy, int radius, uint32_t color) {
    int x = 0;
    int y = radius;
    int d = 3 - 2 * radius;
    
    auto drawHorizontalLine = [&](int x1, int x2, int y) {
        if (x1 > x2) std::swap(x1, x2);
        for (int x = x1; x <= x2; x++) {
            setPixel(x, y, color);
        }
    };
    
    auto fillCircleLines = [&](int x, int y) {
        drawHorizontalLine(cx - x, cx + x, cy + y);
        drawHorizontalLine(cx - x, cx + x, cy - y);
        drawHorizontalLine(cx - y, cx + y, cy + x);
        drawHorizontalLine(cx - y, cx + y, cy - x);
    };
    
    fillCircleLines(x, y);
    
    while (y >= x) {
        x++;
        
        if (d > 0) {
            y--;
            d = d + 4 * (x - y) + 10;
        } else {
            d = d + 4 * x + 6;
        }
        
        fillCircleLines(x, y);
    }
}

void Renderer::blit(const void* srcPixels, int srcWidth, int srcHeight, int srcPitch,
                   int srcX, int srcY, int srcW, int srcH,
                   int dstX, int dstY) {
    const auto& fb = getFramebufferInfo();
    
    // Clipper source
    if (srcX < 0) { srcW += srcX; dstX -= srcX; srcX = 0; }
    if (srcY < 0) { srcH += srcY; dstY -= srcY; srcY = 0; }
    if (srcX + srcW > srcWidth) srcW = srcWidth - srcX;
    if (srcY + srcH > srcHeight) srcH = srcHeight - srcY;
    
    // Clipper destination
    if (dstX < 0) { srcW += dstX; srcX -= dstX; dstX = 0; }
    if (dstY < 0) { srcH += dstY; srcY -= dstY; dstY = 0; }
    if (dstX + srcW > fb.width) srcW = fb.width - dstX;
    if (dstY + srcH > fb.height) srcH = fb.height - dstY;
    
    if (srcW <= 0 || srcH <= 0) return;
    
    int bytesPerPixel = fb.bitsPerPixel / 8;
    const uint8_t* src = static_cast<const uint8_t*>(srcPixels);
    uint8_t* dst = static_cast<uint8_t*>(fb.pixels);
    
    for (int y = 0; y < srcH; y++) {
        const uint8_t* srcLine = src + (srcY + y) * srcPitch + srcX * bytesPerPixel;
        uint8_t* dstLine = dst + (dstY + y) * fb.pitch + dstX * bytesPerPixel;
        
        std::memcpy(dstLine, srcLine, srcW * bytesPerPixel);
    }
}

// ================================================================
// VIEWPORT
// ================================================================

void Renderer::setViewport(int x, int y, int width, int height) {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->setViewport(x, y, width, height);
    }
}

void Renderer::getViewport(int& x, int& y, int& width, int& height) const {
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->getViewport(x, y, width, height);
    } else {
        x = y = width = height = 0;
    }
}

// ================================================================
// INFORMATIONS
// ================================================================

RendererAPI Renderer::getAPI() const {
    return m_impl ? m_impl->getAPI() : RendererAPI::Software;
}

const char* Renderer::getAPIName() const {
    return m_impl ? m_impl->getAPIName() : "None";
}

bool Renderer::isHardwareAccelerated() const {
    return m_impl ? m_impl->isHardwareAccelerated() : false;
}

// ================================================================
// UTILITAIRES DE COULEUR
// ================================================================

uint32_t Renderer::packColor(uint8_t r, uint8_t g, uint8_t b, uint8_t a) const {
    const auto& fb = getFramebufferInfo();
    
    switch (fb.format) {
        case FramebufferFormat::RGBA8888:
            return r | (g << 8) | (b << 16) | (a << 24);
            
        case FramebufferFormat::BGRA8888:
            return b | (g << 8) | (r << 16) | (a << 24);
            
        case FramebufferFormat::ARGB8888:
            return (a << 24) | (r << 16) | (g << 8) | b;
            
        case FramebufferFormat::RGB888:
            return r | (g << 8) | (b << 16);
            
        case FramebufferFormat::RGB565:
            return ((r >> 3) << 11) | ((g >> 2) << 5) | (b >> 3);
            
        default:
            return r | (g << 8) | (b << 16) | (a << 24);
    }
}

void Renderer::unpackColor(uint32_t packed, uint8_t& r, uint8_t& g, uint8_t& b, uint8_t& a) const {
    const auto& fb = getFramebufferInfo();
    
    switch (fb.format) {
        case FramebufferFormat::RGBA8888:
            r = (packed >> 0) & 0xFF;
            g = (packed >> 8) & 0xFF;
            b = (packed >> 16) & 0xFF;
            a = (packed >> 24) & 0xFF;
            break;
            
        case FramebufferFormat::BGRA8888:
            b = (packed >> 0) & 0xFF;
            g = (packed >> 8) & 0xFF;
            r = (packed >> 16) & 0xFF;
            a = (packed >> 24) & 0xFF;
            break;
            
        case FramebufferFormat::ARGB8888:
            a = (packed >> 24) & 0xFF;
            r = (packed >> 16) & 0xFF;
            g = (packed >> 8) & 0xFF;
            b = (packed >> 0) & 0xFF;
            break;
            
        case FramebufferFormat::RGB888:
            r = (packed >> 0) & 0xFF;
            g = (packed >> 8) & 0xFF;
            b = (packed >> 16) & 0xFF;
            a = 255;
            break;
            
        case FramebufferFormat::RGB565: {
            uint16_t c = static_cast<uint16_t>(packed);
            r = ((c >> 11) & 0x1F) << 3;
            g = ((c >> 5) & 0x3F) << 2;
            b = (c & 0x1F) << 3;
            a = 255;
            break;
        }
            
        default:
            r = g = b = a = 0;
            break;
    }
}

// ================================================================
// ERREURS
// ================================================================

Error Renderer::getLastError() const {
    return m_impl ? m_impl->getLastError() : Error();
}

bool Renderer::hasError() const {
    return m_impl && m_impl->hasError();
}

} // namespace nk
```

## 11. RendererWin32.hpp et RendererWin32.cpp

```cpp
// renderers/RendererWin32.hpp
#pragma once
#ifdef _WIN32

#include "../Renderer.hpp"
#include "../Window.hpp"
#include <windows.h>
#include <mutex>

namespace nk {

class Win32Window;

class RendererWin32 : public RendererImpl {
public:
    RendererWin32();
    ~RendererWin32() override;
    
    bool initialize(Window& window, const RendererConfig& config) override;
    void shutdown() override;
    
    void beginFrame() override;
    void endFrame() override;
    void clear(uint32_t color) override;
    void present() override;
    
    const FramebufferInfo& getFramebufferInfo() const override;
    void* getPixels() override;
    const void* getPixels() const override;
    
    bool lockFramebuffer() override;
    void unlockFramebuffer() override;
    
    void setViewport(int x, int y, int width, int height) override;
    void getViewport(int& x, int& y, int& width, int& height) const override;
    
    RendererAPI getAPI() const override;
    const char* getAPIName() const override;
    bool isHardwareAccelerated() const override;
    
private:
    void createDIBSection();
    void destroyDIBSection();
    
    Win32Window* m_win32Window;
    HWND m_hwnd;
    HDC m_hdc;
    HDC m_memDC;
    HBITMAP m_bitmap;
    HBITMAP m_oldBitmap;
    
    FramebufferInfo m_framebuffer;
    std::vector<uint32_t> m_pixels;
    
    int m_width;
    int m_height;
    
    struct {
        int x, y, width, height;
    } m_viewport;
    
    bool m_locked;
    std::mutex m_mutex;
    
    RendererConfig m_config;
};

} // namespace nk

#endif // _WIN32
```

```cpp
// renderers/RendererWin32.cpp
#ifdef _WIN32

#include "RendererWin32.hpp"
#include "../platforms/Win32Window.hpp"
#include "../Error.hpp"

namespace nk {

RendererWin32::RendererWin32()
    : m_win32Window(nullptr)
    , m_hwnd(nullptr)
    , m_hdc(nullptr)
    , m_memDC(nullptr)
    , m_bitmap(nullptr)
    , m_oldBitmap(nullptr)
    , m_width(0)
    , m_height(0)
    , m_locked(false) {
    
    m_viewport = {0, 0, 0, 0};
}

RendererWin32::~RendererWin32() {
    shutdown();
}

bool RendererWin32::initialize(Window& window, const RendererConfig& config) {
    m_config = config;
    
    // Obtenir le Win32Window
    m_win32Window = dynamic_cast<Win32Window*>(window.m_impl.get());
    if (!m_win32Window) {
        setError(ErrorSeverity::Fatal, "Window is not a Win32Window");
        return false;
    }
    
    m_hwnd = m_win32Window->getNativeHandle();
    if (!m_hwnd) {
        setError(ErrorSeverity::Fatal, "Invalid window handle");
        return false;
    }
    
    m_hdc = GetDC(m_hwnd);
    if (!m_hdc) {
        setError(ErrorSeverity::Fatal, "Failed to get DC", GetLastError());
        return false;
    }
    
    // Obtenir la taille de la fenêtre
    m_width = window.getClientWidth();
    m_height = window.getClientHeight();
    
    // Créer le DIB Section pour l'accès direct aux pixels
    createDIBSection();
    
    // Viewport par défaut
    m_viewport.x = 0;
    m_viewport.y = 0;
    m_viewport.width = m_width;
    m_viewport.height = m_height;
    
    clearError();
    return true;
}

void RendererWin32::shutdown() {
    destroyDIBSection();
    
    if (m_hdc && m_hwnd) {
        ReleaseDC(m_hwnd, m_hdc);
        m_hdc = nullptr;
    }
}

void RendererWin32::createDIBSection() {
    // Créer un DC mémoire
    m_memDC = CreateCompatibleDC(m_hdc);
    if (!m_memDC) {
        setError(ErrorSeverity::Error, "Failed to create memory DC", GetLastError());
        return;
    }
    
    // Créer le DIB Section
    BITMAPINFO bmi = {};
    bmi.bmiHeader.biSize = sizeof(BITMAPINFOHEADER);
    bmi.bmiHeader.biWidth = m_width;
    bmi.bmiHeader.biHeight = -m_height; // Top-down
    bmi.bmiHeader.biPlanes = 1;
    bmi.bmiHeader.biBitCount = 32;
    bmi.bmiHeader.biCompression = BI_RGB;
    
    void* pixels = nullptr;
    m_bitmap = CreateDIBSection(m_memDC, &bmi, DIB_RGB_COLORS, &pixels, nullptr, 0);
    
    if (!m_bitmap) {
        setError(ErrorSeverity::Fatal, "Failed to create DIB section", GetLastError());
        return;
    }
    
    // Sélectionner le bitmap dans le DC
    m_oldBitmap = (HBITMAP)SelectObject(m_memDC, m_bitmap);
    
    // Configurer le framebuffer info
    m_framebuffer.pixels = pixels;
    m_framebuffer.width = m_width;
    m_framebuffer.height = m_height;
    m_framebuffer.pitch = m_width * 4; // 4 bytes par pixel
    m_framebuffer.format = FramebufferFormat::BGRA8888; // Windows utilise BGRA
    m_framebuffer.bitsPerPixel = 32;
    
    m_framebuffer.blueMask = 0x000000FF;
    m_framebuffer.greenMask = 0x0000FF00;
    m_framebuffer.redMask = 0x00FF0000;
    m_framebuffer.alphaMask = 0xFF000000;
    
    m_framebuffer.blueShift = 0;
    m_framebuffer.greenShift = 8;
    m_framebuffer.redShift = 16;
    m_framebuffer.alphaShift = 24;
}

void RendererWin32::destroyDIBSection() {
    if (m_memDC) {
        if (m_oldBitmap) {
            SelectObject(m_memDC, m_oldBitmap);
            m_oldBitmap = nullptr;
        }
        
        DeleteDC(m_memDC);
        m_memDC = nullptr;
    }
    
    if (m_bitmap) {
        DeleteObject(m_bitmap);
        m_bitmap = nullptr;
    }
    
    m_framebuffer.pixels = nullptr;
}

void RendererWin32::beginFrame() {
    // Rien à faire
}

void RendererWin32::endFrame() {
    // Rien à faire
}

void RendererWin32::clear(uint32_t color) {
    if (!m_framebuffer.pixels) return;
    
    lockFramebuffer();
    
    // Convertir RGBA vers BGRA
    uint8_t r = (color >> 0) & 0xFF;
    uint8_t g = (color >> 8) & 0xFF;
    uint8_t b = (color >> 16) & 0xFF;
    uint8_t a = (color >> 24) & 0xFF;
    
    uint32_t bgraColor = b | (g << 8) | (r << 16) | (a << 24);
    
    uint32_t* pixels = static_cast<uint32_t*>(m_framebuffer.pixels);
    size_t count = m_width * m_height;
    
    for (size_t i = 0; i < count; i++) {
        pixels[i] = bgraColor;
    }
    
    unlockFramebuffer();
}

void RendererWin32::present() {
    if (!m_memDC || !m_hdc) return;
    
    // Copier le framebuffer vers le DC de la fenêtre
    BitBlt(m_hdc, 0, 0, m_width, m_height, m_memDC, 0, 0, SRCCOPY);
    
    // VSync si activé
    if (m_config.vsync) {
        DwmFlush(); // Attendre le VSync
    }
}

const FramebufferInfo& RendererWin32::getFramebufferInfo() const {
    return m_framebuffer;
}

void* RendererWin32::getPixels() {
    return m_framebuffer.pixels;
}

const void* RendererWin32::getPixels() const {
    return m_framebuffer.pixels;
}

bool RendererWin32::lockFramebuffer() {
    m_mutex.lock();
    m_locked = true;
    return true;
}

void RendererWin32::unlockFramebuffer() {
    m_locked = false;
    m_mutex.unlock();
}

void RendererWin32::setViewport(int x, int y, int width, int height) {
    m_viewport.x = x;
    m_viewport.y = y;
    m_viewport.width = width;
    m_viewport.height = height;
}

void RendererWin32::getViewport(int& x, int& y, int& width, int& height) const {
    x = m_viewport.x;
    y = m_viewport.y;
    width = m_viewport.width;
    height = m_viewport.height;
}

RendererAPI RendererWin32::getAPI() const {
    return RendererAPI::Software;
}

const char* RendererWin32::getAPIName() const {
    return "Win32 Software Renderer";
}

bool RendererWin32::isHardwareAccelerated() const {
    return false;
}

} // namespace nk

#endif // _WIN32
```

## 12. RendererAndroid.hpp et RendererAndroid.cpp

```cpp
// renderers/RendererAndroid.hpp
#pragma once
#ifdef __ANDROID__

#include "../Renderer.hpp"
#include "../Window.hpp"
#include <EGL/egl.h>
#include <GLES2/gl2.h>
#include <mutex>

namespace nk {

class AndroidWindow;

class RendererAndroid : public RendererImpl {
public:
    RendererAndroid();
    ~RendererAndroid() override;
    
    bool initialize(Window& window, const RendererConfig& config) override;
    void shutdown() override;
    
    void beginFrame() override;
    void endFrame() override;
    void clear(uint32_t color) override;
    void present() override;
    
    const FramebufferInfo& getFramebufferInfo() const override;
    void* getPixels() override;
    const void* getPixels() const override;
    
    bool lockFramebuffer() override;
    void unlockFramebuffer() override;
    
    void setViewport(int x, int y, int width, int height) override;
    void getViewport(int& x, int& y, int& width, int& height) const override;
    
    RendererAPI getAPI() const override;
    const char* getAPIName() const override;
    bool isHardwareAccelerated() const override;
    
private:
    void createFramebuffer();
    void destroyFramebuffer();
    void uploadToGPU();
    
    AndroidWindow* m_androidWindow;
    
    FramebufferInfo m_framebuffer;
    std::vector<uint32_t> m_pixels;
    
    int m_width;
    int m_height;
    
    struct {
        int x, y, width, height;
    } m_viewport;
    
    // OpenGL ES pour l'affichage
    GLuint m_texture;
    GLuint m_program;
    GLuint m_vbo;
    
    bool m_locked;
    std::mutex m_mutex;
    
    RendererConfig m_config;
};

} // namespace nk

#endif // __ANDROID__
```

```cpp
// renderers/RendererAndroid.cpp
#ifdef __ANDROID__

#include "RendererAndroid.hpp"
#include "../platforms/AndroidWindow.hpp"
#include "../Error.hpp"
#include <android/log.h>

#define LOGI(...) ((void)__android_log_print(ANDROID_LOG_INFO, "NK", __VA_ARGS__))
#define LOGE(...) ((void)__android_log_print(ANDROID_LOG_ERROR, "NK", __VA_ARGS__))

namespace nk {

// Vertex shader simple pour afficher une texture plein écran
static const char* vertexShaderSource = R"(
attribute vec2 aPosition;
attribute vec2 aTexCoord;
varying vec2 vTexCoord;
void main() {
    gl_Position = vec4(aPosition, 0.0, 1.0);
    vTexCoord = aTexCoord;
}
)";

// Fragment shader
static const char* fragmentShaderSource = R"(
precision mediump float;
varying vec2 vTexCoord;
uniform sampler2D uTexture;
void main() {
    gl_FragColor = texture2D(uTexture, vTexCoord);
}
)";

RendererAndroid::RendererAndroid()
    : m_androidWindow(nullptr)
    , m_width(0)
    , m_height(0)
    , m_texture(0)
    , m_program(0)
    , m_vbo(0)
    , m_locked(false) {
    
    m_viewport = {0, 0, 0, 0};
}

RendererAndroid::~RendererAndroid() {
    shutdown();
}

bool RendererAndroid::initialize(Window& window, const RendererConfig& config) {
    m_config = config;
    
    // Obtenir l'AndroidWindow
    m_androidWindow = dynamic_cast<AndroidWindow*>(window.m_impl.get());
    if (!m_androidWindow) {
        setError(ErrorSeverity::Fatal, "Window is not an AndroidWindow");
        return false;
    }
    
    // Obtenir la taille
    m_width = window.getWidth();
    m_height = window.getHeight();
    
    LOGI("Renderer initializing: %dx%d", m_width, m_height);
    
    // Créer le framebuffer CPU
    createFramebuffer();
    
    // Créer les ressources OpenGL ES pour l'affichage
    // Compiler les shaders
    GLuint vertexShader = glCreateShader(GL_VERTEX_SHADER);
    glShaderSource(vertexShader, 1, &vertexShaderSource, nullptr);
    glCompileShader(vertexShader);
    
    GLuint fragmentShader = glCreateShader(GL_FRAGMENT_SHADER);
    glShaderSource(fragmentShader, 1, &fragmentShaderSource, nullptr);
    glCompileShader(fragmentShader);
    
    // Linker le programme
    m_program = glCreateProgram();
    glAttachShader(m_program, vertexShader);
    glAttachShader(m_program, fragmentShader);
    glLinkProgram(m_program);
    
    glDeleteShader(vertexShader);
    glDeleteShader(fragmentShader);
    
    // Créer la texture
    glGenTextures(1, &m_texture);
    glBindTexture(GL_TEXTURE_2D, m_texture);
    glTexParameteri(GL_TEXTURE_2D, GL_TEXTURE_MIN_FILTER, GL_NEAREST);
    glTexParameteri(GL_TEXTURE_2D, GL_TEXTURE_MAG_FILTER, GL_NEAREST);
    glTexParameteri(GL_TEXTURE_2D, GL_TEXTURE_WRAP_S, GL_CLAMP_TO_EDGE);
    glTexParameteri(GL_TEXTURE_2D, GL_TEXTURE_WRAP_T, GL_CLAMP_TO_EDGE);
    
    // Créer le VBO pour un quad plein écran
    float vertices[] = {
        // Position   // TexCoord
        -1.0f, -1.0f,  0.0f, 1.0f,
         1.0f, -1.0f,  1.0f, 1.0f,
        -1.0f,  1.0f,  0.0f, 0.0f,
         1.0f,  1.0f,  1.0f, 0.0f
    };
    
    glGenBuffers(1, &m_vbo);
    glBindBuffer(GL_ARRAY_BUFFER, m_vbo);
    glBufferData(GL_ARRAY_BUFFER, sizeof(vertices), vertices, GL_STATIC_DRAW);
    
    // Viewport
    m_viewport.x = 0;
    m_viewport.y = 0;
    m_viewport.width = m_width;
    m_viewport.height = m_height;
    
    LOGI("Renderer initialized successfully");
    clearError();
    return true;
}

void RendererAndroid::shutdown() {
    destroyFramebuffer();
    
    if (m_texture) {
        glDeleteTextures(1, &m_texture);
        m_texture = 0;
    }
    
    if (m_vbo) {
        glDeleteBuffers(1, &m_vbo);
        m_vbo = 0;
    }
    
    if (m_program) {
        glDeleteProgram(m_program);
        m_program = 0;
    }
}

void RendererAndroid::createFramebuffer() {
    size_t pixelCount = m_width * m_height;
    m_pixels.resize(pixelCount);
    
    m_framebuffer.pixels = m_pixels.data();
    m_framebuffer.width = m_width;
    m_framebuffer.height = m_height;
    m_framebuffer.pitch = m_width * 4;
    m_framebuffer.format = FramebufferFormat::RGBA8888;
    m_framebuffer.bitsPerPixel = 32;
    
    m_framebuffer.redMask = 0x000000FF;
    m_framebuffer.greenMask = 0x0000FF00;
    m_framebuffer.blueMask = 0x00FF0000;
    m_framebuffer.alphaMask = 0xFF000000;
    
    m_framebuffer.redShift = 0;
    m_framebuffer.greenShift = 8;
    m_framebuffer.blueShift = 16;
    m_framebuffer.alphaShift = 24;
}

void RendererAndroid::destroyFramebuffer() {
    m_pixels.clear();
    m_framebuffer.pixels = nullptr;
}

void RendererAndroid::beginFrame() {
    // Rien à faire
}

void RendererAndroid::endFrame() {
    // Upload vers GPU
    uploadToGPU();
}

void RendererAndroid::clear(uint32_t color) {
    if (m_pixels.empty()) return;
    
    lockFramebuffer();
    std::fill(m_pixels.begin(), m_pixels.end(), color);
    unlockFramebuffer();
}

void RendererAndroid::uploadToGPU() {
    if (!m_texture || m_pixels.empty()) return;
    
    lockFramebuffer();
    
    // Upload la texture
    glBindTexture(GL_TEXTURE_2D, m_texture);
    glTexImage2D(GL_TEXTURE_2D, 0, GL_RGBA, m_width, m_height, 0, 
                GL_RGBA, GL_UNSIGNED_BYTE, m_pixels.data());
    
    unlockFramebuffer();
}

void RendererAndroid::present() {
    if (!m_program || !m_texture || !m_vbo) return;
    
    // Afficher le framebuffer CPU via OpenGL ES
    glViewport(0, 0, m_width, m_height);
    
    glUseProgram(m_program);
    
    // Bind texture
    glActiveTexture(GL_TEXTURE0);
    glBindTexture(GL_TEXTURE_2D, m_texture);
    
    // Bind VBO
    glBindBuffer(GL_ARRAY_BUFFER, m_vbo);
    
    GLint posLoc = glGetAttribLocation(m_program, "aPosition");
    GLint texLoc = glGetAttribLocation(m_program, "aTexCoord");
    
    glEnableVertexAttribArray(posLoc);
    glVertexAttribPointer(posLoc, 2, GL_FLOAT, GL_FALSE, 4 * sizeof(float), (void*)0);
    
    glEnableVertexAttribArray(texLoc);
    glVertexAttribPointer(texLoc, 2, GL_FLOAT, GL_FALSE, 4 * sizeof(float), (void*)(2 * sizeof(float)));
    
    // Dessiner le quad
    glDrawArrays(GL_TRIANGLE_STRIP, 0, 4);
    
    glDisableVertexAttribArray(posLoc);
    glDisableVertexAttribArray(texLoc);
    
    // Swap buffers (géré par EGL dans AndroidWindow)
    if (m_androidWindow) {
        EGLDisplay display = m_androidWindow->m_eglDisplay;
        EGLSurface surface = m_androidWindow->m_eglSurface;
        if (display != EGL_NO_DISPLAY && surface != EGL_NO_SURFACE) {
            eglSwapBuffers(display, surface);
        }
    }
}

const FramebufferInfo& RendererAndroid::getFramebufferInfo() const {
    return m_framebuffer;
}

void* RendererAndroid::getPixels() {
    return m_pixels.data();
}

const void* RendererAndroid::getPixels() const {
    return m_pixels.data();
}

bool RendererAndroid::lockFramebuffer() {
    m_mutex.lock();
    m_locked = true;
    return true;
}

void RendererAndroid::unlockFramebuffer() {
    m_locked = false;
    m_mutex.unlock();
}

void RendererAndroid::setViewport(int x, int y, int width, int height) {
    m_viewport.x = x;
    m_viewport.y = y;
    m_viewport.width = width;
    m_viewport.height = height;
}

void RendererAndroid::getViewport(int& x, int& y, int& width, int& height) const {
    x = m_viewport.x;
    y = m_viewport.y;
    width = m_viewport.width;
    height = m_viewport.height;
}

RendererAPI RendererAndroid::getAPI() const {
    return RendererAPI::Software;
}

const char* RendererAndroid::getAPIName() const {
    return "Android Software Renderer (GPU Upload)";
}

bool RendererAndroid::isHardwareAccelerated() const {
    return true; // On utilise GPU pour l'affichage final
}

} // namespace nk

#endif // __ANDROID__
```

Je continue avec X11Event, CocoaEvent, iOSEvent et EmscriptenEvent dans le prochain message, ainsi que leurs fenêtres et renderers associés ?

## 13. X11Event (Linux) - Événements et Fenêtre

```cpp
// platforms/X11Event.hpp
#pragma once
#if defined(__linux__) && !defined(__ANDROID__)

#include "../Event.hpp"
#include <X11/Xlib.h>
#include <X11/Xutil.h>
#include <unordered_map>

namespace nk {

class X11Window;

// ====================================================================
// GESTIONNAIRE D'ÉVÉNEMENTS X11 (SINGLETON)
// ====================================================================

class X11Event {
public:
    static X11Event& instance();
    
    void update();
    
    void registerWindow(::Window xwindow, X11Window* window);
    void unregisterWindow(::Window xwindow);
    
    X11Window* getWindow(::Window xwindow) const;
    
private:
    X11Event() = default;
    ~X11Event() = default;
    
    X11Event(const X11Event&) = delete;
    X11Event& operator=(const X11Event&) = delete;
    
    void processEvent(const XEvent& xevent, X11Window* window);
    
    Key keysymToKey(KeySym keysym);
    
    std::unordered_map<::Window, X11Window*> m_windowMap;
    
    struct MouseState {
        int lastX = 0;
        int lastY = 0;
    };
    std::unordered_map<::Window, MouseState> m_mouseStates;
};

void X11Event_Update();

} // namespace nk

#endif
```

```cpp
// platforms/X11Event.cpp
#if defined(__linux__) && !defined(__ANDROID__)

#include "X11Event.hpp"
#include "X11Window.hpp"
#include "../EventSystem.hpp"
#include "../Error.hpp"

namespace nk {

X11Event& X11Event::instance() {
    static X11Event instance;
    return instance;
}

void X11Event_Update() {
    X11Event::instance().update();
}

void X11Event::update() {
    // Traiter tous les événements X11 en attente
    for (auto& [xwindow, window] : m_windowMap) {
        Display* display = window->getDisplay();
        if (!display) continue;
        
        XEvent event;
        while (XCheckWindowEvent(display, xwindow, 
            KeyPressMask | KeyReleaseMask | 
            ButtonPressMask | ButtonReleaseMask | 
            PointerMotionMask | 
            StructureNotifyMask | 
            FocusChangeMask | 
            ExposureMask,
            &event)) {
            
            processEvent(event, window);
        }
        
        // Vérifier aussi les événements ClientMessage (fermeture)
        while (XCheckTypedWindowEvent(display, xwindow, ClientMessage, &event)) {
            processEvent(event, window);
        }
    }
}

void X11Event::registerWindow(::Window xwindow, X11Window* window) {
    if (xwindow && window) {
        m_windowMap[xwindow] = window;
        m_mouseStates[xwindow] = MouseState{};
    }
}

void X11Event::unregisterWindow(::Window xwindow) {
    m_windowMap.erase(xwindow);
    m_mouseStates.erase(xwindow);
}

X11Window* X11Event::getWindow(::Window xwindow) const {
    auto it = m_windowMap.find(xwindow);
    return (it != m_windowMap.end()) ? it->second : nullptr;
}

void X11Event::processEvent(const XEvent& xevent, X11Window* window) {
    if (!window) return;
    
    Window* nkWindow = window->getWindow();
    auto& eventSystem = EventSystem::instance();
    
    switch (xevent.type) {
        case ClientMessage: {
            // Vérifier si c'est WM_DELETE_WINDOW
            if ((Atom)xevent.xclient.data.l[0] == window->getWMDeleteWindow()) {
                auto event = std::make_unique<WindowCloseEvent>();
                event->setWindow(nkWindow);
                eventSystem.pushEvent(std::move(event));
            }
            break;
        }
        
        case ConfigureNotify: {
            int width = xevent.xconfigure.width;
            int height = xevent.xconfigure.height;
            
            auto event = std::make_unique<WindowResizeEvent>(width, height);
            event->setWindow(nkWindow);
            eventSystem.pushEvent(std::move(event));
            
            // Position
            int x = xevent.xconfigure.x;
            int y = xevent.xconfigure.y;
            
            auto moveEvent = std::make_unique<WindowMoveEvent>(x, y);
            moveEvent->setWindow(nkWindow);
            eventSystem.pushEvent(std::move(moveEvent));
            break;
        }
        
        case FocusIn: {
            auto event = std::make_unique<WindowFocusEvent>(true);
            event->setWindow(nkWindow);
            eventSystem.pushEvent(std::move(event));
            break;
        }
        
        case FocusOut: {
            auto event = std::make_unique<WindowFocusEvent>(false);
            event->setWindow(nkWindow);
            eventSystem.pushEvent(std::move(event));
            break;
        }
        
        case KeyPress: {
            KeySym keysym = XLookupKeysym(const_cast<XKeyEvent*>(&xevent.xkey), 0);
            Key key = keysymToKey(keysym);
            
            bool alt = (xevent.xkey.state & Mod1Mask) != 0;
            bool ctrl = (xevent.xkey.state & ControlMask) != 0;
            bool shift = (xevent.xkey.state & ShiftMask) != 0;
            
            auto event = std::make_unique<KeyPressedEvent>(key, false, alt, ctrl, shift);
            event->setWindow(nkWindow);
            eventSystem.pushEvent(std::move(event));
            
            // Générer aussi un événement de texte si applicable
            char buffer[32];
            KeySym ks;
            int len = XLookupString(const_cast<XKeyEvent*>(&xevent.xkey), buffer, sizeof(buffer), &ks, nullptr);
            if (len > 0) {
                for (int i = 0; i < len; i++) {
                    auto textEvent = std::make_unique<KeyTypedEvent>(static_cast<uint32_t>(buffer[i]));
                    textEvent->setWindow(nkWindow);
                    eventSystem.pushEvent(std::move(textEvent));
                }
            }
            break;
        }
        
        case KeyRelease: {
            KeySym keysym = XLookupKeysym(const_cast<XKeyEvent*>(&xevent.xkey), 0);
            Key key = keysymToKey(keysym);
            
            bool alt = (xevent.xkey.state & Mod1Mask) != 0;
            bool ctrl = (xevent.xkey.state & ControlMask) != 0;
            bool shift = (xevent.xkey.state & ShiftMask) != 0;
            
            auto event = std::make_unique<KeyReleasedEvent>(key, alt, ctrl, shift);
            event->setWindow(nkWindow);
            eventSystem.pushEvent(std::move(event));
            break;
        }
        
        case MotionNotify: {
            int x = xevent.xmotion.x;
            int y = xevent.xmotion.y;
            
            auto& mouseState = m_mouseStates[xevent.xmotion.window];
            int deltaX = x - mouseState.lastX;
            int deltaY = y - mouseState.lastY;
            
            mouseState.lastX = x;
            mouseState.lastY = y;
            
            auto event = std::make_unique<MouseMovedEvent>(x, y, deltaX, deltaY);
            event->setWindow(nkWindow);
            eventSystem.pushEvent(std::move(event));
            break;
        }
        
        case ButtonPress: {
            int x = xevent.xbutton.x;
            int y = xevent.xbutton.y;
            
            MouseButton button = MouseButton::Left;
            
            if (xevent.xbutton.button == Button1) button = MouseButton::Left;
            else if (xevent.xbutton.button == Button2) button = MouseButton::Middle;
            else if (xevent.xbutton.button == Button3) button = MouseButton::Right;
            else if (xevent.xbutton.button == Button4 || xevent.xbutton.button == Button5) {
                // Scroll wheel
                float delta = (xevent.xbutton.button == Button4) ? 1.0f : -1.0f;
                auto scrollEvent = std::make_unique<MouseScrolledEvent>(0.0f, delta);
                scrollEvent->setWindow(nkWindow);
                eventSystem.pushEvent(std::move(scrollEvent));
                break;
            }
            
            auto event = std::make_unique<MouseButtonPressedEvent>(button, x, y);
            event->setWindow(nkWindow);
            eventSystem.pushEvent(std::move(event));
            break;
        }
        
        case ButtonRelease: {
            int x = xevent.xbutton.x;
            int y = xevent.xbutton.y;
            
            MouseButton button = MouseButton::Left;
            
            if (xevent.xbutton.button == Button1) button = MouseButton::Left;
            else if (xevent.xbutton.button == Button2) button = MouseButton::Middle;
            else if (xevent.xbutton.button == Button3) button = MouseButton::Right;
            else if (xevent.xbutton.button == Button4 || xevent.xbutton.button == Button5) {
                // Scroll events déjà gérés dans ButtonPress
                break;
            }
            
            auto event = std::make_unique<MouseButtonReleasedEvent>(button, x, y);
            event->setWindow(nkWindow);
            eventSystem.pushEvent(std::move(event));
            break;
        }
    }
}

Key X11Event::keysymToKey(KeySym keysym) {
    switch (keysym) {
        case XK_a: case XK_A: return Key::A;
        case XK_b: case XK_B: return Key::B;
        case XK_c: case XK_C: return Key::C;
        case XK_d: case XK_D: return Key::D;
        case XK_e: case XK_E: return Key::E;
        case XK_f: case XK_F: return Key::F;
        case XK_g: case XK_G: return Key::G;
        case XK_h: case XK_H: return Key::H;
        case XK_i: case XK_I: return Key::I;
        case XK_j: case XK_J: return Key::J;
        case XK_k: case XK_K: return Key::K;
        case XK_l: case XK_L: return Key::L;
        case XK_m: case XK_M: return Key::M;
        case XK_n: case XK_N: return Key::N;
        case XK_o: case XK_O: return Key::O;
        case XK_p: case XK_P: return Key::P;
        case XK_q: case XK_Q: return Key::Q;
        case XK_r: case XK_R: return Key::R;
        case XK_s: case XK_S: return Key::S;
        case XK_t: case XK_T: return Key::T;
        case XK_u: case XK_U: return Key::U;
        case XK_v: case XK_V: return Key::V;
        case XK_w: case XK_W: return Key::W;
        case XK_x: case XK_X: return Key::X;
        case XK_y: case XK_Y: return Key::Y;
        case XK_z: case XK_Z: return Key::Z;
        case XK_0: return Key::Num0;
        case XK_1: return Key::Num1;
        case XK_2: return Key::Num2;
        case XK_3: return Key::Num3;
        case XK_4: return Key::Num4;
        case XK_5: return Key::Num5;
        case XK_6: return Key::Num6;
        case XK_7: return Key::Num7;
        case XK_8: return Key::Num8;
        case XK_9: return Key::Num9;
        case XK_Escape: return Key::Escape;
        case XK_Control_L: return Key::LControl;
        case XK_Shift_L: return Key::LShift;
        case XK_Alt_L: return Key::LAlt;
        case XK_Super_L: return Key::LSystem;
        case XK_Control_R: return Key::RControl;
        case XK_Shift_R: return Key::RShift;
        case XK_Alt_R: return Key::RAlt;
        case XK_Super_R: return Key::RSystem;
        case XK_space: return Key::Space;
        case XK_Return: return Key::Enter;
        case XK_BackSpace: return Key::Backspace;
        case XK_Tab: return Key::Tab;
        case XK_Left: return Key::Left;
        case XK_Right: return Key::Right;
        case XK_Up: return Key::Up;
        case XK_Down: return Key::Down;
        case XK_F1: return Key::F1;
        case XK_F2: return Key::F2;
        case XK_F3: return Key::F3;
        case XK_F4: return Key::F4;
        case XK_F5: return Key::F5;
        case XK_F6: return Key::F6;
        case XK_F7: return Key::F7;
        case XK_F8: return Key::F8;
        case XK_F9: return Key::F9;
        case XK_F10: return Key::F10;
        case XK_F11: return Key::F11;
        case XK_F12: return Key::F12;
        default: return Key::Unknown;
    }
}

} // namespace nk

#endif
```

## 14. CocoaEvent (macOS) - Squelette

```cpp
// platforms/CocoaEvent.hpp
#pragma once
#if defined(__APPLE__) && !TARGET_OS_IPHONE

#include "../Event.hpp"
#include <unordered_map>

#ifdef __OBJC__
    @class NSEvent;
    @class NSWindow;
#else
    typedef struct objc_object NSEvent;
    typedef struct objc_object NSWindow;
#endif

namespace nk {

class CocoaWindow;

class CocoaEvent {
public:
    static CocoaEvent& instance();
    
    void update();
    
    void registerWindow(NSWindow* nswindow, CocoaWindow* window);
    void unregisterWindow(NSWindow* nswindow);
    
    CocoaWindow* getWindow(NSWindow* nswindow) const;
    
private:
    CocoaEvent() = default;
    ~CocoaEvent() = default;
    
    CocoaEvent(const CocoaEvent&) = delete;
    CocoaEvent& operator=(const CocoaEvent&) = delete;
    
    void processEvent(NSEvent* event, CocoaWindow* window);
    
    Key cocoaKeyToKey(unsigned short keyCode);
    
    std::unordered_map<void*, CocoaWindow*> m_windowMap;
    
    struct MouseState {
        int lastX = 0;
        int lastY = 0;
    };
    std::unordered_map<void*, MouseState> m_mouseStates;
};

void CocoaEvent_Update();

} // namespace nk

#endif
```

```cpp
// platforms/CocoaEvent.mm (Objective-C++)
#if defined(__APPLE__) && !TARGET_OS_IPHONE

#include "CocoaEvent.hpp"
#include "CocoaWindow.hpp"
#include "../EventSystem.hpp"
#include <Cocoa/Cocoa.h>

namespace nk {

CocoaEvent& CocoaEvent::instance() {
    static CocoaEvent instance;
    return instance;
}

void CocoaEvent_Update() {
    CocoaEvent::instance().update();
}

void CocoaEvent::update() {
    @autoreleasepool {
        NSEvent* event;
        while ((event = [NSApp nextEventMatchingMask:NSEventMaskAny
                                           untilDate:nil
                                              inMode:NSDefaultRunLoopMode
                                             dequeue:YES])) {
            
            NSWindow* nswindow = [event window];
            if (nswindow) {
                CocoaWindow* window = getWindow(nswindow);
                if (window) {
                    processEvent(event, window);
                }
            }
            
            [NSApp sendEvent:event];
        }
    }
}

void CocoaEvent::registerWindow(NSWindow* nswindow, CocoaWindow* window) {
    if (nswindow && window) {
        m_windowMap[(__bridge void*)nswindow] = window;
        m_mouseStates[(__bridge void*)nswindow] = MouseState{};
    }
}

void CocoaEvent::unregisterWindow(NSWindow* nswindow) {
    void* key = (__bridge void*)nswindow;
    m_windowMap.erase(key);
    m_mouseStates.erase(key);
}

CocoaWindow* CocoaEvent::getWindow(NSWindow* nswindow) const {
    auto it = m_windowMap.find((__bridge void*)nswindow);
    return (it != m_windowMap.end()) ? it->second : nullptr;
}

void CocoaEvent::processEvent(NSEvent* event, CocoaWindow* window) {
    if (!window) return;
    
    Window* nkWindow = window->getWindow();
    auto& eventSystem = EventSystem::instance();
    
    switch ([event type]) {
        case NSEventTypeKeyDown: {
            Key key = cocoaKeyToKey([event keyCode]);
            bool repeat = [event isARepeat];
            bool alt = ([event modifierFlags] & NSEventModifierFlagOption) != 0;
            bool ctrl = ([event modifierFlags] & NSEventModifierFlagControl) != 0;
            bool shift = ([event modifierFlags] & NSEventModifierFlagShift) != 0;
            
            auto keyEvent = std::make_unique<KeyPressedEvent>(key, repeat, alt, ctrl, shift);
            keyEvent->setWindow(nkWindow);
            eventSystem.pushEvent(std::move(keyEvent));
            
            // Texte
            NSString* chars = [event characters];
            if ([chars length] > 0) {
                unichar c = [chars characterAtIndex:0];
                auto textEvent = std::make_unique<KeyTypedEvent>(c);
                textEvent->setWindow(nkWindow);
                eventSystem.pushEvent(std::move(textEvent));
            }
            break;
        }
        
        case NSEventTypeKeyUp: {
            Key key = cocoaKeyToKey([event keyCode]);
            bool alt = ([event modifierFlags] & NSEventModifierFlagOption) != 0;
            bool ctrl = ([event modifierFlags] & NSEventModifierFlagControl) != 0;
            bool shift = ([event modifierFlags] & NSEventModifierFlagShift) != 0;
            
            auto keyEvent = std::make_unique<KeyReleasedEvent>(key, alt, ctrl, shift);
            keyEvent->setWindow(nkWindow);
            eventSystem.pushEvent(std::move(keyEvent));
            break;
        }
        
        case NSEventTypeMouseMoved:
        case NSEventTypeLeftMouseDragged:
        case NSEventTypeRightMouseDragged:
        case NSEventTypeOtherMouseDragged: {
            NSPoint location = [event locationInWindow];
            int x = static_cast<int>(location.x);
            int y = static_cast<int>([window->getNSWindow() frame].size.height - location.y);
            
            auto& mouseState = m_mouseStates[(__bridge void*)[event window]];
            int deltaX = x - mouseState.lastX;
            int deltaY = y - mouseState.lastY;
            
            mouseState.lastX = x;
            mouseState.lastY = y;
            
            auto moveEvent = std::make_unique<MouseMovedEvent>(x, y, deltaX, deltaY);
            moveEvent->setWindow(nkWindow);
            eventSystem.pushEvent(std::move(moveEvent));
            break;
        }
        
        case NSEventTypeLeftMouseDown: {
            NSPoint location = [event locationInWindow];
            int x = static_cast<int>(location.x);
            int y = static_cast<int>([window->getNSWindow() frame].size.height - location.y);
            
            auto mouseEvent = std::make_unique<MouseButtonPressedEvent>(MouseButton::Left, x, y);
            mouseEvent->setWindow(nkWindow);
            eventSystem.pushEvent(std::move(mouseEvent));
            break;
        }
        
        case NSEventTypeLeftMouseUp: {
            NSPoint location = [event locationInWindow];
            int x = static_cast<int>(location.x);
            int y = static_cast<int>([window->getNSWindow() frame].size.height - location.y);
            
            auto mouseEvent = std::make_unique<MouseButtonReleasedEvent>(MouseButton::Left, x, y);
            mouseEvent->setWindow(nkWindow);
            eventSystem.pushEvent(std::move(mouseEvent));
            break;
        }
        
        case NSEventTypeRightMouseDown: {
            NSPoint location = [event locationInWindow];
            int x = static_cast<int>(location.x);
            int y = static_cast<int>([window->getNSWindow() frame].size.height - location.y);
            
            auto mouseEvent = std::make_unique<MouseButtonPressedEvent>(MouseButton::Right, x, y);
            mouseEvent->setWindow(nkWindow);
            eventSystem.pushEvent(std::move(mouseEvent));
            break;
        }
        
        case NSEventTypeRightMouseUp: {
            NSPoint location = [event locationInWindow];
            int x = static_cast<int>(location.x);
            int y = static_cast<int>([window->getNSWindow() frame].size.height - location.y);
            
            auto mouseEvent = std::make_unique<MouseButtonReleasedEvent>(MouseButton::Right, x, y);
            mouseEvent->setWindow(nkWindow);
            eventSystem.pushEvent(std::move(mouseEvent));
            break;
        }
        
        case NSEventTypeScrollWheel: {
            float deltaX = [event scrollingDeltaX];
            float deltaY = [event scrollingDeltaY];
            
            auto scrollEvent = std::make_unique<MouseScrolledEvent>(deltaX, deltaY);
            scrollEvent->setWindow(nkWindow);
            eventSystem.pushEvent(std::move(scrollEvent));
            break;
        }
    }
}

Key CocoaEvent::cocoaKeyToKey(unsigned short keyCode) {
    // Codes clavier macOS
    switch (keyCode) {
        case 0x00: return Key::A;
        case 0x0B: return Key::B;
        case 0x08: return Key::C;
        case 0x02: return Key::D;
        case 0x0E: return Key::E;
        case 0x03: return Key::F;
        case 0x05: return Key::G;
        case 0x04: return Key::H;
        case 0x22: return Key::I;
        case 0x26: return Key::J;
        case 0x28: return Key::K;
        case 0x25: return Key::L;
        case 0x2E: return Key::M;
        case 0x2D: return Key::N;
        case 0x1F: return Key::O;
        case 0x23: return Key::P;
        case 0x0C: return Key::Q;
        case 0x0F: return Key::R;
        case 0x01: return Key::S;
        case 0x11: return Key::T;
        case 0x20: return Key::U;
        case 0x09: return Key::V;
        case 0x0D: return Key::W;
        case 0x07: return Key::X;
        case 0x10: return Key::Y;
        case 0x06: return Key::Z;
        case 0x1D: return Key::Num0;
        case 0x12: return Key::Num1;
        case 0x13: return Key::Num2;
        case 0x14: return Key::Num3;
        case 0x15: return Key::Num4;
        case 0x17: return Key::Num5;
        case 0x16: return Key::Num6;
        case 0x1A: return Key::Num7;
        case 0x1C: return Key::Num8;
        case 0x19: return Key::Num9;
        case 0x35: return Key::Escape;
        case 0x3B: return Key::LControl;
        case 0x38: return Key::LShift;
        case 0x3A: return Key::LAlt;
        case 0x37: return Key::LSystem;
        case 0x3E: return Key::RControl;
        case 0x3C: return Key::RShift;
        case 0x3D: return Key::RAlt;
        case 0x36: return Key::RSystem;
        case 0x31: return Key::Space;
        case 0x24: return Key::Enter;
        case 0x33: return Key::Backspace;
        case 0x30: return Key::Tab;
        case 0x7B: return Key::Left;
        case 0x7C: return Key::Right;
        case 0x7E: return Key::Up;
        case 0x7D: return Key::Down;
        case 0x7A: return Key::F1;
        case 0x78: return Key::F2;
        case 0x63: return Key::F3;
        case 0x76: return Key::F4;
        case 0x60: return Key::F5;
        case 0x61: return Key::F6;
        case 0x62: return Key::F7;
        case 0x64: return Key::F8;
        case 0x65: return Key::F9;
        case 0x6D: return Key::F10;
        case 0x67: return Key::F11;
        case 0x6F: return Key::F12;
        default: return Key::Unknown;
    }
}

} // namespace nk

#endif
```

Voulez-vous que je continue avec iOS et Emscripten, puis un exemple complet d'utilisation final avec tous les systèmes ?

## 15. iOSEvent (iOS) - Événements et Fenêtre

```cpp
// platforms/iOSEvent.hpp
#pragma once
#if defined(__APPLE__) && TARGET_OS_IPHONE

#include "../Event.hpp"
#include <unordered_map>

#ifdef __OBJC__
    @class UITouch;
    @class UIEvent;
    @class UIWindow;
#else
    typedef struct objc_object UITouch;
    typedef struct objc_object UIEvent;
    typedef struct objc_object UIWindow;
#endif

namespace nk {

class iOSWindow;

// ====================================================================
// GESTIONNAIRE D'ÉVÉNEMENTS iOS (SINGLETON)
// ====================================================================

class iOSEvent {
public:
    static iOSEvent& instance();
    
    void update();
    
    void registerWindow(UIWindow* uiwindow, iOSWindow* window);
    void unregisterWindow(UIWindow* uiwindow);
    
    iOSWindow* getWindow(UIWindow* uiwindow) const;
    
    // Callbacks appelés depuis le ViewController
    void onTouchesBegan(UIWindow* uiwindow, const std::vector<UITouch*>& touches);
    void onTouchesMoved(UIWindow* uiwindow, const std::vector<UITouch*>& touches);
    void onTouchesEnded(UIWindow* uiwindow, const std::vector<UITouch*>& touches);
    void onTouchesCancelled(UIWindow* uiwindow, const std::vector<UITouch*>& touches);
    
private:
    iOSEvent() = default;
    ~iOSEvent() = default;
    
    iOSEvent(const iOSEvent&) = delete;
    iOSEvent& operator=(const iOSEvent&) = delete;
    
    std::unordered_map<void*, iOSWindow*> m_windowMap;
    
    struct TouchState {
        int lastX = 0;
        int lastY = 0;
        bool active = false;
    };
    std::unordered_map<void*, TouchState> m_touchStates;
};

void iOSEvent_Update();

} // namespace nk

#endif
```

```cpp
// platforms/iOSEvent.mm
#if defined(__APPLE__) && TARGET_OS_IPHONE

#include "iOSEvent.hpp"
#include "iOSWindow.hpp"
#include "../EventSystem.hpp"
#import <UIKit/UIKit.h>

namespace nk {

iOSEvent& iOSEvent::instance() {
    static iOSEvent instance;
    return instance;
}

void iOSEvent_Update() {
    iOSEvent::instance().update();
}

void iOSEvent::update() {
    // Sur iOS, les événements sont gérés par les callbacks
    // Cette méthode peut être vide ou servir à d'autres tâches
}

void iOSEvent::registerWindow(UIWindow* uiwindow, iOSWindow* window) {
    if (uiwindow && window) {
        m_windowMap[(__bridge void*)uiwindow] = window;
        m_touchStates[(__bridge void*)uiwindow] = TouchState{};
    }
}

void iOSEvent::unregisterWindow(UIWindow* uiwindow) {
    void* key = (__bridge void*)uiwindow;
    m_windowMap.erase(key);
    m_touchStates.erase(key);
}

iOSWindow* iOSEvent::getWindow(UIWindow* uiwindow) const {
    auto it = m_windowMap.find((__bridge void*)uiwindow);
    return (it != m_windowMap.end()) ? it->second : nullptr;
}

void iOSEvent::onTouchesBegan(UIWindow* uiwindow, const std::vector<UITouch*>& touches) {
    iOSWindow* window = getWindow(uiwindow);
    if (!window || touches.empty()) return;
    
    Window* nkWindow = window->getWindow();
    auto& eventSystem = EventSystem::instance();
    
    UITouch* touch = touches[0];
    CGPoint location = [touch locationInView:nil];
    
    // Convertir les touches en événements souris
    int x = static_cast<int>(location.x);
    int y = static_cast<int>(location.y);
    
    auto& touchState = m_touchStates[(__bridge void*)uiwindow];
    touchState.lastX = x;
    touchState.lastY = y;
    touchState.active = true;
    
    auto event = std::make_unique<MouseButtonPressedEvent>(MouseButton::Left, x, y);
    event->setWindow(nkWindow);
    eventSystem.pushEvent(std::move(event));
}

void iOSEvent::onTouchesMoved(UIWindow* uiwindow, const std::vector<UITouch*>& touches) {
    iOSWindow* window = getWindow(uiwindow);
    if (!window || touches.empty()) return;
    
    Window* nkWindow = window->getWindow();
    auto& eventSystem = EventSystem::instance();
    
    UITouch* touch = touches[0];
    CGPoint location = [touch locationInView:nil];
    
    int x = static_cast<int>(location.x);
    int y = static_cast<int>(location.y);
    
    auto& touchState = m_touchStates[(__bridge void*)uiwindow];
    int deltaX = x - touchState.lastX;
    int deltaY = y - touchState.lastY;
    
    touchState.lastX = x;
    touchState.lastY = y;
    
    auto event = std::make_unique<MouseMovedEvent>(x, y, deltaX, deltaY);
    event->setWindow(nkWindow);
    eventSystem.pushEvent(std::move(event));
}

void iOSEvent::onTouchesEnded(UIWindow* uiwindow, const std::vector<UITouch*>& touches) {
    iOSWindow* window = getWindow(uiwindow);
    if (!window || touches.empty()) return;
    
    Window* nkWindow = window->getWindow();
    auto& eventSystem = EventSystem::instance();
    
    UITouch* touch = touches[0];
    CGPoint location = [touch locationInView:nil];
    
    int x = static_cast<int>(location.x);
    int y = static_cast<int>(location.y);
    
    auto& touchState = m_touchStates[(__bridge void*)uiwindow];
    touchState.active = false;
    
    auto event = std::make_unique<MouseButtonReleasedEvent>(MouseButton::Left, x, y);
    event->setWindow(nkWindow);
    eventSystem.pushEvent(std::move(event));
}

void iOSEvent::onTouchesCancelled(UIWindow* uiwindow, const std::vector<UITouch*>& touches) {
    // Traiter comme touchesEnded
    onTouchesEnded(uiwindow, touches);
}

} // namespace nk

#endif
```

## 16. EmscriptenEvent (Web) - Événements et Fenêtre

```cpp
// platforms/EmscriptenEvent.hpp
#pragma once
#ifdef __EMSCRIPTEN__

#include "../Event.hpp"
#include <emscripten/html5.h>
#include <unordered_map>
#include <string>

namespace nk {

class EmscriptenWindow;

// ====================================================================
// GESTIONNAIRE D'ÉVÉNEMENTS EMSCRIPTEN (SINGLETON)
// ====================================================================

class EmscriptenEvent {
public:
    static EmscriptenEvent& instance();
    
    void update();
    
    void registerWindow(const std::string& canvasId, EmscriptenWindow* window);
    void unregisterWindow(const std::string& canvasId);
    
    EmscriptenWindow* getWindow(const std::string& canvasId) const;
    
    // Callbacks HTML5
    static EM_BOOL onKeyDown(int eventType, const EmscriptenKeyboardEvent* keyEvent, void* userData);
    static EM_BOOL onKeyUp(int eventType, const EmscriptenKeyboardEvent* keyEvent, void* userData);
    
    static EM_BOOL onMouseMove(int eventType, const EmscriptenMouseEvent* mouseEvent, void* userData);
    static EM_BOOL onMouseDown(int eventType, const EmscriptenMouseEvent* mouseEvent, void* userData);
    static EM_BOOL onMouseUp(int eventType, const EmscriptenMouseEvent* mouseEvent, void* userData);
    static EM_BOOL onMouseWheel(int eventType, const EmscriptenWheelEvent* wheelEvent, void* userData);
    
    static EM_BOOL onResize(int eventType, const EmscriptenUiEvent* uiEvent, void* userData);
    static EM_BOOL onFocus(int eventType, const EmscriptenFocusEvent* focusEvent, void* userData);
    static EM_BOOL onBlur(int eventType, const EmscriptenFocusEvent* focusEvent, void* userData);
    
private:
    EmscriptenEvent() = default;
    ~EmscriptenEvent() = default;
    
    EmscriptenEvent(const EmscriptenEvent&) = delete;
    EmscriptenEvent& operator=(const EmscriptenEvent&) = delete;
    
    Key htmlKeyToKey(const std::string& key);
    
    std::unordered_map<std::string, EmscriptenWindow*> m_windowMap;
    
    struct MouseState {
        int lastX = 0;
        int lastY = 0;
    };
    std::unordered_map<std::string, MouseState> m_mouseStates;
};

void EmscriptenEvent_Update();

} // namespace nk

#endif
```

```cpp
// platforms/EmscriptenEvent.cpp
#ifdef __EMSCRIPTEN__

#include "EmscriptenEvent.hpp"
#include "EmscriptenWindow.hpp"
#include "../EventSystem.hpp"
#include "../Error.hpp"

namespace nk {

EmscriptenEvent& EmscriptenEvent::instance() {
    static EmscriptenEvent instance;
    return instance;
}

void EmscriptenEvent_Update() {
    EmscriptenEvent::instance().update();
}

void EmscriptenEvent::update() {
    // Les événements HTML5 sont gérés par les callbacks
    // On peut faire un emscripten_sleep(0) pour laisser le navigateur traiter les événements
    emscripten_sleep(0);
}

void EmscriptenEvent::registerWindow(const std::string& canvasId, EmscriptenWindow* window) {
    if (canvasId.empty() || !window) return;
    
    m_windowMap[canvasId] = window;
    m_mouseStates[canvasId] = MouseState{};
    
    // Enregistrer les callbacks HTML5
    const char* target = canvasId.c_str();
    
    emscripten_set_keydown_callback(EMSCRIPTEN_EVENT_TARGET_WINDOW, window, true, onKeyDown);
    emscripten_set_keyup_callback(EMSCRIPTEN_EVENT_TARGET_WINDOW, window, true, onKeyUp);
    
    emscripten_set_mousemove_callback(target, window, true, onMouseMove);
    emscripten_set_mousedown_callback(target, window, true, onMouseDown);
    emscripten_set_mouseup_callback(target, window, true, onMouseUp);
    emscripten_set_wheel_callback(target, window, true, onMouseWheel);
    
    emscripten_set_resize_callback(EMSCRIPTEN_EVENT_TARGET_WINDOW, window, false, onResize);
    emscripten_set_focus_callback(target, window, false, onFocus);
    emscripten_set_blur_callback(target, window, false, onBlur);
}

void EmscriptenEvent::unregisterWindow(const std::string& canvasId) {
    m_windowMap.erase(canvasId);
    m_mouseStates.erase(canvasId);
    
    // Désenregistrer les callbacks
    const char* target = canvasId.c_str();
    
    emscripten_set_keydown_callback(EMSCRIPTEN_EVENT_TARGET_WINDOW, nullptr, false, nullptr);
    emscripten_set_keyup_callback(EMSCRIPTEN_EVENT_TARGET_WINDOW, nullptr, false, nullptr);
    
    emscripten_set_mousemove_callback(target, nullptr, false, nullptr);
    emscripten_set_mousedown_callback(target, nullptr, false, nullptr);
    emscripten_set_mouseup_callback(target, nullptr, false, nullptr);
    emscripten_set_wheel_callback(target, nullptr, false, nullptr);
    
    emscripten_set_resize_callback(EMSCRIPTEN_EVENT_TARGET_WINDOW, nullptr, false, nullptr);
    emscripten_set_focus_callback(target, nullptr, false, nullptr);
    emscripten_set_blur_callback(target, nullptr, false, nullptr);
}

EmscriptenWindow* EmscriptenEvent::getWindow(const std::string& canvasId) const {
    auto it = m_windowMap.find(canvasId);
    return (it != m_windowMap.end()) ? it->second : nullptr;
}

EM_BOOL EmscriptenEvent::onKeyDown(int eventType, const EmscriptenKeyboardEvent* keyEvent, void* userData) {
    EmscriptenWindow* window = static_cast<EmscriptenWindow*>(userData);
    if (!window) return EM_FALSE;
    
    Window* nkWindow = window->getWindow();
    auto& eventSystem = EventSystem::instance();
    
    Key key = instance().htmlKeyToKey(keyEvent->key);
    
    bool alt = keyEvent->altKey;
    bool ctrl = keyEvent->ctrlKey;
    bool shift = keyEvent->shiftKey;
    bool repeat = keyEvent->repeat;
    
    auto event = std::make_unique<KeyPressedEvent>(key, repeat, alt, ctrl, shift);
    event->setWindow(nkWindow);
    eventSystem.pushEvent(std::move(event));
    
    return EM_TRUE;
}

EM_BOOL EmscriptenEvent::onKeyUp(int eventType, const EmscriptenKeyboardEvent* keyEvent, void* userData) {
    EmscriptenWindow* window = static_cast<EmscriptenWindow*>(userData);
    if (!window) return EM_FALSE;
    
    Window* nkWindow = window->getWindow();
    auto& eventSystem = EventSystem::instance();
    
    Key key = instance().htmlKeyToKey(keyEvent->key);
    
    bool alt = keyEvent->altKey;
    bool ctrl = keyEvent->ctrlKey;
    bool shift = keyEvent->shiftKey;
    
    auto event = std::make_unique<KeyReleasedEvent>(key, alt, ctrl, shift);
    event->setWindow(nkWindow);
    eventSystem.pushEvent(std::move(event));
    
    return EM_TRUE;
}

EM_BOOL EmscriptenEvent::onMouseMove(int eventType, const EmscriptenMouseEvent* mouseEvent, void* userData) {
    EmscriptenWindow* window = static_cast<EmscriptenWindow*>(userData);
    if (!window) return EM_FALSE;
    
    Window* nkWindow = window->getWindow();
    auto& eventSystem = EventSystem::instance();
    
    int x = mouseEvent->targetX;
    int y = mouseEvent->targetY;
    
    std::string canvasId = window->getCanvasId();
    auto& mouseState = instance().m_mouseStates[canvasId];
    
    int deltaX = x - mouseState.lastX;
    int deltaY = y - mouseState.lastY;
    
    mouseState.lastX = x;
    mouseState.lastY = y;
    
    auto event = std::make_unique<MouseMovedEvent>(x, y, deltaX, deltaY);
    event->setWindow(nkWindow);
    eventSystem.pushEvent(std::move(event));
    
    return EM_TRUE;
}

EM_BOOL EmscriptenEvent::onMouseDown(int eventType, const EmscriptenMouseEvent* mouseEvent, void* userData) {
    EmscriptenWindow* window = static_cast<EmscriptenWindow*>(userData);
    if (!window) return EM_FALSE;
    
    Window* nkWindow = window->getWindow();
    auto& eventSystem = EventSystem::instance();
    
    int x = mouseEvent->targetX;
    int y = mouseEvent->targetY;
    
    MouseButton button = MouseButton::Left;
    if (mouseEvent->button == 0) button = MouseButton::Left;
    else if (mouseEvent->button == 1) button = MouseButton::Middle;
    else if (mouseEvent->button == 2) button = MouseButton::Right;
    
    auto event = std::make_unique<MouseButtonPressedEvent>(button, x, y);
    event->setWindow(nkWindow);
    eventSystem.pushEvent(std::move(event));
    
    return EM_TRUE;
}

EM_BOOL EmscriptenEvent::onMouseUp(int eventType, const EmscriptenMouseEvent* mouseEvent, void* userData) {
    EmscriptenWindow* window = static_cast<EmscriptenWindow*>(userData);
    if (!window) return EM_FALSE;
    
    Window* nkWindow = window->getWindow();
    auto& eventSystem = EventSystem::instance();
    
    int x = mouseEvent->targetX;
    int y = mouseEvent->targetY;
    
    MouseButton button = MouseButton::Left;
    if (mouseEvent->button == 0) button = MouseButton::Left;
    else if (mouseEvent->button == 1) button = MouseButton::Middle;
    else if (mouseEvent->button == 2) button = MouseButton::Right;
    
    auto event = std::make_unique<MouseButtonReleasedEvent>(button, x, y);
    event->setWindow(nkWindow);
    eventSystem.pushEvent(std::move(event));
    
    return EM_TRUE;
}

EM_BOOL EmscriptenEvent::onMouseWheel(int eventType, const EmscriptenWheelEvent* wheelEvent, void* userData) {
    EmscriptenWindow* window = static_cast<EmscriptenWindow*>(userData);
    if (!window) return EM_FALSE;
    
    Window* nkWindow = window->getWindow();
    auto& eventSystem = EventSystem::instance();
    
    float deltaX = wheelEvent->deltaX;
    float deltaY = wheelEvent->deltaY;
    
    auto event = std::make_unique<MouseScrolledEvent>(deltaX, deltaY);
    event->setWindow(nkWindow);
    eventSystem.pushEvent(std::move(event));
    
    return EM_TRUE;
}

EM_BOOL EmscriptenEvent::onResize(int eventType, const EmscriptenUiEvent* uiEvent, void* userData) {
    EmscriptenWindow* window = static_cast<EmscriptenWindow*>(userData);
    if (!window) return EM_FALSE;
    
    Window* nkWindow = window->getWindow();
    auto& eventSystem = EventSystem::instance();
    
    int width, height;
    emscripten_get_canvas_element_size(window->getCanvasId().c_str(), &width, &height);
    
    auto event = std::make_unique<WindowResizeEvent>(width, height);
    event->setWindow(nkWindow);
    eventSystem.pushEvent(std::move(event));
    
    return EM_TRUE;
}

EM_BOOL EmscriptenEvent::onFocus(int eventType, const EmscriptenFocusEvent* focusEvent, void* userData) {
    EmscriptenWindow* window = static_cast<EmscriptenWindow*>(userData);
    if (!window) return EM_FALSE;
    
    Window* nkWindow = window->getWindow();
    auto& eventSystem = EventSystem::instance();
    
    auto event = std::make_unique<WindowFocusEvent>(true);
    event->setWindow(nkWindow);
    eventSystem.pushEvent(std::move(event));
    
    return EM_TRUE;
}

EM_BOOL EmscriptenEvent::onBlur(int eventType, const EmscriptenFocusEvent* focusEvent, void* userData) {
    EmscriptenWindow* window = static_cast<EmscriptenWindow*>(userData);
    if (!window) return EM_FALSE;
    
    Window* nkWindow = window->getWindow();
    auto& eventSystem = EventSystem::instance();
    
    auto event = std::make_unique<WindowFocusEvent>(false);
    event->setWindow(nkWindow);
    eventSystem.pushEvent(std::move(event));
    
    return EM_TRUE;
}

Key EmscriptenEvent::htmlKeyToKey(const std::string& key) {
    if (key == "a" || key == "A") return Key::A;
    if (key == "b" || key == "B") return Key::B;
    if (key == "c" || key == "C") return Key::C;
    if (key == "d" || key == "D") return Key::D;
    if (key == "e" || key == "E") return Key::E;
    if (key == "f" || key == "F") return Key::F;
    if (key == "g" || key == "G") return Key::G;
    if (key == "h" || key == "H") return Key::H;
    if (key == "i" || key == "I") return Key::I;
    if (key == "j" || key == "J") return Key::J;
    if (key == "k" || key == "K") return Key::K;
    if (key == "l" || key == "L") return Key::L;
    if (key == "m" || key == "M") return Key::M;
    if (key == "n" || key == "N") return Key::N;
    if (key == "o" || key == "O") return Key::O;
    if (key == "p" || key == "P") return Key::P;
    if (key == "q" || key == "Q") return Key::Q;
    if (key == "r" || key == "R") return Key::R;
    if (key == "s" || key == "S") return Key::S;
    if (key == "t" || key == "T") return Key::T;
    if (key == "u" || key == "U") return Key::U;
    if (key == "v" || key == "V") return Key::V;
    if (key == "w" || key == "W") return Key::W;
    if (key == "x" || key == "X") return Key::X;
    if (key == "y" || key == "Y") return Key::Y;
    if (key == "z" || key == "Z") return Key::Z;
    if (key == "0") return Key::Num0;
```
