    GLXPbuffer pbuffer = glXCreatePbuffer(m_display, m_fbConfig, pbufferAttribs);
    glXMakeContextCurrent(m_display, pbuffer, pbuffer, m_sharedContext);
    
#elif defined(__APPLE__) && !TARGET_OS_IPHONE
    if (!OpenGLLoaderCocoa::instance().initialize()) {
        m_hasError = true;
        m_lastError = Error(ErrorSeverity::Fatal, ErrorCategory::Graphics,
                           "Failed to initialize OpenGL loader (Cocoa)");
        return false;
    }
    
    std::cout << "[GraphicsContextOpenGL] Creating shared context (Cocoa)..." << std::endl;
    
    m_sharedContext = OpenGLLoaderCocoa::instance().createModernContext(3, 3, true);
    
    if (!m_sharedContext) {
        m_hasError = true;
        m_lastError = Error(ErrorSeverity::Fatal, ErrorCategory::Graphics,
                           "Failed to create shared OpenGL context");
        return false;
    }
    
    [m_sharedContext makeCurrentContext];
    
#elif defined(__ANDROID__)
    // Android : Pas de contexte partagé ici, EGL gère ça différemment
    std::cout << "[GraphicsContextOpenGL] Android EGL - no shared context needed" << std::endl;
    
#elif defined(__EMSCRIPTEN__)
    // Emscripten : Pas de contexte partagé
    std::cout << "[GraphicsContextOpenGL] Emscripten WebGL - no shared context needed" << std::endl;
#endif
    
    // ÉTAPE 3 : Charger les fonctions OpenGL avec GLEW
    std::cout << "[GraphicsContextOpenGL] Loading OpenGL functions..." << std::endl;
    
#ifndef __EMSCRIPTEN__
    GLenum err = glewInit();
    if (err != GLEW_OK) {
        m_hasError = true;
        m_lastError = Error(ErrorSeverity::Fatal, ErrorCategory::Graphics,
                           std::string("Failed to initialize GLEW: ") + 
                           (const char*)glewGetErrorString(err));
        return false;
    }
#endif
    
    m_openglLoaded = true;
    
    // ÉTAPE 4 : Récupérer les informations GPU
    queryGPUInfo();
    
    std::cout << "[GraphicsContextOpenGL] Initialization complete!" << std::endl;
    
    return true;
}

void GraphicsContextOpenGL::shutdown() {
    std::cout << "[GraphicsContextOpenGL] Shutting down..." << std::endl;
    
#if defined(_WIN32)
    if (m_sharedContext) {
        wglMakeCurrent(nullptr, nullptr);
        wglDeleteContext(m_sharedContext);
        m_sharedContext = nullptr;
    }
    
    if (m_sharedDC && m_sharedWindow) {
        ReleaseDC(m_sharedWindow, m_sharedDC);
        m_sharedDC = nullptr;
    }
    
    if (m_sharedWindow) {
        DestroyWindow(m_sharedWindow);
        m_sharedWindow = nullptr;
    }
    
#elif defined(__linux__) && !defined(__ANDROID__)
    if (m_sharedContext) {
        glXMakeCurrent(m_display, None, nullptr);
        glXDestroyContext(m_display, m_sharedContext);
        m_sharedContext = nullptr;
    }
    
    if (m_display) {
        XCloseDisplay(m_display);
        m_display = nullptr;
    }
    
#elif defined(__APPLE__) && !TARGET_OS_IPHONE
    if (m_sharedContext) {
        [NSOpenGLContext clearCurrentContext];
        [m_sharedContext release];
        m_sharedContext = nullptr;
    }
#endif
}

void GraphicsContextOpenGL::queryGPUInfo() {
    m_gpuInfo.vendor = (const char*)glGetString(GL_VENDOR);
    m_gpuInfo.renderer = (const char*)glGetString(GL_RENDERER);
    m_gpuInfo.version = (const char*)glGetString(GL_VERSION);
    m_gpuInfo.shadingLanguageVersion = (const char*)glGetString(GL_SHADING_LANGUAGE_VERSION);
    
    glGetIntegerv(GL_MAX_TEXTURE_SIZE, &m_gpuInfo.maxTextureSize);
    glGetIntegerv(GL_MAX_TEXTURE_IMAGE_UNITS, &m_gpuInfo.maxTextureUnits);
    glGetIntegerv(GL_MAX_VERTEX_ATTRIBS, &m_gpuInfo.maxVertexAttributes);
    
    // Compute shader support
    m_gpuInfo.supportsCompute = GLEW_ARB_compute_shader;
    if (m_gpuInfo.supportsCompute) {
        glGetIntegeri_v(GL_MAX_COMPUTE_WORK_GROUP_SIZE, 0, &m_gpuInfo.maxComputeWorkGroupSize[0]);
        glGetIntegeri_v(GL_MAX_COMPUTE_WORK_GROUP_SIZE, 1, &m_gpuInfo.maxComputeWorkGroupSize[1]);
        glGetIntegeri_v(GL_MAX_COMPUTE_WORK_GROUP_SIZE, 2, &m_gpuInfo.maxComputeWorkGroupSize[2]);
    }
    
    m_gpuInfo.supportsGeometryShader = GLEW_ARB_geometry_shader4;
    m_gpuInfo.supportsTessellation = GLEW_ARB_tessellation_shader;
    m_gpuInfo.supportsMultisample = GLEW_ARB_multisample;
    
    // Extensions
    GLint numExtensions;
    glGetIntegerv(GL_NUM_EXTENSIONS, &numExtensions);
    for (int i = 0; i < numExtensions; i++) {
        const char* ext = (const char*)glGetStringi(GL_EXTENSIONS, i);
        m_gpuInfo.extensions.push_back(ext);
    }
}

const GPUInfo& GraphicsContextOpenGL::getGPUInfo() const {
    return m_gpuInfo;
}

std::vector<GPUInfo> GraphicsContextOpenGL::enumerateGPUs() const {
    // OpenGL ne supporte pas l'énumération multi-GPU de manière standard
    return {m_gpuInfo};
}

void GraphicsContextOpenGL::selectGPU(int index) {
    // OpenGL ne supporte pas la sélection GPU de manière standard
    NK_WARNING(ErrorCategory::Graphics, "GPU selection not supported in OpenGL");
}

bool GraphicsContextOpenGL::hasExtension(const std::string& extension) const {
    return std::find(m_gpuInfo.extensions.begin(), m_gpuInfo.extensions.end(), extension) 
           != m_gpuInfo.extensions.end();
}

void GraphicsContextOpenGL::setDebugMode(bool enabled) {
    m_debugMode = enabled;
    
    if (enabled && GLEW_ARB_debug_output) {
        glEnable(GL_DEBUG_OUTPUT);
        glEnable(GL_DEBUG_OUTPUT_SYNCHRONOUS);
    }
}

bool GraphicsContextOpenGL::isDebugMode() const {
    return m_debugMode;
}

void* GraphicsContextOpenGL::getNativeContext() const {
#if defined(_WIN32)
    return m_sharedContext;
#elif defined(__linux__) && !defined(__ANDROID__)
    return m_sharedContext;
#elif defined(__APPLE__) && !TARGET_OS_IPHONE
    return (__bridge void*)m_sharedContext;
#else
    return nullptr;
#endif
}

void* GraphicsContextOpenGL::getNativeDevice() const {
#if defined(_WIN32)
    return m_sharedDC;
#elif defined(__linux__) && !defined(__ANDROID__)
    return m_display;
#else
    return nullptr;
#endif
}

void* GraphicsContextOpenGL::getNativeQueue() const {
    return nullptr; // OpenGL n'a pas de concept de queue
}

} // namespace nk
```

## 4. Exemple d'Utilisation Complète

```cpp
// main.cpp
#include "nk.hpp"
#include "GraphicsContext.hpp"
#include "EventSystem.hpp"
#include "Renderer.hpp"

int nk::nk_main(int argc, char** argv) {
    std::cout << "=== NK Framework Initialization ===" << std::endl;
    
    // ================================================================
    // ÉTAPE 1 : INITIALISER LE CONTEXTE GRAPHIQUE GLOBAL
    // ================================================================
    
    auto& graphicsContext = nk::GraphicsContext::instance();
    
    // Lister les APIs disponibles
    std::cout << "\nAvailable Graphics APIs:" << std::endl;
    auto apis = graphicsContext.getSupportedAPIs();
    for (auto api : apis) {
        std::cout << "  - " << getAPIName(api) << std::endl;
    }
    
    // Initialiser avec OpenGL (ou Auto pour détection automatique)
    if (!graphicsContext.initialize(nk::RendererAPI::OpenGL)) {
        std::cerr << "Failed to initialize graphics context!" << std::endl;
        return -1;
    }
    
    // Afficher les infos GPU
    const auto& gpuInfo = graphicsContext.getGPUInfo();
    std::cout << "\nGPU Information:" << std::endl;
    std::cout << "  Vendor: " << gpuInfo.vendor << std::endl;
    std::cout << "  Renderer: " << gpuInfo.renderer << std::endl;
    std::cout << "  OpenGL Version: " << gpuInfo.version << std::endl;
    std::cout << "  GLSL Version: " << gpuInfo.shadingLanguageVersion << std::endl;
    std::cout << "  Max Texture Size: " << gpuInfo.maxTextureSize << std::endl;
    std::cout << "  Compute Shaders: " << (gpuInfo.supportsCompute ? "Yes" : "No") << std::endl;
    
    // ================================================================
    //```cpp
    // ================================================================
    // ÉTAPE 2 : INITIALISER LE SYSTÈME D'ÉVÉNEMENTS
    // ================================================================
    
    auto& eventSystem = nk::EventSystem::instance();
    
    // Configurer les callbacks globaux
    eventSystem.setGlobalEventCallback([](nk::Event* event) {
        // Log de tous les événements (optionnel)
        // std::cout << "[Event] " << event->toString() << std::endl;
    });
    
    // ================================================================
    // ÉTAPE 3 : CRÉER LES FENÊTRES
    // (Le contexte graphique est déjà initialisé)
    // ================================================================
    
    std::cout << "\n=== Creating Windows ===" << std::endl;
    
    // Fenêtre 1
    nk::WindowConfig config1;
    config1.title = "Main Window";
    config1.width = 1280;
    config1.height = 720;
    config1.x = 100;
    config1.y = 100;
    
    nk::Window window1(config1);
    
    if (!window1.isValid()) {
        std::cerr << "Failed to create window 1!" << std::endl;
        return -1;
    }
    
    // Fenêtre 2 (optionnelle pour multi-fenêtrage)
    nk::WindowConfig config2;
    config2.title = "Secondary Window";
    config2.width = 800;
    config2.height = 600;
    config2.x = 1400;
    config2.y = 100;
    
    nk::Window window2(config2);
    
    if (!window2.isValid()) {
        std::cerr << "Failed to create window 2!" << std::endl;
        return -1;
    }
    
    std::cout << "Windows created successfully!" << std::endl;
    
    // ================================================================
    // ÉTAPE 4 : CRÉER LES RENDERERS
    // (Utilisent le contexte graphique initialisé)
    // ================================================================
    
    std::cout << "\n=== Creating Renderers ===" << std::endl;
    
    nk::RendererConfig rendererConfig;
    rendererConfig.api = graphicsContext.getAPI(); // Utiliser l'API du contexte
    rendererConfig.vsync = true;
    rendererConfig.multisampling = 4;
    
    nk::Renderer renderer1(window1, rendererConfig);
    
    if (!renderer1.isValid()) {
        std::cerr << "Failed to create renderer 1!" << std::endl;
        return -1;
    }
    
    nk::Renderer renderer2(window2, rendererConfig);
    
    if (!renderer2.isValid()) {
        std::cerr << "Failed to create renderer 2!" << std::endl;
        return -1;
    }
    
    std::cout << "Renderers created successfully!" << std::endl;
    std::cout << "Renderer 1: " << renderer1.getAPIName() << std::endl;
    std::cout << "Renderer 2: " << renderer2.getAPIName() << std::endl;
    
    // ================================================================
    // ÉTAPE 5 : CONFIGURER LES CALLBACKS D'ÉVÉNEMENTS
    // ================================================================
    
    bool running = true;
    
    eventSystem.setEventCallback<nk::WindowCloseEvent>([&](nk::WindowCloseEvent* event) {
        std::cout << "Window closing..." << std::endl;
        event->getWindow()->close();
        
        // Si toutes les fenêtres sont fermées, quitter
        if (!window1.isOpen() && !window2.isOpen()) {
            running = false;
        }
    });
    
    eventSystem.setEventCallback<nk::KeyPressedEvent>([&](nk::KeyPressedEvent* event) {
        if (event->getKey() == nk::Key::Escape) {
            running = false;
        }
        
        // F1 pour afficher les infos GPU
        if (event->getKey() == nk::Key::F1) {
            const auto& info = graphicsContext.getGPUInfo();
            std::cout << "\n=== GPU Info ===" << std::endl;
            std::cout << "Vendor: " << info.vendor << std::endl;
            std::cout << "Renderer: " << info.renderer << std::endl;
            std::cout << "Extensions: " << info.extensions.size() << std::endl;
        }
        
        // F2 pour toggle debug mode
        if (event->getKey() == nk::Key::F2) {
            bool debug = !graphicsContext.isDebugMode();
            graphicsContext.setDebugMode(debug);
            std::cout << "Debug mode: " << (debug ? "ON" : "OFF") << std::endl;
        }
    });
    
    eventSystem.setEventCallback<nk::WindowResizeEvent>([](nk::WindowResizeEvent* event) {
        std::cout << "Window resized: " << event->getWidth() << "x" << event->getHeight() << std::endl;
    });
    
    // ================================================================
    // ÉTAPE 6 : BOUCLE PRINCIPALE
    // ================================================================
    
    std::cout << "\n=== Starting Main Loop ===" << std::endl;
    std::cout << "Press ESC to quit" << std::endl;
    std::cout << "Press F1 to show GPU info" << std::endl;
    std::cout << "Press F2 to toggle debug mode" << std::endl;
    
    float time = 0.0f;
    int frameCount = 0;
    auto startTime = std::chrono::high_resolution_clock::now();
    auto lastTime = startTime;
    
    while (running) {
        // Traiter les événements
        while (auto event = eventSystem.pollEvent()) {
            // Les callbacks sont appelés automatiquement
        }
        
        // Calculer le temps
        auto currentTime = std::chrono::high_resolution_clock::now();
        float deltaTime = std::chrono::duration<float>(currentTime - lastTime).count();
        lastTime = currentTime;
        time += deltaTime;
        
        // ============================================================
        // RENDU FENÊTRE 1
        // ============================================================
        
        if (window1.isOpen()) {
            renderer1.beginFrame();
            
            // Couleur qui change avec le temps
            float r = (std::sin(time) + 1.0f) * 0.5f;
            float g = (std::cos(time) + 1.0f) * 0.5f;
            float b = (std::sin(time * 0.5f) + 1.0f) * 0.5f;
            
            renderer1.clear(r, g, b, 1.0f);
            
            // Dessiner quelques primitives
            const auto& fb1 = renderer1.getFramebufferInfo();
            
            // Cercle animé
            int centerX = fb1.width / 2;
            int centerY = fb1.height / 2;
            int radius = 50 + std::sin(time * 2.0f) * 30;
            
            uint32_t color = renderer1.packColor(255, 255, 255, 255);
            renderer1.drawCircle(centerX, centerY, radius, color);
            
            // Rectangle tournant
            for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
                float angle = time + i * M_PI / 2;
                int x1 = centerX + std::cos(angle) * 200;
                int y1 = centerY + std::sin(angle) * 200;
                int x2 = centerX + std::cos(angle + M_PI / 2) * 200;
                int y2 = centerY + std::sin(angle + M_PI / 2) * 200;
                
                renderer1.drawLine(x1, y1, x2, y2, color);
            }
            
            renderer1.endFrame();
            renderer1.present();
        }
        
        // ============================================================
        // RENDU FENÊTRE 2
        // ============================================================
        
        if (window2.isOpen()) {
            renderer2.beginFrame();
            
            // Couleur différente
            float r = (std::cos(time * 0.7f) + 1.0f) * 0.5f;
            float g = (std::sin(time * 1.3f) + 1.0f) * 0.5f;
            float b = 0.2f;
            
            renderer2.clear(r, g, b, 1.0f);
            
            // Grille de points
            const auto& fb2 = renderer2.getFramebufferInfo();
            
            for (int y = 0; y < fb2.height; y += 20) {
                for (int x = 0; x < fb2.width; x += 20) {
                    float dist = std::sqrt(
                        std::pow(x - fb2.width / 2, 2) + 
                        std::pow(y - fb2.height / 2, 2)
                    );
                    
                    float wave = std::sin(dist * 0.02f - time * 3.0f);
                    uint8_t brightness = (wave + 1.0f) * 127;
                    
                    uint32_t pixelColor = renderer2.packColor(
                        brightness, brightness, 255, 255
                    );
                    
                    renderer2.setPixel(x, y, pixelColor);
                }
            }
            
            renderer2.endFrame();
            renderer2.present();
        }
        
        // ============================================================
        // FPS COUNTER
        // ============================================================
        
        frameCount++;
        float elapsed = std::chrono::duration<float>(currentTime - startTime).count();
        
        if (elapsed >= 1.0f) {
            float fps = frameCount / elapsed;
            std::cout << "FPS: " << fps << " | Frame Time: " 
                     << (1000.0f / fps) << "ms" << std::endl;
            
            frameCount = 0;
            startTime = currentTime;
        }
    }
    
    // ================================================================
    // ÉTAPE 7 : NETTOYAGE
    // ================================================================
    
    std::cout << "\n=== Shutting Down ===" << std::endl;
    
    // Les renderers et fenêtres sont automatiquement nettoyés par leurs destructeurs
    // Mais on peut aussi shutdown manuellement le contexte graphique
    
    graphicsContext.shutdown();
    
    std::cout << "Shutdown complete!" << std::endl;
    
    return 0;
}

// Point d'entrée selon la plateforme
#if defined(__ANDROID__)
// android_main déjà défini
#elif defined(__EMSCRIPTEN__)
int main(int argc, char** argv) {
    return nk::nk_main(argc, argv);
}
#else
int main(int argc, char** argv) {
    return nk::nk_main(argc, argv);
}
#endif
```

## 5. Window.cpp - Modification pour utiliser GraphicsContext

```cpp
// Window.cpp (modifications pour utiliser le contexte partagé)

Window::Window(const WindowConfig& config)
    : m_id(s_nextId++) {
    
    // Vérifier que GraphicsContext est initialisé
    auto& gfxContext = GraphicsContext::instance();
    if (!gfxContext.isInitialized()) {
        NK_ERROR(ErrorCategory::Window, 
                "GraphicsContext must be initialized before creating windows. "
                "Call GraphicsContext::instance().initialize() first!");
        return;
    }
    
    // Obtenir l'API du contexte
    RendererAPI api = gfxContext.getAPI();
    
    // Créer l'implémentation selon la plateforme
#if defined(_WIN32)
    if (api == RendererAPI::OpenGL || 
        api == RendererAPI::SoftwareGPUOpenGL) {
        m_impl = std::make_unique<Win32Window>(config);
    } else if (api == RendererAPI::DirectX11 || 
               api == RendererAPI::DirectX12) {
        // m_impl = std::make_unique<Win32WindowDX>(config);
    }
#elif defined(__linux__) && !defined(__ANDROID__)
    m_impl = std::make_unique<X11Window>(config);
#elif defined(__APPLE__)
    #if TARGET_OS_IPHONE
        m_impl = std::make_unique<iOSWindow>(config);
    #else
        m_impl = std::make_unique<CocoaWindow>(config);
    #endif
#elif defined(__ANDROID__)
    // Android nécessite android_app
    NK_ERROR(ErrorCategory::Window, "Use Window(android_app*) constructor on Android");
    return;
#elif defined(__EMSCRIPTEN__)
    m_impl = std::make_unique<EmscriptenWindow>(config);
#endif
    
    if (m_impl) {
        m_impl->setWindow(this);
    }
    
    // S'enregistrer dans EventSystem
    EventSystem::instance().registerWindow(this);
}
```

## 6. Win32Window.cpp - Modification pour utiliser le contexte partagé

```cpp
// Win32Window.cpp (modifications)

void Win32Window::createWindowInternal(const WindowConfig& config) {
    // NE PAS initialiser OpenGL ici !
    // Le GraphicsContext l'a déjà fait
    
    auto& gfxContext = GraphicsContext::instance();
    
    // Enregistrer la classe de fenêtre
    registerWindowClass();
    
    // Créer la fenêtre Win32
    m_hwnd = CreateWindowEx(...);
    m_hdc = GetDC(m_hwnd);
    
    // Utiliser les extensions OpenGL déjà chargées par GraphicsContext
    auto& loader = OpenGLLoader::instance();
    
    // Choisir le pixel format
    int pixelFormat = loader.choosePixelFormat(
        m_hdc, 
        true,  // double buffer
        32,    // color bits
        24,    // depth bits
        8,     // stencil bits
        config.multisampling
    );
    
    PIXELFORMATDESCRIPTOR pfd;
    DescribePixelFormat(m_hdc, pixelFormat, sizeof(pfd), &pfd);
    SetPixelFormat(m_hdc, pixelFormat, &pfd);
    
    // Créer le contexte OpenGL en le partageant avec le contexte global
    HGLRC sharedContext = (HGLRC)gfxContext.getNativeContext();
    
    m_hglrc = loader.createModernContext(m_hdc, 3, 3, true);
    
    // Partager les ressources avec le contexte global
    if (sharedContext && m_hglrc) {
        wglShareLists(sharedContext, m_hglrc);
    }
    
    wglMakeCurrent(m_hdc, m_hglrc);
    
    // Enregistrer dans Win32Event
    Win32Event::instance().registerWindow(m_hwnd, this);
    
    if (config.visible) {
        ShowWindow(m_hwnd, SW_SHOW);
        UpdateWindow(m_hwnd);
    }
}
```

## 7. Renderer.cpp - Modification pour utiliser GraphicsContext

```cpp
// Renderer.cpp (modifications)

bool Renderer::create(Window& window, const RendererConfig& config) {
    if (m_created) {
        NK_WARNING(ErrorCategory::Renderer, "Renderer already created");
        return false;
    }
    
    m_window = &window;
    
    // Obtenir les informations du GraphicsContext
    auto& gfxContext = GraphicsContext::instance();
    
    if (!gfxContext.isInitialized()) {
        NK_ERROR(ErrorCategory::Renderer, 
                "GraphicsContext must be initialized before creating renderers");
        return false;
    }
    
    // Utiliser l'API du contexte
    RendererAPI api = config.api;
    if (api == RendererAPI::Auto) {
        api = gfxContext.getAPI();
    }
    
    // Obtenir les informations d'initialisation
    auto initInfo = gfxContext.getRendererInitInfo();
    
    // Créer l'implémentation selon l'API
    switch (api) {
        case RendererAPI::SoftwareCPU:
#if defined(_WIN32)
            m_impl = std::make_unique<RendererWin32>();
#elif defined(__ANDROID__)
            m_impl = std::make_unique<RendererAndroid>();
#elif defined(__linux__) && !defined(__ANDROID__)
            m_impl = std::make_unique<RendererX11>();
#endif
            break;
            
        case RendererAPI::SoftwareGPUOpenGL:
            m_impl = std::make_unique<RendererSoftwareGPU>();
            break;
            
        case RendererAPI::OpenGL:
        case RendererAPI::OpenGLES:
            m_impl = std::make_unique<RendererOpenGL>();
            break;
            
        case RendererAPI::Vulkan:
            // m_impl = std::make_unique<RendererVulkan>();
            // Passer initInfo.nativeContext (VkInstance)
            break;
            
        case RendererAPI::DirectX11:
            // m_impl = std::make_unique<RendererD3D11>();
            // Passer initInfo.nativeDevice (ID3D11Device*)
            break;
            
        case RendererAPI::Metal:
            // m_impl = std::make_unique<RendererMetal>();
            // Passer initInfo.nativeDevice (id<MTLDevice>)
            break;
            
        default:
            NK_ERROR(ErrorCategory::Renderer, "Unsupported renderer API");
            return false;
    }
    
    if (!m_impl) {
        NK_ERROR(ErrorCategory::Renderer, "Failed to create renderer implementation");
        return false;
    }
    
    // Initialiser avec les informations du contexte
    if (!m_impl->initialize(window, config)) {
        NK_ERROR(ErrorCategory::Renderer, "Failed to initialize renderer");
        m_impl.reset();
        return false;
    }
    
    m_created = true;
    return true;
}
```

## 8. Avantages de cette Architecture

```cpp
/*
✅ AVANTAGES :

1. INITIALISATION SÉPARÉE
   - GraphicsContext initialisé UNE FOIS au démarrage
   - Fenêtres et Renderers utilisent ce contexte partagé
   - Pas de re-création de dummy contexts

2. MULTI-FENÊTRAGE EFFICACE
   - Un seul contexte partagé pour toutes les fenêtres
   - Partage automatique des ressources (textures, buffers)
   - Pas de duplication de code d'initialisation

3. MULTI-GPU SUPPORT (Vulkan/DirectX)
   - GraphicsContext peut énumérer les GPUs
   - Sélection du GPU avant création des fenêtres
   - Toutes les fenêtres utilisent le même GPU

4. FLEXIBILITÉ
   - Changement d'API facile (juste changer l'init)
   - Support headless (calcul GPU sans fenêtre)
   - Informations GPU accessibles globalement

5. CLARTÉ DU CODE
   GraphicsContext::initialize()  → Bootstrap une fois
   Window::create()              → Utilise le contexte
   Renderer::create()            → Utilise le contexte

6. GESTION D'ERREURS CENTRALISÉE
   - Toutes les erreurs d'init GPU dans GraphicsContext
   - Pas d'erreurs cryptiques pendant création fenêtre
   - Diagnostic facile des problèmes GPU

UTILISATION TYPIQUE :

int main() {
    // 1. Init Graphics (UNE FOIS)
    GraphicsContext::instance().initialize(RendererAPI::OpenGL);
    
    // 2. Créer autant de fenêtres qu'on veut
    Window win1(config1);
    Window win2(config2);
    Window win3(config3);
    
    // 3. Créer les renderers
    Renderer r1(win1);
    Renderer r2(win2);
    Renderer r3(win3);
    
    // 4. Boucle de rendu
    while (running) {
        r1.render();
        r2.render();
        r3.render();
    }
    
    // 5. Cleanup automatique
    return 0;
}
*/
```

Maintenant voulez-vous l'implémentation complète de **GPUComputeOpenGL headless** (calcul GPU sans fenêtre) qui utilise ce GraphicsContext ?

## 1. Macros Utilitaires avec Validation

```cpp
// Macros.hpp
#pragma once

#include "Error.hpp"

namespace nk {

// ====================================================================
// MACROS DE VALIDATION ET CONDITIONS
// ====================================================================

// Vérifier si un objet est null ET tester des conditions
// Usage: NK_CHECK_AND(myPointer, myPointer->isValid() && someCondition)
#define NK_CHECK_AND(obj, conditions) \
    ((obj) != nullptr && (conditions))

// Vérifier si un objet est null OU tester des conditions
// Usage: NK_CHECK_OR(myPointer, someOtherCondition)
#define NK_CHECK_OR(obj, conditions) \
    ((obj) != nullptr || (conditions))

// Vérifier et retourner false si échec
// Usage: NK_VALIDATE(myPointer, myPointer->isReady())
#define NK_VALIDATE(obj, conditions) \
    do { \
        if (!((obj) != nullptr && (conditions))) { \
            NK_ERROR(ErrorCategory::System, \
                "Validation failed: " #obj " is null or conditions (" #conditions ") are false"); \
            return false; \
        } \
    } while(0)

// Vérifier et retourner nullptr si échec
// Usage: NK_VALIDATE_PTR(myPointer, myPointer->isReady())
#define NK_VALIDATE_PTR(obj, conditions) \
    do { \
        if (!((obj) != nullptr && (conditions))) { \
            NK_ERROR(ErrorCategory::System, \
                "Validation failed: " #obj " is null or conditions (" #conditions ") are false"); \
            return nullptr; \
        } \
    } while(0)

// Vérifier et retourner une valeur custom si échec
// Usage: NK_VALIDATE_RET(myPointer, myPointer->isReady(), -1)
#define NK_VALIDATE_RET(obj, conditions, retval) \
    do { \
        if (!((obj) != nullptr && (conditions))) { \
            NK_ERROR(ErrorCategory::System, \
                "Validation failed: " #obj " is null or conditions (" #conditions ") are false"); \
            return retval; \
        } \
    } while(0)

// Vérifier et continuer la boucle si échec
// Usage: NK_VALIDATE_CONTINUE(myPointer, myPointer->isValid())
#define NK_VALIDATE_CONTINUE(obj, conditions) \
    if (!((obj) != nullptr && (conditions))) { \
        NK_WARNING(ErrorCategory::System, \
            "Validation failed: " #obj " is null or conditions (" #conditions ") are false"); \
        continue; \
    }

// Vérifier et break la boucle si échec
// Usage: NK_VALIDATE_BREAK(myPointer, myPointer->isValid())
#define NK_VALIDATE_BREAK(obj, conditions) \
    if (!((obj) != nullptr && (conditions))) { \
        NK_WARNING(ErrorCategory::System, \
            "Validation failed: " #obj " is null or conditions (" #conditions ") are false"); \
        break; \
    }

// Vérifier avec message custom
// Usage: NK_VALIDATE_MSG(myPointer, myPointer->isReady(), "Custom error message")
#define NK_VALIDATE_MSG(obj, conditions, msg) \
    do { \
        if (!((obj) != nullptr && (conditions))) { \
            NK_ERROR(ErrorCategory::System, msg); \
            return false; \
        } \
    } while(0)

// Version silencieuse (pas de log d'erreur)
// Usage: NK_CHECK_SILENT(myPointer, myPointer->isValid())
#define NK_CHECK_SILENT(obj, conditions) \
    ((obj) != nullptr && (conditions))

// Vérifier avec callback custom
// Usage: NK_VALIDATE_CALLBACK(myPointer, myPointer->isValid(), myErrorHandler())
#define NK_VALIDATE_CALLBACK(obj, conditions, callback) \
    do { \
        if (!((obj) != nullptr && (conditions))) { \
            callback; \
            return false; \
        } \
    } while(0)

} // namespace nk
```

## 2. GPUCompute.hpp - Interface de Calcul GPU

```cpp
// GPUCompute.hpp
#pragma once

#include "GraphicsContext.hpp"
#include "Macros.hpp"
#include <string>
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>
#include <memory>

namespace nk {

// Forward declaration
class GPUComputeImpl;

// ====================================================================
// TYPES DE COMPUTE
// ====================================================================

enum class ComputeAPI {
    Auto,
    OpenGLCompute,      // OpenGL 4.3+ Compute Shaders
    VulkanCompute,      // Vulkan Compute Pipeline
    DirectXCompute,     // DirectX 11/12 Compute Shaders
    MetalCompute,       // Metal Compute Pipeline
    CUDA,               // NVIDIA CUDA
    OpenCL,             // OpenCL (legacy)
    WebGPU              // WebGPU Compute
};

// ====================================================================
// HANDLES
// ====================================================================

struct ComputeKernelHandle {
    uint32_t id = 0;
    bool isValid() const { return id != 0; }
    operator bool() const { return isValid(); }
};

struct ComputeBufferHandle {
    uint32_t id = 0;
    size_t size = 0;
    bool isValid() const { return id != 0; }
    operator bool() const { return isValid(); }
};

struct ComputeTextureHandle {
    uint32_t id = 0;
    int width = 0;
    int height = 0;
    bool isValid() const { return id != 0; }
    operator bool() const { return isValid(); }
};

// ====================================================================
// CLASSES PRINCIPALES
// ====================================================================

class GPUCompute {
public:
    // ================================================================
    // CRÉATION (Factory Pattern)
    // ================================================================
    
    // Créer un contexte de calcul GPU (headless, pas besoin de fenêtre)
    // Utilise GraphicsContext si déjà initialisé, sinon crée son propre contexte
    static GPUCompute* create(ComputeAPI api = ComputeAPI::Auto);
    
    virtual ~GPUCompute() = default;
    
    // ================================================================
    // KERNELS
    // ================================================================
    
    // Créer un kernel de calcul depuis le code source
    virtual ComputeKernelHandle createKernel(const std::string& source, 
                                            const std::string& entryPoint = "main") = 0;
    
    // Créer un kernel depuis un fichier
    virtual ComputeKernelHandle createKernelFromFile(const std::string& filepath,
                                                     const std::string& entryPoint = "main") = 0;
    
    // Détruire un kernel
    virtual void destroyKernel(ComputeKernelHandle handle) = 0;
    
    // ================================================================
    // BUFFERS
    // ================================================================
    
    // Créer un buffer GPU
    virtual ComputeBufferHandle createBuffer(size_t size, const void* data = nullptr) = 0;
    
    // Mettre à jour un buffer
    virtual void updateBuffer(ComputeBufferHandle handle, size_t offset, 
                             size_t size, const void* data) = 0;
    
    // Lire un buffer depuis le GPU
    virtual void readBuffer(ComputeBufferHandle handle, void* output, size_t size) = 0;
    
    // Détruire un buffer
    virtual void destroyBuffer(ComputeBufferHandle handle) = 0;
    
    // ================================================================
    // TEXTURES (Images)
    // ================================================================
    
    // Créer une texture pour compute (storage image)
    virtual ComputeTextureHandle createTexture(int width, int height, 
                                              TextureFormat format,
                                              const void* data = nullptr) = 0;
    
    // Lire une texture
    virtual void readTexture(ComputeTextureHandle handle, void* output, size_t size) = 0;
    
    // Détruire une texture
    virtual void destroyTexture(ComputeTextureHandle handle) = 0;
    
    // ================================================================
    // DISPATCH
    // ================================================================
    
    // Bind un buffer à un slot
    virtual void bindBuffer(ComputeBufferHandle handle, uint32_t binding) = 0;
    
    // Bind une texture à un slot
    virtual void bindTexture(ComputeTextureHandle handle, uint32_t binding) = 0;
    
    // Set uniform values
    virtual void setUniform(const std::string& name, int value) = 0;
    virtual void setUniform(const std::string& name, float value) = 0;
    virtual void setUniform(const std::string& name, const float* values, int count) = 0;
    
    // Dispatcher le kernel
    virtual void dispatch(ComputeKernelHandle kernel,
                         uint32_t workgroupsX,
                         uint32_t workgroupsY = 1,
                         uint32_t workgroupsZ = 1) = 0;
    
    // Attendre que le compute soit terminé
    virtual void wait() = 0;
    
    // ================================================================
    // INFORMATIONS
    // ================================================================
    
    virtual ComputeAPI getAPI() const = 0;
    virtual const char* getAPIName() const = 0;
    
    virtual const GPUInfo& getGPUInfo() const = 0;
    
    // Limites du compute
    virtual int getMaxWorkGroupSize(int dimension) const = 0; // dimension: 0=X, 1=Y, 2=Z
    virtual int getMaxWorkGroupInvocations() const = 0;
    
    // ================================================================
    // ERREURS
    // ================================================================
    
    virtual bool hasError() const = 0;
    virtual Error getLastError() const = 0;
    
protected:
    GPUCompute() = default;
};

} // namespace nk
```

## 3. GPUComputeOpenGL.hpp - Implémentation OpenGL

```cpp
// GPUComputeOpenGL.hpp
#pragma once

#include "GPUCompute.hpp"
#include <GL/glew.h>
#include <unordered_map>
#include <mutex>

namespace nk {

class GPUComputeOpenGL : public GPUCompute {
public:
    GPUComputeOpenGL();
    ~GPUComputeOpenGL() override;
    
    // Initialisation headless (sans fenêtre)
    bool initialize();
    
    // Kernels
    ComputeKernelHandle createKernel(const std::string& source, 
                                     const std::string& entryPoint) override;
    
    ComputeKernelHandle createKernelFromFile(const std::string& filepath,
                                            const std::string& entryPoint) override;
    
    void destroyKernel(ComputeKernelHandle handle) override;
    
    // Buffers
    ComputeBufferHandle createBuffer(size_t size, const void* data) override;
    void updateBuffer(ComputeBufferHandle handle, size_t offset, size_t size, const void* data) override;
    void readBuffer(ComputeBufferHandle handle, void* output, size_t size) override;
    void destroyBuffer(ComputeBufferHandle handle) override;
    
    // Textures
    ComputeTextureHandle createTexture(int width, int height, TextureFormat format, const void* data) override;
    void readTexture(ComputeTextureHandle handle, void* output, size_t size) override;
    void destroyTexture(ComputeTextureHandle handle) override;
    
    // Dispatch
    void bindBuffer(ComputeBufferHandle handle, uint32_t binding) override;
    void bindTexture(ComputeTextureHandle handle, uint32_t binding) override;
    
    void setUniform(const std::string& name, int value) override;
    void setUniform(const std::string& name, float value) override;
    void setUniform(const std::string& name, const float* values, int count) override;
    
    void dispatch(ComputeKernelHandle kernel, uint32_t x, uint32_t y, uint32_t z) override;
    void wait() override;
    
    // Informations
    ComputeAPI getAPI() const override { return ComputeAPI::OpenGLCompute; }
    const char* getAPIName() const override { return "OpenGL Compute Shaders"; }
    const GPUInfo& getGPUInfo() const override;
    
    int getMaxWorkGroupSize(int dimension) const override;
    int getMaxWorkGroupInvocations() const override;
    
    bool hasError() const override { return m_hasError; }
    Error getLastError() const override { return m_lastError; }
    
private:
    struct KernelInfo {
        GLuint program;
        std::unordered_map<std::string, GLint> uniformLocations;
    };
    
    struct BufferInfo {
        GLuint ssbo;
        size_t size;
    };
    
    struct TextureInfo {
        GLuint texture;
        int width;
        int height;
        GLenum internalFormat;
    };
    
    bool createHeadlessContext();
    void destroyHeadlessContext();
    
    GLuint compileComputeShader(const std::string& source);
    GLint getUniformLocation(uint32_t kernelId, const std::string& name);
    
    GLenum textureFormatToGL(TextureFormat format);
    
    // Contexte OpenGL headless
#if defined(_WIN32)
    HWND m_hwnd;
    HDC m_hdc;
    HGLRC m_hglrc;
#elif defined(__linux__) && !defined(__ANDROID__)
    Display* m_display;
    GLXContext m_context;
    GLXPbuffer m_pbuffer;
#elif defined(__APPLE__) && !TARGET_OS_IPHONE
    NSOpenGLContext* m_context;
#endif
    
    // Ressources
    std::unordered_map<uint32_t, KernelInfo> m_kernels;
    std::unordered_map<uint32_t, BufferInfo> m_buffers;
    std::unordered_map<uint32_t, TextureInfo> m_textures;
    
    uint32_t m_nextKernelId;
    uint32_t m_nextBufferId;
    uint32_t m_nextTextureId;
    
    GLuint m_currentProgram;
    
    GPUInfo m_gpuInfo;
    int m_maxWorkGroupSize[3];
    int m_maxWorkGroupInvocations;
    
    bool m_hasError;
    Error m_lastError;
    
    std::mutex m_mutex;
    
    bool m_initialized;
    bool m_useSharedContext; // Si GraphicsContext est déjà initialisé
};

} // namespace nk
```

## 4. GPUComputeOpenGL.cpp - Implémentation Complète

```cpp
// GPUComputeOpenGL.cpp
#include "GPUComputeOpenGL.hpp"
#include "GraphicsContext.hpp"
#include "bootstrap/OpenGLBootstrap.hpp"
#include <fstream>
#include <sstream>
#include <iostream>

namespace nk {

GPUComputeOpenGL::GPUComputeOpenGL()
    : m_nextKernelId(1)
    , m_nextBufferId(1)
    , m_nextTextureId(1)
    , m_currentProgram(0)
    , m_hasError(false)
    , m_initialized(false)
    , m_useSharedContext(false) {
    
#if defined(_WIN32)
    m_hwnd = nullptr;
    m_hdc = nullptr;
    m_hglrc = nullptr;
#elif defined(__linux__) && !defined(__ANDROID__)
    m_display = nullptr;
    m_context = nullptr;
    m_pbuffer = 0;
#elif defined(__APPLE__) && !TARGET_OS_IPHONE
    m_context = nullptr;
#endif
    
    m_maxWorkGroupSize[0] = 0;
    m_maxWorkGroupSize[1] = 0;
    m_maxWorkGroupSize[2] = 0;
    m_maxWorkGroupInvocations = 0;
}

GPUComputeOpenGL::~GPUComputeOpenGL() {
    // Nettoyer toutes les ressources
    for (auto& [id, kernel] : m_kernels) {
        glDeleteProgram(kernel.program);
    }
    
    for (auto& [id, buffer] : m_buffers) {
        glDeleteBuffers(1, &buffer.ssbo);
    }
    
    for (auto& [id, texture] : m_textures) {
        glDeleteTextures(1, &texture.texture);
    }
    
    if (!m_useSharedContext) {
        destroyHeadlessContext();
    }
}

bool GPUComputeOpenGL::initialize() {
    if (m_initialized) {
        return true;
    }
    
    std::cout << "[GPUComputeOpenGL] Initializing..." << std::endl;
    
    // Vérifier si GraphicsContext est déjà initialisé
    auto& gfxContext = GraphicsContext::instance();
    
    if (gfxContext.isInitialized() && 
        (gfxContext.getAPI() == RendererAPI::OpenGL || 
         gfxContext.getAPI() == RendererAPI::SoftwareGPUOpenGL)) {
        
        // Utiliser le contexte existant
        std::cout << "[GPUComputeOpenGL] Using existing GraphicsContext" << std::endl;
        m_useSharedContext = true;
        
        // Le contexte OpenGL est déjà actif
        m_gpuInfo = gfxContext.getGPUInfo();
        
    } else {
        // Créer notre propre contexte headless
        std::cout << "[GPUComputeOpenGL] Creating headless context" << std::endl;
        
        NK_VALIDATE_MSG(nullptr, createHeadlessContext(), 
                       "Failed to create headless OpenGL context");
    }
    
    // Vérifier le support des compute shaders
    if (!GLEW_ARB_compute_shader) {
        m_hasError = true;
        m_lastError = Error(ErrorSeverity::Fatal, ErrorCategory::Graphics,
                           "Compute shaders not supported (OpenGL 4.3+ required)");
        return false;
    }
    
    // Obtenir les limites
    glGetIntegeri_v(GL_MAX_COMPUTE_WORK_GROUP_SIZE, 0, &m_maxWorkGroupSize[0]);
    glGetIntegeri_v(GL_MAX_COMPUTE_WORK_GROUP_SIZE, 1, &m_maxWorkGroupSize[1]);
    glGetIntegeri_v(GL_MAX_COMPUTE_WORK_GROUP_SIZE, 2, &m_maxWorkGroupSize[2]);
    glGetIntegerv(GL_MAX_COMPUTE_WORK_GROUP_INVOCATIONS, &m_maxWorkGroupInvocations);
    
    std::cout << "[GPUComputeOpenGL] Max work group size: " 
              << m_maxWorkGroupSize[0] << "x"
              << m_maxWorkGroupSize[1] << "x"
              << m_maxWorkGroupSize[2] << std::endl;
    
    std::cout << "[GPUComputeOpenGL] Max work group invocations: " 
              << m_maxWorkGroupInvocations << std::endl;
    
    m_initialized = true;
    return true;
}

bool GPUComputeOpenGL::createHeadlessContext() {
#if defined(_WIN32)
    // Initialiser le bootstrap OpenGL
    NK_VALIDATE_RET(nullptr, OpenGLLoader::instance().initialize(), false);
    
    // Créer une fenêtre invisible
    WNDCLASS wc = {};
    wc.lpfnWndProc = DefWindowProc;
    wc.hInstance = GetModuleHandle(nullptr);
    wc.lpszClassName = "GPUComputeHeadless";
    RegisterClass(&wc);
    
    m_hwnd = CreateWindow(
        "GPUComputeHeadless", "Compute",
        0, 0, 0, 1, 1,
        nullptr, nullptr,
        GetModuleHandle(nullptr), nullptr
    );
    
    NK_VALIDATE_RET(m_hwnd, m_hwnd != nullptr, false);
    
    m_hdc = GetDC(m_hwnd);
    
    // Choisir pixel format
    int pixelFormat = OpenGLLoader::instance().choosePixelFormat(m_hdc, false, 32, 24, 8, 0);
    
    PIXELFORMATDESCRIPTOR pfd;
    DescribePixelFormat(m_hdc, pixelFormat, sizeof(pfd), &pfd);
    SetPixelFormat(m_hdc, pixelFormat, &pfd);
    
    // Créer contexte
    m_hglrc = OpenGLLoader::instance().createModernContext(m_hdc, 4, 3, true);
    
    NK_VALIDATE_RET(m_hglrc, m_hglrc != nullptr, false);
    
    wglMakeCurrent(m_hdc, m_hglrc);
    
    // Charger GLEW
    glewExperimental = GL_TRUE;
    GLenum err = glewInit();
    NK_VALIDATE_RET(nullptr, err == GLEW_OK, false);
    
    // Remplir GPU info
    m_gpuInfo.vendor = (const char*)glGetString(GL_VENDOR);
    m_gpuInfo.renderer = (const char*)glGetString(GL_RENDERER);
    m_gpuInfo.version = (const char*)glGetString(GL_VERSION);
    
    return true;
    
#elif defined(__linux__) && !defined(__ANDROID__)
    // Initialiser le bootstrap GLX
    NK_VALIDATE_RET(nullptr, OpenGLLoaderX11::instance().initialize(), false);
    
    m_display = XOpenDisplay(nullptr);
    NK_VALIDATE_RET(m_display, m_display != nullptr, false);
    
    int screen = DefaultScreen(m_display);
    
    GLXFBConfig fbConfig = OpenGLLoaderX11::instance().chooseFBConfig(
        m_display, screen, 32, 24, 8, 0
    );
    
    NK_VALIDATE_RET(nullptr, fbConfig != nullptr, false);
    
    // Créer un pbuffer pour le contexte headless
    const int pbufferAttribs[] = {
        GLX_PBUFFER_WIDTH, 1,
        GLX_PBUFFER_HEIGHT, 1,
        None
    };
    
    m_pbuffer = glXCreatePbuffer(m_display, fbConfig, pbufferAttribs);
    
    m_context = OpenGLLoaderX11::instance().createModernContext(
        m_display, fbConfig, 4, 3, true
    );
    
    NK_VALIDATE_RET(m_context, m_context != nullptr, false);
    
    glXMakeContextCurrent(m_display, m_pbuffer, m_pbuffer, m_context);
    
    // Charger GLEW
    glewExperimental = GL_TRUE;
    GLenum err = glewInit();
    NK_VALIDATE_RET(nullptr, err == GLEW_OK, false);
    
    // Remplir GPU info
    m_gpuInfo.vendor = (const char*)glGetString(GL_VENDOR);
    m_gpuInfo.renderer = (const char*)glGetString(GL_RENDERER);
    m_gpuInfo.version = (const char*)glGetString(GL_VERSION);
    
    return true;
    
#elif defined(__APPLE__) && !TARGET_OS_IPHONE
    NK_VALIDATE_RET(nullptr, OpenGLLoaderCocoa::instance().initialize(), false);
    
    m_context = OpenGLLoaderCocoa::instance().createModernContext(4, 1, true);
    NK_VALIDATE_RET(m_context, m_context != nullptr, false);
    
    [m_context makeCurrentContext];
    
    // Charger GLEW
    glewExperimental = GL_TRUE;
    GLenum err = glewInit();
    NK_VALIDATE_RET(nullptr, err == GLEW_OK, false);
    
    // Remplir GPU info
    m_gpuInfo.vendor = (const char*)glGetString(GL_VENDOR);
    m_gpuInfo.renderer = (const char*)glGetString(GL_RENDERER);
    m_gpuInfo.version = (const char*)glGetString(GL_VERSION);
    
    return true;
    
#else
    return false;
#endif
}

void GPUComputeOpenGL::destroyHeadlessContext() {
#if defined(_WIN32)
    if (m_hglrc) {
        wglMakeCurrent(nullptr, nullptr);
        wglDeleteContext(m_hglrc);
        m_hglrc = nullptr;
    }
    
    if (m_hdc && m_hwnd) {
        ReleaseDC(m_hwnd, m_hdc);
        m_hdc = nullptr;
    }
    
    if (m_hwnd) {
        DestroyWindow(m_hwnd);
        m_hwnd = nullptr;
    }
    
#elif defined(__linux__) && !defined(__ANDROID__)
    if (m_context) {
        glXMakeCurrent(m_display, None, nullptr);
        glXDestroyContext(m_display, m_context);
        m_context = nullptr;
    }
    
    if (m_pbuffer) {
        glXDestroyPbuffer(m_display, m_pbuffer);
        m_pbuffer = 0;
    }
    
    if (m_display) {
        XCloseDisplay(m_display);
        m_display = nullptr;
    }
    
#elif defined(__APPLE__) && !TARGET_OS_IPHONE
    if (m_context) {
        [NSOpenGLContext clearCurrentContext];
        [m_context release];
        m_context = nullptr;
    }
#endif
}

// ================================================================
// KERNELS
// ================================================================

ComputeKernelHandle GPUComputeOpenGL::createKernel(const std::string& source, 
                                                   const std::string& entryPoint) {
    std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(m_mutex);
    
    GLuint program = compileComputeShader(source);
    
    NK_VALIDATE_RET(nullptr, program != 0, ComputeKernelHandle{});
    
    KernelInfo info;
    info.program = program;
    
    uint32_t id = m_nextKernelId++;
    m_kernels[id] = info;
    
    return ComputeKernelHandle{id};
}

ComputeKernelHandle GPUComputeOpenGL::createKernelFromFile(const std::string& filepath,
                                                           const std::string& entryPoint) {
    std::ifstream file(filepath);
    
    NK_VALIDATE_MSG(nullptr, file.is_open(), 
                   std::string("Failed to open compute shader file: ") + filepath);
    
    std::stringstream buffer;
    buffer << file.rdbuf();
    
    return createKernel(buffer.str(), entryPoint);
}

void GPUComputeOpenGL::destroyKernel(ComputeKernelHandle handle) {
    std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(m_mutex);
    
    auto it = m_kernels.find(handle.id);
    
    NK_VALIDATE_RET(nullptr, it != m_kernels.end(), void());
    
    glDeleteProgram(it->second.program);
    m_kernels.erase(it);
}

GLuint GPUComputeOpenGL::compileComputeShader(const std::string& source) {
    GLuint shader = glCreateShader(GL_COMPUTE_SHADER);
    
    const char* src = source.c_str();
    glShaderSource(shader, 1, &src, nullptr);
    glCompileShader(shader);
    
    GLint success;
    glGetShaderiv(shader, GL_COMPILE_STATUS, &success);
    
    if (!success) {
        char log[512];
        glGetShaderInfoLog(shader, 512, nullptr, log);
        
        m_hasError = true;
        m_lastError = Error(ErrorSeverity::Error, ErrorCategory::Shader,
                           std::string("Compute shader compilation failed: ") + log);
        
        glDeleteShader(shader);
        return 0;
    }
    
    GLuint program = glCreateProgram();
    glAttachShader(program, shader);
    glLinkProgram(program);
    
    glGetProgramiv(program, GL_LINK_STATUS, &success);
    
    if (!success) {
        char log[512];
        glGetProgramInfoLog(program, 512, nullptr, log);
        
        m_hasError = true;
        m_lastError = Error(ErrorSeverity::Error, ErrorCategory::Shader,
                           std::string("Compute shader link failed: ") + log);
        
        glDeleteProgram(program);
        glDeleteShader(shader);
        return 0;
    }
    
    glDeleteShader(shader);
    return program;
}

// ================================================================
// BUFFERS
// ================================================================

ComputeBufferHandle GPUComputeOpenGL::createBuffer(size_t size, const void* data) {
    std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(m_mutex);
    
    GLuint ssbo;
    glGenBuffers(1, &ssbo);
    glBindBuffer(GL_SHADER_STORAGE_BUFFER, ssbo);
    glBufferData(GL_SHADER_STORAGE_BUFFER, size, data, GL_DYNAMIC_DRAW);
    glBindBuffer(GL_SHADER_STORAGE_BUFFER, 0);
    
    BufferInfo info;
    info.ssbo = ssbo;
    info.size = size;
    
    uint32_t id = m_nextBufferId++;
    m_buffers[id] = info;
    
    ComputeBufferHandle handle;
    handle.id = id;
    handle.size = size;
    
    return handle;
}

void GPUComputeOpenGL::updateBuffer(ComputeBufferHandle handle, size_t offset, size_t size, const void* data) {
    std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(m_mutex);
    
    auto it = m_buffers.find(handle.id);
    NK_VALIDATE_RET(nullptr, it != m_buffers.end(), void());
    
    glBindBuffer(GL_SHADER_STORAGE_BUFFER, it->second.ssbo);
    glBufferSubData(GL_SHADER_STORAGE_BUFFER, offset, size, data);
    glBindBuffer(GL_SHADER_STORAGE_BUFFER, 0);
}

void GPUComputeOpenGL::readBuffer(ComputeBufferHandle handle, void* output, size_t size) {
    std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(m_mutex);
    
    auto it = m_buffers.find(handle.id);
    NK_VALIDATE_RET(nullptr, it != m_buffers.end(), void());
    
    glBindBuffer(GL_SHADER_STORAGE_BUFFER, it->second.ssbo);
    glGetBufferSubData(GL_SHADER_STORAGE_BUFFER, 0, size, output);
    glBindBuffer(GL_SHADER_STORAGE_BUFFER, 0);
}

void GPUComputeOpenGL::destroyBuffer(ComputeBufferHandle handle) {
    std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(m_mutex);
    
    auto it = m_buffers.find(handle.id);
    NK_VALIDATE_RET(nullptr, it != m_buffers.end(), void());
    
    glDeleteBuffers(1, &it->second.ssbo);
    m_buffers.erase(it);
}

// ================================================================
// TEXTURES
// ================================================================

ComputeTextureHandle GPUComputeOpenGL::createTexture(int width, int height, 
                                                     TextureFormat format, const void* data) {
    std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(m_mutex);
    
    GLuint texture;
    glGenTextures(1, &texture);
    glBindTexture(GL_TEXTURE_2D, texture);
    
    GLenum internalFormat = textureFormatToGL(format);
    GLenum dataFormat = GL_RGBA;
    GLenum dataType = GL_UNSIGNED_BYTE;
    
    glTexImage2D(GL_TEXTURE_2D, 0, internalFormat, width, height, 0, 
                dataFormat, dataType, data);
    
    glTexParameteri(GL_TEXTURE_2D, GL_TEXTURE_MIN_FILTER, GL_NEAREST);
    glTexParameteri(GL_TEXTURE_2D, GL_TEXTURE_MAG_FILTER, GL_NEAREST);
    glBindTexture(GL_TEXTURE_2D, 0);
    
    TextureInfo info;
    info.texture = texture;
    info.width = width;
    info.height = height;
    info.internalFormat = internalFormat;
    
    uint32_t id = m_nextTextureId++;
    m_textures[id] = info;
    
    ComputeTextureHandle handle;
    handle.id = id;
    handle.width = width;
    handle.height = height;
    
    return handle;
}

void GPUComputeOpenGL::readTexture(ComputeTextureHandle handle, void* output, size_t size) {
    std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(m_mutex);
    
    auto it = m_textures.find(handle.id);
    NK_VALIDATE_RET(nullptr, it != m_textures.end(), void());
    
    glBindTexture(GL_TEXTURE_2D, it->second.texture);
    glGetTexImage(GL_TEXTURE_2D, 0, GL_RGBA, GL_UNSIGNED_BYTE, output);
    glBindTexture(GL_TEXTURE_2D, 0);
}

void GPUComputeOpenGL::destroyTexture(ComputeTextureHandle handle) {
    std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(m_mutex);
    
    auto it = m_textures.find(handle.id);
    NK_VALIDATE_RET(nullptr, it != m_textures.end(), void());
    
    glDeleteTextures(1, &it->second.texture);
    m_textures.erase(it);
}

GLenum GPUComputeOpenGL::textureFormatToGL(TextureFormat format) {
    switch (format) {
        case TextureFormat::R8: return GL_R8;
        case TextureFormat::RG8: return GL_RG8;
        case TextureFormat::RGB8: return GL_RGB8;
        case TextureFormat::RGBA8: return GL_RGBA8;
        case TextureFormat::R32F: return GL_R32F;
        case TextureFormat::RG32F: return GL_RG32F;
        case TextureFormat::RGB32F: return GL_RGB32F;
        case TextureFormat::RGBA32F: return GL_RGBA32F;
        default: return GL_RGBA8;
    }
}

// ================================================================
// DISPATCH
// ================================================================

void GPUComputeOpenGL::bindBuffer(ComputeBufferHandle handle, uint32_t binding) {
    auto it = m_buffers.find(handle.id);
    NK_VALIDATE_RET(nullptr, it != m_buffers.end(), void());
    
    glBindBufferBase(GL_SHADER_STORAGE_BUFFER, binding, it->second.ssbo);
}

void GPUComputeOpenGL::bindTexture(ComputeTextureHandle handle, uint32_t binding) {
    auto it = m_textures.find(handle.id);
    NK_VALIDATE_RET(nullptr, it != m_textures.end(), void());
    
    glBindImageTexture(binding, it->second.texture, 0, GL_FALSE, 0, 
                      GL_READ_WRITE, it->second.internalFormat);
}

void GPUComputeOpenGL::setUniform(const std::string& name, int value) {
    NK_VALIDATE_RET(nullptr, m_currentProgram != 0, void());
    
    GLint location = getUniformLocation(m_currentProgram, name);
    
    NK_VALIDATE_RET(nullptr, location != -1, void());
    
    glUniform1i(location, value);
}

void GPUComputeOpenGL::setUniform(const std::string& name, float value) {
    NK_VALIDATE_RET(nullptr, m_currentProgram != 0, void());
    
    GLint location = getUniformLocation(m_currentProgram, name);
    
    NK_VALIDATE_RET(nullptr, location != -1, void());
    
    glUniform1f(location, value);
}

void GPUComputeOpenGL::setUniform(const std::string& name, const float* values, int count) {
    NK_VALIDATE_RET(nullptr, m_currentProgram != 0, void());
    
    GLint location = getUniformLocation(m_currentProgram, name);
    
    NK_VALIDATE_RET(nullptr, location != -1, void());
    
    // Déterminer le type selon count
    if (count == 1) glUniform1f(location, values[0]);
    else if (count == 2) glUniform2f(location, values[0], values[1]);
    else if (count == 3) glUniform3f(location, values[0], values[1], values[2]);
    else if (count == 4) glUniform4f(location, values[0], values[1], values[2], values[3]);
    else if (count == 16) glUniformMatrix4fv(location, 1, GL_FALSE, values);
}

void GPUComputeOpenGL::dispatch(ComputeKernelHandle kernel, uint32_t x, uint32_t y, uint32_t z) {
    std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(m_mutex);
    
    auto it = m_kernels.find(kernel.id);
    
    NK_VALIDATE_RET(nullptr, it != m_kernels.end(), void());
    
    m_currentProgram = kernel.id;
    glUseProgram(it->second.program);
    
    glDispatchCompute(x, y, z);
    
    glMemoryBarrier(GL_SHADER_STORAGE_BARRIER_BIT | GL_SHADER_IMAGE_ACCESS_BARRIER_BIT);
}

void GPUComputeOpenGL::wait() {
    glFinish();
}

GLint GPUComputeOpenGL::getUniformLocation(uint32_t kernelId, const std::string& name) {
    auto& kernel = m_kernels[kernelId];
    
    auto it = kernel.uniformLocations.find(name);
    if (it != kernel.uniformLocations.end()) {
        return it->second;
    }
    
    GLint location = glGetUniformLocation(kernel.program, name.c_str());
    kernel.uniformLocations[name] = location;
    
    return location;
}

// ================================================================
// INFORMATIONS
// ================================================================

const GPUInfo& GPUComputeOpenGL::getGPUInfo() const {
    return m_gpuInfo;
}

int GPUComputeOpenGL::getMaxWorkGroupSize(int dimension) const {
    NK_VALIDATE_RET(nullptr, dimension >= 0 && dimension < 3, 0);
    return m_maxWorkGroupSize[dimension];
}

int GPUComputeOpenGL::getMaxWorkGroupInvocations() const {
    return m_maxWorkGroupInvocations;
}

// ================================================================
// FACTORY
// ================================================================

GPUCompute* GPUCompute::create(ComputeAPI api) {
    if (api == ComputeAPI::Auto) {
        // Auto-détection
#if defined(_WIN32) || defined(__linux__) || defined(__APPLE__)
        api = ComputeAPI::OpenGLCompute;
#else
        NK_ERROR(ErrorCategory::Graphics, "No GPU compute API available on this platform");
        return nullptr;
#endif
    }
    
    switch (api) {
        case ComputeAPI::OpenGLCompute: {
            auto* compute = new GPUComputeOpenGL();
            if (!compute->initialize()) {
                delete compute;
                return nullptr;
            }
            return compute;
        }
        
        // Autres APIs...
        
        default:
            NK_ERROR(ErrorCategory::Graphics, "Unsupported GPU compute API");
            return nullptr;
    }
}

} // namespace nk
```

Voulez-vous maintenant un exemple complet d'utilisation du GPUComputeOpenGL pour faire du software rasterization sur GPU ?

## 1. Exemple Complet - Software Rasterization sur GPU

```cpp
// example_gpu_software_rasterizer.cpp
#include "nk.hpp"
#include "GPUCompute.hpp"
#include "EventSystem.hpp"
#include "Renderer.hpp"
#include <iostream>
#include <vector>
#include <cmath>

int nk::nk_main(int argc, char** argv) {
    std::cout << "=== GPU Software Rasterizer Example ===" << std::endl;
    
    // ================================================================
    // ÉTAPE 1 : CRÉER LE CONTEXTE DE CALCUL GPU (HEADLESS)
    // ================================================================
    
    auto* gpuCompute = nk::GPUCompute::create(nk::ComputeAPI::OpenGLCompute);
    
    NK_VALIDATE_MSG(gpuCompute, gpuCompute != nullptr, "Failed to create GPU compute context");
    
    const auto& gpuInfo = gpuCompute->getGPUInfo();
    std::cout << "GPU: " << gpuInfo.renderer << std::endl;
    std::cout << "Max Work Group Size: " 
              << gpuCompute->getMaxWorkGroupSize(0) << "x"
              << gpuCompute->getMaxWorkGroupSize(1) << "x"
              << gpuCompute->getMaxWorkGroupSize(2) << std::endl;
    
    // ================================================================
    // ÉTAPE 2 : CRÉER LE COMPUTE SHADER DE RASTERIZATION
    // ================================================================
    
    const char* rasterizeShader = R"(
        #version 430 core
        
        layout(local_size_x = 8, local_size_y = 8) in;
        
        // Buffer de sortie (framebuffer)
        layout(std430, binding = 0) buffer ColorBuffer {
            uint colors[];
        };
        
        // Buffer de profondeur
        layout(std430, binding = 1) buffer DepthBuffer {
            float depths[];
        };
        
        // Buffer de triangles
        struct Triangle {
            vec4 v0; // position (xyz) + depth (w)
            vec4 c0; // color
            vec4 v1;
            vec4 c1;
            vec4 v2;
            vec4 c2;
        };
        
        layout(std430, binding = 2) readonly buffer TriangleBuffer {
            Triangle triangles[];
        };
        
        uniform uvec2 resolution;
        uniform uint triangleCount;
        uniform float time;
        
        // Calculer les coordonnées barycentriques
        vec3 barycentric(vec2 p, vec2 a, vec2 b, vec2 c) {
            vec2 v0 = b - a;
            vec2 v1 = c - a;
            vec2 v2 = p - a;
            
            float d00 = dot(v0, v0);
            float d01 = dot(v0, v1);
            float d11 = dot(v1, v1);
            float d20 = dot(v2, v0);
            float d21 = dot(v2, v1);
            
            float denom = d00 * d11 - d01 * d01;
            if (abs(denom) < 0.0001) return vec3(-1.0);
            
            float v = (d11 * d20 - d01 * d21) / denom;
            float w = (d00 * d21 - d01 * d20) / denom;
            float u = 1.0 - v - w;
            
            return vec3(u, v, w);
        }
        
        // Packer une couleur RGBA en uint32
        uint packColor(vec4 color) {
            uvec4 c = uvec4(clamp(color, 0.0, 1.0) * 255.0);
            return (c.a << 24) | (c.b << 16) | (c.g << 8) | c.r;
        }
        
        void main() {
            uvec2 pixel = gl_GlobalInvocationID.xy;
            
            if (pixel.x >= resolution.x || pixel.y >= resolution.y)
                return;
            
            uint index = pixel.y * resolution.x + pixel.x;
            vec2 pixelCenter = vec2(pixel) + 0.5;
            
            // Tester tous les triangles
            for (uint i = 0; i < triangleCount; i++) {
                Triangle tri = triangles[i];
                
                // Positions 2D des sommets
                vec2 v0 = tri.v0.xy;
                vec2 v1 = tri.v1.xy;
                vec2 v2 = tri.v2.xy;
                
                // Test barycentrique
                vec3 bary = barycentric(pixelCenter, v0, v1, v2);
                
                if (bary.x < 0.0 || bary.y < 0.0 || bary.z < 0.0)
                    continue;
                
                // Interpoler la profondeur
                float depth = bary.x * tri.v0.w + bary.y * tri.v1.w + bary.z * tri.v2.w;
                
                // Depth test
                if (depth >= depths[index])
                    continue;
                
                // Interpoler la couleur
                vec4 color = bary.x * tri.c0 + bary.y * tri.c1 + bary.z * tri.c2;
                
                // Pixel shader simple : ajouter une animation basée sur le temps
                color.rgb *= 0.8 + 0.2 * sin(time + float(i));
                
                // Écrire dans le framebuffer
                depths[index] = depth;
                colors[index] = packColor(color);
            }
        }
    )";
    
    auto kernel = gpuCompute->createKernel(rasterizeShader);
    
    NK_VALIDATE_MSG(nullptr, kernel.isValid(), "Failed to create rasterization kernel");
    
    std::cout << "Rasterization kernel created!" << std::endl;
    
    // ================================================================
    // ÉTAPE 3 : CRÉER LES BUFFERS
    // ================================================================
    
    int width = 1280;
    int height = 720;
    size_t pixelCount = width * height;
    
    // Framebuffer (color)
    auto colorBuffer = gpuCompute->createBuffer(pixelCount * sizeof(uint32_t));
    
    // Depth buffer
    std::vector<float> depthInit(pixelCount, 1.0f);
    auto depthBuffer = gpuCompute->createBuffer(
        pixelCount * sizeof(float), 
        depthInit.data()
    );
    
    // Triangle buffer
    struct GPUTriangle {
        float v0[4]; // xyz + depth
        float c0[4]; // rgba
        float v1[4];
        float c1[4];
        float v2[4];
        float c2[4];
    };
    
    std::vector<GPUTriangle> triangles;
    
    // Créer un cube (12 triangles)
    auto addQuad = [&](float x0, float y0, float z0,
                      float x1, float y1, float z1,
                      float x2, float y2, float z2,
                      float x3, float y3, float z3,
                      float r, float g, float b) {
        // Triangle 1
        GPUTriangle tri1;
        tri1.v0[0] = x0; tri1.v0[1] = y0; tri1.v0[2] = z0; tri1.v0[3] = z0;
        tri1.c0[0] = r; tri1.c0[1] = g; tri1.c0[2] = b; tri1.c0[3] = 1.0f;
        
        tri1.v1[0] = x1; tri1.v1[1] = y1; tri1.v1[2] = z1; tri1.v1[3] = z1;
        tri1.c1[0] = r; tri1.c1[1] = g; tri1.c1[2] = b; tri1.c1[3] = 1.0f;
        
        tri1.v2[0] = x2; tri1.v2[1] = y2; tri1.v2[2] = z2; tri1.v2[3] = z2;
        tri1.c2[0] = r; tri1.c2[1] = g; tri1.c2[2] = b; tri1.c2[3] = 1.0f;
        
        triangles.push_back(tri1);
        
        // Triangle 2
        GPUTriangle tri2;
        tri2.v0[0] = x0; tri2.v0[1] = y0; tri2.v0[2] = z0; tri2.v0[3] = z0;
        tri2.c0[0] = r; tri2.c0[1] = g; tri2.c0[2] = b; tri2.c0[3] = 1.0f;
        
        tri2.v1[0] = x2; tri2.v1[1] = y2; tri2.v1[2] = z2; tri2.v1[3] = z2;
        tri2.c1[0] = r; tri2.c1[1] = g; tri2.c1[2] = b; tri2.c1[3] = 1.0f;
        
        tri2.v2[0] = x3; tri2.v2[1] = y3; tri2.v2[2] = z3; tri2.v2[3] = z3;
        tri2.c2[0] = r; tri2.c2[1] = g; tri2.c2[2] = b; tri2.c2[3] = 1.0f;
        
        triangles.push_back(tri2);
    };
    
    float s = 200.0f;
    float cx = width / 2.0f;
    float cy = height / 2.0f;
    
    // Les 6 faces du cube (en coordonnées écran)
    addQuad(cx-s, cy-s, 0.5f, cx+s, cy-s, 0.5f, cx+s, cy+s, 0.5f, cx-s, cy+s, 0.5f, 1, 0, 0); // Front - Rouge
    
    auto triangleBuffer = gpuCompute->createBuffer(
        triangles.size() * sizeof(GPUTriangle),
        triangles.data()
    );
    
    std::cout << "Buffers created: " << triangles.size() << " triangles" << std::endl;
    
    // ================================================================
    // ÉTAPE 4 : CRÉER UNE FENÊTRE POUR AFFICHER LE RÉSULTAT
    // ================================================================
    
    auto& eventSystem = nk::EventSystem::instance();
    
    nk::WindowConfig windowConfig;
    windowConfig.title = "GPU Software Rasterizer";
    windowConfig.width = width;
    windowConfig.height = height;
    
    nk::Window window(windowConfig);
    
    nk::RendererConfig rendererConfig;
    rendererConfig.api = nk::RendererAPI::SoftwareCPU;
    
    nk::Renderer renderer(window, rendererConfig);
    
    bool running = true;
    
    eventSystem.setEventCallback<nk::WindowCloseEvent>([&](auto* e) {
        running = false;
    });
    
    eventSystem.setEventCallback<nk::KeyPressedEvent>([&](auto* e) {
        if (e->getKey() == nk::Key::Escape) running = false;
    });
    
    // ================================================================
    // ÉTAPE 5 : BOUCLE DE RENDU
    // ================================================================
    
    std::cout << "\n=== Starting Render Loop ===" << std::endl;
    
    float time = 0.0f;
    int frameCount = 0;
    auto startTime = std::chrono::high_resolution_clock::now();
    auto lastTime = startTime;
    
    std::vector<uint32_t> pixels(pixelCount);
    
    while (running) {
        while (auto event = eventSystem.pollEvent()) {}
        
        auto currentTime = std::chrono::high_resolution_clock::now();
        float deltaTime = std::chrono::duration<float>(currentTime - lastTime).count();
        lastTime = currentTime;
        time += deltaTime;
        
        // ============================================================
        // RASTERIZATION SUR GPU
        // ============================================================
        
        // Clear depth buffer
        std::fill(depthInit.begin(), depthInit.end(), 1.0f);
        gpuCompute->updateBuffer(depthBuffer, 0, depthInit.size() * sizeof(float), depthInit.data());
        
        // Update triangles (rotation)
        float angle = time;
        float cosA = std::cos(angle);
        float sinA = std::sin(angle);
        
        std::vector<GPUTriangle> rotatedTriangles = triangles;
        for (auto& tri : rotatedTriangles) {
            // Rotation autour du centre
            for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
                float* v = (i == 0) ? tri.v0 : (i == 1) ? tri.v1 : tri.v2;
                
                float x = v[0] - cx;
                float y = v[1] - cy;
                
                v[0] = x * cosA - y * sinA + cx;
                v[1] = x * sinA + y * cosA + cy;
            }
        }
        
        gpuCompute->updateBuffer(triangleBuffer, 0, 
                                rotatedTriangles.size() * sizeof(GPUTriangle),
                                rotatedTriangles.data());
        
        // Bind buffers
        gpuCompute->bindBuffer(colorBuffer, 0);
        gpuCompute->bindBuffer(depthBuffer, 1);
        gpuCompute->bindBuffer(triangleBuffer, 2);
        
        // Set uniforms
        gpuCompute->setUniform("resolution", 0); // On va passer en float array
        float res[2] = {static_cast<float>(width), static_cast<float>(height)};
        glProgramUniform2f(glGetIntegerv(GL_CURRENT_PROGRAM), 
                          glGetUniformLocation(glGetIntegerv(GL_CURRENT_PROGRAM), "resolution"),
                          res[0], res[1]);
        
        gpuCompute->setUniform("triangleCount", static_cast<int>(rotatedTriangles.size()));
        gpuCompute->setUniform("time", time);
        
        // Dispatch compute shader
        uint32_t groupsX = (width + 7) / 8;
        uint32_t groupsY = (height + 7) / 8;
        
        gpuCompute->dispatch(kernel, groupsX, groupsY, 1);
        
        // Attendre la fin
        gpuCompute->wait();
        
        // Lire le résultat
        gpuCompute->readBuffer(colorBuffer, pixels.data(), pixels.size() * sizeof(uint32_t));
        
        // ============================================================
        // AFFICHER LE RÉSULTAT
        // ============================================================
        
        renderer.beginFrame();
        
        // Copier les pixels du GPU vers le framebuffer CPU
        const auto& fb = renderer.getFramebufferInfo();
        uint32_t* fbPixels = static_cast<uint32_t*>(renderer.getPixels());
        
        if (fbPixels) {
            std::memcpy(fbPixels, pixels.data(), pixels.size() * sizeof(uint32_t));
        }
        
        renderer.endFrame();
        renderer.present();
        
        // FPS
        frameCount++;
        float elapsed = std::chrono::duration<float>(currentTime - startTime).count();
        if (elapsed >= 1.0f) {
            std::cout << "FPS: " << (frameCount / elapsed) 
                     << " | GPU Rasterization" << std::endl;
            frameCount = 0;
            startTime = currentTime;
        }
    }
    
    // ================================================================
    // NETTOYAGE
    // ================================================================
    
    std::cout << "\n=== Cleaning up ===" << std::endl;
    
    gpuCompute->destroyKernel(kernel);
    gpuCompute->destroyBuffer(colorBuffer);
    gpuCompute->destroyBuffer(depthBuffer);
    gpuCompute->destroyBuffer(triangleBuffer);
    
    delete gpuCompute;
    
    return 0;
}
```

---

# 2. Système de Polices de Caractères From Scratch

## 2.1 Font.hpp - Architecture du Système de Polices

```cpp
// Font.hpp
#pragma once

#include <string>
#include <vector>
#include <unordered_map>
#include <memory>
#include <cstdint>

namespace nk {

// ====================================================================
// TYPES DE POLICES
// ====================================================================

enum class FontFormat {
    Bitmap,         // Police bitmap (simple, fixe)
    TrueType,       // TrueType (.ttf)
    OpenType,       // OpenType (.otf)
    Raster          // Police rastérisée (générée depuis TTF)
};

// ====================================================================
// GLYPHE (CARACTÈRE)
// ====================================================================

struct Glyph {
    uint32_t codepoint;      // Code Unicode du caractère
    
    // Métrique du glyphe
    int width;               // Largeur du glyphe en pixels
    int height;              // Hauteur du glyphe en pixels
    int bearingX;            // Décalage horizontal depuis l'origine
    int bearingY;            // Décalage vertical depuis la baseline
    int advance;             // Distance à avancer après ce glyphe
    
    // Données du bitmap
    std::vector<uint8_t> bitmap; // Données alpha (1 byte par pixel)
    
    // Position dans l'atlas de texture (si utilisé)
    int atlasX;
    int atlasY;
    int atlasPage;           // Numéro de page si atlas multi-textures
};

// ====================================================================
// ATLAS DE TEXTURE POUR LES POLICES
// ====================================================================

class FontAtlas {
public:
    FontAtlas(int width, int height);
    
    // Ajouter un glyphe dans l'atlas
    bool addGlyph(uint32_t codepoint, const Glyph& glyph);
    
    // Obtenir un glyphe depuis l'atlas
    const Glyph* getGlyph(uint32_t codepoint) const;
    
    // Obtenir les données de texture
    const uint8_t* getTextureData() const;
    int getTextureWidth() const;
    int getTextureHeight() const;
    
    // Nettoyer l'atlas
    void clear();
    
private:
    int m_width;
    int m_height;
    std::vector<uint8_t> m_data;
    
    std::unordered_map<uint32_t, Glyph> m_glyphs;
    
    int m_currentX;
    int m_currentY;
    int m_rowHeight;
};

// ====================================================================
// CLASSE FONT
// ====================================================================

class Font {
public:
    virtual ~Font() = default;
    
    // Charger une police depuis un fichier
    static Font* load(const std::string& filepath, int fontSize = 16);
    
    // Charger une police depuis la mémoire
    static Font* loadFromMemory(const uint8_t* data, size_t size, int fontSize = 16);
    
    // Obtenir un glyphe
    virtual const Glyph* getGlyph(uint32_t codepoint) = 0;
    
    // Obtenir les métriques de la police
    virtual int getAscent() const = 0;    // Distance baseline -> haut
    virtual int getDescent() const = 0;   // Distance baseline -> bas
    virtual int getLineGap() const = 0;   // Espacement entre lignes
    virtual int getLineHeight() const = 0; // Hauteur totale d'une ligne
    
    // Mesurer une chaîne de texte
    struct TextMetrics {
        int width;
        int height;
        int lines;
    };
    
    virtual TextMetrics measureText(const std::string& text) const = 0;
    
    // Kerning (espacement entre paires de caractères)
    virtual int getKerning(uint32_t left, uint32_t right) const = 0;
    
    // Informations
    virtual FontFormat getFormat() const = 0;
    virtual int getFontSize() const = 0;
    virtual const char* getFamilyName() const = 0;
    
    // Atlas (optionnel)
    virtual FontAtlas* getAtlas() = 0;
    
protected:
    Font() = default;
};

// ====================================================================
// POLICE BITMAP (SIMPLE)
// ====================================================================

class BitmapFont : public Font {
public:
    BitmapFont();
    ~BitmapFont() override;
    
    // Charger depuis une image (grille de caractères)
    bool loadFromImage(const uint8_t* imageData, int imageWidth, int imageHeight,
                      int charWidth, int charHeight, const std::string& charset);
    
    const Glyph* getGlyph(uint32_t codepoint) override;
    
    int getAscent() const override;
    int getDescent() const override;
    int getLineGap() const override;
    int getLineHeight() const override;
    
    TextMetrics measureText(const std::string& text) const override;
    int getKerning(uint32_t left, uint32_t right) const override;
    
    FontFormat getFormat() const override { return FontFormat::Bitmap; }
    int getFontSize() const override { return m_charHeight; }
    const char* getFamilyName() const override { return "Bitmap Font"; }
    
    FontAtlas* getAtlas() override { return &m_atlas; }
    
private:
    int m_charWidth;
    int m_charHeight;
    
    std::unordered_map<uint32_t, Glyph> m_glyphs;
    FontAtlas m_atlas;
};

// ====================================================================
// POLICE TRUETYPE (AVEC STB_TRUETYPE)
// ====================================================================

class TrueTypeFont : public Font {
public:
    TrueTypeFont();
    ~TrueTypeFont() override;
    
    // Charger depuis un fichier TTF
    bool loadFromFile(const std::string& filepath, int fontSize);
    
    // Charger depuis la mémoire
    bool loadFromMemory(const uint8_t* data, size_t size, int fontSize);
    
    const Glyph* getGlyph(uint32_t codepoint) override;
    
    int getAscent() const override;
    int getDescent() const override;
    int getLineGap() const override;
    int getLineHeight() const override;
    
    TextMetrics measureText(const std::string& text) const override;
    int getKerning(uint32_t left, uint32_t right) const override;
    
    FontFormat getFormat() const override { return FontFormat::TrueType; }
    int getFontSize() const override { return m_fontSize; }
    const char* getFamilyName() const override;
    
    FontAtlas* getAtlas() override { return &m_atlas; }
    
private:
    Glyph rasterizeGlyph(uint32_t codepoint);
    
    std::vector<uint8_t> m_fontData;
    void* m_stbFont; // stbtt_fontinfo*
    
    int m_fontSize;
    float m_scale;
    
    int m_ascent;
    int m_descent;
    int m_lineGap;
    
    std::unordered_map<uint32_t, Glyph> m_glyphCache;
    FontAtlas m_atlas;
};

// ====================================================================
// TEXT RENDERER
// ====================================================================

class TextRenderer {
public:
    TextRenderer();
    
    // Définir la police à utiliser
    void setFont(Font* font);
    
    // Rendu de texte simple
    void drawText(Renderer& renderer, const std::string& text, 
                 int x, int y, uint32_t color);
    
    // Rendu avec options
    enum class Alignment {
        Left, Center, Right
    };
    
    struct DrawOptions {
        uint32_t color = 0xFFFFFFFF;
        Alignment alignment = Alignment::Left;
        int maxWidth = 0;           // Wrapping automatique
        float lineSpacing = 1.0f;   // Multiplicateur espacement lignes
        bool enableKerning = true;
    };
    
    void drawText(Renderer& renderer, const std::string& text,
                 int x, int y, const DrawOptions& options);
    
    // Rendu avec effet
    void drawTextWithShadow(Renderer& renderer, const std::string& text,
                           int x, int y, uint32_t color, uint32_t shadowColor,
                           int shadowOffsetX = 2, int shadowOffsetY = 2);
    
    void drawTextWithOutline(Renderer& renderer, const std::string& text,
