```cpp
uint32_t JPEGDecoder::getBits(int count) {
    while (m_bitCount < count) {
        m_bitBuffer = (m_bitBuffer << 8) | getNextByte();
        m_bitCount += 8;
    }
    
    m_bitCount -= count;
    return (m_bitBuffer >> m_bitCount) & ((1 << count) - 1);
}

uint32_t JPEGDecoder::peekBits(int count) {
    while (m_bitCount < count) {
        m_bitBuffer = (m_bitBuffer << 8) | getNextByte();
        m_bitCount += 8;
    }
    
    return (m_bitBuffer >> (m_bitCount - count)) & ((1 << count) - 1);
}

void JPEGDecoder::skipBits(int count) {
    while (m_bitCount < count) {
        m_bitBuffer = (m_bitBuffer << 8) | getNextByte();
        m_bitCount += 8;
    }
    
    m_bitCount -= count;
}

// ====================================================================
// HUFFMAN DECODING
// ====================================================================

int16_t JPEGDecoder::decodeHuffman(HuffmanTable& table) {
    // Fast lookup pour les codes courts (<=16 bits)
    if (m_bitCount >= 16) {
        uint16_t peek = (m_bitBuffer >> (m_bitCount - 16)) & 0xFFFF;
        
        if (table.fastLookupLen[peek] > 0) {
            uint8_t len = table.fastLookupLen[peek];
            m_bitCount -= len;
            return table.fastLookup[peek];
        }
    }
    
    // Décodage complet pour les codes longs
    uint32_t code = 0;
    
    for (int len = 1; len <= 16; len++) {
        code = (code << 1) | getBits(1);
        
        for (size_t i = 0; i < table.codes.size(); i++) {
            if (table.codes[i] == code && table.codeLengths[i] == len) {
                return table.symbols[i];
            }
        }
    }
    
    return 0; // Erreur
}

// ====================================================================
// DECODE BLOCK (8x8)
// ====================================================================

void JPEGDecoder::decodeBlock(int16_t* block, HuffmanTable& dcTable, 
                              HuffmanTable& acTable, int16_t& prevDC) {
    
    std::memset(block, 0, 64 * sizeof(int16_t));
    
    // Decode DC coefficient
    int dcCategory = decodeHuffman(dcTable);
    
    int dcDiff = 0;
    if (dcCategory > 0) {
        dcDiff = getBits(dcCategory);
        
        // Sign extension
        if (dcDiff < (1 << (dcCategory - 1))) {
            dcDiff += ((-1) << dcCategory) + 1;
        }
    }
    
    prevDC += dcDiff;
    block[0] = prevDC;
    
    // Decode AC coefficients
    int index = 1;
    
    while (index < 64) {
        int symbol = decodeHuffman(acTable);
        
        if (symbol == 0x00) { // EOB (End of Block)
            break;
        }
        
        int zeroRun = (symbol >> 4) & 0x0F;
        int category = symbol & 0x0F;
        
        index += zeroRun;
        
        if (index >= 64) break;
        
        if (category > 0) {
            int value = getBits(category);
            
            // Sign extension
            if (value < (1 << (category - 1))) {
                value += ((-1) << category) + 1;
            }
            
            block[DEZIGZAG[index]] = value;
            index++;
        }
    }
}

// ====================================================================
// INVERSE DCT (IDCT)
// ====================================================================

void JPEGDecoder::inverseDCT(const int16_t* input, uint8_t* output) {
    // IDCT rapide en utilisant l'algorithme de Arai, Agui, et Nakajima (AAN)
    
    float temp[64];
    
    // IDCT 1D sur les lignes
    for (int i = 0; i < 8; i++) {
        float s0 = input[i * 8 + 0];
        float s1 = input[i * 8 + 1];
        float s2 = input[i * 8 + 2];
        float s3 = input[i * 8 + 3];
        float s4 = input[i * 8 + 4];
        float s5 = input[i * 8 + 5];
        float s6 = input[i * 8 + 6];
        float s7 = input[i * 8 + 7];
        
        // Constantes pré-calculées
        const float c1 = 1.414213562f;    // sqrt(2)
        const float c2 = 1.847759065f;    // sqrt(2) * cos(pi/8)
        const float c3 = 1.414213562f;    // sqrt(2)
        const float c4 = 1.082392200f;    // sqrt(2) * cos(3*pi/8)
        
        float t0 = s0 + s4;
        float t1 = s0 - s4;
        float t2 = s2 * c4 - s6 * c2;
        float t3 = s2 * c2 + s6 * c4;
        
        float t4 = s1 + s7;
        float t5 = s3 + s5;
        float t6 = s1 - s7;
        float t7 = s3 - s5;
        
        float u0 = t0 + t3;
        float u1 = t1 + t2;
        float u2 = t1 - t2;
        float u3 = t0 - t3;
        
        float u4 = t4 + t5;
        float u5 = (t6 + t7) * c3;
        float u6 = t4 - t5;
        
        float v0 = u4 + u5;
        float v1 = u6 + u5;
        
        temp[i * 8 + 0] = u0 + v0;
        temp[i * 8 + 1] = u1 + v1;
        temp[i * 8 + 2] = u2 + v1;
        temp[i * 8 + 3] = u3 + v0;
        temp[i * 8 + 4] = u3 - v0;
        temp[i * 8 + 5] = u2 - v1;
        temp[i * 8 + 6] = u1 - v1;
        temp[i * 8 + 7] = u0 - v0;
    }
    
    // IDCT 1D sur les colonnes
    for (int i = 0; i < 8; i++) {
        float s0 = temp[0 * 8 + i];
        float s1 = temp[1 * 8 + i];
        float s2 = temp[2 * 8 + i];
        float s3 = temp[3 * 8 + i];
        float s4 = temp[4 * 8 + i];
        float s5 = temp[5 * 8 + i];
        float s6 = temp[6 * 8 + i];
        float s7 = temp[7 * 8 + i];
        
        const float c1 = 1.414213562f;
        const float c2 = 1.847759065f;
        const float c3 = 1.414213562f;
        const float c4 = 1.082392200f;
        
        float t0 = s0 + s4;
        float t1 = s0 - s4;
        float t2 = s2 * c4 - s6 * c2;
        float t3 = s2 * c2 + s6 * c4;
        
        float t4 = s1 + s7;
        float t5 = s3 + s5;
        float t6 = s1 - s7;
        float t7 = s3 - s5;
        
        float u0 = t0 + t3;
        float u1 = t1 + t2;
        float u2 = t1 - t2;
        float u3 = t0 - t3;
        
        float u4 = t4 + t5;
        float u5 = (t6 + t7) * c3;
        float u6 = t4 - t5;
        
        float v0 = u4 + u5;
        float v1 = u6 + u5;
        
        // Clamp et convertir en uint8
        auto clamp = [](float x) -> uint8_t {
            int val = static_cast<int>(x + 128.5f);
            if (val < 0) return 0;
            if (val > 255) return 255;
            return static_cast<uint8_t>(val);
        };
        
        output[0 * 8 + i] = clamp(u0 + v0);
        output[1 * 8 + i] = clamp(u1 + v1);
        output[2 * 8 + i] = clamp(u2 + v1);
        output[3 * 8 + i] = clamp(u3 + v0);
        output[4 * 8 + i] = clamp(u3 - v0);
        output[5 * 8 + i] = clamp(u2 - v1);
        output[6 * 8 + i] = clamp(u1 - v1);
        output[7 * 8 + i] = clamp(u0 - v0);
    }
}

// ====================================================================
// DECODE MCU
// ====================================================================

void JPEGDecoder::decodeMCU(int mcuX, int mcuY) {
    static int16_t prevDC[3] = {0, 0, 0};
    
    // Pour chaque composant
    for (int comp = 0; comp < m_componentCount; comp++) {
        JPEGComponent& component = m_components[comp];
        
        int hsamp = component.horizontalSampling;
        int vsamp = component.verticalSampling;
        
        // Decode tous les blocs de ce composant dans ce MCU
        for (int y = 0; y < vsamp; y++) {
            for (int x = 0; x < hsamp; x++) {
                int16_t block[64];
                int16_t dequantized[64];
                uint8_t spatial[64];
                
                // Decode Huffman
                HuffmanTable& dcTable = m_huffmanDC[comp == 0 ? 0 : 1];
                HuffmanTable& acTable = m_huffmanAC[comp == 0 ? 0 : 1];
                
                decodeBlock(block, dcTable, acTable, prevDC[comp]);
                
                // Dequantize
                QuantizationTable& quantTable = m_quantTables[component.quantTableId];
                
                for (int i = 0; i < 64; i++) {
                    dequantized[i] = block[i] * quantTable.values[i];
                }
                
                // IDCT
                inverseDCT(dequantized, spatial);
                
                // Copier dans le buffer du composant
                int blockX = mcuX * hsamp + x;
                int blockY = mcuY * vsamp + y;
                
                for (int by = 0; by < 8; by++) {
                    for (int bx = 0; bx < 8; bx++) {
                        int px = blockX * 8 + bx;
                        int py = blockY * 8 + by;
                        
                        if (px < component.width && py < component.height) {
                            int index = py * component.width + px;
                            // Note: on stocke en int16_t mais les valeurs sont déjà dans [0, 255]
                            component.data[index] = spatial[by * 8 + bx];
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
}

// ====================================================================
// YCBCR TO RGB
// ====================================================================

void JPEGDecoder::ycbcrToRGB() {
    // Conversion YCbCr -> RGB avec upsampling si nécessaire
    // (implémentation simplifiée pour cet exemple)
}

// ====================================================================
// PARSE MARKERS
// ====================================================================

bool JPEGDecoder::parseMarkers(const uint8_t* data, size_t size) {
    const uint8_t* ptr = data;
    const uint8_t* end = data + size;
    
    // Vérifier SOI
    if (ptr + 2 > end || (ptr[0] != 0xFF || ptr[1] != 0xD8)) {
        NK_ERROR(ErrorCategory::Graphics, "Invalid JPEG: missing SOI marker");
        return false;
    }
    
    ptr += 2;
    
    size_t scanStart = 0;
    
    while (ptr < end - 1) {
        if (ptr[0] != 0xFF) {
            ptr++;
            continue;
        }
        
        uint8_t marker = ptr[1];
        ptr += 2;
        
        if (marker == 0xD8 || marker == 0xD9 || (marker >= 0xD0 && marker <= 0xD7)) {
            // Standalone markers
            continue;
        }
        
        if (ptr + 2 > end) break;
        
        uint16_t length = (ptr[0] << 8) | ptr[1];
        
        if (ptr + length > end) break;
        
        const uint8_t* segmentData = ptr + 2;
        size_t segmentLength = length - 2;
        
        uint16_t markerValue = (0xFF << 8) | marker;
        
        switch (markerValue) {
            case SOF0:
            case SOF2:
                if (!parseSOF(segmentData, segmentLength)) return false;
                break;
                
            case DQT:
                if (!parseDQT(segmentData, segmentLength)) return false;
                break;
                
            case DHT:
                if (!parseDHT(segmentData, segmentLength)) return false;
                break;
                
            case SOS:
                if (!parseSOS(segmentData, segmentLength, scanStart)) {
                    return false;
                }
                // Le scan data commence après ce segment
                scanStart = ptr + length - data;
                
                // Décoder le scan
                size_t scanLength = size - scanStart;
                
                // Trouver EOI
                for (size_t i = scanStart; i < size - 1; i++) {
                    if (data[i] == 0xFF && data[i + 1] == 0xD9) {
                        scanLength = i - scanStart;
                        break;
                    }
                }
                
                return decodeScan(data + scanStart, scanLength);
                
            case DRI:
                if (segmentLength >= 2) {
                    m_restartInterval = (segmentData[0] << 8) | segmentData[1];
                }
                break;
        }
        
        ptr += length;
    }
    
    return true;
}
```

# PARTIE 3 : JPEG - Suite et Fin (Parsing + Décodage + Encodage)

## 1. ImageLoaderJPEG.cpp - Parsing Complet

```cpp
// ImageLoaderJPEG.cpp - SUITE (Parsing)

// ====================================================================
// PARSE SOF (Start of Frame)
// ====================================================================

bool JPEGDecoder::parseSOF(const uint8_t* data, size_t length) {
    if (length < 6) {
        NK_ERROR(ErrorCategory::Graphics, "Invalid SOF segment");
        return false;
    }
    
    uint8_t precision = data[0];
    m_height = (data[1] << 8) | data[2];
    m_width = (data[3] << 8) | data[4];
    m_componentCount = data[5];
    
    NK_VALIDATE_MSG(nullptr, precision == 8, "Only 8-bit precision supported");
    NK_VALIDATE_MSG(nullptr, m_componentCount <= 3, "Too many components");
    
    if (length < 6 + m_componentCount * 3) {
        NK_ERROR(ErrorCategory::Graphics, "Invalid SOF segment length");
        return false;
    }
    
    m_maxHorizontalSampling = 0;
    m_maxVerticalSampling = 0;
    
    for (int i = 0; i < m_componentCount; i++) {
        int offset = 6 + i * 3;
        
        m_components[i].id = data[offset];
        uint8_t sampling = data[offset + 1];
        m_components[i].horizontalSampling = (sampling >> 4) & 0x0F;
        m_components[i].verticalSampling = sampling & 0x0F;
        m_components[i].quantTableId = data[offset + 2];
        
        m_maxHorizontalSampling = std::max(m_maxHorizontalSampling, 
                                           (int)m_components[i].horizontalSampling);
        m_maxVerticalSampling = std::max(m_maxVerticalSampling, 
                                         (int)m_components[i].verticalSampling);
    }
    
    // Calculer les dimensions MCU
    m_mcuWidth = m_maxHorizontalSampling * 8;
    m_mcuHeight = m_maxVerticalSampling * 8;
    m_mcuCountX = (m_width + m_mcuWidth - 1) / m_mcuWidth;
    m_mcuCountY = (m_height + m_mcuHeight - 1) / m_mcuHeight;
    
    // Allouer les buffers pour chaque composant
    for (int i = 0; i < m_componentCount; i++) {
        int compWidth = (m_width * m_components[i].horizontalSampling + 
                        m_maxHorizontalSampling - 1) / m_maxHorizontalSampling;
        int compHeight = (m_height * m_components[i].verticalSampling + 
                         m_maxVerticalSampling - 1) / m_maxVerticalSampling;
        
        // Arrondir aux multiples de 8
        compWidth = ((compWidth + 7) / 8) * 8;
        compHeight = ((compHeight + 7) / 8) * 8;
        
        m_components[i].width = compWidth;
        m_components[i].height = compHeight;
        m_components[i].data.resize(compWidth * compHeight, 0);
    }
    
    return true;
}

// ====================================================================
// PARSE DQT (Define Quantization Table)
// ====================================================================

bool JPEGDecoder::parseDQT(const uint8_t* data, size_t length) {
    size_t offset = 0;
    
    while (offset < length) {
        uint8_t info = data[offset++];
        uint8_t tableId = info & 0x0F;
        uint8_t precision = (info >> 4) & 0x0F;
        
        NK_VALIDATE_MSG(nullptr, tableId < 4, "Invalid quantization table ID");
        
        QuantizationTable& table = m_quantTables[tableId];
        table.precision = precision;
        
        int valueSize = (precision == 0) ? 1 : 2;
        
        if (offset + 64 * valueSize > length) {
            NK_ERROR(ErrorCategory::Graphics, "Invalid DQT segment");
            return false;
        }
        
        for (int i = 0; i < 64; i++) {
            if (precision == 0) {
                table.values[i] = data[offset++];
            } else {
                table.values[i] = (data[offset] << 8) | data[offset + 1];
                offset += 2;
            }
        }
    }
    
    return true;
}

// ====================================================================
// PARSE DHT (Define Huffman Table)
// ====================================================================

bool JPEGDecoder::parseDHT(const uint8_t* data, size_t length) {
    size_t offset = 0;
    
    while (offset < length) {
        uint8_t info = data[offset++];
        uint8_t tableClass = (info >> 4) & 0x0F; // 0 = DC, 1 = AC
        uint8_t tableId = info & 0x0F;
        
        NK_VALIDATE_MSG(nullptr, tableId < 4, "Invalid Huffman table ID");
        
        HuffmanTable& table = (tableClass == 0) ? m_huffmanDC[tableId] : m_huffmanAC[tableId];
        
        // Lire les bits
        table.bits[0] = 0; // bits[0] n'est pas utilisé
        
        int totalSymbols = 0;
        for (int i = 1; i <= 16; i++) {
            if (offset >= length) {
                NK_ERROR(ErrorCategory::Graphics, "Invalid DHT segment");
                return false;
            }
            table.bits[i] = data[offset++];
            totalSymbols += table.bits[i];
        }
        
        NK_VALIDATE_MSG(nullptr, totalSymbols <= 256, "Too many Huffman symbols");
        
        // Lire les valeurs
        if (offset + totalSymbols > length) {
            NK_ERROR(ErrorCategory::Graphics, "Invalid DHT segment");
            return false;
        }
        
        for (int i = 0; i < totalSymbols; i++) {
            table.values[i] = data[offset++];
        }
        
        // Construire la table
        table.build();
    }
    
    return true;
}

// ====================================================================
// PARSE SOS (Start of Scan)
// ====================================================================

bool JPEGDecoder::parseSOS(const uint8_t* data, size_t length, size_t& scanStart) {
    if (length < 1) {
        NK_ERROR(ErrorCategory::Graphics, "Invalid SOS segment");
        return false;
    }
    
    uint8_t componentCount = data[0];
    
    NK_VALIDATE_MSG(nullptr, componentCount == m_componentCount, 
                   "SOS component count mismatch");
    
    if (length < 1 + componentCount * 2 + 3) {
        NK_ERROR(ErrorCategory::Graphics, "Invalid SOS segment length");
        return false;
    }
    
    // Lire les sélecteurs de table pour chaque composant
    for (int i = 0; i < componentCount; i++) {
        int offset = 1 + i * 2;
        uint8_t componentId = data[offset];
        uint8_t tables = data[offset + 1];
        
        // Trouver le composant correspondant
        bool found = false;
        for (int j = 0; j < m_componentCount; j++) {
            if (m_components[j].id == componentId) {
                // Tables stockées temporairement (non utilisé dans cette implémentation simplifiée)
                found = true;
                break;
            }
        }
        
        NK_VALIDATE_MSG(nullptr, found, "Unknown component ID in SOS");
    }
    
    // Spectral selection et approximation (ignorés pour baseline)
    // uint8_t spectralStart = data[1 + componentCount * 2];
    // uint8_t spectralEnd = data[1 + componentCount * 2 + 1];
    // uint8_t approximation = data[1 + componentCount * 2 + 2];
    
    return true;
}

// ====================================================================
// DECODE SCAN
// ====================================================================

bool JPEGDecoder::decodeScan(const uint8_t* data, size_t length) {
    initBitStream(data, length);
    
    int restartCounter = m_restartInterval;
    int16_t prevDC[3] = {0, 0, 0};
    
    // Décoder tous les MCUs
    for (int mcuY = 0; mcuY < m_mcuCountY; mcuY++) {
        for (int mcuX = 0; mcuX < m_mcuCountX; mcuX++) {
            // Vérifier restart interval
            if (m_restartInterval > 0) {
                restartCounter--;
                if (restartCounter == 0) {
                    // Reset DC predictors
                    prevDC[0] = prevDC[1] = prevDC[2] = 0;
                    
                    // Align to byte boundary
                    m_bitCount = 0;
                    m_bitBuffer = 0;
                    
                    // Skip restart marker
                    if (m_bitPtr < m_bitEnd && *m_bitPtr == 0xFF) {
                        m_bitPtr += 2;
                    }
                    
                    restartCounter = m_restartInterval;
                }
            }
            
            // Décoder chaque composant du MCU
            for (int comp = 0; comp < m_componentCount; comp++) {
                JPEGComponent& component = m_components[comp];
                
                int hsamp = component.horizontalSampling;
                int vsamp = component.verticalSampling;
                
                // Decode tous les blocs de ce composant dans ce MCU
                for (int y = 0; y < vsamp; y++) {
                    for (int x = 0; x < hsamp; x++) {
                        int16_t block[64];
                        int16_t dequantized[64];
                        uint8_t spatial[64];
                        
                        // Decode Huffman
                        HuffmanTable& dcTable = m_huffmanDC[comp == 0 ? 0 : 1];
                        HuffmanTable& acTable = m_huffmanAC[comp == 0 ? 0 : 1];
                        
                        decodeBlock(block, dcTable, acTable, prevDC[comp]);
                        
                        // Dequantize
                        QuantizationTable& quantTable = m_quantTables[component.quantTableId];
                        
                        for (int i = 0; i < 64; i++) {
                            dequantized[i] = block[i] * quantTable.values[i];
                        }
                        
                        // IDCT
                        inverseDCT(dequantized, spatial);
                        
                        // Copier dans le buffer du composant
                        int blockX = mcuX * hsamp + x;
                        int blockY = mcuY * vsamp + y;
                        
                        for (int by = 0; by < 8; by++) {
                            for (int bx = 0; bx < 8; bx++) {
                                int px = blockX * 8 + bx;
                                int py = blockY * 8 + by;
                                
                                if (px < component.width && py < component.height) {
                                    int index = py * component.width + px;
                                    component.data[index] = spatial[by * 8 + bx];
                                }
                            }
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    return true;
}

// ====================================================================
// DECODE PRINCIPAL
// ====================================================================

bool JPEGDecoder::decode(const uint8_t* data, size_t size, Image& outImage) {
    // Parser tous les markers
    if (!parseMarkers(data, size)) {
        return false;
    }
    
    // Convertir YCbCr en RGB
    outImage.width = m_width;
    outImage.height = m_height;
    outImage.channels = 4;
    outImage.format = PixelFormat::RGBA;
    outImage.pixels.resize(m_width * m_height * 4);
    
    // Conversion YCbCr -> RGB avec upsampling
    for (int y = 0; y < m_height; y++) {
        for (int x = 0; x < m_width; x++) {
            // Calculer les positions dans chaque composant
            int yIndex = y * m_components[0].width / m_height * m_height + 
                        x * m_components[0].width / m_width;
            
            float yVal = m_components[0].data[yIndex];
            
            float cb = 128.0f, cr = 128.0f;
            
            if (m_componentCount == 3) {
                // Upsampling simple (nearest neighbor)
                int cbX = x * m_components[1].width / m_width;
                int cbY = y * m_components[1].height / m_height;
                int cbIndex = cbY * m_components[1].width + cbX;
                
                int crX = x * m_components[2].width / m_width;
                int crY = y * m_components[2].height / m_height;
                int crIndex = crY * m_components[2].width + crX;
                
                cb = m_components[1].data[cbIndex];
                cr = m_components[2].data[crIndex];
            }
            
            // YCbCr to RGB
            float r = yVal + 1.402f * (cr - 128.0f);
            float g = yVal - 0.344136f * (cb - 128.0f) - 0.714136f * (cr - 128.0f);
            float b = yVal + 1.772f * (cb - 128.0f);
            
            // Clamp
            auto clamp = [](float val) -> uint8_t {
                if (val < 0.0f) return 0;
                if (val > 255.0f) return 255;
                return static_cast<uint8_t>(val + 0.5f);
            };
            
            int index = (y * m_width + x) * 4;
            outImage.pixels[index + 0] = clamp(r);
            outImage.pixels[index + 1] = clamp(g);
            outImage.pixels[index + 2] = clamp(b);
            outImage.pixels[index + 3] = 255;
        }
    }
    
    return true;
}

// ====================================================================
// IMAGE LOADER JPEG - INTERFACE PRINCIPALE
// ====================================================================

Image ImageLoader::loadJPEG(const uint8_t* data, size_t size) {
    Image image;
    
    JPEGDecoder decoder;
    if (!decoder.decode(data, size, image)) {
        NK_ERROR(ErrorCategory::Graphics, "Failed to decode JPEG");
        return Image();
    }
    
    return image;
}

} // namespace nk
```

## 2. ImageLoaderJPEG_Encoder.cpp - Encodeur JPEG

```cpp
// ====================================================================
// JPEG ENCODER - CONSTRUCTOR
// ====================================================================

JPEGEncoder::JPEGEncoder()
    : m_bitBuffer(0)
    , m_bitCount(0)
    , m_image(nullptr)
    , m_quality(90) {
}

JPEGEncoder::~JPEGEncoder() {
}

// ====================================================================
// BIT STREAM WRITING
// ====================================================================

void JPEGEncoder::initBitStream() {
    m_bitBuffer = 0;
    m_bitCount = 0;
    m_output.clear();
}

void JPEGEncoder::putBits(uint32_t bits, int count) {
    m_bitBuffer = (m_bitBuffer << count) | bits;
    m_bitCount += count;
    
    while (m_bitCount >= 8) {
        uint8_t byte = (m_bitBuffer >> (m_bitCount - 8)) & 0xFF;
        m_output.push_back(byte);
        
        // Byte stuffing
        if (byte == 0xFF) {
            m_output.push_back(0x00);
        }
        
        m_bitCount -= 8;
    }
}

void JPEGEncoder::flushBits() {
    if (m_bitCount > 0) {
        uint8_t byte = (m_bitBuffer << (8 - m_bitCount)) & 0xFF;
        m_output.push_back(byte);
        
        if (byte == 0xFF) {
            m_output.push_back(0x00);
        }
    }
    
    m_bitBuffer = 0;
    m_bitCount = 0;
}

// ====================================================================
// WRITE MARKERS
// ====================================================================

void JPEGEncoder::writeMarker(uint16_t marker) {
    m_output.push_back((marker >> 8) & 0xFF);
    m_output.push_back(marker & 0xFF);
}

void JPEGEncoder::writeSegment(uint16_t marker, const std::vector<uint8_t>& data) {
    writeMarker(marker);
    
    uint16_t length = data.size() + 2;
    m_output.push_back((length >> 8) & 0xFF);
    m_output.push_back(length & 0xFF);
    
    m_output.insert(m_output.end(), data.begin(), data.end());
}

void JPEGEncoder::writeSOI() {
    writeMarker(SOI);
}

void JPEGEncoder::writeAPP0() {
    std::vector<uint8_t> data;
    
    // JFIF identifier
    data.push_back('J');
    data.push_back('F');
    data.push_back('I');
    data.push_back('F');
    data.push_back(0);
    
    // Version 1.01
    data.push_back(1);
    data.push_back(1);
    
    // Density units (0 = no units)
    data.push_back(0);
    
    // X density
    data.push_back(0);
    data.push_back(1);
    
    // Y density
    data.push_back(0);
    data.push_back(1);
    
    // Thumbnail (0x0)
    data.push_back(0);
    data.push_back(0);
    
    writeSegment(APP0, data);
}

void JPEGEncoder::writeDQT() {
    // Luma table
    {
        std::vector<uint8_t> data;
        data.push_back(0); // 8-bit precision, table 0
        
        for (int i = 0; i < 64; i++) {
            data.push_back(m_quantLuma.values[i] & 0xFF);
        }
        
        writeSegment(DQT, data);
    }
    
    // Chroma table
    {
        std::vector<uint8_t> data;
        data.push_back(1); // 8-bit precision, table 1
        
        for (int i = 0; i < 64; i++) {
            data.push_back(m_quantChroma.values[i] & 0xFF);
        }
        
        writeSegment(DQT, data);
    }
}

void JPEGEncoder::writeDHT() {
    // DC Luma
    {
        std::vector<uint8_t> data;
        data.push_back(0x00); // Class 0 (DC), ID 0
        
        for (int i = 1; i <= 16; i++) {
            data.push_back(STD_DC_LUMINANCE_BITS[i]);
        }
        
        for (int i = 0; i < 12; i++) {
            data.push_back(STD_DC_LUMINANCE_VALUES[i]);
        }
        
        writeSegment(DHT, data);
    }
    
    // AC Luma
    {
        std::vector<uint8_t> data;
        data.push_back(0x10); // Class 1 (AC), ID 0
        
        for (int i = 1; i <= 16; i++) {
            data.push_back(STD_AC_LUMINANCE_BITS[i]);
        }
        
        for (int i = 0; i < 162; i++) {
            data.push_back(STD_AC_LUMINANCE_VALUES[i]);
        }
        
        writeSegment(DHT, data);
    }
    
    // DC Chroma
    {
        std::vector<uint8_t> data;
        data.push_back(0x01); // Class 0 (DC), ID 1
        
        for (int i = 1; i <= 16; i++) {
            data.push_back(STD_DC_CHROMINANCE_BITS[i]);
        }
        
        for (int i = 0; i < 12; i++) {
            data.push_back(STD_DC_CHROMINANCE_VALUES[i]);
        }
        
        writeSegment(DHT, data);
    }
    
    // AC Chroma
    {
        std::vector<uint8_t> data;
        data.push_back(0x11); // Class 1 (AC), ID 1
        
        for (int i = 1; i <= 16; i++) {
            data.push_back(STD_AC_CHROMINANCE_BITS[i]);
        }
        
        for (int i = 0; i < 162; i++) {
            data.push_back(STD_AC_CHROMINANCE_VALUES[i]);
        }
        
        writeSegment(DHT, data);
    }
}

void JPEGEncoder::writeSOF0() {
    std::vector<uint8_t> data;
    
    data.push_back(8); // Precision
    
    // Height
    data.push_back((m_image->height >> 8) & 0xFF);
    data.push_back(m_image->height & 0xFF);
    
    // Width
    data.push_back((m_image->width >> 8) & 0xFF);
    data.push_back(m_image->width & 0xFF);
    
    data.push_back(3); // 3 components (Y, Cb, Cr)
    
    // Y component
    data.push_back(1); // ID
    data.push_back(0x22); // 2x2 sampling
    data.push_back(0); // Quant table 0
    
    // Cb component
    data.push_back(2); // ID
    data.push_back(0x11); // 1x1 sampling
    data.push_back(1); // Quant table 1
    
    // Cr component
    data.push_back(3); // ID
    data.push_back(0x11); // 1x1 sampling
    data.push_back(1); // Quant table 1
    
    writeSegment(SOF0, data);
}

void JPEGEncoder::writeSOS() {
    std::vector<uint8_t> data;
    
    data.push_back(3); // 3 components
    
    // Y
    data.push_back(1); // Component ID
    data.push_back(0x00); // DC table 0, AC table 0
    
    // Cb
    data.push_back(2);
    data.push_back(0x11); // DC table 1, AC table 1
    
    // Cr
    data.push_back(3);
    data.push_back(0x11);
    
    // Spectral selection
    data.push_back(0);
    data.push_back(63);
    
    // Approximation
    data.push_back(0);
    
    writeSegment(SOS, data);
}

void JPEGEncoder::writeEOI() {
    writeMarker(EOI);
}

// ====================================================================
// FORWARD DCT
// ====================================================================

void JPEGEncoder::forwardDCT(const uint8_t* input, int16_t* output) {
    // DCT 2D séparable
    float temp[64];
    
    // DCT 1D sur les lignes
    for (int i = 0; i < 8; i++) {
        float s[8];
        for (int j = 0; j < 8; j++) {
            s[j] = input[i * 8 + j] - 128.0f; // Shift pour centrer autour de 0
        }
        
        for (int u = 0; u < 8; u++) {
            float sum = 0.0f;
            for (int x = 0; x < 8; x++) {
                sum += s[x] * std::cos((2.0f * x + 1.0f) * u * M_PI / 16.0f);
            }
            
            float cu = (u == 0) ? (1.0f / std::sqrt(2.0f)) : 1.0f;
            temp[i * 8 + u] = 0.5f * cu * sum;
        }
    }
    
    // DCT 1D sur les colonnes
    for (int i = 0; i < 8; i++) {
        for (int u = 0; u < 8; u++) {
            float sum = 0.0f;
            for (int y = 0; y < 8; y++) {
                sum += temp[y * 8 + i] * std::cos((2.0f * y + 1.0f) * u * M_PI / 16.0f);
            }
            
            float cu = (u == 0) ? (1.0f / std::sqrt(2.0f)) : 1.0f;
            output[u * 8 + i] = static_cast<int16_t>(0.5f * cu * sum);
        }
    }
}

void JPEGEncoder::quantize(int16_t* block, const QuantizationTable& table) {
    for (int i = 0; i < 64; i++) {
        block[i] = static_cast<int16_t>((block[i] + table.values[i] / 2) / table.values[i]);
    }
}

// ====================================================================
// RGB TO YCBCR
// ====================================================================

void JPEGEncoder::rgbToYCbCr() {
    int width = m_image->width;
    int height = m_image->height;
    
    m_yChannel.resize(width * height);
    m_cbChannel.resize(width * height);
    m_crChannel.resize(width * height);
    
    for (int y = 0; y < height; y++) {
        for (int x = 0; x < width; x++) {
            uint32_t pixel = m_image->getPixel(x, y);
            
            uint8_t r = (pixel >> 0) & 0xFF;
            uint8_t g = (pixel >> 8) & 0xFF;
            uint8_t b = (pixel >> 16) & 0xFF;
            
            float yVal = 0.299f * r + 0.587f * g + 0.114f * b;
            float cb = 128.0f + (-0.168736f * r - 0.331264f * g + 0.5f * b);
            float cr = 128.0f + (0.5f * r - 0.418688f * g - 0.081312f * b);
            
            int index = y * width + x;
            m_yChannel[index] = static_cast<uint8_t>(std::clamp(yVal, 0.0f, 255.0f));
            m_cbChannel[index] = static_cast<uint8_t>(std::clamp(cb, 0.0f, 255.0f));
            m_crChannel[index] = static_cast<uint8_t>(std::clamp(cr, 0.0f, 255.0f));
        }
    }
}

// ====================================================================
// ENCODE
// ====================================================================

bool JPEGEncoder::encode(const Image& image, std::vector<uint8_t>& outData, int quality) {
    m_image = &image;
    m_quality = quality;
    
    // Préparer les tables de quantization basées sur la qualité
    float scale = (quality < 50) ? (5000.0f / quality) : (200.0f - quality * 2.0f);
    scale /= 100.0f;
    
    for (int i = 0; i < 64; i++) {
        int val = static_cast<int>(STD_LUMINANCE_QUANT[i] * scale + 0.5f);
        m_quantLuma.values[i] = std::clamp(val, 1, 255);
        
        val = static_cast<int>(STD_CHROMINANCE_QUANT[i] * scale + 0.5f);
        m_quantChroma.values[i] = std::clamp(val, 1, 255);
    }
    
    // Construire les tables Huffman
    std::memcpy(m_huffmanDCLuma.bits, STD_DC_LUMINANCE_BITS, 17);
    std::memcpy(m_huffmanDCLuma.values, STD_DC_LUMINANCE_VALUES, 12);
    m_huffmanDCLuma.build();
    
    std::memcpy(m_huffmanACLuma.bits, STD_AC_LUMINANCE_BITS, 17);
    std::memcpy(m_huffmanACLuma.values, STD_AC_LUMINANCE_VALUES, 162);
    m_huffmanACLuma.build();
    
    std::memcpy(m_huffmanDCChroma.bits, STD_DC_CHROMINANCE_BITS, 17);
    std::memcpy(m_huffmanDCChroma.values, STD_DC_CHROMINANCE_VALUES, 12);
    m_huffmanDCChroma.build();
    
    std::memcpy(m_huffmanACChroma.bits, STD_AC_CHROMINANCE_BITS, 17);
    std::memcpy(m_huffmanACChroma.values, STD_AC_CHROMINANCE_VALUES, 162);
    m_huffmanACChroma.build();
    
    // Convertir RGB en YCbCr
    rgbToYCbCr();
    
    // Écrire les headers
    writeSOI();
    writeAPP0();
    writeDQT();
    writeSOF0();
    writeDHT();
    writeSOS();
    
    // Init bit stream
    initBitStream();
    
    // Encoder les MCUs
    int mcuWidth = 16;  // 2x2 subsampling
    int mcuHeight = 16;
    
    int mcuCountX = (image.width + mcuWidth - 1) / mcuWidth;
    int mcuCountY = (image.height + mcuHeight - 1) / mcuHeight;
    
    int16_t prevDC[3] = {0, 0, 0};
    
    for (int mcuY = 0; mcuY < mcuCountY; mcuY++) {
        for (int mcuX = 0; mcuX < mcuCountX; mcuX++) {
            // Encoder Y (4 blocs 8x8)
            for (int by = 0; by < 2; by++) {
                for (int bx = 0; bx < 2; bx++) {
                    uint8_t block[64];
                    int16_t dct[64];
                    
                    // Extraire le bloc
                    for (int y = 0; y < 8; y++) {
                        for (int x = 0; x < 8; x++) {
                            int px = mcuX * mcuWidth + bx * 8 + x;
                            int py = mcuY * mcuHeight + by * 8 + y;
                            
                            if (px < image.width && py < image.height) {
                                block[y * 8 + x] = m_yChannel[py * image.width + px];
                            } else {
                                block[y * 8 + x] = 0;
                            }
                        }
                    }
                    
                    forwardDCT(block, dct);
                    quantize(dct, m_quantLuma);
                    encodeBlock(dct, m_huffmanDCLuma, m_huffmanACLuma, prevDC[0]);
                }
            }
            
            // Encoder Cb (1 bloc 8x8 downsampled)
            {
                uint8_t block[64];
                int16_t dct[64];
                
                for (int y = 0; y < 8; y++) {
                    for (int x = 0; x < 8; x++) {
                        int px = mcuX * 8 + x;
                        int py = mcuY * 8 + y;
                        
                        // Downsample 2x2
                        px = std::min(px * 2, image.width - 1);
                        py = std::min(py * 2, image.height - 1);
                        
                        block[y * 8 + x] = m_cbChannel[py * image.width + px];
                    }
                }
                
                forwardDCT(block, dct);
                quantize(dct, m_quantChroma);
                encodeBlock(dct, m_huffmanDCChroma, m_huffmanACChroma, prevDC[1]);
            }
            
            // Encoder Cr (1 bloc 8x8 downsampled)
            {
                uint8_t block[64];
                int16_t dct[64];
                
                for (int y = 0; y < 8; y++) {
                    for (int x = 0; x < 8; x++) {
                        int px = mcuX * 8 + x;
                        int py = mcuY * 8 + y;
                        
                        px = std::min(px * 2, image.width - 1);
                        py = std::min(py * 2, image.height - 1);
                        
                        block[y * 8 + x] = m_crChannel[py * image.width + px];
                    }
                }
                
                forwardDCT(block, dct);
                quantize(dct, m_quantChroma);
                encodeBlock(dct, m_huffmanDCChroma, m_huffmanACChroma, prevDC[2]);
            }
        }
    }
    
    flushBits();
    
    // EOI
    writeEOI();
    
    outData = m_output;
    return true;
}

void JPEGEncoder::encodeBlock(const int16_t* block, HuffmanTable& dcTable, 
                              HuffmanTable& acTable, int16_t& prevDC) {
    // Encoder DC
    int16_t dcDiff = block[0] - prevDC;
    prevDC = block[0];
    
    int dcCategory = 0;
    int dcValue = std::abs(dcDiff);
    
    while (dcValue > 0) {
        dcCategory++;
        dcValue >>= 1;
    }
    
    // Trouver le code Huffman pour cette catégorie
    for (size_t i = 0; i < dcTable.symbols.size(); i++) {
        if (dcTable.symbols[i] == dcCategory) {
            putBits(dcTable.codes[i], dcTable.codeLengths[i]);
            
            if (dcCategory > 0) {
                int bits = dcDiff;
                if (dcDiff < 0) {
                    bits = dcDiff - 1;
                }
                putBits(bits & ((1 << dcCategory) - 1), dcCategory);
            }
            break;
        }
    }
    
    // Encoder AC coefficients en zigzag
    int runLength = 0;
    
    for (int i = 1; i < 64; i++) {
        int16_t value = block[ZIGZAG[i]];
        
        if (value == 0) {
            runLength++;
            continue;
        }
        
        // Encoder les runs de zéros
        while (runLength >= 16) {
            // ZRL (Zero Run Length)
            for (size_t j = 0; j < acTable.symbols.size(); j++) {
                if (acTable.symbols[j] == 0xF0) {
                    putBits(acTable.codes[j], acTable.codeLengths[j]);
                    break;
                }
            }
            runLength -= 16;
        }
        
        int category = 0;
        int absValue = std::abs(value);
        
        while (absValue > 0) {
            category++;
            absValue >>= 1;
        }
        
        uint8_t symbol = (runLength << 4) | category;
        
        // Trouver le code Huffman
        for (size_t j = 0; j < acTable.symbols.size(); j++) {
            if (acTable.symbols[j] == symbol) {
                putBits(acTable.codes[j], acTable.codeLengths[j]);
                
                int bits = value;
                if (value < 0) {
                    bits = value - 1;
                }
                putBits(bits & ((1 << category) - 1), category);
                break;
            }
        }
        
        runLength = 0;
    }
    
    // EOB (End of Block)
    if (runLength > 0 || block[ZIGZAG[63]] != 0) {
        for (size_t j = 0; j < acTable.symbols.size(); j++) {
            if (acTable.symbols[j] == 0x00) {
                putBits(acTable.codes[j], acTable.codeLengths[j]);
                break;
            }
        }
    }
}

} // namespace nk
```

Trop long ! Voulez-vous que je continue avec **TrueType from scratch** (parser TTF complet) ou **les états de rendu avancés** (scissor, blend, depth, wireframe) ?


# PARTIE 4 : TRUETYPE FONT LOADER FROM SCRATCH

## 1. TrueTypeLoader.hpp - Parser TTF Complet

```cpp
// TrueTypeLoader.hpp
#pragma once

#include <cstdint>
#include <vector>
#include <string>
#include <unordered_map>
#include <memory>

namespace nk {

// ====================================================================
// TRUETYPE TABLES
// ====================================================================

enum class TTFTable : uint32_t {
    cmap = 0x636D6170,  // Character to glyph mapping
    glyf = 0x676C7966,  // Glyph data
    head = 0x68656164,  // Font header
    hhea = 0x68686561,  // Horizontal header
    hmtx = 0x686D7478,  // Horizontal metrics
    loca = 0x6C6F6361,  // Index to location
    maxp = 0x6D617870,  // Maximum profile
    name = 0x6E616D65,  // Naming table
    post = 0x706F7374,  // PostScript information
    kern = 0x6B65726E,  // Kerning
    OS2  = 0x4F532F32,  // OS/2 and Windows specific metrics
    cvt  = 0x63767420,  // Control Value Table
    fpgm = 0x6670676D,  // Font program
    prep = 0x70726570,  // CVT Program
    GSUB = 0x47535542,  // Glyph Substitution
    GPOS = 0x47504F53   // Glyph Positioning
};

// ====================================================================
// TRUETYPE STRUCTURES
// ====================================================================

#pragma pack(push, 1)
struct TTFOffsetTable {
    uint32_t sfntVersion;
    uint16_t numTables;
    uint16_t searchRange;
    uint16_t entrySelector;
    uint16_t rangeShift;
};

struct TTFTableDirectory {
    uint32_t tag;
    uint32_t checksum;
    uint32_t offset;
    uint32_t length;
};

struct TTFHeadTable {
    uint16_t majorVersion;
    uint16_t minorVersion;
    int32_t fontRevision;
    uint32_t checksumAdjustment;
    uint32_t magicNumber;
    uint16_t flags;
    uint16_t unitsPerEm;
    int64_t created;
    int64_t modified;
    int16_t xMin;
    int16_t yMin;
    int16_t xMax;
    int16_t yMax;
    uint16_t macStyle;
    uint16_t lowestRecPPEM;
    int16_t fontDirectionHint;
    int16_t indexToLocFormat;  // 0 = short, 1 = long
    int16_t glyphDataFormat;
};

struct TTFHheaTable {
    uint16_t majorVersion;
    uint16_t minorVersion;
    int16_t ascender;
    int16_t descender;
    int16_t lineGap;
    uint16_t advanceWidthMax;
    int16_t minLeftSideBearing;
    int16_t minRightSideBearing;
    int16_t xMaxExtent;
    int16_t caretSlopeRise;
    int16_t caretSlopeRun;
    int16_t caretOffset;
    int16_t reserved[4];
    int16_t metricDataFormat;
    uint16_t numberOfHMetrics;
};

struct TTFMaxpTable {
    uint32_t version;
    uint16_t numGlyphs;
    uint16_t maxPoints;
    uint16_t maxContours;
    uint16_t maxCompositePoints;
    uint16_t maxCompositeContours;
    uint16_t maxZones;
    uint16_t maxTwilightPoints;
    uint16_t maxStorage;
    uint16_t maxFunctionDefs;
    uint16_t maxInstructionDefs;
    uint16_t maxStackElements;
    uint16_t maxSizeOfInstructions;
    uint16_t maxComponentElements;
    uint16_t maxComponentDepth;
};

struct TTFLongHorMetric {
    uint16_t advanceWidth;
    int16_t lsb;  // Left side bearing
};
#pragma pack(pop)

// ====================================================================
// GLYPH OUTLINE
// ====================================================================

struct TTFPoint {
    float x, y;
    bool onCurve;
};

struct TTFContour {
    std::vector<TTFPoint> points;
};

struct TTFGlyphOutline {
    std::vector<TTFContour> contours;
    int16_t xMin, yMin, xMax, yMax;
    int numberOfContours;
    bool isComposite;
};

// ====================================================================
// TRUETYPE LOADER
// ====================================================================

class TrueTypeLoader {
public:
    TrueTypeLoader();
    ~TrueTypeLoader();
    
    bool load(const uint8_t* data, size_t size);
    bool loadFromFile(const std::string& filepath);
    
    // Glyph operations
    int getGlyphIndex(uint32_t codepoint) const;
    TTFGlyphOutline getGlyphOutline(int glyphIndex) const;
    
    // Rasterization
    std::vector<uint8_t> rasterizeGlyph(int glyphIndex, int pixelSize, 
                                        int& outWidth, int& outHeight,
                                        int& outBearingX, int& outBearingY,
                                        int& outAdvance) const;
    
    // Metrics
    void getHMetrics(int glyphIndex, int& advanceWidth, int& leftSideBearing) const;
    int getKerning(int leftGlyphIndex, int rightGlyphIndex) const;
    
    // Font info
    int getUnitsPerEm() const { return m_unitsPerEm; }
    int getAscender() const { return m_ascender; }
    int getDescender() const { return m_descender; }
    int getLineGap() const { return m_lineGap; }
    
    std::string getFontFamily() const;
    std::string getFontStyle() const;
    
    bool isValid() const { return m_valid; }
    
private:
    // Parsing
    bool parseOffsetTable();
    bool parseTableDirectory();
    bool parseHeadTable();
    bool parseHheaTable();
    bool parseMaxpTable();
    bool parseLocaTable();
    bool parseHmtxTable();
    bool parseCmapTable();
    bool parseNameTable();
    bool parseKernTable();
    
    // Glyph parsing
    TTFGlyphOutline parseSimpleGlyph(const uint8_t* data) const;
    TTFGlyphOutline parseCompositeGlyph(const uint8_t* data) const;
    
    // Helpers
    const uint8_t* getTableData(TTFTable table, uint32_t& outLength) const;
    
    uint16_t readU16(const uint8_t* data) const;
    int16_t readI16(const uint8_t* data) const;
    uint32_t readU32(const uint8_t* data) const;
    int32_t readI32(const uint8_t* data) const;
    int64_t readI64(const uint8_t* data) const;
    
    // Rasterization helpers
    void scanlineRasterize(const TTFGlyphOutline& outline, 
                          std::vector<uint8_t>& bitmap,
                          int width, int height, float scale) const;
    
    // Font data
    std::vector<uint8_t> m_fontData;
    bool m_valid;
    
    // Tables
    std::unordered_map<uint32_t, TTFTableDirectory> m_tables;
    
    // Parsed data
    TTFHeadTable m_head;
    TTFHheaTable m_hhea;
    TTFMaxpTable m_maxp;
    
    std::vector<uint32_t> m_loca;  // Glyph locations
    std::vector<TTFLongHorMetric> m_hmtx;  // Horizontal metrics
    
    // Cmap (character to glyph index mapping)
    std::unordered_map<uint32_t, uint16_t> m_cmap;
    
    // Kerning
    struct KernPair {
        uint16_t left;
        uint16_t right;
        int16_t value;
    };
    std::vector<KernPair> m_kernPairs;
    
    // Font metrics
    int m_unitsPerEm;
    int m_ascender;
    int m_descender;
    int m_lineGap;
    int m_numGlyphs;
    
    bool m_indexToLocFormat; // false = short, true = long
};

} // namespace nk
```

## 2. TrueTypeLoader.cpp - Implémentation Parsing

```cpp
// TrueTypeLoader.cpp
#include "TrueTypeLoader.hpp"
#include "Error.hpp"
#include <fstream>
#include <cstring>
#include <algorithm>
#include <cmath>

namespace nk {

TrueTypeLoader::TrueTypeLoader()
    : m_valid(false)
    , m_unitsPerEm(0)
    , m_ascender(0)
    , m_descender(0)
    , m_lineGap(0)
    , m_numGlyphs(0)
    , m_indexToLocFormat(false) {
}

TrueTypeLoader::~TrueTypeLoader() {
}

// ====================================================================
// ENDIANNESS HELPERS
// ====================================================================

uint16_t TrueTypeLoader::readU16(const uint8_t* data) const {
    return (data[0] << 8) | data[1];
}

int16_t TrueTypeLoader::readI16(const uint8_t* data) const {
    return static_cast<int16_t>((data[0] << 8) | data[1]);
}

uint32_t TrueTypeLoader::readU32(const uint8_t* data) const {
    return (data[0] << 24) | (data[1] << 16) | (data[2] << 8) | data[3];
}

int32_t TrueTypeLoader::readI32(const uint8_t* data) const {
    return static_cast<int32_t>(readU32(data));
}

int64_t TrueTypeLoader::readI64(const uint8_t* data) const {
    uint64_t high = readU32(data);
    uint64_t low = readU32(data + 4);
    return static_cast<int64_t>((high << 32) | low);
}

// ====================================================================
// LOAD
// ====================================================================

bool TrueTypeLoader::loadFromFile(const std::string& filepath) {
    std::ifstream file(filepath, std::ios::binary | std::ios::ate);
    
    NK_VALIDATE_MSG(nullptr, file.is_open(), 
                   std::string("Failed to open font file: ") + filepath);
    
    size_t fileSize = file.tellg();
    file.seekg(0, std::ios::beg);
    
    m_fontData.resize(fileSize);
    file.read(reinterpret_cast<char*>(m_fontData.data()), fileSize);
    file.close();
    
    return load(m_fontData.data(), m_fontData.size());
}

bool TrueTypeLoader::load(const uint8_t* data, size_t size) {
    m_fontData.assign(data, data + size);
    
    m_valid = false;
    
    // Parse offset table
    if (!parseOffsetTable()) return false;
    
    // Parse table directory
    if (!parseTableDirectory()) return false;
    
    // Parse required tables
    if (!parseHeadTable()) return false;
    if (!parseMaxpTable()) return false;
    if (!parseHheaTable()) return false;
    if (!parseLocaTable()) return false;
    if (!parseHmtxTable()) return false;
    if (!parseCmapTable()) return false;
    
    // Optional tables
    parseNameTable();
    parseKernTable();
    
    m_valid = true;
    return true;
}

// ====================================================================
// PARSE OFFSET TABLE
// ====================================================================

bool TrueTypeLoader::parseOffsetTable() {
    NK_VALIDATE_MSG(nullptr, m_fontData.size() >= sizeof(TTFOffsetTable),
                   "Font file too small");
    
    const uint8_t* ptr = m_fontData.data();
    
    uint32_t version = readU32(ptr);
    
    // Vérifier la version (0x00010000 pour TrueType, 'OTTO' pour CFF)
    NK_VALIDATE_MSG(nullptr, version == 0x00010000 || version == 0x4F54544F,
                   "Invalid TrueType font version");
    
    return true;
}

// ====================================================================
// PARSE TABLE DIRECTORY
// ====================================================================

bool TrueTypeLoader::parseTableDirectory() {
    const uint8_t* ptr = m_fontData.data();
    
    ptr += 4; // Skip version
    uint16_t numTables = readU16(ptr);
    ptr += 2;
    ptr += 6; // Skip searchRange, entrySelector, rangeShift
    
    NK_VALIDATE_MSG(nullptr, m_fontData.size() >= 12 + numTables * 16,
                   "Invalid table directory");
    
    for (int i = 0; i < numTables; i++) {
        TTFTableDirectory entry;
        
        entry.tag = readU32(ptr);
        ptr += 4;
        entry.checksum = readU32(ptr);
        ptr += 4;
        entry.offset = readU32(ptr);
        ptr += 4;
        entry.length = readU32(ptr);
        ptr += 4;
        
        m_tables[entry.tag] = entry;
    }
    
    return true;
}

// ====================================================================
// GET TABLE DATA
// ====================================================================

const uint8_t* TrueTypeLoader::getTableData(TTFTable table, uint32_t& outLength) const {
    auto it = m_tables.find(static_cast<uint32_t>(table));
    
    if (it == m_tables.end()) {
        outLength = 0;
        return nullptr;
    }
    
    const TTFTableDirectory& entry = it->second;
    
    if (entry.offset + entry.length > m_fontData.size()) {
        outLength = 0;
        return nullptr;
    }
    
    outLength = entry.length;
    return m_fontData.data() + entry.offset;
}

// ====================================================================
// PARSE HEAD TABLE
// ====================================================================

bool TrueTypeLoader::parseHeadTable() {
    uint32_t length;
    const uint8_t* data = getTableData(TTFTable::head, length);
    
    NK_VALIDATE_MSG(data, data != nullptr, "'head' table not found");
    NK_VALIDATE_MSG(nullptr, length >= 54, "Invalid 'head' table");
    
    const uint8_t* ptr = data;
    
    m_head.majorVersion = readU16(ptr); ptr += 2;
    m_head.minorVersion = readU16(ptr); ptr += 2;
    m_head.fontRevision = readI32(ptr); ptr += 4;
    m_head.checksumAdjustment = readU32(ptr); ptr += 4;
    m_head.magicNumber = readU32(ptr); ptr += 4;
    
    NK_VALIDATE_MSG(nullptr, m_head.magicNumber == 0x5F0F3CF5, "Invalid magic number");
    
    m_head.flags = readU16(ptr); ptr += 2;
    m_head.unitsPerEm = readU16(ptr); ptr += 2;
    m_head.created = readI64(ptr); ptr += 8;
    m_head.modified = readI64(ptr); ptr += 8;
    m_head.xMin = readI16(ptr); ptr += 2;
    m_head.yMin = readI16(ptr); ptr += 2;
    m_head.xMax = readI16(ptr); ptr += 2;
    m_head.yMax = readI16(ptr); ptr += 2;
    m_head.macStyle = readU16(ptr); ptr += 2;
    m_head.lowestRecPPEM = readU16(ptr); ptr += 2;
    m_head.fontDirectionHint = readI16(ptr); ptr += 2;
    m_head.indexToLocFormat = readI16(ptr); ptr += 2;
    m_head.glyphDataFormat = readI16(ptr); ptr += 2;
    
    m_unitsPerEm = m_head.unitsPerEm;
    m_indexToLocFormat = (m_head.indexToLocFormat == 1);
    
    return true;
}

// ====================================================================
// PARSE HHEA TABLE
// ====================================================================

bool TrueTypeLoader::parseHheaTable() {
    uint32_t length;
    const uint8_t* data = getTableData(TTFTable::hhea, length);
    
    NK_VALIDATE_MSG(data, data != nullptr, "'hhea' table not found");
    NK_VALIDATE_MSG(nullptr, length >= 36, "Invalid 'hhea' table");
    
    const uint8_t* ptr = data;
    
    m_hhea.majorVersion = readU16(ptr); ptr += 2;
    m_hhea.minorVersion = readU16(ptr); ptr += 2;
    m_hhea.ascender = readI16(ptr); ptr += 2;
    m_hhea.descender = readI16(ptr); ptr += 2;
    m_hhea.lineGap = readI16(ptr); ptr += 2;
    m_hhea.advanceWidthMax = readU16(ptr); ptr += 2;
    m_hhea.minLeftSideBearing = readI16(ptr); ptr += 2;
    m_hhea.minRightSideBearing = readI16(ptr); ptr += 2;
    m_hhea.xMaxExtent = readI16(ptr); ptr += 2;
    m_hhea.caretSlopeRise = readI16(ptr); ptr += 2;
    m_hhea.caretSlopeRun = readI16(ptr); ptr += 2;
    m_hhea.caretOffset = readI16(ptr); ptr += 2;
    
    ptr += 8; // Skip reserved
    
    m_hhea.metricDataFormat = readI16(ptr); ptr += 2;
    m_hhea.numberOfHMetrics = readU16(ptr); ptr += 2;
    
    m_ascender = m_hhea.ascender;
    m_descender = m_hhea.descender;
    m_lineGap = m_hhea.lineGap;
    
    return true;
}

// ====================================================================
// PARSE MAXP TABLE
// ====================================================================

bool TrueTypeLoader::parseMaxpTable() {
    uint32_t length;
    const uint8_t* data = getTableData(TTFTable::maxp, length);
    
    NK_VALIDATE_MSG(data, data != nullptr, "'maxp' table not found");
    NK_VALIDATE_MSG(nullptr, length >= 6, "Invalid 'maxp' table");
    
    const uint8_t* ptr = data;
    
    m_maxp.version = readU32(ptr); ptr += 4;
    m_maxp.numGlyphs = readU16(ptr); ptr += 2;
    
    m_numGlyphs = m_maxp.numGlyphs;
    
    if (length >= 32) {
        m_maxp.maxPoints = readU16(ptr); ptr += 2;
        m_maxp.maxContours = readU16(ptr); ptr += 2;
        m_maxp.maxCompositePoints = readU16(ptr); ptr += 2;
        m_maxp.maxCompositeContours = readU16(ptr); ptr += 2;
        m_maxp.maxZones = readU16(ptr); ptr += 2;
        m_maxp.maxTwilightPoints = readU16(ptr); ptr += 2;
        m_maxp.maxStorage = readU16(ptr); ptr += 2;
        m_maxp.maxFunctionDefs = readU16(ptr); ptr += 2;
        m_maxp.maxInstructionDefs = readU16(ptr); ptr += 2;
        m_maxp.maxStackElements = readU16(ptr); ptr += 2;
        m_maxp.maxSizeOfInstructions = readU16(ptr); ptr += 2;
        m_maxp.maxComponentElements = readU16(ptr); ptr += 2;
        m_maxp.maxComponentDepth = readU16(ptr); ptr += 2;
    }
    
    return true;
}

// ====================================================================
// PARSE LOCA TABLE
// ====================================================================

bool TrueTypeLoader::parseLocaTable() {
    uint32_t length;
    const uint8_t* data = getTableData(TTFTable::loca, length);
    
    NK_VALIDATE_MSG(data, data != nullptr, "'loca' table not found");
    
    const uint8_t* ptr = data;
    
    m_loca.resize(m_numGlyphs + 1);
    
    if (m_indexToLocFormat) {
        // Long format (uint32)
        NK_VALIDATE_MSG(nullptr, length >= (m_numGlyphs + 1) * 4, "Invalid 'loca' table");
        
        for (int i = 0; i <= m_numGlyphs; i++) {
            m_loca[i] = readU32(ptr);
            ptr += 4;
        }
    } else {
        // Short format (uint16 * 2)
        NK_VALIDATE_MSG(nullptr, length >= (m_numGlyphs + 1) * 2, "Invalid 'loca' table");
        
        for (int i = 0; i <= m_numGlyphs; i++) {
            m_loca[i] = readU16(ptr) * 2;
            ptr += 2;
        }
    }
    
    return true;
}

// ====================================================================
// PARSE HMTX TABLE
// ====================================================================

bool TrueTypeLoader::parseHmtxTable() {
    uint32_t length;
    const uint8_t* data = getTableData(TTFTable::hmtx, length);
    
    NK_VALIDATE_MSG(data, data != nullptr, "'hmtx' table not found");
    
    const uint8_t* ptr = data;
    
    m_hmtx.resize(m_numGlyphs);
    
    // Lire les longHorMetrics
    for (int i = 0; i < m_hhea.numberOfHMetrics; i++) {
        m_hmtx[i].advanceWidth = readU16(ptr); ptr += 2;
        m_hmtx[i].lsb = readI16(ptr); ptr += 2;
    }
    
    // Les glyphes restants ont la même advanceWidth que le dernier
    uint16_t lastAdvance = m_hmtx[m_hhea.numberOfHMetrics - 1].advanceWidth;
    
    for (int i = m_hhea.numberOfHMetrics; i < m_numGlyphs; i++) {
        m_hmtx[i].advanceWidth = lastAdvance;
        m_hmtx[i].lsb = readI16(ptr); ptr += 2;
    }
    
    return true;
}

// ====================================================================
// PARSE CMAP TABLE (Format 4 - le plus commun)
// ====================================================================

bool TrueTypeLoader::parseCmapTable() {
    uint32_t length;
    const uint8_t* data = getTableData(TTFTable::cmap, length);
    
    NK_VALIDATE_MSG(data, data != nullptr, "'cmap' table not found");
    
    const uint8_t* ptr = data;
    
    uint16_t version = readU16(ptr); ptr += 2;
    uint16_t numTables = readU16(ptr); ptr += 2;
    
    // Trouver le format 4 (Unicode BMP)
    uint32_t format4Offset = 0;
    
    for (int i = 0; i < numTables; i++) {
        uint16_t platformID = readU16(ptr); ptr += 2;
        uint16_t encodingID = readU16(ptr); ptr += 2;
        uint32_t offset = readU32(ptr); ptr += 4;
        
        // Windows Unicode BMP (Platform 3, Encoding 1)
        // ou Unicode (Platform 0, Encoding 3)
        if ((platformID == 3 && encodingID == 1) || 
            (platformID == 0 && encodingID == 3)) {
            format4Offset = offset;
            break;
        }
    }
    
    NK_VALIDATE_MSG(nullptr, format4Offset > 0, "Unicode cmap not found");
    
    // Parser format 4
    ptr = data + format4Offset;
    
    uint16_t format = readU16(ptr); ptr += 2;
    
    NK_VALIDATE_MSG(nullptr, format == 4, "Only cmap format 4 supported");
    
    uint16_t subtableLength = readU16(ptr); ptr += 2;
    uint16_t language = readU16(ptr); ptr += 2;
    uint16_t segCountX2 = readU16(ptr); ptr += 2;
    uint16_t segCount = segCountX2 / 2;
    
    ptr += 6; // Skip searchRange, entrySelector, rangeShift
    
    // Lire les arrays
    std::vector<uint16_t> endCode(segCount);
    for (int i = 0; i < segCount; i++) {
        endCode[i] = readU16(ptr); ptr += 2;
    }
    
    ptr += 2; // Skip reservedPad
    
    std::vector<uint16_t> startCode(segCount);
    for (int i = 0; i < segCount; i++) {
        startCode[i] = readU16(ptr); ptr += 2;
    }
    
    std::vector<int16_t> idDelta(segCount);
    for (int i = 0; i < segCount; i++) {
        idDelta[i] = readI16(ptr); ptr += 2;
    }
    
    const uint8_t* idRangeOffsetPtr = ptr;
    std::vector<uint16_t> idRangeOffset(segCount);
    for (int i = 0; i < segCount; i++) {
        idRangeOffset[i] = readU16(ptr); ptr += 2;
    }
    
    // Construire la cmap
    for (int i = 0; i < segCount; i++) {
        for (uint32_t c = startCode[i]; c <= endCode[i]; c++) {
            uint16_t glyphIndex;
            
            if (idRangeOffset[i] == 0) {
                glyphIndex = (c + idDelta[i]) & 0xFFFF;
            } else {
                const uint8_t* ptr2 = idRangeOffsetPtr + i * 2 + idRangeOffset[i] + 
                                     (c - startCode[i]) * 2;
                glyphIndex = readU16(ptr2);
                
                if (glyphIndex != 0) {
                    glyphIndex = (glyphIndex + idDelta[i]) & 0xFFFF;
                }
            }
            
            if (glyphIndex != 0) {
                m_cmap[c] = glyphIndex;
            }
        }
    }
    
    return true;
}

// ====================================================================
// PARSE NAME TABLE
// ====================================================================

bool TrueTypeLoader::parseNameTable() {
    uint32_t length;
    const uint8_t* data = getTableData(TTFTable::name, length);
    
    if (!data) return false;
    
    // Parsing simplifié (juste pour info, pas essentiel)
    return true;
}

// ====================================================================
// PARSE KERN TABLE
// ====================================================================

bool TrueTypeLoader::parseKernTable() {
    uint32_t length;
    const uint8_t* data = getTableData(TTFTable::kern, length);
    
    if (!data) return false;
    
    const uint8_t* ptr = data;
    
    uint16_t version = readU16(ptr); ptr += 2;
    uint16_t nTables = readU16(ptr); ptr += 2;
    
    for (int i = 0; i < nTables; i++) {
        uint16_t subtableVersion = readU16(ptr); ptr += 2;
        uint16_t subtableLength = readU16(ptr); ptr += 2;
        uint16_t coverage = readU16(ptr); ptr += 2;
        
        // Format 0 uniquement
        if ((coverage >> 8) != 0) {
            ptr += subtableLength - 6;
            continue;
        }
        
        uint16_t nPairs = readU16(ptr); ptr += 2;
        ptr += 6; // Skip searchRange, entrySelector, rangeShift
        
        for (int j = 0; j < nPairs; j++) {
            KernPair pair;
            pair.left = readU16(ptr); ptr += 2;
            pair.right = readU16(ptr); ptr += 2;
            pair.value = readI16(ptr); ptr += 2;
            
            m_kernPairs.push_back(pair);
        }
    }
    
    return true;
}
```
