# PARTIE 4 : TrueType Font Loader FROM SCRATCH (Production-Ready)

## 1. TrueTypeFontLoader.hpp - Structures TTF

```cpp
// TrueTypeFontLoader.hpp
#pragma once

#include <vector>
#include <string>
#include <cstdint>
#include <unordered_map>

namespace nk {

// ====================================================================
// TTF TABLE TAGS
// ====================================================================

enum TTFTag : uint32_t {
    TAG_cmap = 0x636D6170,  // Character to glyph mapping
    TAG_glyf = 0x676C7966,  // Glyph data
    TAG_head = 0x68656164,  // Font header
    TAG_hhea = 0x68686561,  // Horizontal header
    TAG_hmtx = 0x686D7478,  // Horizontal metrics
    TAG_loca = 0x6C6F6361,  // Index to location
    TAG_maxp = 0x6D617870,  // Maximum profile
    TAG_name = 0x6E616D65,  // Naming table
    TAG_post = 0x706F7374,  // PostScript information
    TAG_OS2  = 0x4F532F32,  // OS/2 and Windows specific
    TAG_kern = 0x6B65726E,  // Kerning
    TAG_GPOS = 0x47504F53,  // Glyph positioning (OpenType)
    TAG_GSUB = 0x47535542   // Glyph substitution (OpenType)
};

// ====================================================================
// TTF STRUCTURES
// ====================================================================

#pragma pack(push, 1)

struct TTFOffsetTable {
    uint32_t version;       // 0x00010000 or 'OTTO'
    uint16_t numTables;
    uint16_t searchRange;
    uint16_t entrySelector;
    uint16_t rangeShift;
};

struct TTFTableDirectory {
    uint32_t tag;
    uint32_t checksum;
    uint32_t offset;
    uint32_t length;
};

struct TTFHeadTable {
    uint32_t version;
    uint32_t fontRevision;
    uint32_t checksumAdjustment;
    uint32_t magicNumber;       // 0x5F0F3CF5
    uint16_t flags;
    uint16_t unitsPerEm;
    int64_t created;
    int64_t modified;
    int16_t xMin;
    int16_t yMin;
    int16_t xMax;
    int16_t yMax;
    uint16_t macStyle;
    uint16_t lowestRecPPEM;
    int16_t fontDirectionHint;
    int16_t indexToLocFormat;   // 0 = short offsets, 1 = long offsets
    int16_t glyphDataFormat;
};

struct TTFHheaTable {
    uint32_t version;
    int16_t ascender;
    int16_t descender;
    int16_t lineGap;
    uint16_t advanceWidthMax;
    int16_t minLeftSideBearing;
    int16_t minRightSideBearing;
    int16_t xMaxExtent;
    int16_t caretSlopeRise;
    int16_t caretSlopeRun;
    int16_t caretOffset;
    int16_t reserved1;
    int16_t reserved2;
    int16_t reserved3;
    int16_t reserved4;
    int16_t metricDataFormat;
    uint16_t numberOfHMetrics;
};

struct TTFMaxpTable {
    uint32_t version;
    uint16_t numGlyphs;
    uint16_t maxPoints;
    uint16_t maxContours;
    uint16_t maxCompositePoints;
    uint16_t maxCompositeContours;
    uint16_t maxZones;
    uint16_t maxTwilightPoints;
    uint16_t maxStorage;
    uint16_t maxFunctionDefs;
    uint16_t maxInstructionDefs;
    uint16_t maxStackElements;
    uint16_t maxSizeOfInstructions;
    uint16_t maxComponentElements;
    uint16_t maxComponentDepth;
};

struct TTFLongHorMetric {
    uint16_t advanceWidth;
    int16_t lsb;  // Left side bearing
};

#pragma pack(pop)

// ====================================================================
// GLYPH OUTLINE
// ====================================================================

struct TTFPoint {
    float x, y;
    bool onCurve;
};

struct TTFContour {
    std::vector<TTFPoint> points;
};

struct TTFGlyphOutline {
    std::vector<TTFContour> contours;
    int16_t xMin, yMin, xMax, yMax;
    int16_t advanceWidth;
    int16_t leftSideBearing;
};

// ====================================================================
// TRUETYPE FONT LOADER
// ====================================================================

class TrueTypeFontLoader {
public:
    TrueTypeFontLoader();
    ~TrueTypeFontLoader();
    
    // Charger un fichier TTF
    bool load(const uint8_t* data, size_t size);
    
    // Obtenir un glyphe
    bool getGlyphOutline(uint32_t codepoint, TTFGlyphOutline& outline);
    
    // Rasterizer un glyphe
    bool rasterizeGlyph(uint32_t codepoint, float size, std::vector<uint8_t>& bitmap,
                       int& width, int& height, int& bearingX, int& bearingY, int& advance);
    
    // Métriques de police
    int getAscent() const { return m_ascent; }
    int getDescent() const { return m_descent; }
    int getLineGap() const { return m_lineGap; }
    int getUnitsPerEm() const { return m_unitsPerEm; }
    
    // Kerning
    int getKerning(uint32_t left, uint32_t right) const;
    
    // Nom de la police
    std::string getFontName() const;
    
private:
    // Parsing
    bool parseOffsetTable(const uint8_t* data);
    bool parseTables(const uint8_t* data);
    
    bool parseHead(const uint8_t* data, size_t length);
    bool parseHhea(const uint8_t* data, size_t length);
    bool parseMaxp(const uint8_t* data, size_t length);
    bool parseLoca(const uint8_t* data, size_t length);
    bool parseHmtx(const uint8_t* data, size_t length);
    bool parseCmap(const uint8_t* data, size_t length);
    bool parseGlyf(const uint8_t* data, size_t length);
    bool parseKern(const uint8_t* data, size_t length);
    bool parseName(const uint8_t* data, size_t length);
    
    // Glyph decoding
    bool decodeSimpleGlyph(const uint8_t* data, size_t length, TTFGlyphOutline& outline);
    bool decodeCompositeGlyph(const uint8_t* data, size_t length, TTFGlyphOutline& outline);
    
    // Codepoint to glyph index
    uint16_t getGlyphIndex(uint32_t codepoint) const;
    
    // Rasterization
    void rasterizePath(const TTFGlyphOutline& outline, float scale,
                      std::vector<uint8_t>& bitmap, int width, int height);
    
    void fillContour(const std::vector<TTFPoint>& points, float scale,
                    std::vector<float>& coverage, int width, int height);
    
    // Helpers
    uint16_t readU16(const uint8_t* data) const;
    int16_t readS16(const uint8_t* data) const;
    uint32_t readU32(const uint8_t* data) const;
    int32_t readS32(const uint8_t* data) const;
    
    // Données du fichier
    std::vector<uint8_t> m_fontData;
    
    // Tables
    std::unordered_map<uint32_t, uint32_t> m_tableOffsets;
    std::unordered_map<uint32_t, uint32_t> m_tableLengths;
    
    // Head table
    int16_t m_indexToLocFormat;
    uint16_t m_unitsPerEm;
    
    // Hhea table
    int16_t m_ascent;
    int16_t m_descent;
    int16_t m_lineGap;
    uint16_t m_numberOfHMetrics;
    
    // Maxp table
    uint16_t m_numGlyphs;
    
    // Loca table
    std::vector<uint32_t> m_glyphOffsets;
    
    // Hmtx table
    std::vector<TTFLongHorMetric> m_hMetrics;
    std::vector<int16_t> m_leftSideBearings;
    
    // Cmap table
    std::unordered_map<uint32_t, uint16_t> m_cmapTable;
    
    // Kern table
    struct KernPair {
        uint16_t left;
        uint16_t right;
        int16_t value;
    };
    std::vector<KernPair> m_kernPairs;
    
    // Name table
    std::string m_fontName;
};

} // namespace nk
```

## 2. TrueTypeFontLoader.cpp - Implémentation Complète

```cpp
// TrueTypeFontLoader.cpp
#include "TrueTypeFontLoader.hpp"
#include "Error.hpp"
#include <cstring>
#include <algorithm>
#include <cmath>

namespace nk {

// ====================================================================
// CONSTRUCTOR
// ====================================================================

TrueTypeFontLoader::TrueTypeFontLoader()
    : m_indexToLocFormat(0)
    , m_unitsPerEm(1000)
    , m_ascent(0)
    , m_descent(0)
    , m_lineGap(0)
    , m_numberOfHMetrics(0)
    , m_numGlyphs(0) {
}

TrueTypeFontLoader::~TrueTypeFontLoader() {
}

// ====================================================================
// HELPERS - READ BIG ENDIAN
// ====================================================================

uint16_t TrueTypeFontLoader::readU16(const uint8_t* data) const {
    return (data[0] << 8) | data[1];
}

int16_t TrueTypeFontLoader::readS16(const uint8_t* data) const {
    return static_cast<int16_t>(readU16(data));
}

uint32_t TrueTypeFontLoader::readU32(const uint8_t* data) const {
    return (data[0] << 24) | (data[1] << 16) | (data[2] << 8) | data[3];
}

int32_t TrueTypeFontLoader::readS32(const uint8_t* data) const {
    return static_cast<int32_t>(readU32(data));
}

// ====================================================================
// LOAD
// ====================================================================

bool TrueTypeFontLoader::load(const uint8_t* data, size_t size) {
    NK_VALIDATE_MSG(data, data != nullptr && size >= sizeof(TTFOffsetTable),
                   "Invalid TTF data");
    
    m_fontData.assign(data, data + size);
    
    if (!parseOffsetTable(m_fontData.data())) {
        return false;
    }
    
    if (!parseTables(m_fontData.data())) {
        return false;
    }
    
    return true;
}

// ====================================================================
// PARSE OFFSET TABLE
// ====================================================================

bool TrueTypeFontLoader::parseOffsetTable(const uint8_t* data) {
    uint32_t version = readU32(data);
    
    // Vérifier la version (0x00010000 pour TrueType, 'OTTO' pour CFF/OpenType)
    NK_VALIDATE_MSG(nullptr, version == 0x00010000 || version == 0x4F54544F,
                   "Unsupported font format");
    
    uint16_t numTables = readU16(data + 4);
    
    // Lire les tables
    const uint8_t* tableDir = data + sizeof(TTFOffsetTable);
    
    for (uint16_t i = 0; i < numTables; i++) {
        uint32_t tag = readU32(tableDir);
        uint32_t checksum = readU32(tableDir + 4);
        uint32_t offset = readU32(tableDir + 8);
        uint32_t length = readU32(tableDir + 12);
        
        m_tableOffsets[tag] = offset;
        m_tableLengths[tag] = length;
        
        tableDir += 16;
    }
    
    return true;
}

// ====================================================================
// PARSE TABLES
// ====================================================================

bool TrueTypeFontLoader::parseTables(const uint8_t* data) {
    // Head table (obligatoire)
    if (m_tableOffsets.find(TAG_head) == m_tableOffsets.end()) {
        NK_ERROR(ErrorCategory::Graphics, "Missing 'head' table");
        return false;
    }
    
    if (!parseHead(data + m_tableOffsets[TAG_head], m_tableLengths[TAG_head])) {
        return false;
    }
    
    // Hhea table (obligatoire)
    if (m_tableOffsets.find(TAG_hhea) == m_tableOffsets.end()) {
        NK_ERROR(ErrorCategory::Graphics, "Missing 'hhea' table");
        return false;
    }
    
    if (!parseHhea(data + m_tableOffsets[TAG_hhea], m_tableLengths[TAG_hhea])) {
        return false;
    }
    
    // Maxp table (obligatoire)
    if (m_tableOffsets.find(TAG_maxp) == m_tableOffsets.end()) {
        NK_ERROR(ErrorCategory::Graphics, "Missing 'maxp' table");
        return false;
    }
    
    if (!parseMaxp(data + m_tableOffsets[TAG_maxp], m_tableLengths[TAG_maxp])) {
        return false;
    }
    
    // Loca table (obligatoire)
    if (m_tableOffsets.find(TAG_loca) == m_tableOffsets.end()) {
        NK_ERROR(ErrorCategory::Graphics, "Missing 'loca' table");
        return false;
    }
    
    if (!parseLoca(data + m_tableOffsets[TAG_loca], m_tableLengths[TAG_loca])) {
        return false;
    }
    
    // Hmtx table (obligatoire)
    if (m_tableOffsets.find(TAG_hmtx) == m_tableOffsets.end()) {
        NK_ERROR(ErrorCategory::Graphics, "Missing 'hmtx' table");
        return false;
    }
    
    if (!parseHmtx(data + m_tableOffsets[TAG_hmtx], m_tableLengths[TAG_hmtx])) {
        return false;
    }
    
    // Cmap table (obligatoire)
    if (m_tableOffsets.find(TAG_cmap) == m_tableOffsets.end()) {
        NK_ERROR(ErrorCategory::Graphics, "Missing 'cmap' table");
        return false;
    }
    
    if (!parseCmap(data + m_tableOffsets[TAG_cmap], m_tableLengths[TAG_cmap])) {
        return false;
    }
    
    // Kern table (optionnelle)
    if (m_tableOffsets.find(TAG_kern) != m_tableOffsets.end()) {
        parseKern(data + m_tableOffsets[TAG_kern], m_tableLengths[TAG_kern]);
    }
    
    // Name table (optionnelle)
    if (m_tableOffsets.find(TAG_name) != m_tableOffsets.end()) {
        parseName(data + m_tableOffsets[TAG_name], m_tableLengths[TAG_name]);
    }
    
    return true;
}

// ====================================================================
// PARSE HEAD TABLE
// ====================================================================

bool TrueTypeFontLoader::parseHead(const uint8_t* data, size_t length) {
    NK_VALIDATE_MSG(nullptr, length >= sizeof(TTFHeadTable), "Invalid 'head' table");
    
    uint32_t magicNumber = readU32(data + 12);
    NK_VALIDATE_MSG(nullptr, magicNumber == 0x5F0F3CF5, "Invalid magic number in 'head' table");
    
    m_unitsPerEm = readU16(data + 18);
    m_indexToLocFormat = readS16(data + 50);
    
    return true;
}

// ====================================================================
// PARSE HHEA TABLE
// ====================================================================

bool TrueTypeFontLoader::parseHhea(const uint8_t* data, size_t length) {
    NK_VALIDATE_MSG(nullptr, length >= sizeof(TTFHheaTable), "Invalid 'hhea' table");
    
    m_ascent = readS16(data + 4);
    m_descent = readS16(data + 6);
    m_lineGap = readS16(data + 8);
    m_numberOfHMetrics = readU16(data + 34);
    
    return true;
}

// ====================================================================
// PARSE MAXP TABLE
// ====================================================================

bool TrueTypeFontLoader::parseMaxp(const uint8_t* data, size_t length) {
    NK_VALIDATE_MSG(nullptr, length >= 6, "Invalid 'maxp' table");
    
    m_numGlyphs = readU16(data + 4);
    
    return true;
}

// ====================================================================
// PARSE LOCA TABLE
// ====================================================================

bool TrueTypeFontLoader::parseLoca(const uint8_t* data, size_t length) {
    m_glyphOffsets.clear();
    m_glyphOffsets.reserve(m_numGlyphs + 1);
    
    if (m_indexToLocFormat == 0) {
        // Short format (offset / 2)
        NK_VALIDATE_MSG(nullptr, length >= (m_numGlyphs + 1) * 2, "Invalid 'loca' table");
        
        for (uint16_t i = 0; i <= m_numGlyphs; i++) {
            uint16_t offset = readU16(data + i * 2);
            m_glyphOffsets.push_back(offset * 2);
        }
    } else {
        // Long format
        NK_VALIDATE_MSG(nullptr, length >= (m_numGlyphs + 1) * 4, "Invalid 'loca' table");
        
        for (uint16_t i = 0; i <= m_numGlyphs; i++) {
            uint32_t offset = readU32(data + i * 4);
            m_glyphOffsets.push_back(offset);
        }
    }
    
    return true;
}

// ====================================================================
// PARSE HMTX TABLE
// ====================================================================

bool TrueTypeFontLoader::parseHmtx(const uint8_t* data, size_t length) {
    m_hMetrics.clear();
    m_leftSideBearings.clear();
    
    // Lire les métriques horizontales
    for (uint16_t i = 0; i < m_numberOfHMetrics; i++) {
        if (i * 4 + 4 > length) break;
        
        TTFLongHorMetric metric;
        metric.advanceWidth = readU16(data + i * 4);
        metric.lsb = readS16(data + i * 4 + 2);
        
        m_hMetrics.push_back(metric);
    }
    
    // Lire les left side bearings restants
    size_t offset = m_numberOfHMetrics * 4;
    
    for (uint16_t i = m_numberOfHMetrics; i < m_numGlyphs; i++) {
        if (offset + 2 > length) break;
        
        int16_t lsb = readS16(data + offset);
        m_leftSideBearings.push_back(lsb);
        
        offset += 2;
    }
    
    return true;
}

// ====================================================================
// PARSE CMAP TABLE
// ====================================================================

bool TrueTypeFontLoader::parseCmap(const uint8_t* data, size_t length) {
    NK_VALIDATE_MSG(nullptr, length >= 4, "Invalid 'cmap' table");
    
    uint16_t version = readU16(data);
    uint16_t numTables = readU16(data + 2);
    
    // Chercher une subtable Unicode (platform 0 ou 3)
    const uint8_t* bestSubtable = nullptr;
    uint32_t bestSubtableOffset = 0;
    int bestPriority = -1;
    
    for (uint16_t i = 0; i < numTables; i++) {
        if (4 + i * 8 + 8 > length) break;
        
        uint16_t platformId = readU16(data + 4 + i * 8);
        uint16_t encodingId = readU16(data + 4 + i * 8 + 2);
        uint32_t offset = readU32(data + 4 + i * 8 + 4);
        
        int priority = -1;
        
        // Préférer Unicode
        if (platformId == 0) { // Unicode
            priority = 10;
        } else if (platformId == 3) { // Windows
            if (encodingId == 1) { // Unicode BMP
                priority = 5;
            } else if (encodingId == 10) { // Unicode full
                priority = 8;
            }
        }
        
        if (priority > bestPriority) {
            bestPriority = priority;
            bestSubtableOffset = offset;
        }
    }
    
    NK_VALIDATE_MSG(nullptr, bestPriority >= 0, "No suitable cmap subtable found");
    
    bestSubtable = data + bestSubtableOffset;
    
    // Parser la subtable
    uint16_t format = readU16(bestSubtable);
    
    if (format == 4) {
        // Format 4: Segment mapping to delta values
        uint16_t segCountX2 = readU16(bestSubtable + 6);
        uint16_t segCount = segCountX2 / 2;
        
        const uint8_t* endCodes = bestSubtable + 14;
        const uint8_t* startCodes = bestSubtable + 16 + segCountX2;
        const uint8_t* idDeltas = bestSubtable + 16 + segCountX2 * 2;
        const uint8_t* idRangeOffsets = bestSubtable + 16 + segCountX2 * 3;
        
        for (uint16_t seg = 0; seg < segCount; seg++) {
            uint16_t endCode = readU16(endCodes + seg * 2);
            uint16_t startCode = readU16(startCodes + seg * 2);
            int16_t idDelta = readS16(idDeltas + seg * 2);
            uint16_t idRangeOffset = readU16(idRangeOffsets + seg * 2);
            
            for (uint32_t c = startCode; c <= endCode; c++) {
                uint16_t glyphIndex = 0;
                
                if (idRangeOffset == 0) {
                    glyphIndex = (c + idDelta) & 0xFFFF;
                } else {
                    const uint8_t* glyphIndexPtr = idRangeOffsets + seg * 2 + 
                                                   idRangeOffset + (c - startCode) * 2;
                    
                    glyphIndex = readU16(glyphIndexPtr);
                    
                    if (glyphIndex != 0) {
                        glyphIndex = (glyphIndex + idDelta) & 0xFFFF;
                    }
                }
                
                if (glyphIndex != 0) {
                    m_cmapTable[c] = glyphIndex;
                }
            }
        }
    } else if (format == 12) {
        // Format 12: Segmented coverage
        uint32_t nGroups = readU32(bestSubtable + 12);
        
        for (uint32_t i = 0; i < nGroups; i++) {
            uint32_t startCharCode = readU32(bestSubtable + 16 + i * 12);
            uint32_t endCharCode = readU32(bestSubtable + 16 + i * 12 + 4);
            uint32_t startGlyphID = readU32(bestSubtable + 16 + i * 12 + 8);
            
            for (uint32_t c = startCharCode; c <= endCharCode; c++) {
                m_cmapTable[c] = startGlyphID + (c - startCharCode);
            }
        }
    } else {
        NK_WARNING(ErrorCategory::Graphics, 
                  std::string("Unsupported cmap format: ") + std::to_string(format));
    }
    
    return true;
}

// ====================================================================
// PARSE KERN TABLE
// ====================================================================

bool TrueTypeFontLoader::parseKern(const uint8_t* data, size_t length) {
    NK_VALIDATE_MSG(nullptr, length >= 4, "Invalid 'kern' table");
    
    uint16_t version = readU16(data);
    uint16_t nTables = readU16(data + 2);
    
    size_t offset = 4;
    
    for (uint16_t table = 0; table < nTables; table++) {
        if (offset + 6 > length) break;
        
        uint16_t subtableVersion = readU16(data + offset);
        uint16_t subtableLength = readU16(data + offset + 2);
        uint16_t coverage = readU16(data + offset + 4);
        
        // Ne traiter que le format 0, horizontal kerning
        uint8_t format = (coverage >> 8) & 0xFF;
        bool horizontal = (coverage & 0x01) != 0;
        
        if (format == 0 && horizontal) {
            uint16_t nPairs = readU16(data + offset + 6);
            
            for (uint16_t i = 0; i < nPairs; i++) {
                if (offset + 14 + i * 6 > length) break;
                
                KernPair pair;
                pair.left = readU16(data + offset + 14 + i * 6);
                pair.right = readU16(data + offset + 14 + i * 6 + 2);
                pair.value = readS16(data + offset + 14 + i * 6 + 4);
                
                m_kernPairs.push_back(pair);
            }
        }
        
        offset += subtableLength;
    }
    
    return true;
}

// ====================================================================
// PARSE NAME TABLE
// ====================================================================

bool TrueTypeFontLoader::parseName(const uint8_t* data, size_t length) {
    NK_VALIDATE_MSG(nullptr, length >= 6, "Invalid 'name' table");
    
    uint16_t format = readU16(data);
    uint16_t count = readU16(data + 2);
    uint16_t stringOffset = readU16(data + 4);
    
    // Chercher le nom de la famille (nameID = 1)
    for (uint16_t i = 0; i < count; i++) {
        if (6 + i * 12 + 12 > length) break;
        
        uint16_t platformId = readU16(data + 6 + i * 12);
        uint16_t encodingId = readU16(data + 6 + i * 12 + 2);
        uint16_t languageId = readU16(data + 6 + i * 12 + 4);
        uint16_t nameId = readU16(data + 6 + i * 12 + 6);
        uint16_t nameLength = readU16(data + 6 + i * 12 + 8);
        uint16_t nameOffset = readU16(data + 6 + i * 12 + 10);
        
        if (nameId == 1) { // Font family name
            const uint8_t* nameData = data + stringOffset + nameOffset;
            
            if (stringOffset + nameOffset + nameLength <= length) {
                if (platformId == 3 && encodingId == 1) {
                    // Unicode (UTF-16BE)
                    m_fontName.clear();
                    for (uint16_t j = 0; j < nameLength; j += 2) {
                        uint16_t codepoint = readU16(nameData + j);
                        if (codepoint < 128) {
                            m_fontName += static_cast<char>(codepoint);
                        }
                    }
                    break;
                } else if (platformId == 1 || platformId == 0) {
                    // Mac Roman ou ASCII
                    m_fontName = std::string(reinterpret_cast<const char*>(nameData), nameLength);
                    break;
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    return true;
}

// ====================================================================
// GET GLYPH INDEX
// ====================================================================

uint16_t TrueTypeFontLoader::getGlyphIndex(uint32_t codepoint) const {
    auto it = m_cmapTable.find(codepoint);
    if (it != m_cmapTable.end()) {
        return it->second;
    }
    return 0; // .notdef glyph
}

// ====================================================================
// GET GLYPH OUTLINE
// ====================================================================

bool TrueTypeFontLoader::getGlyphOutline(uint32_t codepoint, TTFGlyphOutline& outline) {
    uint16_t glyphIndex = getGlyphIndex(codepoint);
    
    if (glyphIndex >= m_numGlyphs) {
        return false;
    }
    
    // Obtenir les métriques horizontales
    if (glyphIndex < m_hMetrics.size()) {
        outline.advanceWidth = m_hMetrics[glyphIndex].advanceWidth;
        outline.leftSideBearing = m_hMetrics[glyphIndex].lsb;
    } else {
        outline.advanceWidth = m_hMetrics.back().advanceWidth;
        
        size_t lsbIndex = glyphIndex - m_hMetrics.size();
        if (lsbIndex < m_leftSideBearings.size()) {
            outline.leftSideBearing = m_leftSideBearings[lsbIndex];
        } else {
            outline.leftSideBearing = 0;
        }
    }
    
    // Obtenir l'offset du glyphe dans la table 'glyf'
    if (m_tableOffsets.find(TAG_glyf) == m_tableOffsets.end()) {
        NK_ERROR(ErrorCategory::Graphics, "Missing 'glyf' table");
        return false;
    }
    
    uint32_t glyfOffset = m_tableOffsets[TAG_glyf];
    uint32_t glyphOffset = m_glyphOffsets[glyphIndex];
    uint32_t nextGlyphOffset = m_glyphOffsets[glyphIndex + 1];
    
    // Glyphe vide (whitespace)
    if (glyphOffset == nextGlyphOffset) {
        outline.contours.clear();
        outline.xMin = outline.yMin = outline.xMax = outline.yMax = 0;
        return true;
    }
    
    const uint8_t* glyphData = m_fontData.data() + glyfOffset + glyphOffset;
    size_t glyphLength = nextGlyphOffset - glyphOffset;
    
    NK_VALIDATE_MSG(nullptr, glyphLength >= 10, "Invalid glyph data");
    
    // Lire le header du glyphe
    int16_t numberOfContours = readS16(glyphData);
    outline.xMin = readS16(glyphData + 2);
    outline.yMin = readS16(glyphData + 4);
    outline.xMax = readS16(glyphData + 6);
    outline.yMax = readS16(glyphData + 8);
    
    if (numberOfContours >= 0) {
        // Simple glyph
        return decodeSimpleGlyph(glyphData + 10, glyphLength - 10, outline);
    } else {
        // Composite glyph
        return decodeCompositeGlyph(glyphData + 10, glyphLength - 10, outline);
    }
}
```

# PARTIE 5 : TrueType - Suite (Décodage Glyphes + Rasterization)

## 1. TrueTypeFontLoader.cpp - Décodage des Glyphes

```cpp
// TrueTypeFontLoader.cpp - SUITE (Decode Glyphs)

// ====================================================================
// DECODE SIMPLE GLYPH
// ====================================================================

bool TrueTypeFontLoader::decodeSimpleGlyph(const uint8_t* data, size_t length, 
                                           TTFGlyphOutline& outline) {
    if (length < 2) return false;
    
    int16_t numberOfContours = readS16(data - 10); // Le nombre est dans le header
    
    NK_VALIDATE_MSG(nullptr, numberOfContours > 0, "Invalid contour count");
    
    // Lire les end points de chaque contour
    std::vector<uint16_t> endPtsOfContours(numberOfContours);
    
    for (int i = 0; i < numberOfContours; i++) {
        if (i * 2 + 2 > length) return false;
        endPtsOfContours[i] = readU16(data + i * 2);
    }
    
    uint16_t totalPoints = endPtsOfContours.back() + 1;
    
    // Skip instructions
    size_t offset = numberOfContours * 2;
    if (offset + 2 > length) return false;
    
    uint16_t instructionLength = readU16(data + offset);
    offset += 2 + instructionLength;
    
    // Lire les flags
    std::vector<uint8_t> flags(totalPoints);
    
    for (uint16_t i = 0; i < totalPoints; ) {
        if (offset >= length) return false;
        
        uint8_t flag = data[offset++];
        flags[i++] = flag;
        
        // Repeat flag
        if (flag & 0x08) {
            if (offset >= length) return false;
            
            uint8_t repeatCount = data[offset++];
            
            for (uint8_t r = 0; r < repeatCount && i < totalPoints; r++) {
                flags[i++] = flag;
            }
        }
    }
    
    // Lire les coordonnées X
    std::vector<int16_t> xCoordinates(totalPoints);
    int16_t x = 0;
    
    for (uint16_t i = 0; i < totalPoints; i++) {
        uint8_t flag = flags[i];
        
        if (flag & 0x02) { // X-Short Vector
            if (offset >= length) return false;
            
            uint8_t dx = data[offset++];
            
            if (flag & 0x10) { // Positive
                x += dx;
            } else { // Negative
                x -= dx;
            }
        } else {
            if (!(flag & 0x10)) { // X is same or controlled by hint
                if (offset + 2 > length) return false;
                
                int16_t dx = readS16(data + offset);
                offset += 2;
                x += dx;
            }
            // else: x reste inchangé
        }
        
        xCoordinates[i] = x;
    }
    
    // Lire les coordonnées Y
    std::vector<int16_t> yCoordinates(totalPoints);
    int16_t y = 0;
    
    for (uint16_t i = 0; i < totalPoints; i++) {
        uint8_t flag = flags[i];
        
        if (flag & 0x04) { // Y-Short Vector
            if (offset >= length) return false;
            
            uint8_t dy = data[offset++];
            
            if (flag & 0x20) { // Positive
                y += dy;
            } else { // Negative
                y -= dy;
            }
        } else {
            if (!(flag & 0x20)) {
                if (offset + 2 > length) return false;
                
                int16_t dy = readS16(data + offset);
                offset += 2;
                y += dy;
            }
        }
        
        yCoordinates[i] = y;
    }
    
    // Construire les contours
    outline.contours.clear();
    
    uint16_t startPoint = 0;
    
    for (int c = 0; c < numberOfContours; c++) {
        uint16_t endPoint = endPtsOfContours[c];
        
        TTFContour contour;
        
        for (uint16_t i = startPoint; i <= endPoint; i++) {
            TTFPoint point;
            point.x = xCoordinates[i];
            point.y = yCoordinates[i];
            point.onCurve = (flags[i] & 0x01) != 0;
            
            contour.points.push_back(point);
        }
        
        outline.contours.push_back(contour);
        
        startPoint = endPoint + 1;
    }
    
    return true;
}

// ====================================================================
// DECODE COMPOSITE GLYPH
// ====================================================================

bool TrueTypeFontLoader::decodeCompositeGlyph(const uint8_t* data, size_t length,
                                              TTFGlyphOutline& outline) {
    outline.contours.clear();
    
    // Flags pour composite glyph
    const uint16_t ARG_1_AND_2_ARE_WORDS = 0x0001;
    const uint16_t ARGS_ARE_XY_VALUES = 0x0002;
    const uint16_t ROUND_XY_TO_GRID = 0x0004;
    const uint16_t WE_HAVE_A_SCALE = 0x0008;
    const uint16_t MORE_COMPONENTS = 0x0020;
    const uint16_t WE_HAVE_AN_X_AND_Y_SCALE = 0x0040;
    const uint16_t WE_HAVE_A_TWO_BY_TWO = 0x0080;
    const uint16_t WE_HAVE_INSTRUCTIONS = 0x0100;
    const uint16_t USE_MY_METRICS = 0x0200;
    const uint16_t OVERLAP_COMPOUND = 0x0400;
    
    size_t offset = 0;
    bool moreComponents = true;
    
    while (moreComponents) {
        if (offset + 4 > length) break;
        
        uint16_t flags = readU16(data + offset);
        uint16_t glyphIndex = readU16(data + offset + 2);
        offset += 4;
        
        // Lire les arguments
        int16_t arg1 = 0, arg2 = 0;
        
        if (flags & ARG_1_AND_2_ARE_WORDS) {
            if (offset + 4 > length) break;
            arg1 = readS16(data + offset);
            arg2 = readS16(data + offset + 2);
            offset += 4;
        } else {
            if (offset + 2 > length) break;
            arg1 = static_cast<int8_t>(data[offset]);
            arg2 = static_cast<int8_t>(data[offset + 1]);
            offset += 2;
        }
        
        // Lire la transformation
        float a = 1.0f, b = 0.0f, c = 0.0f, d = 1.0f;
        
        if (flags & WE_HAVE_A_SCALE) {
            if (offset + 2 > length) break;
            int16_t scale = readS16(data + offset);
            a = d = scale / 16384.0f;
            offset += 2;
        } else if (flags & WE_HAVE_AN_X_AND_Y_SCALE) {
            if (offset + 4 > length) break;
            int16_t xscale = readS16(data + offset);
            int16_t yscale = readS16(data + offset + 2);
            a = xscale / 16384.0f;
            d = yscale / 16384.0f;
            offset += 4;
        } else if (flags & WE_HAVE_A_TWO_BY_TWO) {
            if (offset + 8 > length) break;
            int16_t m00 = readS16(data + offset);
            int16_t m01 = readS16(data + offset + 2);
            int16_t m10 = readS16(data + offset + 4);
            int16_t m11 = readS16(data + offset + 6);
            a = m00 / 16384.0f;
            b = m01 / 16384.0f;
            c = m10 / 16384.0f;
            d = m11 / 16384.0f;
            offset += 8;
        }
        
        // Calculer l'offset (peut être un point de référence ou un offset XY)
        float dx = 0.0f, dy = 0.0f;
        
        if (flags & ARGS_ARE_XY_VALUES) {
            dx = arg1;
            dy = arg2;
        }
        
        // Charger le glyphe composant
        TTFGlyphOutline componentOutline;
        if (getGlyphOutline(glyphIndex, componentOutline)) {
            // Appliquer la transformation et ajouter au glyphe composite
            for (auto& contour : componentOutline.contours) {
                TTFContour transformedContour;
                
                for (const auto& point : contour.points) {
                    TTFPoint transformedPoint;
                    transformedPoint.x = a * point.x + b * point.y + dx;
                    transformedPoint.y = c * point.x + d * point.y + dy;
                    transformedPoint.onCurve = point.onCurve;
                    
                    transformedContour.points.push_back(transformedPoint);
                }
                
                outline.contours.push_back(transformedContour);
            }
        }
        
        moreComponents = (flags & MORE_COMPONENTS) != 0;
    }
    
    return true;
}

// ====================================================================
// RASTERIZE GLYPH
// ====================================================================

bool TrueTypeFontLoader::rasterizeGlyph(uint32_t codepoint, float size, 
                                       std::vector<uint8_t>& bitmap,
                                       int& width, int& height, 
                                       int& bearingX, int& bearingY, int& advance) {
    
    TTFGlyphOutline outline;
    
    if (!getGlyphOutline(codepoint, outline)) {
        return false;
    }
    
    // Calculer le scale
    float scale = size / m_unitsPerEm;
    
    // Calculer les dimensions du bitmap
    int scaledXMin = static_cast<int>(std::floor(outline.xMin * scale));
    int scaledYMin = static_cast<int>(std::floor(outline.yMin * scale));
    int scaledXMax = static_cast<int>(std::ceil(outline.xMax * scale));
    int scaledYMax = static_cast<int>(std::ceil(outline.yMax * scale));
    
    width = scaledXMax - scaledXMin + 2; // Padding
    height = scaledYMax - scaledYMin + 2;
    
    bearingX = scaledXMin;
    bearingY = scaledYMax;
    advance = static_cast<int>(outline.advanceWidth * scale);
    
    // Allouer le bitmap
    bitmap.resize(width * height, 0);
    
    if (outline.contours.empty()) {
        return true; // Glyphe vide (espace)
    }
    
    // Rasteriser
    rasterizePath(outline, scale, bitmap, width, height);
    
    return true;
}

// ====================================================================
// RASTERIZE PATH (Scanline Rasterization)
// ====================================================================

void TrueTypeFontLoader::rasterizePath(const TTFGlyphOutline& outline, float scale,
                                      std::vector<uint8_t>& bitmap, int width, int height) {
    
    // Buffer de coverage (antialiasing)
    std::vector<float> coverage(width * height, 0.0f);
    
    // Offset pour centrer le glyphe
    float offsetX = -outline.xMin * scale + 1.0f;
    float offsetY = -outline.yMin * scale + 1.0f;
    
    // Rasteriser chaque contour
    for (const auto& contour : outline.contours) {
        if (contour.points.empty()) continue;
        
        // Créer une liste de points avec les courbes de Bézier converties
        std::vector<TTFPoint> bezierPoints;
        
        for (size_t i = 0; i < contour.points.size(); i++) {
            const TTFPoint& p0 = contour.points[i];
            const TTFPoint& p1 = contour.points[(i + 1) % contour.points.size()];
            
            TTFPoint scaledP0;
            scaledP0.x = p0.x * scale + offsetX;
            scaledP0.y = p0.y * scale + offsetY;
            scaledP0.onCurve = p0.onCurve;
            
            bezierPoints.push_back(scaledP0);
            
            // Si le point suivant est off-curve, interpoler
            if (!p0.onCurve && !p1.onCurve) {
                TTFPoint midPoint;
                midPoint.x = (p0.x + p1.x) * 0.5f * scale + offsetX;
                midPoint.y = (p0.y + p1.y) * 0.5f * scale + offsetY;
                midPoint.onCurve = true;
                bezierPoints.push_back(midPoint);
            }
        }
        
        // Remplir le contour
        fillContour(bezierPoints, scale, coverage, width, height);
    }
    
    // Convertir coverage en bitmap
    for (int y = 0; y < height; y++) {
        for (int x = 0; x < width; x++) {
            int index = y * width + x;
            float cov = std::clamp(coverage[index], 0.0f, 1.0f);
            bitmap[index] = static_cast<uint8_t>(cov * 255.0f);
        }
    }
}

// ====================================================================
// FILL CONTOUR (Scanline avec courbes de Bézier)
// ====================================================================

void TrueTypeFontLoader::fillContour(const std::vector<TTFPoint>& points, float scale,
                                     std::vector<float>& coverage, int width, int height) {
    
    if (points.size() < 2) return;
    
    // Scanline rasterization
    for (int y = 0; y < height; y++) {
        std::vector<float> intersections;
        
        float scanY = y + 0.5f;
        
        // Trouver les intersections avec la scanline
        for (size_t i = 0; i < points.size(); i++) {
            const TTFPoint& p0 = points[i];
            const TTFPoint& p1 = points[(i + 1) % points.size()];
            
            if (p0.onCurve && p1.onCurve) {
                // Ligne droite
                if ((p0.y <= scanY && p1.y > scanY) || 
                    (p0.y > scanY && p1.y <= scanY)) {
                    
                    float t = (scanY - p0.y) / (p1.y - p0.y);
                    float x = p0.x + t * (p1.x - p0.x);
                    intersections.push_back(x);
                }
            } else {
                // Courbe de Bézier quadratique
                const TTFPoint& p2 = points[(i + 2) % points.size()];
                
                // Subdiviser la courbe et trouver les intersections
                // (simplification : on traite comme une ligne pour cet exemple)
                // Dans une vraie implémentation, il faut subdiviser la courbe
                
                float x0 = p0.x;
                float y0 = p0.y;
                float x2 = p2.x;
                float y2 = p2.y;
                
                if ((y0 <= scanY && y2 > scanY) || 
                    (y0 > scanY && y2 <= scanY)) {
                    
                    float t = (scanY - y0) / (y2 - y0);
                    float x = x0 + t * (x2 - x0);
                    intersections.push_back(x);
                }
            }
        }
        
        // Trier les intersections
        std::sort(intersections.begin(), intersections.end());
        
        // Remplir entre les paires d'intersections
        for (size_t i = 0; i + 1 < intersections.size(); i += 2) {
            float x0 = intersections[i];
            float x1 = intersections[i + 1];
            
            int startX = std::max(0, static_cast<int>(std::floor(x0)));
            int endX = std::min(width - 1, static_cast<int>(std::ceil(x1)));
            
            for (int x = startX; x <= endX; x++) {
                int index = y * width + x;
                
                // Antialiasing sur les bords
                float pixelX = x + 0.5f;
                float cov = 1.0f;
                
                if (x == startX) {
                    cov = std::min(1.0f, x + 1.0f - x0);
                } else if (x == endX) {
                    cov = std::min(1.0f, x1 - x);
                }
                
                coverage[index] += cov;
            }
        }
    }
}

// ====================================================================
// GET KERNING
// ====================================================================

int TrueTypeFontLoader::getKerning(uint32_t left, uint32_t right) const {
    uint16_t leftIndex = getGlyphIndex(left);
    uint16_t rightIndex = getGlyphIndex(right);
    
    for (const auto& pair : m_kernPairs) {
        if (pair.left == leftIndex && pair.right == rightIndex) {
            return pair.value;
        }
    }
    
    return 0;
}

// ====================================================================
// GET FONT NAME
// ====================================================================

std::string TrueTypeFontLoader::getFontName() const {
    return m_fontName.empty() ? "Unknown Font" : m_fontName;
}

} // namespace nk
```

## 2. Integration TrueType dans BitmapFont

```cpp
// Font.cpp - Mise à jour pour utiliser TrueType

#include "Font.hpp"
#include "TrueTypeFontLoader.hpp"

namespace nk {

// Redéfinir TrueTypeFont pour utiliser notre loader
class TrueTypeFont : public Font {
public:
    TrueTypeFont() : m_loader(new TrueTypeFontLoader()), m_fontSize(16), m_atlas(1024, 1024) {}
    
    ~TrueTypeFont() override {
        delete m_loader;
    }
    
    bool loadFromFile(const std::string& filepath, int fontSize) override {
        std::ifstream file(filepath, std::ios::binary | std::ios::ate);
        
        NK_VALIDATE_MSG(nullptr, file.is_open(), "Cannot open font file");
        
        size_t size = file.tellg();
        file.seekg(0);
        
        std::vector<uint8_t> data(size);
        file.read(reinterpret_cast<char*>(data.data()), size);
        file.close();
        
        return loadFromMemory(data.data(), data.size(), fontSize);
    }
    
    bool loadFromMemory(const uint8_t* data, size_t size, int fontSize) override {
        m_fontSize = fontSize;
        
        if (!m_loader->load(data, size)) {
            return false;
        }
        
        // Pré-rasteriser les caractères ASCII
        for (uint32_t c = 32; c < 127; c++) {
            getGlyph(c);
        }
        
        return true;
    }
    
    const Glyph* getGlyph(uint32_t codepoint) override {
        auto it = m_glyphCache.find(codepoint);
        if (it != m_glyphCache.end()) {
            return &it->second;
        }
        
        // Rasteriser le glyphe
        Glyph glyph;
        glyph.codepoint = codepoint;
        
        int width, height, bearingX, bearingY, advance;
        
        if (!m_loader->rasterizeGlyph(codepoint, static_cast<float>(m_fontSize), 
                                     glyph.bitmap, width, height, 
                                     bearingX, bearingY, advance)) {
            return nullptr;
        }
        
        glyph.width = width;
        glyph.height = height;
        glyph.bearingX = bearingX;
        glyph.bearingY = bearingY;
        glyph.advance = advance;
        
        // Ajouter à l'atlas
        m_atlas.addGlyph(codepoint, glyph);
        m_glyphCache[codepoint] = glyph;
        
        return &m_glyphCache[codepoint];
    }
    
    int getAscent() const override {
        return static_cast<int>(m_loader->getAscent() * m_fontSize / m_loader->getUnitsPerEm());
    }
    
    int getDescent() const override {
        return static_cast<int>(m_loader->getDescent() * m_fontSize / m_loader->getUnitsPerEm());
    }
    
    int getLineGap() const override {
        return static_cast<int>(m_loader->getLineGap() * m_fontSize / m_loader->getUnitsPerEm());
    }
    
    int getLineHeight() const override {
        return getAscent() - getDescent() + getLineGap();
    }
    
    TextMetrics measureText(const std::string& text) const override {
        // Implémentation identique à avant
        TextMetrics metrics = {0, 0, 1};
        // ...
        return metrics;
    }
    
    int getKerning(uint32_t left, uint32_t right) const override {
        int kern = m_loader->getKerning(left, right);
        return static_cast<int>(kern * m_fontSize / m_loader->getUnitsPerEm());
    }
    
    FontFormat getFormat() const override { return FontFormat::TrueType; }
    int getFontSize() const override { return m_fontSize; }
    const char* getFamilyName() const override { 
        return m_loader->getFontName().c_str(); 
    }
    
    FontAtlas* getAtlas() override { return &m_atlas; }
    
private:
    TrueTypeFontLoader* m_loader;
    int m_fontSize;
    std::unordered_map<uint32_t, Glyph> m_glyphCache;
    FontAtlas m_atlas;
};

} // namespace nk
```

Maintenant passons aux **ÉTATS DE RENDU AVANCÉS** ! Voulez-vous voir :

1. **Scissor Test** (découpage rectangulaire)
2. **Blend Modes** (alpha, additive, multiply, etc.)
3. **Depth Test** (Z-buffer complet)
4. **Face Culling** (front/back/none)
5. **Wireframe Mode**
6. **Stencil Buffer**
7. **Multiple Viewports**

Tout d'un coup ?

# PARTIE 6 : ÉTATS DE RENDU AVANCÉS (Production-Ready)

## 1. RenderState.hpp - Tous les États de Rendu

```cpp
// RenderState.hpp
#pragma once

#include <cstdint>
#include <array>

namespace nk {

// ====================================================================
// BLEND MODE
// ====================================================================

enum class BlendMode {
    None,           // Pas de blending
    Alpha,          // Alpha blending classique
    Additive,       // Addition des couleurs
    Multiply,       // Multiplication
    Subtract,       // Soustraction
    Screen,         // Screen blending
    Custom          // Blending personnalisé
};

enum class BlendFactor {
    Zero,
    One,
    SrcColor,
    OneMinusSrcColor,
    DstColor,
    OneMinusDstColor,
    SrcAlpha,
    OneMinusSrcAlpha,
    DstAlpha,
    OneMinusDstAlpha,
    ConstantColor,
    OneMinusConstantColor,
    ConstantAlpha,
    OneMinusConstantAlpha,
    SrcAlphaSaturate
};

enum class BlendOp {
    Add,
    Subtract,
    ReverseSubtract,
    Min,
    Max
};

struct BlendState {
    bool enabled = false;
    
    // RGB blending
    BlendFactor srcColorFactor = BlendFactor::SrcAlpha;
    BlendFactor dstColorFactor = BlendFactor::OneMinusSrcAlpha;
    BlendOp colorOp = BlendOp::Add;
    
    // Alpha blending
    BlendFactor srcAlphaFactor = BlendFactor::One;
    BlendFactor dstAlphaFactor = BlendFactor::OneMinusSrcAlpha;
    BlendOp alphaOp = BlendOp::Add;
    
    // Constant blend color
    float constantColor[4] = {1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f, 1.0f};
    
    // Presets
    static BlendState none() {
        BlendState state;
        state.enabled = false;
        return state;
    }
    
    static BlendState alpha() {
        BlendState state;
        state.enabled = true;
        state.srcColorFactor = BlendFactor::SrcAlpha;
        state.dstColorFactor = BlendFactor::OneMinusSrcAlpha;
        state.srcAlphaFactor = BlendFactor::One;
        state.dstAlphaFactor = BlendFactor::OneMinusSrcAlpha;
        return state;
    }
    
    static BlendState additive() {
        BlendState state;
        state.enabled = true;
        state.srcColorFactor = BlendFactor::SrcAlpha;
        state.dstColorFactor = BlendFactor::One;
        state.srcAlphaFactor = BlendFactor::One;
        state.dstAlphaFactor = BlendFactor::One;
        return state;
    }
    
    static BlendState multiply() {
        BlendState state;
        state.enabled = true;
        state.srcColorFactor = BlendFactor::DstColor;
        state.dstColorFactor = BlendFactor::Zero;
        return state;
    }
    
    static BlendState screen() {
        BlendState state;
        state.enabled = true;
        state.srcColorFactor = BlendFactor::OneMinusDstColor;
        state.dstColorFactor = BlendFactor::One;
        return state;
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// DEPTH STATE
// ====================================================================

enum class CompareFunc {
    Never,
    Less,
    Equal,
    LessOrEqual,
    Greater,
    NotEqual,
    GreaterOrEqual,
    Always
};

struct DepthState {
    bool testEnabled = false;
    bool writeEnabled = true;
    CompareFunc compareFunc = CompareFunc::Less;
    
    static DepthState disabled() {
        DepthState state;
        state.testEnabled = false;
        state.writeEnabled = false;
        return state;
    }
    
    static DepthState readWrite() {
        DepthState state;
        state.testEnabled = true;
        state.writeEnabled = true;
        state.compareFunc = CompareFunc::Less;
        return state;
    }
    
    static DepthState readOnly() {
        DepthState state;
        state.testEnabled = true;
        state.writeEnabled = false;
        state.compareFunc = CompareFunc::Less;
        return state;
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// STENCIL STATE
// ====================================================================

enum class StencilOp {
    Keep,           // Garder la valeur
    Zero,           // Mettre à zéro
    Replace,        // Remplacer par la référence
    IncrementClamp, // Incrémenter avec clamp
    DecrementClamp, // Décrémenter avec clamp
    Invert,         // Inverser les bits
    IncrementWrap,  // Incrémenter avec wrap
    DecrementWrap   // Décrémenter avec wrap
};

struct StencilOpState {
    StencilOp stencilFailOp = StencilOp::Keep;
    StencilOp depthFailOp = StencilOp::Keep;
    StencilOp passOp = StencilOp::Keep;
    CompareFunc compareFunc = CompareFunc::Always;
};

struct StencilState {
    bool enabled = false;
    uint8_t readMask = 0xFF;
    uint8_t writeMask = 0xFF;
    uint8_t reference = 0;
    
    StencilOpState front;
    StencilOpState back;
    
    static StencilState disabled() {
        StencilState state;
        state.enabled = false;
        return state;
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// RASTERIZER STATE
// ====================================================================

enum class CullMode {
    None,
    Front,
    Back,
    FrontAndBack
};

enum class FrontFace {
    Clockwise,
    CounterClockwise
};

enum class FillMode {
    Solid,
    Wireframe,
    Point
};

struct RasterizerState {
    CullMode cullMode = CullMode::Back;
    FrontFace frontFace = FrontFace::CounterClockwise;
    FillMode fillMode = FillMode::Solid;
    
    bool depthClipEnabled = true;
    bool scissorTestEnabled = false;
    bool multisampleEnabled = false;
    bool antialiasedLineEnabled = false;
    
    float depthBias = 0.0f;
    float depthBiasClamp = 0.0f;
    float slopeScaledDepthBias = 0.0f;
    
    static RasterizerState solid() {
        RasterizerState state;
        state.fillMode = FillMode::Solid;
        state.cullMode = CullMode::Back;
        return state;
    }
    
    static RasterizerState wireframe() {
        RasterizerState state;
        state.fillMode = FillMode::Wireframe;
        state.cullMode = CullMode::None;
        return state;
    }
    
    static RasterizerState noCulling() {
        RasterizerState state;
        state.cullMode = CullMode::None;
        return state;
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// SCISSOR STATE
// ====================================================================

struct ScissorRect {
    int x = 0;
    int y = 0;
    int width = 0;
    int height = 0;
    
    bool contains(int px, int py) const {
        return px >= x && px < x + width &&
               py >= y && py < y + height;
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// VIEWPORT
// ====================================================================

struct Viewport {
    int x = 0;
    int y = 0;
    int width = 0;
    int height = 0;
    float minDepth = 0.0f;
    float maxDepth = 1.0f;
};

// ====================================================================
// COLOR WRITE MASK
// ====================================================================

struct ColorWriteMask {
    bool red = true;
    bool green = true;
    bool blue = true;
    bool alpha = true;
    
    static ColorWriteMask all() {
        return {true, true, true, true};
    }
    
    static ColorWriteMask none() {
        return {false, false, false, false};
    }
    
    static ColorWriteMask rgb() {
        return {true, true, true, false};
    }
    
    static ColorWriteMask alphaOnly() {
        return {false, false, false, true};
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// RENDER STATE COMPLET
// ====================================================================

struct RenderState {
    BlendState blend;
    DepthState depth;
    StencilState stencil;
    RasterizerState rasterizer;
    ScissorRect scissor;
    Viewport viewport;
    ColorWriteMask colorMask;
    
    // Presets
    static RenderState opaque() {
        RenderState state;
        state.blend = BlendState::none();
        state.depth = DepthState::readWrite();
        state.rasterizer = RasterizerState::solid();
        return state;
    }
    
    static RenderState transparent() {
        RenderState state;
        state.blend = BlendState::alpha();
        state.depth = DepthState::readOnly();
        state.rasterizer = RasterizerState::solid();
        return state;
    }
    
    static RenderState wireframe() {
        RenderState state;
        state.blend = BlendState::none();
        state.depth = DepthState::readWrite();
        state.rasterizer = RasterizerState::wireframe();
        return state;
    }
};

} // namespace nk
```

## 2. RenderStateManager.hpp - Gestionnaire d'États

```cpp
// RenderStateManager.hpp
#pragma once

#include "RenderState.hpp"
#include <vector>
#include <cstdint>

namespace nk {

// ====================================================================
// RENDER STATE MANAGER
// ====================================================================

class RenderStateManager {
public:
    RenderStateManager();
    
    // Gestion de la pile d'états
    void pushState();
    void popState();
    
    // Blend
    void setBlendState(const BlendState& state);
    const BlendState& getBlendState() const;
    
    // Depth
    void setDepthState(const DepthState& state);
    const DepthState& getDepthState() const;
    
    // Stencil
    void setStencilState(const StencilState& state);
    const StencilState& getStencilState() const;
    
    // Rasterizer
    void setRasterizerState(const RasterizerState& state);
    const RasterizerState& getRasterizerState() const;
    
    // Scissor
    void setScissorRect(const ScissorRect& rect);
    const ScissorRect& getScissorRect() const;
    
    // Viewport
    void setViewport(const Viewport& viewport);
    const Viewport& getViewport() const;
    
    // Color mask
    void setColorWriteMask(const ColorWriteMask& mask);
    const ColorWriteMask& getColorWriteMask() const;
    
    // État complet
    void setRenderState(const RenderState& state);
    const RenderState& getRenderState() const;
    
    // Helpers
    bool isPixelVisible(int x, int y) const;
    
private:
    std::vector<RenderState> m_stateStack;
    RenderState m_currentState;
};

} // namespace nk
```

## 3. RenderStateManager.cpp - Implémentation

```cpp
// RenderStateManager.cpp
#include "RenderStateManager.hpp"

namespace nk {

RenderStateManager::RenderStateManager() {
    m_currentState = RenderState::opaque();
}

void RenderStateManager::pushState() {
    m_stateStack.push_back(m_currentState);
}

void RenderStateManager::popState() {
    if (!m_stateStack.empty()) {
        m_currentState = m_stateStack.back();
        m_stateStack.pop_back();
    }
}

void RenderStateManager::setBlendState(const BlendState& state) {
    m_currentState.blend = state;
}

const BlendState& RenderStateManager::getBlendState() const {
    return m_currentState.blend;
}

void RenderStateManager::setDepthState(const DepthState& state) {
    m_currentState.depth = state;
}

const DepthState& RenderStateManager::getDepthState() const {
    return m_currentState.depth;
}

void RenderStateManager::setStencilState(const StencilState& state) {
    m_currentState.stencil = state;
}

const StencilState& RenderStateManager::getStencilState() const {
    return m_currentState.stencil;
}

void RenderStateManager::setRasterizerState(const RasterizerState& state) {
    m_currentState.rasterizer = state;
}

const RasterizerState& RenderStateManager::getRasterizerState() const {
    return m_currentState.rasterizer;
}

void RenderStateManager::setScissorRect(const ScissorRect& rect) {
    m_currentState.scissor = rect;
}

const ScissorRect& RenderStateManager::getScissorRect() const {
    return m_currentState.scissor;
}

void RenderStateManager::setViewport(const Viewport& viewport) {
    m_currentState.viewport = viewport;
}

const Viewport& RenderStateManager::getViewport() const {
    return m_currentState.viewport;
}

void RenderStateManager::setColorWriteMask(const ColorWriteMask& mask) {
    m_currentState.colorMask = mask;
}

const ColorWriteMask& RenderStateManager::getColorWriteMask() const {
    return m_currentState.colorMask;
}

void RenderStateManager::setRenderState(const RenderState& state) {
    m_currentState = state;
}

const RenderState& RenderStateManager::getRenderState() const {
    return m_currentState;
}

bool RenderStateManager::isPixelVisible(int x, int y) const {
    // Viewport test
    if (x < m_currentState.viewport.x || 
        x >= m_currentState.viewport.x + m_currentState.viewport.width ||
        y < m_currentState.viewport.y || 
        y >= m_currentState.viewport.y + m_currentState.viewport.height) {
        return false;
    }
    
    // Scissor test
    if (m_currentState.rasterizer.scissorTestEnabled) {
        if (!m_currentState.scissor.contains(x, y)) {
            return false;
        }
    }
    
    return true;
}

} // namespace nk
```

## 4. Blending.hpp - Implémentation du Blending

```cpp
// Blending.hpp
#pragma once

#include "RenderState.hpp"
#include <algorithm>
#include <cmath>

namespace nk {

class BlendingOperations {
public:
    // Unpacker une couleur
    static void unpack(uint32_t color, float& r, float& g, float& b, float& a) {
        r = ((color >> 0) & 0xFF) / 255.0f;
        g = ((color >> 8) & 0xFF) / 255.0f;
        b = ((color >> 16) & 0xFF) / 255.0f;
        a = ((color >> 24) & 0xFF) / 255.0f;
    }
    
    // Packer une couleur
    static uint32_t pack(float r, float g, float b, float a) {
        uint8_t ri = static_cast<uint8_t>(std::clamp(r * 255.0f, 0.0f, 255.0f));
        uint8_t gi = static_cast<uint8_t>(std::clamp(g * 255.0f, 0.0f, 255.0f));
        uint8_t bi = static_cast<uint8_t>(std::clamp(b * 255.0f, 0.0f, 255.0f));
        uint8_t ai = static_cast<uint8_t>(std::clamp(a * 255.0f, 0.0f, 255.0f));
        
        return (ai << 24) | (bi << 16) | (gi << 8) | ri;
    }
    
    // Calculer un facteur de blend
    static void evaluateFactor(BlendFactor factor, 
                              float srcR, float srcG, float srcB, float srcA,
                              float dstR, float dstG, float dstB, float dstA,
                              const float* constantColor,
                              float& outR, float& outG, float& outB, float& outA) {
        
        switch (factor) {
            case BlendFactor::Zero:
                outR = outG = outB = outA = 0.0f;
                break;
                
            case BlendFactor::One:
                outR = outG = outB = outA = 1.0f;
                break;
                
            case BlendFactor::SrcColor:
                outR = srcR; outG = srcG; outB = srcB; outA = srcA;
                break;
                
            case BlendFactor::OneMinusSrcColor:
                outR = 1.0f - srcR;
                outG = 1.0f - srcG;
                outB = 1.0f - srcB;
                outA = 1.0f - srcA;
                break;
                
            case BlendFactor::DstColor:
                outR = dstR; outG = dstG; outB = dstB; outA = dstA;
                break;
                
            case BlendFactor::OneMinusDstColor:
                outR = 1.0f - dstR;
                outG = 1.0f - dstG;
                outB = 1.0f - dstB;
                outA = 1.0f - dstA;
                break;
                
            case BlendFactor::SrcAlpha:
                outR = outG = outB = outA = srcA;
                break;
                
            case BlendFactor::OneMinusSrcAlpha:
                outR = outG = outB = outA = 1.0f - srcA;
                break;
                
            case BlendFactor::DstAlpha:
                outR = outG = outB = outA = dstA;
                break;
                
            case BlendFactor::OneMinusDstAlpha:
                outR = outG = outB = outA = 1.0f - dstA;
                break;
                
            case BlendFactor::ConstantColor:
                outR = constantColor[0];
                outG = constantColor[1];
                outB = constantColor[2];
                outA = constantColor[3];
                break;
                
            case BlendFactor::OneMinusConstantColor:
                outR = 1.0f - constantColor[0];
                outG = 1.0f - constantColor[1];
                outB = 1.0f - constantColor[2];
                outA = 1.0f - constantColor[3];
                break;
                
            case BlendFactor::ConstantAlpha:
                outR = outG = outB = outA = constantColor[3];
                break;
                
            case BlendFactor::OneMinusConstantAlpha:
                outR = outG = outB = outA = 1.0f - constantColor[3];
                break;
                
            case BlendFactor::SrcAlphaSaturate:
                float f = std::min(srcA, 1.0f - dstA);
                outR = outG = outB = f;
                outA = 1.0f;
                break;
        }
    }
    
    // Appliquer une opération de blend
    static float evaluateOp(BlendOp op, float src, float dst) {
        switch (op) {
            case BlendOp::Add:
                return src + dst;
                
            case BlendOp::Subtract:
                return src - dst;
                
            case BlendOp::ReverseSubtract:
                return dst - src;
                
            case BlendOp::Min:
                return std::min(src, dst);
                
            case BlendOp::Max:
                return std::max(src, dst);
                
            default:
                return src + dst;
        }
    }
    
    // Blender deux couleurs
    static uint32_t blend(uint32_t srcColor, uint32_t dstColor, const BlendState& state) {
        if (!state.enabled) {
            return srcColor;
        }
        
        // Unpacker les couleurs
        float srcR, srcG, srcB, srcA;
        float dstR, dstG, dstB, dstA;
        
        unpack(srcColor, srcR, srcG, srcB, srcA);
        unpack(dstColor, dstR, dstG, dstB, dstA);
        
        // Calculer les facteurs de blend pour RGB
        float srcFactorR, srcFactorG, srcFactorB, srcFactorA;
        evaluateFactor(state.srcColorFactor, 
                      srcR, srcG, srcB, srcA,
                      dstR, dstG, dstB, dstA,
                      state.constantColor,
                      srcFactorR, srcFactorG, srcFactorB, srcFactorA);
        
        float dstFactorR, dstFactorG, dstFactorB, dstFactorA;
        evaluateFactor(state.dstColorFactor,
                      srcR, srcG, srcB, srcA,
                      dstR, dstG, dstB, dstA,
                      state.constantColor,
                      dstFactorR, dstFactorG, dstFactorB, dstFactorA);
        
        // Appliquer les facteurs
        float blendedSrcR = srcR * srcFactorR;
        float blendedSrcG = srcG * srcFactorG;
        float blendedSrcB = srcB * srcFactorB;
        
        float blendedDstR = dstR * dstFactorR;
        float blendedDstG = dstG * dstFactorG;
        float blendedDstB = dstB * dstFactorB;
        
        // Appliquer l'opération de blend RGB
        float finalR = evaluateOp(state.colorOp, blendedSrcR, blendedDstR);
        float finalG = evaluateOp(state.colorOp, blendedSrcG, blendedDstG);
        float finalB = evaluateOp(state.colorOp, blendedSrcB, blendedDstB);
        
        // Alpha blending
        float srcAlphaFactor, dstAlphaFactor, dummy1, dummy2;
        
        evaluateFactor(state.srcAlphaFactor,
                      srcR, srcG, srcB, srcA,
                      dstR, dstG, dstB, dstA,
                      state.constantColor,
                      dummy1, dummy1, dummy1, srcAlphaFactor);
        
        evaluateFactor(state.dstAlphaFactor,
                      srcR, srcG, srcB, srcA,
                      dstR, dstG, dstB, dstA,
                      state.constantColor,
                      dummy2, dummy2, dummy2, dstAlphaFactor);
        
        float blendedSrcA = srcA * srcAlphaFactor;
        float blendedDstA = dstA * dstAlphaFactor;
        
        float finalA = evaluateOp(state.alphaOp, blendedSrcA, blendedDstA);
        
        // Clamper et retourner
        return pack(finalR, finalG, finalB, finalA);
    }
};

} // namespace nk
```

## 5. DepthBuffer.hpp - Buffer de Profondeur

```cpp
// DepthBuffer.hpp
#pragma once

#include "RenderState.hpp"
#include <vector>
#include <limits>
#include <cmath>

namespace nk {

class DepthBuffer {
public:
    DepthBuffer(int width, int height)
        : m_width(width)
        , m_height(height) {
        m_buffer.resize(width * height, 1.0f);
    }
    
    void resize(int width, int height) {
        m_width = width;
        m_height = height;
        m_buffer.resize(width * height, 1.0f);
    }
    
    void clear(float value = 1.0f) {
        std::fill(m_buffer.begin(), m_buffer.end(), value);
    }
    
    float get(int x, int y) const {
        if (x < 0 || x >= m_width || y < 0 || y >= m_height) {
            return 1.0f;
        }
        return m_buffer[y * m_width + x];
    }
    
    void set(int x, int y, float depth) {
        if (x < 0 || x >= m_width || y < 0 || y >= m_height) {
            return;
        }
        m_buffer[y * m_width + x] = depth;
    }
    
    bool test(int x, int y, float depth, const DepthState& state) const {
        if (!state.testEnabled) {
            return true;
        }
        
        float existingDepth = get(x, y);
        
        switch (state.compareFunc) {
            case CompareFunc::Never:
                return false;
                
            case CompareFunc::Less:
                return depth < existingDepth;
                
            case CompareFunc::Equal:
                return std::abs(depth - existingDepth) < 0.0001f;
                
            case CompareFunc::LessOrEqual:
                return depth <= existingDepth;
                
            case CompareFunc::Greater:
                return depth > existingDepth;
                
            case CompareFunc::NotEqual:
                return std::abs(depth - existingDepth) >= 0.0001f;
                
            case CompareFunc::GreaterOrEqual:
                return depth >= existingDepth;
                
            case CompareFunc::Always:
                return true;
                
            default:
                return depth < existingDepth;
        }
    }
    
    bool testAndWrite(int x, int y, float depth, const DepthState& state) {
        if (!test(x, y, depth, state)) {
            return false;
        }
        
        if (state.writeEnabled) {
            set(x, y, depth);
        }
        
        return true;
    }
    
private:
    int m_width;
    int m_height;
    std::vector<float> m_buffer;
};

} // namespace nk
```

## 6. StencilBuffer.hpp - Buffer de Stencil

```cpp
// StencilBuffer.hpp
#pragma once

#include "RenderState.hpp"
#include <vector>

namespace nk {

class StencilBuffer {
public:
    StencilBuffer(int width, int height)
        : m_width(width)
        , m_height(height) {
        m_buffer.resize(width * height, 0);
    }
    
    void resize(int width, int height) {
        m_width = width;
        m_height = height;
        m_buffer.resize(width * height, 0);
    }
    
    void clear(uint8_t value = 0) {
        std::fill(m_buffer.begin(), m_buffer.end(), value);
    }
    
    uint8_t get(int x, int y) const {
        if (x < 0 || x >= m_width || y < 0 || y >= m_height) {
            return 0;
        }
        return m_buffer[y * m_width + x];
    }
    
    void set(int x, int y, uint8_t value) {
        if (x < 0 || x >= m_width || y < 0 || y >= m_height) {
            return;
        }
        m_buffer[y * m_width + x] = value;
    }
    
    bool compareFunc(CompareFunc func, uint8_t ref, uint8_t stencil) const {
        switch (func) {
            case CompareFunc::Never: return false;
            case CompareFunc::Less: return ref < stencil;
            case CompareFunc::Equal: return ref == stencil;
            case CompareFunc::LessOrEqual: return ref <= stencil;
            case CompareFunc::Greater: return ref > stencil;
            case CompareFunc::NotEqual: return ref != stencil;
            case CompareFunc::GreaterOrEqual: return ref >= stencil;
            case CompareFunc::Always: return true;
            default: return true;
        }
    }
    
    uint8_t applyOp(StencilOp op, uint8_t currentValue, uint8_t reference) const {
        switch (op) {
            case StencilOp::Keep:
                return currentValue;
                
            case StencilOp::Zero:
                return 0;
                
            case StencilOp::Replace:
                return reference;
                
            case StencilOp::IncrementClamp:
                return (currentValue == 255) ? 255 : currentValue + 1;
                
            case StencilOp::DecrementClamp:
                return (currentValue == 0) ? 0 : currentValue - 1;
                
            case StencilOp::Invert:
                return ~currentValue;
                
            case StencilOp::IncrementWrap:
                return currentValue + 1;
                
            case StencilOp::DecrementWrap:
                return currentValue - 1;
                
            default:
                return currentValue;
        }
    }
    
    bool test(int x, int y, bool frontFacing, bool depthPassed, 
             const StencilState& state) {
        
        if (!state.enabled) {
            return true;
        }
        
        uint8_t currentValue = get(x, y);
        uint8_t maskedValue = currentValue & state.readMask;
        uint8_t maskedRef = state.reference & state.readMask;
        
        const StencilOpState& opState = frontFacing ? state.front : state.back;
        
        bool passed = compareFunc(opState.compareFunc, maskedRef, maskedValue);
        
        uint8_t newValue = currentValue;
        
        if (!passed) {
            // Stencil test failed
            newValue = applyOp(opState.stencilFailOp, currentValue, state.reference);
        } else if (!depthPassed) {
            // Stencil passed, depth failed
            newValue = applyOp(opState.depthFailOp, currentValue, state.reference);
        } else {
            // Both passed
            newValue = applyOp(opState.passOp, currentValue, state.reference);
        }
        
        // Appliquer le write mask
        uint8_t finalValue = (newValue & state.writeMask) | (currentValue & ~state.writeMask);
        set(x, y, finalValue);
        
        return passed;
    }
    
private:
    int m_width;
    int m_height;
    std::vector<uint8_t> m_buffer;
};

} // namespace nk
```

Suite dans le prochain message avec l'intégration dans le Renderer...


# PARTIE 7 : Intégration des États de Rendu dans le Renderer

## 1. Renderer.hpp - Extension avec États

```cpp
// Renderer.hpp - EXTENSION avec états de rendu

namespace nk {

class Renderer {
public:
    // ... (méthodes existantes) ...
    
    // ================================================================
    // GESTION DES ÉTATS DE RENDU
    // ================================================================
    
    // Blend state
    void setBlendState(const BlendState& state);
    const BlendState& getBlendState() const;
    
    void setBlendMode(BlendMode mode); // Helper simplifié
    
    // Depth state
    void setDepthState(const DepthState& state);
    const DepthState& getDepthState() const;
    
    void setDepthTest(bool enabled);
    void setDepthWrite(bool enabled);
    void setDepthFunc(CompareFunc func);
    
    // Stencil state
    void setStencilState(const StencilState& state);
    const StencilState& getStencilState() const;
    
    void setStencilTest(bool enabled);
    void setStencilFunc(CompareFunc func, uint8_t ref, uint8_t mask);
    void setStencilOp(StencilOp sfail, StencilOp dpfail, StencilOp dppass);
    
    // Rasterizer state
    void setRasterizerState(const RasterizerState& state);
    const RasterizerState& getRasterizerState() const;
    
    void setCullMode(CullMode mode);
    void setFillMode(FillMode mode);
    void setFrontFace(FrontFace face);
    
    // Scissor
    void setScissorTest(bool enabled);
    void setScissorRect(int x, int y, int width, int height);
    void setScissorRect(const ScissorRect& rect);
    const ScissorRect& getScissorRect() const;
    
    // Viewport
    void setViewport(int x, int y, int width, int height);
    void setViewport(const Viewport& viewport);
    const Viewport& getViewport() const;
    
    // Color mask
    void setColorWriteMask(bool r, bool g, bool b, bool a);
    void setColorWriteMask(const ColorWriteMask& mask);
    const ColorWriteMask& getColorWriteMask() const;
    
    // État complet
    void setRenderState(const RenderState& state);
    const RenderState& getRenderState() const;
    
    // Stack d'états
    void pushState();
    void popState();
    
    // ================================================================
    // BUFFERS AVANCÉS
    // ================================================================
    
    // Depth buffer
    void clearDepth(float value = 1.0f);
    float getDepth(int x, int y) const;
    void setDepth(int x, int y, float depth);
    
    // Stencil buffer
    void clearStencil(uint8_t value = 0);
    uint8_t getStencil(int x, int y) const;
    void setStencil(int x, int y, uint8_t value);
    
    // ================================================================
    // DRAWING AVEC ÉTATS
    // ================================================================
    
    // setPixel étendu avec tous les tests
    void setPixelAdvanced(int x, int y, uint32_t color, float depth = 0.0f);
    
    // Ligne avec tests de profondeur
    void drawLine3D(int x0, int y0, float z0, int x1, int y1, float z1, uint32_t color);
    
    // Triangle avec depth/stencil
    void drawTriangle3D(int x0, int y0, float z0,
                       int x1, int y1, float z1,
                       int x2, int y2, float z2,
                       uint32_t color);
    
    // Triangle rempli avec depth/stencil
    void fillTriangle3D(int x0, int y0, float z0,
                       int x1, int y1, float z1,
                       int x2, int y2, float z2,
                       uint32_t color);
    
    // Rectangle avec profondeur
    void fillRect3D(int x, int y, int width, int height, float depth, uint32_t color);
    
    // Cercle avec profondeur
    void fillCircle3D(int cx, int cy, int radius, float depth, uint32_t color);
    
private:
    RenderStateManager m_stateManager;
    std::unique_ptr<DepthBuffer> m_depthBuffer;
    std::unique_ptr<StencilBuffer> m_stencilBuffer;
};

} // namespace nk
```

## 2. Renderer.cpp - Implémentation des États

```cpp
// Renderer.cpp - IMPLÉMENTATION des états

namespace nk {

// ====================================================================
// CONSTRUCTEUR - Initialiser les buffers
// ====================================================================

bool Renderer::create(Window& window, const RendererConfig& config) {
    // ... (code existant) ...
    
    // Créer les buffers depth et stencil
    const auto& fb = getFramebufferInfo();
    m_depthBuffer = std::make_unique<DepthBuffer>(fb.width, fb.height);
    m_stencilBuffer = std::make_unique<StencilBuffer>(fb.width, fb.height);
    
    // Initialiser le viewport par défaut
    Viewport vp;
    vp.x = 0;
    vp.y = 0;
    vp.width = fb.width;
    vp.height = fb.height;
    vp.minDepth = 0.0f;
    vp.maxDepth = 1.0f;
    m_stateManager.setViewport(vp);
    
    return true;
}

// ====================================================================
// RESIZE - Redimensionner les buffers
// ====================================================================

void Renderer::resize(int width, int height) {
    // ... (code existant) ...
    
    if (m_depthBuffer) {
        m_depthBuffer->resize(width, height);
    }
    
    if (m_stencilBuffer) {
        m_stencilBuffer->resize(width, height);
    }
    
    // Mettre à jour le viewport
    Viewport vp = m_stateManager.getViewport();
    vp.width = width;
    vp.height = height;
    m_stateManager.setViewport(vp);
}

// ====================================================================
// BLEND STATE
// ====================================================================

void Renderer::setBlendState(const BlendState& state) {
    m_stateManager.setBlendState(state);
}

const BlendState& Renderer::getBlendState() const {
    return m_stateManager.getBlendState();
}

void Renderer::setBlendMode(BlendMode mode) {
    switch (mode) {
        case BlendMode::None:
            setBlendState(BlendState::none());
            break;
        case BlendMode::Alpha:
            setBlendState(BlendState::alpha());
            break;
        case BlendMode::Additive:
            setBlendState(BlendState::additive());
            break;
        case BlendMode::Multiply:
            setBlendState(BlendState::multiply());
            break;
        case BlendMode::Screen:
            setBlendState(BlendState::screen());
            break;
        default:
            break;
    }
}

// ====================================================================
// DEPTH STATE
// ====================================================================

void Renderer::setDepthState(const DepthState& state) {
    m_stateManager.setDepthState(state);
}

const DepthState& Renderer::getDepthState() const {
    return m_stateManager.getDepthState();
}

void Renderer::setDepthTest(bool enabled) {
    DepthState state = m_stateManager.getDepthState();
    state.testEnabled = enabled;
    m_stateManager.setDepthState(state);
}

void Renderer::setDepthWrite(bool enabled) {
    DepthState state = m_stateManager.getDepthState();
    state.writeEnabled = enabled;
    m_stateManager.setDepthState(state);
}

void Renderer::setDepthFunc(CompareFunc func) {
    DepthState state = m_stateManager.getDepthState();
    state.compareFunc = func;
    m_stateManager.setDepthState(state);
}

// ====================================================================
// STENCIL STATE
// ====================================================================
```
