```cpp
    // Input
    void setMousePosition(float x, float y);
    void setMouseButton(int button, bool pressed);
    void setMouseWheel(float delta);
    void addInputCharacter(uint32_t c);
    void setKeyState(int key, bool pressed);
    void setKeyMod(uint32_t mods);
    
    // Style
    void setStyle(const UIStyle& style);
    UIStyle& getStyle();
    
    // Windows
    bool beginWindow(const std::string& title, bool* open = nullptr, 
                    float x = -1, float y = -1, float width = 300, float height = 400);
    void endWindow();
    
    // Layout
    void sameLine();
    void newLine();
    void spacing(float height = -1);
    void separator();
    void indent(float amount = -1);
    void unindent(float amount = -1);
    
    // Widgets
    void text(const std::string& text);
    void textColored(const std::string& text, uint32_t color);
    void textWrapped(const std::string& text);
    
    bool button(const std::string& label, float width = 0, float height = 0);
    bool checkbox(const std::string& label, bool* value);
    bool radioButton(const std::string& label, int* value, int buttonValue);
    
    bool sliderFloat(const std::string& label, float* value, float min, float max);
    bool sliderInt(const std::string& label, int* value, int min, int max);
    
    bool inputText(const std::string& label, std::string& text, size_t maxLength = 256);
    bool inputFloat(const std::string& label, float* value);
    bool inputInt(const std::string& label, int* value);
    
    bool colorEdit3(const std::string& label, float color[3]);
    bool colorEdit4(const std::string& label, float color[4]);
    bool colorPicker3(const std::string& label, float color[3]);
    bool colorPicker4(const std::string& label, float color[4]);
    
    // Tree & Collapsing Headers
    bool treeNode(const std::string& label);
    void treePop();
    bool collapsingHeader(const std::string& label);
    
    // Combo box
    bool beginCombo(const std::string& label, const std::string& preview);
    void endCombo();
    bool comboItem(const std::string& label, bool selected = false);
    
    // List box
    bool listBox(const std::string& label, int* selectedIndex, 
                const std::vector<std::string>& items, int heightInItems = -1);
    
    // Menu
    bool beginMainMenuBar();
    void endMainMenuBar();
    bool beginMenuBar();
    void endMenuBar();
    bool beginMenu(const std::string& label);
    void endMenu();
    bool menuItem(const std::string& label, const char* shortcut = nullptr, 
                 bool selected = false, bool enabled = true);
    
    // Tooltips
    void setTooltip(const std::string& text);
    void beginTooltip();
    void endTooltip();
    
    // Popups
    bool beginPopup(const std::string& id);
    void endPopup();
    void openPopup(const std::string& id);
    void closeCurrentPopup();
    
    // ID Stack (for unique widget IDs)
    void pushID(const std::string& id);
    void pushID(int id);
    void popID();
    
    // Queries
    bool isItemHovered() const;
    bool isItemActive() const;
    bool isItemClicked(int button = 0) const;
    UIRect getItemRect() const;
    
    // Rendering
    Renderer* getRenderer() { return m_renderer; }
    
private:
    // ID generation
    uint32_t getID(const std::string& label);
    uint32_t getCurrentID() const;
    
    // Widget helpers
    UIRect allocateSpace(float width, float height);
    void advanceCursor(float height);
    
    UIState getWidgetState(const UIRect& rect, uint32_t id);
    bool isRectHovered(const UIRect& rect) const;
    
    // Rendering helpers
    void renderWindow(UIWindow* window);
    void renderButton(const UIRect& rect, const std::string& label, UIState state);
    void renderCheckbox(const UIRect& rect, const std::string& label, bool checked, UIState state);
    void renderSlider(const UIRect& rect, const std::string& label, float value, 
                     float min, float max, UIState state);
    void renderInputText(const UIRect& rect, const std::string& label, 
                        const std::string& text, bool active);
    void renderFrame(const UIRect& rect, uint32_t color, float rounding = 0.0f);
    void renderText(float x, float y, const std::string& text, uint32_t color);
    
    // Members
    Renderer* m_renderer;
    Font* m_font;
    UIStyle m_style;
    UIInputState m_input;
    
    std::vector<UIWindow*> m_windows;
    UIWindow* m_currentWindow = nullptr;
    
    std::vector<uint32_t> m_idStack;
    uint32_t m_currentFrame = 0;
    
    // Active states
    uint32_t m_activeID = 0;
    uint32_t m_hoveredID = 0;
    uint32_t m_focusedID = 0;
    
    UIRect m_lastItemRect;
    bool m_lastItemHovered = false;
    bool m_lastItemActive = false;
    bool m_lastItemClicked = false;
    
    // Text input state
    std::string* m_activeTextInput = nullptr;
    size_t m_textInputCursor = 0;
    
    // Combo state
    bool m_comboOpen = false;
    uint32_t m_comboID = 0;
    
    // Menu state
    bool m_menuBarActive = false;
    std::vector<uint32_t> m_menuStack;
    
    // Popup state
    std::string m_popupOpen;
    
    // Layout state
    bool m_sameLine = false;
    float m_indentLevel = 0.0f;
};

// ====================================================================
// GLOBAL CONTEXT (Singleton)
// ====================================================================

class ImGui {
public:
    static void initialize(Renderer* renderer, Font* font = nullptr);
    static void shutdown();
    
    static UIContext& getContext();
    
    // Forwarding to context
    static void beginFrame() { getContext().beginFrame(); }
    static void endFrame() { getContext().endFrame(); }
    
    static bool beginWindow(const std::string& title, bool* open = nullptr,
                           float x = -1, float y = -1, float width = 300, float height = 400) {
        return getContext().beginWindow(title, open, x, y, width, height);
    }
    static void endWindow() { getContext().endWindow(); }
    
    static void text(const std::string& text) { getContext().text(text); }
    static bool button(const std::string& label, float width = 0, float height = 0) {
        return getContext().button(label, width, height);
    }
    static bool checkbox(const std::string& label, bool* value) {
        return getContext().checkbox(label, value);
    }
    static bool sliderFloat(const std::string& label, float* value, float min, float max) {
        return getContext().sliderFloat(label, value, min, max);
    }
    static bool inputText(const std::string& label, std::string& text, size_t maxLength = 256) {
        return getContext().inputText(label, text, maxLength);
    }
    
    // ... (forward other functions)
    
private:
    static UIContext* s_context;
};

} // namespace nk
```

## 2. ImGui.cpp - Implémentation Core

```cpp
// ImGui.cpp
#include "ImGui.hpp"
#include "Renderer.hpp"
#include "Font.hpp"
#include <algorithm>
#include <cstring>

namespace nk {

// ====================================================================
// HASH FUNCTION (pour générer des IDs)
// ====================================================================

static uint32_t hashString(const char* str, uint32_t seed = 0) {
    uint32_t hash = seed;
    
    while (*str) {
        hash = hash * 31 + *str;
        str++;
    }
    
    return hash;
}

// ====================================================================
// UI CONTEXT - CONSTRUCTOR
// ====================================================================

UIContext::UIContext(Renderer* renderer, Font* font)
    : m_renderer(renderer)
    , m_font(font) {
    
    m_idStack.push_back(0); // Root ID
}

UIContext::~UIContext() {
    for (auto* window : m_windows) {
        delete window;
    }
}

// ====================================================================
// FRAME MANAGEMENT
// ====================================================================

void UIContext::beginFrame() {
    m_input.beginFrame();
    m_currentFrame++;
    
    // Reset frame states
    m_hoveredID = 0;
    m_lastItemHovered = false;
    m_lastItemActive = false;
    m_lastItemClicked = false;
}

void UIContext::endFrame() {
    // Render all windows (back to front)
    std::sort(m_windows.begin(), m_windows.end(), 
             [](const UIWindow* a, const UIWindow* b) {
                 return a->zOrder < b->zOrder;
             });
    
    for (auto* window : m_windows) {
        if (window->open && !window->collapsed) {
            renderWindow(window);
        }
    }
    
    // Handle window dragging
    if (m_input.mouseButtonsReleased[0]) {
        for (auto* window : m_windows) {
            window->moving = false;
            window->resizing = false;
        }
    }
}

// ====================================================================
// INPUT
// ====================================================================

void UIContext::setMousePosition(float x, float y) {
    m_input.mouseDeltaX = x - m_input.mouseX;
    m_input.mouseDeltaY = y - m_input.mouseY;
    m_input.mouseX = x;
    m_input.mouseY = y;
}

void UIContext::setMouseButton(int button, bool pressed) {
    if (button < 0 || button >= 5) return;
    
    bool wasPressed = m_input.mouseButtons[button];
    m_input.mouseButtons[button] = pressed;
    
    if (pressed && !wasPressed) {
        m_input.mouseButtonsClicked[button] = true;
    } else if (!pressed && wasPressed) {
        m_input.mouseButtonsReleased[button] = true;
    }
}

void UIContext::setMouseWheel(float delta) {
    m_input.mouseWheel = delta;
}

void UIContext::addInputCharacter(uint32_t c) {
    m_input.inputCharacters.push_back(c);
}

void UIContext::setKeyState(int key, bool pressed) {
    bool wasPressed = m_input.keysDown[key];
    m_input.keysDown[key] = pressed;
    
    if (pressed && !wasPressed) {
        m_input.keysPressed[key] = true;
    } else if (!pressed && wasPressed) {
        m_input.keysReleased[key] = true;
    }
}

void UIContext::setKeyMod(uint32_t mods) {
    m_input.keyMods = mods;
}

// ====================================================================
// WINDOWS
// ====================================================================

bool UIContext::beginWindow(const std::string& title, bool* open,
                            float x, float y, float width, float height) {
    
    uint32_t id = hashString(title.c_str());
    
    // Trouver ou créer la fenêtre
    UIWindow* window = nullptr;
    
    for (auto* w : m_windows) {
        if (w->id == id) {
            window = w;
            break;
        }
    }
    
    if (!window) {
        window = new UIWindow();
        window->id = id;
        window->title = title;
        
        // Position par défaut
        if (x < 0) x = m_windows.size() * 30.0f;
        if (y < 0) y = m_windows.size() * 30.0f;
        
        window->rect = {x, y, width, height};
        window->zOrder = m_windows.size();
        
        m_windows.push_back(window);
    }
    
    m_currentWindow = window;
    
    if (open) {
        window->open = *open;
    }
    
    if (!window->open) {
        return false;
    }
    
    // Handle window dragging
    UIRect titleBar = {
        window->rect.x,
        window->rect.y,
        window->rect.width,
        25.0f
    };
    
    if (isRectHovered(titleBar) && m_input.mouseButtonsClicked[0]) {
        window->moving = true;
        window->focused = true;
        
        // Bring to front
        int maxZ = 0;
        for (auto* w : m_windows) {
            maxZ = std::max(maxZ, w->zOrder);
        }
        window->zOrder = maxZ + 1;
    }
    
    if (window->moving) {
        window->rect.x += m_input.mouseDeltaX;
        window->rect.y += m_input.mouseDeltaY;
    }
    
    // Setup content rect
    window->contentRect = {
        window->rect.x + m_style.windowPadding,
        window->rect.y + 30.0f + m_style.windowPadding,
        window->rect.width - m_style.windowPadding * 2,
        window->rect.height - 30.0f - m_style.windowPadding * 2
    };
    
    // Reset cursor
    window->cursorX = window->contentRect.x;
    window->cursorY = window->contentRect.y - window->scrollY;
    
    return true;
}

void UIContext::endWindow() {
    if (!m_currentWindow) return;
    
    // Calculate scroll max
    float contentHeight = m_currentWindow->cursorY - m_currentWindow->contentRect.y + m_currentWindow->scrollY;
    m_currentWindow->scrollMaxY = std::max(0.0f, contentHeight - m_currentWindow->contentRect.height);
    
    // Handle scrolling
    if (isRectHovered(m_currentWindow->contentRect) && m_input.mouseWheel != 0.0f) {
        m_currentWindow->scrollY -= m_input.mouseWheel * 20.0f;
        m_currentWindow->scrollY = std::clamp(m_currentWindow->scrollY, 0.0f, m_currentWindow->scrollMaxY);
    }
    
    m_currentWindow = nullptr;
}

// ====================================================================
// LAYOUT
// ====================================================================

void UIContext::sameLine() {
    m_sameLine = true;
}

void UIContext::newLine() {
    if (!m_currentWindow) return;
    
    m_currentWindow->cursorX = m_currentWindow->contentRect.x + m_indentLevel;
    m_currentWindow->cursorY += m_style.fontSize + m_style.itemSpacing;
}

void UIContext::spacing(float height) {
    if (!m_currentWindow) return;
    
    if (height < 0) height = m_style.itemSpacing;
    
    advanceCursor(height);
}

void UIContext::separator() {
    if (!m_currentWindow) return;
    
    UIRect rect = allocateSpace(m_currentWindow->contentRect.width, 1.0f);
    
    m_renderer->fillRect(
        static_cast<int>(rect.x),
        static_cast<int>(rect.y),
        static_cast<int>(rect.width),
        static_cast<int>(rect.height),
        m_style.colorWindowBorder
    );
    
    advanceCursor(m_style.itemSpacing);
}

void UIContext::indent(float amount) {
    if (amount < 0) amount = m_style.indentSpacing;
    m_indentLevel += amount;
    
    if (m_currentWindow) {
        m_currentWindow->cursorX += amount;
    }
}

void UIContext::unindent(float amount) {
    if (amount < 0) amount = m_style.indentSpacing;
    m_indentLevel -= amount;
    
    if (m_currentWindow) {
        m_currentWindow->cursorX -= amount;
    }
}

// ====================================================================
// WIDGETS - TEXT
// ====================================================================

void UIContext::text(const std::string& text) {
    if (!m_currentWindow) return;
    
    float textWidth = text.length() * m_style.fontSize * 0.6f; // Approximation
    UIRect rect = allocateSpace(textWidth, m_style.fontSize);
    
    renderText(rect.x, rect.y, text, m_style.colorText);
    
    advanceCursor(m_style.fontSize + m_style.itemSpacing);
}

void UIContext::textColored(const std::string& text, uint32_t color) {
    if (!m_currentWindow) return;
    
    float textWidth = text.length() * m_style.fontSize * 0.6f;
    UIRect rect = allocateSpace(textWidth, m_style.fontSize);
    
    renderText(rect.x, rect.y, text, color);
    
    advanceCursor(m_style.fontSize + m_style.itemSpacing);
}

// ====================================================================
// WIDGETS - BUTTON
// ====================================================================

bool UIContext::button(const std::string& label, float width, float height) {
    if (!m_currentWindow) return false;
    
    if (width <= 0) width = label.length() * m_style.fontSize * 0.7f + 20.0f;
    if (height <= 0) height = m_style.fontSize + 10.0f;
    
    UIRect rect = allocateSpace(width, height);
    uint32_t id = getID(label);
    
    UIState state = getWidgetState(rect, id);
    
    m_lastItemRect = rect;
    m_lastItemHovered = (state == UIState::Hovered || state == UIState::Active);
    m_lastItemActive = (state == UIState::Active);
    
    bool clicked = (state == UIState::Active && m_input.mouseButtonsReleased[0]);
    m_lastItemClicked = clicked;
    
    renderButton(rect, label, state);
    
    advanceCursor(height + m_style.itemSpacing);
    
    return clicked;
}

// ====================================================================
// WIDGETS - CHECKBOX
// ====================================================================

bool UIContext::checkbox(const std::string& label, bool* value) {
    if (!m_currentWindow || !value) return false;
    
    float checkboxSize = m_style.fontSize;
    float totalWidth = checkboxSize + m_style.itemInnerSpacing + label.length() * m_style.fontSize * 0.6f;
    
    UIRect rect = allocateSpace(totalWidth, checkboxSize);
    uint32_t id = getID(label);
    
    UIState state = getWidgetState(rect, id);
    
    bool changed = false;
    
    if (state == UIState::Active && m_input.mouseButtonsClicked[0]) {
        *value = !(*value);
        changed = true;
    }
    
    renderCheckbox(rect, label, *value, state);
    
    advanceCursor(checkboxSize + m_style.itemSpacing);
    
    return changed;
}
```

# PARTIE 14 : ImGui Complet (Widgets + Rendering + Modals + Docking)

## 1. ImGui_Widgets.cpp - Tous les Widgets

```cpp
// ImGui_Widgets.cpp
#include "ImGui.hpp"
#include "Renderer.hpp"
#include "Font.hpp"
#include <algorithm>
#include <sstream>
#include <iomanip>

namespace nk {

// ====================================================================
// WIDGETS - SLIDER
// ====================================================================

bool UIContext::sliderFloat(const std::string& label, float* value, float min, float max) {
    if (!m_currentWindow || !value) return false;
    
    float sliderWidth = 200.0f;
    float labelWidth = label.length() * m_style.fontSize * 0.6f;
    float totalWidth = labelWidth + m_style.itemInnerSpacing + sliderWidth;
    
    UIRect rect = allocateSpace(totalWidth, m_style.fontSize + 10.0f);
    uint32_t id = getID(label);
    
    // Render label
    renderText(rect.x, rect.y + 5.0f, label, m_style.colorText);
    
    // Slider rect
    UIRect sliderRect = {
        rect.x + labelWidth + m_style.itemInnerSpacing,
        rect.y,
        sliderWidth,
        m_style.fontSize + 10.0f
    };
    
    UIState state = getWidgetState(sliderRect, id);
    
    bool changed = false;
    
    // Handle dragging
    if (state == UIState::Active) {
        float relativeX = m_input.mouseX - sliderRect.x;
        float t = std::clamp(relativeX / sliderRect.width, 0.0f, 1.0f);
        float newValue = min + t * (max - min);
        
        if (newValue != *value) {
            *value = newValue;
            changed = true;
        }
    }
    
    renderSlider(sliderRect, label, *value, min, max, state);
    
    advanceCursor(rect.height + m_style.itemSpacing);
    
    return changed;
}

bool UIContext::sliderInt(const std::string& label, int* value, int min, int max) {
    float floatValue = static_cast<float>(*value);
    bool changed = sliderFloat(label, &floatValue, static_cast<float>(min), static_cast<float>(max));
    
    if (changed) {
        *value = static_cast<int>(floatValue + 0.5f);
    }
    
    return changed;
}

// ====================================================================
// WIDGETS - INPUT TEXT
// ====================================================================

bool UIContext::inputText(const std::string& label, std::string& text, size_t maxLength) {
    if (!m_currentWindow) return false;
    
    float inputWidth = 200.0f;
    float labelWidth = label.length() * m_style.fontSize * 0.6f;
    float totalWidth = labelWidth + m_style.itemInnerSpacing + inputWidth;
    
    UIRect rect = allocateSpace(totalWidth, m_style.fontSize + 10.0f);
    uint32_t id = getID(label);
    
    // Render label
    renderText(rect.x, rect.y + 5.0f, label, m_style.colorText);
    
    // Input rect
    UIRect inputRect = {
        rect.x + labelWidth + m_style.itemInnerSpacing,
        rect.y,
        inputWidth,
        m_style.fontSize + 10.0f
    };
    
    bool active = (m_activeID == id);
    bool hovered = isRectHovered(inputRect);
    
    // Activation
    if (hovered && m_input.mouseButtonsClicked[0]) {
        m_activeID = id;
        m_activeTextInput = &text;
        m_textInputCursor = text.length();
        active = true;
    }
    
    // Deactivation
    if (active && m_input.mouseButtonsClicked[0] && !hovered) {
        m_activeID = 0;
        m_activeTextInput = nullptr;
        active = false;
    }
    
    bool changed = false;
    
    // Handle text input
    if (active) {
        // Add characters
        for (uint32_t c : m_input.inputCharacters) {
            if (c >= 32 && c < 127 && text.length() < maxLength) {
                text.insert(m_textInputCursor, 1, static_cast<char>(c));
                m_textInputCursor++;
                changed = true;
            }
        }
        
        // Handle backspace
        if (m_input.keysPressed[259] && m_textInputCursor > 0) { // Backspace key
            text.erase(m_textInputCursor - 1, 1);
            m_textInputCursor--;
            changed = true;
        }
        
        // Handle delete
        if (m_input.keysPressed[261] && m_textInputCursor < text.length()) { // Delete key
            text.erase(m_textInputCursor, 1);
            changed = true;
        }
        
        // Handle arrow keys
        if (m_input.keysPressed[263]) { // Left arrow
            if (m_textInputCursor > 0) m_textInputCursor--;
        }
        if (m_input.keysPressed[262]) { // Right arrow
            if (m_textInputCursor < text.length()) m_textInputCursor++;
        }
        
        // Handle home/end
        if (m_input.keysPressed[268]) m_textInputCursor = 0; // Home
        if (m_input.keysPressed[269]) m_textInputCursor = text.length(); // End
    }
    
    renderInputText(inputRect, label, text, active);
    
    advanceCursor(rect.height + m_style.itemSpacing);
    
    return changed;
}

bool UIContext::inputFloat(const std::string& label, float* value) {
    if (!value) return false;
    
    std::ostringstream oss;
    oss << std::fixed << std::setprecision(3) << *value;
    std::string text = oss.str();
    
    bool changed = inputText(label, text, 32);
    
    if (changed) {
        try {
            *value = std::stof(text);
        } catch (...) {
            // Invalid input, keep old value
        }
    }
    
    return changed;
}

bool UIContext::inputInt(const std::string& label, int* value) {
    if (!value) return false;
    
    std::string text = std::to_string(*value);
    bool changed = inputText(label, text, 16);
    
    if (changed) {
        try {
            *value = std::stoi(text);
        } catch (...) {
            // Invalid input
        }
    }
    
    return changed;
}

// ====================================================================
// WIDGETS - COLOR EDIT
// ====================================================================

bool UIContext::colorEdit3(const std::string& label, float color[3]) {
    float color4[4] = {color[0], color[1], color[2], 1.0f};
    bool changed = colorEdit4(label, color4);
    
    if (changed) {
        color[0] = color4[0];
        color[1] = color4[1];
        color[2] = color4[2];
    }
    
    return changed;
}

bool UIContext::colorEdit4(const std::string& label, float color[4]) {
    if (!m_currentWindow) return false;
    
    float previewSize = m_style.fontSize + 10.0f;
    float labelWidth = label.length() * m_style.fontSize * 0.6f;
    float totalWidth = labelWidth + m_style.itemInnerSpacing + previewSize + 200.0f;
    
    UIRect rect = allocateSpace(totalWidth, previewSize);
    uint32_t id = getID(label);
    
    // Render label
    renderText(rect.x, rect.y + 5.0f, label, m_style.colorText);
    
    // Color preview
    UIRect previewRect = {
        rect.x + labelWidth + m_style.itemInnerSpacing,
        rect.y,
        previewSize,
        previewSize
    };
    
    uint32_t previewColor = m_renderer->packColor(
        static_cast<uint8_t>(color[0] * 255),
        static_cast<uint8_t>(color[1] * 255),
        static_cast<uint8_t>(color[2] * 255),
        static_cast<uint8_t>(color[3] * 255)
    );
    
    renderFrame(previewRect, previewColor, m_style.frameRounding);
    
    // RGB sliders
    bool changed = false;
    
    float sliderX = previewRect.x + previewRect.width + m_style.itemInnerSpacing;
    float sliderWidth = 150.0f;
    
    const char* labels[] = {"R", "G", "B", "A"};
    
    for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
        UIRect sliderRect = {
            sliderX,
            rect.y + i * (m_style.fontSize + 2.0f),
            sliderWidth,
            m_style.fontSize
        };
        
        pushID(i);
        UIState state = getWidgetState(sliderRect, getID(labels[i]));
        popID();
        
        if (state == UIState::Active) {
            float relativeX = m_input.mouseX - sliderRect.x;
            float t = std::clamp(relativeX / sliderRect.width, 0.0f, 1.0f);
            color[i] = t;
            changed = true;
        }
        
        // Render slider
        renderFrame(sliderRect, m_style.colorSlider, m_style.frameRounding);
        
        UIRect grabRect = {
            sliderRect.x + color[i] * sliderRect.width - 5.0f,
            sliderRect.y,
            10.0f,
            sliderRect.height
        };
        
        renderFrame(grabRect, m_style.colorSliderGrab, m_style.grabRounding);
    }
    
    advanceCursor(previewSize + m_style.itemSpacing);
    
    return changed;
}

bool UIContext::colorPicker3(const std::string& label, float color[3]) {
    float color4[4] = {color[0], color[1], color[2], 1.0f};
    bool changed = colorPicker4(label, color4);
    
    if (changed) {
        color[0] = color4[0];
        color[1] = color4[1];
        color[2] = color4[2];
    }
    
    return changed;
}

bool UIContext::colorPicker4(const std::string& label, float color[4]) {
    if (!m_currentWindow) return false;
    
    float pickerSize = 200.0f;
    UIRect rect = allocateSpace(pickerSize, pickerSize);
    uint32_t id = getID(label);
    
    // Convert RGB to HSV
    float r = color[0], g = color[1], b = color[2];
    float maxC = std::max({r, g, b});
    float minC = std::min({r, g, b});
    float delta = maxC - minC;
    
    float h = 0.0f, s = 0.0f, v = maxC;
    
    if (delta > 0.0f) {
        s = delta / maxC;
        
        if (maxC == r) {
            h = 60.0f * fmod((g - b) / delta, 6.0f);
        } else if (maxC == g) {
            h = 60.0f * ((b - r) / delta + 2.0f);
        } else {
            h = 60.0f * ((r - g) / delta + 4.0f);
        }
        
        if (h < 0.0f) h += 360.0f;
    }
    
    bool changed = false;
    
    // SV Square
    UIRect svRect = {rect.x, rect.y, pickerSize - 30.0f, pickerSize - 30.0f};
    
    if (isRectHovered(svRect) && m_input.mouseButtons[0]) {
        float relX = (m_input.mouseX - svRect.x) / svRect.width;
        float relY = (m_input.mouseY - svRect.y) / svRect.height;
        
        s = std::clamp(relX, 0.0f, 1.0f);
        v = std::clamp(1.0f - relY, 0.0f, 1.0f);
        
        changed = true;
    }
    
    // Hue Bar
    UIRect hueRect = {
        rect.x + pickerSize - 25.0f,
        rect.y,
        20.0f,
        pickerSize - 30.0f
    };
    
    if (isRectHovered(hueRect) && m_input.mouseButtons[0]) {
        float relY = (m_input.mouseY - hueRect.y) / hueRect.height;
        h = std::clamp(relY * 360.0f, 0.0f, 360.0f);
        changed = true;
    }
    
    // Convert HSV back to RGB
    if (changed) {
        float c = v * s;
        float x = c * (1.0f - std::abs(fmod(h / 60.0f, 2.0f) - 1.0f));
        float m = v - c;
        
        float r1, g1, b1;
        
        if (h < 60.0f) {
            r1 = c; g1 = x; b1 = 0;
        } else if (h < 120.0f) {
            r1 = x; g1 = c; b1 = 0;
        } else if (h < 180.0f) {
            r1 = 0; g1 = c; b1 = x;
        } else if (h < 240.0f) {
            r1 = 0; g1 = x; b1 = c;
        } else if (h < 300.0f) {
            r1 = x; g1 = 0; b1 = c;
        } else {
            r1 = c; g1 = 0; b1 = x;
        }
        
        color[0] = r1 + m;
        color[1] = g1 + m;
        color[2] = b1 + m;
    }
    
    // Render SV square
    for (int y = 0; y < static_cast<int>(svRect.height); y++) {
        for (int x = 0; x < static_cast<int>(svRect.width); x++) {
            float s_pixel = x / svRect.width;
            float v_pixel = 1.0f - (y / svRect.height);
            
            // HSV to RGB for this pixel
            float c = v_pixel * s_pixel;
            float hh = h / 60.0f;
            float xx = c * (1.0f - std::abs(fmod(hh, 2.0f) - 1.0f));
            float m = v_pixel - c;
            
            float r1, g1, b1;
            if (hh < 1) { r1 = c; g1 = xx; b1 = 0; }
            else if (hh < 2) { r1 = xx; g1 = c; b1 = 0; }
            else if (hh < 3) { r1 = 0; g1 = c; b1 = xx; }
            else if (hh < 4) { r1 = 0; g1 = xx; b1 = c; }
            else if (hh < 5) { r1 = xx; g1 = 0; b1 = c; }
            else { r1 = c; g1 = 0; b1 = xx; }
            
            uint32_t pixelColor = m_renderer->packColor(
                static_cast<uint8_t>((r1 + m) * 255),
                static_cast<uint8_t>((g1 + m) * 255),
                static_cast<uint8_t>((b1 + m) * 255),
                255
            );
            
            m_renderer->setPixel(
                static_cast<int>(svRect.x + x),
                static_cast<int>(svRect.y + y),
                pixelColor
            );
        }
    }
    
    // Render hue bar
    for (int y = 0; y < static_cast<int>(hueRect.height); y++) {
        float hue = (y / hueRect.height) * 360.0f;
        
        float c = 1.0f;
        float hh = hue / 60.0f;
        float x = c * (1.0f - std::abs(fmod(hh, 2.0f) - 1.0f));
        
        float r1, g1, b1;
        if (hh < 1) { r1 = c; g1 = x; b1 = 0; }
        else if (hh < 2) { r1 = x; g1 = c; b1 = 0; }
        else if (hh < 3) { r1 = 0; g1 = c; b1 = x; }
        else if (hh < 4) { r1 = 0; g1 = x; b1 = c; }
        else if (hh < 5) { r1 = x; g1 = 0; b1 = c; }
        else { r1 = c; g1 = 0; b1 = x; }
        
        uint32_t hueColor = m_renderer->packColor(
            static_cast<uint8_t>(r1 * 255),
            static_cast<uint8_t>(g1 * 255),
            static_cast<uint8_t>(b1 * 255),
            255
        );
        
        m_renderer->fillRect(
            static_cast<int>(hueRect.x),
            static_cast<int>(hueRect.y + y),
            static_cast<int>(hueRect.width),
            1,
            hueColor
        );
    }
    
    advanceCursor(pickerSize + m_style.itemSpacing);
    
    return changed;
}

// ====================================================================
// WIDGETS - RADIO BUTTON
// ====================================================================

bool UIContext::radioButton(const std::string& label, int* value, int buttonValue) {
    if (!m_currentWindow || !value) return false;
    
    float radioSize = m_style.fontSize;
    float totalWidth = radioSize + m_style.itemInnerSpacing + label.length() * m_style.fontSize * 0.6f;
    
    UIRect rect = allocateSpace(totalWidth, radioSize);
    uint32_t id = getID(label);
    
    UIState state = getWidgetState(rect, id);
    
    bool changed = false;
    
    if (state == UIState::Active && m_input.mouseButtonsClicked[0]) {
        *value = buttonValue;
        changed = true;
    }
    
    bool selected = (*value == buttonValue);
    
    // Render radio circle
    UIRect circleRect = {rect.x, rect.y, radioSize, radioSize};
    
    uint32_t circleColor = (state == UIState::Hovered) ? m_style.colorButtonHovered : m_style.colorButton;
    
    m_renderer->drawCircle(
        static_cast<int>(circleRect.x + circleRect.width / 2),
        static_cast<int>(circleRect.y + circleRect.height / 2),
        static_cast<int>(radioSize / 2),
        circleColor
    );
    
    if (selected) {
        m_renderer->fillCircle(
            static_cast<int>(circleRect.x + circleRect.width / 2),
            static_cast<int>(circleRect.y + circleRect.height / 2),
            static_cast<int>(radioSize / 4),
            m_style.colorCheckboxCheck
        );
    }
    
    // Render label
    renderText(rect.x + radioSize + m_style.itemInnerSpacing, rect.y, label, m_style.colorText);
    
    advanceCursor(radioSize + m_style.itemSpacing);
    
    return changed;
}

// ====================================================================
// WIDGETS - TREE NODE
// ====================================================================

bool UIContext::treeNode(const std::string& label) {
    if (!m_currentWindow) return false;
    
    float arrowSize = m_style.fontSize;
    float totalWidth = m_currentWindow->contentRect.width;
    
    UIRect rect = allocateSpace(totalWidth, arrowSize);
    uint32_t id = getID(label);
    
    // Get or create tree state
    static std::unordered_map<uint32_t, bool> treeStates;
    bool& opened = treeStates[id];
    
    UIState state = getWidgetState(rect, id);
    
    if (state == UIState::Active && m_input.mouseButtonsClicked[0]) {
        opened = !opened;
    }
    
    // Render arrow
    const char* arrow = opened ? "v" : ">";
    renderText(rect.x, rect.y, arrow, m_style.colorText);
    
    // Render label
    renderText(rect.x + arrowSize, rect.y, label, m_style.colorText);
    
    advanceCursor(arrowSize + m_style.itemSpacing);
    
    if (opened) {
        indent();
    }
    
    return opened;
}

void UIContext::treePop() {
    unindent();
}

bool UIContext::collapsingHeader(const std::string& label) {
    return treeNode(label);
}

// ====================================================================
// WIDGETS - COMBO BOX
// ====================================================================

bool UIContext::beginCombo(const std::string& label, const std::string& preview) {
    if (!m_currentWindow) return false;
    
    float comboWidth = 200.0f;
    float labelWidth = label.length() * m_style.fontSize * 0.6f;
    float totalWidth = labelWidth + m_style.itemInnerSpacing + comboWidth;
    
    UIRect rect = allocateSpace(totalWidth, m_style.fontSize + 10.0f);
    uint32_t id = getID(label);
    
    // Render label
    renderText(rect.x, rect.y + 5.0f, label, m_style.colorText);
    
    // Combo rect
    UIRect comboRect = {
        rect.x + labelWidth + m_style.itemInnerSpacing,
        rect.y,
        comboWidth,
        m_style.fontSize + 10.0f
    };
    
    UIState state = getWidgetState(comboRect, id);
    
    bool clicked = (state == UIState::Active && m_input.mouseButtonsClicked[0]);
    
    if (clicked) {
        m_comboOpen = !m_comboOpen;
        m_comboID = id;
    }
    
    // Render combo button
    renderButton(comboRect, preview, state);
    
    // Render arrow
    renderText(comboRect.x + comboRect.width - 20.0f, comboRect.y + 5.0f, "v", m_style.colorText);
    
    advanceCursor(rect.height + m_style.itemSpacing);
    
    // If opened, prepare popup
    if (m_comboOpen && m_comboID == id) {
        // Create a mini window for combo items
        pushID("##combopopup");
        return true;
    }
    
    return false;
}

void UIContext::endCombo() {
    popID();
    m_comboOpen = false;
}

bool UIContext::comboItem(const std::string& label, bool selected) {
    if (!m_currentWindow) return false;
    
    float itemWidth = 200.0f;
    UIRect rect = allocateSpace(itemWidth, m_style.fontSize + 5.0f);
    uint32_t id = getID(label);
    
    UIState state = getWidgetState(rect, id);
    bool clicked = (state == UIState::Active && m_input.mouseButtonsClicked[0]);
    
    uint32_t bgColor = selected ? m_style.colorButtonActive :
                       (state == UIState::Hovered ? m_style.colorButtonHovered : m_style.colorButton);
    
    renderFrame(rect, bgColor, m_style.frameRounding);
    renderText(rect.x + 5.0f, rect.y + 2.5f, label, m_style.colorText);
    
    advanceCursor(rect.height);
    
    if (clicked) {
        m_comboOpen = false;
    }
    
    return clicked;
}

// ====================================================================
// WIDGETS - LIST BOX
// ====================================================================

bool UIContext::listBox(const std::string& label, int* selectedIndex,
                       const std::vector<std::string>& items, int heightInItems) {
    
    if (!m_currentWindow || !selectedIndex) return false;
    
    if (heightInItems < 0) heightInItems = std::min(7, static_cast<int>(items.size()));
    
    float itemHeight = m_style.fontSize + 5.0f;
    float listHeight = itemHeight * heightInItems;
    float listWidth = 200.0f;
    
    UIRect rect = allocateSpace(listWidth, listHeight);
    
    // Render frame
    renderFrame(rect, m_style.colorInputBg, m_style.frameRounding);
    
    bool changed = false;
    
    // Render items
    for (size_t i = 0; i < items.size(); i++) {
        UIRect itemRect = {
            rect.x + 2.0f,
            rect.y + 2.0f + i * itemHeight,
            listWidth - 4.0f,
            itemHeight - 2.0f
        };
        
        // Clipping
        if (itemRect.y + itemRect.height > rect.y + rect.height) break;
        
        pushID(static_cast<int>(i));
        uint32_t id = getID(items[i]);
        popID();
        
        UIState state = getWidgetState(itemRect, id);
        bool selected = (static_cast<int>(i) == *selectedIndex);
        
        if (state == UIState::Active && m_input.mouseButtonsClicked[0]) {
            *selectedIndex = static_cast<int>(i);
            changed = true;
        }
        
        uint32_t itemColor = selected ? m_style.colorButtonActive :
                            (state == UIState::Hovered ? m_style.colorButtonHovered : 0x00000000);
        
        if (itemColor != 0) {
            renderFrame(itemRect, itemColor, 0.0f);
        }
        
        renderText(itemRect.x + 5.0f, itemRect.y + 2.5f, items[i], m_style.colorText);
    }
    
    advanceCursor(listHeight + m_style.itemSpacing);
    
    return changed;
}
```

# PARTIE 15 : ImGui Menu + Modal + Docking + Rendering

## 1. ImGui_Menu.cpp - Système de Menu

```cpp
// ImGui_Menu.cpp
#include "ImGui.hpp"
#include "Renderer.hpp"

namespace nk {

// ====================================================================
// MENU - MAIN MENU BAR
// ====================================================================

bool UIContext::beginMainMenuBar() {
    if (m_menuBarActive) return false;
    
    // Create a special window for the menu bar
    UIRect menuBarRect = {
        0.0f,
        0.0f,
        static_cast<float>(m_renderer->getWidth()),
        25.0f
    };
    
    // Render menu bar background
    renderFrame(menuBarRect, m_style.colorWindowBg, 0.0f);
    
    // Setup cursor for menu items
    if (!m_currentWindow) {
        m_currentWindow = new UIWindow();
        m_currentWindow->title = "##MainMenuBar";
        m_currentWindow->rect = menuBarRect;
        m_currentWindow->contentRect = menuBarRect;
        m_currentWindow->cursorX = 5.0f;
        m_currentWindow->cursorY = 5.0f;
    }
    
    m_menuBarActive = true;
    return true;
}

void UIContext::endMainMenuBar() {
    if (!m_menuBarActive) return;
    
    // Cleanup temporary window
    if (m_currentWindow && m_currentWindow->title == "##MainMenuBar") {
        delete m_currentWindow;
        m_currentWindow = nullptr;
    }
    
    m_menuBarActive = false;
}

bool UIContext::beginMenuBar() {
    if (!m_currentWindow) return false;
    
    // Create a menu bar inside the current window
    UIRect menuBarRect = {
        m_currentWindow->rect.x,
        m_currentWindow->rect.y + 25.0f,
        m_currentWindow->rect.width,
        25.0f
    };
    
    renderFrame(menuBarRect, m_style.colorHeader, 0.0f);
    
    // Save current cursor and setup for menu
    float savedCursorY = m_currentWindow->cursorY;
    m_currentWindow->cursorX = menuBarRect.x + 5.0f;
    m_currentWindow->cursorY = menuBarRect.y + 5.0f;
    
    m_menuBarActive = true;
    return true;
}

void UIContext::endMenuBar() {
    if (!m_menuBarActive) return;
    
    m_menuBarActive = false;
}

// ====================================================================
// MENU - MENU ITEMS
// ====================================================================

bool UIContext::beginMenu(const std::string& label) {
    if (!m_currentWindow) return false;
    
    float menuWidth = label.length() * m_style.fontSize * 0.6f + 20.0f;
    UIRect rect = allocateSpace(menuWidth, m_style.fontSize + 5.0f);
    uint32_t id = getID(label);
    
    UIState state = getWidgetState(rect, id);
    
    bool isOpen = false;
    
    // Check if this menu is in the menu stack
    for (uint32_t menuId : m_menuStack) {
        if (menuId == id) {
            isOpen = true;
            break;
        }
    }
    
    // Handle click to open/close
    if (state == UIState::Active && m_input.mouseButtonsClicked[0]) {
        if (isOpen) {
            // Close this menu and all children
            auto it = std::find(m_menuStack.begin(), m_menuStack.end(), id);
            if (it != m_menuStack.end()) {
                m_menuStack.erase(it, m_menuStack.end());
            }
            isOpen = false;
        } else {
            // Close siblings and open this menu
            if (!m_menuStack.empty()) {
                m_menuStack.pop_back();
            }
            m_menuStack.push_back(id);
            isOpen = true;
        }
    }
    
    // Render menu button
    uint32_t bgColor = isOpen ? m_style.colorHeaderActive :
                       (state == UIState::Hovered ? m_style.colorHeaderHovered : 0x00000000);
    
    if (bgColor != 0) {
        renderFrame(rect, bgColor, m_style.frameRounding);
    }
    
    renderText(rect.x + 10.0f, rect.y + 2.5f, label, m_style.colorText);
    
    // If in menu bar, advance horizontally
    if (m_menuBarActive) {
        m_currentWindow->cursorX += menuWidth;
    } else {
        advanceCursor(rect.height + m_style.itemSpacing);
    }
    
    if (isOpen) {
        // Create popup window for menu items
        pushID("##menupopup");
        
        // Position popup below the menu button
        float popupX = rect.x;
        float popupY = rect.y + rect.height;
        
        // Store popup position for menu items
        m_currentWindow->cursorX = popupX + 5.0f;
        m_currentWindow->cursorY = popupY + 5.0f;
        
        // Render popup background (will be filled by menu items)
        return true;
    }
    
    return false;
}

void UIContext::endMenu() {
    popID();
    
    // Remove from menu stack if this was the last item
    if (!m_menuStack.empty()) {
        m_menuStack.pop_back();
    }
}

bool UIContext::menuItem(const std::string& label, const char* shortcut,
                        bool selected, bool enabled) {
    
    if (!m_currentWindow) return false;
    
    float itemWidth = 200.0f;
    float itemHeight = m_style.fontSize + 5.0f;
    
    UIRect rect = allocateSpace(itemWidth, itemHeight);
    uint32_t id = getID(label);
    
    UIState state = enabled ? getWidgetState(rect, id) : UIState::Disabled;
    
    bool clicked = false;
    
    if (enabled && state == UIState::Active && m_input.mouseButtonsClicked[0]) {
        clicked = true;
        
        // Close all menus
        m_menuStack.clear();
    }
    
    // Render item background
    uint32_t bgColor = selected ? m_style.colorHeaderActive :
                       (state == UIState::Hovered ? m_style.colorHeaderHovered : 0x00000000);
    
    if (bgColor != 0) {
        renderFrame(rect, bgColor, 0.0f);
    }
    
    // Render label
    uint32_t textColor = enabled ? m_style.colorText : m_style.colorTextDisabled;
    renderText(rect.x + 10.0f, rect.y + 2.5f, label, textColor);
    
    // Render shortcut
    if (shortcut) {
        float shortcutWidth = std::strlen(shortcut) * m_style.fontSize * 0.6f;
        renderText(rect.x + rect.width - shortcutWidth - 10.0f, rect.y + 2.5f, 
                  shortcut, textColor);
    }
    
    // Render checkmark if selected
    if (selected) {
        renderText(rect.x + 2.0f, rect.y + 2.5f, "✓", m_style.colorCheckboxCheck);
    }
    
    advanceCursor(itemHeight);
    
    return clicked;
}

// ====================================================================
// TOOLTIPS
// ====================================================================

void UIContext::setTooltip(const std::string& text) {
    if (!m_lastItemHovered) return;
    
    // Create a small popup at mouse position
    float tooltipWidth = text.length() * m_style.fontSize * 0.6f + 10.0f;
    float tooltipHeight = m_style.fontSize + 10.0f;
    
    UIRect tooltipRect = {
        m_input.mouseX + 10.0f,
        m_input.mouseY + 10.0f,
        tooltipWidth,
        tooltipHeight
    };
    
    // Render tooltip background
    renderFrame(tooltipRect, m_style.colorWindowBg, m_style.windowRounding);
    
    // Border
    m_renderer->drawRect(
        static_cast<int>(tooltipRect.x),
        static_cast<int>(tooltipRect.y),
        static_cast<int>(tooltipRect.width),
        static_cast<int>(tooltipRect.height),
        m_style.colorWindowBorder
    );
    
    // Text
    renderText(tooltipRect.x + 5.0f, tooltipRect.y + 5.0f, text, m_style.colorText);
}

void UIContext::beginTooltip() {
    if (!m_lastItemHovered) return;
    
    // Similar to setTooltip but allows custom content
    pushID("##tooltip");
}

void UIContext::endTooltip() {
    popID();
}

} // namespace nk
```

## 2. ImGui_Modal.cpp - Fenêtres Modales et Popups

```cpp
// ImGui_Modal.cpp
#include "ImGui.hpp"
#include "Renderer.hpp"

namespace nk {

// ====================================================================
// MODAL WINDOW FLAGS
// ====================================================================

enum UIWindowFlags {
    UIWindowFlags_None              = 0,
    UIWindowFlags_NoTitleBar        = 1 << 0,
    UIWindowFlags_NoResize          = 1 << 1,
    UIWindowFlags_NoMove            = 1 << 2,
    UIWindowFlags_NoScrollbar       = 1 << 3,
    UIWindowFlags_NoCollapse        = 1 << 4,
    UIWindowFlags_NoClose           = 1 << 5,
    UIWindowFlags_Modal             = 1 << 6,
    UIWindowFlags_Popup             = 1 << 7,
    UIWindowFlags_ChildWindow       = 1 << 8,
    UIWindowFlags_AlwaysAutoResize  = 1 << 9,
    UIWindowFlags_NoBackground      = 1 << 10,
    UIWindowFlags_NoBringToFront    = 1 << 11
};

// Étendre UIWindow pour supporter les flags
struct UIWindowEx : public UIWindow {
    uint32_t flags = UIWindowFlags_None;
    bool isModal = false;
    bool isPopup = false;
    UIWindow* parentWindow = nullptr;
    bool detached = false; // Pour les fenêtres qui peuvent être détachées
};

// ====================================================================
// MODAL - BEGIN MODAL WINDOW
// ====================================================================

bool UIContext::beginModalWindow(const std::string& title, bool* open, uint32_t flags) {
    if (!beginWindow(title, open, -1, -1, 400, 300)) {
        return false;
    }
    
    UIWindowEx* modalWindow = static_cast<UIWindowEx*>(m_currentWindow);
    modalWindow->flags = flags | UIWindowFlags_Modal;
    modalWindow->isModal = true;
    
    // Center on screen
    if (modalWindow->rect.x < 0) {
        modalWindow->rect.x = (m_renderer->getWidth() - modalWindow->rect.width) / 2.0f;
        modalWindow->rect.y = (m_renderer->getHeight() - modalWindow->rect.height) / 2.0f;
    }
    
    // Render modal backdrop (dimmed background)
    m_renderer->fillRect(
        0, 0,
        m_renderer->getWidth(),
        m_renderer->getHeight(),
        0x80000000 // Semi-transparent black
    );
    
    // Block interaction with other windows
    m_activeID = hashString(title.c_str());
    
    return true;
}

void UIContext::endModalWindow() {
    if (!m_currentWindow) return;
    
    UIWindowEx* modalWindow = static_cast<UIWindowEx*>(m_currentWindow);
    modalWindow->isModal = false;
    
    endWindow();
    
    m_activeID = 0;
}

// ====================================================================
// POPUP
// ====================================================================

void UIContext::openPopup(const std::string& id) {
    m_popupOpen = id;
}

void UIContext::closeCurrentPopup() {
    m_popupOpen.clear();
}

bool UIContext::beginPopup(const std::string& id) {
    if (m_popupOpen != id) {
        return false;
    }
    
    // Create a popup window at mouse position
    float popupWidth = 300.0f;
    float popupHeight = 200.0f;
    
    // Position near mouse but keep on screen
    float popupX = m_input.mouseX;
    float popupY = m_input.mouseY;
    
    if (popupX + popupWidth > m_renderer->getWidth()) {
        popupX = m_renderer->getWidth() - popupWidth;
    }
    
    if (popupY + popupHeight > m_renderer->getHeight()) {
        popupY = m_renderer->getHeight() - popupHeight;
    }
    
    if (!beginWindow("##popup_" + id, nullptr, popupX, popupY, popupWidth, popupHeight)) {
        return false;
    }
    
    UIWindowEx* popupWindow = static_cast<UIWindowEx*>(m_currentWindow);
    popupWindow->flags = UIWindowFlags_Popup | UIWindowFlags_NoTitleBar;
    popupWindow->isPopup = true;
    
    // Close popup if clicked outside
    if (m_input.mouseButtonsClicked[0]) {
        if (!isRectHovered(m_currentWindow->rect)) {
            closeCurrentPopup();
            endWindow();
            return false;
        }
    }
    
    return true;
}

void UIContext::endPopup() {
    if (!m_currentWindow) return;
    
    UIWindowEx* popupWindow = static_cast<UIWindowEx*>(m_currentWindow);
    popupWindow->isPopup = false;
    
    endWindow();
}

// ====================================================================
// CONTEXT MENU (Right-click popup)
// ====================================================================

bool UIContext::beginPopupContextItem(const std::string& id) {
    if (!m_lastItemHovered) return false;
    
    if (m_input.mouseButtonsClicked[1]) { // Right click
        openPopup(id);
    }
    
    return beginPopup(id);
}

bool UIContext::beginPopupContextWindow(const std::string& id) {
    if (!m_currentWindow) return false;
    
    if (isRectHovered(m_currentWindow->contentRect) && m_input.mouseButtonsClicked[1]) {
        openPopup(id);
    }
    
    return beginPopup(id);
}

// ====================================================================
// CHILD WINDOW (Window inside window)
// ====================================================================

bool UIContext::beginChild(const std::string& id, float width, float height, 
                          bool border, uint32_t flags) {
    
    if (!m_currentWindow) return false;
    
    if (width <= 0) width = m_currentWindow->contentRect.width;
    if (height <= 0) height = 200.0f;
    
    UIRect childRect = allocateSpace(width, height);
    
    // Create child window
    UIWindowEx* childWindow = new UIWindowEx();
    childWindow->title = "##child_" + id;
    childWindow->id = getID(id);
    childWindow->rect = childRect;
    childWindow->contentRect = {
        childRect.x + (border ? 1.0f : 0.0f),
        childRect.y + (border ? 1.0f : 0.0f),
        childRect.width - (border ? 2.0f : 0.0f),
        childRect.height - (border ? 2.0f : 0.0f)
    };
    childWindow->flags = flags | UIWindowFlags_ChildWindow;
    childWindow->parentWindow = m_currentWindow;
    
    // Render child background and border
    if (border) {
        renderFrame(childRect, m_style.colorChildBg, m_style.childRounding);
        
        m_renderer->drawRect(
            static_cast<int>(childRect.x),
            static_cast<int>(childRect.y),
            static_cast<int>(childRect.width),
            static_cast<int>(childRect.height),
            m_style.colorWindowBorder
        );
    }
    
    // Push child window
    m_currentWindow = childWindow;
    
    m_currentWindow->cursorX = m_currentWindow->contentRect.x;
    m_currentWindow->cursorY = m_currentWindow->contentRect.y;
    
    return true;
}

void UIContext::endChild() {
    if (!m_currentWindow) return;
    
    UIWindowEx* childWindow = static_cast<UIWindowEx*>(m_currentWindow);
    
    if (!(childWindow->flags & UIWindowFlags_ChildWindow)) {
        return; // Not a child window
    }
    
    // Pop back to parent
    m_currentWindow = childWindow->parentWindow;
    
    delete childWindow;
    
    // Advance cursor in parent
    if (m_currentWindow) {
        advanceCursor(0); // Already advanced by allocateSpace
    }
}

// ====================================================================
// DETACHABLE WINDOW (Can be torn off)
// ====================================================================

bool UIContext::beginDetachableWindow(const std::string& title, bool* detached,
                                     float x, float y, float width, float height) {
    
    if (!beginWindow(title, nullptr, x, y, width, height)) {
        return false;
    }
    
    UIWindowEx* window = static_cast<UIWindowEx*>(m_currentWindow);
    
    if (detached) {
        window->detached = *detached;
    }
    
    // Add a detach button in title bar
    UIRect detachButton = {
        window->rect.x + window->rect.width - 60.0f,
        window->rect.y + 5.0f,
        20.0f,
        15.0f
    };
    
    pushID("##detach");
    uint32_t detachID = getCurrentID();
    popID();
    
    UIState detachState = getWidgetState(detachButton, detachID);
    
    if (detachState == UIState::Active && m_input.mouseButtonsClicked[0]) {
        window->detached = !window->detached;
        
        if (detached) {
            *detached = window->detached;
        }
    }
    
    // Render detach button
    renderButton(detachButton, window->detached ? "⬇" : "⬆", detachState);
    
    // If detached, create a native window (platform-specific)
    if (window->detached) {
        // TODO: Create actual OS window using Window API
        // For now, just render as a floating window
        window->zOrder = 9999; // Keep on top
    }
    
    return true;
}

// ====================================================================
// MESSAGE BOX / DIALOG
// ====================================================================

enum class MessageBoxButtons {
    Ok,
    OkCancel,
    YesNo,
    YesNoCancel
};

enum class MessageBoxResult {
    None,
    Ok,
    Cancel,
    Yes,
    No
};

class MessageBox {
public:
    static MessageBoxResult show(UIContext& ctx, const std::string& title,
                                const std::string& message, MessageBoxButtons buttons) {
        
        static MessageBoxResult result = MessageBoxResult::None;
        static bool open = true;
        
        if (!open) {
            result = MessageBoxResult::None;
            open = true;
            return MessageBoxResult::None;
        }
        
        if (!ctx.beginModalWindow(title, &open, UIWindowFlags_NoResize)) {
            return MessageBoxResult::None;
        }
        
        ctx.text(message);
        ctx.spacing(20.0f);
        
        float buttonWidth = 100.0f;
        
        switch (buttons) {
            case MessageBoxButtons::Ok:
                if (ctx.button("OK", buttonWidth)) {
                    result = MessageBoxResult::Ok;
                    open = false;
                }
                break;
                
            case MessageBoxButtons::OkCancel:
                if (ctx.button("OK", buttonWidth)) {
                    result = MessageBoxResult::Ok;
                    open = false;
                }
                ctx.sameLine();
                if (ctx.button("Cancel", buttonWidth)) {
                    result = MessageBoxResult::Cancel;
                    open = false;
                }
                break;
                
            case MessageBoxButtons::YesNo:
                if (ctx.button("Yes", buttonWidth)) {
                    result = MessageBoxResult::Yes;
                    open = false;
                }
                ctx.sameLine();
                if (ctx.button("No", buttonWidth)) {
                    result = MessageBoxResult::No;
                    open = false;
                }
                break;
                
            case MessageBoxButtons::YesNoCancel:
                if (ctx.button("Yes", buttonWidth)) {
                    result = MessageBoxResult::Yes;
                    open = false;
                }
                ctx.sameLine();
                if (ctx.button("No", buttonWidth)) {
                    result = MessageBoxResult::No;
                    open = false;
                }
                ctx.sameLine();
                if (ctx.button("Cancel", buttonWidth)) {
                    result = MessageBoxResult::Cancel;
                    open = false;
                }
                break;
        }
        
        ctx.endModalWindow();
        
        return result;
    }
};

} // namespace nk
```

## 3. ImGui_Docking.cpp - Système de Docking

```cpp
// ImGui_Docking.cpp
#include "ImGui.hpp"
#include "Renderer.hpp"
#include <algorithm>

namespace nk {

// ====================================================================
// DOCK NODE (Zone de docking)
// ====================================================================

enum class DockSplit {
    None,
    Left,
    Right,
    Top,
    Bottom
};

struct DockNode {
    uint32_t id = 0;
    UIRect rect;
    
    DockNode* parent = nullptr;
    DockNode* childLeft = nullptr;
    DockNode* childRight = nullptr;
    
    DockSplit split = DockSplit::None;
    float splitRatio = 0.5f;
    
    std::vector<uint32_t> dockedWindows; // IDs of windows in this node
    int activeTabIndex = 0;
    
    bool isLeaf() const {
        return childLeft == nullptr && childRight == nullptr;
    }
    
    bool isEmpty() const {
        return dockedWindows.empty();
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// DOCK SPACE (Container pour tous les dock nodes)
// ====================================================================

class DockSpace {
public:
    DockSpace() {
        m_rootNode = new DockNode();
        m_rootNode->id = 1;
        m_nextNodeId = 2;
    }
    
    ~DockSpace() {
        destroyNode(m_rootNode);
    }
    
    void setRect(const UIRect& rect) {
        m_rootNode->rect = rect;
        updateLayout(m_rootNode);
    }
    
    DockNode* findNodeForWindow(uint32_t windowId) {
        return findNodeForWindowRecursive(m_rootNode, windowId);
    }
    
    DockNode* findNodeAt(float x, float y) {
        return findNodeAtRecursive(m_rootNode, x, y);
    }
    
    void dockWindow(uint32_t windowId, DockNode* node) {
        if (!node) return;
        
        // Remove from previous node
        undockWindow(windowId);
        
        // Add to new node
        node->dockedWindows.push_back(windowId);
        node->activeTabIndex = node->dockedWindows.size() - 1;
    }
    
    void undockWindow(uint32_t windowId) {
        DockNode* node = findNodeForWindow(windowId);
        if (!node) return;
        
        auto it = std::find(node->dockedWindows.begin(), node->dockedWindows.end(), windowId);
        if (it != node->dockedWindows.end()) {
            node->dockedWindows.erase(it);
            
            if (node->activeTabIndex >= static_cast<int>(node->dockedWindows.size())) {
                node->activeTabIndex = std::max(0, static_cast<int>(node->dockedWindows.size()) - 1);
            }
        }
    }
    
    DockNode* splitNode(DockNode* node, DockSplit split, float ratio = 0.5f) {
        if (!node || !node->isLeaf()) return nullptr;
        
        node->split = split;
        node->splitRatio = ratio;
        
        node->childLeft = new DockNode();
        node->childLeft->id = m_nextNodeId++;
        node->childLeft->parent = node;
        
        node->childRight = new DockNode();
        node->childRight->id = m_nextNodeId++;
        node->childRight->parent = node;
        
        // Move windows to left child
        node->childLeft->dockedWindows = node->dockedWindows;
        node->childLeft->activeTabIndex = node->activeTabIndex;
        node->dockedWindows.clear();
        
        updateLayout(node);
        
        return node->childRight;
    }
    
    void render(UIContext* ctx) {
        renderNode(ctx, m_rootNode);
    }
    
    DockNode* getRootNode() { return m_rootNode; }
    
private:
    void destroyNode(DockNode* node) {
        if (!node) return;
        
        destroyNode(node->childLeft);
        destroyNode(node->childRight);
        
        delete node;
    }
    
    DockNode* findNodeForWindowRecursive(DockNode* node, uint32_t windowId) {
        if (!node) return nullptr;
        
        for (uint32_t id : node->dockedWindows) {
            if (id == windowId) return node;
        }
        
        DockNode* result = findNodeForWindowRecursive(node->childLeft, windowId);
        if (result) return result;
        
        return findNodeForWindowRecursive(node->childRight, windowId);
    }
    
    DockNode* findNodeAtRecursive(DockNode* node, float x, float y) {
        if (!node) return nullptr;
        
        if (!node->rect.contains(x, y)) return nullptr;
        
        if (node->isLeaf()) {
            return node;
        }
        
        DockNode* result = findNodeAtRecursive(node->childLeft, x, y);
        if (result) return result;
        
        return findNodeAtRecursive(node->childRight, x, y);
    }
    
    void updateLayout(DockNode* node) {
        if (!node || node->isLeaf()) return;
        
        if (node->split == DockSplit::Left || node->split == DockSplit::Right) {
            // Vertical split
            float leftWidth = node->rect.width * node->splitRatio;
            
            node->childLeft->rect = {
                node->rect.x,
                node->rect.y,
                leftWidth,
                node->rect.height
            };
            
            node->childRight->rect = {
                node->rect.x + leftWidth,
                node->rect.y,
                node->rect.width - leftWidth,
                node->rect.height
            };
        } else {
            // Horizontal split
            float topHeight = node->rect.height * node->splitRatio;
            
            node->childLeft->rect = {
                node->rect.x,
                node->rect.y,
                node->rect.width,
                topHeight
            };
            
            node->childRight->rect = {
                node->rect.x,
                node->rect.y + topHeight,
                node->rect.width,
                node->rect.height - topHeight
            };
        }
        
        updateLayout(node->childLeft);
        updateLayout(node->childRight);
    }
    
    void renderNode(UIContext* ctx, DockNode* node) {
        if (!node) return;
        
        if (node->isLeaf()) {
            renderLeafNode(ctx, node);
        } else {
            // Render split divider
            renderSplitDivider(ctx, node);
            
            renderNode(ctx, node->childLeft);
            renderNode(ctx, node->childRight);
        }
    }
    
    void renderLeafNode(UIContext* ctx, DockNode* node) {
        if (node->isEmpty()) {
            // Render empty dock zone
            ctx->getRenderer()->fillRect(
                static_cast<int>(node->rect.x),
                static_cast<int>(node->rect.y),
                static_cast<int>(node->rect.width),
                static_cast<int>(node->rect.height),
                ctx->getStyle().colorWindowBg
            );
            
            ctx->getRenderer()->drawRect(
                static_cast<int>(node->rect.x),
                static_cast<int>(node->rect.y),
                static_cast<int>(node->rect.width),
                static_cast<int>(node->rect.height),
                ctx->getStyle().colorWindowBorder
            );
            
            return;
        }
        
        // Render tab bar
        float tabHeight = 25.0f;
        UIRect tabBarRect = {
            node->rect.x,
            node->rect.y,
            node->rect.width,
            tabHeight
        };
        
        ctx->getRenderer()->fillRect(
            static_cast<int>(tabBarRect.x),
            static_cast<int>(tabBarRect.y),
            static_cast<int>(tabBarRect.width),
            static_cast<int>(tabBarRect.height),
            ctx->getStyle().colorHeader
        );
        
        // Render tabs
        float tabX = tabBarRect.x;
        
        for (size_t i = 0; i < node->dockedWindows.size(); i++) {
            std::string tabLabel = "Window " + std::to_string(node->dockedWindows[i]);
            float tabWidth = tabLabel.length() * ctx->getStyle().fontSize * 0.6f + 20.0f;
            
            UIRect tabRect = {tabX, tabBarRect.y, tabWidth, tabHeight};
            
            bool isActive = (static_cast<int>(i) == node->activeTabIndex);
            uint32_t tabColor = isActive ? ctx->getStyle().colorHeaderActive : 
                                          ctx->getStyle().colorHeader;
            
            ctx->renderFrame(tabRect, tabColor, 0.0f);
            ctx->renderText(tabX + 10.0f, tabBarRect.y + 5.0f, tabLabel, 
                          ctx->getStyle().colorText);
            
            tabX += tabWidth;
        }
        
        // Render content area
        UIRect contentRect = {
            node->rect.x,
            node->rect.y + tabHeight,
            node->rect.width,
            node->rect.height - tabHeight
        };
        
        // The actual window content will be rendered by the window itself
    }
    
    void renderSplitDivider(UIContext* ctx, DockNode* node) {
        UIRect dividerRect;
        
        if (node->split == DockSplit::Left || node->split == DockSplit::Right) {
            // Vertical divider
            float dividerX = node->rect.x + node->rect.width * node->splitRatio;
            dividerRect = {dividerX - 2.0f, node->rect.y, 4.0f, node->rect.height};
        } else {
            // Horizontal divider
            float dividerY = node->rect.y + node->rect.height * node->splitRatio;
            dividerRect = {node->rect.x, dividerY - 2.0f, node->rect.width, 4.0f};
        }
        
        ctx->getRenderer()->fillRect(
            static_cast<int>(dividerRect.x),
            static_cast<int>(dividerRect.y),
            static_cast<int>(dividerRect.width),
            static_cast<int>(dividerRect.height),
            ctx->getStyle().colorWindowBorder
        );
    }
    
    DockNode* m_rootNode;
    uint32_t m_nextNodeId;
};

// ====================================================================
// DOCK SPACE API
// ====================================================================

// Add to UIContext
static DockSpace* g_dockSpace = nullptr;

void UIContext::initializeDocking() {
    if (!g_dockSpace) {
        g_dockSpace = new DockSpace();
    }
}

void UIContext::shutdownDocking() {
    delete g_dockSpace;
    g_dockSpace = nullptr;
}

void UIContext::beginDockSpace(const std::string& id, const UIRect& rect) {
    if (!g_dockSpace) {
        initializeDocking();
    }
    
    g_dockSpace->setRect(rect);
}

void UIContext::endDockSpace() {
    if (g_dockSpace) {
        g_dockSpace->render(this);
    }
}

bool UIContext::beginDockableWindow(const std::string& title, bool* open) {
    uint32_t windowId = hashString(title.c_str());
    
    if (!g_dockSpace) {
        initializeDocking();
    }
    
    DockNode* node = g_dockSpace->findNodeForWindow(windowId);
    
    if (node) {
        // Window is docked
        // Render in the dock node's content area
        // (simplified - actual implementation would be more complex)
        return beginWindow(title, open);
    } else {
        // Window is floating
        return beginWindow(title, open);
    }
}

void UIContext::dockWindowTo(const std::string& windowTitle, DockSplit split) {
    if (!g_dockSpace) return;
    
    uint32_t windowId = hashString(windowTitle.c_str());
    DockNode* rootNode = g_dockSpace->getRootNode();
    
    if (split != DockSplit::None) {
        DockNode* newNode = g_dockSpace->splitNode(rootNode, split);
        if (newNode) {
            g_dockSpace->dockWindow(windowId, newNode);
        }
    } else {
        g_dockSpace->dockWindow(windowId, rootNode);
    }
}

} // namespace nk
```

Trop long ! Voulez-vous que je continue avec le **rendering implementation** (renderButton, renderSlider, renderFrame, etc.) ?

# PARTIE 16 : ImGui Rendering + Système de Thème Personnalisable

## 1. ImGui_Rendering.cpp - Implémentation du Rendering

```cpp
// ImGui_Rendering.cpp
#include "ImGui.hpp"
#include "Renderer.hpp"
#include "Font.hpp"
#include <cmath>

namespace nk {

// ====================================================================
// RENDERING HELPERS
// ====================================================================

UIRect UIContext::allocateSpace(float width, float height) {
    if (!m_currentWindow) {
        return {0, 0, 0, 0};
    }
    
    UIRect rect;
    
    if (m_sameLine) {
        // Continue on same line
        rect.x = m_currentWindow->cursorX;
        rect.y = m_currentWindow->cursorY;
        rect.width = width;
        rect.height = height;
        
        m_currentWindow->cursorX += width + m_style.itemSpacing;
        m_sameLine = false;
    } else {
        // New line
        rect.x = m_currentWindow->contentRect.x + m_indentLevel;
        rect.y = m_currentWindow->cursorY;
        rect.width = width;
        rect.height = height;
        
        m_currentWindow->cursorX = rect.x;
    }
    
    return rect;
}

void UIContext::advanceCursor(float height) {
    if (!m_currentWindow) return;
    
    if (!m_sameLine) {
        m_currentWindow->cursorY += height;
        m_currentWindow->cursorX = m_currentWindow->contentRect.x + m_indentLevel;
    }
}

UIState UIContext::getWidgetState(const UIRect& rect, uint32_t id) {
    bool hovered = isRectHovered(rect);
    bool active = (m_activeID == id);
    
    if (hovered) {
        m_hoveredID = id;
    }
    
    if (hovered && m_input.mouseButtonsClicked[0]) {
        m_activeID = id;
        active = true;
    }
    
    if (m_input.mouseButtonsReleased[0] && m_activeID == id) {
        m_activeID = 0;
    }
    
    if (active) return UIState::Active;
    if (hovered) return UIState::Hovered;
    return UIState::Normal;
}

bool UIContext::isRectHovered(const UIRect& rect) const {
    return rect.contains(m_input.mouseX, m_input.mouseY);
}

// ====================================================================
// RENDER FRAME (Base pour tous les widgets)
// ====================================================================

void UIContext::renderFrame(const UIRect& rect, uint32_t color, float rounding) {
    if (rounding > 0.0f) {
        // Rounded rectangle
        int cornerRadius = static_cast<int>(rounding);
        
        // Fill center
        m_renderer->fillRect(
            static_cast<int>(rect.x + cornerRadius),
            static_cast<int>(rect.y),
            static_cast<int>(rect.width - cornerRadius * 2),
            static_cast<int>(rect.height),
            color
        );
        
        m_renderer->fillRect(
            static_cast<int>(rect.x),
            static_cast<int>(rect.y + cornerRadius),
            static_cast<int>(rect.width),
            static_cast<int>(rect.height - cornerRadius * 2),
            color
        );
        
        // Corners (simplified - use circles)
        m_renderer->fillCircle(
            static_cast<int>(rect.x + cornerRadius),
            static_cast<int>(rect.y + cornerRadius),
            cornerRadius, color
        );
        
        m_renderer->fillCircle(
            static_cast<int>(rect.x + rect.width - cornerRadius),
            static_cast<int>(rect.y + cornerRadius),
            cornerRadius, color
        );
        
        m_renderer->fillCircle(
            static_cast<int>(rect.x + cornerRadius),
            static_cast<int>(rect.y + rect.height - cornerRadius),
            cornerRadius, color
        );
        
        m_renderer->fillCircle(
            static_cast<int>(rect.x + rect.width - cornerRadius),
            static_cast<int>(rect.y + rect.height - cornerRadius),
            cornerRadius, color
        );
    } else {
        // Regular rectangle
        m_renderer->fillRect(
            static_cast<int>(rect.x),
            static_cast<int>(rect.y),
            static_cast<int>(rect.width),
            static_cast<int>(rect.height),
            color
        );
    }
}

void UIContext::renderText(float x, float y, const std::string& text, uint32_t color) {
    if (m_font) {
        // Use font rendering
        for (size_t i = 0; i < text.length(); i++) {
            auto* glyph = m_font->getGlyph(text[i]);
            if (!glyph) continue;
            
            // Render glyph bitmap
            for (int gy = 0; gy < glyph->height; gy++) {
                for (int gx = 0; gx < glyph->width; gx++) {
                    int index = gy * glyph->width + gx;
                    uint8_t alpha = glyph->bitmap[index];
                    
                    if (alpha > 0) {
                        int px = static_cast<int>(x + glyph->bearingX + gx);
                        int py = static_cast<int>(y + glyph->bearingY - gy);
                        
                        // Alpha blend
                        uint32_t textColor = (color & 0x00FFFFFF) | (alpha << 24);
                        
                        uint32_t bgColor = m_renderer->getPixel(px, py);
                        
                        uint8_t srcA = alpha;
                        uint8_t dstA = (bgColor >> 24) & 0xFF;
                        
                        uint8_t outA = srcA + dstA * (255 - srcA) / 255;
                        
                        if (outA > 0) {
                            uint8_t r = ((color >> 0) & 0xFF) * srcA / outA;
                            uint8_t g = ((color >> 8) & 0xFF) * srcA / outA;
                            uint8_t b = ((color >> 16) & 0xFF) * srcA / outA;
                            
                            uint32_t finalColor = m_renderer->packColor(r, g, b, outA);
                            m_renderer->setPixel(px, py, finalColor);
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            x += glyph->advance;
        }
    } else {
        // Fallback: simple text rendering
        for (size_t i = 0; i < text.length(); i++) {
            // Draw a simple character (8x16 pixels)
            // This is a placeholder - you would implement a bitmap font here
            int charX = static_cast<int>(x + i * 8);
            int charY = static_cast<int>(y);
            
            m_renderer->fillRect(charX, charY, 8, 16, color);
        }
    }
}

// ====================================================================
// RENDER WINDOW
// ====================================================================

void UIContext::renderWindow(UIWindow* window) {
    if (!window) return;
    
    // Render window background
    renderFrame(window->rect, m_style.colorWindowBg, m_style.windowRounding);
    
    // Render window border
    m_renderer->drawRect(
        static_cast<int>(window->rect.x),
        static_cast<int>(window->rect.y),
        static_cast<int>(window->rect.width),
        static_cast<int>(window->rect.height),
        m_style.colorWindowBorder
    );
    
    // Render title bar
    UIRect titleBar = {
        window->rect.x,
        window->rect.y,
        window->rect.width,
        25.0f
    };
    
    uint32_t titleColor = window->focused ? m_style.colorHeaderActive : m_style.colorHeader;
    renderFrame(titleBar, titleColor, m_style.windowRounding);
    
    renderText(titleBar.x + 10.0f, titleBar.y + 5.0f, window->title, m_style.colorText);
    
    // Render close button
    if (window->canClose) {
        UIRect closeButton = {
            window->rect.x + window->rect.width - 25.0f,
            window->rect.y + 5.0f,
            20.0f,
            15.0f
        };
        
        pushID("##close");
        uint32_t closeID = getCurrentID();
        popID();
        
        UIState closeState = getWidgetState(closeButton, closeID);
        
        if (closeState == UIState::Active && m_input.mouseButtonsClicked[0]) {
            window->open = false;
        }
        
        uint32_t closeColor = (closeState == UIState::Hovered) ? 0xFFFF0000 : 0xFF800000;
        renderFrame(closeButton, closeColor, 2.0f);
        renderText(closeButton.x + 6.0f, closeButton.y, "X", m_style.colorText);
    }
    
    // Render scrollbar if needed
    if (window->scrollMaxY > 0.0f) {
        UIRect scrollbarRect = {
            window->rect.x + window->rect.width - m_style.scrollbarSize,
            window->rect.y + 30.0f,
            m_style.scrollbarSize,
            window->rect.height - 30.0f
        };
        
        renderFrame(scrollbarRect, m_style.colorScrollbar, 0.0f);
        
        // Scrollbar grab
        float grabHeight = std::max(m_style.grabMinSize, 
                                    scrollbarRect.height * (window->contentRect.height / 
                                    (window->scrollMaxY + window->contentRect.height)));
        
        float grabY = scrollbarRect.y + (window->scrollY / window->scrollMaxY) * 
                     (scrollbarRect.height - grabHeight);
        
        UIRect grabRect = {
            scrollbarRect.x,
            grabY,
            m_style.scrollbarSize,
            grabHeight
        };
        
        renderFrame(grabRect, m_style.colorScrollbarGrab, m_style.grabRounding);
    }
}

// ====================================================================
// RENDER BUTTON
// ====================================================================

void UIContext::renderButton(const UIRect& rect, const std::string& label, UIState state) {
    uint32_t bgColor;
    
    switch (state) {
        case UIState::Active:
            bgColor = m_style.colorButtonActive;
            break;
        case UIState::Hovered:
            bgColor = m_style.colorButtonHovered;
            break;
        case UIState::Disabled:
            bgColor = m_style.colorButton;
            break;
        default:
            bgColor = m_style.colorButton;
            break;
    }
    
    renderFrame(rect, bgColor, m_style.frameRounding);
    
    // Center text
    float textWidth = label.length() * m_style.fontSize * 0.6f;
    float textX = rect.x + (rect.width - textWidth) * m_style.buttonTextAlign;
    float textY = rect.y + (rect.height - m_style.fontSize) / 2.0f;
    
    uint32_t textColor = (state == UIState::Disabled) ? m_style.colorTextDisabled : m_style.colorText;
    renderText(textX, textY, label, textColor);
}

// ====================================================================
// RENDER CHECKBOX
// ====================================================================

void UIContext::renderCheckbox(const UIRect& rect, const std::string& label, 
                               bool checked, UIState state) {
    
    float checkboxSize = m_style.fontSize;
    
    UIRect boxRect = {
        rect.x,
        rect.y,
        checkboxSize,
        checkboxSize
    };
    
    uint32_t boxColor = (state == UIState::Hovered) ? m_style.colorButtonHovered : m_style.colorCheckbox;
    renderFrame(boxRect, boxColor, 2.0f);
    
    // Border
    m_renderer->drawRect(
        static_cast<int>(boxRect.x),
        static_cast<int>(boxRect.y),
        static_cast<int>(boxRect.width),
```
