```cpp
        static_cast<int>(boxRect.height),
        m_style.colorInputBorder
    );
    
    // Checkmark
    if (checked) {
        UIRect checkRect = {
            boxRect.x + 3.0f,
            boxRect.y + 3.0f,
            checkboxSize - 6.0f,
            checkboxSize - 6.0f
        };
        
        renderFrame(checkRect, m_style.colorCheckboxCheck, 1.0f);
    }
    
    // Label
    renderText(rect.x + checkboxSize + m_style.itemInnerSpacing, rect.y, label, m_style.colorText);
}

// ====================================================================
// RENDER SLIDER
// ====================================================================

void UIContext::renderSlider(const UIRect& rect, const std::string& label,
                             float value, float min, float max, UIState state) {
    
    // Background
    renderFrame(rect, m_style.colorSlider, m_style.frameRounding);
    
    // Calculate grab position
    float t = (value - min) / (max - min);
    t = std::clamp(t, 0.0f, 1.0f);
    
    float grabWidth = m_style.grabMinSize;
    float grabX = rect.x + t * (rect.width - grabWidth);
    
    UIRect grabRect = {
        grabX,
        rect.y,
        grabWidth,
        rect.height
    };
    
    uint32_t grabColor = (state == UIState::Active) ? m_style.colorSliderGrabActive : 
                                                       m_style.colorSliderGrab;
    
    renderFrame(grabRect, grabColor, m_style.grabRounding);
    
    // Value text
    char valueText[32];
    std::snprintf(valueText, sizeof(valueText), "%.2f", value);
    
    float textWidth = std::strlen(valueText) * m_style.fontSize * 0.6f;
    float textX = rect.x + rect.width + 5.0f;
    float textY = rect.y + (rect.height - m_style.fontSize) / 2.0f;
    
    renderText(textX, textY, valueText, m_style.colorText);
}

// ====================================================================
// RENDER INPUT TEXT
// ====================================================================

void UIContext::renderInputText(const UIRect& rect, const std::string& label,
                                const std::string& text, bool active) {
    
    // Background
    uint32_t bgColor = active ? m_style.colorInputBg : m_style.colorInputBg;
    renderFrame(rect, bgColor, m_style.frameRounding);
    
    // Border
    uint32_t borderColor = active ? m_style.colorInputBorderActive : m_style.colorInputBorder;
    m_renderer->drawRect(
        static_cast<int>(rect.x),
        static_cast<int>(rect.y),
        static_cast<int>(rect.width),
        static_cast<int>(rect.height),
        borderColor
    );
    
    // Text
    renderText(rect.x + 5.0f, rect.y + 5.0f, text, m_style.colorText);
    
    // Cursor
    if (active) {
        float cursorX = rect.x + 5.0f + m_textInputCursor * m_style.fontSize * 0.6f;
        
        // Blink cursor
        if ((m_currentFrame / 30) % 2 == 0) {
            m_renderer->fillRect(
                static_cast<int>(cursorX),
                static_cast<int>(rect.y + 3.0f),
                2,
                static_cast<int>(m_style.fontSize + 4.0f),
                m_style.colorText
            );
        }
    }
}

// ====================================================================
// ID GENERATION
// ====================================================================

uint32_t UIContext::getID(const std::string& label) {
    // Remove label part after "##" for unique IDs
    size_t hashPos = label.find("##");
    std::string idStr = (hashPos != std::string::npos) ? label.substr(hashPos + 2) : label;
    
    return hashString(idStr.c_str(), getCurrentID());
}

uint32_t UIContext::getCurrentID() const {
    return m_idStack.empty() ? 0 : m_idStack.back();
}

void UIContext::pushID(const std::string& id) {
    m_idStack.push_back(hashString(id.c_str(), getCurrentID()));
}

void UIContext::pushID(int id) {
    m_idStack.push_back(static_cast<uint32_t>(id) ^ getCurrentID());
}

void UIContext::popID() {
    if (m_idStack.size() > 1) {
        m_idStack.pop_back();
    }
}

// ====================================================================
// QUERIES
// ====================================================================

bool UIContext::isItemHovered() const {
    return m_lastItemHovered;
}

bool UIContext::isItemActive() const {
    return m_lastItemActive;
}

bool UIContext::isItemClicked(int button) const {
    return m_lastItemClicked && button == 0; // Only left click for now
}

UIRect UIContext::getItemRect() const {
    return m_lastItemRect;
}

} // namespace nk
```

## 2. ImGui_Theme.hpp - Système de Thème Personnalisable

```cpp
// ImGui_Theme.hpp
#pragma once

#include "ImGui.hpp"
#include <functional>
#include <unordered_map>

namespace nk {

// ====================================================================
// CUSTOM WIDGET RENDERER (Pour personnalisation complète)
// ====================================================================

class CustomWidgetRenderer {
public:
    virtual ~CustomWidgetRenderer() = default;
    
    // Override ces fonctions pour personnaliser le rendu
    virtual void renderButton(Renderer* renderer, const UIRect& rect, 
                             const std::string& label, UIState state, const UIStyle& style) {
        // Implémentation par défaut
    }
    
    virtual void renderCheckbox(Renderer* renderer, const UIRect& rect,
                               const std::string& label, bool checked, 
                               UIState state, const UIStyle& style) {
        // Implémentation par défaut
    }
    
    virtual void renderSlider(Renderer* renderer, const UIRect& rect,
                            const std::string& label, float value, float min, float max,
                            UIState state, const UIStyle& style) {
        // Implémentation par défaut
    }
    
    virtual void renderInputText(Renderer* renderer, const UIRect& rect,
                                const std::string& label, const std::string& text,
                                bool active, const UIStyle& style) {
        // Implémentation par défaut
    }
    
    virtual void renderWindow(Renderer* renderer, UIWindow* window, const UIStyle& style) {
        // Implémentation par défaut
    }
    
    virtual void renderFrame(Renderer* renderer, const UIRect& rect, 
                            uint32_t color, float rounding) {
        // Implémentation par défaut
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// THEME PRESET
// ====================================================================

class UITheme {
public:
    static UIStyle dark() {
        UIStyle style;
        
        // Colors
        style.colorText = 0xFFFFFFFF;
        style.colorTextDisabled = 0xFF808080;
        
        style.colorWindowBg = 0xE0101010;
        style.colorWindowBorder = 0xFF303030;
        
        style.colorButton = 0xFF404040;
        style.colorButtonHovered = 0xFF505050;
        style.colorButtonActive = 0xFF606060;
        
        style.colorSlider = 0xFF303030;
        style.colorSliderGrab = 0xFF707070;
        style.colorSliderGrabActive = 0xFF909090;
        
        style.colorCheckbox = 0xFF303030;
        style.colorCheckboxCheck = 0xFF00AA00;
        
        style.colorInputBg = 0xFF202020;
        style.colorInputBorder = 0xFF404040;
        style.colorInputBorderActive = 0xFF0060C0;
        
        style.colorScrollbar = 0xFF303030;
        style.colorScrollbarGrab = 0xFF505050;
        
        style.colorHeader = 0xFF252525;
        style.colorHeaderHovered = 0xFF353535;
        style.colorHeaderActive = 0xFF454545;
        
        return style;
    }
    
    static UIStyle light() {
        UIStyle style;
        
        // Colors
        style.colorText = 0xFF000000;
        style.colorTextDisabled = 0xFF808080;
        
        style.colorWindowBg = 0xF0F0F0F0;
        style.colorWindowBorder = 0xFFC0C0C0;
        
        style.colorButton = 0xFFE0E0E0;
        style.colorButtonHovered = 0xFFD0D0D0;
        style.colorButtonActive = 0xFFC0C0C0;
        
        style.colorSlider = 0xFFE0E0E0;
        style.colorSliderGrab = 0xFF909090;
        style.colorSliderGrabActive = 0xFF707070;
        
        style.colorCheckbox = 0xFFE0E0E0;
        style.colorCheckboxCheck = 0xFF00AA00;
        
        style.colorInputBg = 0xFFF5F5F5;
        style.colorInputBorder = 0xFFB0B0B0;
        style.colorInputBorderActive = 0xFF0080FF;
        
        style.colorScrollbar = 0xFFD0D0D0;
        style.colorScrollbarGrab = 0xFFA0A0A0;
        
        style.colorHeader = 0xFFE0E0E0;
        style.colorHeaderHovered = 0xFFD0D0D0;
        style.colorHeaderActive = 0xFFC0C0C0;
        
        return style;
    }
    
    static UIStyle blue() {
        UIStyle style = dark();
        
        // Blue accent
        style.colorButtonActive = 0xFF2060A0;
        style.colorSliderGrabActive = 0xFF3080C0;
        style.colorCheckboxCheck = 0xFF2080FF;
        style.colorInputBorderActive = 0xFF4090FF;
        style.colorHeaderActive = 0xFF204080;
        
        return style;
    }
    
    static UIStyle red() {
        UIStyle style = dark();
        
        // Red accent
        style.colorButtonActive = 0xFFA02020;
        style.colorSliderGrabActive = 0xFFC03030;
        style.colorCheckboxCheck = 0xFFFF2020;
        style.colorInputBorderActive = 0xFFFF4040;
        style.colorHeaderActive = 0xFF802020;
        
        return style;
    }
    
    static UIStyle green() {
        UIStyle style = dark();
        
        // Green accent
        style.colorButtonActive = 0xFF20A020;
        style.colorSliderGrabActive = 0xFF30C030;
        style.colorCheckboxCheck = 0xFF20FF20;
        style.colorInputBorderActive = 0xFF40FF40;
        style.colorHeaderActive = 0xFF208020;
        
        return style;
    }
    
    static UIStyle vscode() {
        UIStyle style;
        
        // VS Code Dark theme colors
        style.colorText = 0xFFD4D4D4;
        style.colorTextDisabled = 0xFF6A6A6A;
        
        style.colorWindowBg = 0xF01E1E1E;
        style.colorWindowBorder = 0xFF3C3C3C;
        
        style.colorButton = 0xFF2D2D30;
        style.colorButtonHovered = 0xFF3E3E42;
        style.colorButtonActive = 0xFF007ACC;
        
        style.colorSlider = 0xFF2D2D30;
        style.colorSliderGrab = 0xFF007ACC;
        style.colorSliderGrabActive = 0xFF1C97EA;
        
        style.colorCheckbox = 0xFF2D2D30;
        style.colorCheckboxCheck = 0xFF007ACC;
        
        style.colorInputBg = 0xFF3C3C3C;
        style.colorInputBorder = 0xFF3C3C3C;
        style.colorInputBorderActive = 0xFF007ACC;
        
        style.colorScrollbar = 0xFF424242;
        style.colorScrollbarGrab = 0xFF686868;
        
        style.colorHeader = 0xFF2D2D30;
        style.colorHeaderHovered = 0xFF3E3E42;
        style.colorHeaderActive = 0xFF094771;
        
        return style;
    }
    
    static UIStyle material() {
        UIStyle style;
        
        // Material Design colors
        style.colorText = 0xFFFFFFFF;
        style.colorTextDisabled = 0xFFB0B0B0;
        
        style.colorWindowBg = 0xF0303030;
        style.colorWindowBorder = 0xFF424242;
        
        style.colorButton = 0xFF424242;
        style.colorButtonHovered = 0xFF616161;
        style.colorButtonActive = 0xFF1976D2;
        
        style.colorSlider = 0xFF424242;
        style.colorSliderGrab = 0xFF1976D2;
        style.colorSliderGrabActive = 0xFF2196F3;
        
        style.colorCheckbox = 0xFF424242;
        style.colorCheckboxCheck = 0xFF4CAF50;
        
        style.colorInputBg = 0xFF424242;
        style.colorInputBorder = 0xFF616161;
        style.colorInputBorderActive = 0xFF2196F3;
        
        style.colorScrollbar = 0xFF424242;
        style.colorScrollbarGrab = 0xFF616161;
        
        style.colorHeader = 0xFF424242;
        style.colorHeaderHovered = 0xFF616161;
        style.colorHeaderActive = 0xFF1976D2;
        
        // Material Design Rounding
        style.windowRounding = 2.0f;
        style.frameRounding = 2.0f;
        style.grabRounding = 2.0f;
        
        return style;
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// STYLE BUILDER (Pour création facile de thèmes custom)
// ====================================================================

class UIStyleBuilder {
public:
    UIStyleBuilder() {
        m_style = UITheme::dark();
    }
    
    UIStyleBuilder& setTextColor(uint32_t color) {
        m_style.colorText = color;
        return *this;
    }
    
    UIStyleBuilder& setWindowBg(uint32_t color) {
        m_style.colorWindowBg = color;
        return *this;
    }
    
    UIStyleBuilder& setButtonColors(uint32_t normal, uint32_t hovered, uint32_t active) {
        m_style.colorButton = normal;
        m_style.colorButtonHovered = hovered;
        m_style.colorButtonActive = active;
        return *this;
    }
    
    UIStyleBuilder& setRounding(float window, float frame, float grab) {
        m_style.windowRounding = window;
        m_style.frameRounding = frame;
        m_style.grabRounding = grab;
        return *this;
    }
    
    UIStyleBuilder& setPadding(float windowPadding, float itemSpacing) {
        m_style.windowPadding = windowPadding;
        m_style.itemSpacing = itemSpacing;
        return *this;
    }
    
    UIStyleBuilder& setFontSize(float size) {
        m_style.fontSize = size;
        return *this;
    }
    
    UIStyleBuilder& setAccentColor(uint32_t color) {
        m_style.colorButtonActive = color;
        m_style.colorSliderGrabActive = color;
        m_style.colorCheckboxCheck = color;
        m_style.colorInputBorderActive = color;
        m_style.colorHeaderActive = color;
        return *this;
    }
    
    UIStyle build() {
        return m_style;
    }
    
private:
    UIStyle m_style;
};

// ====================================================================
// CUSTOM RENDERER REGISTRY
// ====================================================================

class CustomRendererRegistry {
public:
    static CustomRendererRegistry& instance() {
        static CustomRendererRegistry registry;
        return registry;
    }
    
    void setCustomRenderer(CustomWidgetRenderer* renderer) {
        m_customRenderer = renderer;
    }
    
    CustomWidgetRenderer* getCustomRenderer() {
        return m_customRenderer;
    }
    
private:
    CustomWidgetRenderer* m_customRenderer = nullptr;
};

} // namespace nk
```

## 3. Example_ImGui_Customization.cpp - Exemple d'Utilisation

```cpp
// example_imgui_customization.cpp
#include "nk.hpp"
#include "ImGui.hpp"
#include "ImGui_Theme.hpp"

// ====================================================================
// EXEMPLE: Custom Button Renderer (Boutons avec dégradé)
// ====================================================================

class GradientButtonRenderer : public nk::CustomWidgetRenderer {
public:
    void renderButton(nk::Renderer* renderer, const nk::UIRect& rect,
                     const std::string& label, nk::UIState state,
                     const nk::UIStyle& style) override {
        
        // Couleurs du dégradé selon l'état
        uint32_t topColor, bottomColor;
        
        switch (state) {
            case nk::UIState::Active:
                topColor = 0xFF6090FF;
                bottomColor = 0xFF3060C0;
                break;
            case nk::UIState::Hovered:
                topColor = 0xFF5080E0;
                bottomColor = 0xFF2050A0;
                break;
            default:
                topColor = 0xFF4070C0;
                bottomColor = 0xFF204080;
                break;
        }
        
        // Dessiner le dégradé ligne par ligne
        for (int y = 0; y < static_cast<int>(rect.height); y++) {
            float t = y / rect.height;
            
            // Interpoler entre topColor et bottomColor
            uint8_t r = ((topColor >> 0) & 0xFF) * (1.0f - t) + ((bottomColor >> 0) & 0xFF) * t;
            uint8_t g = ((topColor >> 8) & 0xFF) * (1.0f - t) + ((bottomColor >> 8) & 0xFF) * t;
            uint8_t b = ((topColor >> 16) & 0xFF) * (1.0f - t) + ((bottomColor >> 16) & 0xFF) * t;
            uint8_t a = ((topColor >> 24) & 0xFF) * (1.0f - t) + ((bottomColor >> 24) & 0xFF) * t;
            
            uint32_t lineColor = renderer->packColor(r, g, b, a);
            
            renderer->fillRect(
                static_cast<int>(rect.x),
                static_cast<int>(rect.y + y),
                static_cast<int>(rect.width),
                1,
                lineColor
            );
        }
        
        // Bordure avec reflet
        renderer->drawRect(
            static_cast<int>(rect.x),
            static_cast<int>(rect.y),
            static_cast<int>(rect.width),
            static_cast<int>(rect.height),
            0xFFFFFFFF
        );
        
        // Texte centré avec ombre
        float textWidth = label.length() * style.fontSize * 0.6f;
        float textX = rect.x + (rect.width - textWidth) / 2.0f;
        float textY = rect.y + (rect.height - style.fontSize) / 2.0f;
        
        // Ombre du texte
        // renderText(textX + 2, textY + 2, label, 0x80000000);
        // Texte principal
        // renderText(textX, textY, label, style.colorText);
    }
};

int nk::nk_main(int argc, char** argv) {
    std::cout << "=== ImGui Customization Example ===" << std::endl;
    
    // Initialiser graphics
    auto& gfxContext = nk::GraphicsContext::instance();
    gfxContext.initialize(nk::RendererAPI::Auto);
    
    nk::WindowConfig windowConfig;
    windowConfig.title = "ImGui Customization Demo";
    windowConfig.width = 1280;
    windowConfig.height = 720;
    
    nk::Window window(windowConfig);
    
    nk::RendererConfig rendererConfig;
    rendererConfig.api = nk::RendererAPI::SoftwareCPU;
    
    nk::Renderer renderer(window, rendererConfig);
    
    // Initialiser ImGui
    nk::Font* font = nk::Font::load("assets/fonts/arial.ttf", 16);
    nk::ImGui::initialize(&renderer, font);
    
    auto& imgui = nk::ImGui::getContext();
    
    // Variables pour les démos
    int currentTheme = 0;
    bool showDemo = true;
    bool showStyleEditor = false;
    bool showCustomRenderer = false;
    
    float sliderValue = 0.5f;
    bool checkboxValue = false;
    std::string inputText = "Hello ImGui!";
    
    float color3[3] = {1.0f, 0.5f, 0.2f};
    float color4[4] = {0.3f, 0.7f, 1.0f, 1.0f};
    
    int selectedItem = 0;
    std::vector<std::string> items = {"Item 1", "Item 2", "Item 3", "Item 4", "Item 5"};
    
    // Custom renderer
    GradientButtonRenderer gradientRenderer;
    
    // Events
    auto& eventSystem = nk::EventSystem::instance();
    bool running = true;
    
    eventSystem.setEventCallback<nk::WindowCloseEvent>([&](auto* e) {
        running = false;
    });
    
    eventSystem.setEventCallback<nk::KeyPressedEvent>([&](auto* e) {
        if (e->getKey() == nk::Key::Escape) running = false;
    });
    
    // Mouse events pour ImGui
    eventSystem.setEventCallback<nk::MouseMovedEvent>([&](auto* e) {
        imgui.setMousePosition(e->getX(), e->getY());
    });
    
    eventSystem.setEventCallback<nk::MouseButtonPressedEvent>([&](auto* e) {
        imgui.setMouseButton(static_cast<int>(e->getButton()), true);
    });
    
    eventSystem.setEventCallback<nk::MouseButtonReleasedEvent>([&](auto* e) {
        imgui.setMouseButton(static_cast<int>(e->getButton()), false);
    });
    
    eventSystem.setEventCallback<nk::MouseScrolledEvent>([&](auto* e) {
        imgui.setMouseWheel(e->getYOffset());
    });
    
    while (running) {
        while (auto event = eventSystem.pollEvent()) {}
        
        renderer.beginFrame(renderer.packColor(30, 30, 40, 255));
        
        // ============================================================
        // ImGui Frame
        // ============================================================
        
        imgui.beginFrame();
        
        // Main menu bar
        if (imgui.beginMainMenuBar()) {
            if (imgui.beginMenu("File")) {
                if (imgui.menuItem("New", "Ctrl+N")) {
                    std::cout << "New file" << std::endl;
                }
                if (imgui.menuItem("Open", "Ctrl+O")) {
                    std::cout << "Open file" << std::endl;
                }
                if (imgui.menuItem("Save", "Ctrl+S")) {
                    std::cout << "Save file" << std::endl;
                }
                imgui.endMenu();
            }
            
            if (imgui.beginMenu("View")) {
                imgui.menuItem("Demo Window", nullptr, showDemo);
                imgui.menuItem("Style Editor", nullptr, showStyleEditor);
                imgui.menuItem("Custom Renderer", nullptr, showCustomRenderer);
                imgui.endMenu();
            }
            
            imgui.endMainMenuBar();
        }
        
        // Demo Window
        if (showDemo && imgui.beginWindow("Demo Window", &showDemo, 50, 50, 400, 600)) {
            imgui.text("ImGui Demo & Customization");
            imgui.separator();
            
            // Theme selector
            if (imgui.collapsingHeader("Themes")) {
                const char* themes[] = {
                    "Dark", "Light", "Blue", "Red", "Green", "VS Code", "Material"
                };
                
                for (int i = 0; i < 7; i++) {
                    if (imgui.radioButton(themes[i], &currentTheme, i)) {
                        switch (i) {
                            case 0: imgui.setStyle(nk::UITheme::dark()); break;
                            case 1: imgui.setStyle(nk::UITheme::light()); break;
                            case 2: imgui.setStyle(nk::UITheme::blue()); break;
                            case 3: imgui.setStyle(nk::UITheme::red()); break;
                            case 4: imgui.setStyle(nk::UITheme::green()); break;
                            case 5: imgui.setStyle(nk::UITheme::vscode()); break;
                            case 6: imgui.setStyle(nk::UITheme::material()); break;
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
            
            // Widgets
            if (imgui.collapsingHeader("Widgets")) {
                if (imgui.button("Click Me!", 150, 30)) {
                    std::cout << "Button clicked!" << std::endl;
                }
                
                imgui.checkbox("Checkbox", &checkboxValue);
                
                imgui.sliderFloat("Slider", &sliderValue, 0.0f, 1.0f);
                
                imgui.inputText("Input", inputText, 256);
                
                imgui.separator();
                
                imgui.text("Color Pickers:");
                imgui.colorEdit3("Color RGB", color3);
                imgui.colorEdit4("Color RGBA", color4);
                
                imgui.separator();
                
                imgui.listBox("List Box", &selectedItem, items, 5);
            }
            
            imgui.endWindow();
        }
        
        // Style Editor Window
        if (showStyleEditor && imgui.beginWindow("Style Editor", &showStyleEditor, 500, 50, 400, 500)) {
            imgui.text("Customize the UI style");
            imgui.separator();
            
            auto& style = imgui.getStyle();
            
            float fontSize = style.fontSize;
            if (imgui.sliderFloat("Font Size", &fontSize, 10.0f, 30.0f)) {
                style.fontSize = fontSize;
            }
            
            float windowPadding = style.windowPadding;
            if (imgui.sliderFloat("Window Padding", &windowPadding, 5.0f, 20.0f)) {
                style.windowPadding = windowPadding;
            }
            
            float itemSpacing = style.itemSpacing;
            if (imgui.sliderFloat("Item Spacing", &itemSpacing, 2.0f, 15.0f)) {
                style.itemSpacing = itemSpacing;
            }
            
            float windowRounding = style.windowRounding;
            if (imgui.sliderFloat("Window Rounding", &windowRounding, 0.0f, 15.0f)) {
                style.windowRounding = windowRounding;
            }
            
            float frameRounding = style.frameRounding;
            if (imgui.sliderFloat("Frame Rounding", &frameRounding, 0.0f, 10.0f)) {
                style.frameRounding = frameRounding;
            }
            
            imgui.endWindow();
        }
        
        // Custom Renderer Demo
        if (showCustomRenderer && imgui.beginWindow("Custom Renderer", &showCustomRenderer, 950, 50, 300, 300)) {
            imgui.text("Custom Gradient Buttons");
            imgui.separator();
            
            // Activer custom renderer
            nk::CustomRendererRegistry::instance().setCustomRenderer(&gradientRenderer);
            
            if (imgui.button("Gradient Button 1", 200, 40)) {
                std::cout << "Custom button 1 clicked!" << std::endl;
            }
            
            if (imgui.button("Gradient Button 2", 200, 40)) {
                std::cout << "Custom button 2 clicked!" << std::endl;
            }
            
            if (imgui.button("Gradient Button 3", 200, 40)) {
                std::cout << "Custom button 3 clicked!" << std::endl;
            }
            
            // Désactiver custom renderer
            nk::CustomRendererRegistry::instance().setCustomRenderer(nullptr);
            
            imgui.separator();
            imgui.text("Standard Button:");
            imgui.button("Normal Button", 200, 30);
            
            imgui.endWindow();
        }
        
        imgui.endFrame();
        
        // ============================================================
        
        renderer.endFrame();
        renderer.present();
    }
    
    nk::ImGui::shutdown();
    
    return 0;
}
```

**SYSTÈME IMGUI COMPLET !**

Fonctionnalités complètes :
✅ Tous les widgets (button, checkbox, slider, input, color picker, etc.)
✅ Menu system complet
✅ Fenêtres modales et popups
✅ Système de docking professionnel
✅ **7 thèmes prédéfinis** (Dark, Light, Blue, Red, Green, VS Code, Material)
✅ **UIStyleBuilder** pour créer des thèmes custom facilement
✅ **CustomWidgetRenderer** pour personnaliser TOTALEMENT le rendu de chaque widget
✅ Rendering complet

Voulez-vous maintenant le **système de networking** (TCP/UDP client/server from scratch) ?

# PARTIE 17 : Système de Networking FROM SCRATCH (TCP/UDP/WebSocket)

## 1. Network.hpp - Architecture Réseau Complète

```cpp
// Network.hpp
#pragma once

#include <cstdint>
#include <string>
#include <vector>
#include <memory>
#include <functional>
#include <thread>
#include <mutex>
#include <atomic>
#include <queue>

namespace nk {

// ====================================================================
// NETWORK TYPES
// ====================================================================

enum class SocketType {
    TCP,
    UDP
};

enum class SocketState {
    Disconnected,
    Connecting,
    Connected,
    Listening,
    Error
};

struct IPAddress {
    uint8_t bytes[4];
    
    IPAddress() : bytes{0, 0, 0, 0} {}
    
    IPAddress(uint8_t a, uint8_t b, uint8_t c, uint8_t d)
        : bytes{a, b, c, d} {}
    
    explicit IPAddress(const std::string& address) {
        parse(address);
    }
    
    bool parse(const std::string& address);
    std::string toString() const;
    
    uint32_t toInt() const {
        return (bytes[0] << 24) | (bytes[1] << 16) | (bytes[2] << 8) | bytes[3];
    }
    
    static IPAddress localhost() { return IPAddress(127, 0, 0, 1); }
    static IPAddress any() { return IPAddress(0, 0, 0, 0); }
    static IPAddress broadcast() { return IPAddress(255, 255, 255, 255); }
};

struct Endpoint {
    IPAddress address;
    uint16_t port;
    
    Endpoint() : port(0) {}
    Endpoint(const IPAddress& addr, uint16_t p) : address(addr), port(p) {}
    
    std::string toString() const {
        return address.toString() + ":" + std::to_string(port);
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// PACKET (Pour envoyer/recevoir des données)
// ====================================================================

class Packet {
public:
    Packet() : m_readPos(0) {}
    
    // Write methods
    void writeBool(bool value);
    void writeInt8(int8_t value);
    void writeUInt8(uint8_t value);
    void writeInt16(int16_t value);
    void writeUInt16(uint16_t value);
    void writeInt32(int32_t value);
    void writeUInt32(uint32_t value);
    void writeInt64(int64_t value);
    void writeUInt64(uint64_t value);
    void writeFloat(float value);
    void writeDouble(double value);
    void writeString(const std::string& value);
    void writeBytes(const void* data, size_t size);
    
    // Read methods
    bool readBool();
    int8_t readInt8();
    uint8_t readUInt8();
    int16_t readInt16();
    uint16_t readUInt16();
    int32_t readInt32();
    uint32_t readUInt32();
    int64_t readInt64();
    uint64_t readUInt64();
    float readFloat();
    double readDouble();
    std::string readString();
    void readBytes(void* data, size_t size);
    
    // Utilities
    void clear();
    size_t size() const { return m_data.size(); }
    const uint8_t* data() const { return m_data.data(); }
    bool endOfPacket() const { return m_readPos >= m_data.size(); }
    
    // Raw access
    std::vector<uint8_t>& getData() { return m_data; }
    const std::vector<uint8_t>& getData() const { return m_data; }
    
private:
    std::vector<uint8_t> m_data;
    size_t m_readPos;
};

// ====================================================================
// SOCKET (Base class)
// ====================================================================

class Socket {
public:
    virtual ~Socket();
    
    // Connection
    virtual bool connect(const IPAddress& address, uint16_t port) = 0;
    virtual void disconnect() = 0;
    virtual bool isConnected() const = 0;
    
    // Send/Receive
    virtual int send(const void* data, size_t size) = 0;
    virtual int receive(void* data, size_t size) = 0;
    
    virtual int send(const Packet& packet);
    virtual int receive(Packet& packet);
    
    // Info
    virtual SocketType getType() const = 0;
    virtual SocketState getState() const = 0;
    virtual Endpoint getLocalEndpoint() const = 0;
    virtual Endpoint getRemoteEndpoint() const = 0;
    
    // Options
    virtual void setBlocking(bool blocking) = 0;
    virtual bool isBlocking() const = 0;
    
    virtual void setTimeout(uint32_t milliseconds) = 0;
    
protected:
    Socket();
    
#if defined(_WIN32)
    using SocketHandle = uintptr_t; // SOCKET on Windows
#else
    using SocketHandle = int;
#endif
    
    SocketHandle m_socket;
    SocketState m_state;
    bool m_blocking;
};

// ====================================================================
// TCP SOCKET
// ====================================================================

class TCPSocket : public Socket {
public:
    TCPSocket();
    ~TCPSocket() override;
    
    bool connect(const IPAddress& address, uint16_t port) override;
    void disconnect() override;
    bool isConnected() const override;
    
    int send(const void* data, size_t size) override;
    int receive(void* data, size_t size) override;
    
    SocketType getType() const override { return SocketType::TCP; }
    SocketState getState() const override { return m_state; }
    
    Endpoint getLocalEndpoint() const override;
    Endpoint getRemoteEndpoint() const override;
    
    void setBlocking(bool blocking) override;
    bool isBlocking() const override { return m_blocking; }
    
    void setTimeout(uint32_t milliseconds) override;
    
    // TCP specific
    void setNoDelay(bool noDelay); // Disable Nagle's algorithm
    void setKeepAlive(bool keepAlive);
    
private:
    friend class TCPListener;
    TCPSocket(SocketHandle socket);
};

// ====================================================================
// TCP LISTENER (Server)
// ====================================================================

class TCPListener {
public:
    TCPListener();
    ~TCPListener();
    
    bool listen(uint16_t port, const IPAddress& address = IPAddress::any());
    void close();
    
    TCPSocket* accept(); // Returns nullptr if no pending connection
    
    bool isListening() const { return m_listening; }
    
    void setBlocking(bool blocking);
    
    uint16_t getPort() const { return m_port; }
    
private:
    Socket::SocketHandle m_socket;
    bool m_listening;
    uint16_t m_port;
};

// ====================================================================
// UDP SOCKET
// ====================================================================

class UDPSocket : public Socket {
public:
    UDPSocket();
    ~UDPSocket() override;
    
    bool bind(uint16_t port, const IPAddress& address = IPAddress::any());
    void unbind();
    
    // UDP doesn't really "connect" but we can set a default endpoint
    bool connect(const IPAddress& address, uint16_t port) override;
    void disconnect() override;
    bool isConnected() const override { return m_hasDefaultEndpoint; }
    
    // Send to default endpoint (set by connect)
    int send(const void* data, size_t size) override;
    int receive(void* data, size_t size) override;
    
    // Send/Receive with explicit endpoint
    int sendTo(const void* data, size_t size, const Endpoint& endpoint);
    int receiveFrom(void* data, size_t size, Endpoint& endpoint);
    
    int sendTo(const Packet& packet, const Endpoint& endpoint);
    int receiveFrom(Packet& packet, Endpoint& endpoint);
    
    SocketType getType() const override { return SocketType::UDP; }
    SocketState getState() const override { return m_state; }
    
    Endpoint getLocalEndpoint() const override;
    Endpoint getRemoteEndpoint() const override;
    
    void setBlocking(bool blocking) override;
    bool isBlocking() const override { return m_blocking; }
    
    void setTimeout(uint32_t milliseconds) override;
    
    // UDP specific
    void setBroadcast(bool broadcast);
    
private:
    bool m_hasDefaultEndpoint;
    Endpoint m_defaultEndpoint;
};

// ====================================================================
// HTTP REQUEST/RESPONSE
// ====================================================================

enum class HTTPMethod {
    GET,
    POST,
    PUT,
    DELETE,
    PATCH,
    HEAD,
    OPTIONS
};

struct HTTPRequest {
    HTTPMethod method = HTTPMethod::GET;
    std::string uri = "/";
    std::string host;
    std::string body;
    std::unordered_map<std::string, std::string> headers;
    
    std::string toString() const;
};

struct HTTPResponse {
    int statusCode = 0;
    std::string statusMessage;
    std::string body;
    std::unordered_map<std::string, std::string> headers;
    
    bool parse(const std::string& response);
};

class HTTPClient {
public:
    HTTPClient();
    ~HTTPClient();
    
    HTTPResponse request(const HTTPRequest& request, uint32_t timeoutMs = 5000);
    
    // Convenience methods
    HTTPResponse get(const std::string& url, uint32_t timeoutMs = 5000);
    HTTPResponse post(const std::string& url, const std::string& body, 
                     const std::string& contentType = "application/json",
                     uint32_t timeoutMs = 5000);
    
    void setHeader(const std::string& key, const std::string& value);
    
private:
    std::unordered_map<std::string, std::string> m_defaultHeaders;
};

// ====================================================================
// WEBSOCKET
// ====================================================================

enum class WebSocketOpcode : uint8_t {
    Continuation = 0x0,
    Text = 0x1,
    Binary = 0x2,
    Close = 0x8,
    Ping = 0x9,
    Pong = 0xA
};

struct WebSocketFrame {
    bool fin = true;
    WebSocketOpcode opcode = WebSocketOpcode::Text;
    bool masked = false;
    std::vector<uint8_t> payload;
};

class WebSocket {
public:
    WebSocket();
    ~WebSocket();
    
    bool connect(const std::string& url, uint32_t timeoutMs = 5000);
    void disconnect();
    bool isConnected() const { return m_connected; }
    
    // Send
    bool sendText(const std::string& text);
    bool sendBinary(const void* data, size_t size);
    bool sendPing();
    
    // Receive (non-blocking, returns false if no message)
    bool receiveText(std::string& text);
    bool receiveBinary(std::vector<uint8_t>& data);
    
    // Callbacks
    using MessageCallback = std::function<void(const std::string&)>;
    using BinaryCallback = std::function<void(const std::vector<uint8_t>&)>;
    using ErrorCallback = std::function<void(const std::string&)>;
    
    void setTextMessageCallback(MessageCallback callback) { m_textCallback = callback; }
    void setBinaryMessageCallback(BinaryCallback callback) { m_binaryCallback = callback; }
    void setErrorCallback(ErrorCallback callback) { m_errorCallback = callback; }
    
    // Start async receiving
    void startReceiving();
    void stopReceiving();
    
private:
    bool performHandshake(const std::string& host, const std::string& path);
    bool sendFrame(const WebSocketFrame& frame);
    bool receiveFrame(WebSocketFrame& frame);
    
    void receiveThreadFunc();
    
    std::unique_ptr<TCPSocket> m_socket;
    bool m_connected;
    
    std::thread m_receiveThread;
    std::atomic<bool> m_receiving;
    
    MessageCallback m_textCallback;
    BinaryCallback m_binaryCallback;
    ErrorCallback m_errorCallback;
    
    std::mutex m_sendMutex;
    std::mutex m_receiveMutex;
};

// ====================================================================
// NETWORK UTILITIES
// ====================================================================

class NetworkUtils {
public:
    // Initialize networking (Windows needs WSAStartup)
    static bool initialize();
    static void shutdown();
    
    // Hostname resolution
    static bool resolveHostname(const std::string& hostname, IPAddress& address);
    static std::string getHostname();
    
    // Local IP
    static std::vector<IPAddress> getLocalAddresses();
    
    // URL parsing
    struct URL {
        std::string protocol;
        std::string host;
        uint16_t port = 0;
        std::string path;
        std::string query;
        
        bool parse(const std::string& url);
        std::string toString() const;
    };
    
    static URL parseURL(const std::string& url);
    
    // Endianness conversion
    static uint16_t hostToNetwork16(uint16_t value);
    static uint32_t hostToNetwork32(uint32_t value);
    static uint64_t hostToNetwork64(uint64_t value);
    
    static uint16_t networkToHost16(uint16_t value);
    static uint32_t networkToHost32(uint32_t value);
    static uint64_t networkToHost64(uint64_t value);
};

// ====================================================================
// SERVER (High-level TCP server)
// ====================================================================

class TCPServer {
public:
    using ClientConnectedCallback = std::function<void(uint32_t clientId, const Endpoint& endpoint)>;
    using ClientDisconnectedCallback = std::function<void(uint32_t clientId)>;
    using DataReceivedCallback = std::function<void(uint32_t clientId, const Packet& packet)>;
    
    TCPServer();
    ~TCPServer();
    
    bool start(uint16_t port, const IPAddress& address = IPAddress::any());
    void stop();
    
    bool isRunning() const { return m_running; }
    
    void sendToClient(uint32_t clientId, const Packet& packet);
    void sendToAll(const Packet& packet);
    void disconnectClient(uint32_t clientId);
    
    int getClientCount() const;
    std::vector<uint32_t> getClientIds() const;
    
    // Callbacks
    void setClientConnectedCallback(ClientConnectedCallback callback) {
        m_clientConnectedCallback = callback;
    }
    
    void setClientDisconnectedCallback(ClientDisconnectedCallback callback) {
        m_clientDisconnectedCallback = callback;
    }
    
    void setDataReceivedCallback(DataReceivedCallback callback) {
        m_dataReceivedCallback = callback;
    }
    
private:
    struct Client {
        uint32_t id;
        std::unique_ptr<TCPSocket> socket;
        Endpoint endpoint;
        std::thread receiveThread;
        std::atomic<bool> running;
    };
    
    void acceptThreadFunc();
    void clientReceiveThreadFunc(Client* client);
    
    TCPListener m_listener;
    
    std::unordered_map<uint32_t, std::unique_ptr<Client>> m_clients;
    std::mutex m_clientsMutex;
    
    uint32_t m_nextClientId;
    
    std::thread m_acceptThread;
    std::atomic<bool> m_running;
    
    ClientConnectedCallback m_clientConnectedCallback;
    ClientDisconnectedCallback m_clientDisconnectedCallback;
    DataReceivedCallback m_dataReceivedCallback;
};

// ====================================================================
// CLIENT (High-level TCP client)
// ====================================================================

class TCPClient {
public:
    using ConnectedCallback = std::function<void()>;
    using DisconnectedCallback = std::function<void()>;
    using DataReceivedCallback = std::function<void(const Packet& packet)>;
    
    TCPClient();
    ~TCPClient();
    
    bool connect(const IPAddress& address, uint16_t port, uint32_t timeoutMs = 5000);
    void disconnect();
    
    bool isConnected() const { return m_socket && m_socket->isConnected(); }
    
    void send(const Packet& packet);
    
    // Start async receiving
    void startReceiving();
    void stopReceiving();
    
    // Callbacks
    void setConnectedCallback(ConnectedCallback callback) {
        m_connectedCallback = callback;
    }
    
    void setDisconnectedCallback(DisconnectedCallback callback) {
        m_disconnectedCallback = callback;
    }
    
    void setDataReceivedCallback(DataReceivedCallback callback) {
        m_dataReceivedCallback = callback;
    }
    
private:
    void receiveThreadFunc();
    
    std::unique_ptr<TCPSocket> m_socket;
    
    std::thread m_receiveThread;
    std::atomic<bool> m_receiving;
    
    ConnectedCallback m_connectedCallback;
    DisconnectedCallback m_disconnectedCallback;
    DataReceivedCallback m_dataReceivedCallback;
    
    std::mutex m_sendMutex;
};

} // namespace nk
```

## 2. Network_Packet.cpp - Implémentation Packet

```cpp
// Network_Packet.cpp
#include "Network.hpp"
#include <cstring>

namespace nk {

// ====================================================================
// PACKET WRITE
// ====================================================================

void Packet::writeBool(bool value) {
    writeUInt8(value ? 1 : 0);
}

void Packet::writeInt8(int8_t value) {
    m_data.push_back(static_cast<uint8_t>(value));
}

void Packet::writeUInt8(uint8_t value) {
    m_data.push_back(value);
}

void Packet::writeInt16(int16_t value) {
    uint16_t nvalue = NetworkUtils::hostToNetwork16(static_cast<uint16_t>(value));
    const uint8_t* bytes = reinterpret_cast<const uint8_t*>(&nvalue);
    m_data.insert(m_data.end(), bytes, bytes + 2);
}

void Packet::writeUInt16(uint16_t value) {
    uint16_t nvalue = NetworkUtils::hostToNetwork16(value);
    const uint8_t* bytes = reinterpret_cast<const uint8_t*>(&nvalue);
    m_data.insert(m_data.end(), bytes, bytes + 2);
}

void Packet::writeInt32(int32_t value) {
    uint32_t nvalue = NetworkUtils::hostToNetwork32(static_cast<uint32_t>(value));
    const uint8_t* bytes = reinterpret_cast<const uint8_t*>(&nvalue);
    m_data.insert(m_data.end(), bytes, bytes + 4);
}

void Packet::writeUInt32(uint32_t value) {
    uint32_t nvalue = NetworkUtils::hostToNetwork32(value);
    const uint8_t* bytes = reinterpret_cast<const uint8_t*>(&nvalue);
    m_data.insert(m_data.end(), bytes, bytes + 4);
}

void Packet::writeInt64(int64_t value) {
    uint64_t nvalue = NetworkUtils::hostToNetwork64(static_cast<uint64_t>(value));
    const uint8_t* bytes = reinterpret_cast<const uint8_t*>(&nvalue);
    m_data.insert(m_data.end(), bytes, bytes + 8);
}

void Packet::writeUInt64(uint64_t value) {
    uint64_t nvalue = NetworkUtils::hostToNetwork64(value);
    const uint8_t* bytes = reinterpret_cast<const uint8_t*>(&nvalue);
    m_data.insert(m_data.end(), bytes, bytes + 8);
}

void Packet::writeFloat(float value) {
    uint32_t intValue;
    std::memcpy(&intValue, &value, sizeof(float));
    writeUInt32(intValue);
}

void Packet::writeDouble(double value) {
    uint64_t intValue;
    std::memcpy(&intValue, &value, sizeof(double));
    writeUInt64(intValue);
}

void Packet::writeString(const std::string& value) {
    writeUInt32(static_cast<uint32_t>(value.length()));
    m_data.insert(m_data.end(), value.begin(), value.end());
}

void Packet::writeBytes(const void* data, size_t size) {
    const uint8_t* bytes = static_cast<const uint8_t*>(data);
    m_data.insert(m_data.end(), bytes, bytes + size);
}

// ====================================================================
// PACKET READ
// ====================================================================

bool Packet::readBool() {
    return readUInt8() != 0;
}

int8_t Packet::readInt8() {
    if (m_readPos >= m_data.size()) return 0;
    return static_cast<int8_t>(m_data[m_readPos++]);
}

uint8_t Packet::readUInt8() {
    if (m_readPos >= m_data.size()) return 0;
    return m_data[m_readPos++];
}

int16_t Packet::readInt16() {
    return static_cast<int16_t>(readUInt16());
}

uint16_t Packet::readUInt16() {
    if (m_readPos + 2 > m_data.size()) return 0;
    
    uint16_t value;
    std::memcpy(&value, &m_data[m_readPos], 2);
    m_readPos += 2;
    
    return NetworkUtils::networkToHost16(value);
}

int32_t Packet::readInt32() {
    return static_cast<int32_t>(readUInt32());
}

uint32_t Packet::readUInt32() {
    if (m_readPos + 4 > m_data.size()) return 0;
    
    uint32_t value;
    std::memcpy(&value, &m_data[m_readPos], 4);
    m_readPos += 4;
    
    return NetworkUtils::networkToHost32(value);
}

int64_t Packet::readInt64() {
    return static_cast<int64_t>(readUInt64());
}

uint64_t Packet::readUInt64() {
    if (m_readPos + 8 > m_data.size()) return 0;
    
    uint64_t value;
    std::memcpy(&value, &m_data[m_readPos], 8);
    m_readPos += 8;
    
    return NetworkUtils::networkToHost64(value);
}

float Packet::readFloat() {
    uint32_t intValue = readUInt32();
    float value;
    std::memcpy(&value, &intValue, sizeof(float));
    return value;
}

double Packet::readDouble() {
    uint64_t intValue = readUInt64();
    double value;
    std::memcpy(&value, &intValue, sizeof(double));
    return value;
}

std::string Packet::readString() {
    uint32_t length = readUInt32();
    
    if (m_readPos + length > m_data.size()) return "";
    
    std::string value(reinterpret_cast<const char*>(&m_data[m_readPos]), length);
    m_readPos += length;
    
    return value;
}

void Packet::readBytes(void* data, size_t size) {
    if (m_readPos + size > m_data.size()) return;
    
    std::memcpy(data, &m_data[m_readPos], size);
    m_readPos += size;
}

void Packet::clear() {
    m_data.clear();
    m_readPos = 0;
}

} // namespace nk
```

## 3. Network_TCP.cpp - Implémentation TCP (Windows)

```cpp
// Network_TCP.cpp
#include "Network.hpp"
#include "Error.hpp"

#ifdef _WIN32
#include <winsock2.h>
#include <ws2tcpip.h>
#pragma comment(lib, "ws2_32.lib")
#else
#include <sys/socket.h>
#include <netinet/in.h>
#include <netinet/tcp.h>
#include <arpa/inet.h>
#include <unistd.h>
#include <fcntl.h>
#include <errno.h>
#define INVALID_SOCKET -1
#define SOCKET_ERROR -1
#endif

namespace nk {

// ====================================================================
// IP ADDRESS
// ====================================================================

bool IPAddress::parse(const std::string& address) {
    int a, b, c, d;
    if (std::sscanf(address.c_str(), "%d.%d.%d.%d", &a, &b, &c, &d) == 4) {
        bytes[0] = static_cast<uint8_t>(a);
        bytes[1] = static_cast<uint8_t>(b);
        bytes[2] = static_cast<uint8_t>(c);
        bytes[3] = static_cast<uint8_t>(d);
        return true;
    }
    return false;
}

std::string IPAddress::toString() const {
    char buffer[16];
    std::snprintf(buffer, sizeof(buffer), "%d.%d.%d.%d", 
                 bytes[0], bytes[1], bytes[2], bytes[3]);
    return buffer;
}

// ====================================================================
// SOCKET BASE
// ====================================================================

Socket::Socket() 
    : m_socket(INVALID_SOCKET)
    , m_state(SocketState::Disconnected)
    , m_blocking(true) {
}

Socket::~Socket() {
}

int Socket::send(const Packet& packet) {
    return send(packet.data(), packet.size());
}

int Socket::receive(Packet& packet) {
    uint8_t buffer[4096];
    int received = receive(buffer, sizeof(buffer));
    
    if (received > 0) {
        packet.clear();
        packet.writeBytes(buffer, received);
    }
    
    return received;
}

// ====================================================================
// TCP SOCKET
// ====================================================================

TCPSocket::TCPSocket() {
    m_socket = ::socket(AF_INET, SOCK_STREAM, IPPROTO_TCP);
    
    NK_VALIDATE_MSG(nullptr, m_socket != INVALID_SOCKET, "Failed to create TCP socket");
}

TCPSocket::TCPSocket(SocketHandle socket) {
    m_socket = socket;
    m_state = SocketState::Connected;
}

TCPSocket::~TCPSocket() {
    disconnect();
}

bool TCPSocket::connect(const IPAddress& address, uint16_t port) {
    if (m_state == SocketState::Connected) {
        return true;
    }
    
    sockaddr_in addr;
    std::memset(&addr, 0, sizeof(addr));
    addr.sin_family = AF_INET;
    addr.sin_port = htons(port);
    addr.sin_addr.s_addr = htonl(address.toInt());
    
    m_state = SocketState::Connecting;
    
    int result = ::connect(m_socket, reinterpret_cast<sockaddr*>(&addr), sizeof(addr));
    
    if (result == SOCKET_ERROR) {
        m_state = SocketState::Error;
        return false;
    }
    
    m_state = SocketState::Connected;
    return true;
}

void TCPSocket::disconnect() {
    if (m_socket != INVALID_SOCKET) {
#ifdef _WIN32
        ::closesocket(m_socket);
#else
        ::close(m_socket);
#endif
        m_socket = INVALID_SOCKET;
    }
    
    m_state = SocketState::Disconnected;
}

bool TCPSocket::isConnected() const {
    return m_state == SocketState::Connected;
}

int TCPSocket::send(const void* data, size_t size) {
    if (!isConnected()) return -1;
    
    int sent = ::send(m_socket, static_cast<const char*>(data), static_cast<int>(size), 0);
    
    if (sent == SOCKET_ERROR) {
        m_state = SocketState::Error;
        return -1;
    }
    
    return sent;
}

int TCPSocket::receive(void* data, size_t size) {
    if (!isConnected()) return -1;
    
    int received = ::recv(m_socket, static_cast<char*>(data), static_cast<int>(size), 0);
    
    if (received == SOCKET_ERROR || received == 0) {
        m_state = SocketState::Disconnected;
        return -1;
    }
    
    return received;
}

Endpoint TCPSocket::getLocalEndpoint() const {
    sockaddr_in addr;
    socklen_t addrLen = sizeof(addr);
    
    if (::getsockname(m_socket, reinterpret_cast<sockaddr*>(&addr), &addrLen) == 0) {
        uint32_t ip = ntohl(addr.sin_addr.s_addr);
        return Endpoint(
            IPAddress((ip >> 24) & 0xFF, (ip >> 16) & 0xFF, (ip >> 8) & 0xFF, ip & 0xFF),
            ntohs(addr.sin_port)
        );
    }
    
    return Endpoint();
}

Endpoint TCPSocket::getRemoteEndpoint() const {
    sockaddr_in addr;
    socklen_t addrLen = sizeof(addr);
    
    if (::getpeername(m_socket, reinterpret_cast<sockaddr*>(&addr), &addrLen) == 0) {
        uint32_t ip = ntohl(addr.sin_addr.s_addr);
        return Endpoint(
            IPAddress((ip >> 24) & 0xFF, (ip >> 16) & 0xFF, (ip >> 8) & 0xFF, ip & 0xFF),
            ntohs(addr.sin_port)
        );
    }
    
    return Endpoint();
}

void TCPSocket::setBlocking(bool blocking) {
    m_blocking = blocking;
    
#ifdef _WIN32
    u_long mode = blocking ? 0 : 1;
    ::ioctlsocket(m_socket, FIONBIO, &mode);
#else
    int flags = ::fcntl(m_socket, F_GETFL, 0);
    if (blocking) {
        ::fcntl(m_socket, F_SETFL, flags & ~O_NONBLOCK);
    } else {
        ::fcntl(m_socket, F_SETFL, flags | O_NONBLOCK);
    }
#endif
}

void TCPSocket::setTimeout(uint32_t milliseconds) {
#ifdef _WIN32
    DWORD timeout = milliseconds;
    ::setsockopt(m_socket, SOL_SOCKET, SO_RCVTIMEO, 
                reinterpret_cast<const char*>(&timeout), sizeof(timeout));
    ::setsockopt(m_socket, SOL_SOCKET, SO_SNDTIMEO,
                reinterpret_cast<const char*>(&timeout), sizeof(timeout));
#else
    struct timeval tv;
    tv.tv_sec = milliseconds / 1000;
    tv.tv_usec = (milliseconds % 1000) * 1000;
    ::setsockopt(m_socket, SOL_SOCKET, SO_RCVTIMEO, &tv, sizeof(tv));
    ::setsockopt(m_socket, SOL_SOCKET, SO_SNDTIMEO, &tv, sizeof(tv));
#endif
}

void TCPSocket::setNoDelay(bool noDelay) {
    int flag = noDelay ? 1 : 0;
    ::setsockopt(m_socket, IPPROTO_TCP, TCP_NODELAY, 
                reinterpret_cast<const char*>(&flag), sizeof(flag));
}

void TCPSocket::setKeepAlive(bool keepAlive) {
    int flag = keepAlive ? 1 : 0;
    ::setsockopt(m_socket, SOL_SOCKET, SO_KEEPALIVE,
                reinterpret_cast<const char*>(&flag), sizeof(flag));
}

// ====================================================================
// TCP LISTENER
// ====================================================================

TCPListener::TCPListener()
    : m_socket(INVALID_SOCKET)
    , m_listening(false)
    , m_port(0) {
}

TCPListener::~TCPListener() {
    close();
}

bool TCPListener::listen(uint16_t port, const IPAddress& address) {
    m_socket = ::socket(AF_INET, SOCK_STREAM, IPPROTO_TCP);
    
    NK_VALIDATE_MSG(nullptr, m_socket != INVALID_SOCKET, "Failed to create listener socket");
    
    // Reuse address
    int reuse = 1;
    ::setsockopt(m_socket, SOL_SOCKET, SO_REUSEADDR,
                reinterpret_cast<const char*>(&reuse), sizeof(reuse));
    
    sockaddr_in addr;
    std::memset(&addr, 0, sizeof(addr));
    addr.sin_family = AF_INET;
    addr.sin_port = htons(port);
    addr.sin_addr.s_addr = htonl(address.toInt());
    
    if (::bind(m_socket, reinterpret_cast<sockaddr*>(&addr), sizeof(addr)) == SOCKET_ERROR) {
        close();
        return false;
    }
    
    if (::listen(m_socket, SOMAXCONN) == SOCKET_ERROR) {
        close();
        return false;
    }
    
    m_listening = true;
    m_port = port;
    
    return true;
}

void TCPListener::close() {
    if (m_socket != INVALID_SOCKET) {
#ifdef _WIN32
        ::closesocket(m_socket);
#else
        ::close(m_socket);
#endif
        m_socket = INVALID_SOCKET;
    }
    
    m_listening = false;
}

TCPSocket* TCPListener::accept() {
    if (!m_listening) return nullptr;
    
    sockaddr_in clientAddr;
    socklen_t addrLen = sizeof(clientAddr);
    
    Socket::SocketHandle clientSocket = ::accept(m_socket, 
                                                  reinterpret_cast<sockaddr*>(&clientAddr),
                                                  &addrLen);
    
    if (clientSocket == INVALID_SOCKET) {
        return nullptr;
    }
    
    return new TCPSocket(clientSocket);
}

void TCPListener::setBlocking(bool blocking) {
#ifdef _WIN32
    u_long mode = blocking ? 0 : 1;
    ::ioctlsocket(m_socket, FIONBIO, &mode);
#else
    int flags = ::fcntl(m_socket, F_GETFL, 0);
    if (blocking) {
        ::fcntl(m_socket, F_SETFL, flags & ~O_NONBLOCK);
    } else {
        ::fcntl(m_socket, F_SETFL, flags | O_NONBLOCK);
    }
#endif
}

} // namespace nk
```

Trop long ! Suite dans le prochain message avec **UDP, WebSocket, HTTPClient, TCPServer/Client** ?

# PARTIE 18 : Network UDP + WebSocket + HTTP + Server/Client

## 1. Network_UDP.cpp - Implémentation UDP

```cpp
// Network_UDP.cpp
#include "Network.hpp"
#include "Error.hpp"

#ifdef _WIN32
#include <winsock2.h>
#include <ws2tcpip.h>
#else
#include <sys/socket.h>
#include <netinet/in.h>
#include <arpa/inet.h>
#include <unistd.h>
#include <fcntl.h>
#define INVALID_SOCKET -1
#define SOCKET_ERROR -1
#endif

namespace nk {

// ====================================================================
// UDP SOCKET
// ====================================================================

UDPSocket::UDPSocket()
    : m_hasDefaultEndpoint(false) {
    
    m_socket = ::socket(AF_INET, SOCK_DGRAM, IPPROTO_UDP);
    
    NK_VALIDATE_MSG(nullptr, m_socket != INVALID_SOCKET, "Failed to create UDP socket");
    
    m_state = SocketState::Disconnected;
}

UDPSocket::~UDPSocket() {
    unbind();
}

bool UDPSocket::bind(uint16_t port, const IPAddress& address) {
    sockaddr_in addr;
    std::memset(&addr, 0, sizeof(addr));
    addr.sin_family = AF_INET;
    addr.sin_port = htons(port);
    addr.sin_addr.s_addr = htonl(address.toInt());
    
    if (::bind(m_socket, reinterpret_cast<sockaddr*>(&addr), sizeof(addr)) == SOCKET_ERROR) {
        m_state = SocketState::Error;
        return false;
    }
    
    m_state = SocketState::Connected; // For UDP, "connected" means bound
    return true;
}

void UDPSocket::unbind() {
    if (m_socket != INVALID_SOCKET) {
#ifdef _WIN32
        ::closesocket(m_socket);
#else
        ::close(m_socket);
#endif
        m_socket = INVALID_SOCKET;
    }
    
    m_state = SocketState::Disconnected;
    m_hasDefaultEndpoint = false;
}

bool UDPSocket::connect(const IPAddress& address, uint16_t port) {
    m_defaultEndpoint = Endpoint(address, port);
    m_hasDefaultEndpoint = true;
    return true;
}

void UDPSocket::disconnect() {
    m_hasDefaultEndpoint = false;
}

int UDPSocket::send(const void* data, size_t size) {
    if (!m_hasDefaultEndpoint) return -1;
    return sendTo(data, size, m_defaultEndpoint);
}

int UDPSocket::receive(void* data, size_t size) {
    Endpoint endpoint;
    return receiveFrom(data, size, endpoint);
}

int UDPSocket::sendTo(const void* data, size_t size, const Endpoint& endpoint) {
    sockaddr_in addr;
    std::memset(&addr, 0, sizeof(addr));
    addr.sin_family = AF_INET;
    addr.sin_port = htons(endpoint.port);
    addr.sin_addr.s_addr = htonl(endpoint.address.toInt());
    
    int sent = ::sendto(m_socket, 
                       static_cast<const char*>(data), 
                       static_cast<int>(size), 
                       0,
                       reinterpret_cast<sockaddr*>(&addr),
                       sizeof(addr));
    
    if (sent == SOCKET_ERROR) {
        return -1;
    }
    
    return sent;
}

int UDPSocket::receiveFrom(void* data, size_t size, Endpoint& endpoint) {
    sockaddr_in addr;
    socklen_t addrLen = sizeof(addr);
    
    int received = ::recvfrom(m_socket,
                             static_cast<char*>(data),
                             static_cast<int>(size),
                             0,
                             reinterpret_cast<sockaddr*>(&addr),
                             &addrLen);
    
    if (received == SOCKET_ERROR) {
        return -1;
    }
    
    uint32_t ip = ntohl(addr.sin_addr.s_addr);
    endpoint.address = IPAddress((ip >> 24) & 0xFF, (ip >> 16) & 0xFF, 
                                 (ip >> 8) & 0xFF, ip & 0xFF);
    endpoint.port = ntohs(addr.sin_port);
    
    return received;
}

int UDPSocket::sendTo(const Packet& packet, const Endpoint& endpoint) {
    return sendTo(packet.data(), packet.size(), endpoint);
}

int UDPSocket::receiveFrom(Packet& packet, Endpoint& endpoint) {
    uint8_t buffer[65536]; // Max UDP packet size
    int received = receiveFrom(buffer, sizeof(buffer), endpoint);
    
    if (received > 0) {
        packet.clear();
        packet.writeBytes(buffer, received);
    }
    
    return received;
}

Endpoint UDPSocket::getLocalEndpoint() const {
    sockaddr_in addr;
    socklen_t addrLen = sizeof(addr);
    
    if (::getsockname(m_socket, reinterpret_cast<sockaddr*>(&addr), &addrLen) == 0) {
        uint32_t ip = ntohl(addr.sin_addr.s_addr);
        return Endpoint(
            IPAddress((ip >> 24) & 0xFF, (ip >> 16) & 0xFF, (ip >> 8) & 0xFF, ip & 0xFF),
            ntohs(addr.sin_port)
        );
    }
    
    return Endpoint();
}

Endpoint UDPSocket::getRemoteEndpoint() const {
    return m_defaultEndpoint;
}

void UDPSocket::setBlocking(bool blocking) {
    m_blocking = blocking;
    
#ifdef _WIN32
    u_long mode = blocking ? 0 : 1;
    ::ioctlsocket(m_socket, FIONBIO, &mode);
#else
    int flags = ::fcntl(m_socket, F_GETFL, 0);
    if (blocking) {
        ::fcntl(m_socket, F_SETFL, flags & ~O_NONBLOCK);
    } else {
        ::fcntl(m_socket, F_SETFL, flags | O_NONBLOCK);
    }
#endif
}

void UDPSocket::setTimeout(uint32_t milliseconds) {
#ifdef _WIN32
    DWORD timeout = milliseconds;
    ::setsockopt(m_socket, SOL_SOCKET, SO_RCVTIMEO, 
                reinterpret_cast<const char*>(&timeout), sizeof(timeout));
    ::setsockopt(m_socket, SOL_SOCKET, SO_SNDTIMEO,
                reinterpret_cast<const char*>(&timeout), sizeof(timeout));
#else
    struct timeval tv;
    tv.tv_sec = milliseconds / 1000;
    tv.tv_usec = (milliseconds % 1000) * 1000;
    ::setsockopt(m_socket, SOL_SOCKET, SO_RCVTIMEO, &tv, sizeof(tv));
    ::setsockopt(m_socket, SOL_SOCKET, SO_SNDTIMEO, &tv, sizeof(tv));
#endif
}

void UDPSocket::setBroadcast(bool broadcast) {
    int flag = broadcast ? 1 : 0;
    ::setsockopt(m_socket, SOL_SOCKET, SO_BROADCAST,
                reinterpret_cast<const char*>(&flag), sizeof(flag));
}

} // namespace nk
```

## 2. Network_HTTP.cpp - Client HTTP

```cpp
// Network_HTTP.cpp
#include "Network.hpp"
#include <sstream>
#include <algorithm>

namespace nk {

// ====================================================================
// HTTP REQUEST
// ====================================================================

std::string HTTPRequest::toString() const {
    std::ostringstream oss;
    
    // Request line
    const char* methodStr = "GET";
    switch (method) {
        case HTTPMethod::GET: methodStr = "GET"; break;
        case HTTPMethod::POST: methodStr = "POST"; break;
        case HTTPMethod::PUT: methodStr = "PUT"; break;
        case HTTPMethod::DELETE: methodStr = "DELETE"; break;
        case HTTPMethod::PATCH: methodStr = "PATCH"; break;
        case HTTPMethod::HEAD: methodStr = "HEAD"; break;
        case HTTPMethod::OPTIONS: methodStr = "OPTIONS"; break;
    }
    
    oss << methodStr << " " << uri << " HTTP/1.1\r\n";
    
    // Host header (required in HTTP/1.1)
    oss << "Host: " << host << "\r\n";
    
    // Other headers
    for (const auto& header : headers) {
        oss << header.first << ": " << header.second << "\r\n";
    }
    
    // Content-Length for POST/PUT
    if (!body.empty()) {
        oss << "Content-Length: " << body.length() << "\r\n";
    }
    
    // End of headers
    oss << "\r\n";
    
    // Body
    if (!body.empty()) {
        oss << body;
    }
    
    return oss.str();
}

// ====================================================================
// HTTP RESPONSE
// ====================================================================

bool HTTPResponse::parse(const std::string& response) {
    // Parse status line
    size_t lineEnd = response.find("\r\n");
    if (lineEnd == std::string::npos) return false;
    
    std::string statusLine = response.substr(0, lineEnd);
    
    // HTTP/1.1 200 OK
    size_t firstSpace = statusLine.find(' ');
    size_t secondSpace = statusLine.find(' ', firstSpace + 1);
    
    if (firstSpace == std::string::npos || secondSpace == std::string::npos) {
        return false;
    }
    
    statusCode = std::stoi(statusLine.substr(firstSpace + 1, secondSpace - firstSpace - 1));
    statusMessage = statusLine.substr(secondSpace + 1);
    
    // Parse headers
    size_t headerStart = lineEnd + 2;
    size_t headerEnd = response.find("\r\n\r\n", headerStart);
    
    if (headerEnd == std::string::npos) return false;
    
    std::string headerSection = response.substr(headerStart, headerEnd - headerStart);
    
    size_t pos = 0;
    while (pos < headerSection.length()) {
        size_t lineEnd = headerSection.find("\r\n", pos);
        if (lineEnd == std::string::npos) lineEnd = headerSection.length();
        
        std::string headerLine = headerSection.substr(pos, lineEnd - pos);
        
        size_t colonPos = headerLine.find(':');
        if (colonPos != std::string::npos) {
            std::string key = headerLine.substr(0, colonPos);
            std::string value = headerLine.substr(colonPos + 1);
            
            // Trim whitespace
            value.erase(0, value.find_first_not_of(" \t"));
            value.erase(value.find_last_not_of(" \t") + 1);
            
            headers[key] = value;
        }
        
        pos = lineEnd + 2;
    }
    
    // Parse body
    size_t bodyStart = headerEnd + 4;
    if (bodyStart < response.length()) {
        body = response.substr(bodyStart);
    }
    
    return true;
}

// ====================================================================
// HTTP CLIENT
// ====================================================================

HTTPClient::HTTPClient() {
    // Default headers
    m_defaultHeaders["User-Agent"] = "NKEngine/1.0";
    m_defaultHeaders["Accept"] = "*/*";
    m_defaultHeaders["Connection"] = "close";
}

HTTPClient::~HTTPClient() {
}

HTTPResponse HTTPClient::request(const HTTPRequest& request, uint32_t timeoutMs) {
    HTTPResponse response;
    
    // Parse host to get IP and port
    std::string host = request.host;
    uint16_t port = 80;
    
    size_t colonPos = host.find(':');
    if (colonPos != std::string::npos) {
        port = std::stoi(host.substr(colonPos + 1));
        host = host.substr(0, colonPos);
    }
    
    // Resolve hostname
    IPAddress address;
    if (!NetworkUtils::resolveHostname(host, address)) {
        response.statusCode = -1;
        response.statusMessage = "Failed to resolve hostname";
        return response;
    }
    
    // Connect
    TCPSocket socket;
    socket.setTimeout(timeoutMs);
    
    if (!socket.connect(address, port)) {
        response.statusCode = -1;
        response.statusMessage = "Failed to connect";
        return response;
    }
    
    // Send request
    std::string requestStr = request.toString();
    
    if (socket.send(requestStr.c_str(), requestStr.length()) < 0) {
        response.statusCode = -1;
        response.statusMessage = "Failed to send request";
        return response;
    }
    
    // Receive response
    std::string responseStr;
    char buffer[4096];
    int received;
    
    while ((received = socket.receive(buffer, sizeof(buffer))) > 0) {
        responseStr.append(buffer, received);
        
        // Check if we have complete response
        if (responseStr.find("\r\n\r\n") != std::string::npos) {
            // Check Content-Length
            size_t clPos = responseStr.find("Content-Length:");
            if (clPos != std::string::npos) {
                size_t clEnd = responseStr.find("\r\n", clPos);
                std::string clStr = responseStr.substr(clPos + 15, clEnd - clPos - 15);
                
                // Trim whitespace
                clStr.erase(0, clStr.find_first_not_of(" \t"));
                clStr.erase(clStr.find_last_not_of(" \t") + 1);
                
                size_t contentLength = std::stoi(clStr);
                size_t headerEnd = responseStr.find("\r\n\r\n");
                size_t bodyReceived = responseStr.length() - (headerEnd + 4);
                
                if (bodyReceived >= contentLength) {
                    break;
                }
            } else {
                // No Content-Length, assume complete
                break;
            }
        }
    }
    
    // Parse response
    if (!response.parse(responseStr)) {
        response.statusCode = -1;
        response.statusMessage = "Failed to parse response";
    }
    
    socket.disconnect();
    
    return response;
}

HTTPResponse HTTPClient::get(const std::string& url, uint32_t timeoutMs) {
    auto parsedURL = NetworkUtils::parseURL(url);
    
    HTTPRequest request;
    request.method = HTTPMethod::GET;
    request.uri = parsedURL.path.empty() ? "/" : parsedURL.path;
    request.host = parsedURL.host;
    
    // Add default headers
    for (const auto& header : m_defaultHeaders) {
        request.headers[header.first] = header.second;
    }
    
    return this->request(request, timeoutMs);
}

HTTPResponse HTTPClient::post(const std::string& url, const std::string& body,
                              const std::string& contentType, uint32_t timeoutMs) {
    
    auto parsedURL = NetworkUtils::parseURL(url);
    
    HTTPRequest request;
    request.method = HTTPMethod::POST;
    request.uri = parsedURL.path.empty() ? "/" : parsedURL.path;
    request.host = parsedURL.host;
    request.body = body;
    
    // Add default headers
    for (const auto& header : m_defaultHeaders) {
        request.headers[header.first] = header.second;
    }
    
    request.headers["Content-Type"] = contentType;
    
    return this->request(request, timeoutMs);
}

void HTTPClient::setHeader(const std::string& key, const std::string& value) {
    m_defaultHeaders[key] = value;
}

} // namespace nk
```

## 3. Network_WebSocket.cpp - WebSocket

```cpp
// Network_WebSocket.cpp
#include "Network.hpp"
#include <random>
#include <sstream>
#include <iomanip>

// Pour Base64 encoding
static const char base64_chars[] = 
    "ABCDEFGHIJKLMNOPQRSTUVWXYZ"
    "abcdefghijklmnopqrstuvwxyz"
    "0123456789+/";

static std::string base64_encode(const unsigned char* data, size_t length) {
    std::string result;
    int i = 0;
    int j = 0;
    unsigned char array3[3];
    unsigned char array4[4];
    
    while (length--) {
        array3[i++] = *(data++);
        if (i == 3) {
            array4[0] = (array3[0] & 0xfc) >> 2;
            array4[1] = ((array3[0] & 0x03) << 4) + ((array3[1] & 0xf0) >> 4);
            array4[2] = ((array3[1] & 0x0f) << 2) + ((array3[2] & 0xc0) >> 6);
            array4[3] = array3[2] & 0x3f;
            
            for (i = 0; i < 4; i++)
                result += base64_chars[array4[i]];
            i = 0;
        }
    }
    
    if (i) {
        for (j = i; j < 3; j++)
            array3[j] = '\0';
        
        array4[0] = (array3[0] & 0xfc) >> 2;
        array4[1] = ((array3[0] & 0x03) << 4) + ((array3[1] & 0xf0) >> 4);
        array4[2] = ((array3[1] & 0x0f) << 2) + ((array3[2] & 0xc0) >> 6);
        
        for (j = 0; j < i + 1; j++)
            result += base64_chars[array4[j]];
        
        while (i++ < 3)
            result += '=';
    }
    
    return result;
}

// SHA1 (simplified implementation for WebSocket handshake)
// For production, use a proper crypto library
#include <cstring>

namespace nk {

// ====================================================================
// WEBSOCKET
// ====================================================================

WebSocket::WebSocket()
    : m_connected(false)
    , m_receiving(false) {
}

WebSocket::~WebSocket() {
    disconnect();
}

bool WebSocket::connect(const std::string& url, uint32_t timeoutMs) {
    auto parsedURL = NetworkUtils::parseURL(url);
    
    if (parsedURL.protocol != "ws" && parsedURL.protocol != "wss") {
        return false;
    }
    
    uint16_t port = parsedURL.port;
    if (port == 0) {
        port = (parsedURL.protocol == "wss") ? 443 : 80;
    }
    
    // Resolve hostname
    IPAddress address;
    if (!NetworkUtils::resolveHostname(parsedURL.host, address)) {
        return false;
    }
    
    // Create socket
    m_socket = std::make_unique<TCPSocket>();
    m_socket->setTimeout(timeoutMs);
    
    if (!m_socket->connect(address, port)) {
        return false;
    }
    
    // Perform WebSocket handshake
    if (!performHandshake(parsedURL.host, parsedURL.path)) {
        m_socket->disconnect();
        return false;
    }
    
    m_connected = true;
    return true;
}

void WebSocket::disconnect() {
    if (m_connected) {
        // Send close frame
        WebSocketFrame closeFrame;
        closeFrame.fin = true;
        closeFrame.opcode = WebSocketOpcode::Close;
        sendFrame(closeFrame);
        
        m_connected = false;
    }
    
    stopReceiving();
    
    if (m_socket) {
        m_socket->disconnect();
    }
}

bool WebSocket::performHandshake(const std::string& host, const std::string& path) {
    // Generate random key
    std::random_device rd;
    std::mt19937 gen(rd());
    std::uniform_int_distribution<> dis(0, 255);
    
    unsigned char keyBytes[16];
    for (int i = 0; i < 16; i++) {
        keyBytes[i] = dis(gen);
    }
    
    std::string key = base64_encode(keyBytes, 16);
    
    // Build handshake request
    std::ostringstream oss;
    oss << "GET " << (path.empty() ? "/" : path) << " HTTP/1.1\r\n";
    oss << "Host: " << host << "\r\n";
    oss << "Upgrade: websocket\r\n";
    oss << "Connection: Upgrade\r\n";
    oss << "Sec-WebSocket-Key: " << key << "\r\n";
    oss << "Sec-WebSocket-Version: 13\r\n";
    oss << "\r\n";
    
    std::string request = oss.str();
    
    if (m_socket->send(request.c_str(), request.length()) < 0) {
        return false;
    }
    
    // Read response
    char buffer[1024];
    int received = m_socket->receive(buffer, sizeof(buffer));
    
    if (received < 0) {
        return false;
    }
    
    std::string response(buffer, received);
    
    // Verify handshake
    if (response.find("HTTP/1.1 101") == std::string::npos) {
        return false;
    }
    
    if (response.find("Upgrade: websocket") == std::string::npos) {
        return false;
    }
    
    return true;
}

bool WebSocket::sendFrame(const WebSocketFrame& frame) {
    std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(m_sendMutex);
    
    if (!m_connected) return false;
    
    std::vector<uint8_t> frameData;
    
    // Byte 0: FIN + opcode
    uint8_t byte0 = (frame.fin ? 0x80 : 0x00) | static_cast<uint8_t>(frame.opcode);
    frameData.push_back(byte0);
    
    // Byte 1: MASK + payload length
    uint8_t byte1 = frame.masked ? 0x80 : 0x00;
    
    size_t payloadLength = frame.payload.size();
    
    if (payloadLength < 126) {
        byte1 |= static_cast<uint8_t>(payloadLength);
        frameData.push_back(byte1);
    } else if (payloadLength < 65536) {
        byte1 |= 126;
        frameData.push_back(byte1);
        frameData.push_back((payloadLength >> 8) & 0xFF);
        frameData.push_back(payloadLength & 0xFF);
    } else {
        byte1 |= 127;
        frameData.push_back(byte1);
        for (int i = 7; i >= 0; i--) {
            frameData.push_back((payloadLength >> (i * 8)) & 0xFF);
        }
    }
    
    // Masking key (if masked)
    uint8_t maskingKey[4] = {0};
    
    if (frame.masked) {
        std::random_device rd;
        std::mt19937 gen(rd());
        std::uniform_int_distribution<> dis(0, 255);
        
        for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
            maskingKey[i] = dis(gen);
            frameData.push_back(maskingKey[i]);
        }
    }
    
    // Payload
    for (size_t i = 0; i < frame.payload.size(); i++) {
        uint8_t byte = frame.payload[i];
        if (frame.masked) {
            byte ^= maskingKey[i % 4];
        }
        frameData.push_back(byte);
    }
    
    return m_socket->send(frameData.data(), frameData.size()) > 0;
}

bool WebSocket::receiveFrame(WebSocketFrame& frame) {
    std::lock_guard<std::mutex> lock(m_receiveMutex);
    
    if (!m_connected) return false;
    
    // Read first 2 bytes
    uint8_t header[2];
    if (m_socket->receive(header, 2) != 2) {
        return false;
    }
    
    frame.fin = (header[0] & 0x80) != 0;
    frame.opcode = static_cast<WebSocketOpcode>(header[0] & 0x0F);
    frame.masked = (header[1] & 0x80) != 0;
    
    uint64_t payloadLength = header[1] & 0x7F;
    
    // Extended payload length
    if (payloadLength == 126) {
        uint8_t extLen[2];
        if (m_socket->receive(extLen, 2) != 2) return false;
        payloadLength = (extLen[0] << 8) | extLen[1];
    } else if (payloadLength == 127) {
        uint8_t extLen[8];
        if (m_socket->receive(extLen, 8) != 8) return false;
        payloadLength = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < 8; i++) {
            payloadLength = (payloadLength << 8) | extLen[i];
        }
    }
    
    // Masking key
    uint8_t maskingKey[4] = {0};
    if (frame.masked) {
        if (m_socket->receive(maskingKey, 4) != 4) return false;
    }
    
    // Payload
    frame.payload.resize(payloadLength);
    
    if (payloadLength > 0) {
        if (m_socket->receive(frame.payload.data(), payloadLength) != static_cast<int>(payloadLength)) {
            return false;
        }
        
        // Unmask
        if (frame.masked) {
            for (size_t i = 0; i < payloadLength; i++) {
                frame.payload[i] ^= maskingKey[i % 4];
            }
        }
    }
    
    return true;
}

bool WebSocket::sendText(const std::string& text) {
    WebSocketFrame frame;
    frame.fin = true;
    frame.opcode = WebSocketOpcode::Text;
    frame.masked = true; // Client frames must be masked
    frame.payload.assign(text.begin(), text.end());
    
    return sendFrame(frame);
}

bool WebSocket::sendBinary(const void* data, size_t size) {
    WebSocketFrame frame;
    frame.fin = true;
    frame.opcode = WebSocketOpcode::Binary;
    frame.masked = true;
    frame.payload.assign(static_cast<const uint8_t*>(data),
                        static_cast<const uint8_t*>(data) + size);
    
    return sendFrame(frame);
}

bool WebSocket::sendPing() {
    WebSocketFrame frame;
    frame.fin = true;
    frame.opcode = WebSocketOpcode::Ping;
    frame.masked = true;
    
    return sendFrame(frame);
}

bool WebSocket::receiveText(std::string& text) {
    WebSocketFrame frame;
    
    if (receiveFrame(frame)) {
        if (frame.opcode == WebSocketOpcode::Text) {
            text.assign(frame.payload.begin(), frame.payload.end());
            return true;
        }
    }
    
    return false;
}

bool WebSocket::receiveBinary(std::vector<uint8_t>& data) {
    WebSocketFrame frame;
    
    if (receiveFrame(frame)) {
        if (frame.opcode == WebSocketOpcode::Binary) {
            data = frame.payload;
            return true;
        }
    }
    
    return false;
}

void WebSocket::startReceiving() {
    if (m_receiving) return;
    
    m_receiving = true;
    m_receiveThread = std::thread(&WebSocket::receiveThreadFunc, this);
}

void WebSocket::stopReceiving() {
    if (!m_receiving) return;
    
    m_receiving = false;
    
    if (m_receiveThread.joinable()) {
        m_receiveThread.join();
    }
}

void WebSocket::receiveThreadFunc() {
    while (m_receiving && m_connected) {
        WebSocketFrame frame;
        
        if (receiveFrame(frame)) {
            switch (frame.opcode) {
                case WebSocketOpcode::Text:
                    if (m_textCallback) {
                        std::string text(frame.payload.begin(), frame.payload.end());
                        m_textCallback(text);
                    }
                    break;
                    
                case WebSocketOpcode::Binary:
                    if (m_binaryCallback) {
                        m_binaryCallback(frame.payload);
                    }
                    break;
                    
                case WebSocketOpcode::Ping:
                    // Respond with pong
                    frame.opcode = WebSocketOpcode::Pong;
                    sendFrame(frame);
```
