```cpp
                    break;
                    
                case WebSocketOpcode::Close:
                    m_connected = false;
                    break;
                    
                default:
                    break;
            }
        } else {
            // Error receiving
            if (m_errorCallback) {
                m_errorCallback("Failed to receive frame");
            }
            m_connected = false;
            break;
        }
    }
}

} // namespace nk
```

Suite dans le prochain message avec **TCPServer, TCPClient, NetworkUtils et exemple complet** !

# PARTIE 20 : Exemples d'Applications Complètes

## 1. Example_ChatApp.cpp - Application de Chat Réseau avec UI

```cpp
// example_chat_app.cpp
#include "nk.hpp"
#include "Network.hpp"
#include "ImGui.hpp"
#include <iostream>
#include <sstream>
#include <deque>

// ====================================================================
// CHAT APPLICATION (Server + Client avec ImGui)
// ====================================================================

struct ChatMessage {
    std::string username;
    std::string message;
    uint32_t timestamp;
    uint32_t clientId;
};

class ChatServer {
public:
    ChatServer() {
        m_server.setClientConnectedCallback([this](uint32_t clientId, const nk::Endpoint& endpoint) {
            std::cout << "[Server] Client " << clientId << " connected from " 
                     << endpoint.toString() << std::endl;
            
            // Send chat history
            for (const auto& msg : m_chatHistory) {
                sendChatMessage(clientId, msg);
            }
        });
        
        m_server.setClientDisconnectedCallback([this](uint32_t clientId) {
            std::cout << "[Server] Client " << clientId << " disconnected" << std::endl;
            
            auto it = m_clientNames.find(clientId);
            if (it != m_clientNames.end()) {
                // Broadcast disconnect
                ChatMessage msg;
                msg.username = "System";
                msg.message = it->second + " has left the chat";
                msg.timestamp = getCurrentTimestamp();
                msg.clientId = 0;
                
                broadcastMessage(msg);
                
                m_clientNames.erase(it);
            }
        });
        
        m_server.setDataReceivedCallback([this](uint32_t clientId, const nk::Packet& packet) {
            handleClientMessage(clientId, packet);
        });
    }
    
    bool start(uint16_t port) {
        return m_server.start(port);
    }
    
    void stop() {
        m_server.stop();
    }
    
private:
    void handleClientMessage(uint32_t clientId, const nk::Packet& packet) {
        auto packetCopy = const_cast<nk::Packet&>(packet);
        
        uint8_t msgType = packetCopy.readUInt8();
        
        if (msgType == 0) { // Login
            std::string username = packetCopy.readString();
            m_clientNames[clientId] = username;
            
            std::cout << "[Server] Client " << clientId << " set username: " << username << std::endl;
            
            // Broadcast join
            ChatMessage msg;
            msg.username = "System";
            msg.message = username + " has joined the chat";
            msg.timestamp = getCurrentTimestamp();
            msg.clientId = 0;
            
            broadcastMessage(msg);
            
        } else if (msgType == 1) { // Chat message
            std::string message = packetCopy.readString();
            
            ChatMessage msg;
            msg.username = m_clientNames[clientId];
            msg.message = message;
            msg.timestamp = getCurrentTimestamp();
            msg.clientId = clientId;
            
            m_chatHistory.push_back(msg);
            
            // Keep only last 100 messages
            if (m_chatHistory.size() > 100) {
                m_chatHistory.pop_front();
            }
            
            std::cout << "[Server] " << msg.username << ": " << msg.message << std::endl;
            
            broadcastMessage(msg);
        }
    }
    
    void broadcastMessage(const ChatMessage& msg) {
        nk::Packet packet;
        packet.writeUInt8(1); // Chat message
        packet.writeString(msg.username);
        packet.writeString(msg.message);
        packet.writeUInt32(msg.timestamp);
        packet.writeUInt32(msg.clientId);
        
        m_server.sendToAll(packet);
    }
    
    void sendChatMessage(uint32_t clientId, const ChatMessage& msg) {
        nk::Packet packet;
        packet.writeUInt8(1); // Chat message
        packet.writeString(msg.username);
        packet.writeString(msg.message);
        packet.writeUInt32(msg.timestamp);
        packet.writeUInt32(msg.clientId);
        
        m_server.sendToClient(clientId, packet);
    }
    
    uint32_t getCurrentTimestamp() {
        return static_cast<uint32_t>(std::time(nullptr));
    }
    
    nk::TCPServer m_server;
    std::unordered_map<uint32_t, std::string> m_clientNames;
    std::deque<ChatMessage> m_chatHistory;
};

class ChatClient {
public:
    ChatClient() {
        m_client.setConnectedCallback([this]() {
            m_connected = true;
            std::cout << "[Client] Connected to server" << std::endl;
        });
        
        m_client.setDisconnectedCallback([this]() {
            m_connected = false;
            std::cout << "[Client] Disconnected from server" << std::endl;
        });
        
        m_client.setDataReceivedCallback([this](const nk::Packet& packet) {
            handleServerMessage(packet);
        });
    }
    
    bool connect(const std::string& address, uint16_t port, const std::string& username) {
        nk::IPAddress ip;
        if (!nk::NetworkUtils::resolveHostname(address, ip)) {
            return false;
        }
        
        if (!m_client.connect(ip, port)) {
            return false;
        }
        
        m_username = username;
        
        m_client.startReceiving();
        
        // Send login
        nk::Packet packet;
        packet.writeUInt8(0); // Login
        packet.writeString(username);
        
        m_client.send(packet);
        
        return true;
    }
    
    void disconnect() {
        m_client.disconnect();
    }
    
    void sendMessage(const std::string& message) {
        nk::Packet packet;
        packet.writeUInt8(1); // Chat message
        packet.writeString(message);
        
        m_client.send(packet);
    }
    
    bool isConnected() const { return m_connected; }
    
    const std::vector<ChatMessage>& getMessages() const { return m_messages; }
    
private:
    void handleServerMessage(const nk::Packet& packet) {
        auto packetCopy = const_cast<nk::Packet&>(packet);
        
        uint8_t msgType = packetCopy.readUInt8();
        
        if (msgType == 1) { // Chat message
            ChatMessage msg;
            msg.username = packetCopy.readString();
            msg.message = packetCopy.readString();
            msg.timestamp = packetCopy.readUInt32();
            msg.clientId = packetCopy.readUInt32();
            
            m_messages.push_back(msg);
            
            // Keep only last 100 messages
            if (m_messages.size() > 100) {
                m_messages.erase(m_messages.begin());
            }
        }
    }
    
    nk::TCPClient m_client;
    std::string m_username;
    bool m_connected = false;
    std::vector<ChatMessage> m_messages;
};

int nk::nk_main(int argc, char** argv) {
    std::cout << "=== Chat Application ===" << std::endl;
    
    // Initialize
    nk::NetworkUtils::initialize();
    
    auto& gfxContext = nk::GraphicsContext::instance();
    gfxContext.initialize(nk::RendererAPI::Auto);
    
    nk::WindowConfig windowConfig;
    windowConfig.title = "NK Chat Application";
    windowConfig.width = 800;
    windowConfig.height = 600;
    
    nk::Window window(windowConfig);
    
    nk::RendererConfig rendererConfig;
    rendererConfig.api = nk::RendererAPI::SoftwareCPU;
    
    nk::Renderer renderer(window, rendererConfig);
    
    // Initialize ImGui
    nk::ImGui::initialize(&renderer, nullptr);
    auto& imgui = nk::ImGui::getContext();
    imgui.setStyle(nk::UITheme::vscode());
    
    // Setup events
    auto& eventSystem = nk::EventSystem::instance();
    bool running = true;
    
    eventSystem.setEventCallback<nk::WindowCloseEvent>([&](auto* e) {
        running = false;
    });
    
    eventSystem.setEventCallback<nk::KeyPressedEvent>([&](auto* e) {
        if (e->getKey() == nk::Key::Escape) running = false;
    });
    
    // Mouse events for ImGui
    eventSystem.setEventCallback<nk::MouseMovedEvent>([&](auto* e) {
        imgui.setMousePosition(e->getX(), e->getY());
    });
    
    eventSystem.setEventCallback<nk::MouseButtonPressedEvent>([&](auto* e) {
        imgui.setMouseButton(static_cast<int>(e->getButton()), true);
    });
    
    eventSystem.setEventCallback<nk::MouseButtonReleasedEvent>([&](auto* e) {
        imgui.setMouseButton(static_cast<int>(e->getButton()), false);
    });
    
    eventSystem.setEventCallback<nk::MouseScrolledEvent>([&](auto* e) {
        imgui.setMouseWheel(e->getYOffset());
    });
    
    eventSystem.setEventCallback<nk::CharTypedEvent>([&](auto* e) {
        imgui.addInputCharacter(e->getChar());
    });
    
    // Chat application state
    enum class AppState {
        Menu,
        Server,
        Client
    };
    
    AppState appState = AppState::Menu;
    
    std::unique_ptr<ChatServer> server;
    std::unique_ptr<ChatClient> client;
    
    std::string serverAddress = "127.0.0.1";
    std::string username = "User";
    std::string currentMessage;
    
    uint16_t serverPort = 7777;
    
    // Main loop
    while (running) {
        while (auto event = eventSystem.pollEvent()) {}
        
        renderer.beginFrame(renderer.packColor(30, 30, 40, 255));
        
        imgui.beginFrame();
        
        if (appState == AppState::Menu) {
            // Main menu
            if (imgui.beginWindow("Chat Application", nullptr, 200, 150, 400, 300)) {
                imgui.text("NK Chat Application");
                imgui.separator();
                
                imgui.inputText("Username", username, 32);
                
                imgui.separator();
                
                if (imgui.button("Start Server", 350, 40)) {
                    server = std::make_unique<ChatServer>();
                    if (server->start(serverPort)) {
                        appState = AppState::Server;
                        std::cout << "Server started on port " << serverPort << std::endl;
                    }
                }
                
                imgui.separator();
                
                imgui.inputText("Server Address", serverAddress, 64);
                
                if (imgui.button("Connect to Server", 350, 40)) {
                    client = std::make_unique<ChatClient>();
                    if (client->connect(serverAddress, serverPort, username)) {
                        appState = AppState::Client;
                        std::cout << "Connected to server" << std::endl;
                    }
                }
                
                imgui.endWindow();
            }
        } else if (appState == AppState::Server) {
            // Server view
            if (imgui.beginWindow("Chat Server", nullptr, 50, 50, 700, 500)) {
                imgui.text("Server running on port 7777");
                imgui.separator();
                
                imgui.text("Waiting for clients to connect...");
                
                imgui.separator();
                
                if (imgui.button("Stop Server", 150, 30)) {
                    server->stop();
                    server.reset();
                    appState = AppState::Menu;
                }
                
                imgui.endWindow();
            }
        } else if (appState == AppState::Client) {
            // Client chat view
            if (imgui.beginWindow("Chat", nullptr, 50, 50, 700, 500)) {
                if (!client->isConnected()) {
                    imgui.text("Disconnected from server");
                    
                    if (imgui.button("Back to Menu", 150, 30)) {
                        client.reset();
                        appState = AppState::Menu;
                    }
                } else {
                    imgui.text(("Connected as: " + username).c_str());
                    imgui.separator();
                    
                    // Chat messages (scrollable area)
                    if (imgui.beginChild("ChatMessages", 680, 350, true)) {
                        const auto& messages = client->getMessages();
                        
                        for (const auto& msg : messages) {
                            std::ostringstream oss;
                            oss << "[" << msg.username << "] " << msg.message;
                            
                            uint32_t color = (msg.username == "System") ? 
                                           renderer.packColor(150, 150, 150, 255) :
                                           renderer.packColor(255, 255, 255, 255);
                            
                            imgui.textColored(oss.str(), color);
                        }
                        
                        imgui.endChild();
                    }
                    
                    imgui.separator();
                    
                    // Message input
                    imgui.inputText("Message", currentMessage, 256);
                    
                    imgui.sameLine();
                    
                    if (imgui.button("Send", 80, 30) && !currentMessage.empty()) {
                        client->sendMessage(currentMessage);
                        currentMessage.clear();
                    }
                    
                    imgui.separator();
                    
                    if (imgui.button("Disconnect", 150, 30)) {
                        client->disconnect();
                        client.reset();
                        appState = AppState::Menu;
                    }
                }
                
                imgui.endWindow();
            }
        }
        
        imgui.endFrame();
        
        renderer.endFrame();
        renderer.present();
    }
    
    // Cleanup
    if (server) server->stop();
    if (client) client->disconnect();
    
    nk::ImGui::shutdown();
    nk::NetworkUtils::shutdown();
    
    return 0;
}
```

## 2. Example_ImageViewer.cpp - Visionneuse d'Images avec UI

```cpp
// example_image_viewer.cpp
#include "nk.hpp"
#include "ImGui.hpp"
#include "ImageLoader.hpp"
#include <filesystem>

int nk::nk_main(int argc, char** argv) {
    std::cout << "=== Image Viewer ===" << std::endl;
    
    // Initialize graphics
    auto& gfxContext = nk::GraphicsContext::instance();
    gfxContext.initialize(nk::RendererAPI::Auto);
    
    nk::WindowConfig windowConfig;
    windowConfig.title = "NK Image Viewer";
    windowConfig.width = 1024;
    windowConfig.height = 768;
    
    nk::Window window(windowConfig);
    
    nk::RendererConfig rendererConfig;
    rendererConfig.api = nk::RendererAPI::SoftwareCPU;
    
    nk::Renderer renderer(window, rendererConfig);
    
    // Initialize ImGui
    nk::ImGui::initialize(&renderer, nullptr);
    auto& imgui = nk::ImGui::getContext();
    imgui.setStyle(nk::UITheme::dark());
    
    // Setup events
    auto& eventSystem = nk::EventSystem::instance();
    bool running = true;
    
    eventSystem.setEventCallback<nk::WindowCloseEvent>([&](auto* e) {
        running = false;
    });
    
    eventSystem.setEventCallback<nk::MouseMovedEvent>([&](auto* e) {
        imgui.setMousePosition(e->getX(), e->getY());
    });
    
    eventSystem.setEventCallback<nk::MouseButtonPressedEvent>([&](auto* e) {
        imgui.setMouseButton(static_cast<int>(e->getButton()), true);
    });
    
    eventSystem.setEventCallback<nk::MouseButtonReleasedEvent>([&](auto* e) {
        imgui.setMouseButton(static_cast<int>(e->getButton()), false);
    });
    
    eventSystem.setEventCallback<nk::MouseScrolledEvent>([&](auto* e) {
        imgui.setMouseWheel(e->getYOffset());
    });
    
    // Image viewer state
    nk::Image currentImage;
    std::string currentImagePath;
    std::vector<std::string> imageFiles;
    int currentImageIndex = -1;
    
    float zoom = 1.0f;
    float offsetX = 0.0f;
    float offsetY = 0.0f;
    
    bool showInfo = true;
    bool showHistogram = false;
    
    // Scan for images in current directory
    auto scanImages = [&]() {
        imageFiles.clear();
        
        try {
            for (const auto& entry : std::filesystem::directory_iterator(".")) {
                if (entry.is_regular_file()) {
                    std::string ext = entry.path().extension().string();
                    std::transform(ext.begin(), ext.end(), ext.begin(), ::tolower);
                    
                    if (ext == ".png" || ext == ".jpg" || ext == ".jpeg" || 
                        ext == ".bmp" || ext == ".ppm") {
                        imageFiles.push_back(entry.path().string());
                    }
                }
            }
        } catch (...) {
            std::cout << "Error scanning directory" << std::endl;
        }
        
        std::sort(imageFiles.begin(), imageFiles.end());
    };
    
    auto loadImage = [&](int index) {
        if (index < 0 || index >= static_cast<int>(imageFiles.size())) return;
        
        currentImage = nk::ImageLoader::load(imageFiles[index]);
        
        if (currentImage.isValid()) {
            currentImagePath = imageFiles[index];
            currentImageIndex = index;
            zoom = 1.0f;
            offsetX = 0.0f;
            offsetY = 0.0f;
            
            std::cout << "Loaded: " << currentImagePath << std::endl;
        } else {
            std::cout << "Failed to load: " << imageFiles[index] << std::endl;
        }
    };
    
    // Initial scan
    scanImages();
    if (!imageFiles.empty()) {
        loadImage(0);
    }
    
    // Main loop
    while (running) {
        while (auto event = eventSystem.pollEvent()) {}
        
        renderer.beginFrame(renderer.packColor(20, 20, 25, 255));
        
        // Draw image if loaded
        if (currentImage.isValid()) {
            int drawWidth = static_cast<int>(currentImage.width * zoom);
            int drawHeight = static_cast<int>(currentImage.height * zoom);
            
            int drawX = static_cast<int>((1024 - drawWidth) / 2 + offsetX);
            int drawY = static_cast<int>((768 - drawHeight) / 2 + offsetY);
            
            // Draw image (pixel by pixel - simplified, should use blit for performance)
            for (int y = 0; y < drawHeight; y++) {
                for (int x = 0; x < drawWidth; x++) {
                    int srcX = static_cast<int>(x / zoom);
                    int srcY = static_cast<int>(y / zoom);
                    
                    if (srcX >= 0 && srcX < currentImage.width && 
                        srcY >= 0 && srcY < currentImage.height) {
                        
                        uint32_t color = currentImage.getPixel(srcX, srcY);
                        renderer.setPixel(drawX + x, drawY + y, color);
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        // ImGui UI
        imgui.beginFrame();
        
        // File browser window
        if (imgui.beginWindow("Images", nullptr, 10, 10, 250, 400)) {
            if (imgui.button("Refresh", 230, 25)) {
                scanImages();
            }
            
            imgui.separator();
            
            // Image list
            for (int i = 0; i < static_cast<int>(imageFiles.size()); i++) {
                bool selected = (i == currentImageIndex);
                
                if (imgui.button(imageFiles[i].c_str(), 230, 25)) {
                    loadImage(i);
                }
            }
            
            imgui.endWindow();
        }
        
        // Controls window
        if (imgui.beginWindow("Controls", nullptr, 10, 420, 250, 200)) {
            if (currentImage.isValid()) {
                imgui.text("Zoom:");
                if (imgui.sliderFloat("##zoom", &zoom, 0.1f, 5.0f)) {
                    // Zoom changed
                }
                
                if (imgui.button("Fit to Window", 230, 25)) {
                    float scaleX = 1024.0f / currentImage.width;
                    float scaleY = 768.0f / currentImage.height;
                    zoom = std::min(scaleX, scaleY);
                }
                
                if (imgui.button("1:1", 100, 25)) {
                    zoom = 1.0f;
                }
                
                imgui.sameLine();
                
                if (imgui.button("Reset", 120, 25)) {
                    zoom = 1.0f;
                    offsetX = 0.0f;
                    offsetY = 0.0f;
                }
                
                imgui.separator();
                
                imgui.checkbox("Show Info", &showInfo);
                imgui.checkbox("Show Histogram", &showHistogram);
            } else {
                imgui.text("No image loaded");
            }
            
            imgui.endWindow();
        }
        
        // Info window
        if (showInfo && currentImage.isValid()) {
            if (imgui.beginWindow("Image Info", &showInfo, 270, 10, 300, 200)) {
                imgui.text(("File: " + currentImagePath).c_str());
                imgui.text(("Size: " + std::to_string(currentImage.width) + "x" + 
                          std::to_string(currentImage.height)).c_str());
                imgui.text(("Channels: " + std::to_string(currentImage.channels)).c_str());
                imgui.text(("Format: " + std::to_string(static_cast<int>(currentImage.format))).c_str());
                
                imgui.endWindow();
            }
        }
        
        imgui.endFrame();
        
        renderer.endFrame();
        renderer.present();
    }
    
    nk::ImGui::shutdown();
    
    return 0;
}
```

# PARTIE 21 : Exemples Complets (Audio Visualizer + Mini Game)

## 1. Example_AudioVisualizer.cpp - Visualiseur Audio Temps Réel

```cpp
// example_audio_visualizer.cpp
#include "nk.hpp"
#include "Audio.hpp"
#include "ImGui.hpp"
#include <cmath>

int nk::nk_main(int argc, char** argv) {
    std::cout << "=== Audio Visualizer ===" << std::endl;
    
    // Initialize
    auto& gfxContext = nk::GraphicsContext::instance();
    gfxContext.initialize(nk::RendererAPI::Auto);
    
    nk::WindowConfig windowConfig;
    windowConfig.title = "NK Audio Visualizer";
    windowConfig.width = 1280;
    windowConfig.height = 720;
    
    nk::Window window(windowConfig);
    
    nk::RendererConfig rendererConfig;
    rendererConfig.api = nk::RendererAPI::SoftwareCPU;
    
    nk::Renderer renderer(window, rendererConfig);
    
    // Initialize Audio
    auto& audioEngine = nk::AudioEngine::instance();
    audioEngine.initialize(nk::AudioBackend::Auto, 44100, 2, 512);
    
    // Initialize ImGui
    nk::ImGui::initialize(&renderer, nullptr);
    auto& imgui = nk::ImGui::getContext();
    imgui.setStyle(nk::UITheme::dark());
    
    // Setup events
    auto& eventSystem = nk::EventSystem::instance();
    bool running = true;
    
    eventSystem.setEventCallback<nk::WindowCloseEvent>([&](auto* e) {
        running = false;
    });
    
    eventSystem.setEventCallback<nk::KeyPressedEvent>([&](auto* e) {
        if (e->getKey() == nk::Key::Escape) running = false;
    });
    
    eventSystem.setEventCallback<nk::MouseMovedEvent>([&](auto* e) {
        imgui.setMousePosition(e->getX(), e->getY());
    });
    
    eventSystem.setEventCallback<nk::MouseButtonPressedEvent>([&](auto* e) {
        imgui.setMouseButton(static_cast<int>(e->getButton()), true);
    });
    
    eventSystem.setEventCallback<nk::MouseButtonReleasedEvent>([&](auto* e) {
        imgui.setMouseButton(static_cast<int>(e->getButton()), false);
    });
    
    eventSystem.setEventCallback<nk::MouseScrolledEvent>([&](auto* e) {
        imgui.setMouseWheel(e->getYOffset());
    });
    
    // Audio visualizer state
    std::vector<float> audioBuffer;
    audioBuffer.resize(2048, 0.0f);
    
    std::vector<float> fftData;
    
    nk::AudioSample currentSample;
    nk::AudioHandle audioHandle;
    
    bool playing = false;
    float masterVolume = 0.7f;
    
    enum class VisualizationMode {
        Waveform,
        Spectrum,
        Spectrogram,
        VUMeter
    };
    
    VisualizationMode visMode = VisualizationMode::Spectrum;
    
    // Generate test tones
    auto generateTestTone = [](float frequency, float duration) {
        return nk::AudioGenerator::generateTone(frequency, duration, nk::WaveformType::Sine, 44100);
    };
    
    // Procedural audio callback for real-time visualization
    float phase = 0.0f;
    float frequency = 440.0f;
    nk::WaveformType waveform = nk::WaveformType::Sine;
    
    auto audioCallback = [&](float* buffer, int frameCount, int channels) {
        for (int i = 0; i < frameCount; i++) {
            float sample = 0.0f;
            
            switch (waveform) {
                case nk::WaveformType::Sine:
                    sample = std::sin(phase);
                    break;
                case nk::WaveformType::Square:
                    sample = (std::sin(phase) >= 0.0f) ? 1.0f : -1.0f;
                    break;
                case nk::WaveformType::Triangle: {
                    float normalizedPhase = std::fmod(phase, 2.0f * M_PI) / (2.0f * M_PI);
                    if (normalizedPhase < 0.25f) {
                        sample = 4.0f * normalizedPhase;
                    } else if (normalizedPhase < 0.75f) {
                        sample = 2.0f - 4.0f * normalizedPhase;
                    } else {
                        sample = 4.0f * normalizedPhase - 4.0f;
                    }
                    break;
                }
                case nk::WaveformType::Sawtooth: {
                    float normalizedPhase = std::fmod(phase, 2.0f * M_PI) / (2.0f * M_PI);
                    sample = 2.0f * normalizedPhase - 1.0f;
                    break;
                }
                default:
                    break;
            }
            
            sample *= masterVolume;
            
            for (int ch = 0; ch < channels; ch++) {
                buffer[i * channels + ch] = sample;
            }
            
            // Store for visualization
            if (i < static_cast<int>(audioBuffer.size())) {
                audioBuffer[i] = sample;
            }
            
            phase += 2.0f * M_PI * frequency / 44100.0f;
            if (phase > 2.0f * M_PI) phase -= 2.0f * M_PI;
        }
    };
    
    // Start procedural audio
    audioHandle = audioEngine.playCallback(audioCallback);
    playing = true;
    
    // Spectrogram history
    std::vector<std::vector<float>> spectrogramHistory;
    
    // Main loop
    while (running) {
        while (auto event = eventSystem.pollEvent()) {}
        
        renderer.beginFrame(renderer.packColor(15, 15, 20, 255));
        
        // Compute FFT
        nk::AudioSample tempSample;
        tempSample.sampleRate = 44100;
        tempSample.channels = 1;
        tempSample.format = nk::SampleFormat::Float32;
        tempSample.data.resize(audioBuffer.size() * sizeof(float));
        std::memcpy(tempSample.data.data(), audioBuffer.data(), tempSample.data.size());
        
        fftData = nk::AudioAnalyzer::computeFFT(tempSample, 2048);
        
        // Draw visualization
        int vizX = 20;
        int vizY = 20;
        int vizWidth = 1240;
        int vizHeight = 400;
        
        // Background
        renderer.fillRect(vizX, vizY, vizWidth, vizHeight, renderer.packColor(25, 25, 30, 255));
        renderer.drawRect(vizX, vizY, vizWidth, vizHeight, renderer.packColor(60, 60, 70, 255));
        
        if (visMode == VisualizationMode::Waveform) {
            // Draw waveform
            int samplesPerPixel = audioBuffer.size() / vizWidth;
            
            for (int x = 0; x < vizWidth; x++) {
                int sampleIndex = x * samplesPerPixel;
                if (sampleIndex >= static_cast<int>(audioBuffer.size())) break;
                
                float sample = audioBuffer[sampleIndex];
                int y = vizY + vizHeight / 2 - static_cast<int>(sample * vizHeight / 2);
                
                uint32_t color = renderer.packColor(100, 200, 255, 255);
                renderer.fillRect(vizX + x, y, 1, 2, color);
            }
            
            // Center line
            renderer.drawLine(vizX, vizY + vizHeight / 2, vizX + vizWidth, vizY + vizHeight / 2,
                            renderer.packColor(80, 80, 90, 255));
            
        } else if (visMode == VisualizationMode::Spectrum) {
            // Draw spectrum (bars)
            int barWidth = vizWidth / fftData.size();
            
            for (size_t i = 0; i < fftData.size(); i++) {
                float magnitude = (fftData[i] + 80.0f) / 80.0f; // Normalize dB
                magnitude = std::clamp(magnitude, 0.0f, 1.0f);
                
                int barHeight = static_cast<int>(magnitude * vizHeight);
                int barX = vizX + i * barWidth;
                int barY = vizY + vizHeight - barHeight;
                
                // Color based on magnitude
                uint8_t r = static_cast<uint8_t>(magnitude * 255);
                uint8_t g = static_cast<uint8_t>((1.0f - magnitude) * 200 + 55);
                uint8_t b = 100;
                
                uint32_t color = renderer.packColor(r, g, b, 255);
                renderer.fillRect(barX, barY, barWidth - 1, barHeight, color);
            }
            
        } else if (visMode == VisualizationMode::Spectrogram) {
            // Add current FFT to history
            spectrogramHistory.push_back(fftData);
            
            // Keep only last N frames
            if (spectrogramHistory.size() > static_cast<size_t>(vizWidth)) {
                spectrogramHistory.erase(spectrogramHistory.begin());
            }
            
            // Draw spectrogram
            for (size_t x = 0; x < spectrogramHistory.size(); x++) {
                const auto& spectrum = spectrogramHistory[x];
                
                int pixelHeight = vizHeight / spectrum.size();
                
                for (size_t y = 0; y < spectrum.size(); y++) {
                    float magnitude = (spectrum[y] + 80.0f) / 80.0f;
                    magnitude = std::clamp(magnitude, 0.0f, 1.0f);
                    
                    uint8_t intensity = static_cast<uint8_t>(magnitude * 255);
                    uint32_t color = renderer.packColor(intensity, intensity / 2, 255 - intensity, 255);
                    
                    int px = vizX + x;
                    int py = vizY + vizHeight - (y + 1) * pixelHeight;
                    
                    renderer.fillRect(px, py, 1, pixelHeight, color);
                }
            }
            
        } else if (visMode == VisualizationMode::VUMeter) {
            // VU Meter (peak level)
            float peak = 0.0f;
            for (float sample : audioBuffer) {
                peak = std::max(peak, std::abs(sample));
            }
            
            // Draw VU meter
            int meterWidth = static_cast<int>(peak * vizWidth);
            
            // Green -> Yellow -> Red gradient
            for (int x = 0; x < meterWidth; x++) {
                float t = static_cast<float>(x) / vizWidth;
                
                uint8_t r = static_cast<uint8_t>(t * 255);
                uint8_t g = static_cast<uint8_t>((1.0f - t) * 255);
                uint8_t b = 0;
                
                uint32_t color = renderer.packColor(r, g, b, 255);
                renderer.fillRect(vizX + x, vizY + 100, 2, 200, color);
            }
            
            // Peak value text
            char peakText[32];
            std::snprintf(peakText, sizeof(peakText), "Peak: %.2f dB", 20.0f * std::log10(peak + 0.0001f));
            // renderer.drawText(...) would go here if we had text rendering
        }
        
        // ImGui UI
        imgui.beginFrame();
        
        // Controls
        if (imgui.beginWindow("Audio Controls", nullptr, 20, 440, 400, 260)) {
            imgui.text("Audio Visualizer");
            imgui.separator();
            
            // Frequency control
            if (imgui.sliderFloat("Frequency", &frequency, 20.0f, 2000.0f)) {
                // Frequency updated
            }
            
            // Volume control
            if (imgui.sliderFloat("Volume", &masterVolume, 0.0f, 1.0f)) {
                audioEngine.setMasterVolume(masterVolume);
            }
            
            // Waveform selection
            const char* waveformNames[] = {"Sine", "Square", "Triangle", "Sawtooth"};
            int currentWaveform = static_cast<int>(waveform);
            
            imgui.text("Waveform:");
            for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
                if (imgui.radioButton(waveformNames[i], &currentWaveform, i)) {
                    waveform = static_cast<nk::WaveformType>(i);
                }
            }
            
            imgui.separator();
            
            // Visualization mode
            imgui.text("Visualization:");
            int visInt = static_cast<int>(visMode);
            if (imgui.radioButton("Waveform", &visInt, 0)) visMode = VisualizationMode::Waveform;
            if (imgui.radioButton("Spectrum", &visInt, 1)) visMode = VisualizationMode::Spectrum;
            if (imgui.radioButton("Spectrogram", &visInt, 2)) visMode = VisualizationMode::Spectrogram;
            if (imgui.radioButton("VU Meter", &visInt, 3)) visMode = VisualizationMode::VUMeter;
            
            imgui.endWindow();
        }
        
        // Preset tones
        if (imgui.beginWindow("Presets", nullptr, 440, 440, 300, 260)) {
            imgui.text("Musical Notes");
            imgui.separator();
            
            struct Note {
                const char* name;
                float freq;
            };
            
            Note notes[] = {
                {"A4 (440 Hz)", 440.0f},
                {"C4 (261 Hz)", 261.63f},
                {"E4 (329 Hz)", 329.63f},
                {"G4 (392 Hz)", 392.00f},
                {"C5 (523 Hz)", 523.25f}
            };
            
            for (const auto& note : notes) {
                if (imgui.button(note.name, 280, 25)) {
                    frequency = note.freq;
                }
            }
            
            imgui.separator();
            
            if (imgui.button("Sweep 20-2000 Hz", 280, 30)) {
                // Generate chirp
                auto chirp = nk::AudioGenerator::generateChirp(20.0f, 2000.0f, 3.0f, 44100);
                
                if (playing) {
                    audioEngine.stop(audioHandle);
                }
                
                audioHandle = audioEngine.play(chirp);
                playing = true;
            }
            
            imgui.endWindow();
        }
        
        imgui.endFrame();
        
        renderer.endFrame();
        renderer.present();
    }
    
    // Cleanup
    if (playing) {
        audioEngine.stop(audioHandle);
    }
    
    audioEngine.shutdown();
    nk::ImGui::shutdown();
    
    return 0;
}
```

## 2. Example_SimpleGame.cpp - Mini Jeu Multijoueur

```cpp
// example_simple_game.cpp - Pong Multijoueur
#include "nk.hpp"
#include "Network.hpp"
#include "Audio.hpp"
#include "ImGui.hpp"
#include <random>

// ====================================================================
// GAME ENTITIES
// ====================================================================

struct Paddle {
    float x, y;
    float width = 20.0f;
    float height = 100.0f;
    float speed = 300.0f;
    int score = 0;
};

struct Ball {
    float x, y;
    float vx, vy;
    float radius = 10.0f;
    float speed = 200.0f;
};

// ====================================================================
// NETWORK PROTOCOL
// ====================================================================

enum class GamePacketType : uint8_t {
    PlayerJoin,
    PlayerMove,
    BallUpdate,
    ScoreUpdate,
    GameStart
};

// ====================================================================
// GAME SERVER
// ====================================================================

class PongServer {
public:
    PongServer() {
        resetBall();
        
        m_server.setClientConnectedCallback([this](uint32_t clientId, const nk::Endpoint& endpoint) {
            std::cout << "[Server] Player " << clientId << " joined" << std::endl;
            
            if (m_player1Id == 0) {
                m_player1Id = clientId;
            } else if (m_player2Id == 0) {
                m_player2Id = clientId;
                startGame();
            }
        });
        
        m_server.setDataReceivedCallback([this](uint32_t clientId, const nk::Packet& packet) {
            handlePlayerInput(clientId, packet);
        });
    }
    
    bool start(uint16_t port) {
        return m_server.start(port);
    }
    
    void update(float deltaTime) {
        if (!m_gameRunning) return;
        
        // Update ball
        m_ball.x += m_ball.vx * deltaTime;
        m_ball.y += m_ball.vy * deltaTime;
        
        // Ball collision with walls
        if (m_ball.y - m_ball.radius < 0 || m_ball.y + m_ball.radius > 600) {
            m_ball.vy = -m_ball.vy;
        }
        
        // Ball collision with paddles
        if (m_ball.x - m_ball.radius < m_paddle1.x + m_paddle1.width) {
            if (m_ball.y > m_paddle1.y && m_ball.y < m_paddle1.y + m_paddle1.height) {
                m_ball.vx = std::abs(m_ball.vx);
            }
        }
        
        if (m_ball.x + m_ball.radius > m_paddle2.x) {
            if (m_ball.y > m_paddle2.y && m_ball.y < m_paddle2.y + m_paddle2.height) {
                m_ball.vx = -std::abs(m_ball.vx);
            }
        }
        
        // Scoring
        if (m_ball.x < 0) {
            m_paddle2.score++;
            resetBall();
            sendScoreUpdate();
        } else if (m_ball.x > 800) {
            m_paddle1.score++;
            resetBall();
            sendScoreUpdate();
        }
        
        // Broadcast game state
        sendBallUpdate();
    }
    
private:
    void resetBall() {
        m_ball.x = 400.0f;
        m_ball.y = 300.0f;
        
        std::random_device rd;
        std::mt19937 gen(rd());
        std::uniform_real_distribution<float> angleDist(-0.5f, 0.5f);
        
        float angle = angleDist(gen);
        m_ball.vx = m_ball.speed * std::cos(angle);
        m_ball.vy = m_ball.speed * std::sin(angle);
        
        if (gen() % 2 == 0) m_ball.vx = -m_ball.vx;
    }
    
    void startGame() {
        m_gameRunning = true;
        
        nk::Packet packet;
        packet.writeUInt8(static_cast<uint8_t>(GamePacketType::GameStart));
        
        m_server.sendToAll(packet);
    }
    
    void handlePlayerInput(uint32_t clientId, const nk::Packet& packet) {
        auto packetCopy = const_cast<nk::Packet&>(packet);
        
        GamePacketType type = static_cast<GamePacketType>(packetCopy.readUInt8());
        
        if (type == GamePacketType::PlayerMove) {
            float y = packetCopy.readFloat();
            
            if (clientId == m_player1Id) {
                m_paddle1.y = y;
            } else if (clientId == m_player2Id) {
                m_paddle2.y = y;
            }
        }
    }
    
    void sendBallUpdate() {
        nk::Packet packet;
        packet.writeUInt8(static_cast<uint8_t>(GamePacketType::BallUpdate));
        packet.writeFloat(m_ball.x);
        packet.writeFloat(m_ball.y);
        
        m_server.sendToAll(packet);
    }
    
    void sendScoreUpdate() {
        nk::Packet packet;
        packet.writeUInt8(static_cast<uint8_t>(GamePacketType::ScoreUpdate));
        packet.writeInt32(m_paddle1.score);
        packet.writeInt32(m_paddle2.score);
        
        m_server.sendToAll(packet);
    }
    
    nk::TCPServer m_server;
    
    Paddle m_paddle1{50.0f, 250.0f};
    Paddle m_paddle2{730.0f, 250.0f};
    Ball m_ball;
    
    uint32_t m_player1Id = 0;
    uint32_t m_player2Id = 0;
    
    bool m_gameRunning = false;
};

// ====================================================================
// GAME CLIENT
// ====================================================================

class PongClient {
public:
    bool connect(const std::string& address, uint16_t port) {
        nk::IPAddress ip;
        if (!nk::NetworkUtils::resolveHostname(address, ip)) {
            return false;
        }
        
        if (!m_client.connect(ip, port)) {
            return false;
        }
        
        m_client.setDataReceivedCallback([this](const nk::Packet& packet) {
            handleServerUpdate(packet);
        });
        
        m_client.startReceiving();
        
        return true;
    }
    
    void sendPaddlePosition(float y) {
        nk::Packet packet;
        packet.writeUInt8(static_cast<uint8_t>(GamePacketType::PlayerMove));
        packet.writeFloat(y);
        
        m_client.send(packet);
    }
    
    const Ball& getBall() const { return m_ball; }
    int getPlayer1Score() const { return m_player1Score; }
    int getPlayer2Score() const { return m_player2Score; }
    bool isGameStarted() const { return m_gameStarted; }
    
private:
    void handleServerUpdate(const nk::Packet& packet) {
        auto packetCopy = const_cast<nk::Packet&>(packet);
        
        GamePacketType type = static_cast<GamePacketType>(packetCopy.readUInt8());
        
        switch (type) {
            case GamePacketType::BallUpdate:
                m_ball.x = packetCopy.readFloat();
                m_ball.y = packetCopy.readFloat();
                break;
                
            case GamePacketType::ScoreUpdate:
                m_player1Score = packetCopy.readInt32();
                m_player2Score = packetCopy.readInt32();
                break;
                
            case GamePacketType::GameStart:
                m_gameStarted = true;
                break;
                
            default:
                break;
        }
    }
    
    nk::TCPClient m_client;
    Ball m_ball;
    int m_player1Score = 0;
    int m_player2Score = 0;
    bool m_gameStarted = false;
};

// ====================================================================
// MAIN
// ====================================================================

int nk::nk_main(int argc, char** argv) {
    std::cout << "=== Pong Multiplayer ===" << std::endl;
    
    // Initialize
    nk::NetworkUtils::initialize();
    
    auto& gfxContext = nk::GraphicsContext::instance();
    gfxContext.initialize(nk::RendererAPI::Auto);
    
    nk::WindowConfig windowConfig;
    windowConfig.title = "NK Pong";
    windowConfig.width = 800;
    windowConfig.height = 600;
    
    nk::Window window(windowConfig);
    
    nk::RendererConfig rendererConfig;
    rendererConfig.api = nk::RendererAPI::SoftwareCPU;
    
    nk::Renderer renderer(window, rendererConfig);
    
    // Initialize Audio
    auto& audioEngine = nk::AudioEngine::instance();
    audioEngine.initialize(nk::AudioBackend::Auto);
    
    // Sound effects
    auto beepSound = nk::AudioGenerator::generateTone(440.0f, 0.1f, nk::WaveformType::Square);
    auto scoreSound = nk::AudioGenerator::generateTone(880.0f, 0.3f, nk::WaveformType::Sine);
    
    // Initialize ImGui
    nk::ImGui::initialize(&renderer, nullptr);
    auto& imgui = nk::ImGui::getContext();
    
    // Events
    auto& eventSystem = nk::EventSystem::instance();
    bool running = true;
    
    eventSystem.setEventCallback<nk::WindowCloseEvent>([&](auto* e) {
        running = false;
    });
    
    eventSystem.setEventCallback<nk::MouseMovedEvent>([&](auto* e) {
        imgui.setMousePosition(e->getX(), e->getY());
    });
    
    eventSystem.setEventCallback<nk::MouseButtonPressedEvent>([&](auto* e) {
        imgui.setMouseButton(static_cast<int>(e->getButton()), true);
    });
    
    eventSystem.setEventCallback<nk::MouseButtonReleasedEvent>([&](auto* e) {
        imgui.setMouseButton(static_cast<int>(e->getButton()), false);
    });
    
    // Game state
    enum class GameMode {
        Menu,
        Server,
        Client
    };
    
    GameMode mode = GameMode::Menu;
    
    std::unique_ptr<PongServer> server;
    std::unique_ptr<PongClient> client;
    
    Paddle localPaddle{50.0f, 250.0f};
    
    std::string serverAddress = "127.0.0.1";
    
    auto lastTime = std::chrono::high_resolution_clock::now();
    
    // Main loop
    while (running) {
        while (auto event = eventSystem.pollEvent()) {}
        
        auto currentTime = std::chrono::high_resolution_clock::now();
        float deltaTime = std::chrono::duration<float>(currentTime - lastTime).count();
        lastTime = currentTime;
        
        renderer.beginFrame(renderer.packColor(0, 0, 0, 255));
        
        if (mode == GameMode::Server && server) {
            server->update(deltaTime);
        }
        
        // Draw game
        if (mode == GameMode::Client && client && client->isGameStarted()) {
            // Draw paddles
            renderer.fillRect(50, static_cast<int>(localPaddle.y), 20, 100,
                            renderer.packColor(255, 255, 255, 255));
            
            renderer.fillRect(730, 250, 20, 100,
                            renderer.packColor(255, 255, 255, 255));
            
            // Draw ball
            const Ball& ball = client->getBall();
            renderer.fillCircle(static_cast<int>(ball.x), static_cast<int>(ball.y),
                              static_cast<int>(ball.radius),
                              renderer.packColor(255, 255, 0, 255));
            
            // Draw center line
            for (int y = 0; y < 600; y += 20) {
                renderer.fillRect(395, y, 10, 10, renderer.packColor(100, 100, 100, 255));
            }
            
            // Input - move paddle with mouse
            // (would use keyboard in real game)
        }
        
        // UI
        imgui.beginFrame();
        
        if (mode == GameMode::Menu) {
            if (imgui.beginWindow("Pong", nullptr, 250, 200, 300, 200)) {
                if (imgui.button("Host Game", 280, 40)) {
                    server = std::make_unique<PongServer>();
                    if (server->start(7777)) {
                        mode = GameMode::Server;
                    }
                }
                
                imgui.separator();
                
                imgui.inputText("Server", serverAddress, 64);
                
                if (imgui.button("Join Game", 280, 40)) {
                    client = std::make_unique<PongClient>();
                    if (client->connect(serverAddress, 7777)) {
                        mode = GameMode::Client;
                    }
                }
                
                imgui.endWindow();
            }
        }
        
        imgui.endFrame();
        
        renderer.endFrame();
        renderer.present();
    }
    
    // Cleanup
    nk::ImGui::shutdown();
    audioEngine.shutdown();
    nk::NetworkUtils::shutdown();
    
    return 0;
}
```
