```cpp
enum class BodyType {
    Static,    // Immovable (infinite mass)
    Kinematic, // Movable but not affected by forces
    Dynamic    // Fully simulated
};

struct Material {
    float density = 1.0f;        // kg/m²
    float restitution = 0.5f;    // Bounciness [0, 1]
    float friction = 0.3f;       // [0, 1]
    
    static Material rock() { return {2.5f, 0.1f, 0.9f}; }
    static Material wood() { return {0.6f, 0.3f, 0.4f}; }
    static Material metal() { return {7.8f, 0.05f, 0.5f}; }
    static Material rubber() { return {1.0f, 0.8f, 0.9f}; }
    static Material ice() { return {0.9f, 0.2f, 0.02f}; }
};

struct RigidBody2D {
    // Transform
    Vec2 position;
    float rotation = 0.0f;  // radians
    
    // Linear motion
    Vec2 velocity;
    Vec2 force;
    
    // Angular motion
    float angularVelocity = 0.0f;
    float torque = 0.0f;
    
    // Physical properties
    float mass = 1.0f;
    float invMass = 1.0f;
    float inertia = 1.0f;
    float invInertia = 1.0f;
    
    Material material;
    BodyType type = BodyType::Dynamic;
    
    // Flags
    bool enabled = true;
    bool sleeping = false;
    
    // User data
    void* userData = nullptr;
    
    // Constructors
    RigidBody2D() {
        updateMass();
    }
    
    void updateMass() {
        if (type == BodyType::Static) {
            mass = 0.0f;
            invMass = 0.0f;
            inertia = 0.0f;
            invInertia = 0.0f;
        } else {
            invMass = mass > 0.0f ? 1.0f / mass : 0.0f;
            invInertia = inertia > 0.0f ? 1.0f / inertia : 0.0f;
        }
    }
    
    void applyForce(const Vec2& f) {
        if (type != BodyType::Dynamic) return;
        force += f;
    }
    
    void applyForceAtPoint(const Vec2& f, const Vec2& point) {
        if (type != BodyType::Dynamic) return;
        
        force += f;
        
        Vec2 r = point - position;
        torque += r.cross(f);
    }
    
    void applyImpulse(const Vec2& impulse) {
        if (type != BodyType::Dynamic) return;
        velocity += impulse * invMass;
    }
    
    void applyImpulseAtPoint(const Vec2& impulse, const Vec2& point) {
        if (type != BodyType::Dynamic) return;
        
        velocity += impulse * invMass;
        
        Vec2 r = point - position;
        angularVelocity += r.cross(impulse) * invInertia;
    }
    
    void setMass(float m) {
        mass = m;
        updateMass();
    }
    
    void setStatic() {
        type = BodyType::Static;
        velocity = Vec2::zero();
        angularVelocity = 0.0f;
        updateMass();
    }
    
    void setDynamic() {
        type = BodyType::Dynamic;
        updateMass();
    }
    
    Mat2 getRotationMatrix() const {
        return Mat2::rotation(rotation);
    }
    
    Vec2 localToWorld(const Vec2& local) const {
        return getRotationMatrix() * local + position;
    }
    
    Vec2 worldToLocal(const Vec2& world) const {
        return getRotationMatrix().transposed() * (world - position);
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// COLLISION SHAPES
// ====================================================================

enum class ShapeType {
    Circle,
    Box,
    Polygon,
    Edge
};

struct Shape {
    ShapeType type;
    
    virtual ~Shape() = default;
    virtual ShapeType getType() const = 0;
    virtual float getArea() const = 0;
    virtual float getMomentOfInertia(float mass) const = 0;
    virtual void computeAABB(const RigidBody2D& body, Vec2& min, Vec2& max) const = 0;
    virtual bool containsPoint(const RigidBody2D& body, const Vec2& point) const = 0;
};

// Circle shape
struct CircleShape : public Shape {
    float radius;
    Vec2 center; // Local space
    
    CircleShape(float r = 1.0f, const Vec2& c = Vec2::zero())
        : radius(r), center(c) {
        type = ShapeType::Circle;
    }
    
    ShapeType getType() const override { return ShapeType::Circle; }
    
    float getArea() const override {
        return PI * radius * radius;
    }
    
    float getMomentOfInertia(float mass) const override {
        // I = 0.5 * m * r²
        return 0.5f * mass * radius * radius;
    }
    
    void computeAABB(const RigidBody2D& body, Vec2& min, Vec2& max) const override {
        Vec2 worldCenter = body.localToWorld(center);
        min = worldCenter - Vec2(radius, radius);
        max = worldCenter + Vec2(radius, radius);
    }
    
    bool containsPoint(const RigidBody2D& body, const Vec2& point) const override {
        Vec2 worldCenter = body.localToWorld(center);
        return (point - worldCenter).lengthSquared() <= radius * radius;
    }
};

// Box shape (AABB in local space)
struct BoxShape : public Shape {
    Vec2 halfExtents;
    
    BoxShape(const Vec2& halfSize = Vec2(1, 1))
        : halfExtents(halfSize) {
        type = ShapeType::Box;
    }
    
    BoxShape(float width, float height)
        : halfExtents(width * 0.5f, height * 0.5f) {
        type = ShapeType::Box;
    }
    
    ShapeType getType() const override { return ShapeType::Box; }
    
    float getArea() const override {
        return 4.0f * halfExtents.x * halfExtents.y;
    }
    
    float getMomentOfInertia(float mass) const override {
        // I = (1/12) * m * (w² + h²)
        float w = halfExtents.x * 2.0f;
        float h = halfExtents.y * 2.0f;
        return (mass / 12.0f) * (w * w + h * h);
    }
    
    void computeAABB(const RigidBody2D& body, Vec2& min, Vec2& max) const override {
        // Get all 4 corners in world space
        Vec2 corners[4] = {
            body.localToWorld(Vec2(-halfExtents.x, -halfExtents.y)),
            body.localToWorld(Vec2( halfExtents.x, -halfExtents.y)),
            body.localToWorld(Vec2( halfExtents.x,  halfExtents.y)),
            body.localToWorld(Vec2(-halfExtents.x,  halfExtents.y))
        };
        
        min = corners[0];
        max = corners[0];
        
        for (int i = 1; i < 4; i++) {
            min.x = std::min(min.x, corners[i].x);
            min.y = std::min(min.y, corners[i].y);
            max.x = std::max(max.x, corners[i].x);
            max.y = std::max(max.y, corners[i].y);
        }
    }
    
    bool containsPoint(const RigidBody2D& body, const Vec2& point) const override {
        Vec2 local = body.worldToLocal(point);
        return std::abs(local.x) <= halfExtents.x && std::abs(local.y) <= halfExtents.y;
    }
    
    std::vector<Vec2> getVertices() const {
        return {
            Vec2(-halfExtents.x, -halfExtents.y),
            Vec2( halfExtents.x, -halfExtents.y),
            Vec2( halfExtents.x,  halfExtents.y),
            Vec2(-halfExtents.x,  halfExtents.y)
        };
    }
};

// Polygon shape (convex only)
struct PolygonShape : public Shape {
    std::vector<Vec2> vertices; // Local space, CCW order
    
    PolygonShape() {
        type = ShapeType::Polygon;
    }
    
    PolygonShape(const std::vector<Vec2>& verts)
        : vertices(verts) {
        type = ShapeType::Polygon;
        ensureCCW();
    }
    
    ShapeType getType() const override { return ShapeType::Polygon; }
    
    void ensureCCW() {
        // Ensure counter-clockwise winding
        float area = 0.0f;
        for (size_t i = 0; i < vertices.size(); i++) {
            size_t j = (i + 1) % vertices.size();
            area += vertices[i].cross(vertices[j]);
        }
        
        if (area < 0.0f) {
            std::reverse(vertices.begin(), vertices.end());
        }
    }
    
    float getArea() const override {
        float area = 0.0f;
        for (size_t i = 0; i < vertices.size(); i++) {
            size_t j = (i + 1) % vertices.size();
            area += vertices[i].cross(vertices[j]);
        }
        return area * 0.5f;
    }
    
    float getMomentOfInertia(float mass) const override {
        // For convex polygon
        float numerator = 0.0f;
        float denominator = 0.0f;
        
        for (size_t i = 0; i < vertices.size(); i++) {
            size_t j = (i + 1) % vertices.size();
            
            float cross = std::abs(vertices[i].cross(vertices[j]));
            numerator += cross * (vertices[i].dot(vertices[i]) + 
                                 vertices[i].dot(vertices[j]) + 
                                 vertices[j].dot(vertices[j]));
            denominator += cross;
        }
        
        return (mass / 6.0f) * (numerator / denominator);
    }
    
    void computeAABB(const RigidBody2D& body, Vec2& min, Vec2& max) const override {
        if (vertices.empty()) {
            min = max = body.position;
            return;
        }
        
        Vec2 worldVert = body.localToWorld(vertices[0]);
        min = max = worldVert;
        
        for (size_t i = 1; i < vertices.size(); i++) {
            worldVert = body.localToWorld(vertices[i]);
            min.x = std::min(min.x, worldVert.x);
            min.y = std::min(min.y, worldVert.y);
            max.x = std::max(max.x, worldVert.x);
            max.y = std::max(max.y, worldVert.y);
        }
    }
    
    bool containsPoint(const RigidBody2D& body, const Vec2& point) const override {
        Vec2 local = body.worldToLocal(point);
        
        // Ray casting algorithm
        int crossings = 0;
        for (size_t i = 0; i < vertices.size(); i++) {
            size_t j = (i + 1) % vertices.size();
            
            if (((vertices[i].y > local.y) != (vertices[j].y > local.y)) &&
                (local.x < (vertices[j].x - vertices[i].x) * (local.y - vertices[i].y) / 
                          (vertices[j].y - vertices[i].y) + vertices[i].x)) {
                crossings++;
            }
        }
        
        return (crossings % 2) == 1;
    }
    
    Vec2 getCentroid() const {
        Vec2 centroid(0, 0);
        float area = 0.0f;
        
        for (size_t i = 0; i < vertices.size(); i++) {
            size_t j = (i + 1) % vertices.size();
            
            float cross = vertices[i].cross(vertices[j]);
            area += cross;
            centroid += (vertices[i] + vertices[j]) * cross;
        }
        
        area *= 0.5f;
        centroid /= (6.0f * area);
        
        return centroid;
    }
    
    std::vector<Vec2> getNormals() const {
        std::vector<Vec2> normals;
        
        for (size_t i = 0; i < vertices.size(); i++) {
            size_t j = (i + 1) % vertices.size();
            Vec2 edge = vertices[j] - vertices[i];
            normals.push_back(edge.perpendicular().normalized());
        }
        
        return normals;
    }
    
    // Create regular polygon
    static PolygonShape regularPolygon(int sides, float radius) {
        std::vector<Vec2> verts;
        
        for (int i = 0; i < sides; i++) {
            float angle = (2.0f * PI * i) / sides;
            verts.push_back(Vec2(std::cos(angle), std::sin(angle)) * radius);
        }
        
        return PolygonShape(verts);
    }
};

// Edge shape (line segment)
struct EdgeShape : public Shape {
    Vec2 v1, v2; // Endpoints in local space
    
    EdgeShape(const Vec2& vertex1 = Vec2::zero(), const Vec2& vertex2 = Vec2(1, 0))
        : v1(vertex1), v2(vertex2) {
        type = ShapeType::Edge;
    }
    
    ShapeType getType() const override { return ShapeType::Edge; }
    
    float getArea() const override { return 0.0f; } // Line has no area
    
    float getMomentOfInertia(float mass) const override {
        // For a line segment
        float length = (v2 - v1).length();
        return (mass * length * length) / 12.0f;
    }
    
    void computeAABB(const RigidBody2D& body, Vec2& min, Vec2& max) const override {
        Vec2 w1 = body.localToWorld(v1);
        Vec2 w2 = body.localToWorld(v2);
        
        min.x = std::min(w1.x, w2.x);
        min.y = std::min(w1.y, w2.y);
        max.x = std::max(w1.x, w2.x);
        max.y = std::max(w1.y, w2.y);
    }
    
    bool containsPoint(const RigidBody2D& body, const Vec2& point) const override {
        return false; // Line segment has no interior
    }
    
    Vec2 getNormal() const {
        return (v2 - v1).perpendicular().normalized();
    }
};

} // namespace physics2d
} // namespace nk
```

## 2. Collision2D.hpp - Détection de Collision

```cpp
// Collision2D.hpp
#pragma once

#include "Physics2D.hpp"

namespace nk {
namespace physics2d {

// ====================================================================
// COLLISION CONTACT
// ====================================================================

struct ContactPoint {
    Vec2 position;      // World space
    Vec2 normal;        // From A to B
    float penetration;  // How deep
    
    ContactPoint() : penetration(0.0f) {}
};

struct Manifold {
    RigidBody2D* bodyA = nullptr;
    RigidBody2D* bodyB = nullptr;
    Shape* shapeA = nullptr;
    Shape* shapeB = nullptr;
    
    std::vector<ContactPoint> contacts;
    Vec2 normal;        // From A to B
    float penetration;
    
    Manifold() : penetration(0.0f) {}
    
    bool hasCollision() const {
        return penetration > 0.0f && !contacts.empty();
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// AABB (Axis-Aligned Bounding Box)
// ====================================================================

struct AABB {
    Vec2 min, max;
    
    AABB() {}
    AABB(const Vec2& min, const Vec2& max) : min(min), max(max) {}
    
    Vec2 center() const { return (min + max) * 0.5f; }
    Vec2 extents() const { return (max - min) * 0.5f; }
    
    bool overlaps(const AABB& other) const {
        return !(max.x < other.min.x || min.x > other.max.x ||
                max.y < other.min.y || min.y > other.max.y);
    }
    
    bool contains(const Vec2& point) const {
        return point.x >= min.x && point.x <= max.x &&
               point.y >= min.y && point.y <= max.y;
    }
    
    void merge(const AABB& other) {
        min.x = std::min(min.x, other.min.x);
        min.y = std::min(min.y, other.min.y);
        max.x = std::max(max.x, other.max.x);
        max.y = std::max(max.y, other.max.y);
    }
    
    float area() const {
        Vec2 size = max - min;
        return size.x * size.y;
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// COLLISION DETECTION
// ====================================================================

class CollisionDetector {
public:
    // Circle vs Circle
    static bool testCircleCircle(
        const RigidBody2D& bodyA, const CircleShape& circleA,
        const RigidBody2D& bodyB, const CircleShape& circleB,
        Manifold& manifold)
    {
        Vec2 centerA = bodyA.localToWorld(circleA.center);
        Vec2 centerB = bodyB.localToWorld(circleB.center);
        
        Vec2 delta = centerB - centerA;
        float distSq = delta.lengthSquared();
        float radiusSum = circleA.radius + circleB.radius;
        
        if (distSq >= radiusSum * radiusSum) {
            return false; // No collision
        }
        
        float dist = std::sqrt(distSq);
        
        manifold.bodyA = const_cast<RigidBody2D*>(&bodyA);
        manifold.bodyB = const_cast<RigidBody2D*>(&bodyB);
        manifold.shapeA = const_cast<CircleShape*>(&circleA);
        manifold.shapeB = const_cast<CircleShape*>(&circleB);
        
        if (dist > 0.0f) {
            manifold.normal = delta / dist;
        } else {
            manifold.normal = Vec2(1, 0); // Arbitrary
        }
        
        manifold.penetration = radiusSum - dist;
        
        ContactPoint contact;
        contact.position = centerA + manifold.normal * circleA.radius;
        contact.normal = manifold.normal;
        contact.penetration = manifold.penetration;
        
        manifold.contacts.push_back(contact);
        
        return true;
    }
    
    // Circle vs Box (OBB)
    static bool testCircleBox(
        const RigidBody2D& bodyA, const CircleShape& circle,
        const RigidBody2D& bodyB, const BoxShape& box,
        Manifold& manifold)
    {
        Vec2 circleCenter = bodyA.localToWorld(circle.center);
        
        // Transform circle center to box local space
        Vec2 localCenter = bodyB.worldToLocal(circleCenter);
        
        // Find closest point on box to circle
        Vec2 closest;
        closest.x = clamp(localCenter.x, -box.halfExtents.x, box.halfExtents.x);
        closest.y = clamp(localCenter.y, -box.halfExtents.y, box.halfExtents.y);
        
        // Check if inside box
        bool inside = false;
        if (localCenter == closest) {
            inside = true;
            
            // Find closest edge
            float dx = box.halfExtents.x - std::abs(localCenter.x);
            float dy = box.halfExtents.y - std::abs(localCenter.y);
            
            if (dx < dy) {
                closest.x = localCenter.x > 0 ? box.halfExtents.x : -box.halfExtents.x;
            } else {
                closest.y = localCenter.y > 0 ? box.halfExtents.y : -box.halfExtents.y;
            }
        }
        
        Vec2 normal = localCenter - closest;
        float distSq = normal.lengthSquared();
        
        if (!inside && distSq >= circle.radius * circle.radius) {
            return false; // No collision
        }
        
        float dist = std::sqrt(distSq);
        
        manifold.bodyA = const_cast<RigidBody2D*>(&bodyA);
        manifold.bodyB = const_cast<RigidBody2D*>(&bodyB);
        manifold.shapeA = const_cast<CircleShape*>(&circle);
        manifold.shapeB = const_cast<BoxShape*>(&box);
        
        if (inside) {
            manifold.normal = -bodyB.getRotationMatrix() * (normal / dist);
            manifold.penetration = circle.radius + dist;
        } else {
            if (dist > 0.0f) {
                manifold.normal = bodyB.getRotationMatrix() * (normal / dist);
            } else {
                manifold.normal = Vec2(1, 0);
            }
            manifold.penetration = circle.radius - dist;
        }
        
        ContactPoint contact;
        contact.position = bodyB.localToWorld(closest);
        contact.normal = manifold.normal;
        contact.penetration = manifold.penetration;
        
        manifold.contacts.push_back(contact);
        
        return true;
    }
    
    // Box vs Box using SAT (Separating Axis Theorem)
    static bool testBoxBox(
        const RigidBody2D& bodyA, const BoxShape& boxA,
        const RigidBody2D& bodyB, const BoxShape& boxB,
        Manifold& manifold)
    {
        // Get box vertices in world space
        auto getWorldVertices = [](const RigidBody2D& body, const BoxShape& box) {
            std::vector<Vec2> verts = box.getVertices();
            for (auto& v : verts) {
                v = body.localToWorld(v);
            }
            return verts;
        };
        
        auto vertsA = getWorldVertices(bodyA, boxA);
        auto vertsB = getWorldVertices(bodyB, boxB);
        
        // Test axes from both boxes
        Vec2 axes[4] = {
            bodyA.getRotationMatrix() * Vec2(1, 0),
            bodyA.getRotationMatrix() * Vec2(0, 1),
            bodyB.getRotationMatrix() * Vec2(1, 0),
            bodyB.getRotationMatrix() * Vec2(0, 1)
        };
        
        float minPenetration = std::numeric_limits<float>::max();
        Vec2 minAxis;
        
        for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
            Vec2 axis = axes[i].normalized();
            
            // Project vertices onto axis
            auto project = [&axis](const std::vector<Vec2>& verts) {
                float min = axis.dot(verts[0]);
                float max = min;
                
                for (size_t j = 1; j < verts.size(); j++) {
                    float proj = axis.dot(verts[j]);
                    if (proj < min) min = proj;
                    if (proj > max) max = proj;
                }
                
                return std::make_pair(min, max);
            };
            
            auto projA = project(vertsA);
            auto projB = project(vertsB);
            
            // Check for separation
            if (projA.second < projB.first || projB.second < projA.first) {
                return false; // Separated on this axis
            }
            
            // Calculate penetration
            float penetration = std::min(projA.second - projB.first, projB.second - projA.first);
            
            if (penetration < minPenetration) {
                minPenetration = penetration;
                minAxis = axis;
            }
        }
        
        // Collision detected
        manifold.bodyA = const_cast<RigidBody2D*>(&bodyA);
        manifold.bodyB = const_cast<RigidBody2D*>(&bodyB);
        manifold.shapeA = const_cast<BoxShape*>(&boxA);
        manifold.shapeB = const_cast<BoxShape*>(&boxB);
        manifold.penetration = minPenetration;
        
        // Make sure normal points from A to B
        Vec2 centerA = bodyA.position;
        Vec2 centerB = bodyB.position;
        
        if (minAxis.dot(centerB - centerA) < 0) {
            minAxis = -minAxis;
        }
        
        manifold.normal = minAxis;
        
        // Find contact points (simplified - use box centers)
        ContactPoint contact;
        contact.position = (centerA + centerB) * 0.5f;
        contact.normal = manifold.normal;
        contact.penetration = manifold.penetration;
        
        manifold.contacts.push_back(contact);
        
        return true;
    }
    
    // Polygon vs Polygon using SAT
    static bool testPolygonPolygon(
        const RigidBody2D& bodyA, const PolygonShape& polyA,
        const RigidBody2D& bodyB, const PolygonShape& polyB,
        Manifold& manifold)
    {
        // Get normals from both polygons
        auto normalsA = polyA.getNormals();
        auto normalsB = polyB.getNormals();
        
        // Transform to world space
        for (auto& n : normalsA) {
            n = bodyA.getRotationMatrix() * n;
        }
        for (auto& n : normalsB) {
            n = bodyB.getRotationMatrix() * n;
        }
        
        // Get vertices in world space
        auto getWorldVerts = [](const RigidBody2D& body, const PolygonShape& poly) {
            std::vector<Vec2> verts;
            for (const auto& v : poly.vertices) {
                verts.push_back(body.localToWorld(v));
            }
            return verts;
        };
        
        auto vertsA = getWorldVerts(bodyA, polyA);
        auto vertsB = getWorldVerts(bodyB, polyB);
        
        float minPenetration = std::numeric_limits<float>::max();
        Vec2 minAxis;
        
        // Test all axes
        auto testAxis = [&](const Vec2& axis) {
            // Project both polygons onto axis
            auto project = [&axis](const std::vector<Vec2>& verts) {
                float min = axis.dot(verts[0]);
                float max = min;
                
                for (size_t i = 1; i < verts.size(); i++) {
                    float proj = axis.dot(verts[i]);
                    if (proj < min) min = proj;
                    if (proj > max) max = proj;
                }
                
                return std::make_pair(min, max);
            };
            
            auto projA = project(vertsA);
            auto projB = project(vertsB);
            
            // Check separation
            if (projA.second < projB.first || projB.second < projA.first) {
                return false;
            }
            
            float penetration = std::min(projA.second - projB.first, projB.second - projA.first);
            
            if (penetration < minPenetration) {
                minPenetration = penetration;
                minAxis = axis;
            }
            
            return true;
        };
        
        // Test all normals
        for (const auto& n : normalsA) {
            if (!testAxis(n)) return false;
        }
        
        for (const auto& n : normalsB) {
            if (!testAxis(n)) return false;
        }
        
        // Collision detected
        manifold.bodyA = const_cast<RigidBody2D*>(&bodyA);
        manifold.bodyB = const_cast<RigidBody2D*>(&bodyB);
        manifold.shapeA = const_cast<PolygonShape*>(&polyA);
        manifold.shapeB = const_cast<PolygonShape*>(&polyB);
        manifold.penetration = minPenetration;
        
        // Ensure normal points from A to B
        if (minAxis.dot(bodyB.position - bodyA.position) < 0) {
            minAxis = -minAxis;
        }
        
        manifold.normal = minAxis;
        
        // Find contact point (simplified)
        ContactPoint contact;
        contact.position = (bodyA.position + bodyB.position) * 0.5f;
        contact.normal = manifold.normal;
        contact.penetration = manifold.penetration;
        
        manifold.contacts.push_back(contact);
        
        return true;
    }
};

} // namespace physics2d
} // namespace nk
```

Suite dans le prochain message avec **Collision Response + Physics World** !

# PARTIE 27 : Physics 2D - Collision Response + Physics World

## 1. CollisionResponse2D.hpp - Résolution des Collisions

```cpp
// CollisionResponse2D.hpp
#pragma once

#include "Collision2D.hpp"

namespace nk {
namespace physics2d {

// ====================================================================
// COLLISION RESOLVER (Impulse-based)
// ====================================================================

class CollisionResolver {
public:
    // Resolve collision using impulse method
    static void resolveCollision(Manifold& manifold) {
        if (!manifold.hasCollision()) return;
        
        RigidBody2D* bodyA = manifold.bodyA;
        RigidBody2D* bodyB = manifold.bodyB;
        
        // Skip if both are static
        if (bodyA->type == BodyType::Static && bodyB->type == BodyType::Static) {
            return;
        }
        
        // Process each contact point
        for (auto& contact : manifold.contacts) {
            resolveContact(bodyA, bodyB, contact, manifold.normal);
        }
        
        // Positional correction to prevent sinking
        positionalCorrection(bodyA, bodyB, manifold);
    }
    
private:
    static void resolveContact(RigidBody2D* bodyA, RigidBody2D* bodyB,
                               const ContactPoint& contact, const Vec2& normal) {
        
        // Calculate relative velocity at contact point
        Vec2 rA = contact.position - bodyA->position;
        Vec2 rB = contact.position - bodyB->position;
        
        Vec2 vA = bodyA->velocity + Vec2(-bodyA->angularVelocity * rA.y, 
                                         bodyA->angularVelocity * rA.x);
        Vec2 vB = bodyB->velocity + Vec2(-bodyB->angularVelocity * rB.y, 
                                         bodyB->angularVelocity * rB.x);
        
        Vec2 relativeVel = vB - vA;
        
        // Velocity along normal
        float velAlongNormal = relativeVel.dot(normal);
        
        // Don't resolve if velocities are separating
        if (velAlongNormal > 0) {
            return;
        }
        
        // Calculate restitution (bounce)
        float restitution = std::min(bodyA->material.restitution, 
                                     bodyB->material.restitution);
        
        // Calculate impulse scalar
        float rACrossN = rA.cross(normal);
        float rBCrossN = rB.cross(normal);
        
        float invMassSum = bodyA->invMass + bodyB->invMass +
                          (rACrossN * rACrossN) * bodyA->invInertia +
                          (rBCrossN * rBCrossN) * bodyB->invInertia;
        
        if (invMassSum == 0.0f) return; // Both infinite mass
        
        float j = -(1.0f + restitution) * velAlongNormal / invMassSum;
        j /= static_cast<float>(manifold.contacts.size()); // Divide by contact count
        
        // Apply impulse
        Vec2 impulse = normal * j;
        
        if (bodyA->type == BodyType::Dynamic) {
            bodyA->velocity -= impulse * bodyA->invMass;
            bodyA->angularVelocity -= rA.cross(impulse) * bodyA->invInertia;
        }
        
        if (bodyB->type == BodyType::Dynamic) {
            bodyB->velocity += impulse * bodyB->invMass;
            bodyB->angularVelocity += rB.cross(impulse) * bodyB->invInertia;
        }
        
        // Friction
        applyFriction(bodyA, bodyB, contact, normal, j);
    }
    
    static void applyFriction(RigidBody2D* bodyA, RigidBody2D* bodyB,
                             const ContactPoint& contact, const Vec2& normal,
                             float normalImpulse) {
        
        // Recalculate relative velocity
        Vec2 rA = contact.position - bodyA->position;
        Vec2 rB = contact.position - bodyB->position;
        
        Vec2 vA = bodyA->velocity + Vec2(-bodyA->angularVelocity * rA.y, 
                                         bodyA->angularVelocity * rA.x);
        Vec2 vB = bodyB->velocity + Vec2(-bodyB->angularVelocity * rB.y, 
                                         bodyB->angularVelocity * rB.x);
        
        Vec2 relativeVel = vB - vA;
        
        // Tangent vector (perpendicular to normal)
        Vec2 tangent = relativeVel - normal * relativeVel.dot(normal);
        
        if (tangent.lengthSquared() < EPSILON * EPSILON) {
            return; // No tangential velocity
        }
        
        tangent = tangent.normalized();
        
        // Calculate tangential impulse
        float rACrossT = rA.cross(tangent);
        float rBCrossT = rB.cross(tangent);
        
        float invMassSum = bodyA->invMass + bodyB->invMass +
                          (rACrossT * rACrossT) * bodyA->invInertia +
                          (rBCrossT * rBCrossT) * bodyB->invInertia;
        
        if (invMassSum == 0.0f) return;
        
        float jt = -relativeVel.dot(tangent) / invMassSum;
        jt /= static_cast<float>(manifold.contacts.size());
        
        // Coulomb's law: friction force <= mu * normal force
        float mu = std::sqrt(bodyA->material.friction * bodyB->material.friction);
        
        Vec2 frictionImpulse;
        
        if (std::abs(jt) < std::abs(normalImpulse) * mu) {
            // Static friction
            frictionImpulse = tangent * jt;
        } else {
            // Kinetic friction
            frictionImpulse = tangent * (-std::abs(normalImpulse) * mu);
        }
        
        // Apply friction impulse
        if (bodyA->type == BodyType::Dynamic) {
            bodyA->velocity -= frictionImpulse * bodyA->invMass;
            bodyA->angularVelocity -= rA.cross(frictionImpulse) * bodyA->invInertia;
        }
        
        if (bodyB->type == BodyType::Dynamic) {
            bodyB->velocity += frictionImpulse * bodyB->invMass;
            bodyB->angularVelocity += rB.cross(frictionImpulse) * bodyB->invInertia;
        }
    }
    
    // Positional correction (Baumgarte stabilization)
    static void positionalCorrection(RigidBody2D* bodyA, RigidBody2D* bodyB,
                                    const Manifold& manifold) {
        
        const float percent = 0.2f; // Penetration percentage to correct (0.2 = 20%)
        const float slop = 0.01f;   // Penetration allowance (to prevent jitter)
        
        float penetration = manifold.penetration;
        
        if (penetration < slop) return;
        
        Vec2 correction = manifold.normal * 
                         (std::max(penetration - slop, 0.0f) / 
                         (bodyA->invMass + bodyB->invMass)) * percent;
        
        if (bodyA->type == BodyType::Dynamic) {
            bodyA->position -= correction * bodyA->invMass;
        }
        
        if (bodyB->type == BodyType::Dynamic) {
            bodyB->position += correction * bodyB->invMass;
        }
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// CONSTRAINTS (Distance, Hinge, etc.)
// ====================================================================

struct Constraint {
    RigidBody2D* bodyA = nullptr;
    RigidBody2D* bodyB = nullptr;
    
    virtual ~Constraint() = default;
    virtual void prepare(float dt) = 0;
    virtual void solve() = 0;
};

// Distance constraint (keeps two bodies at fixed distance)
struct DistanceConstraint : public Constraint {
    Vec2 localAnchorA;
    Vec2 localAnchorB;
    float restLength;
    float stiffness = 1.0f;
    float damping = 0.1f;
    
    DistanceConstraint(RigidBody2D* a, RigidBody2D* b,
                      const Vec2& anchorA, const Vec2& anchorB,
                      float length = -1.0f)
        : localAnchorA(anchorA), localAnchorB(anchorB) {
        
        bodyA = a;
        bodyB = b;
        
        if (length < 0.0f) {
            // Calculate current distance
            Vec2 worldA = a->localToWorld(anchorA);
            Vec2 worldB = b->localToWorld(anchorB);
            restLength = (worldB - worldA).length();
        } else {
            restLength = length;
        }
    }
    
    void prepare(float dt) override {}
    
    void solve() override {
        Vec2 worldA = bodyA->localToWorld(localAnchorA);
        Vec2 worldB = bodyB->localToWorld(localAnchorB);
        
        Vec2 delta = worldB - worldA;
        float currentLength = delta.length();
        
        if (currentLength < EPSILON) return;
        
        Vec2 direction = delta / currentLength;
        float error = currentLength - restLength;
        
        // Calculate relative velocity
        Vec2 rA = worldA - bodyA->position;
        Vec2 rB = worldB - bodyB->position;
        
        Vec2 vA = bodyA->velocity + Vec2(-bodyA->angularVelocity * rA.y,
                                         bodyA->angularVelocity * rA.x);
        Vec2 vB = bodyB->velocity + Vec2(-bodyB->angularVelocity * rB.y,
                                         bodyB->angularVelocity * rB.x);
        
        Vec2 relativeVel = vB - vA;
        float velocityError = relativeVel.dot(direction);
        
        // Calculate impulse
        float rACrossD = rA.cross(direction);
        float rBCrossD = rB.cross(direction);
        
        float invMassSum = bodyA->invMass + bodyB->invMass +
                          (rACrossD * rACrossD) * bodyA->invInertia +
                          (rBCrossD * rBCrossD) * bodyB->invInertia;
        
        if (invMassSum == 0.0f) return;
        
        float bias = stiffness * error;
        float impulse = -(velocityError + bias + damping * error) / invMassSum;
        
        Vec2 impulseVec = direction * impulse;
        
        // Apply impulse
        if (bodyA->type == BodyType::Dynamic) {
            bodyA->velocity -= impulseVec * bodyA->invMass;
            bodyA->angularVelocity -= rA.cross(impulseVec) * bodyA->invInertia;
        }
        
        if (bodyB->type == BodyType::Dynamic) {
            bodyB->velocity += impulseVec * bodyB->invMass;
            bodyB->angularVelocity += rB.cross(impulseVec) * bodyB->invInertia;
        }
    }
};

// Hinge constraint (pin joint)
struct HingeConstraint : public Constraint {
    Vec2 localAnchorA;
    Vec2 localAnchorB;
    
    HingeConstraint(RigidBody2D* a, RigidBody2D* b,
                   const Vec2& worldAnchor) {
        bodyA = a;
        bodyB = b;
        
        localAnchorA = a->worldToLocal(worldAnchor);
        localAnchorB = b->worldToLocal(worldAnchor);
    }
    
    void prepare(float dt) override {}
    
    void solve() override {
        Vec2 worldA = bodyA->localToWorld(localAnchorA);
        Vec2 worldB = bodyB->localToWorld(localAnchorB);
        
        Vec2 error = worldB - worldA;
        
        Vec2 rA = worldA - bodyA->position;
        Vec2 rB = worldB - bodyB->position;
        
        // Solve for x and y separately
        for (int axis = 0; axis < 2; axis++) {
            Vec2 direction = (axis == 0) ? Vec2(1, 0) : Vec2(0, 1);
            
            float positionError = error.dot(direction);
            
            Vec2 vA = bodyA->velocity + Vec2(-bodyA->angularVelocity * rA.y,
                                             bodyA->angularVelocity * rA.x);
            Vec2 vB = bodyB->velocity + Vec2(-bodyB->angularVelocity * rB.y,
                                             bodyB->angularVelocity * rB.x);
            
            float velocityError = (vB - vA).dot(direction);
            
            float rACrossD = rA.cross(direction);
            float rBCrossD = rB.cross(direction);
            
            float invMassSum = bodyA->invMass + bodyB->invMass +
                              (rACrossD * rACrossD) * bodyA->invInertia +
                              (rBCrossD * rBCrossD) * bodyB->invInertia;
            
            if (invMassSum == 0.0f) continue;
            
            float bias = 0.2f * positionError; // Baumgarte stabilization
            float impulse = -(velocityError + bias) / invMassSum;
            
            Vec2 impulseVec = direction * impulse;
            
            if (bodyA->type == BodyType::Dynamic) {
                bodyA->velocity -= impulseVec * bodyA->invMass;
                bodyA->angularVelocity -= rA.cross(impulseVec) * bodyA->invInertia;
            }
            
            if (bodyB->type == BodyType::Dynamic) {
                bodyB->velocity += impulseVec * bodyB->invMass;
                bodyB->angularVelocity += rB.cross(impulseVec) * bodyB->invInertia;
            }
        }
    }
};

} // namespace physics2d
} // namespace nk
```

## 2. PhysicsWorld2D.hpp - Monde Physique Complet

```cpp
// PhysicsWorld2D.hpp
#pragma once

#include "CollisionResponse2D.hpp"
#include <memory>
#include <algorithm>

namespace nk {
namespace physics2d {

// ====================================================================
// PHYSICS WORLD
// ====================================================================

class PhysicsWorld2D {
public:
    // Constructor
    PhysicsWorld2D(const Vec2& gravity = Vec2(0, -9.81f))
        : m_gravity(gravity)
        , m_iterations(10)
        , m_timeAccumulator(0.0f)
        , m_fixedTimestep(1.0f / 60.0f) {
    }
    
    ~PhysicsWorld2D() {
        clear();
    }
    
    // Add/Remove bodies
    RigidBody2D* createBody(const Vec2& position = Vec2::zero(), 
                           BodyType type = BodyType::Dynamic) {
        auto* body = new RigidBody2D();
        body->position = position;
        body->type = type;
        body->updateMass();
        
        m_bodies.push_back(body);
        return body;
    }
    
    void removeBody(RigidBody2D* body) {
        auto it = std::find(m_bodies.begin(), m_bodies.end(), body);
        if (it != m_bodies.end()) {
            delete *it;
            m_bodies.erase(it);
        }
    }
    
    // Add shapes to bodies
    CircleShape* addCircleShape(RigidBody2D* body, float radius, 
                               const Vec2& center = Vec2::zero()) {
        auto* shape = new CircleShape(radius, center);
        m_shapes[body].push_back(shape);
        
        // Update mass properties
        body->mass = body->material.density * shape->getArea();
        body->inertia = shape->getMomentOfInertia(body->mass);
        body->updateMass();
        
        return shape;
    }
    
    BoxShape* addBoxShape(RigidBody2D* body, const Vec2& halfExtents) {
        auto* shape = new BoxShape(halfExtents);
        m_shapes[body].push_back(shape);
        
        body->mass = body->material.density * shape->getArea();
        body->inertia = shape->getMomentOfInertia(body->mass);
        body->updateMass();
        
        return shape;
    }
    
    PolygonShape* addPolygonShape(RigidBody2D* body, 
                                 const std::vector<Vec2>& vertices) {
        auto* shape = new PolygonShape(vertices);
        m_shapes[body].push_back(shape);
        
        body->mass = body->material.density * shape->getArea();
        body->inertia = shape->getMomentOfInertia(body->mass);
        body->updateMass();
        
        return shape;
    }
    
    // Constraints
    void addConstraint(Constraint* constraint) {
        m_constraints.push_back(constraint);
    }
    
    DistanceConstraint* createDistanceConstraint(
        RigidBody2D* bodyA, RigidBody2D* bodyB,
        const Vec2& anchorA, const Vec2& anchorB,
        float length = -1.0f) {
        
        auto* constraint = new DistanceConstraint(bodyA, bodyB, anchorA, anchorB, length);
        addConstraint(constraint);
        return constraint;
    }
    
    HingeConstraint* createHingeConstraint(
        RigidBody2D* bodyA, RigidBody2D* bodyB,
        const Vec2& worldAnchor) {
        
        auto* constraint = new HingeConstraint(bodyA, bodyB, worldAnchor);
        addConstraint(constraint);
        return constraint;
    }
    
    // Physics update (variable timestep with fixed substeps)
    void update(float deltaTime) {
        m_timeAccumulator += deltaTime;
        
        while (m_timeAccumulator >= m_fixedTimestep) {
            step(m_fixedTimestep);
            m_timeAccumulator -= m_fixedTimestep;
        }
    }
    
    // Fixed timestep
    void step(float dt) {
        // Clear manifolds
        m_manifolds.clear();
        
        // Apply forces (gravity)
        for (auto* body : m_bodies) {
            if (body->type != BodyType::Dynamic) continue;
            
            body->force += m_gravity * body->mass;
        }
        
        // Integrate velocities
        for (auto* body : m_bodies) {
            if (body->type != BodyType::Dynamic) continue;
            
            body->velocity += (body->force * body->invMass) * dt;
            body->angularVelocity += (body->torque * body->invInertia) * dt;
            
            // Damping
            body->velocity *= 0.99f;
            body->angularVelocity *= 0.99f;
            
            // Clear forces
            body->force = Vec2::zero();
            body->torque = 0.0f;
        }
        
        // Broad phase (simple AABB check)
        broadPhase();
        
        // Narrow phase (detailed collision detection)
        narrowPhase();
        
        // Prepare constraints
        for (auto* constraint : m_constraints) {
            constraint->prepare(dt);
        }
        
        // Iterative impulse solver
        for (int i = 0; i < m_iterations; i++) {
            // Resolve collisions
            for (auto& manifold : m_manifolds) {
                CollisionResolver::resolveCollision(manifold);
            }
            
            // Solve constraints
            for (auto* constraint : m_constraints) {
                constraint->solve();
            }
        }
        
        // Integrate positions
        for (auto* body : m_bodies) {
            if (body->type == BodyType::Static) continue;
            
            body->position += body->velocity * dt;
            body->rotation += body->angularVelocity * dt;
        }
        
        // Callbacks
        for (auto& manifold : m_manifolds) {
            if (m_collisionCallback) {
                m_collisionCallback(manifold);
            }
        }
    }
    
    // Raycasting
    struct RaycastHit {
        RigidBody2D* body = nullptr;
        Vec2 point;
        Vec2 normal;
        float distance = 0.0f;
    };
    
    bool raycast(const Vec2& origin, const Vec2& direction, float maxDistance,
                RaycastHit& hit) {
        
        float closestDistance = maxDistance;
        bool foundHit = false;
        
        for (auto* body : m_bodies) {
            auto it = m_shapes.find(body);
            if (it == m_shapes.end()) continue;
            
            for (auto* shape : it->second) {
                // Simple ray-AABB test first
                Vec2 aabbMin, aabbMax;
                shape->computeAABB(*body, aabbMin, aabbMax);
                
                // Ray-AABB intersection
                Vec2 invDir(1.0f / direction.x, 1.0f / direction.y);
                
                float t1 = (aabbMin.x - origin.x) * invDir.x;
                float t2 = (aabbMax.x - origin.x) * invDir.x;
                float t3 = (aabbMin.y - origin.y) * invDir.y;
                float t4 = (aabbMax.y - origin.y) * invDir.y;
                
                float tmin = std::max(std::min(t1, t2), std::min(t3, t4));
                float tmax = std::min(std::max(t1, t2), std::max(t3, t4));
                
                if (tmax < 0 || tmin > tmax || tmin > maxDistance) {
                    continue;
                }
                
                // Detailed shape intersection
                if (shape->getType() == ShapeType::Circle) {
                    auto* circle = static_cast<CircleShape*>(shape);
                    Vec2 center = body->localToWorld(circle->center);
                    
                    Vec2 oc = origin - center;
                    float a = direction.dot(direction);
                    float b = 2.0f * oc.dot(direction);
                    float c = oc.dot(oc) - circle->radius * circle->radius;
                    
                    float discriminant = b * b - 4 * a * c;
                    
                    if (discriminant >= 0) {
                        float t = (-b - std::sqrt(discriminant)) / (2.0f * a);
                        
                        if (t > 0 && t < closestDistance) {
                            closestDistance = t;
                            hit.body = body;
                            hit.point = origin + direction * t;
                            hit.normal = (hit.point - center).normalized();
                            hit.distance = t;
                            foundHit = true;
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        return foundHit;
    }
    
    // Query
    std::vector<RigidBody2D*> queryAABB(const Vec2& min, const Vec2& max) {
        std::vector<RigidBody2D*> result;
        
        AABB queryBox(min, max);
        
        for (auto* body : m_bodies) {
            auto it = m_shapes.find(body);
            if (it == m_shapes.end()) continue;
            
            for (auto* shape : it->second) {
                Vec2 aabbMin, aabbMax;
                shape->computeAABB(*body, aabbMin, aabbMax);
                
                AABB bodyAABB(aabbMin, aabbMax);
                
                if (queryBox.overlaps(bodyAABB)) {
                    result.push_back(body);
                    break;
                }
            }
        }
        
        return result;
    }
    
    std::vector<RigidBody2D*> queryPoint(const Vec2& point) {
        std::vector<RigidBody2D*> result;
        
        for (auto* body : m_bodies) {
            auto it = m_shapes.find(body);
            if (it == m_shapes.end()) continue;
            
            for (auto* shape : it->second) {
                if (shape->containsPoint(*body, point)) {
                    result.push_back(body);
                    break;
                }
            }
        }
        
        return result;
    }
    
    // Settings
    void setGravity(const Vec2& gravity) { m_gravity = gravity; }
    Vec2 getGravity() const { return m_gravity; }
    
    void setIterations(int iterations) { m_iterations = iterations; }
    int getIterations() const { return m_iterations; }
    
    void setFixedTimestep(float timestep) { m_fixedTimestep = timestep; }
    float getFixedTimestep() const { return m_fixedTimestep; }
    
    // Callbacks
    using CollisionCallback = std::function<void(const Manifold&)>;
    void setCollisionCallback(CollisionCallback callback) {
        m_collisionCallback = callback;
    }
    
    // Access
    const std::vector<RigidBody2D*>& getBodies() const { return m_bodies; }
    const std::vector<Manifold>& getManifolds() const { return m_manifolds; }
    
    // Clear
    void clear() {
        for (auto* body : m_bodies) {
            delete body;
        }
        m_bodies.clear();
        
        for (auto& pair : m_shapes) {
            for (auto* shape : pair.second) {
                delete shape;
            }
        }
        m_shapes.clear();
        
        for (auto* constraint : m_constraints) {
            delete constraint;
        }
        m_constraints.clear();
        
        m_manifolds.clear();
    }
    
private:
    void broadPhase() {
        m_potentialCollisions.clear();
        
        // Simple O(n²) for now - use spatial hash or BVH for large worlds
        for (size_t i = 0; i < m_bodies.size(); i++) {
            for (size_t j = i + 1; j < m_bodies.size(); j++) {
                auto* bodyA = m_bodies[i];
                auto* bodyB = m_bodies[j];
                
                // Skip if both static
                if (bodyA->type == BodyType::Static && 
                    bodyB->type == BodyType::Static) {
                    continue;
                }
                
                // AABB test
                auto itA = m_shapes.find(bodyA);
                auto itB = m_shapes.find(bodyB);
                
                if (itA == m_shapes.end() || itB == m_shapes.end()) continue;
                
                for (auto* shapeA : itA->second) {
                    for (auto* shapeB : itB->second) {
                        Vec2 minA, maxA, minB, maxB;
                        shapeA->computeAABB(*bodyA, minA, maxA);
                        shapeB->computeAABB(*bodyB, minB, maxB);
                        
                        AABB aabbA(minA, maxA);
                        AABB aabbB(minB, maxB);
                        
                        if (aabbA.overlaps(aabbB)) {
                            m_potentialCollisions.push_back({bodyA, bodyB, shapeA, shapeB});
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    void narrowPhase() {
        for (auto& potential : m_potentialCollisions) {
            Manifold manifold;
            
            bool collided = testCollision(
                potential.bodyA, potential.shapeA,
                potential.bodyB, potential.shapeB,
                manifold
            );
            
            if (collided) {
                m_manifolds.push_back(manifold);
            }
        }
    }
    
    bool testCollision(RigidBody2D* bodyA, Shape* shapeA,
                      RigidBody2D* bodyB, Shape* shapeB,
                      Manifold& manifold) {
        
        // Dispatch to appropriate collision test
        if (shapeA->getType() == ShapeType::Circle && 
            shapeB->getType() == ShapeType::Circle) {
            return CollisionDetector::testCircleCircle(
                *bodyA, *static_cast<CircleShape*>(shapeA),
                *bodyB, *static_cast<CircleShape*>(shapeB),
                manifold
            );
        }
        else if (shapeA->getType() == ShapeType::Circle && 
                 shapeB->getType() == ShapeType::Box) {
            return CollisionDetector::testCircleBox(
                *bodyA, *static_cast<CircleShape*>(shapeA),
                *bodyB, *static_cast<BoxShape*>(shapeB),
                manifold
            );
        }
        else if (shapeA->getType() == ShapeType::Box && 
                 shapeB->getType() == ShapeType::Circle) {
            bool result = CollisionDetector::testCircleBox(
                *bodyB, *static_cast<CircleShape*>(shapeB),
                *bodyA, *static_cast<BoxShape*>(shapeA),
                manifold
            );
            if (result) {
                // Swap A and B
                std::swap(manifold.bodyA, manifold.bodyB);
                std::swap(manifold.shapeA, manifold.shapeB);
                manifold.normal = -manifold.normal;
            }
            return result;
        }
        else if (shapeA->getType() == ShapeType::Box && 
                 shapeB->getType() == ShapeType::Box) {
            return CollisionDetector::testBoxBox(
                *bodyA, *static_cast<BoxShape*>(shapeA),
                *bodyB, *static_cast<BoxShape*>(shapeB),
                manifold
            );
        }
        else if (shapeA->getType() == ShapeType::Polygon && 
                 shapeB->getType() == ShapeType::Polygon) {
            return CollisionDetector::testPolygonPolygon(
                *bodyA, *static_cast<PolygonShape*>(shapeA),
                *bodyB, *static_cast<PolygonShape*>(shapeB),
                manifold
            );
        }
        
        return false;
    }
    
    struct PotentialCollision {
        RigidBody2D* bodyA;
        RigidBody2D* bodyB;
        Shape* shapeA;
        Shape* shapeB;
    };
    
    Vec2 m_gravity;
    int m_iterations;
    float m_timeAccumulator;
    float m_fixedTimestep;
    
    std::vector<RigidBody2D*> m_bodies;
    std::unordered_map<RigidBody2D*, std::vector<Shape*>> m_shapes;
    std::vector<Constraint*> m_constraints;
    
    std::vector<PotentialCollision> m_potentialCollisions;
    std::vector<Manifold> m_manifolds;
    
    CollisionCallback m_collisionCallback;
};

} // namespace physics2d
} // namespace nk
```

**PHYSICS 2D COMPLET !** ✅

Maintenant attaquons **PHYSICS 3D** (AABB, Sphere, OBB, Mesh collision, GJK/EPA) ?

# PARTIE 28 : Physics 3D - Structures de Base + Collision

## 1. Physics3D.hpp - Structures 3D

```cpp
// Physics3D.hpp
#pragma once

#include "Vector3.hpp"
#include "Quaternion.hpp"
#include "Matrix3.hpp"
#include "Matrix4.hpp"
#include "Transform.hpp"
#include <vector>
#include <memory>

namespace nk {
namespace physics3d {

using namespace math;

// ====================================================================
// RIGIDBODY 3D
// ====================================================================

enum class BodyType3D {
    Static,
    Kinematic,
    Dynamic
};

struct Material3D {
    float density = 1.0f;
    float restitution = 0.5f;
    float friction = 0.3f;
    
    static Material3D rock() { return {2.5f, 0.1f, 0.9f}; }
    static Material3D wood() { return {0.6f, 0.3f, 0.4f}; }
    static Material3D metal() { return {7.8f, 0.05f, 0.5f}; }
    static Material3D rubber() { return {1.0f, 0.8f, 0.9f}; }
    static Material3D ice() { return {0.9f, 0.2f, 0.02f}; }
};

struct RigidBody3D {
    // Transform
    Vec3 position;
    Quat rotation;
    
    // Linear motion
    Vec3 velocity;
    Vec3 force;
    
    // Angular motion
    Vec3 angularVelocity;
    Vec3 torque;
    
    // Physical properties
    float mass = 1.0f;
    float invMass = 1.0f;
    
    Mat3 inertiaTensor;       // Local space
    Mat3 invInertiaTensor;    // Local space
    Mat3 invInertiaTensorWorld; // World space (updated each frame)
    
    Material3D material;
    BodyType3D type = BodyType3D::Dynamic;
    
    bool enabled = true;
    bool sleeping = false;
    
    void* userData = nullptr;
    
    // Constructor
    RigidBody3D() {
        updateMass();
    }
    
    void updateMass() {
        if (type == BodyType3D::Static) {
            mass = 0.0f;
            invMass = 0.0f;
            inertiaTensor = Mat3::zero();
            invInertiaTensor = Mat3::zero();
        } else {
            invMass = mass > 0.0f ? 1.0f / mass : 0.0f;
            
            // Try to invert inertia tensor
            Mat3 invI = inertiaTensor.inverted();
            
            // Check if valid
            bool valid = true;
            for (int i = 0; i < 3; i++) {
                for (int j = 0; j < 3; j++) {
                    if (!isFinite(invI[i][j])) {
                        valid = false;
                        break;
                    }
                }
            }
            
            invInertiaTensor = valid ? invI : Mat3::zero();
        }
        
        updateInertiaTensorWorld();
    }
    
    void updateInertiaTensorWorld() {
        Mat3 rotMat = rotation.toMatrix3();
        invInertiaTensorWorld = rotMat * invInertiaTensor * rotMat.transposed();
    }
    
    void applyForce(const Vec3& f) {
        if (type != BodyType3D::Dynamic) return;
        force += f;
    }
    
    void applyForceAtPoint(const Vec3& f, const Vec3& point) {
        if (type != BodyType3D::Dynamic) return;
        
        force += f;
        
        Vec3 r = point - position;
        torque += r.cross(f);
    }
    
    void applyImpulse(const Vec3& impulse) {
        if (type != BodyType3D::Dynamic) return;
        velocity += impulse * invMass;
    }
    
    void applyImpulseAtPoint(const Vec3& impulse, const Vec3& point) {
        if (type != BodyType3D::Dynamic) return;
        
        velocity += impulse * invMass;
        
        Vec3 r = point - position;
        angularVelocity += invInertiaTensorWorld * r.cross(impulse);
    }
    
    void setMass(float m) {
        mass = m;
        updateMass();
    }
    
    void setInertiaTensor(const Mat3& tensor) {
        inertiaTensor = tensor;
        updateMass();
    }
    
    void setStatic() {
        type = BodyType3D::Static;
        velocity = Vec3::zero();
        angularVelocity = Vec3::zero();
        updateMass();
    }
    
    void setDynamic() {
        type = BodyType3D::Dynamic;
        updateMass();
    }
    
    Mat3 getRotationMatrix() const {
        return rotation.toMatrix3();
    }
    
    Vec3 localToWorld(const Vec3& local) const {
        return rotation * local + position;
    }
    
    Vec3 worldToLocal(const Vec3& world) const {
        return rotation.inverse() * (world - position);
    }
    
    Vec3 getVelocityAtPoint(const Vec3& worldPoint) const {
        Vec3 r = worldPoint - position;
        return velocity + angularVelocity.cross(r);
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// COLLISION SHAPES 3D
// ====================================================================

enum class ShapeType3D {
    Sphere,
    Box,
    Capsule,
    Cylinder,
    Cone,
    ConvexHull,
    Mesh
};

struct Shape3D {
    ShapeType3D type;
    
    virtual ~Shape3D() = default;
    virtual ShapeType3D getType() const = 0;
    virtual float getVolume() const = 0;
    virtual Mat3 getInertiaTensor(float mass) const = 0;
    virtual void computeAABB(const RigidBody3D& body, Vec3& min, Vec3& max) const = 0;
    virtual bool containsPoint(const RigidBody3D& body, const Vec3& point) const = 0;
    
    // Support function for GJK (furthest point in direction)
    virtual Vec3 support(const RigidBody3D& body, const Vec3& direction) const = 0;
};

// ====================================================================
// SPHERE SHAPE
// ====================================================================

struct SphereShape : public Shape3D {
    float radius;
    Vec3 center; // Local space
    
    SphereShape(float r = 1.0f, const Vec3& c = Vec3::zero())
        : radius(r), center(c) {
        type = ShapeType3D::Sphere;
    }
    
    ShapeType3D getType() const override { return ShapeType3D::Sphere; }
    
    float getVolume() const override {
        return (4.0f / 3.0f) * PI * radius * radius * radius;
    }
    
    Mat3 getInertiaTensor(float mass) const override {
        // I = (2/5) * m * r²
        float i = (2.0f / 5.0f) * mass * radius * radius;
        return Mat3(
            i, 0, 0,
            0, i, 0,
            0, 0, i
        );
    }
    
    void computeAABB(const RigidBody3D& body, Vec3& min, Vec3& max) const override {
        Vec3 worldCenter = body.localToWorld(center);
        min = worldCenter - Vec3(radius, radius, radius);
        max = worldCenter + Vec3(radius, radius, radius);
    }
    
    bool containsPoint(const RigidBody3D& body, const Vec3& point) const override {
        Vec3 worldCenter = body.localToWorld(center);
        return (point - worldCenter).lengthSquared() <= radius * radius;
    }
    
    Vec3 support(const RigidBody3D& body, const Vec3& direction) const override {
        Vec3 worldCenter = body.localToWorld(center);
        return worldCenter + direction.normalized() * radius;
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// BOX SHAPE (OBB - Oriented Bounding Box)
// ====================================================================

struct BoxShape : public Shape3D {
    Vec3 halfExtents;
    
    BoxShape(const Vec3& halfSize = Vec3(1, 1, 1))
        : halfExtents(halfSize) {
        type = ShapeType3D::Box;
    }
    
    BoxShape(float width, float height, float depth)
        : halfExtents(width * 0.5f, height * 0.5f, depth * 0.5f) {
        type = ShapeType3D::Box;
    }
    
    ShapeType3D getType() const override { return ShapeType3D::Box; }
    
    float getVolume() const override {
        return 8.0f * halfExtents.x * halfExtents.y * halfExtents.z;
    }
    
    Mat3 getInertiaTensor(float mass) const override {
        // I = (1/12) * m * (h² + d², w² + d², w² + h²)
        float w = halfExtents.x * 2.0f;
        float h = halfExtents.y * 2.0f;
        float d = halfExtents.z * 2.0f;
        
        float ixx = (mass / 12.0f) * (h * h + d * d);
        float iyy = (mass / 12.0f) * (w * w + d * d);
        float izz = (mass / 12.0f) * (w * w + h * h);
        
        return Mat3(
            ixx, 0, 0,
            0, iyy, 0,
            0, 0, izz
        );
    }
    
    void computeAABB(const RigidBody3D& body, Vec3& min, Vec3& max) const override {
        // Get all 8 corners in world space
        Vec3 corners[8] = {
            body.localToWorld(Vec3(-halfExtents.x, -halfExtents.y, -halfExtents.z)),
            body.localToWorld(Vec3( halfExtents.x, -halfExtents.y, -halfExtents.z)),
            body.localToWorld(Vec3(-halfExtents.x,  halfExtents.y, -halfExtents.z)),
            body.localToWorld(Vec3( halfExtents.x,  halfExtents.y, -halfExtents.z)),
            body.localToWorld(Vec3(-halfExtents.x, -halfExtents.y,  halfExtents.z)),
            body.localToWorld(Vec3( halfExtents.x, -halfExtents.y,  halfExtents.z)),
            body.localToWorld(Vec3(-halfExtents.x,  halfExtents.y,  halfExtents.z)),
            body.localToWorld(Vec3( halfExtents.x,  halfExtents.y,  halfExtents.z))
        };
        
        min = corners[0];
        max = corners[0];
        
        for (int i = 1; i < 8; i++) {
            min.x = std::min(min.x, corners[i].x);
            min.y = std::min(min.y, corners[i].y);
            min.z = std::min(min.z, corners[i].z);
            max.x = std::max(max.x, corners[i].x);
            max.y = std::max(max.y, corners[i].y);
            max.z = std::max(max.z, corners[i].z);
        }
    }
    
    bool containsPoint(const RigidBody3D& body, const Vec3& point) const override {
        Vec3 local = body.worldToLocal(point);
        return std::abs(local.x) <= halfExtents.x &&
               std::abs(local.y) <= halfExtents.y &&
               std::abs(local.z) <= halfExtents.z;
    }
    
    Vec3 support(const RigidBody3D& body, const Vec3& direction) const override {
        Vec3 localDir = body.rotation.inverse() * direction;
        
        Vec3 result(
            localDir.x > 0 ? halfExtents.x : -halfExtents.x,
            localDir.y > 0 ? halfExtents.y : -halfExtents.y,
            localDir.z > 0 ? halfExtents.z : -halfExtents.z
        );
        
        return body.localToWorld(result);
    }
    
    std::vector<Vec3> getVertices() const {
        return {
            Vec3(-halfExtents.x, -halfExtents.y, -halfExtents.z),
            Vec3( halfExtents.x, -halfExtents.y, -halfExtents.z),
            Vec3(-halfExtents.x,  halfExtents.y, -halfExtents.z),
            Vec3( halfExtents.x,  halfExtents.y, -halfExtents.z),
            Vec3(-halfExtents.x, -halfExtents.y,  halfExtents.z),
            Vec3( halfExtents.x, -halfExtents.y,  halfExtents.z),
            Vec3(-halfExtents.x,  halfExtents.y,  halfExtents.z),
            Vec3( halfExtents.x,  halfExtents.y,  halfExtents.z)
        };
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// CAPSULE SHAPE (Cylinder with hemispheres on ends)
// ====================================================================

struct CapsuleShape : public Shape3D {
    float radius;
    float height; // Height of cylindrical section (not including caps)
    
    CapsuleShape(float r = 0.5f, float h = 1.0f)
        : radius(r), height(h) {
        type = ShapeType3D::Capsule;
    }
    
    ShapeType3D getType() const override { return ShapeType3D::Capsule; }
    
    float getVolume() const override {
        // Volume = cylinder + 2 hemispheres (= 1 sphere)
        float cylinderVol = PI * radius * radius * height;
        float sphereVol = (4.0f / 3.0f) * PI * radius * radius * radius;
        return cylinderVol + sphereVol;
    }
    
    Mat3 getInertiaTensor(float mass) const override {
        // Approximate as cylinder + sphere
        float h = height;
        float r = radius;
        
        float cylinderMass = mass * (height / (height + 2.0f * radius));
        float sphereMass = mass - cylinderMass;
        
        // Cylinder
        float ixxCyl = cylinderMass * ((3.0f * r * r + h * h) / 12.0f);
        float iyyCyl = cylinderMass * (r * r / 2.0f);
        
        // Sphere
        float iSphere = (2.0f / 5.0f) * sphereMass * r * r;
        
        return Mat3(
            ixxCyl + iSphere, 0, 0,
            0, iyyCyl + iSphere, 0,
            0, 0, ixxCyl + iSphere
        );
    }
    
    void computeAABB(const RigidBody3D& body, Vec3& min, Vec3& max) const override {
        Vec3 up = body.rotation * Vec3(0, 1, 0);
        Vec3 halfHeight = up * (height * 0.5f);
        
        Vec3 top = body.position + halfHeight;
        Vec3 bottom = body.position - halfHeight;
        
        // AABB around both spheres
        Vec3 topMin = top - Vec3(radius, radius, radius);
        Vec3 topMax = top + Vec3(radius, radius, radius);
        Vec3 bottomMin = bottom - Vec3(radius, radius, radius);
        Vec3 bottomMax = bottom + Vec3(radius, radius, radius);
        
        min.x = std::min(topMin.x, bottomMin.x);
        min.y = std::min(topMin.y, bottomMin.y);
        min.z = std::min(topMin.z, bottomMin.z);
        max.x = std::max(topMax.x, bottomMax.x);
        max.y = std::max(topMax.y, bottomMax.y);
        max.z = std::max(topMax.z, bottomMax.z);
    }
    
    bool containsPoint(const RigidBody3D& body, const Vec3& point) const override {
        Vec3 local = body.worldToLocal(point);
        
        // Clamp to line segment
        float t = clamp(local.y, -height * 0.5f, height * 0.5f);
        Vec3 closest(0, t, 0);
        
        return (local - closest).lengthSquared() <= radius * radius;
    }
    
    Vec3 support(const RigidBody3D& body, const Vec3& direction) const override {
        Vec3 localDir = body.rotation.inverse() * direction;
        
        // Choose top or bottom cap
        Vec3 center(0, localDir.y > 0 ? height * 0.5f : -height * 0.5f, 0);
        
        // Add sphere support
        Vec3 result = center + localDir.normalized() * radius;
        
        return body.localToWorld(result);
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// CONVEX HULL SHAPE
// ====================================================================

struct ConvexHullShape : public Shape3D {
    std::vector<Vec3> vertices; // Local space
    
    ConvexHullShape() {
        type = ShapeType3D::ConvexHull;
    }
    
    ConvexHullShape(const std::vector<Vec3>& verts)
        : vertices(verts) {
        type = ShapeType3D::ConvexHull;
    }
    
    ShapeType3D getType() const override { return ShapeType3D::ConvexHull; }
    
    float getVolume() const override {
        // Simplified - compute volume using divergence theorem
        float volume = 0.0f;
        
        // Assumes convex hull with triangulated faces
        // This is a placeholder - proper implementation needs face data
        
        return volume;
    }
    
    Mat3 getInertiaTensor(float mass) const override {
        // Approximate using bounding box
        Vec3 min = vertices[0];
        Vec3 max = vertices[0];
        
        for (const auto& v : vertices) {
            min.x = std::min(min.x, v.x);
            min.y = std::min(min.y, v.y);
            min.z = std::min(min.z, v.z);
            max.x = std::max(max.x, v.x);
            max.y = std::max(max.y, v.y);
            max.z = std::max(max.z, v.z);
        }
        
        Vec3 size = max - min;
        
        float ixx = (mass / 12.0f) * (size.y * size.y + size.z * size.z);
        float iyy = (mass / 12.0f) * (size.x * size.x + size.z * size.z);
        float izz = (mass / 12.0f) * (size.x * size.x + size.y * size.y);
        
        return Mat3(
            ixx, 0, 0,
            0, iyy, 0,
            0, 0, izz
        );
    }
    
    void computeAABB(const RigidBody3D& body, Vec3& min, Vec3& max) const override {
        if (vertices.empty()) {
            min = max = body.position;
            return;
        }
        
        Vec3 worldVert = body.localToWorld(vertices[0]);
        min = max = worldVert;
        
        for (size_t i = 1; i < vertices.size(); i++) {
            worldVert = body.localToWorld(vertices[i]);
            min.x = std::min(min.x, worldVert.x);
            min.y = std::min(min.y, worldVert.y);
            min.z = std::min(min.z, worldVert.z);
            max.x = std::max(max.x, worldVert.x);
            max.y = std::max(max.y, worldVert.y);
            max.z = std::max(max.z, worldVert.z);
        }
    }
    
    bool containsPoint(const RigidBody3D& body, const Vec3& point) const override {
        // GJK would be proper here, simplified version
        Vec3 local = body.worldToLocal(point);
        
        // Check if inside using face normals (assumes convex hull with faces)
        // This is a placeholder
        
        return false;
    }
    
    Vec3 support(const RigidBody3D& body, const Vec3& direction) const override {
        Vec3 localDir = body.rotation.inverse() * direction;
        
        float maxDot = vertices[0].dot(localDir);
        Vec3 maxVert = vertices[0];
        
        for (size_t i = 1; i < vertices.size(); i++) {
            float d = vertices[i].dot(localDir);
            if (d > maxDot) {
                maxDot = d;
                maxVert = vertices[i];
            }
        }
        
        return body.localToWorld(maxVert);
    }
};

} // namespace physics3d
} // namespace nk
```

Suite avec **GJK Algorithm, Collision Detection 3D** dans le prochain message !

# PARTIE 29 : Physics 3D - GJK/EPA + Collision Detection

## 1. GJK.hpp - Gilbert-Johnson-Keerthi Algorithm

```cpp
// GJK.hpp - Collision Detection using GJK/EPA
#pragma once

#include "Physics3D.hpp"
#include <array>

namespace nk {
namespace physics3d {

// ====================================================================
// GJK SIMPLEX
// ====================================================================

struct Simplex {
    std::array<Vec3, 4> points;
    size_t size = 0;
    
    void add(const Vec3& point) {
        points[size++] = point;
    }
    
    Vec3& operator[](size_t i) { return points[i]; }
    const Vec3& operator[](size_t i) const { return points[i]; }
    
    void set(const std::array<Vec3, 4>& newPoints, size_t newSize) {
        points = newPoints;
        size = newSize;
    }
    
    Vec3 getLast() const { return points[size - 1]; }
};

// ====================================================================
// GJK ALGORITHM (Collision Detection)
// ====================================================================

class GJK {
public:
    // Test if two shapes intersect
    static bool intersects(const RigidBody3D& bodyA, const Shape3D& shapeA,
                          const RigidBody3D& bodyB, const Shape3D& shapeB) {
        
        Simplex simplex;
        
        // Initial direction (from A to B)
        Vec3 direction = bodyB.position - bodyA.position;
        
        if (direction.lengthSquared() < EPSILON) {
            direction = Vec3(1, 0, 0); // Arbitrary
        }
        
        // First support point
        Vec3 support = getSupport(bodyA, shapeA, bodyB, shapeB, direction);
        simplex.add(support);
        
        // New direction towards origin
        direction = -support;
        
        // Main GJK loop
        for (int iterations = 0; iterations < 32; iterations++) {
            support = getSupport(bodyA, shapeA, bodyB, shapeB, direction);
            
            // If support point didn't pass the origin, no collision
            if (support.dot(direction) < 0) {
                return false;
            }
            
            simplex.add(support);
            
            // Check if simplex contains origin
            if (containsOrigin(simplex, direction)) {
                return true;
            }
        }
        
        return false;
    }
    
    // Get collision info with penetration depth (using EPA)
    static bool getCollisionInfo(const RigidBody3D& bodyA, const Shape3D& shapeA,
                                const RigidBody3D& bodyB, const Shape3D& shapeB,
                                Vec3& normal, float& penetration) {
        
        Simplex simplex;
        Vec3 direction = bodyB.position - bodyA.position;
        
        if (direction.lengthSquared() < EPSILON) {
            direction = Vec3(1, 0, 0);
        }
        
        Vec3 support = getSupport(bodyA, shapeA, bodyB, shapeB, direction);
        simplex.add(support);
        direction = -support;
        
        for (int iterations = 0; iterations < 32; iterations++) {
            support = getSupport(bodyA, shapeA, bodyB, shapeB, direction);
            
            if (support.dot(direction) < 0) {
                return false; // No collision
            }
            
            simplex.add(support);
            
            if (containsOrigin(simplex, direction)) {
                // Collision detected, use EPA to get penetration
                return EPA(simplex, bodyA, shapeA, bodyB, shapeB, normal, penetration);
            }
        }
        
        return false;
    }
    
private:
    // Minkowski difference support function
    static Vec3 getSupport(const RigidBody3D& bodyA, const Shape3D& shapeA,
                          const RigidBody3D& bodyB, const Shape3D& shapeB,
                          const Vec3& direction) {
        
        Vec3 supportA = shapeA.support(bodyA, direction);
        Vec3 supportB = shapeB.support(bodyB, -direction);
        
        return supportA - supportB;
    }
    
    // Check if simplex contains origin and update it
    static bool containsOrigin(Simplex& simplex, Vec3& direction) {
        switch (simplex.size) {
            case 2: return line(simplex, direction);
            case 3: return triangle(simplex, direction);
            case 4: return tetrahedron(simplex, direction);
            default: return false;
        }
    }
    
    // Line case (2 points)
    static bool line(Simplex& simplex, Vec3& direction) {
        Vec3 a = simplex[1];
        Vec3 b = simplex[0];
        
        Vec3 ab = b - a;
        Vec3 ao = -a;
        
        if (ab.dot(ao) > 0) {
            // Region AB
            direction = ab.cross(ao).cross(ab);
        } else {
            // Region A
            simplex.set({a}, 1);
            direction = ao;
        }
        
        return false;
    }
    
    // Triangle case (3 points)
    static bool triangle(Simplex& simplex, Vec3& direction) {
        Vec3 a = simplex[2];
        Vec3 b = simplex[1];
        Vec3 c = simplex[0];
        
        Vec3 ab = b - a;
        Vec3 ac = c - a;
        Vec3 ao = -a;
        
        Vec3 abc = ab.cross(ac);
        
        // Check which region origin is in
        if (abc.cross(ac).dot(ao) > 0) {
            if (ac.dot(ao) > 0) {
                // Region AC
                simplex.set({a, c}, 2);
                direction = ac.cross(ao).cross(ac);
            } else {
                // Region A or AB
                if (ab.dot(ao) > 0) {
                    simplex.set({a, b}, 2);
                    direction = ab.cross(ao).cross(ab);
                } else {
                    simplex.set({a}, 1);
                    direction = ao;
                }
            }
        } else {
            if (ab.cross(abc).dot(ao) > 0) {
                // Region AB
                if (ab.dot(ao) > 0) {
                    simplex.set({a, b}, 2);
                    direction = ab.cross(ao).cross(ab);
                } else {
                    simplex.set({a}, 1);
                    direction = ao;
                }
            } else {
                // Region ABC
                if (abc.dot(ao) > 0) {
                    direction = abc;
                } else {
                    simplex.set({a, c, b}, 3);
                    direction = -abc;
                }
            }
        }
        
        return false;
    }
    
    // Tetrahedron case (4 points)
    static bool tetrahedron(Simplex& simplex, Vec3& direction) {
        Vec3 a = simplex[3];
        Vec3 b = simplex[2];
        Vec3 c = simplex[1];
        Vec3 d = simplex[0];
        
        Vec3 ab = b - a;
        Vec3 ac = c - a;
        Vec3 ad = d - a;
        Vec3 ao = -a;
        
        Vec3 abc = ab.cross(ac);
        Vec3 acd = ac.cross(ad);
        Vec3 adb = ad.cross(ab);
        
        // Check which face is closest to origin
        if (abc.dot(ao) > 0) {
            simplex.set({a, b, c}, 3);
            return triangle(simplex, direction);
        }
        
        if (acd.dot(ao) > 0) {
            simplex.set({a, c, d}, 3);
            return triangle(simplex, direction);
        }
        
        if (adb.dot(ao) > 0) {
            simplex.set({a, d, b}, 3);
            return triangle(simplex, direction);
        }
        
        // Origin is inside tetrahedron
        return true;
    }
    
    // ====================================================================
    // EPA (Expanding Polytope Algorithm) - Get penetration depth
    // ====================================================================
    
    struct Face {
        Vec3 a, b, c;
        Vec3 normal;
        float distance;
        
        Face(const Vec3& a, const Vec3& b, const Vec3& c)
            : a(a), b(b), c(c) {
            
            normal = (b - a).cross(c - a).normalized();
            distance = normal.dot(a);
        }
    };
    
    static bool EPA(const Simplex& simplex,
                   const RigidBody3D& bodyA, const Shape3D& shapeA,
                   const RigidBody3D& bodyB, const Shape3D& shapeB,
                   Vec3& outNormal, float& outPenetration) {
        
        std::vector<Face> polytope;
        
        // Initialize polytope from simplex tetrahedron
        Vec3 a = simplex[3];
        Vec3 b = simplex[2];
        Vec3 c = simplex[1];
        Vec3 d = simplex[0];
        
        polytope.push_back(Face(a, b, c));
        polytope.push_back(Face(a, c, d));
        polytope.push_back(Face(a, d, b));
        polytope.push_back(Face(b, d, c));
        
        const int maxIterations = 32;
        const float tolerance = 0.001f;
        
        for (int iteration = 0; iteration < maxIterations; iteration++) {
            // Find closest face to origin
            float minDistance = std::numeric_limits<float>::max();
            size_t minIndex = 0;
            
            for (size_t i = 0; i < polytope.size(); i++) {
                float dist = polytope[i].distance;
                if (dist < minDistance) {
                    minDistance = dist;
                    minIndex = i;
                }
            }
            
            Face& closestFace = polytope[minIndex];
            
            // Get support point in direction of closest face normal
            Vec3 support = getSupport(bodyA, shapeA, bodyB, shapeB, closestFace.normal);
```
