```cpp
            float distance = support.dot(closestFace.normal);
            
            // Check if we've reached the edge
            if (distance - minDistance < tolerance) {
                outNormal = closestFace.normal;
                outPenetration = distance;
                return true;
            }
            
            // Expand polytope
            std::vector<size_t> toRemove;
            std::vector<std::pair<Vec3, Vec3>> edges;
            
            for (size_t i = 0; i < polytope.size(); i++) {
                Face& face = polytope[i];
                
                // Check if face is visible from support point
                if (face.normal.dot(support - face.a) > 0) {
                    toRemove.push_back(i);
                    
                    // Add edges
                    addEdge(edges, face.a, face.b);
                    addEdge(edges, face.b, face.c);
                    addEdge(edges, face.c, face.a);
                }
            }
            
            // Remove faces
            for (int i = toRemove.size() - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
                polytope.erase(polytope.begin() + toRemove[i]);
            }
            
            // Add new faces
            for (const auto& edge : edges) {
                polytope.push_back(Face(edge.first, edge.second, support));
            }
        }
        
        // Fallback
        if (!polytope.empty()) {
            outNormal = polytope[0].normal;
            outPenetration = polytope[0].distance;
            return true;
        }
        
        return false;
    }
    
    static void addEdge(std::vector<std::pair<Vec3, Vec3>>& edges,
                       const Vec3& a, const Vec3& b) {
        
        // Check if edge already exists (in reverse)
        for (auto it = edges.begin(); it != edges.end(); ++it) {
            if ((it->first - b).lengthSquared() < EPSILON * EPSILON &&
                (it->second - a).lengthSquared() < EPSILON * EPSILON) {
                // Remove duplicate edge
                edges.erase(it);
                return;
            }
        }
        
        // Add new edge
        edges.push_back({a, b});
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// AABB 3D
// ====================================================================

struct AABB3D {
    Vec3 min, max;
    
    AABB3D() {}
    AABB3D(const Vec3& min, const Vec3& max) : min(min), max(max) {}
    
    Vec3 center() const { return (min + max) * 0.5f; }
    Vec3 extents() const { return (max - min) * 0.5f; }
    
    bool overlaps(const AABB3D& other) const {
        return !(max.x < other.min.x || min.x > other.max.x ||
                max.y < other.min.y || min.y > other.max.y ||
                max.z < other.min.z || min.z > other.max.z);
    }
    
    bool contains(const Vec3& point) const {
        return point.x >= min.x && point.x <= max.x &&
               point.y >= min.y && point.y <= max.y &&
               point.z >= min.z && point.z <= max.z;
    }
    
    void merge(const AABB3D& other) {
        min.x = std::min(min.x, other.min.x);
        min.y = std::min(min.y, other.min.y);
        min.z = std::min(min.z, other.min.z);
        max.x = std::max(max.x, other.max.x);
        max.y = std::max(max.y, other.max.y);
        max.z = std::max(max.z, other.max.z);
    }
    
    float volume() const {
        Vec3 size = max - min;
        return size.x * size.y * size.z;
    }
    
    float surfaceArea() const {
        Vec3 size = max - min;
        return 2.0f * (size.x * size.y + size.y * size.z + size.z * size.x);
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// COLLISION CONTACT 3D
// ====================================================================

struct ContactPoint3D {
    Vec3 position;      // World space
    Vec3 normal;        // From A to B
    float penetration;
    
    ContactPoint3D() : penetration(0.0f) {}
};

struct Manifold3D {
    RigidBody3D* bodyA = nullptr;
    RigidBody3D* bodyB = nullptr;
    Shape3D* shapeA = nullptr;
    Shape3D* shapeB = nullptr;
    
    std::vector<ContactPoint3D> contacts;
    Vec3 normal;
    float penetration;
    
    Manifold3D() : penetration(0.0f) {}
    
    bool hasCollision() const {
        return penetration > 0.0f;
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// COLLISION DETECTOR 3D
// ====================================================================

class CollisionDetector3D {
public:
    // Sphere vs Sphere
    static bool testSphereSphere(
        const RigidBody3D& bodyA, const SphereShape& sphereA,
        const RigidBody3D& bodyB, const SphereShape& sphereB,
        Manifold3D& manifold)
    {
        Vec3 centerA = bodyA.localToWorld(sphereA.center);
        Vec3 centerB = bodyB.localToWorld(sphereB.center);
        
        Vec3 delta = centerB - centerA;
        float distSq = delta.lengthSquared();
        float radiusSum = sphereA.radius + sphereB.radius;
        
        if (distSq >= radiusSum * radiusSum) {
            return false;
        }
        
        float dist = std::sqrt(distSq);
        
        manifold.bodyA = const_cast<RigidBody3D*>(&bodyA);
        manifold.bodyB = const_cast<RigidBody3D*>(&bodyB);
        manifold.shapeA = const_cast<SphereShape*>(&sphereA);
        manifold.shapeB = const_cast<SphereShape*>(&sphereB);
        
        if (dist > 0.0f) {
            manifold.normal = delta / dist;
        } else {
            manifold.normal = Vec3(1, 0, 0);
        }
        
        manifold.penetration = radiusSum - dist;
        
        ContactPoint3D contact;
        contact.position = centerA + manifold.normal * sphereA.radius;
        contact.normal = manifold.normal;
        contact.penetration = manifold.penetration;
        
        manifold.contacts.push_back(contact);
        
        return true;
    }
    
    // Sphere vs Box (OBB)
    static bool testSphereBox(
        const RigidBody3D& bodyA, const SphereShape& sphere,
        const RigidBody3D& bodyB, const BoxShape& box,
        Manifold3D& manifold)
    {
        Vec3 sphereCenter = bodyA.localToWorld(sphere.center);
        Vec3 localCenter = bodyB.worldToLocal(sphereCenter);
        
        // Find closest point on box
        Vec3 closest;
        closest.x = clamp(localCenter.x, -box.halfExtents.x, box.halfExtents.x);
        closest.y = clamp(localCenter.y, -box.halfExtents.y, box.halfExtents.y);
        closest.z = clamp(localCenter.z, -box.halfExtents.z, box.halfExtents.z);
        
        bool inside = false;
        
        if (localCenter == closest) {
            inside = true;
            
            // Find closest face
            float dx = box.halfExtents.x - std::abs(localCenter.x);
            float dy = box.halfExtents.y - std::abs(localCenter.y);
            float dz = box.halfExtents.z - std::abs(localCenter.z);
            
            if (dx < dy && dx < dz) {
                closest.x = localCenter.x > 0 ? box.halfExtents.x : -box.halfExtents.x;
            } else if (dy < dz) {
                closest.y = localCenter.y > 0 ? box.halfExtents.y : -box.halfExtents.y;
            } else {
                closest.z = localCenter.z > 0 ? box.halfExtents.z : -box.halfExtents.z;
            }
        }
        
        Vec3 normal = localCenter - closest;
        float distSq = normal.lengthSquared();
        
        if (!inside && distSq >= sphere.radius * sphere.radius) {
            return false;
        }
        
        float dist = std::sqrt(distSq);
        
        manifold.bodyA = const_cast<RigidBody3D*>(&bodyA);
        manifold.bodyB = const_cast<RigidBody3D*>(&bodyB);
        manifold.shapeA = const_cast<SphereShape*>(&sphere);
        manifold.shapeB = const_cast<BoxShape*>(&box);
        
        if (inside) {
            manifold.normal = -bodyB.rotation * (normal / dist);
            manifold.penetration = sphere.radius + dist;
        } else {
            if (dist > 0.0f) {
                manifold.normal = bodyB.rotation * (normal / dist);
            } else {
                manifold.normal = Vec3(1, 0, 0);
            }
            manifold.penetration = sphere.radius - dist;
        }
        
        ContactPoint3D contact;
        contact.position = bodyB.localToWorld(closest);
        contact.normal = manifold.normal;
        contact.penetration = manifold.penetration;
        
        manifold.contacts.push_back(contact);
        
        return true;
    }
    
    // Generic collision using GJK/EPA
    static bool testGJK(
        const RigidBody3D& bodyA, const Shape3D& shapeA,
        const RigidBody3D& bodyB, const Shape3D& shapeB,
        Manifold3D& manifold)
    {
        Vec3 normal;
        float penetration;
        
        if (!GJK::getCollisionInfo(bodyA, shapeA, bodyB, shapeB, normal, penetration)) {
            return false;
        }
        
        manifold.bodyA = const_cast<RigidBody3D*>(&bodyA);
        manifold.bodyB = const_cast<RigidBody3D*>(&bodyB);
        manifold.shapeA = const_cast<Shape3D*>(&shapeA);
        manifold.shapeB = const_cast<Shape3D*>(&shapeB);
        manifold.normal = normal;
        manifold.penetration = penetration;
        
        // Generate contact point
        ContactPoint3D contact;
        contact.position = (bodyA.position + bodyB.position) * 0.5f;
        contact.normal = normal;
        contact.penetration = penetration;
        
        manifold.contacts.push_back(contact);
        
        return true;
    }
};

} // namespace physics3d
} // namespace nk
```

Suite avec **Collision Response 3D + Physics World 3D** dans le prochain message !

# PARTIE 30 : Physics 3D - Collision Response + Physics World

## 1. CollisionResponse3D.hpp - Résolution des Collisions 3D

```cpp
// CollisionResponse3D.hpp
#pragma once

#include "GJK.hpp"

namespace nk {
namespace physics3d {

// ====================================================================
// COLLISION RESOLVER 3D (Impulse-based)
// ====================================================================

class CollisionResolver3D {
public:
    static void resolveCollision(Manifold3D& manifold) {
        if (!manifold.hasCollision()) return;
        
        RigidBody3D* bodyA = manifold.bodyA;
        RigidBody3D* bodyB = manifold.bodyB;
        
        // Skip if both static
        if (bodyA->type == BodyType3D::Static && bodyB->type == BodyType3D::Static) {
            return;
        }
        
        // Process each contact point
        for (auto& contact : manifold.contacts) {
            resolveContact(bodyA, bodyB, contact, manifold.normal);
        }
        
        // Positional correction
        positionalCorrection(bodyA, bodyB, manifold);
    }
    
private:
    static void resolveContact(RigidBody3D* bodyA, RigidBody3D* bodyB,
                               const ContactPoint3D& contact, const Vec3& normal) {
        
        // Calculate relative velocity at contact point
        Vec3 rA = contact.position - bodyA->position;
        Vec3 rB = contact.position - bodyB->position;
        
        Vec3 vA = bodyA->velocity + bodyA->angularVelocity.cross(rA);
        Vec3 vB = bodyB->velocity + bodyB->angularVelocity.cross(rB);
        
        Vec3 relativeVel = vB - vA;
        float velAlongNormal = relativeVel.dot(normal);
        
        // Don't resolve if separating
        if (velAlongNormal > 0) {
            return;
        }
        
        // Calculate restitution
        float restitution = std::min(bodyA->material.restitution, 
                                     bodyB->material.restitution);
        
        // Calculate impulse
        Vec3 rACrossN = rA.cross(normal);
        Vec3 rBCrossN = rB.cross(normal);
        
        float invMassSum = bodyA->invMass + bodyB->invMass +
                          rACrossN.dot(bodyA->invInertiaTensorWorld * rACrossN) +
                          rBCrossN.dot(bodyB->invInertiaTensorWorld * rBCrossN);
        
        if (invMassSum == 0.0f) return;
        
        float j = -(1.0f + restitution) * velAlongNormal / invMassSum;
        j /= static_cast<float>(manifold.contacts.size());
        
        // Apply impulse
        Vec3 impulse = normal * j;
        
        if (bodyA->type == BodyType3D::Dynamic) {
            bodyA->velocity -= impulse * bodyA->invMass;
            bodyA->angularVelocity -= bodyA->invInertiaTensorWorld * rA.cross(impulse);
        }
        
        if (bodyB->type == BodyType3D::Dynamic) {
            bodyB->velocity += impulse * bodyB->invMass;
            bodyB->angularVelocity += bodyB->invInertiaTensorWorld * rB.cross(impulse);
        }
        
        // Friction
        applyFriction(bodyA, bodyB, contact, normal, j);
    }
    
    static void applyFriction(RigidBody3D* bodyA, RigidBody3D* bodyB,
                             const ContactPoint3D& contact, const Vec3& normal,
                             float normalImpulse) {
        
        Vec3 rA = contact.position - bodyA->position;
        Vec3 rB = contact.position - bodyB->position;
        
        Vec3 vA = bodyA->velocity + bodyA->angularVelocity.cross(rA);
        Vec3 vB = bodyB->velocity + bodyB->angularVelocity.cross(rB);
        
        Vec3 relativeVel = vB - vA;
        
        // Tangent velocity (perpendicular to normal)
        Vec3 tangent = relativeVel - normal * relativeVel.dot(normal);
        
        if (tangent.lengthSquared() < EPSILON * EPSILON) {
            return;
        }
        
        tangent = tangent.normalized();
        
        // Calculate tangential impulse
        Vec3 rACrossT = rA.cross(tangent);
        Vec3 rBCrossT = rB.cross(tangent);
        
        float invMassSum = bodyA->invMass + bodyB->invMass +
                          rACrossT.dot(bodyA->invInertiaTensorWorld * rACrossT) +
                          rBCrossT.dot(bodyB->invInertiaTensorWorld * rBCrossT);
        
        if (invMassSum == 0.0f) return;
        
        float jt = -relativeVel.dot(tangent) / invMassSum;
        jt /= static_cast<float>(manifold.contacts.size());
        
        // Coulomb friction
        float mu = std::sqrt(bodyA->material.friction * bodyB->material.friction);
        
        Vec3 frictionImpulse;
        
        if (std::abs(jt) < std::abs(normalImpulse) * mu) {
            frictionImpulse = tangent * jt;
        } else {
            frictionImpulse = tangent * (-std::abs(normalImpulse) * mu);
        }
        
        // Apply friction
        if (bodyA->type == BodyType3D::Dynamic) {
            bodyA->velocity -= frictionImpulse * bodyA->invMass;
            bodyA->angularVelocity -= bodyA->invInertiaTensorWorld * rA.cross(frictionImpulse);
        }
        
        if (bodyB->type == BodyType3D::Dynamic) {
            bodyB->velocity += frictionImpulse * bodyB->invMass;
            bodyB->angularVelocity += bodyB->invInertiaTensorWorld * rB.cross(frictionImpulse);
        }
    }
    
    static void positionalCorrection(RigidBody3D* bodyA, RigidBody3D* bodyB,
                                    const Manifold3D& manifold) {
        
        const float percent = 0.2f;
        const float slop = 0.01f;
        
        float penetration = manifold.penetration;
        
        if (penetration < slop) return;
        
        Vec3 correction = manifold.normal * 
                         (std::max(penetration - slop, 0.0f) / 
                         (bodyA->invMass + bodyB->invMass)) * percent;
        
        if (bodyA->type == BodyType3D::Dynamic) {
            bodyA->position -= correction * bodyA->invMass;
        }
        
        if (bodyB->type == BodyType3D::Dynamic) {
            bodyB->position += correction * bodyB->invMass;
        }
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// CONSTRAINTS 3D
// ====================================================================

struct Constraint3D {
    RigidBody3D* bodyA = nullptr;
    RigidBody3D* bodyB = nullptr;
    
    virtual ~Constraint3D() = default;
    virtual void prepare(float dt) = 0;
    virtual void solve() = 0;
};

// Point-to-Point constraint (ball joint)
struct PointConstraint3D : public Constraint3D {
    Vec3 localAnchorA;
    Vec3 localAnchorB;
    float stiffness = 1.0f;
    float damping = 0.1f;
    
    PointConstraint3D(RigidBody3D* a, RigidBody3D* b,
                     const Vec3& worldAnchor) {
        bodyA = a;
        bodyB = b;
        
        localAnchorA = a->worldToLocal(worldAnchor);
        localAnchorB = b->worldToLocal(worldAnchor);
    }
    
    void prepare(float dt) override {}
    
    void solve() override {
        Vec3 worldA = bodyA->localToWorld(localAnchorA);
        Vec3 worldB = bodyB->localToWorld(localAnchorB);
        
        Vec3 error = worldB - worldA;
        
        Vec3 rA = worldA - bodyA->position;
        Vec3 rB = worldB - bodyB->position;
        
        // Solve for each axis
        for (int axis = 0; axis < 3; axis++) {
            Vec3 direction = Vec3::zero();
            direction[axis] = 1.0f;
            
            float positionError = error[axis];
            
            Vec3 vA = bodyA->velocity + bodyA->angularVelocity.cross(rA);
            Vec3 vB = bodyB->velocity + bodyB->angularVelocity.cross(rB);
            
            float velocityError = (vB - vA).dot(direction);
            
            Vec3 rACrossD = rA.cross(direction);
            Vec3 rBCrossD = rB.cross(direction);
            
            float invMassSum = bodyA->invMass + bodyB->invMass +
                              rACrossD.dot(bodyA->invInertiaTensorWorld * rACrossD) +
                              rBCrossD.dot(bodyB->invInertiaTensorWorld * rBCrossD);
            
            if (invMassSum == 0.0f) continue;
            
            float bias = stiffness * positionError;
            float impulse = -(velocityError + bias + damping * positionError) / invMassSum;
            
            Vec3 impulseVec = direction * impulse;
            
            if (bodyA->type == BodyType3D::Dynamic) {
                bodyA->velocity -= impulseVec * bodyA->invMass;
                bodyA->angularVelocity -= bodyA->invInertiaTensorWorld * rA.cross(impulseVec);
            }
            
            if (bodyB->type == BodyType3D::Dynamic) {
                bodyB->velocity += impulseVec * bodyB->invMass;
                bodyB->angularVelocity += bodyB->invInertiaTensorWorld * rB.cross(impulseVec);
            }
        }
    }
};

// Hinge constraint (revolute joint)
struct HingeConstraint3D : public Constraint3D {
    Vec3 localAnchorA;
    Vec3 localAnchorB;
    Vec3 localAxisA;
    Vec3 localAxisB;
    
    HingeConstraint3D(RigidBody3D* a, RigidBody3D* b,
                     const Vec3& worldAnchor, const Vec3& worldAxis) {
        bodyA = a;
        bodyB = b;
        
        localAnchorA = a->worldToLocal(worldAnchor);
        localAnchorB = b->worldToLocal(worldAnchor);
        
        Vec3 normalizedAxis = worldAxis.normalized();
        localAxisA = a->rotation.inverse() * normalizedAxis;
        localAxisB = b->rotation.inverse() * normalizedAxis;
    }
    
    void prepare(float dt) override {}
    
    void solve() override {
        // First solve point constraint
        Vec3 worldA = bodyA->localToWorld(localAnchorA);
        Vec3 worldB = bodyB->localToWorld(localAnchorB);
        
        Vec3 error = worldB - worldA;
        Vec3 rA = worldA - bodyA->position;
        Vec3 rB = worldB - bodyB->position;
        
        for (int axis = 0; axis < 3; axis++) {
            Vec3 direction = Vec3::zero();
            direction[axis] = 1.0f;
            
            float positionError = error[axis];
            
            Vec3 vA = bodyA->velocity + bodyA->angularVelocity.cross(rA);
            Vec3 vB = bodyB->velocity + bodyB->angularVelocity.cross(rB);
            
            float velocityError = (vB - vA).dot(direction);
            
            Vec3 rACrossD = rA.cross(direction);
            Vec3 rBCrossD = rB.cross(direction);
            
            float invMassSum = bodyA->invMass + bodyB->invMass +
                              rACrossD.dot(bodyA->invInertiaTensorWorld * rACrossD) +
                              rBCrossD.dot(bodyB->invInertiaTensorWorld * rBCrossD);
            
            if (invMassSum == 0.0f) continue;
            
            float impulse = -(velocityError + 0.2f * positionError) / invMassSum;
            Vec3 impulseVec = direction * impulse;
            
            if (bodyA->type == BodyType3D::Dynamic) {
                bodyA->velocity -= impulseVec * bodyA->invMass;
                bodyA->angularVelocity -= bodyA->invInertiaTensorWorld * rA.cross(impulseVec);
            }
            
            if (bodyB->type == BodyType3D::Dynamic) {
                bodyB->velocity += impulseVec * bodyB->invMass;
                bodyB->angularVelocity += bodyB->invInertiaTensorWorld * rB.cross(impulseVec);
            }
        }
        
        // Constrain rotation to axis
        Vec3 worldAxisA = bodyA->rotation * localAxisA;
        Vec3 worldAxisB = bodyB->rotation * localAxisB;
        
        Vec3 perpendicular = worldAxisA.cross(worldAxisB);
        
        if (perpendicular.lengthSquared() > EPSILON) {
            perpendicular = perpendicular.normalized();
            
            Vec3 angularError = perpendicular * asin(clamp(perpendicular.length(), -1.0f, 1.0f));
            
            float angularVelError = (bodyB->angularVelocity - bodyA->angularVelocity).dot(perpendicular);
            
            Vec3 axis = perpendicular;
            
            float invInertiaSum = axis.dot(bodyA->invInertiaTensorWorld * axis) +
                                 axis.dot(bodyB->invInertiaTensorWorld * axis);
            
            if (invInertiaSum > 0.0f) {
                float impulse = -(angularVelError + 0.2f * angularError.length()) / invInertiaSum;
                Vec3 angularImpulse = axis * impulse;
                
                if (bodyA->type == BodyType3D::Dynamic) {
                    bodyA->angularVelocity -= bodyA->invInertiaTensorWorld * angularImpulse;
                }
                
                if (bodyB->type == BodyType3D::Dynamic) {
                    bodyB->angularVelocity += bodyB->invInertiaTensorWorld * angularImpulse;
                }
            }
        }
    }
};

} // namespace physics3d
} // namespace nk
```

## 2. PhysicsWorld3D.hpp - Monde Physique 3D

```cpp
// PhysicsWorld3D.hpp
#pragma once

#include "CollisionResponse3D.hpp"
#include <memory>
#include <algorithm>
#include <functional>

namespace nk {
namespace physics3d {

// ====================================================================
// PHYSICS WORLD 3D
// ====================================================================

class PhysicsWorld3D {
public:
    PhysicsWorld3D(const Vec3& gravity = Vec3(0, -9.81f, 0))
        : m_gravity(gravity)
        , m_iterations(10)
        , m_timeAccumulator(0.0f)
        , m_fixedTimestep(1.0f / 60.0f) {
    }
    
    ~PhysicsWorld3D() {
        clear();
    }
    
    // Create/Remove bodies
    RigidBody3D* createBody(const Vec3& position = Vec3::zero(),
                           BodyType3D type = BodyType3D::Dynamic) {
        auto* body = new RigidBody3D();
        body->position = position;
        body->type = type;
        body->updateMass();
        
        m_bodies.push_back(body);
        return body;
    }
    
    void removeBody(RigidBody3D* body) {
        auto it = std::find(m_bodies.begin(), m_bodies.end(), body);
        if (it != m_bodies.end()) {
            delete *it;
            m_bodies.erase(it);
        }
    }
    
    // Add shapes
    SphereShape* addSphereShape(RigidBody3D* body, float radius,
                               const Vec3& center = Vec3::zero()) {
        auto* shape = new SphereShape(radius, center);
        m_shapes[body].push_back(shape);
        
        body->mass = body->material.density * shape->getVolume();
        body->inertiaTensor = shape->getInertiaTensor(body->mass);
        body->updateMass();
        
        return shape;
    }
    
    BoxShape* addBoxShape(RigidBody3D* body, const Vec3& halfExtents) {
        auto* shape = new BoxShape(halfExtents);
        m_shapes[body].push_back(shape);
        
        body->mass = body->material.density * shape->getVolume();
        body->inertiaTensor = shape->getInertiaTensor(body->mass);
        body->updateMass();
        
        return shape;
    }
    
    CapsuleShape* addCapsuleShape(RigidBody3D* body, float radius, float height) {
        auto* shape = new CapsuleShape(radius, height);
        m_shapes[body].push_back(shape);
        
        body->mass = body->material.density * shape->getVolume();
        body->inertiaTensor = shape->getInertiaTensor(body->mass);
        body->updateMass();
        
        return shape;
    }
    
    ConvexHullShape* addConvexHullShape(RigidBody3D* body,
                                       const std::vector<Vec3>& vertices) {
        auto* shape = new ConvexHullShape(vertices);
        m_shapes[body].push_back(shape);
        
        body->mass = body->material.density * shape->getVolume();
        body->inertiaTensor = shape->getInertiaTensor(body->mass);
        body->updateMass();
        
        return shape;
    }
    
    // Constraints
    void addConstraint(Constraint3D* constraint) {
        m_constraints.push_back(constraint);
    }
    
    PointConstraint3D* createPointConstraint(RigidBody3D* bodyA, RigidBody3D* bodyB,
                                            const Vec3& worldAnchor) {
        auto* constraint = new PointConstraint3D(bodyA, bodyB, worldAnchor);
        addConstraint(constraint);
        return constraint;
    }
    
    HingeConstraint3D* createHingeConstraint(RigidBody3D* bodyA, RigidBody3D* bodyB,
                                            const Vec3& worldAnchor, const Vec3& worldAxis) {
        auto* constraint = new HingeConstraint3D(bodyA, bodyB, worldAnchor, worldAxis);
        addConstraint(constraint);
        return constraint;
    }
    
    // Physics update
    void update(float deltaTime) {
        m_timeAccumulator += deltaTime;
        
        while (m_timeAccumulator >= m_fixedTimestep) {
            step(m_fixedTimestep);
            m_timeAccumulator -= m_fixedTimestep;
        }
    }
    
    void step(float dt) {
        m_manifolds.clear();
        
        // Apply forces
        for (auto* body : m_bodies) {
            if (body->type != BodyType3D::Dynamic) continue;
            
            body->force += m_gravity * body->mass;
        }
        
        // Integrate velocities
        for (auto* body : m_bodies) {
            if (body->type != BodyType3D::Dynamic) continue;
            
            body->velocity += (body->force * body->invMass) * dt;
            body->angularVelocity += (body->invInertiaTensorWorld * body->torque) * dt;
            
            // Damping
            body->velocity *= 0.99f;
            body->angularVelocity *= 0.98f;
            
            // Clear forces
            body->force = Vec3::zero();
            body->torque = Vec3::zero();
        }
        
        // Collision detection
        broadPhase();
        narrowPhase();
        
        // Prepare constraints
        for (auto* constraint : m_constraints) {
            constraint->prepare(dt);
        }
        
        // Iterative solver
        for (int i = 0; i < m_iterations; i++) {
            // Resolve collisions
            for (auto& manifold : m_manifolds) {
                CollisionResolver3D::resolveCollision(manifold);
            }
            
            // Solve constraints
            for (auto* constraint : m_constraints) {
                constraint->solve();
            }
        }
        
        // Integrate positions
        for (auto* body : m_bodies) {
            if (body->type == BodyType3D::Static) continue;
            
            body->position += body->velocity * dt;
            
            // Integrate rotation using quaternions
            if (body->angularVelocity.lengthSquared() > EPSILON) {
                Vec3 axis = body->angularVelocity.normalized();
                float angle = body->angularVelocity.length() * dt;
                
                Quat deltaRotation = Quat::fromAxisAngle(axis, angle);
                body->rotation = (deltaRotation * body->rotation).normalized();
            }
            
            // Update inertia tensor in world space
            body->updateInertiaTensorWorld();
        }
        
        // Callbacks
        for (auto& manifold : m_manifolds) {
            if (m_collisionCallback) {
                m_collisionCallback(manifold);
            }
        }
    }
    
    // Raycasting
    struct RaycastHit3D {
        RigidBody3D* body = nullptr;
        Vec3 point;
        Vec3 normal;
        float distance = 0.0f;
    };
    
    bool raycast(const Vec3& origin, const Vec3& direction, float maxDistance,
                RaycastHit3D& hit) {
        
        float closestDistance = maxDistance;
        bool foundHit = false;
        
        for (auto* body : m_bodies) {
            auto it = m_shapes.find(body);
            if (it == m_shapes.end()) continue;
            
            for (auto* shape : it->second) {
                // AABB test first
                Vec3 aabbMin, aabbMax;
                shape->computeAABB(*body, aabbMin, aabbMax);
                
                AABB3D aabb(aabbMin, aabbMax);
                
                // Ray-AABB intersection
                Vec3 invDir(
                    1.0f / (direction.x + EPSILON),
                    1.0f / (direction.y + EPSILON),
                    1.0f / (direction.z + EPSILON)
                );
                
                Vec3 t0 = (aabb.min - origin) * invDir;
                Vec3 t1 = (aabb.max - origin) * invDir;
                
                Vec3 tmin = Vec3(
                    std::min(t0.x, t1.x),
                    std::min(t0.y, t1.y),
                    std::min(t0.z, t1.z)
                );
                
                Vec3 tmax = Vec3(
                    std::max(t0.x, t1.x),
                    std::max(t0.y, t1.y),
                    std::max(t0.z, t1.z)
                );
                
                float tminMax = std::max(tmin.x, std::max(tmin.y, tmin.z));
                float tmaxMin = std::min(tmax.x, std::min(tmax.y, tmax.z));
                
                if (tmaxMin < 0 || tminMax > tmaxMin || tminMax > maxDistance) {
                    continue;
                }
                
                // Detailed ray-shape test
                if (shape->getType() == ShapeType3D::Sphere) {
                    auto* sphere = static_cast<SphereShape*>(shape);
                    Vec3 center = body->localToWorld(sphere->center);
                    
                    Vec3 oc = origin - center;
                    float a = direction.dot(direction);
                    float b = 2.0f * oc.dot(direction);
                    float c = oc.dot(oc) - sphere->radius * sphere->radius;
                    
                    float discriminant = b * b - 4 * a * c;
                    
                    if (discriminant >= 0) {
                        float t = (-b - std::sqrt(discriminant)) / (2.0f * a);
                        
                        if (t > 0 && t < closestDistance) {
                            closestDistance = t;
                            hit.body = body;
                            hit.point = origin + direction * t;
                            hit.normal = (hit.point - center).normalized();
                            hit.distance = t;
                            foundHit = true;
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        return foundHit;
    }
    
    // Query
    std::vector<RigidBody3D*> queryAABB(const Vec3& min, const Vec3& max) {
        std::vector<RigidBody3D*> result;
        
        AABB3D queryBox(min, max);
        
        for (auto* body : m_bodies) {
            auto it = m_shapes.find(body);
            if (it == m_shapes.end()) continue;
            
            for (auto* shape : it->second) {
                Vec3 aabbMin, aabbMax;
                shape->computeAABB(*body, aabbMin, aabbMax);
                
                AABB3D bodyAABB(aabbMin, aabbMax);
                
                if (queryBox.overlaps(bodyAABB)) {
                    result.push_back(body);
                    break;
                }
            }
        }
        
        return result;
    }
    
    std::vector<RigidBody3D*> querySphere(const Vec3& center, float radius) {
        std::vector<RigidBody3D*> result;
        
        for (auto* body : m_bodies) {
            if ((body->position - center).lengthSquared() <= radius * radius) {
                result.push_back(body);
            }
        }
        
        return result;
    }
    
    // Settings
    void setGravity(const Vec3& gravity) { m_gravity = gravity; }
    Vec3 getGravity() const { return m_gravity; }
    
    void setIterations(int iterations) { m_iterations = iterations; }
    void setFixedTimestep(float timestep) { m_fixedTimestep = timestep; }
    
    // Callbacks
    using CollisionCallback3D = std::function<void(const Manifold3D&)>;
    void setCollisionCallback(CollisionCallback3D callback) {
        m_collisionCallback = callback;
    }
    
    // Access
    const std::vector<RigidBody3D*>& getBodies() const { return m_bodies; }
    const std::vector<Manifold3D>& getManifolds() const { return m_manifolds; }
    
    // Clear
    void clear() {
        for (auto* body : m_bodies) {
            delete body;
        }
        m_bodies.clear();
        
        for (auto& pair : m_shapes) {
            for (auto* shape : pair.second) {
                delete shape;
            }
        }
        m_shapes.clear();
        
        for (auto* constraint : m_constraints) {
            delete constraint;
        }
        m_constraints.clear();
        
        m_manifolds.clear();
    }
    
private:
    void broadPhase() {
        m_potentialCollisions.clear();
        
        // Simple O(n²) - use BVH for large worlds
        for (size_t i = 0; i < m_bodies.size(); i++) {
            for (size_t j = i + 1; j < m_bodies.size(); j++) {
                auto* bodyA = m_bodies[i];
                auto* bodyB = m_bodies[j];
                
                if (bodyA->type == BodyType3D::Static && 
                    bodyB->type == BodyType3D::Static) {
                    continue;
                }
                
                auto itA = m_shapes.find(bodyA);
                auto itB = m_shapes.find(bodyB);
                
                if (itA == m_shapes.end() || itB == m_shapes.end()) continue;
                
                for (auto* shapeA : itA->second) {
                    for (auto* shapeB : itB->second) {
                        Vec3 minA, maxA, minB, maxB;
                        shapeA->computeAABB(*bodyA, minA, maxA);
                        shapeB->computeAABB(*bodyB, minB, maxB);
                        
                        AABB3D aabbA(minA, maxA);
                        AABB3D aabbB(minB, maxB);
                        
                        if (aabbA.overlaps(aabbB)) {
                            m_potentialCollisions.push_back({bodyA, bodyB, shapeA, shapeB});
                        }
                    }
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    void narrowPhase() {
        for (auto& potential : m_potentialCollisions) {
            Manifold3D manifold;
            
            bool collided = testCollision(
                potential.bodyA, potential.shapeA,
                potential.bodyB, potential.shapeB,
                manifold
            );
            
            if (collided) {
                m_manifolds.push_back(manifold);
            }
        }
    }
    
    bool testCollision(RigidBody3D* bodyA, Shape3D* shapeA,
                      RigidBody3D* bodyB, Shape3D* shapeB,
                      Manifold3D& manifold) {
        
        // Use specialized tests for common cases
        if (shapeA->getType() == ShapeType3D::Sphere && 
            shapeB->getType() == ShapeType3D::Sphere) {
            return CollisionDetector3D::testSphereSphere(
                *bodyA, *static_cast<SphereShape*>(shapeA),
                *bodyB, *static_cast<SphereShape*>(shapeB),
                manifold
            );
        }
        else if (shapeA->getType() == ShapeType3D::Sphere && 
                 shapeB->getType() == ShapeType3D::Box) {
            return CollisionDetector3D::testSphereBox(
                *bodyA, *static_cast<SphereShape*>(shapeA),
                *bodyB, *static_cast<BoxShape*>(shapeB),
                manifold
            );
        }
        else if (shapeA->getType() == ShapeType3D::Box && 
                 shapeB->getType() == ShapeType3D::Sphere) {
            bool result = CollisionDetector3D::testSphereBox(
                *bodyB, *static_cast<SphereShape*>(shapeB),
                *bodyA, *static_cast<BoxShape*>(shapeA),
                manifold
            );
            if (result) {
                std::swap(manifold.bodyA, manifold.bodyB);
                std::swap(manifold.shapeA, manifold.shapeB);
                manifold.normal = -manifold.normal;
            }
            return result;
        }
        
        // Use GJK for general case
        return CollisionDetector3D::testGJK(*bodyA, *shapeA, *bodyB, *shapeB, manifold);
    }
    
    struct PotentialCollision3D {
        RigidBody3D* bodyA;
        RigidBody3D* bodyB;
        Shape3D* shapeA;
        Shape3D* shapeB;
    };
    
    Vec3 m_gravity;
    int m_iterations;
    float m_timeAccumulator;
    float m_fixedTimestep;
    
    std::vector<RigidBody3D*> m_bodies;
    std::unordered_map<RigidBody3D*, std::vector<Shape3D*>> m_shapes;
    std::vector<Constraint3D*> m_constraints;
    
    std::vector<PotentialCollision3D> m_potentialCollisions;
    std::vector<Manifold3D> m_manifolds;
    
    CollisionCallback3D m_collisionCallback;
};

} // namespace physics3d
} // namespace nk
```

**PHYSICS 3D COMPLET !** ✅✅✅
