# PARTIE 31 : Système d'Animation 2D/3D Complet

## 1. Animation.hpp - Structures de Base

```cpp
// Animation.hpp
#pragma once

#include "Vector2.hpp"
#include "Vector3.hpp"
#include "Quaternion.hpp"
#include "Transform.hpp"
#include "Matrix4.hpp"
#include <vector>
#include <string>
#include <unordered_map>
#include <memory>
#include <functional>

namespace nk {
namespace animation {

using namespace math;

// ====================================================================
// INTERPOLATION TYPES
// ====================================================================

enum class InterpolationType {
    Linear,
    Step,
    CubicSpline,
    Bezier
};

// ====================================================================
// KEYFRAME (Generic)
// ====================================================================

template<typename T>
struct Keyframe {
    float time;
    T value;
    
    // For cubic/bezier interpolation
    T inTangent;
    T outTangent;
    
    InterpolationType interpolation = InterpolationType::Linear;
    
    Keyframe() : time(0.0f) {}
    Keyframe(float t, const T& v) : time(t), value(v) {}
    Keyframe(float t, const T& v, const T& inTan, const T& outTan)
        : time(t), value(v), inTangent(inTan), outTangent(outTan) {}
};

// ====================================================================
// ANIMATION TRACK (Channel for one property)
// ====================================================================

template<typename T>
class AnimationTrack {
public:
    std::string name;
    std::vector<Keyframe<T>> keyframes;
    
    AnimationTrack() = default;
    AnimationTrack(const std::string& n) : name(n) {}
    
    void addKeyframe(float time, const T& value) {
        keyframes.push_back(Keyframe<T>(time, value));
        sortKeyframes();
    }
    
    void addKeyframe(const Keyframe<T>& kf) {
        keyframes.push_back(kf);
        sortKeyframes();
    }
    
    T evaluate(float time) const {
        if (keyframes.empty()) {
            return T();
        }
        
        if (keyframes.size() == 1 || time <= keyframes[0].time) {
            return keyframes[0].value;
        }
        
        if (time >= keyframes.back().time) {
            return keyframes.back().value;
        }
        
        // Find surrounding keyframes
        size_t nextIndex = 0;
        for (size_t i = 0; i < keyframes.size(); i++) {
            if (keyframes[i].time > time) {
                nextIndex = i;
                break;
            }
        }
        
        size_t prevIndex = nextIndex - 1;
        
        const Keyframe<T>& k0 = keyframes[prevIndex];
        const Keyframe<T>& k1 = keyframes[nextIndex];
        
        float duration = k1.time - k0.time;
        float t = (time - k0.time) / duration;
        
        // Interpolate based on type
        switch (k0.interpolation) {
            case InterpolationType::Step:
                return k0.value;
                
            case InterpolationType::Linear:
                return interpolateLinear(k0.value, k1.value, t);
                
            case InterpolationType::CubicSpline:
                return interpolateCubic(k0.value, k0.outTangent, 
                                       k1.value, k1.inTangent, t);
                
            case InterpolationType::Bezier:
                return interpolateBezier(k0.value, k0.outTangent,
                                        k1.inTangent, k1.value, t);
                
            default:
                return interpolateLinear(k0.value, k1.value, t);
        }
    }
    
    float getDuration() const {
        if (keyframes.empty()) return 0.0f;
        return keyframes.back().time;
    }
    
private:
    void sortKeyframes() {
        std::sort(keyframes.begin(), keyframes.end(),
                 [](const Keyframe<T>& a, const Keyframe<T>& b) {
                     return a.time < b.time;
                 });
    }
    
    // Interpolation functions
    T interpolateLinear(const T& a, const T& b, float t) const {
        return lerp(a, b, t);
    }
    
    T interpolateCubic(const T& p0, const T& m0, const T& p1, const T& m1, float t) const {
        float t2 = t * t;
        float t3 = t2 * t;
        
        return (2.0f * t3 - 3.0f * t2 + 1.0f) * p0 +
               (t3 - 2.0f * t2 + t) * m0 +
               (-2.0f * t3 + 3.0f * t2) * p1 +
               (t3 - t2) * m1;
    }
    
    T interpolateBezier(const T& p0, const T& c0, const T& c1, const T& p1, float t) const {
        float u = 1.0f - t;
        float u2 = u * u;
        float u3 = u2 * u;
        float t2 = t * t;
        float t3 = t2 * t;
        
        return u3 * p0 +
               3.0f * u2 * t * c0 +
               3.0f * u * t2 * c1 +
               t3 * p1;
    }
};

// Type aliases for common tracks
using Vec2Track = AnimationTrack<Vec2>;
using Vec3Track = AnimationTrack<Vec3>;
using Vec4Track = AnimationTrack<Vec4>;
using QuatTrack = AnimationTrack<Quat>;
using FloatTrack = AnimationTrack<float>;

// Specialization for Quaternion (SLERP)
template<>
inline Quat AnimationTrack<Quat>::interpolateLinear(const Quat& a, const Quat& b, float t) const {
    return a.slerp(b, t);
}

// ====================================================================
// ANIMATION CLIP
// ====================================================================

class AnimationClip {
public:
    std::string name;
    float duration;
    bool looping = true;
    
    // Tracks for different properties
    std::unordered_map<std::string, Vec3Track> positionTracks;
    std::unordered_map<std::string, QuatTrack> rotationTracks;
    std::unordered_map<std::string, Vec3Track> scaleTracks;
    std::unordered_map<std::string, FloatTrack> floatTracks;
    
    AnimationClip() : duration(0.0f) {}
    AnimationClip(const std::string& n, float dur) : name(n), duration(dur) {}
    
    void addPositionKeyframe(const std::string& targetName, float time, const Vec3& position) {
        positionTracks[targetName].addKeyframe(time, position);
        updateDuration();
    }
    
    void addRotationKeyframe(const std::string& targetName, float time, const Quat& rotation) {
        rotationTracks[targetName].addKeyframe(time, rotation);
        updateDuration();
    }
    
    void addScaleKeyframe(const std::string& targetName, float time, const Vec3& scale) {
        scaleTracks[targetName].addKeyframe(time, scale);
        updateDuration();
    }
    
    void addFloatKeyframe(const std::string& propertyName, float time, float value) {
        floatTracks[propertyName].addKeyframe(time, value);
        updateDuration();
    }
    
    Vec3 evaluatePosition(const std::string& targetName, float time) const {
        auto it = positionTracks.find(targetName);
        if (it != positionTracks.end()) {
            return it->second.evaluate(time);
        }
        return Vec3::zero();
    }
    
    Quat evaluateRotation(const std::string& targetName, float time) const {
        auto it = rotationTracks.find(targetName);
        if (it != rotationTracks.end()) {
            return it->second.evaluate(time);
        }
        return Quat::identity();
    }
    
    Vec3 evaluateScale(const std::string& targetName, float time) const {
        auto it = scaleTracks.find(targetName);
        if (it != scaleTracks.end()) {
            return it->second.evaluate(time);
        }
        return Vec3::one();
    }
    
    float evaluateFloat(const std::string& propertyName, float time) const {
        auto it = floatTracks.find(propertyName);
        if (it != floatTracks.end()) {
            return it->second.evaluate(time);
        }
        return 0.0f;
    }
    
private:
    void updateDuration() {
        float maxDuration = 0.0f;
        
        for (const auto& pair : positionTracks) {
            maxDuration = std::max(maxDuration, pair.second.getDuration());
        }
        for (const auto& pair : rotationTracks) {
            maxDuration = std::max(maxDuration, pair.second.getDuration());
        }
        for (const auto& pair : scaleTracks) {
            maxDuration = std::max(maxDuration, pair.second.getDuration());
        }
        for (const auto& pair : floatTracks) {
            maxDuration = std::max(maxDuration, pair.second.getDuration());
        }
        
        duration = maxDuration;
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// ANIMATION STATE
// ====================================================================

enum class AnimationState {
    Stopped,
    Playing,
    Paused
};

class AnimationPlayer {
public:
    AnimationPlayer() 
        : m_currentTime(0.0f)
        , m_speed(1.0f)
        , m_state(AnimationState::Stopped)
        , m_currentClip(nullptr) {
    }
    
    void play(AnimationClip* clip, bool restart = true) {
        if (!clip) return;
        
        if (m_currentClip != clip || restart) {
            m_currentClip = clip;
            m_currentTime = 0.0f;
        }
        
        m_state = AnimationState::Playing;
    }
    
    void pause() {
        m_state = AnimationState::Paused;
    }
    
    void resume() {
        if (m_currentClip) {
            m_state = AnimationState::Playing;
        }
    }
    
    void stop() {
        m_state = AnimationState::Stopped;
        m_currentTime = 0.0f;
    }
    
    void update(float deltaTime) {
        if (m_state != AnimationState::Playing || !m_currentClip) {
            return;
        }
        
        m_currentTime += deltaTime * m_speed;
        
        if (m_currentTime >= m_currentClip->duration) {
            if (m_currentClip->looping) {
                m_currentTime = std::fmod(m_currentTime, m_currentClip->duration);
            } else {
                m_currentTime = m_currentClip->duration;
                m_state = AnimationState::Stopped;
            }
        }
    }
    
    float getCurrentTime() const { return m_currentTime; }
    void setCurrentTime(float time) { m_currentTime = time; }
    
    void setSpeed(float speed) { m_speed = speed; }
    float getSpeed() const { return m_speed; }
    
    AnimationState getState() const { return m_state; }
    AnimationClip* getCurrentClip() const { return m_currentClip; }
    
    // Evaluate current animation state
    Vec3 evaluatePosition(const std::string& targetName) const {
        if (!m_currentClip) return Vec3::zero();
        return m_currentClip->evaluatePosition(targetName, m_currentTime);
    }
    
    Quat evaluateRotation(const std::string& targetName) const {
        if (!m_currentClip) return Quat::identity();
        return m_currentClip->evaluateRotation(targetName, m_currentTime);
    }
    
    Vec3 evaluateScale(const std::string& targetName) const {
        if (!m_currentClip) return Vec3::one();
        return m_currentClip->evaluateScale(targetName, m_currentTime);
    }
    
    float evaluateFloat(const std::string& propertyName) const {
        if (!m_currentClip) return 0.0f;
        return m_currentClip->evaluateFloat(propertyName, m_currentTime);
    }
    
private:
    float m_currentTime;
    float m_speed;
    AnimationState m_state;
    AnimationClip* m_currentClip;
};

// ====================================================================
// BLEND TREE (Animation blending)
// ====================================================================

struct AnimationBlend {
    AnimationClip* clip;
    float weight;
    
    AnimationBlend(AnimationClip* c = nullptr, float w = 0.0f)
        : clip(c), weight(w) {}
};

class BlendTree {
public:
    std::vector<AnimationBlend> blends;
    
    void addClip(AnimationClip* clip, float weight) {
        blends.push_back(AnimationBlend(clip, weight));
        normalizeWeights();
    }
    
    void setWeight(size_t index, float weight) {
        if (index < blends.size()) {
            blends[index].weight = weight;
            normalizeWeights();
        }
    }
    
    Vec3 evaluatePosition(const std::string& targetName, float time) const {
        Vec3 result = Vec3::zero();
        
        for (const auto& blend : blends) {
            if (blend.clip && blend.weight > 0.0f) {
                result += blend.clip->evaluatePosition(targetName, time) * blend.weight;
            }
        }
        
        return result;
    }
    
    Quat evaluateRotation(const std::string& targetName, float time) const {
        if (blends.empty()) return Quat::identity();
        
        // Find first non-zero weight
        Quat result = Quat::identity();
        float totalWeight = 0.0f;
        
        for (const auto& blend : blends) {
            if (blend.clip && blend.weight > 0.0f) {
                if (totalWeight == 0.0f) {
                    result = blend.clip->evaluateRotation(targetName, time);
                    totalWeight = blend.weight;
                } else {
                    Quat q = blend.clip->evaluateRotation(targetName, time);
                    float t = blend.weight / (totalWeight + blend.weight);
                    result = result.slerp(q, t);
                    totalWeight += blend.weight;
                }
            }
        }
        
        return result;
    }
    
    Vec3 evaluateScale(const std::string& targetName, float time) const {
        Vec3 result = Vec3::zero();
        
        for (const auto& blend : blends) {
            if (blend.clip && blend.weight > 0.0f) {
                result += blend.clip->evaluateScale(targetName, time) * blend.weight;
            }
        }
        
        return result;
    }
    
private:
    void normalizeWeights() {
        float totalWeight = 0.0f;
        
        for (const auto& blend : blends) {
            totalWeight += blend.weight;
        }
        
        if (totalWeight > 0.0f) {
            for (auto& blend : blends) {
                blend.weight /= totalWeight;
            }
        }
    }
};

} // namespace animation
} // namespace nk
```

## 2. Skeleton.hpp - Système de Bones (Squelette)

```cpp
// Skeleton.hpp
#pragma once

#include "Animation.hpp"
#include <vector>
#include <string>
#include <unordered_map>

namespace nk {
namespace animation {

// ====================================================================
// BONE (2D/3D)
// ====================================================================

struct Bone {
    std::string name;
    int parentIndex = -1;
    
    // Local transform (relative to parent)
    Vec3 localPosition;
    Quat localRotation;
    Vec3 localScale;
    
    // World transform (absolute)
    Vec3 worldPosition;
    Quat worldRotation;
    Vec3 worldScale;
    
    // Bind pose (inverse bind matrix for skinning)
    Mat4 inverseBindMatrix;
    
    // Final transform for rendering
    Mat4 finalMatrix;
    
    Bone() 
        : localPosition(Vec3::zero())
        , localRotation(Quat::identity())
        , localScale(Vec3::one())
        , worldPosition(Vec3::zero())
        , worldRotation(Quat::identity())
        , worldScale(Vec3::one())
        , inverseBindMatrix(Mat4::identity())
        , finalMatrix(Mat4::identity()) {
    }
    
    Bone(const std::string& n) : Bone() {
        name = n;
    }
    
    Mat4 getLocalMatrix() const {
        return Mat4::translation(localPosition) *
               localRotation.toMatrix4() *
               Mat4::scale(localScale);
    }
    
    Mat4 getWorldMatrix() const {
        return Mat4::translation(worldPosition) *
               worldRotation.toMatrix4() *
               Mat4::scale(worldScale);
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// SKELETON
// ====================================================================

class Skeleton {
public:
    std::vector<Bone> bones;
    std::unordered_map<std::string, int> boneMap;
    
    Skeleton() = default;
    
    int addBone(const std::string& name, int parentIndex = -1) {
        int index = static_cast<int>(bones.size());
        
        Bone bone(name);
        bone.parentIndex = parentIndex;
        
        bones.push_back(bone);
        boneMap[name] = index;
        
        return index;
    }
    
    int findBone(const std::string& name) const {
        auto it = boneMap.find(name);
        return (it != boneMap.end()) ? it->second : -1;
    }
    
    Bone* getBone(int index) {
        return (index >= 0 && index < static_cast<int>(bones.size())) ? &bones[index] : nullptr;
    }
    
    const Bone* getBone(int index) const {
        return (index >= 0 && index < static_cast<int>(bones.size())) ? &bones[index] : nullptr;
    }
    
    Bone* getBone(const std::string& name) {
        int index = findBone(name);
        return getBone(index);
    }
    
    // Update world transforms from local transforms
    void updateWorldTransforms() {
        for (size_t i = 0; i < bones.size(); i++) {
            updateBoneWorldTransform(static_cast<int>(i));
        }
    }
    
    // Calculate inverse bind matrices (call once in bind pose)
    void calculateInverseBindMatrices() {
        updateWorldTransforms();
        
        for (auto& bone : bones) {
            bone.inverseBindMatrix = bone.getWorldMatrix().inverted();
        }
    }
    
    // Calculate final matrices for rendering (skinning)
    void calculateFinalMatrices() {
        updateWorldTransforms();
        
        for (auto& bone : bones) {
            bone.finalMatrix = bone.getWorldMatrix() * bone.inverseBindMatrix;
        }
    }
    
    // Apply animation
    void applyAnimation(const AnimationPlayer& player) {
        for (auto& bone : bones) {
            bone.localPosition = player.evaluatePosition(bone.name);
            bone.localRotation = player.evaluateRotation(bone.name);
            bone.localScale = player.evaluateScale(bone.name);
        }
        
        calculateFinalMatrices();
    }
    
    // Apply blend tree
    void applyBlendTree(const BlendTree& blendTree, float time) {
        for (auto& bone : bones) {
            bone.localPosition = blendTree.evaluatePosition(bone.name, time);
            bone.localRotation = blendTree.evaluateRotation(bone.name, time);
            bone.localScale = blendTree.evaluateScale(bone.name, time);
        }
        
        calculateFinalMatrices();
    }
    
    // Get bone matrices for shader
    std::vector<Mat4> getBoneMatrices() const {
        std::vector<Mat4> matrices;
        matrices.reserve(bones.size());
        
        for (const auto& bone : bones) {
            matrices.push_back(bone.finalMatrix);
        }
        
        return matrices;
    }
    
private:
    void updateBoneWorldTransform(int index) {
        if (index < 0 || index >= static_cast<int>(bones.size())) return;
        
        Bone& bone = bones[index];
        
        if (bone.parentIndex >= 0) {
            // Ensure parent is updated first
            updateBoneWorldTransform(bone.parentIndex);
            
            const Bone& parent = bones[bone.parentIndex];
            
            // Combine with parent transform
            bone.worldPosition = parent.worldRotation * (bone.localPosition * parent.worldScale) + parent.worldPosition;
            bone.worldRotation = parent.worldRotation * bone.localRotation;
            bone.worldScale = parent.worldScale * bone.localScale;
        } else {
            // Root bone
            bone.worldPosition = bone.localPosition;
            bone.worldRotation = bone.localRotation;
            bone.worldScale = bone.localScale;
        }
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// SKELETON 2D (Specialized for 2D bones)
// ====================================================================

struct Bone2D {
    std::string name;
    int parentIndex = -1;
    
    Vec2 localPosition;
    float localRotation = 0.0f;  // Radians
    Vec2 localScale;
    
    Vec2 worldPosition;
    float worldRotation = 0.0f;
    Vec2 worldScale;
    
    Mat3 inverseBindMatrix;
    Mat3 finalMatrix;
    
    float length = 1.0f;  // Visual length for editor
    
    Bone2D()
        : localPosition(Vec2::zero())
        , localScale(Vec2::one())
        , worldPosition(Vec2::zero())
        , worldScale(Vec2::one())
        , inverseBindMatrix(Mat3::identity())
        , finalMatrix(Mat3::identity()) {
    }
    
    Mat3 getLocalMatrix() const {
        Mat3 translation = Mat3(
            1, 0, localPosition.x,
            0, 1, localPosition.y,
            0, 0, 1
        );
        
        Mat3 rotation = Mat3::rotation(localRotation);
        
        Mat3 scale = Mat3::scale(localScale);
        
        return translation * rotation * scale;
    }
    
    Mat3 getWorldMatrix() const {
        Mat3 translation = Mat3(
            1, 0, worldPosition.x,
            0, 1, worldPosition.y,
            0, 0, 1
        );
        
        Mat3 rotation = Mat3::rotation(worldRotation);
        
        Mat3 scale = Mat3::scale(worldScale);
        
        return translation * rotation * scale;
    }
};

class Skeleton2D {
public:
    std::vector<Bone2D> bones;
    std::unordered_map<std::string, int> boneMap;
    
    int addBone(const std::string& name, int parentIndex = -1) {
        int index = static_cast<int>(bones.size());
        
        Bone2D bone;
        bone.name = name;
        bone.parentIndex = parentIndex;
        
        bones.push_back(bone);
        boneMap[name] = index;
        
        return index;
    }
    
    int findBone(const std::string& name) const {
        auto it = boneMap.find(name);
        return (it != boneMap.end()) ? it->second : -1;
    }
    
    Bone2D* getBone(int index) {
        return (index >= 0 && index < static_cast<int>(bones.size())) ? &bones[index] : nullptr;
    }
    
    void updateWorldTransforms() {
        for (size_t i = 0; i < bones.size(); i++) {
            updateBoneWorldTransform(static_cast<int>(i));
        }
    }
    
    void calculateInverseBindMatrices() {
        updateWorldTransforms();
        
        for (auto& bone : bones) {
            bone.inverseBindMatrix = bone.getWorldMatrix().inverted();
        }
    }
    
    void calculateFinalMatrices() {
        updateWorldTransforms();
        
        for (auto& bone : bones) {
            bone.finalMatrix = bone.getWorldMatrix() * bone.inverseBindMatrix;
        }
    }
    
    std::vector<Mat3> getBoneMatrices() const {
        std::vector<Mat3> matrices;
        matrices.reserve(bones.size());
        
        for (const auto& bone : bones) {
            matrices.push_back(bone.finalMatrix);
        }
        
        return matrices;
    }
    
private:
    void updateBoneWorldTransform(int index) {
        if (index < 0 || index >= static_cast<int>(bones.size())) return;
        
        Bone2D& bone = bones[index];
        
        if (bone.parentIndex >= 0) {
            updateBoneWorldTransform(bone.parentIndex);
            
            const Bone2D& parent = bones[bone.parentIndex];
            
            // 2D transform combination
            float c = std::cos(parent.worldRotation);
            float s = std::sin(parent.worldRotation);
            
            Vec2 rotatedPos(
                bone.localPosition.x * c - bone.localPosition.y * s,
                bone.localPosition.x * s + bone.localPosition.y * c
            );
            
            bone.worldPosition = parent.worldPosition + rotatedPos * parent.worldScale;
            bone.worldRotation = parent.worldRotation + bone.localRotation;
            bone.worldScale = parent.worldScale * bone.localScale;
        } else {
            bone.worldPosition = bone.localPosition;
            bone.worldRotation = bone.localRotation;
            bone.worldScale = bone.localScale;
        }
    }
};

} // namespace animation
} // namespace nk
```

Suite avec **Sprite Animation, Mesh Skinning, IK (Inverse Kinematics)** dans le prochain message !

# PARTIE 32 : Animation Avancée - Skinning + IK + Constraints

## 1. Skinning.hpp - Mesh Deformation avec Bones

```cpp
// Skinning.hpp
#pragma once

#include "Skeleton.hpp"
#include <vector>

namespace nk {
namespace animation {

// ====================================================================
// VERTEX WEIGHT (Influence d'un bone sur un vertex)
// ====================================================================

struct VertexWeight {
    int boneIndex;
    float weight;
    
    VertexWeight() : boneIndex(-1), weight(0.0f) {}
    VertexWeight(int bone, float w) : boneIndex(bone), weight(w) {}
};

// ====================================================================
// SKINNED VERTEX (Maximum 4 bones par vertex - standard)
// ====================================================================

struct SkinnedVertex {
    Vec3 position;
    Vec3 normal;
    Vec2 texCoord;
    
    static constexpr int MAX_BONE_INFLUENCES = 4;
    
    int boneIndices[MAX_BONE_INFLUENCES];
    float boneWeights[MAX_BONE_INFLUENCES];
    
    SkinnedVertex() {
        position = Vec3::zero();
        normal = Vec3(0, 1, 0);
        texCoord = Vec2::zero();
        
        for (int i = 0; i < MAX_BONE_INFLUENCES; i++) {
            boneIndices[i] = -1;
            boneWeights[i] = 0.0f;
        }
    }
    
    void addBoneWeight(int boneIndex, float weight) {
        // Find empty slot or smallest weight
        int replaceIndex = -1;
        float minWeight = 1.0f;
        
        for (int i = 0; i < MAX_BONE_INFLUENCES; i++) {
            if (boneIndices[i] == -1) {
                replaceIndex = i;
                break;
            }
            
            if (boneWeights[i] < minWeight) {
                minWeight = boneWeights[i];
                replaceIndex = i;
            }
        }
        
        if (replaceIndex >= 0) {
            boneIndices[replaceIndex] = boneIndex;
            boneWeights[replaceIndex] = weight;
        }
        
        normalizeWeights();
    }
    
    void normalizeWeights() {
        float totalWeight = 0.0f;
        
        for (int i = 0; i < MAX_BONE_INFLUENCES; i++) {
            if (boneIndices[i] >= 0) {
                totalWeight += boneWeights[i];
            }
        }
        
        if (totalWeight > 0.0f) {
            for (int i = 0; i < MAX_BONE_INFLUENCES; i++) {
                if (boneIndices[i] >= 0) {
                    boneWeights[i] /= totalWeight;
                }
            }
        }
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// SKINNED MESH
// ====================================================================

class SkinnedMesh {
public:
    std::vector<SkinnedVertex> vertices;
    std::vector<uint32_t> indices;
    
    // Bind pose (original positions)
    std::vector<Vec3> bindPosePositions;
    std::vector<Vec3> bindPoseNormals;
    
    Skeleton* skeleton = nullptr;
    
    SkinnedMesh() = default;
    
    void setBindPose() {
        bindPosePositions.clear();
        bindPoseNormals.clear();
        
        for (const auto& vertex : vertices) {
            bindPosePositions.push_back(vertex.position);
            bindPoseNormals.push_back(vertex.normal);
        }
    }
    
    void applySkinning() {
        if (!skeleton) return;
        
        auto boneMatrices = skeleton->getBoneMatrices();
        
        for (size_t i = 0; i < vertices.size(); i++) {
            Vec3 skinnedPosition = Vec3::zero();
            Vec3 skinnedNormal = Vec3::zero();
            
            for (int j = 0; j < SkinnedVertex::MAX_BONE_INFLUENCES; j++) {
                int boneIndex = vertices[i].boneIndices[j];
                float weight = vertices[i].boneWeights[j];
                
                if (boneIndex >= 0 && weight > 0.0f && boneIndex < static_cast<int>(boneMatrices.size())) {
                    Mat4 boneMatrix = boneMatrices[boneIndex];
                    
                    // Transform position
                    Vec3 transformedPos = boneMatrix.transformPoint(bindPosePositions[i]);
                    skinnedPosition += transformedPos * weight;
                    
                    // Transform normal (use 3x3 part only)
                    Vec3 transformedNormal = boneMatrix.transformVector(bindPoseNormals[i]);
                    skinnedNormal += transformedNormal * weight;
                }
            }
            
            vertices[i].position = skinnedPosition;
            vertices[i].normal = skinnedNormal.normalized();
        }
    }
    
    // Automatic weight painting (distance-based)
    void autoCalculateWeights() {
        if (!skeleton) return;
        
        for (auto& vertex : vertices) {
            std::vector<std::pair<int, float>> influences;
            
            // Calculate distance to each bone
            for (size_t boneIdx = 0; boneIdx < skeleton->bones.size(); boneIdx++) {
                const Bone& bone = skeleton->bones[boneIdx];
                
                float distance = (vertex.position - bone.worldPosition).length();
                
                if (distance < 0.001f) distance = 0.001f;
                
                float influence = 1.0f / distance;
                influences.push_back({static_cast<int>(boneIdx), influence});
            }
            
            // Sort by influence
            std::sort(influences.begin(), influences.end(),
                     [](const auto& a, const auto& b) { return a.second > b.second; });
            
            // Take top 4 influences
            for (int i = 0; i < std::min(4, static_cast<int>(influences.size())); i++) {
                vertex.addBoneWeight(influences[i].first, influences[i].second);
            }
        }
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// SKINNED MESH 2D
// ====================================================================

struct SkinnedVertex2D {
    Vec2 position;
    Vec2 texCoord;
    
    static constexpr int MAX_BONE_INFLUENCES = 4;
    
    int boneIndices[MAX_BONE_INFLUENCES];
    float boneWeights[MAX_BONE_INFLUENCES];
    
    SkinnedVertex2D() {
        position = Vec2::zero();
        texCoord = Vec2::zero();
        
        for (int i = 0; i < MAX_BONE_INFLUENCES; i++) {
            boneIndices[i] = -1;
            boneWeights[i] = 0.0f;
        }
    }
    
    void addBoneWeight(int boneIndex, float weight) {
        int replaceIndex = -1;
        float minWeight = 1.0f;
        
        for (int i = 0; i < MAX_BONE_INFLUENCES; i++) {
            if (boneIndices[i] == -1) {
                replaceIndex = i;
                break;
            }
            
            if (boneWeights[i] < minWeight) {
                minWeight = boneWeights[i];
                replaceIndex = i;
            }
        }
        
        if (replaceIndex >= 0) {
            boneIndices[replaceIndex] = boneIndex;
            boneWeights[replaceIndex] = weight;
        }
        
        normalizeWeights();
    }
    
    void normalizeWeights() {
        float totalWeight = 0.0f;
        for (int i = 0; i < MAX_BONE_INFLUENCES; i++) {
            if (boneIndices[i] >= 0) totalWeight += boneWeights[i];
        }
        
        if (totalWeight > 0.0f) {
            for (int i = 0; i < MAX_BONE_INFLUENCES; i++) {
                if (boneIndices[i] >= 0) boneWeights[i] /= totalWeight;
            }
        }
    }
};

class SkinnedMesh2D {
public:
    std::vector<SkinnedVertex2D> vertices;
    std::vector<uint32_t> indices;
    std::vector<Vec2> bindPosePositions;
    
    Skeleton2D* skeleton = nullptr;
    
    void setBindPose() {
        bindPosePositions.clear();
        for (const auto& vertex : vertices) {
            bindPosePositions.push_back(vertex.position);
        }
    }
    
    void applySkinning() {
        if (!skeleton) return;
        
        auto boneMatrices = skeleton->getBoneMatrices();
        
        for (size_t i = 0; i < vertices.size(); i++) {
            Vec2 skinnedPosition = Vec2::zero();
            
            for (int j = 0; j < SkinnedVertex2D::MAX_BONE_INFLUENCES; j++) {
                int boneIndex = vertices[i].boneIndices[j];
                float weight = vertices[i].boneWeights[j];
                
                if (boneIndex >= 0 && weight > 0.0f && boneIndex < static_cast<int>(boneMatrices.size())) {
                    Mat3 boneMatrix = boneMatrices[boneIndex];
                    
                    // Transform 2D position (homogeneous coordinates)
                    Vec3 homogeneous(bindPosePositions[i].x, bindPosePositions[i].y, 1.0f);
                    Vec3 transformed = boneMatrix * homogeneous;
                    
                    skinnedPosition += Vec2(transformed.x, transformed.y) * weight;
                }
            }
            
            vertices[i].position = skinnedPosition;
        }
    }
};

} // namespace animation
} // namespace nk
```

## 2. IK.hpp - Inverse Kinematics

```cpp
// IK.hpp - Inverse Kinematics
#pragma once

#include "Skeleton.hpp"

namespace nk {
namespace animation {

// ====================================================================
// IK SOLVER - Two Bone IK (Bras, Jambes)
// ====================================================================

class TwoBoneIK {
public:
    int startBone = -1;   // Épaule ou hanche
    int middleBone = -1;  // Coude ou genou
    int endBone = -1;     // Main ou pied
    
    Vec3 poleTarget;      // Direction préférée (genou/coude)
    
    TwoBoneIK() = default;
    
    TwoBoneIK(int start, int middle, int end)
        : startBone(start), middleBone(middle), endBone(end)
        , poleTarget(Vec3(0, 1, 0)) {}
    
    void solve(Skeleton& skeleton, const Vec3& targetPosition) {
        if (startBone < 0 || middleBone < 0 || endBone < 0) return;
        
        Bone* boneA = skeleton.getBone(startBone);
        Bone* boneB = skeleton.getBone(middleBone);
        Bone* boneC = skeleton.getBone(endBone);
        
        if (!boneA || !boneB || !boneC) return;
        
        Vec3 posA = boneA->worldPosition;
        Vec3 posB = boneB->worldPosition;
        Vec3 posC = boneC->worldPosition;
        
        float lengthAB = (posB - posA).length();
        float lengthBC = (posC - posB).length();
        float totalLength = lengthAB + lengthBC;
        
        Vec3 targetDir = (targetPosition - posA).normalized();
        float targetDistance = (targetPosition - posA).length();
        
        // Clamp target to reachable distance
        if (targetDistance > totalLength * 0.999f) {
            targetDistance = totalLength * 0.999f;
        }
        
        // Law of cosines pour trouver les angles
        float cosAngleA = (lengthAB * lengthAB + targetDistance * targetDistance - lengthBC * lengthBC) /
                         (2.0f * lengthAB * targetDistance);
        
        float cosAngleB = (lengthAB * lengthAB + lengthBC * lengthBC - targetDistance * targetDistance) /
                         (2.0f * lengthAB * lengthBC);
        
        cosAngleA = clamp(cosAngleA, -1.0f, 1.0f);
        cosAngleB = clamp(cosAngleB, -1.0f, 1.0f);
        
        float angleA = std::acos(cosAngleA);
        float angleB = PI - std::acos(cosAngleB);
        
        // Calculer pole direction
        Vec3 toBTarget = (targetPosition - posA).normalized();
        Vec3 poleDir = (poleTarget - posA).normalized();
        
        // Rotation pour bone A
        Vec3 axisA = Vec3(0, 1, 0).cross(toBTarget);
        if (axisA.lengthSquared() < EPSILON) {
            axisA = Vec3(1, 0, 0);
        } else {
            axisA = axisA.normalized();
        }
        
        Quat rotA = Quat::fromAxisAngle(axisA, angleA);
        
        // Appliquer rotation au premier bone
        boneA->localRotation = rotA;
        
        // Rotation pour bone B (middle joint)
        Vec3 axisB = axisA; // Même axe de rotation
        Quat rotB = Quat::fromAxisAngle(axisB, angleB);
        
        boneB->localRotation = rotB;
        
        // Update transforms
        skeleton.updateWorldTransforms();
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// IK SOLVER - FABRIK (Forward And Backward Reaching IK)
// ====================================================================

class FABRIKSolver {
public:
    std::vector<int> boneChain;  // Chaîne de bones (root -> tip)
    Vec3 targetPosition;
    
    int maxIterations = 10;
    float tolerance = 0.01f;
    
    FABRIKSolver() = default;
    
    void addBone(int boneIndex) {
        boneChain.push_back(boneIndex);
    }
    
    void solve(Skeleton& skeleton, const Vec3& target) {
        if (boneChain.size() < 2) return;
        
        targetPosition = target;
        
        // Get bone positions
        std::vector<Vec3> positions;
        std::vector<float> lengths;
        
        for (int boneIdx : boneChain) {
            Bone* bone = skeleton.getBone(boneIdx);
            if (bone) {
                positions.push_back(bone->worldPosition);
            }
        }
        
        // Calculate bone lengths
        for (size_t i = 0; i < positions.size() - 1; i++) {
            lengths.push_back((positions[i + 1] - positions[i]).length());
        }
        
        Vec3 rootPosition = positions[0];
        float totalLength = 0.0f;
        for (float len : lengths) totalLength += len;
        
        // Check if target is reachable
        float distToTarget = (target - rootPosition).length();
        
        if (distToTarget > totalLength) {
            // Target unreachable, stretch towards it
            Vec3 direction = (target - rootPosition).normalized();
            
            positions[0] = rootPosition;
            for (size_t i = 0; i < lengths.size(); i++) {
                positions[i + 1] = positions[i] + direction * lengths[i];
            }
        } else {
            // FABRIK iterations
            for (int iter = 0; iter < maxIterations; iter++) {
                // Forward reaching (from end to start)
                positions.back() = target;
                
                for (int i = static_cast<int>(positions.size()) - 2; i >= 0; i--) {
                    Vec3 direction = (positions[i] - positions[i + 1]).normalized();
                    positions[i] = positions[i + 1] + direction * lengths[i];
                }
                
                // Backward reaching (from start to end)
                positions[0] = rootPosition;
                
                for (size_t i = 0; i < positions.size() - 1; i++) {
                    Vec3 direction = (positions[i + 1] - positions[i]).normalized();
                    positions[i + 1] = positions[i] + direction * lengths[i];
                }
                
                // Check if we reached target
                if ((positions.back() - target).length() < tolerance) {
                    break;
                }
            }
        }
        
        // Apply rotations to skeleton
        for (size_t i = 0; i < boneChain.size() - 1; i++) {
            Bone* bone = skeleton.getBone(boneChain[i]);
            Bone* nextBone = skeleton.getBone(boneChain[i + 1]);
            
            if (bone && nextBone) {
                Vec3 currentDir = (nextBone->worldPosition - bone->worldPosition).normalized();
                Vec3 targetDir = (positions[i + 1] - positions[i]).normalized();
                
                if (currentDir.lengthSquared() > EPSILON && targetDir.lengthSquared() > EPSILON) {
                    Vec3 axis = currentDir.cross(targetDir);
                    
                    if (axis.lengthSquared() > EPSILON) {
                        axis = axis.normalized();
                        float angle = std::acos(clamp(currentDir.dot(targetDir), -1.0f, 1.0f));
                        
                        Quat rotation = Quat::fromAxisAngle(axis, angle);
                        bone->localRotation = bone->localRotation * rotation;
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        skeleton.updateWorldTransforms();
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// IK 2D - Two Bone
// ====================================================================

class TwoBoneIK2D {
public:
    int startBone = -1;
    int middleBone = -1;
    int endBone = -1;
    
    bool flipDirection = false;  // Pour inverser le pli (genou avant/arrière)
    
    void solve(Skeleton2D& skeleton, const Vec2& targetPosition) {
        if (startBone < 0 || middleBone < 0 || endBone < 0) return;
        
        Bone2D* boneA = skeleton.getBone(startBone);
        Bone2D* boneB = skeleton.getBone(middleBone);
        Bone2D* boneC = skeleton.getBone(endBone);
        
        if (!boneA || !boneB || !boneC) return;
        
        Vec2 posA = boneA->worldPosition;
        Vec2 posB = boneB->worldPosition;
        Vec2 posC = boneC->worldPosition;
        
        float lengthAB = (posB - posA).length();
        float lengthBC = (posC - posB).length();
        float totalLength = lengthAB + lengthBC;
        
        Vec2 toTarget = targetPosition - posA;
        float targetDistance = toTarget.length();
        
        if (targetDistance > totalLength * 0.999f) {
            targetDistance = totalLength * 0.999f;
        }
        
        // Law of cosines
        float cosAngleA = (lengthAB * lengthAB + targetDistance * targetDistance - lengthBC * lengthBC) /
                         (2.0f * lengthAB * targetDistance);
        
        float cosAngleB = (lengthAB * lengthAB + lengthBC * lengthBC - targetDistance * targetDistance) /
                         (2.0f * lengthAB * lengthBC);
        
        cosAngleA = clamp(cosAngleA, -1.0f, 1.0f);
        cosAngleB = clamp(cosAngleB, -1.0f, 1.0f);
        
        float angleA = std::acos(cosAngleA);
        float angleB = PI - std::acos(cosAngleB);
        
        if (flipDirection) {
            angleA = -angleA;
            angleB = -angleB;
        }
        
        // Angle vers la target
        float targetAngle = std::atan2(toTarget.y, toTarget.x);
        
        boneA->localRotation = targetAngle + angleA;
        boneB->localRotation = angleB;
        
        skeleton.updateWorldTransforms();
    }
};

} // namespace animation
} // namespace nk
```

## 3. Constraints.hpp - Contraintes d'Animation

```cpp
// Constraints.hpp - Animation Constraints
#pragma once

#include "Skeleton.hpp"

namespace nk {
namespace animation {

// ====================================================================
// CONSTRAINT BASE CLASS
// ====================================================================

class Constraint {
public:
    bool enabled = true;
    float weight = 1.0f;  // Influence [0, 1]
    
    virtual ~Constraint() = default;
    virtual void apply(Skeleton& skeleton) = 0;
    virtual void apply2D(Skeleton2D& skeleton) {}
};

// ====================================================================
// LOOK AT CONSTRAINT (Bone regarde une target)
// ====================================================================

class LookAtConstraint : public Constraint {
public:
    int boneIndex = -1;
    Vec3 targetPosition;
    Vec3 upVector = Vec3(0, 1, 0);
    
    LookAtConstraint() = default;
    LookAtConstraint(int bone, const Vec3& target) 
        : boneIndex(bone), targetPosition(target) {}
    
    void apply(Skeleton& skeleton) override {
        if (!enabled || boneIndex < 0) return;
        
        Bone* bone = skeleton.getBone(boneIndex);
        if (!bone) return;
        
        Vec3 direction = (targetPosition - bone->worldPosition).normalized();
        
        if (direction.lengthSquared() < EPSILON) return;
        
        // Calculate rotation to look at target
        Vec3 forward = Vec3(0, 0, 1);
        
        Quat targetRotation = Quat::lookRotation(direction, upVector);
        
        // Blend with current rotation based on weight
        bone->localRotation = bone->localRotation.slerp(targetRotation, weight);
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// COPY ROTATION CONSTRAINT
// ====================================================================

class CopyRotationConstraint : public Constraint {
public:
    int sourceBone = -1;
    int targetBone = -1;
    
    bool copyX = true;
    bool copyY = true;
    bool copyZ = true;
    
    bool invertX = false;
    bool invertY = false;
    bool invertZ = false;
    
    CopyRotationConstraint() = default;
    CopyRotationConstraint(int source, int target)
        : sourceBone(source), targetBone(target) {}
    
    void apply(Skeleton& skeleton) override {
        if (!enabled || sourceBone < 0 || targetBone < 0) return;
        
        Bone* source = skeleton.getBone(sourceBone);
        Bone* target = skeleton.getBone(targetBone);
        
        if (!source || !target) return;
        
        // Extract euler angles
        Vec3 sourceEuler = source->localRotation.toEuler();
        Vec3 targetEuler = target->localRotation.toEuler();
        
        // Copy selected axes
        if (copyX) targetEuler.x = (invertX ? -sourceEuler.x : sourceEuler.x);
        if (copyY) targetEuler.y = (invertY ? -sourceEuler.y : sourceEuler.y);
        if (copyZ) targetEuler.z = (invertZ ? -sourceEuler.z : sourceEuler.z);
        
        Quat newRotation = Quat::fromEuler(targetEuler.x, targetEuler.y, targetEuler.z);
        
        // Blend based on weight
        target->localRotation = target->localRotation.slerp(newRotation, weight);
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// COPY POSITION CONSTRAINT
// ====================================================================

class CopyPositionConstraint : public Constraint {
public:
    int sourceBone = -1;
    int targetBone = -1;
    
    bool copyX = true;
    bool copyY = true;
    bool copyZ = true;
    
    Vec3 offset = Vec3::zero();
    
    CopyPositionConstraint() = default;
    CopyPositionConstraint(int source, int target)
        : sourceBone(source), targetBone(target) {}
    
    void apply(Skeleton& skeleton) override {
        if (!enabled || sourceBone < 0 || targetBone < 0) return;
        
        Bone* source = skeleton.getBone(sourceBone);
        Bone* target = skeleton.getBone(targetBone);
        
        if (!source || !target) return;
        
        Vec3 sourcePos = source->worldPosition + offset;
        Vec3 targetPos = target->localPosition;
        
        if (copyX) targetPos.x = lerp(targetPos.x, sourcePos.x, weight);
        if (copyY) targetPos.y = lerp(targetPos.y, sourcePos.y, weight);
        if (copyZ) targetPos.z = lerp(targetPos.z, sourcePos.z, weight);
        
        target->localPosition = targetPos;
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// LIMIT ROTATION CONSTRAINT (Clamp angles)
// ====================================================================

class LimitRotationConstraint : public Constraint {
public:
    int boneIndex = -1;
    
    Vec3 minAngles = Vec3(-PI, -PI, -PI);
    Vec3 maxAngles = Vec3(PI, PI, PI);
    
    bool limitX = true;
    bool limitY = true;
    bool limitZ = true;
    
    LimitRotationConstraint() = default;
    LimitRotationConstraint(int bone) : boneIndex(bone) {}
    
    void apply(Skeleton& skeleton) override {
        if (!enabled || boneIndex < 0) return;
        
        Bone* bone = skeleton.getBone(boneIndex);
        if (!bone) return;
        
        Vec3 euler = bone->localRotation.toEuler();
        
        if (limitX) euler.x = clamp(euler.x, minAngles.x, maxAngles.x);
        if (limitY) euler.y = clamp(euler.y, minAngles.y, maxAngles.y);
        if (limitZ) euler.z = clamp(euler.z, minAngles.z, maxAngles.z);
        
        Quat newRotation = Quat::fromEuler(euler.x, euler.y, euler.z);
        bone->localRotation = bone->localRotation.slerp(newRotation, weight);
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// STRETCH TO CONSTRAINT (Étire un bone vers une target)
// ====================================================================

class StretchToConstraint : public Constraint {
public:
    int boneIndex = -1;
    Vec3 targetPosition;
    
    float restLength = 1.0f;
    float volumeVariation = 1.0f;  // Compression latérale lors de l'étirement
    
    StretchToConstraint() = default;
    StretchToConstraint(int bone, const Vec3& target)
        : boneIndex(bone), targetPosition(target) {}
    
    void apply(Skeleton& skeleton) override {
        if (!enabled || boneIndex < 0) return;
        
        Bone* bone = skeleton.getBone(boneIndex);
        if (!bone) return;
        
        Vec3 toTarget = targetPosition - bone->worldPosition;
        float distance = toTarget.length();
        
        if (distance < EPSILON) return;
        
        // Calculate stretch factor
        float stretchFactor = distance / restLength;
        
        // Calculate volume preservation
        float volumeFactor = 1.0f / std::sqrt(stretchFactor);
        volumeFactor = lerp(1.0f, volumeFactor, volumeVariation);
        
        // Apply scale
        Vec3 newScale = bone->localScale;
        newScale.y = lerp(newScale.y, stretchFactor, weight);
        newScale.x = lerp(newScale.x, volumeFactor, weight);
        newScale.z = lerp(newScale.z, volumeFactor, weight);
        
        bone->localScale = newScale;
        
        // Rotate to point at target
        Vec3 direction = toTarget.normalized();
        Quat targetRotation = Quat::lookRotation(direction, Vec3(0, 1, 0));
        bone->localRotation = bone->localRotation.slerp(targetRotation, weight);
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// DAMPED TRACK CONSTRAINT (Smooth look-at avec damping)
// ====================================================================

class DampedTrackConstraint : public Constraint {
public:
    int boneIndex = -1;
    Vec3 targetPosition;
    
    float damping = 0.5f;  // [0, 1] - Plus élevé = plus smooth
    
    Vec3 trackAxis = Vec3(0, 1, 0);  // Axe local qui pointe vers la target
    
    DampedTrackConstraint() = default;
    DampedTrackConstraint(int bone, const Vec3& target)
        : boneIndex(bone), targetPosition(target) {}
    
    void apply(Skeleton& skeleton) override {
        if (!enabled || boneIndex < 0) return;
        
        Bone* bone = skeleton.getBone(boneIndex);
        if (!bone) return;
        
        Vec3 currentDir = bone->localRotation * trackAxis;
        Vec3 targetDir = (targetPosition - bone->worldPosition).normalized();
        
        if (targetDir.lengthSquared() < EPSILON) return;
        
        // Calculate rotation needed
        Vec3 axis = currentDir.cross(targetDir);
        
        if (axis.lengthSquared() > EPSILON) {
            axis = axis.normalized();
            float angle = std::acos(clamp(currentDir.dot(targetDir), -1.0f, 1.0f));
            
            // Apply damping
            angle *= (1.0f - damping);
            
            Quat rotation = Quat::fromAxisAngle(axis, angle);
            Quat newRotation = rotation * bone->localRotation;
            
            bone->localRotation = bone->localRotation.slerp(newRotation, weight);
        }
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// CONSTRAINT MANAGER
// ====================================================================

class ConstraintManager {
public:
    std::vector<std::unique_ptr<Constraint>> constraints;
    
    void addConstraint(Constraint* constraint) {
        constraints.push_back(std::unique_ptr<Constraint>(constraint));
    }
    
    void applyAll(Skeleton& skeleton) {
        for (auto& constraint : constraints) {
            if (constraint->enabled) {
                constraint->apply(skeleton);
            }
        }
    }
    
    void clear() {
        constraints.clear();
    }
};

} // namespace animation
} // namespace nk
```

Suite avec **Sprite Animation, Animation Events, State Machine** dans le prochain message !

# PARTIE 33 : Sprite Animation + State Machine + Animation Events

## 1. SpriteAnimation.hpp - Animation 2D par Sprites

```cpp
// SpriteAnimation.hpp
#pragma once

#include "Animation.hpp"
#include "Vector2.hpp"
#include <vector>
#include <string>

namespace nk {
namespace animation {

// ====================================================================
// SPRITE FRAME
// ====================================================================

struct SpriteFrame {
    int textureIndex = 0;      // Index de texture dans un atlas
    Vec2 uvMin = Vec2::zero(); // Coordonnées UV
    Vec2 uvMax = Vec2::one();
    
    Vec2 pivot = Vec2(0.5f, 0.5f);  // Point d'ancrage
    Vec2 size;                       // Taille du sprite
    
    float duration = 0.1f;           // Durée de cette frame
    
    SpriteFrame() = default;
    SpriteFrame(int texIdx, float dur = 0.1f)
        : textureIndex(texIdx), duration(dur) {}
};

// ====================================================================
// SPRITE ANIMATION CLIP
// ====================================================================

class SpriteAnimationClip {
public:
    std::string name;
    std::vector<SpriteFrame> frames;
    
    bool looping = true;
    float totalDuration = 0.0f;
    
    SpriteAnimationClip() = default;
    SpriteAnimationClip(const std::string& n) : name(n) {}
    
    void addFrame(const SpriteFrame& frame) {
        frames.push_back(frame);
        totalDuration += frame.duration;
    }
    
    void addFrame(int textureIndex, float duration = 0.1f) {
        SpriteFrame frame(textureIndex, duration);
        addFrame(frame);
    }
    
    SpriteFrame getFrameAtTime(float time) const {
        if (frames.empty()) {
            return SpriteFrame();
        }
        
        // Handle looping
        if (looping && totalDuration > 0.0f) {
            time = std::fmod(time, totalDuration);
        }
        
        // Find frame at time
        float accumulated = 0.0f;
        
        for (const auto& frame : frames) {
            accumulated += frame.duration;
            
            if (time <= accumulated) {
                return frame;
            }
        }
        
        return frames.back();
    }
    
    int getFrameIndexAtTime(float time) const {
        if (frames.empty()) return 0;
        
        if (looping && totalDuration > 0.0f) {
            time = std::fmod(time, totalDuration);
        }
        
        float accumulated = 0.0f;
        
        for (size_t i = 0; i < frames.size(); i++) {
            accumulated += frames[i].duration;
            
            if (time <= accumulated) {
                return static_cast<int>(i);
            }
        }
        
        return static_cast<int>(frames.size() - 1);
    }
    
    // Create from sprite sheet grid
    static SpriteAnimationClip fromSpriteSheet(
        const std::string& name,
        int startFrame,
        int frameCount,
        int columns,
        int rows,
        float frameDuration = 0.1f)
    {
        SpriteAnimationClip clip(name);
        
        for (int i = 0; i < frameCount; i++) {
            int frameIndex = startFrame + i;
            int row = frameIndex / columns;
            int col = frameIndex % columns;
            
            SpriteFrame frame;
            frame.duration = frameDuration;
            
            // Calculate UV coordinates
            frame.uvMin.x = static_cast<float>(col) / columns;
            frame.uvMin.y = static_cast<float>(row) / rows;
            frame.uvMax.x = static_cast<float>(col + 1) / columns;
            frame.uvMax.y = static_cast<float>(row + 1) / rows;
            
            clip.addFrame(frame);
        }
        
        return clip;
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// SPRITE ANIMATOR
// ====================================================================

class SpriteAnimator {
public:
    SpriteAnimator() 
        : m_currentTime(0.0f)
        , m_speed(1.0f)
        , m_playing(false)
        , m_currentClip(nullptr) {}
    
    void play(SpriteAnimationClip* clip, bool restart = true) {
        if (!clip) return;
        
        if (m_currentClip != clip || restart) {
            m_currentClip = clip;
            m_currentTime = 0.0f;
        }
        
        m_playing = true;
    }
    
    void stop() {
        m_playing = false;
        m_currentTime = 0.0f;
    }
    
    void pause() {
        m_playing = false;
    }
    
    void resume() {
        m_playing = true;
    }
    
    void update(float deltaTime) {
        if (!m_playing || !m_currentClip) return;
        
        m_currentTime += deltaTime * m_speed;
        
        if (!m_currentClip->looping && m_currentTime >= m_currentClip->totalDuration) {
            m_currentTime = m_currentClip->totalDuration;
            m_playing = false;
        }
    }
    
    SpriteFrame getCurrentFrame() const {
        if (!m_currentClip) return SpriteFrame();
        return m_currentClip->getFrameAtTime(m_currentTime);
    }
    
    int getCurrentFrameIndex() const {
        if (!m_currentClip) return 0;
        return m_currentClip->getFrameIndexAtTime(m_currentTime);
    }
    
    void setSpeed(float speed) { m_speed = speed; }
    float getSpeed() const { return m_speed; }
    
    bool isPlaying() const { return m_playing; }
    
    SpriteAnimationClip* getCurrentClip() const { return m_currentClip; }
    float getCurrentTime() const { return m_currentTime; }
    
private:
    float m_currentTime;
    float m_speed;
    bool m_playing;
    SpriteAnimationClip* m_currentClip;
};

// ====================================================================
// SPRITE SHEET ATLAS
// ====================================================================

struct SpriteAtlas {
    struct Sprite {
        std::string name;
        Vec2 uvMin;
        Vec2 uvMax;
        Vec2 size;
        Vec2 pivot;
    };
    
    std::vector<Sprite> sprites;
    std::unordered_map<std::string, int> spriteMap;
    
    int addSprite(const std::string& name, const Vec2& uvMin, const Vec2& uvMax,
                  const Vec2& size, const Vec2& pivot = Vec2(0.5f, 0.5f)) {
        
        int index = static_cast<int>(sprites.size());
        
        Sprite sprite;
        sprite.name = name;
        sprite.uvMin = uvMin;
        sprite.uvMax = uvMax;
        sprite.size = size;
        sprite.pivot = pivot;
        
        sprites.push_back(sprite);
        spriteMap[name] = index;
        
        return index;
    }
    
    int findSprite(const std::string& name) const {
        auto it = spriteMap.find(name);
        return (it != spriteMap.end()) ? it->second : -1;
    }
    
    const Sprite* getSprite(int index) const {
        return (index >= 0 && index < static_cast<int>(sprites.size())) ? &sprites[index] : nullptr;
    }
    
    const Sprite* getSprite(const std::string& name) const {
        int index = findSprite(name);
        return getSprite(index);
    }
};

} // namespace animation
} // namespace nk
```

## 2. AnimationEvents.hpp - Système d'Events

```cpp
// AnimationEvents.hpp
#pragma once

#include "Animation.hpp"
#include <functional>
#include <vector>

namespace nk {
namespace animation {

// ====================================================================
// ANIMATION EVENT
// ====================================================================

struct AnimationEvent {
    std::string name;
    float time;
    
    // Event data (flexible)
    std::string stringParam;
    int intParam = 0;
    float floatParam = 0.0f;
    
    AnimationEvent() : time(0.0f) {}
    AnimationEvent(const std::string& n, float t) : name(n), time(t) {}
};

// ====================================================================
// ANIMATION EVENT TRACK
// ====================================================================

class AnimationEventTrack {
public:
    std::vector<AnimationEvent> events;
    
    void addEvent(const AnimationEvent& event) {
        events.push_back(event);
        sortEvents();
    }
    
    void addEvent(const std::string& name, float time) {
        addEvent(AnimationEvent(name, time));
    }
    
    std::vector<AnimationEvent> getEventsBetween(float startTime, float endTime) const {
        std::vector<AnimationEvent> triggered;
        
        for (const auto& event : events) {
            if (event.time >= startTime && event.time < endTime) {
                triggered.push_back(event);
            }
        }
        
        return triggered;
    }
    
    void clear() {
        events.clear();
    }
    
private:
    void sortEvents() {
        std::sort(events.begin(), events.end(),
                 [](const AnimationEvent& a, const AnimationEvent& b) {
                     return a.time < b.time;
                 });
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// ANIMATION CLIP WITH EVENTS
// ====================================================================

class AnimationClipWithEvents : public AnimationClip {
public:
    AnimationEventTrack eventTrack;
    
    using EventCallback = std::function<void(const AnimationEvent&)>;
    EventCallback eventCallback;
    
    AnimationClipWithEvents() = default;
    AnimationClipWithEvents(const std::string& name, float duration)
        : AnimationClip(name, duration) {}
    
    void addEvent(const std::string& eventName, float time) {
        eventTrack.addEvent(eventName, time);
    }
    
    void addEvent(const AnimationEvent& event) {
        eventTrack.addEvent(event);
    }
    
    void setEventCallback(EventCallback callback) {
        eventCallback = callback;
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// ANIMATION PLAYER WITH EVENTS
// ====================================================================

class AnimationPlayerWithEvents : public AnimationPlayer {
public:
    AnimationPlayerWithEvents() : m_lastTime(0.0f) {}
    
    void update(float deltaTime) override {
        float prevTime = getCurrentTime();
        
        AnimationPlayer::update(deltaTime);
        
        float currentTime = getCurrentTime();
        
        // Check for events
        auto* clipWithEvents = dynamic_cast<AnimationClipWithEvents*>(getCurrentClip());
        
        if (clipWithEvents && clipWithEvents->eventCallback) {
            auto triggeredEvents = clipWithEvents->eventTrack.getEventsBetween(prevTime, currentTime);
            
            for (const auto& event : triggeredEvents) {
                clipWithEvents->eventCallback(event);
            }
        }
        
        m_lastTime = currentTime;
    }
    
private:
    float m_lastTime;
};

// ====================================================================
// FOOTSTEP SYSTEM (Example usage)
// ====================================================================

class FootstepSystem {
public:
    using FootstepCallback = std::function<void(const std::string& foot)>;
    FootstepCallback callback;
    
    void onAnimationEvent(const AnimationEvent& event) {
        if (event.name == "footstep_left" || event.name == "footstep_right") {
            if (callback) {
                callback(event.stringParam);
            }
            
            // Play sound, spawn particle, etc.
            playFootstepSound(event.stringParam);
        }
    }
    
private:
    void playFootstepSound(const std::string& foot) {
        // Implementation would play audio here
        std::cout << "Footstep sound: " << foot << std::endl;
    }
};

} // namespace animation
} // namespace nk
```

## 3. AnimationStateMachine.hpp - State Machine

```cpp
// AnimationStateMachine.hpp
#pragma once

#include "Animation.hpp"
#include "AnimationEvents.hpp"
#include <memory>
#include <unordered_map>

namespace nk {
namespace animation {

// ====================================================================
// ANIMATION STATE
// ====================================================================

class AnimationState {
public:
    std::string name;
    AnimationClip* clip = nullptr;
    
    float speed = 1.0f;
    bool looping = true;
    
    // State callbacks
    std::function<void()> onEnter;
    std::function<void(float)> onUpdate;
    std::function<void()> onExit;
    
    AnimationState() = default;
    AnimationState(const std::string& n, AnimationClip* c)
        : name(n), clip(c) {
        if (clip) {
            looping = clip->looping;
        }
    }
    
    void enter() {
        if (onEnter) onEnter();
    }
    
    void update(float deltaTime) {
        if (onUpdate) onUpdate(deltaTime);
    }
    
    void exit() {
        if (onExit) onExit();
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// TRANSITION CONDITION
// ====================================================================

class TransitionCondition {
public:
    virtual ~TransitionCondition() = default;
    virtual bool evaluate() const = 0;
};

// Parameter-based conditions
class BoolCondition : public TransitionCondition {
public:
    bool* parameter = nullptr;
    bool expectedValue = true;
    
    BoolCondition(bool* param, bool expected)
        : parameter(param), expectedValue(expected) {}
    
    bool evaluate() const override {
        return parameter && (*parameter == expectedValue);
    }
};

class FloatCondition : public TransitionCondition {
public:
    enum class Comparison {
        Greater,
        Less,
        GreaterOrEqual,
        LessOrEqual,
        Equal,
        NotEqual
    };
    
    float* parameter = nullptr;
    float threshold = 0.0f;
    Comparison comparison = Comparison::Greater;
    
    FloatCondition(float* param, Comparison comp, float thresh)
        : parameter(param), comparison(comp), threshold(thresh) {}
    
    bool evaluate() const override {
        if (!parameter) return false;
        
        switch (comparison) {
            case Comparison::Greater: return *parameter > threshold;
            case Comparison::Less: return *parameter < threshold;
            case Comparison::GreaterOrEqual: return *parameter >= threshold;
            case Comparison::LessOrEqual: return *parameter <= threshold;
            case Comparison::Equal: return std::abs(*parameter - threshold) < 0.001f;
            case Comparison::NotEqual: return std::abs(*parameter - threshold) >= 0.001f;
        }
        
        return false;
    }
};

class IntCondition : public TransitionCondition {
public:
    enum class Comparison {
        Equal,
        NotEqual,
        Greater,
        Less
    };
    
    int* parameter = nullptr;
    int value = 0;
    Comparison comparison = Comparison::Equal;
    
    IntCondition(int* param, Comparison comp, int val)
        : parameter(param), comparison(comp), value(val) {}
    
    bool evaluate() const override {
        if (!parameter) return false;
        
        switch (comparison) {
            case Comparison::Equal: return *parameter == value;
            case Comparison::NotEqual: return *parameter != value;
            case Comparison::Greater: return *parameter > value;
            case Comparison::Less: return *parameter < value;
        }
        
        return false;
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// STATE TRANSITION
// ====================================================================

class StateTransition {
public:
    AnimationState* fromState = nullptr;
    AnimationState* toState = nullptr;
    
    std::vector<std::unique_ptr<TransitionCondition>> conditions;
    
    float blendDuration = 0.2f;
    bool hasExitTime = false;
    float exitTime = 0.0f;  // Normalized [0, 1]
    
    StateTransition() = default;
    StateTransition(AnimationState* from, AnimationState* to)
        : fromState(from), toState(to) {}
    
    void addCondition(TransitionCondition* condition) {
        conditions.push_back(std::unique_ptr<TransitionCondition>(condition));
    }
    
    bool canTransition(float normalizedTime) const {
        // Check exit time
        if (hasExitTime && normalizedTime < exitTime) {
            return false;
        }
        
        // Check all conditions
        for (const auto& condition : conditions) {
            if (!condition->evaluate()) {
                return false;
            }
        }
        
        return true;
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// ANIMATION STATE MACHINE
// ====================================================================

class AnimationStateMachine {
public:
    AnimationStateMachine() 
        : m_currentState(nullptr)
        , m_currentTime(0.0f)
        , m_blending(false)
        , m_blendTime(0.0f)
        , m_blendDuration(0.0f)
        , m_nextState(nullptr) {}
    
    AnimationState* addState(const std::string& name, AnimationClip* clip) {
        auto state = std::make_unique<AnimationState>(name, clip);
        AnimationState* ptr = state.get();
        
        m_states[name] = std::move(state);
        
        // Set as default state if first
        if (!m_currentState) {
            m_currentState = ptr;
        }
        
        return ptr;
    }
    
    StateTransition* addTransition(const std::string& fromState, const std::string& toState) {
        AnimationState* from = getState(fromState);
        AnimationState* to = getState(toState);
        
        if (!from || !to) return nullptr;
        
        auto transition = std::make_unique<StateTransition>(from, to);
        StateTransition* ptr = transition.get();
        
        m_transitions.push_back(std::move(transition));
        
        return ptr;
    }
    
    void setDefaultState(const std::string& stateName) {
        m_currentState = getState(stateName);
        if (m_currentState) {
            m_currentTime = 0.0f;
            m_currentState->enter();
        }
    }
    
    void update(float deltaTime) {
        if (!m_currentState) return;
        
        // Update blend
        if (m_blending) {
            m_blendTime += deltaTime;
            
            if (m_blendTime >= m_blendDuration) {
                // Finish blend
                m_currentState->exit();
                m_currentState = m_nextState;
                m_currentState->enter();
                
                m_blending = false;
                m_blendTime = 0.0f;
                m_currentTime = 0.0f;
            }
        }
        
        // Update current animation
        if (m_currentState->clip) {
            m_currentTime += deltaTime * m_currentState->speed;
            
            if (m_currentTime >= m_currentState->clip->duration) {
                if (m_currentState->looping) {
                    m_currentTime = std::fmod(m_currentTime, m_currentState->clip->duration);
                } else {
                    m_currentTime = m_currentState->clip->duration;
                }
            }
        }
        
        // Update state callbacks
        m_currentState->update(deltaTime);
        
        // Check transitions
        if (!m_blending) {
            checkTransitions();
        }
    }
    
    void evaluatePose(Skeleton& skeleton) {
        if (!m_currentState || !m_currentState->clip) return;
        
        if (m_blending && m_nextState && m_nextState->clip) {
            // Blend between current and next state
            float blendWeight = m_blendTime / m_blendDuration;
            
            BlendTree blendTree;
            blendTree.addClip(m_currentState->clip, 1.0f - blendWeight);
            blendTree.addClip(m_nextState->clip, blendWeight);
            
            skeleton.applyBlendTree(blendTree, m_currentTime);
        } else {
            // Just apply current state
            for (auto& bone : skeleton.bones) {
                bone.localPosition = m_currentState->clip->evaluatePosition(bone.name, m_currentTime);
                bone.localRotation = m_currentState->clip->evaluateRotation(bone.name, m_currentTime);
                bone.localScale = m_currentState->clip->evaluateScale(bone.name, m_currentTime);
            }
            
            skeleton.calculateFinalMatrices();
        }
    }
    
    AnimationState* getCurrentState() const { return m_currentState; }
    float getCurrentTime() const { return m_currentTime; }
    
    // Parameters (for conditions)
    std::unordered_map<std::string, bool> boolParameters;
    std::unordered_map<std::string, int> intParameters;
    std::unordered_map<std::string, float> floatParameters;
    
    void setBool(const std::string& name, bool value) {
        boolParameters[name] = value;
    }
    
    void setInt(const std::string& name, int value) {
        intParameters[name] = value;
    }
    
    void setFloat(const std::string& name, float value) {
        floatParameters[name] = value;
    }
    
    bool getBool(const std::string& name) const {
        auto it = boolParameters.find(name);
        return (it != boolParameters.end()) ? it->second : false;
    }
    
    int getInt(const std::string& name) const {
        auto it = intParameters.find(name);
        return (it != intParameters.end()) ? it->second : 0;
    }
    
    float getFloat(const std::string& name) const {
        auto it = floatParameters.find(name);
        return (it != floatParameters.end()) ? it->second : 0.0f;
    }
    
    // Triggers (one-time bools)
    void setTrigger(const std::string& name) {
        m_triggers[name] = true;
    }
    
    void resetTrigger(const std::string& name) {
        m_triggers.erase(name);
    }
    
    bool getTrigger(const std::string& name) const {
        return m_triggers.find(name) != m_triggers.end();
    }
    
private:
    AnimationState* getState(const std::string& name) {
        auto it = m_states.find(name);
        return (it != m_states.end()) ? it->second.get() : nullptr;
    }
    
    void checkTransitions() {
        if (!m_currentState) return;
        
        float normalizedTime = 0.0f;
        
        if (m_currentState->clip && m_currentState->clip->duration > 0.0f) {
            normalizedTime = m_currentTime / m_currentState->clip->duration;
        }
        
        for (const auto& transition : m_transitions) {
            if (transition->fromState == m_currentState) {
                if (transition->canTransition(normalizedTime)) {
                    // Start transition
                    m_nextState = transition->toState;
                    m_blending = true;
                    m_blendTime = 0.0f;
                    m_blendDuration = transition->blendDuration;
                    
                    // Reset triggers
                    m_triggers.clear();
                    
                    break;
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    std::unordered_map<std::string, std::unique_ptr<AnimationState>> m_states;
    std::vector<std::unique_ptr<StateTransition>> m_transitions;
    
    AnimationState* m_currentState;
    float m_currentTime;
    
    bool m_blending;
    float m_blendTime;
    float m_blendDuration;
    AnimationState* m_nextState;
    
    std::unordered_map<std::string, bool> m_triggers;
};

} // namespace animation
} // namespace nk
```

# PARTIE 34 : AI/ML Engine - Neural Networks FROM SCRATCH

## 1. Tensor.hpp - Structure de Données Fondamentale

```cpp
// Tensor.hpp - N-dimensional arrays pour ML
#pragma once

#include "MathConstants.hpp"
#include "Random.hpp"
#include <vector>
#include <memory>
#include <algorithm>
#include <numeric>
#include <iostream>
#include <functional>

namespace nk {
namespace ai {

using namespace math;

// ====================================================================
// TENSOR (N-dimensional array)
// ====================================================================

class Tensor {
public:
    std::vector<int> shape;
    std::vector<float> data;
    
    // Gradient pour backpropagation
    std::shared_ptr<Tensor> grad;
    
    // Autograd (computation graph)
    bool requiresGrad = false;
    std::function<void()> backwardFn;
    
    // Constructors
    Tensor() = default;
    
    explicit Tensor(const std::vector<int>& shape, bool requiresGrad = false)
        : shape(shape), requiresGrad(requiresGrad) {
        
        int size = getSize();
        data.resize(size, 0.0f);
        
        if (requiresGrad) {
            grad = std::make_shared<Tensor>(shape, false);
        }
    }
    
    Tensor(const std::vector<int>& shape, const std::vector<float>& data, bool requiresGrad = false)
        : shape(shape), data(data), requiresGrad(requiresGrad) {
        
        if (requiresGrad) {
            grad = std::make_shared<Tensor>(shape, false);
        }
    }
    
    // Scalar tensor
    static Tensor scalar(float value, bool requiresGrad = false) {
        return Tensor({1}, {value}, requiresGrad);
    }
    
    // Get total size
    int getSize() const {
        return std::accumulate(shape.begin(), shape.end(), 1, std::multiplies<int>());
    }
    
    // Get number of dimensions
    int ndim() const {
        return static_cast<int>(shape.size());
    }
    
    // Access
    float& operator[](int index) {
        return data[index];
    }
    
    const float& operator[](int index) const {
        return data[index];
    }
    
    float& at(const std::vector<int>& indices) {
        return data[flattenIndex(indices)];
    }
    
    const float& at(const std::vector<int>& indices) const {
        return data[flattenIndex(indices)];
    }
    
    // Reshape
    Tensor reshape(const std::vector<int>& newShape) const {
        Tensor result(newShape, data, requiresGrad);
        return result;
    }
    
    // Transpose (2D only for simplicity)
    Tensor transpose() const {
        if (ndim() != 2) {
            throw std::runtime_error("Transpose only supports 2D tensors");
        }
        
        int rows = shape[0];
        int cols = shape[1];
        
        Tensor result({cols, rows}, requiresGrad);
        
        for (int i = 0; i < rows; i++) {
            for (int j = 0; j < cols; j++) {
                result.data[j * rows + i] = data[i * cols + j];
            }
        }
        
        return result;
    }
    
    // ====================================================================
    // ARITHMETIC OPERATIONS
    // ====================================================================
    
    // Addition
    Tensor operator+(const Tensor& other) const {
        if (shape != other.shape) {
            throw std::runtime_error("Shape mismatch for addition");
        }
        
        Tensor result(shape, requiresGrad || other.requiresGrad);
        
        for (size_t i = 0; i < data.size(); i++) {
            result.data[i] = data[i] + other.data[i];
        }
        
        // Autograd
        if (result.requiresGrad) {
            auto thisPtr = std::make_shared<Tensor>(*this);
            auto otherPtr = std::make_shared<Tensor>(other);
            
            result.backwardFn = [thisPtr, otherPtr]() {
                if (thisPtr->requiresGrad && thisPtr->grad) {
                    for (size_t i = 0; i < thisPtr->data.size(); i++) {
                        thisPtr->grad->data[i] += thisPtr->grad->data[i];
                    }
                }
                
                if (otherPtr->requiresGrad && otherPtr->grad) {
                    for (size_t i = 0; i < otherPtr->data.size(); i++) {
                        otherPtr->grad->data[i] += otherPtr->grad->data[i];
                    }
                }
            };
        }
        
        return result;
    }
```
