```cpp
    // Scalar addition
    Tensor operator+(float scalar) const {
        Tensor result(shape, requiresGrad);
        
        for (size_t i = 0; i < data.size(); i++) {
            result.data[i] = data[i] + scalar;
        }
        
        return result;
    }
    
    // Subtraction
    Tensor operator-(const Tensor& other) const {
        if (shape != other.shape) {
            throw std::runtime_error("Shape mismatch for subtraction");
        }
        
        Tensor result(shape, requiresGrad || other.requiresGrad);
        
        for (size_t i = 0; i < data.size(); i++) {
            result.data[i] = data[i] - other.data[i];
        }
        
        return result;
    }
    
    // Multiplication (element-wise)
    Tensor operator*(const Tensor& other) const {
        if (shape != other.shape) {
            throw std::runtime_error("Shape mismatch for multiplication");
        }
        
        Tensor result(shape, requiresGrad || other.requiresGrad);
        
        for (size_t i = 0; i < data.size(); i++) {
            result.data[i] = data[i] * other.data[i];
        }
        
        return result;
    }
    
    // Scalar multiplication
    Tensor operator*(float scalar) const {
        Tensor result(shape, requiresGrad);
        
        for (size_t i = 0; i < data.size(); i++) {
            result.data[i] = data[i] * scalar;
        }
        
        return result;
    }
    
    // Division
    Tensor operator/(const Tensor& other) const {
        if (shape != other.shape) {
            throw std::runtime_error("Shape mismatch for division");
        }
        
        Tensor result(shape, requiresGrad || other.requiresGrad);
        
        for (size_t i = 0; i < data.size(); i++) {
            result.data[i] = data[i] / (other.data[i] + 1e-8f);
        }
        
        return result;
    }
    
    // ====================================================================
    // MATRIX OPERATIONS
    // ====================================================================
    
    // Matrix multiplication
    Tensor matmul(const Tensor& other) const {
        if (ndim() != 2 || other.ndim() != 2) {
            throw std::runtime_error("Matmul requires 2D tensors");
        }
        
        if (shape[1] != other.shape[0]) {
            throw std::runtime_error("Invalid dimensions for matmul");
        }
        
        int m = shape[0];
        int n = shape[1];
        int p = other.shape[1];
        
        Tensor result({m, p}, requiresGrad || other.requiresGrad);
        
        for (int i = 0; i < m; i++) {
            for (int j = 0; j < p; j++) {
                float sum = 0.0f;
                
                for (int k = 0; k < n; k++) {
                    sum += data[i * n + k] * other.data[k * p + j];
                }
                
                result.data[i * p + j] = sum;
            }
        }
        
        // Autograd
        if (result.requiresGrad) {
            auto thisPtr = std::make_shared<Tensor>(*this);
            auto otherPtr = std::make_shared<Tensor>(other);
            
            result.backwardFn = [thisPtr, otherPtr, result]() {
                if (thisPtr->requiresGrad && thisPtr->grad) {
                    // grad_input = grad_output @ other^T
                    auto otherT = otherPtr->transpose();
                    auto gradInput = result.grad->matmul(otherT);
                    
                    for (size_t i = 0; i < thisPtr->data.size(); i++) {
                        thisPtr->grad->data[i] += gradInput.data[i];
                    }
                }
                
                if (otherPtr->requiresGrad && otherPtr->grad) {
                    // grad_other = input^T @ grad_output
                    auto thisT = thisPtr->transpose();
                    auto gradOther = thisT.matmul(*result.grad);
                    
                    for (size_t i = 0; i < otherPtr->data.size(); i++) {
                        otherPtr->grad->data[i] += gradOther.data[i];
                    }
                }
            };
        }
        
        return result;
    }
    
    // ====================================================================
    // ACTIVATION FUNCTIONS
    // ====================================================================
    
    Tensor relu() const {
        Tensor result(shape, requiresGrad);
        
        for (size_t i = 0; i < data.size(); i++) {
            result.data[i] = std::max(0.0f, data[i]);
        }
        
        if (requiresGrad) {
            auto thisPtr = std::make_shared<Tensor>(*this);
            
            result.backwardFn = [thisPtr, result]() {
                if (thisPtr->grad) {
                    for (size_t i = 0; i < thisPtr->data.size(); i++) {
                        thisPtr->grad->data[i] += (thisPtr->data[i] > 0) ? result.grad->data[i] : 0.0f;
                    }
                }
            };
        }
        
        return result;
    }
    
    Tensor sigmoid() const {
        Tensor result(shape, requiresGrad);
        
        for (size_t i = 0; i < data.size(); i++) {
            result.data[i] = 1.0f / (1.0f + std::exp(-data[i]));
        }
        
        if (requiresGrad) {
            auto thisPtr = std::make_shared<Tensor>(*this);
            
            result.backwardFn = [thisPtr, result]() {
                if (thisPtr->grad) {
                    for (size_t i = 0; i < thisPtr->data.size(); i++) {
                        float sig = result.data[i];
                        thisPtr->grad->data[i] += result.grad->data[i] * sig * (1.0f - sig);
                    }
                }
            };
        }
        
        return result;
    }
    
    Tensor tanh() const {
        Tensor result(shape, requiresGrad);
        
        for (size_t i = 0; i < data.size(); i++) {
            result.data[i] = std::tanh(data[i]);
        }
        
        if (requiresGrad) {
            auto thisPtr = std::make_shared<Tensor>(*this);
            
            result.backwardFn = [thisPtr, result]() {
                if (thisPtr->grad) {
                    for (size_t i = 0; i < thisPtr->data.size(); i++) {
                        float t = result.data[i];
                        thisPtr->grad->data[i] += result.grad->data[i] * (1.0f - t * t);
                    }
                }
            };
        }
        
        return result;
    }
    
    // Softmax (along last dimension)
    Tensor softmax() const {
        Tensor result(shape, requiresGrad);
        
        if (ndim() == 1) {
            // Find max for numerical stability
            float maxVal = *std::max_element(data.begin(), data.end());
            
            float sum = 0.0f;
            for (size_t i = 0; i < data.size(); i++) {
                result.data[i] = std::exp(data[i] - maxVal);
                sum += result.data[i];
            }
            
            for (size_t i = 0; i < data.size(); i++) {
                result.data[i] /= sum;
            }
        } else if (ndim() == 2) {
            int rows = shape[0];
            int cols = shape[1];
            
            for (int i = 0; i < rows; i++) {
                float maxVal = data[i * cols];
                for (int j = 1; j < cols; j++) {
                    maxVal = std::max(maxVal, data[i * cols + j]);
                }
                
                float sum = 0.0f;
                for (int j = 0; j < cols; j++) {
                    result.data[i * cols + j] = std::exp(data[i * cols + j] - maxVal);
                    sum += result.data[i * cols + j];
                }
                
                for (int j = 0; j < cols; j++) {
                    result.data[i * cols + j] /= sum;
                }
            }
        }
        
        return result;
    }
    
    // ====================================================================
    // REDUCTION OPERATIONS
    // ====================================================================
    
    Tensor sum() const {
        float total = std::accumulate(data.begin(), data.end(), 0.0f);
        return Tensor::scalar(total, requiresGrad);
    }
    
    Tensor mean() const {
        float avg = sum().data[0] / getSize();
        return Tensor::scalar(avg, requiresGrad);
    }
    
    // ====================================================================
    // INITIALIZATION
    // ====================================================================
    
    void fill(float value) {
        std::fill(data.begin(), data.end(), value);
    }
    
    void zeros() {
        fill(0.0f);
    }
    
    void ones() {
        fill(1.0f);
    }
    
    void randomUniform(float min = 0.0f, float max = 1.0f) {
        Random& rng = Random::global();
        for (auto& val : data) {
            val = rng.nextFloat(min, max);
        }
    }
    
    void randomNormal(float mean = 0.0f, float stddev = 1.0f) {
        Random& rng = Random::global();
        for (auto& val : data) {
            val = rng.nextGaussian(mean, stddev);
        }
    }
    
    // Xavier/Glorot initialization
    void xavier(int fanIn, int fanOut) {
        float limit = std::sqrt(6.0f / (fanIn + fanOut));
        randomUniform(-limit, limit);
    }
    
    // He initialization
    void he(int fanIn) {
        float stddev = std::sqrt(2.0f / fanIn);
        randomNormal(0.0f, stddev);
    }
    
    // ====================================================================
    // AUTOGRAD
    // ====================================================================
    
    void backward(const Tensor* gradOutput = nullptr) {
        if (!requiresGrad) return;
        
        if (!grad) {
            grad = std::make_shared<Tensor>(shape, false);
        }
        
        if (gradOutput) {
            // Accumulate gradient
            for (size_t i = 0; i < data.size(); i++) {
                grad->data[i] += gradOutput->data[i];
            }
        } else {
            // Root node - gradient is all ones
            grad->ones();
        }
        
        if (backwardFn) {
            backwardFn();
        }
    }
    
    void zeroGrad() {
        if (grad) {
            grad->zeros();
        }
    }
    
    // ====================================================================
    // UTILITIES
    // ====================================================================
    
    void print() const {
        std::cout << "Tensor(shape=[";
        for (size_t i = 0; i < shape.size(); i++) {
            std::cout << shape[i];
            if (i < shape.size() - 1) std::cout << ", ";
        }
        std::cout << "], data=[";
        
        int printSize = std::min(10, static_cast<int>(data.size()));
        for (int i = 0; i < printSize; i++) {
            std::cout << data[i];
            if (i < printSize - 1) std::cout << ", ";
        }
        
        if (data.size() > 10) {
            std::cout << ", ...";
        }
        
        std::cout << "])" << std::endl;
    }
    
private:
    int flattenIndex(const std::vector<int>& indices) const {
        int index = 0;
        int stride = 1;
        
        for (int i = static_cast<int>(shape.size()) - 1; i >= 0; i--) {
            index += indices[i] * stride;
            stride *= shape[i];
        }
        
        return index;
    }
};

// Scalar * Tensor
inline Tensor operator*(float scalar, const Tensor& tensor) {
    return tensor * scalar;
}

} // namespace ai
} // namespace nk
```

## 2. Layer.hpp - Couches de Réseau de Neurones

```cpp
// Layer.hpp - Neural Network Layers
#pragma once

#include "Tensor.hpp"
#include <memory>
#include <vector>

namespace nk {
namespace ai {

// ====================================================================
// LAYER BASE CLASS
// ====================================================================

class Layer {
public:
    virtual ~Layer() = default;
    
    virtual Tensor forward(const Tensor& input) = 0;
    virtual void backward(const Tensor& gradOutput) = 0;
    
    virtual std::vector<Tensor*> parameters() { return {}; }
    
    virtual void train() { m_training = true; }
    virtual void eval() { m_training = false; }
    
protected:
    bool m_training = true;
};

// ====================================================================
// LINEAR (DENSE/FULLY CONNECTED)
// ====================================================================

class Linear : public Layer {
public:
    Tensor weight;
    Tensor bias;
    
    Tensor input;  // Cached for backward
    
    Linear(int inputSize, int outputSize)
        : weight({inputSize, outputSize}, true)
        , bias({1, outputSize}, true) {
        
        // He initialization
        weight.he(inputSize);
        bias.zeros();
    }
    
    Tensor forward(const Tensor& input) override {
        this->input = input;
        
        // output = input @ weight + bias
        Tensor output = input.matmul(weight);
        
        // Add bias (broadcast)
        for (int i = 0; i < output.shape[0]; i++) {
            for (int j = 0; j < output.shape[1]; j++) {
                output.data[i * output.shape[1] + j] += bias.data[j];
            }
        }
        
        return output;
    }
    
    void backward(const Tensor& gradOutput) override {
        // Gradient w.r.t weight: input^T @ gradOutput
        Tensor inputT = input.transpose();
        Tensor gradWeight = inputT.matmul(gradOutput);
        
        // Accumulate gradients
        for (size_t i = 0; i < weight.data.size(); i++) {
            weight.grad->data[i] += gradWeight.data[i];
        }
        
        // Gradient w.r.t bias: sum along batch dimension
        for (int j = 0; j < bias.shape[1]; j++) {
            float sum = 0.0f;
            for (int i = 0; i < gradOutput.shape[0]; i++) {
                sum += gradOutput.data[i * gradOutput.shape[1] + j];
            }
            bias.grad->data[j] += sum;
        }
    }
    
    std::vector<Tensor*> parameters() override {
        return {&weight, &bias};
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// ACTIVATION LAYERS
// ====================================================================

class ReLU : public Layer {
public:
    Tensor input;
    
    Tensor forward(const Tensor& input) override {
        this->input = input;
        return input.relu();
    }
    
    void backward(const Tensor& gradOutput) override {
        // Already handled by autograd
    }
};

class Sigmoid : public Layer {
public:
    Tensor input;
    
    Tensor forward(const Tensor& input) override {
        this->input = input;
        return input.sigmoid();
    }
    
    void backward(const Tensor& gradOutput) override {
        // Already handled by autograd
    }
};

class Tanh : public Layer {
public:
    Tensor input;
    
    Tensor forward(const Tensor& input) override {
        this->input = input;
        return input.tanh();
    }
    
    void backward(const Tensor& gradOutput) override {
        // Already handled by autograd
    }
};

class Softmax : public Layer {
public:
    Tensor output;
    
    Tensor forward(const Tensor& input) override {
        output = input.softmax();
        return output;
    }
    
    void backward(const Tensor& gradOutput) override {
        // Softmax gradient is complex, simplified here
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// DROPOUT (Regularization)
// ====================================================================

class Dropout : public Layer {
public:
    float dropRate;
    Tensor mask;
    
    Dropout(float rate = 0.5f) : dropRate(rate) {}
    
    Tensor forward(const Tensor& input) override {
        if (!m_training) {
            return input;
        }
        
        mask = Tensor(input.shape);
        
        Random& rng = Random::global();
        for (auto& val : mask.data) {
            val = rng.nextFloat() > dropRate ? 1.0f : 0.0f;
        }
        
        // Scale by 1/(1-p) during training
        float scale = 1.0f / (1.0f - dropRate);
        
        Tensor output = input * mask;
        output = output * scale;
        
        return output;
    }
    
    void backward(const Tensor& gradOutput) override {
        // Gradient flows through mask
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// BATCH NORMALIZATION
// ====================================================================

class BatchNorm : public Layer {
public:
    int numFeatures;
    
    Tensor gamma;  // Scale
    Tensor beta;   // Shift
    
    Tensor runningMean;
    Tensor runningVar;
    
    float momentum = 0.1f;
    float epsilon = 1e-5f;
    
    Tensor input;
    Tensor normalized;
    
    BatchNorm(int features)
        : numFeatures(features)
        , gamma({features}, true)
        , beta({features}, true)
        , runningMean({features})
        , runningVar({features}) {
        
        gamma.ones();
        beta.zeros();
        runningMean.zeros();
        runningVar.ones();
    }
    
    Tensor forward(const Tensor& input) override {
        this->input = input;
        
        if (m_training) {
            // Calculate batch statistics
            Tensor batchMean({numFeatures});
            Tensor batchVar({numFeatures});
            
            int batchSize = input.shape[0];
            
            for (int j = 0; j < numFeatures; j++) {
                float sum = 0.0f;
                for (int i = 0; i < batchSize; i++) {
                    sum += input.data[i * numFeatures + j];
                }
                batchMean.data[j] = sum / batchSize;
            }
            
            for (int j = 0; j < numFeatures; j++) {
                float sum = 0.0f;
                for (int i = 0; i < batchSize; i++) {
                    float diff = input.data[i * numFeatures + j] - batchMean.data[j];
                    sum += diff * diff;
                }
                batchVar.data[j] = sum / batchSize;
            }
            
            // Update running statistics
            for (int j = 0; j < numFeatures; j++) {
                runningMean.data[j] = (1.0f - momentum) * runningMean.data[j] + 
                                     momentum * batchMean.data[j];
                runningVar.data[j] = (1.0f - momentum) * runningVar.data[j] + 
                                    momentum * batchVar.data[j];
            }
            
            // Normalize
            normalized = Tensor(input.shape);
            
            for (int i = 0; i < batchSize; i++) {
                for (int j = 0; j < numFeatures; j++) {
                    float x = input.data[i * numFeatures + j];
                    float mean = batchMean.data[j];
                    float var = batchVar.data[j];
                    
                    normalized.data[i * numFeatures + j] = 
                        (x - mean) / std::sqrt(var + epsilon);
                }
            }
        } else {
            // Use running statistics
            normalized = Tensor(input.shape);
            
            int batchSize = input.shape[0];
            
            for (int i = 0; i < batchSize; i++) {
                for (int j = 0; j < numFeatures; j++) {
                    float x = input.data[i * numFeatures + j];
                    float mean = runningMean.data[j];
                    float var = runningVar.data[j];
                    
                    normalized.data[i * numFeatures + j] = 
                        (x - mean) / std::sqrt(var + epsilon);
                }
            }
        }
        
        // Scale and shift
        Tensor output(input.shape);
        
        int batchSize = input.shape[0];
        
        for (int i = 0; i < batchSize; i++) {
            for (int j = 0; j < numFeatures; j++) {
                output.data[i * numFeatures + j] = 
                    gamma.data[j] * normalized.data[i * numFeatures + j] + beta.data[j];
            }
        }
        
        return output;
    }
    
    void backward(const Tensor& gradOutput) override {
        // Complex gradient computation for batch norm
        // Simplified for brevity
    }
    
    std::vector<Tensor*> parameters() override {
        return {&gamma, &beta};
    }
};

} // namespace ai
} // namespace nk
```

Suite avec **Convolutional Layers, Loss Functions, Optimizers** dans le prochain message !

# PARTIE 35 : CNN Layers + Loss Functions + Optimizers

## 1. ConvLayer.hpp - Couches Convolutionnelles

```cpp
// ConvLayer.hpp - Convolutional Neural Network Layers
#pragma once

#include "Layer.hpp"

namespace nk {
namespace ai {

// ====================================================================
// CONV2D (2D Convolution)
// ====================================================================

class Conv2D : public Layer {
public:
    int inChannels;
    int outChannels;
    int kernelSize;
    int stride;
    int padding;
    
    Tensor weight;  // [outChannels, inChannels, kernelSize, kernelSize]
    Tensor bias;    // [outChannels]
    
    Tensor input;   // Cached for backward
    
    Conv2D(int inCh, int outCh, int kernel = 3, int stride = 1, int padding = 0)
        : inChannels(inCh)
        , outChannels(outCh)
        , kernelSize(kernel)
        , stride(stride)
        , padding(padding)
        , weight({outCh, inCh, kernel, kernel}, true)
        , bias({outCh}, true) {
        
        // He initialization
        int fanIn = inCh * kernel * kernel;
        weight.he(fanIn);
        bias.zeros();
    }
    
    Tensor forward(const Tensor& input) override {
        // Input shape: [batch, channels, height, width]
        this->input = input;
        
        int batch = input.shape[0];
        int inH = input.shape[2];
        int inW = input.shape[3];
        
        int outH = (inH + 2 * padding - kernelSize) / stride + 1;
        int outW = (inW + 2 * padding - kernelSize) / stride + 1;
        
        Tensor output({batch, outChannels, outH, outW});
        
        // Convolution (naive implementation)
        for (int b = 0; b < batch; b++) {
            for (int oc = 0; oc < outChannels; oc++) {
                for (int oh = 0; oh < outH; oh++) {
                    for (int ow = 0; ow < outW; ow++) {
                        float sum = 0.0f;
                        
                        // Convolve
                        for (int ic = 0; ic < inChannels; ic++) {
                            for (int kh = 0; kh < kernelSize; kh++) {
                                for (int kw = 0; kw < kernelSize; kw++) {
                                    int ih = oh * stride - padding + kh;
                                    int iw = ow * stride - padding + kw;
                                    
                                    // Check bounds
                                    if (ih >= 0 && ih < inH && iw >= 0 && iw < inW) {
                                        int inputIdx = ((b * inChannels + ic) * inH + ih) * inW + iw;
                                        int weightIdx = ((oc * inChannels + ic) * kernelSize + kh) * kernelSize + kw;
                                        
                                        sum += input.data[inputIdx] * weight.data[weightIdx];
                                    }
                                }
                            }
                        }
                        
                        // Add bias
                        sum += bias.data[oc];
                        
                        int outputIdx = ((b * outChannels + oc) * outH + oh) * outW + ow;
                        output.data[outputIdx] = sum;
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        return output;
    }
    
    void backward(const Tensor& gradOutput) override {
        // Gradient computation for convolution
        // Simplified - full implementation would compute gradients for weight and bias
        
        int batch = input.shape[0];
        int inH = input.shape[2];
        int inW = input.shape[3];
        
        int outH = gradOutput.shape[2];
        int outW = gradOutput.shape[3];
        
        // Gradient w.r.t weight
        for (int oc = 0; oc < outChannels; oc++) {
            for (int ic = 0; ic < inChannels; ic++) {
                for (int kh = 0; kh < kernelSize; kh++) {
                    for (int kw = 0; kw < kernelSize; kw++) {
                        float gradSum = 0.0f;
                        
                        for (int b = 0; b < batch; b++) {
                            for (int oh = 0; oh < outH; oh++) {
                                for (int ow = 0; ow < outW; ow++) {
                                    int ih = oh * stride - padding + kh;
                                    int iw = ow * stride - padding + kw;
                                    
                                    if (ih >= 0 && ih < inH && iw >= 0 && iw < inW) {
                                        int inputIdx = ((b * inChannels + ic) * inH + ih) * inW + iw;
                                        int gradIdx = ((b * outChannels + oc) * outH + oh) * outW + ow;
                                        
                                        gradSum += input.data[inputIdx] * gradOutput.data[gradIdx];
                                    }
                                }
                            }
                        }
                        
                        int weightIdx = ((oc * inChannels + ic) * kernelSize + kh) * kernelSize + kw;
                        weight.grad->data[weightIdx] += gradSum;
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        // Gradient w.r.t bias
        for (int oc = 0; oc < outChannels; oc++) {
            float gradSum = 0.0f;
            
            for (int b = 0; b < batch; b++) {
                for (int oh = 0; oh < outH; oh++) {
                    for (int ow = 0; ow < outW; ow++) {
                        int gradIdx = ((b * outChannels + oc) * outH + oh) * outW + ow;
                        gradSum += gradOutput.data[gradIdx];
                    }
                }
            }
            
            bias.grad->data[oc] += gradSum;
        }
    }
    
    std::vector<Tensor*> parameters() override {
        return {&weight, &bias};
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// MAX POOL 2D
// ====================================================================

class MaxPool2D : public Layer {
public:
    int kernelSize;
    int stride;
    
    Tensor input;
    std::vector<int> maxIndices;  // For backward pass
    
    MaxPool2D(int kernel = 2, int stride = 2)
        : kernelSize(kernel), stride(stride) {}
    
    Tensor forward(const Tensor& input) override {
        this->input = input;
        
        int batch = input.shape[0];
        int channels = input.shape[1];
        int inH = input.shape[2];
        int inW = input.shape[3];
        
        int outH = (inH - kernelSize) / stride + 1;
        int outW = (inW - kernelSize) / stride + 1;
        
        Tensor output({batch, channels, outH, outW});
        maxIndices.clear();
        maxIndices.resize(output.getSize());
        
        for (int b = 0; b < batch; b++) {
            for (int c = 0; c < channels; c++) {
                for (int oh = 0; oh < outH; oh++) {
                    for (int ow = 0; ow < outW; ow++) {
                        float maxVal = -std::numeric_limits<float>::infinity();
                        int maxIdx = 0;
                        
                        for (int kh = 0; kh < kernelSize; kh++) {
                            for (int kw = 0; kw < kernelSize; kw++) {
                                int ih = oh * stride + kh;
                                int iw = ow * stride + kw;
                                
                                int inputIdx = ((b * channels + c) * inH + ih) * inW + iw;
                                
                                if (input.data[inputIdx] > maxVal) {
                                    maxVal = input.data[inputIdx];
                                    maxIdx = inputIdx;
                                }
                            }
                        }
                        
                        int outputIdx = ((b * channels + c) * outH + oh) * outW + ow;
                        output.data[outputIdx] = maxVal;
                        maxIndices[outputIdx] = maxIdx;
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        return output;
    }
    
    void backward(const Tensor& gradOutput) override {
        // Gradient only flows through max values
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// AVERAGE POOL 2D
// ====================================================================

class AvgPool2D : public Layer {
public:
    int kernelSize;
    int stride;
    
    Tensor input;
    
    AvgPool2D(int kernel = 2, int stride = 2)
        : kernelSize(kernel), stride(stride) {}
    
    Tensor forward(const Tensor& input) override {
        this->input = input;
        
        int batch = input.shape[0];
        int channels = input.shape[1];
        int inH = input.shape[2];
        int inW = input.shape[3];
        
        int outH = (inH - kernelSize) / stride + 1;
        int outW = (inW - kernelSize) / stride + 1;
        
        Tensor output({batch, channels, outH, outW});
        
        float poolSize = static_cast<float>(kernelSize * kernelSize);
        
        for (int b = 0; b < batch; b++) {
            for (int c = 0; c < channels; c++) {
                for (int oh = 0; oh < outH; oh++) {
                    for (int ow = 0; ow < outW; ow++) {
                        float sum = 0.0f;
                        
                        for (int kh = 0; kh < kernelSize; kh++) {
                            for (int kw = 0; kw < kernelSize; kw++) {
                                int ih = oh * stride + kh;
                                int iw = ow * stride + kw;
                                
                                int inputIdx = ((b * channels + c) * inH + ih) * inW + iw;
                                sum += input.data[inputIdx];
                            }
                        }
                        
                        int outputIdx = ((b * channels + c) * outH + oh) * outW + ow;
                        output.data[outputIdx] = sum / poolSize;
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        return output;
    }
    
    void backward(const Tensor& gradOutput) override {
        // Gradient is evenly distributed
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// FLATTEN
// ====================================================================

class Flatten : public Layer {
public:
    std::vector<int> inputShape;
    
    Tensor forward(const Tensor& input) override {
        inputShape = input.shape;
        
        int batch = input.shape[0];
        int flatSize = input.getSize() / batch;
        
        return input.reshape({batch, flatSize});
    }
    
    void backward(const Tensor& gradOutput) override {
        // Just reshape back
    }
};

} // namespace ai
} // namespace nk
```

## 2. Loss.hpp - Fonctions de Perte

```cpp
// Loss.hpp - Loss Functions
#pragma once

#include "Tensor.hpp"

namespace nk {
namespace ai {

// ====================================================================
// LOSS FUNCTION BASE
// ====================================================================

class Loss {
public:
    virtual ~Loss() = default;
    
    virtual float forward(const Tensor& prediction, const Tensor& target) = 0;
    virtual Tensor backward() = 0;
    
protected:
    Tensor m_prediction;
    Tensor m_target;
    Tensor m_gradient;
};

// ====================================================================
// MEAN SQUARED ERROR (MSE)
// ====================================================================

class MSELoss : public Loss {
public:
    float forward(const Tensor& prediction, const Tensor& target) override {
        m_prediction = prediction;
        m_target = target;
        
        float sum = 0.0f;
        
        for (size_t i = 0; i < prediction.data.size(); i++) {
            float diff = prediction.data[i] - target.data[i];
            sum += diff * diff;
        }
        
        return sum / prediction.data.size();
    }
    
    Tensor backward() override {
        m_gradient = Tensor(m_prediction.shape);
        
        float scale = 2.0f / m_prediction.data.size();
        
        for (size_t i = 0; i < m_prediction.data.size(); i++) {
            m_gradient.data[i] = scale * (m_prediction.data[i] - m_target.data[i]);
        }
        
        return m_gradient;
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// CROSS ENTROPY LOSS
// ====================================================================

class CrossEntropyLoss : public Loss {
public:
    float forward(const Tensor& prediction, const Tensor& target) override {
        m_prediction = prediction;
        m_target = target;
        
        // Apply softmax to predictions
        Tensor softmax = prediction.softmax();
        
        float loss = 0.0f;
        
        if (prediction.ndim() == 2) {
            // Batch of predictions
            int batch = prediction.shape[0];
            int classes = prediction.shape[1];
            
            for (int b = 0; b < batch; b++) {
                for (int c = 0; c < classes; c++) {
                    int idx = b * classes + c;
                    
                    if (target.data[idx] > 0.5f) {
                        loss -= std::log(softmax.data[idx] + 1e-8f);
                    }
                }
            }
            
            loss /= batch;
        } else {
            // Single prediction
            for (size_t i = 0; i < prediction.data.size(); i++) {
                if (target.data[i] > 0.5f) {
                    loss -= std::log(softmax.data[i] + 1e-8f);
                }
            }
        }
        
        return loss;
    }
    
    Tensor backward() override {
        // Gradient of softmax + cross entropy
        Tensor softmax = m_prediction.softmax();
        
        m_gradient = Tensor(m_prediction.shape);
        
        if (m_prediction.ndim() == 2) {
            int batch = m_prediction.shape[0];
            
            for (size_t i = 0; i < m_prediction.data.size(); i++) {
                m_gradient.data[i] = (softmax.data[i] - m_target.data[i]) / batch;
            }
        } else {
            for (size_t i = 0; i < m_prediction.data.size(); i++) {
                m_gradient.data[i] = softmax.data[i] - m_target.data[i];
            }
        }
        
        return m_gradient;
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// BINARY CROSS ENTROPY
// ====================================================================

class BCELoss : public Loss {
public:
    float forward(const Tensor& prediction, const Tensor& target) override {
        m_prediction = prediction;
        m_target = target;
        
        float loss = 0.0f;
        
        for (size_t i = 0; i < prediction.data.size(); i++) {
            float p = clamp(prediction.data[i], 1e-8f, 1.0f - 1e-8f);
            float t = target.data[i];
            
            loss -= t * std::log(p) + (1.0f - t) * std::log(1.0f - p);
        }
        
        return loss / prediction.data.size();
    }
    
    Tensor backward() override {
        m_gradient = Tensor(m_prediction.shape);
        
        float scale = 1.0f / m_prediction.data.size();
        
        for (size_t i = 0; i < m_prediction.data.size(); i++) {
            float p = clamp(m_prediction.data[i], 1e-8f, 1.0f - 1e-8f);
            float t = m_target.data[i];
            
            m_gradient.data[i] = scale * ((p - t) / (p * (1.0f - p)));
        }
        
        return m_gradient;
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// L1 LOSS (Mean Absolute Error)
// ====================================================================

class L1Loss : public Loss {
public:
    float forward(const Tensor& prediction, const Tensor& target) override {
        m_prediction = prediction;
        m_target = target;
        
        float sum = 0.0f;
        
        for (size_t i = 0; i < prediction.data.size(); i++) {
            sum += std::abs(prediction.data[i] - target.data[i]);
        }
        
        return sum / prediction.data.size();
    }
    
    Tensor backward() override {
        m_gradient = Tensor(m_prediction.shape);
        
        float scale = 1.0f / m_prediction.data.size();
        
        for (size_t i = 0; i < m_prediction.data.size(); i++) {
            float diff = m_prediction.data[i] - m_target.data[i];
            m_gradient.data[i] = scale * (diff > 0 ? 1.0f : -1.0f);
        }
        
        return m_gradient;
    }
};

} // namespace ai
} // namespace nk
```

## 3. Optimizer.hpp - Algorithmes d'Optimisation

```cpp
// Optimizer.hpp - Optimization Algorithms
#pragma once

#include "Tensor.hpp"
#include <vector>
#include <unordered_map>

namespace nk {
namespace ai {

// ====================================================================
// OPTIMIZER BASE CLASS
// ====================================================================

class Optimizer {
public:
    std::vector<Tensor*> parameters;
    
    virtual ~Optimizer() = default;
    
    void setParameters(const std::vector<Tensor*>& params) {
        parameters = params;
    }
    
    void zeroGrad() {
        for (auto* param : parameters) {
            if (param->grad) {
                param->grad->zeros();
            }
        }
    }
    
    virtual void step() = 0;
};

// ====================================================================
// STOCHASTIC GRADIENT DESCENT (SGD)
// ====================================================================

class SGD : public Optimizer {
public:
    float learningRate;
    float momentum;
    float weightDecay;
    
    std::unordered_map<Tensor*, Tensor> velocities;
    
    SGD(float lr = 0.01f, float momentum = 0.0f, float decay = 0.0f)
        : learningRate(lr), momentum(momentum), weightDecay(decay) {}
    
    void step() override {
        for (auto* param : parameters) {
            if (!param->grad) continue;
            
            // Weight decay (L2 regularization)
            if (weightDecay > 0.0f) {
                for (size_t i = 0; i < param->data.size(); i++) {
                    param->grad->data[i] += weightDecay * param->data[i];
                }
            }
            
            if (momentum > 0.0f) {
                // Momentum
                if (velocities.find(param) == velocities.end()) {
                    velocities[param] = Tensor(param->shape);
                    velocities[param].zeros();
                }
                
                Tensor& velocity = velocities[param];
                
                for (size_t i = 0; i < param->data.size(); i++) {
                    velocity.data[i] = momentum * velocity.data[i] - learningRate * param->grad->data[i];
                    param->data[i] += velocity.data[i];
                }
            } else {
                // Simple SGD
                for (size_t i = 0; i < param->data.size(); i++) {
                    param->data[i] -= learningRate * param->grad->data[i];
                }
            }
        }
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// ADAM (Adaptive Moment Estimation)
// ====================================================================

class Adam : public Optimizer {
public:
    float learningRate;
    float beta1;
    float beta2;
    float epsilon;
    
    std::unordered_map<Tensor*, Tensor> m;  // First moment
    std::unordered_map<Tensor*, Tensor> v;  // Second moment
    int t = 0;  // Timestep
    
    Adam(float lr = 0.001f, float beta1 = 0.9f, float beta2 = 0.999f, float eps = 1e-8f)
        : learningRate(lr), beta1(beta1), beta2(beta2), epsilon(eps) {}
    
    void step() override {
        t++;
        
        for (auto* param : parameters) {
            if (!param->grad) continue;
            
            // Initialize moments
            if (m.find(param) == m.end()) {
                m[param] = Tensor(param->shape);
                m[param].zeros();
            }
            
            if (v.find(param) == v.end()) {
                v[param] = Tensor(param->shape);
                v[param].zeros();
            }
            
            Tensor& mt = m[param];
            Tensor& vt = v[param];
            
            for (size_t i = 0; i < param->data.size(); i++) {
                float g = param->grad->data[i];
                
                // Update biased first moment
                mt.data[i] = beta1 * mt.data[i] + (1.0f - beta1) * g;
                
                // Update biased second moment
                vt.data[i] = beta2 * vt.data[i] + (1.0f - beta2) * g * g;
                
                // Bias correction
                float mt_hat = mt.data[i] / (1.0f - std::pow(beta1, t));
                float vt_hat = vt.data[i] / (1.0f - std::pow(beta2, t));
                
                // Update parameter
                param->data[i] -= learningRate * mt_hat / (std::sqrt(vt_hat) + epsilon);
            }
        }
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// RMSPROP
// ====================================================================

class RMSprop : public Optimizer {
public:
    float learningRate;
    float alpha;
    float epsilon;
    
    std::unordered_map<Tensor*, Tensor> squaredGrads;
    
    RMSprop(float lr = 0.01f, float alpha = 0.99f, float eps = 1e-8f)
        : learningRate(lr), alpha(alpha), epsilon(eps) {}
    
    void step() override {
        for (auto* param : parameters) {
            if (!param->grad) continue;
            
            if (squaredGrads.find(param) == squaredGrads.end()) {
                squaredGrads[param] = Tensor(param->shape);
                squaredGrads[param].zeros();
            }
            
            Tensor& sq = squaredGrads[param];
            
            for (size_t i = 0; i < param->data.size(); i++) {
                float g = param->grad->data[i];
                
                // Moving average of squared gradients
                sq.data[i] = alpha * sq.data[i] + (1.0f - alpha) * g * g;
                
                // Update parameter
                param->data[i] -= learningRate * g / (std::sqrt(sq.data[i]) + epsilon);
            }
        }
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// ADAGRAD
// ====================================================================

class AdaGrad : public Optimizer {
public:
    float learningRate;
    float epsilon;
    
    std::unordered_map<Tensor*, Tensor> sumSquaredGrads;
    
    AdaGrad(float lr = 0.01f, float eps = 1e-8f)
        : learningRate(lr), epsilon(eps) {}
    
    void step() override {
        for (auto* param : parameters) {
            if (!param->grad) continue;
            
            if (sumSquaredGrads.find(param) == sumSquaredGrads.end()) {
                sumSquaredGrads[param] = Tensor(param->shape);
                sumSquaredGrads[param].zeros();
            }
            
            Tensor& sumSq = sumSquaredGrads[param];
            
            for (size_t i = 0; i < param->data.size(); i++) {
                float g = param->grad->data[i];
                
                // Accumulate squared gradients
                sumSq.data[i] += g * g;
                
                // Update parameter
                param->data[i] -= learningRate * g / (std::sqrt(sumSq.data[i]) + epsilon);
            }
        }
    }
};

} // namespace ai
} // namespace nk
```

Suite avec **Model (Sequential), Training Loop, RNN/LSTM** dans le prochain message !

# PARTIE 36 : Sequential Model + RNN/LSTM + Training

## 1. Model.hpp - Modèle Sequential

```cpp
// Model.hpp - Neural Network Model
#pragma once

#include "Layer.hpp"
#include "ConvLayer.hpp"
#include "Loss.hpp"
#include "Optimizer.hpp"
#include <vector>
#include <memory>

namespace nk {
namespace ai {

// ====================================================================
// SEQUENTIAL MODEL
// ====================================================================

class Sequential {
public:
    std::vector<std::unique_ptr<Layer>> layers;
    
    Sequential() = default;
    
    // Add layer
    template<typename LayerType, typename... Args>
    LayerType* add(Args&&... args) {
        auto layer = std::make_unique<LayerType>(std::forward<Args>(args)...);
        LayerType* ptr = layer.get();
        layers.push_back(std::move(layer));
        return ptr;
    }
    
    void addLayer(Layer* layer) {
        layers.push_back(std::unique_ptr<Layer>(layer));
    }
    
    // Forward pass
    Tensor forward(const Tensor& input) {
        Tensor output = input;
        
        for (auto& layer : layers) {
            output = layer->forward(output);
        }
        
        return output;
    }
    
    // Operator for convenience
    Tensor operator()(const Tensor& input) {
        return forward(input);
    }
    
    // Backward pass
    void backward(const Tensor& gradOutput) {
        Tensor grad = gradOutput;
        
        for (auto it = layers.rbegin(); it != layers.rend(); ++it) {
            (*it)->backward(grad);
            // grad would be updated by layer for next iteration
        }
    }
    
    // Get all parameters
    std::vector<Tensor*> parameters() {
        std::vector<Tensor*> params;
        
        for (auto& layer : layers) {
            auto layerParams = layer->parameters();
            params.insert(params.end(), layerParams.begin(), layerParams.end());
        }
        
        return params;
    }
    
    // Training mode
    void train() {
        for (auto& layer : layers) {
            layer->train();
        }
    }
    
    // Evaluation mode
    void eval() {
        for (auto& layer : layers) {
            layer->eval();
        }
    }
    
    // Save/Load (simplified)
    void save(const std::string& filename) {
        // Would serialize all parameters to file
        std::cout << "Model saved to " << filename << std::endl;
    }
    
    void load(const std::string& filename) {
        // Would load parameters from file
        std::cout << "Model loaded from " << filename << std::endl;
    }
    
    // Summary
    void summary() {
        std::cout << "Model Summary:" << std::endl;
        std::cout << "============================================" << std::endl;
        
        int totalParams = 0;
        
        for (size_t i = 0; i < layers.size(); i++) {
            auto params = layers[i]->parameters();
            int layerParams = 0;
            
            for (auto* param : params) {
                layerParams += param->getSize();
            }
            
            totalParams += layerParams;
            
            std::cout << "Layer " << i << ": " << layerParams << " parameters" << std::endl;
        }
        
        std::cout << "============================================" << std::endl;
        std::cout << "Total parameters: " << totalParams << std::endl;
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// TRAINING UTILITIES
// ====================================================================

struct TrainingConfig {
    int epochs = 10;
    int batchSize = 32;
    float validationSplit = 0.2f;
    bool shuffle = true;
    bool verbose = true;
};

class Trainer {
public:
    Sequential* model;
    Loss* lossFunction;
    Optimizer* optimizer;
    
    std::vector<float> trainLosses;
    std::vector<float> valLosses;
    
    Trainer(Sequential* m, Loss* loss, Optimizer* opt)
        : model(m), lossFunction(loss), optimizer(opt) {
        
        // Set optimizer parameters
        optimizer->setParameters(model->parameters());
    }
    
    void fit(const std::vector<Tensor>& X, const std::vector<Tensor>& y,
             const TrainingConfig& config = TrainingConfig()) {
        
        int numSamples = static_cast<int>(X.size());
        int numVal = static_cast<int>(numSamples * config.validationSplit);
        int numTrain = numSamples - numVal;
        
        // Split data
        std::vector<int> indices(numSamples);
        std::iota(indices.begin(), indices.end(), 0);
        
        if (config.shuffle) {
            Random& rng = Random::global();
            for (int i = numSamples - 1; i > 0; i--) {
                int j = rng.nextInt(i + 1);
                std::swap(indices[i], indices[j]);
            }
        }
        
        std::vector<int> trainIndices(indices.begin(), indices.begin() + numTrain);
        std::vector<int> valIndices(indices.begin() + numTrain, indices.end());
        
        // Training loop
        for (int epoch = 0; epoch < config.epochs; epoch++) {
            model->train();
            
            float epochLoss = 0.0f;
            int numBatches = (numTrain + config.batchSize - 1) / config.batchSize;
            
            for (int batch = 0; batch < numBatches; batch++) {
                int startIdx = batch * config.batchSize;
                int endIdx = std::min(startIdx + config.batchSize, numTrain);
                
                // Mini-batch
                float batchLoss = 0.0f;
                
                optimizer->zeroGrad();
                
                for (int i = startIdx; i < endIdx; i++) {
                    int idx = trainIndices[i];
                    
                    // Forward
                    Tensor prediction = model->forward(X[idx]);
                    
                    // Compute loss
                    float loss = lossFunction->forward(prediction, y[idx]);
                    batchLoss += loss;
                    
                    // Backward
                    Tensor gradOutput = lossFunction->backward();
                    model->backward(gradOutput);
                }
                
                // Update weights
                optimizer->step();
                
                epochLoss += batchLoss / (endIdx - startIdx);
            }
            
            epochLoss /= numBatches;
            trainLosses.push_back(epochLoss);
            
            // Validation
            float valLoss = 0.0f;
            
            if (numVal > 0) {
                model->eval();
                
                for (int idx : valIndices) {
                    Tensor prediction = model->forward(X[idx]);
                    valLoss += lossFunction->forward(prediction, y[idx]);
                }
                
                valLoss /= numVal;
                valLosses.push_back(valLoss);
            }
            
            if (config.verbose) {
                std::cout << "Epoch " << (epoch + 1) << "/" << config.epochs
                         << " - loss: " << epochLoss;
                
                if (numVal > 0) {
                    std::cout << " - val_loss: " << valLoss;
                }
                
                std::cout << std::endl;
            }
        }
    }
    
    Tensor predict(const Tensor& input) {
        model->eval();
        return model->forward(input);
    }
    
    float evaluate(const std::vector<Tensor>& X, const std::vector<Tensor>& y) {
        model->eval();
        
        float totalLoss = 0.0f;
        
        for (size_t i = 0; i < X.size(); i++) {
            Tensor prediction = model->forward(X[i]);
            totalLoss += lossFunction->forward(prediction, y[i]);
        }
        
        return totalLoss / X.size();
    }
};

} // namespace ai
} // namespace nk
```

## 2. RNN.hpp - Recurrent Neural Networks

```cpp
// RNN.hpp - Recurrent Neural Networks
#pragma once

#include "Layer.hpp"

namespace nk {
namespace ai {

// ====================================================================
// RNN CELL (Vanilla RNN)
// ====================================================================

class RNNCell : public Layer {
public:
    int inputSize;
    int hiddenSize;
    
    Tensor Wih;  // Input to hidden
    Tensor Whh;  // Hidden to hidden
    Tensor bh;   // Bias
    
    Tensor input;
    Tensor hiddenState;
    Tensor prevHidden;
    
    RNNCell(int inSize, int hidSize)
        : inputSize(inSize)
        , hiddenSize(hidSize)
        , Wih({inSize, hidSize}, true)
        , Whh({hidSize, hidSize}, true)
        , bh({hidSize}, true) {
        
        // Xavier initialization
        Wih.xavier(inSize, hidSize);
        Whh.xavier(hidSize, hidSize);
        bh.zeros();
    }
    
    Tensor forward(const Tensor& input) override {
        return forward(input, Tensor({hiddenSize}));
    }
    
    Tensor forward(const Tensor& input, const Tensor& hidden) {
        this->input = input;
        this->prevHidden = hidden;
        
        // h_t = tanh(W_ih @ x_t + W_hh @ h_{t-1} + b_h)
        Tensor ih = input.matmul(Wih);
        Tensor hh = hidden.matmul(Whh);
        
        hiddenState = Tensor(bh.shape);
        
        for (int i = 0; i < hiddenSize; i++) {
            hiddenState.data[i] = ih.data[i] + hh.data[i] + bh.data[i];
        }
        
        hiddenState = hiddenState.tanh();
        
        return hiddenState;
    }
    
    void backward(const Tensor& gradOutput) override {
        // RNN backpropagation through time (simplified)
    }
    
    std::vector<Tensor*> parameters() override {
        return {&Wih, &Whh, &bh};
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// LSTM CELL (Long Short-Term Memory)
// ====================================================================

class LSTMCell : public Layer {
public:
    int inputSize;
    int hiddenSize;
    
    // Forget gate
    Tensor Wif, Whf, bf;
    
    // Input gate
    Tensor Wii, Whi, bi;
    
    // Cell gate
    Tensor Wig, Whg, bg;
    
    // Output gate
    Tensor Wio, Who, bo;
    
    Tensor input;
    Tensor hiddenState;
    Tensor cellState;
    Tensor prevHidden;
    Tensor prevCell;
    
    // Gates (cached for backward)
    Tensor forgetGate;
    Tensor inputGate;
    Tensor cellGate;
    Tensor outputGate;
    
    LSTMCell(int inSize, int hidSize)
        : inputSize(inSize)
        , hiddenSize(hidSize)
        , Wif({inSize, hidSize}, true), Whf({hidSize, hidSize}, true), bf({hidSize}, true)
        , Wii({inSize, hidSize}, true), Whi({hidSize, hidSize}, true), bi({hidSize}, true)
        , Wig({inSize, hidSize}, true), Whg({hidSize, hidSize}, true), bg({hidSize}, true)
        , Wio({inSize, hidSize}, true), Who({hidSize, hidSize}, true), bo({hidSize}, true) {
        
        // Xavier initialization
        Wif.xavier(inSize, hidSize); Whf.xavier(hidSize, hidSize); bf.zeros();
        Wii.xavier(inSize, hidSize); Whi.xavier(hidSize, hidSize); bi.zeros();
        Wig.xavier(inSize, hidSize); Whg.xavier(hidSize, hidSize); bg.zeros();
        Wio.xavier(inSize, hidSize); Who.xavier(hidSize, hidSize); bo.zeros();
    }
    
    std::pair<Tensor, Tensor> forward(const Tensor& input, 
                                      const Tensor& hidden, 
                                      const Tensor& cell) {
        this->input = input;
        this->prevHidden = hidden;
        this->prevCell = cell;
        
        // Forget gate: f_t = sigmoid(W_if @ x_t + W_hf @ h_{t-1} + b_f)
        forgetGate = (input.matmul(Wif) + hidden.matmul(Whf));
        for (int i = 0; i < hiddenSize; i++) {
            forgetGate.data[i] += bf.data[i];
        }
        forgetGate = forgetGate.sigmoid();
        
        // Input gate: i_t = sigmoid(W_ii @ x_t + W_hi @ h_{t-1} + b_i)
        inputGate = (input.matmul(Wii) + hidden.matmul(Whi));
        for (int i = 0; i < hiddenSize; i++) {
            inputGate.data[i] += bi.data[i];
        }
        inputGate = inputGate.sigmoid();
        
        // Cell gate: g_t = tanh(W_ig @ x_t + W_hg @ h_{t-1} + b_g)
        cellGate = (input.matmul(Wig) + hidden.matmul(Whg));
        for (int i = 0; i < hiddenSize; i++) {
            cellGate.data[i] += bg.data[i];
        }
        cellGate = cellGate.tanh();
        
        // Output gate: o_t = sigmoid(W_io @ x_t + W_ho @ h_{t-1} + b_o)
        outputGate = (input.matmul(Wio) + hidden.matmul(Who));
        for (int i = 0; i < hiddenSize; i++) {
            outputGate.data[i] += bo.data[i];
        }
        outputGate = outputGate.sigmoid();
        
        // Cell state: c_t = f_t * c_{t-1} + i_t * g_t
        cellState = Tensor({hiddenSize});
        for (int i = 0; i < hiddenSize; i++) {
            cellState.data[i] = forgetGate.data[i] * cell.data[i] + 
                               inputGate.data[i] * cellGate.data[i];
        }
        
        // Hidden state: h_t = o_t * tanh(c_t)
        Tensor cellTanh = cellState.tanh();
        hiddenState = Tensor({hiddenSize});
        for (int i = 0; i < hiddenSize; i++) {
            hiddenState.data[i] = outputGate.data[i] * cellTanh.data[i];
        }
        
        return {hiddenState, cellState};
    }
    
    Tensor forward(const Tensor& input) override {
        Tensor hidden({hiddenSize});
        Tensor cell({hiddenSize});
        hidden.zeros();
        cell.zeros();
        
        auto [h, c] = forward(input, hidden, cell);
        return h;
    }
    
    void backward(const Tensor& gradOutput) override {
        // LSTM BPTT (complex, simplified here)
    }
    
    std::vector<Tensor*> parameters() override {
        return {
            &Wif, &Whf, &bf,
            &Wii, &Whi, &bi,
            &Wig, &Whg, &bg,
            &Wio, &Who, &bo
        };
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// GRU CELL (Gated Recurrent Unit)
// ====================================================================

class GRUCell : public Layer {
public:
    int inputSize;
    int hiddenSize;
    
    // Reset gate
    Tensor Wir, Whr, br;
    
    // Update gate
    Tensor Wiz, Whz, bz;
    
    // New gate
    Tensor Win, Whn, bn;
    
    Tensor input;
    Tensor hiddenState;
    Tensor prevHidden;
    
    GRUCell(int inSize, int hidSize)
        : inputSize(inSize)
        , hiddenSize(hidSize)
        , Wir({inSize, hidSize}, true), Whr({hidSize, hidSize}, true), br({hidSize}, true)
        , Wiz({inSize, hidSize}, true), Whz({hidSize, hidSize}, true), bz({hidSize}, true)
        , Win({inSize, hidSize}, true), Whn({hidSize, hidSize}, true), bn({hidSize}, true) {
        
        Wir.xavier(inSize, hidSize); Whr.xavier(hidSize, hidSize); br.zeros();
        Wiz.xavier(inSize, hidSize); Whz.xavier(hidSize, hidSize); bz.zeros();
        Win.xavier(inSize, hidSize); Whn.xavier(hidSize, hidSize); bn.zeros();
    }
    
    Tensor forward(const Tensor& input, const Tensor& hidden) {
        this->input = input;
        this->prevHidden = hidden;
        
        // Reset gate: r_t = sigmoid(W_ir @ x_t + W_hr @ h_{t-1} + b_r)
        Tensor resetGate = (input.matmul(Wir) + hidden.matmul(Whr));
        for (int i = 0; i < hiddenSize; i++) {
            resetGate.data[i] += br.data[i];
        }
        resetGate = resetGate.sigmoid();
        
        // Update gate: z_t = sigmoid(W_iz @ x_t + W_hz @ h_{t-1} + b_z)
        Tensor updateGate = (input.matmul(Wiz) + hidden.matmul(Whz));
        for (int i = 0; i < hiddenSize; i++) {
            updateGate.data[i] += bz.data[i];
        }
        updateGate = updateGate.sigmoid();
        
        // New gate: n_t = tanh(W_in @ x_t + r_t * (W_hn @ h_{t-1}) + b_n)
        Tensor resetHidden = Tensor({hiddenSize});
        for (int i = 0; i < hiddenSize; i++) {
            resetHidden.data[i] = resetGate.data[i] * hidden.data[i];
        }
        
        Tensor newGate = (input.matmul(Win) + resetHidden.matmul(Whn));
        for (int i = 0; i < hiddenSize; i++) {
            newGate.data[i] += bn.data[i];
        }
        newGate = newGate.tanh();
        
        // Hidden state: h_t = (1 - z_t) * n_t + z_t * h_{t-1}
        hiddenState = Tensor({hiddenSize});
        for (int i = 0; i < hiddenSize; i++) {
            hiddenState.data[i] = (1.0f - updateGate.data[i]) * newGate.data[i] + 
                                 updateGate.data[i] * hidden.data[i];
        }
        
        return hiddenState;
    }
    
    Tensor forward(const Tensor& input) override {
        Tensor hidden({hiddenSize});
        hidden.zeros();
        return forward(input, hidden);
    }
    
    void backward(const Tensor& gradOutput) override {
        // GRU BPTT
    }
    
    std::vector<Tensor*> parameters() override {
        return {
            &Wir, &Whr, &br,
            &Wiz, &Whz, &bz,
            &Win, &Whn, &bn
        };
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// RNN LAYER (Multiple timesteps)
// ====================================================================

class RNN : public Layer {
public:
    std::unique_ptr<RNNCell> cell;
    int numLayers;
    
    RNN(int inputSize, int hiddenSize, int layers = 1)
        : cell(std::make_unique<RNNCell>(inputSize, hiddenSize))
        , numLayers(layers) {}
    
    // Process sequence
    std::vector<Tensor> forward(const std::vector<Tensor>& sequence) {
        std::vector<Tensor> outputs;
        
        Tensor hidden({cell->hiddenSize});
        hidden.zeros();
        
        for (const auto& input : sequence) {
            hidden = cell->forward(input, hidden);
            outputs.push_back(hidden);
        }
        
        return outputs;
    }
    
    Tensor forward(const Tensor& input) override {
        // Single timestep
        return cell->forward(input);
    }
    
    void backward(const Tensor& gradOutput) override {
        cell->backward(gradOutput);
    }
    
    std::vector<Tensor*> parameters() override {
        return cell->parameters();
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// LSTM LAYER
// ====================================================================

class LSTM : public Layer {
public:
    std::unique_ptr<LSTMCell> cell;
    
    LSTM(int inputSize, int hiddenSize)
        : cell(std::make_unique<LSTMCell>(inputSize, hiddenSize)) {}
    
    std::vector<Tensor> forward(const std::vector<Tensor>& sequence) {
        std::vector<Tensor> outputs;
        
        Tensor hidden({cell->hiddenSize});
        Tensor cellState({cell->hiddenSize});
        hidden.zeros();
        cellState.zeros();
        
        for (const auto& input : sequence) {
            auto [h, c] = cell->forward(input, hidden, cellState);
            hidden = h;
            cellState = c;
            outputs.push_back(hidden);
        }
        
        return outputs;
    }
    
    Tensor forward(const Tensor& input) override {
        return cell->forward(input);
    }
    
    void backward(const Tensor& gradOutput) override {
        cell->backward(gradOutput);
    }
    
    std::vector<Tensor*> parameters() override {
        return cell->parameters();
    }
};

} // namespace ai
} // namespace nk
```

Suite avec **Embeddings, Attention, Transformer** dans le prochain message !

# PARTIE 37 : Embeddings + Attention + Transformer

## 1. Embedding.hpp - Word/Token Embeddings

```cpp
// Embedding.hpp - Embedding Layers
#pragma once

#include "Layer.hpp"
#include <unordered_map>
#include <string>

namespace nk {
namespace ai {

// ====================================================================
// EMBEDDING LAYER
// ====================================================================

class Embedding : public Layer {
public:
    int vocabSize;
    int embeddingDim;
    
    Tensor embeddings;  // [vocabSize, embeddingDim]
    
    std::vector<int> inputIndices;  // Cached for backward
    
    Embedding(int vocab, int dim)
        : vocabSize(vocab)
        , embeddingDim(dim)
        , embeddings({vocab, dim}, true) {
        
        // Random initialization
        embeddings.randomNormal(0.0f, 0.1f);
    }
    
    // Forward: indices -> embeddings
    Tensor forward(const std::vector<int>& indices) {
        inputIndices = indices;
        
        int seqLength = static_cast<int>(indices.size());
        Tensor output({seqLength, embeddingDim});
        
        for (int i = 0; i < seqLength; i++) {
            int idx = indices[i];
            
            if (idx >= 0 && idx < vocabSize) {
                for (int j = 0; j < embeddingDim; j++) {
                    output.data[i * embeddingDim + j] = embeddings.data[idx * embeddingDim + j];
                }
            }
        }
        
        return output;
    }
    
    Tensor forward(const Tensor& input) override {
        // Assume input contains indices as floats
        std::vector<int> indices;
        for (float val : input.data) {
            indices.push_back(static_cast<int>(val));
        }
        return forward(indices);
    }
    
    void backward(const Tensor& gradOutput) override {
        // Gradient accumulation for embeddings
        for (size_t i = 0; i < inputIndices.size(); i++) {
            int idx = inputIndices[i];
            
            if (idx >= 0 && idx < vocabSize) {
                for (int j = 0; j < embeddingDim; j++) {
                    embeddings.grad->data[idx * embeddingDim + j] += 
                        gradOutput.data[i * embeddingDim + j];
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    std::vector<Tensor*> parameters() override {
        return {&embeddings};
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// POSITIONAL ENCODING (for Transformer)
// ====================================================================

class PositionalEncoding {
public:
    int maxSeqLength;
    int embeddingDim;
    
    Tensor encoding;  // [maxSeqLength, embeddingDim]
    
    PositionalEncoding(int maxLen, int dim)
        : maxSeqLength(maxLen)
        , embeddingDim(dim)
        , encoding({maxLen, dim}) {
        
        // Sinusoidal positional encoding
        for (int pos = 0; pos < maxLen; pos++) {
            for (int i = 0; i < dim; i++) {
                float angle = pos / std::pow(10000.0f, (2.0f * i) / dim);
                
                if (i % 2 == 0) {
                    encoding.data[pos * dim + i] = std::sin(angle);
                } else {
                    encoding.data[pos * dim + i] = std::cos(angle);
                }
            }
        }
    }
    
    Tensor apply(const Tensor& embeddings) {
        // Add positional encoding to embeddings
        Tensor output = embeddings;
        
        int seqLength = embeddings.shape[0];
        
        for (int pos = 0; pos < seqLength && pos < maxSeqLength; pos++) {
            for (int i = 0; i < embeddingDim; i++) {
                output.data[pos * embeddingDim + i] += encoding.data[pos * embeddingDim + i];
            }
        }
        
        return output;
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// VOCABULARY (Token <-> Index mapping)
// ====================================================================

class Vocabulary {
public:
    std::unordered_map<std::string, int> word2idx;
    std::unordered_map<int, std::string> idx2word;
    
    int padToken = 0;
    int unkToken = 1;
    int sosToken = 2;  // Start of sequence
    int eosToken = 3;  // End of sequence
    
    int nextIdx = 4;
    
    Vocabulary() {
        word2idx["<PAD>"] = padToken;
        word2idx["<UNK>"] = unkToken;
        word2idx["<SOS>"] = sosToken;
        word2idx["<EOS>"] = eosToken;
        
        idx2word[padToken] = "<PAD>";
        idx2word[unkToken] = "<UNK>";
        idx2word[sosToken] = "<SOS>";
        idx2word[eosToken] = "<EOS>";
    }
    
    void addWord(const std::string& word) {
        if (word2idx.find(word) == word2idx.end()) {
            word2idx[word] = nextIdx;
            idx2word[nextIdx] = word;
            nextIdx++;
        }
    }
    
    int getIndex(const std::string& word) const {
        auto it = word2idx.find(word);
        return (it != word2idx.end()) ? it->second : unkToken;
    }
    
    std::string getWord(int index) const {
        auto it = idx2word.find(index);
        return (it != idx2word.end()) ? it->second : "<UNK>";
    }
    
    int size() const {
        return nextIdx;
    }
    
    std::vector<int> encode(const std::vector<std::string>& tokens) const {
        std::vector<int> indices;
        for (const auto& token : tokens) {
            indices.push_back(getIndex(token));
        }
        return indices;
    }
    
    std::vector<std::string> decode(const std::vector<int>& indices) const {
        std::vector<std::string> tokens;
        for (int idx : indices) {
            tokens.push_back(getWord(idx));
        }
        return tokens;
    }
};

} // namespace ai
} // namespace nk
```

## 2. Attention.hpp - Attention Mechanisms

```cpp
// Attention.hpp - Attention Mechanisms
#pragma once

#include "Layer.hpp"

namespace nk {
namespace ai {

// ====================================================================
// SCALED DOT-PRODUCT ATTENTION
// ====================================================================

class ScaledDotProductAttention {
public:
    float scale;
    
    ScaledDotProductAttention(int dim)
        : scale(1.0f / std::sqrt(static_cast<float>(dim))) {}
    
    // Q: [seqLen, dim], K: [seqLen, dim], V: [seqLen, dim]
    Tensor forward(const Tensor& Q, const Tensor& K, const Tensor& V, 
                   const Tensor* mask = nullptr) {
        
        // Attention scores: QK^T / sqrt(d_k)
        Tensor KT = K.transpose();
        Tensor scores = Q.matmul(KT);
        
        // Scale
        scores = scores * scale;
        
        // Apply mask (optional)
        if (mask) {
            for (size_t i = 0; i < scores.data.size(); i++) {
                if (mask->data[i] < 0.5f) {
                    scores.data[i] = -1e9f;  // Large negative value
                }
            }
        }
        
        // Softmax
        Tensor attention = scores.softmax();
        
        // Apply attention to values
        Tensor output = attention.matmul(V);
        
        return output;
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// MULTI-HEAD ATTENTION
// ====================================================================

class MultiHeadAttention : public Layer {
public:
    int embedDim;
    int numHeads;
    int headDim;
    
    // Linear projections for Q, K, V
    Tensor WQ, WK, WV;
    Tensor WO;  // Output projection
    
    Tensor bQ, bK, bV, bO;
    
    ScaledDotProductAttention attention;
    
    MultiHeadAttention(int dim, int heads)
        : embedDim(dim)
        , numHeads(heads)
        , headDim(dim / heads)
        , WQ({dim, dim}, true), WK({dim, dim}, true), WV({dim, dim}, true)
        , WO({dim, dim}, true)
        , bQ({dim}, true), bK({dim}, true), bV({dim}, true), bO({dim}, true)
        , attention(headDim) {
        
        // Xavier initialization
        WQ.xavier(dim, dim);
        WK.xavier(dim, dim);
        WV.xavier(dim, dim);
        WO.xavier(dim, dim);
        
        bQ.zeros();
        bK.zeros();
        bV.zeros();
        bO.zeros();
    }
    
    Tensor forward(const Tensor& query, const Tensor& key, const Tensor& value,
                   const Tensor* mask = nullptr) {
        
        int seqLen = query.shape[0];
        
        // Linear projections
        Tensor Q = query.matmul(WQ);
        Tensor K = key.matmul(WK);
        Tensor V = value.matmul(WV);
        
        // Add bias
        for (int i = 0; i < seqLen; i++) {
            for (int j = 0; j < embedDim; j++) {
                Q.data[i * embedDim + j] += bQ.data[j];
                K.data[i * embedDim + j] += bK.data[j];
                V.data[i * embedDim + j] += bV.data[j];
            }
        }
        
        // Split into multiple heads
        // Simplified: process all heads together (proper impl would split)
        Tensor attended = attention.forward(Q, K, V, mask);
        
        // Output projection
        Tensor output = attended.matmul(WO);
        
        for (int i = 0; i < seqLen; i++) {
            for (int j = 0; j < embedDim; j++) {
                output.data[i * embedDim + j] += bO.data[j];
            }
        }
        
        return output;
    }
    
    Tensor forward(const Tensor& input) override {
        // Self-attention: Q=K=V=input
        return forward(input, input, input);
    }
    
    void backward(const Tensor& gradOutput) override {
        // Complex gradient computation
    }
    
    std::vector<Tensor*> parameters() override {
        return {&WQ, &WK, &WV, &WO, &bQ, &bK, &bV, &bO};
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// FEED FORWARD NETWORK (for Transformer)
// ====================================================================

class FeedForward : public Layer {
public:
    int embedDim;
    int hiddenDim;
    
    Tensor W1, W2;
    Tensor b1, b2;
    
    Tensor hidden;  // Cached
    
    FeedForward(int dim, int hidDim)
        : embedDim(dim)
        , hiddenDim(hidDim)
        , W1({dim, hidDim}, true)
        , W2({hidDim, dim}, true)
        , b1({hidDim}, true)
        , b2({dim}, true) {
        
        W1.xavier(dim, hidDim);
        W2.xavier(hidDim, dim);
        b1.zeros();
        b2.zeros();
    }
    
    Tensor forward(const Tensor& input) override {
        int seqLen = input.shape[0];
        
        // First layer + ReLU
        hidden = input.matmul(W1);
        
        for (int i = 0; i < seqLen; i++) {
            for (int j = 0; j < hiddenDim; j++) {
                hidden.data[i * hiddenDim + j] += b1.data[j];
            }
        }
        
        hidden = hidden.relu();
        
        // Second layer
        Tensor output = hidden.matmul(W2);
        
        for (int i = 0; i < seqLen; i++) {
            for (int j = 0; j < embedDim; j++) {
                output.data[i * embedDim + j] += b2.data[j];
            }
        }
        
        return output;
    }
    
    void backward(const Tensor& gradOutput) override {
        // Backprop through FFN
    }
    
    std::vector<Tensor*> parameters() override {
        return {&W1, &W2, &b1, &b2};
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// LAYER NORMALIZATION
// ====================================================================

class LayerNorm : public Layer {
public:
    int normalizedShape;
    float epsilon;
    
    Tensor gamma;
    Tensor beta;
    
    Tensor input;
    Tensor normalized;
    
    LayerNorm(int shape, float eps = 1e-5f)
        : normalizedShape(shape)
        , epsilon(eps)
        , gamma({shape}, true)
        , beta({shape}, true) {
        
        gamma.ones();
        beta.zeros();
    }
    
    Tensor forward(const Tensor& input) override {
        this->input = input;
        
        int seqLen = input.shape[0];
        
        Tensor output(input.shape);
        normalized = Tensor(input.shape);
        
        for (int i = 0; i < seqLen; i++) {
            // Calculate mean
            float mean = 0.0f;
            for (int j = 0; j < normalizedShape; j++) {
                mean += input.data[i * normalizedShape + j];
            }
            mean /= normalizedShape;
            
            // Calculate variance
            float variance = 0.0f;
            for (int j = 0; j < normalizedShape; j++) {
                float diff = input.data[i * normalizedShape + j] - mean;
                variance += diff * diff;
            }
            variance /= normalizedShape;
            
            // Normalize
            float stddev = std::sqrt(variance + epsilon);
            
            for (int j = 0; j < normalizedShape; j++) {
                normalized.data[i * normalizedShape + j] = 
                    (input.data[i * normalizedShape + j] - mean) / stddev;
                
                // Scale and shift
                output.data[i * normalizedShape + j] = 
                    gamma.data[j] * normalized.data[i * normalizedShape + j] + beta.data[j];
            }
        }
        
        return output;
    }
    
    void backward(const Tensor& gradOutput) override {
        // LayerNorm gradient
    }
    
    std::vector<Tensor*> parameters() override {
        return {&gamma, &beta};
    }
};

} // namespace ai
} // namespace nk
```

## 3. Transformer.hpp - Transformer Architecture

```cpp
// Transformer.hpp - Transformer Model
#pragma once

#include "Attention.hpp"
#include "Embedding.hpp"

namespace nk {
namespace ai {

// ====================================================================
// TRANSFORMER ENCODER BLOCK
// ====================================================================

class TransformerEncoderBlock : public Layer {
public:
    std::unique_ptr<MultiHeadAttention> selfAttention;
    std::unique_ptr<LayerNorm> norm1;
    std::unique_ptr<FeedForward> ffn;
    std::unique_ptr<LayerNorm> norm2;
    std::unique_ptr<Dropout> dropout1;
    std::unique_ptr<Dropout> dropout2;
    
    TransformerEncoderBlock(int embedDim, int numHeads, int ffnHiddenDim, float dropoutRate = 0.1f) {
        selfAttention = std::make_unique<MultiHeadAttention>(embedDim, numHeads);
        norm1 = std::make_unique<LayerNorm>(embedDim);
        ffn = std::make_unique<FeedForward>(embedDim, ffnHiddenDim);
        norm2 = std::make_unique<LayerNorm>(embedDim);
        dropout1 = std::make_unique<Dropout>(dropoutRate);
        dropout2 = std::make_unique<Dropout>(dropoutRate);
    }
    
    Tensor forward(const Tensor& input) override {
        // Self-attention + residual
        Tensor attended = selfAttention->forward(input);
        attended = dropout1->forward(attended);
        
        Tensor residual1 = input + attended;
        Tensor normed1 = norm1->forward(residual1);
        
        // Feed-forward + residual
        Tensor ffnOut = ffn->forward(normed1);
        ffnOut = dropout2->forward(ffnOut);
        
        Tensor residual2 = normed1 + ffnOut;
        Tensor output = norm2->forward(residual2);
        
        return output;
    }
    
    void backward(const Tensor& gradOutput) override {
        // Backprop through encoder block
    }
    
    std::vector<Tensor*> parameters() override {
        std::vector<Tensor*> params;
        
        auto attnParams = selfAttention->parameters();
        params.insert(params.end(), attnParams.begin(), attnParams.end());
        
        auto norm1Params = norm1->parameters();
        params.insert(params.end(), norm1Params.begin(), norm1Params.end());
        
        auto ffnParams = ffn->parameters();
        params.insert(params.end(), ffnParams.begin(), ffnParams.end());
        
        auto norm2Params = norm2->parameters();
        params.insert(params.end(), norm2Params.begin(), norm2Params.end());
        
        return params;
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// TRANSFORMER DECODER BLOCK
// ====================================================================

class TransformerDecoderBlock : public Layer {
public:
```
