```cpp
    std::unique_ptr<MultiHeadAttention> selfAttention;
    std::unique_ptr<LayerNorm> norm1;
    std::unique_ptr<MultiHeadAttention> crossAttention;
    std::unique_ptr<LayerNorm> norm2;
    std::unique_ptr<FeedForward> ffn;
    std::unique_ptr<LayerNorm> norm3;
    std::unique_ptr<Dropout> dropout1;
    std::unique_ptr<Dropout> dropout2;
    std::unique_ptr<Dropout> dropout3;
    
    TransformerDecoderBlock(int embedDim, int numHeads, int ffnHiddenDim, float dropoutRate = 0.1f) {
        selfAttention = std::make_unique<MultiHeadAttention>(embedDim, numHeads);
        norm1 = std::make_unique<LayerNorm>(embedDim);
        crossAttention = std::make_unique<MultiHeadAttention>(embedDim, numHeads);
        norm2 = std::make_unique<LayerNorm>(embedDim);
        ffn = std::make_unique<FeedForward>(embedDim, ffnHiddenDim);
        norm3 = std::make_unique<LayerNorm>(embedDim);
        dropout1 = std::make_unique<Dropout>(dropoutRate);
        dropout2 = std::make_unique<Dropout>(dropoutRate);
        dropout3 = std::make_unique<Dropout>(dropoutRate);
    }
    
    Tensor forward(const Tensor& input, const Tensor& encoderOutput) {
        // Masked self-attention
        Tensor attended = selfAttention->forward(input);
        attended = dropout1->forward(attended);
        
        Tensor residual1 = input + attended;
        Tensor normed1 = norm1->forward(residual1);
        
        // Cross-attention (decoder attends to encoder)
        Tensor crossAttended = crossAttention->forward(normed1, encoderOutput, encoderOutput);
        crossAttended = dropout2->forward(crossAttended);
        
        Tensor residual2 = normed1 + crossAttended;
        Tensor normed2 = norm2->forward(residual2);
        
        // Feed-forward
        Tensor ffnOut = ffn->forward(normed2);
        ffnOut = dropout3->forward(ffnOut);
        
        Tensor residual3 = normed2 + ffnOut;
        Tensor output = norm3->forward(residual3);
        
        return output;
    }
    
    Tensor forward(const Tensor& input) override {
        // For compatibility with Layer interface
        return selfAttention->forward(input);
    }
    
    void backward(const Tensor& gradOutput) override {
        // Backprop through decoder block
    }
    
    std::vector<Tensor*> parameters() override {
        std::vector<Tensor*> params;
        
        auto params1 = selfAttention->parameters();
        params.insert(params.end(), params1.begin(), params1.end());
        
        auto params2 = norm1->parameters();
        params.insert(params.end(), params2.begin(), params2.end());
        
        auto params3 = crossAttention->parameters();
        params.insert(params.end(), params3.begin(), params3.end());
        
        auto params4 = norm2->parameters();
        params.insert(params.end(), params4.begin(), params4.end());
        
        auto params5 = ffn->parameters();
        params.insert(params.end(), params5.begin(), params5.end());
        
        auto params6 = norm3->parameters();
        params.insert(params.end(), params6.begin(), params6.end());
        
        return params;
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// TRANSFORMER MODEL (Full Encoder-Decoder)
// ====================================================================

class Transformer {
public:
    int vocabSize;
    int embedDim;
    int numHeads;
    int numEncoderLayers;
    int numDecoderLayers;
    int ffnHiddenDim;
    
    std::unique_ptr<Embedding> srcEmbedding;
    std::unique_ptr<Embedding> tgtEmbedding;
    std::unique_ptr<PositionalEncoding> posEncoding;
    
    std::vector<std::unique_ptr<TransformerEncoderBlock>> encoderBlocks;
    std::vector<std::unique_ptr<TransformerDecoderBlock>> decoderBlocks;
    
    std::unique_ptr<Linear> outputProjection;
    
    Transformer(int vocab, int dim, int heads, int encLayers, int decLayers, int ffnDim)
        : vocabSize(vocab)
        , embedDim(dim)
        , numHeads(heads)
        , numEncoderLayers(encLayers)
        , numDecoderLayers(decLayers)
        , ffnHiddenDim(ffnDim) {
        
        srcEmbedding = std::make_unique<Embedding>(vocab, dim);
        tgtEmbedding = std::make_unique<Embedding>(vocab, dim);
        posEncoding = std::make_unique<PositionalEncoding>(512, dim);
        
        // Encoder layers
        for (int i = 0; i < numEncoderLayers; i++) {
            encoderBlocks.push_back(
                std::make_unique<TransformerEncoderBlock>(dim, heads, ffnDim)
            );
        }
        
        // Decoder layers
        for (int i = 0; i < numDecoderLayers; i++) {
            decoderBlocks.push_back(
                std::make_unique<TransformerDecoderBlock>(dim, heads, ffnDim)
            );
        }
        
        // Output projection
        outputProjection = std::make_unique<Linear>(dim, vocab);
    }
    
    Tensor forward(const std::vector<int>& srcIndices, const std::vector<int>& tgtIndices) {
        // Embed source
        Tensor srcEmbedded = srcEmbedding->forward(srcIndices);
        srcEmbedded = posEncoding->apply(srcEmbedded);
        
        // Encode
        Tensor encoded = srcEmbedded;
        for (auto& encoder : encoderBlocks) {
            encoded = encoder->forward(encoded);
        }
        
        // Embed target
        Tensor tgtEmbedded = tgtEmbedding->forward(tgtIndices);
        tgtEmbedded = posEncoding->apply(tgtEmbedded);
        
        // Decode
        Tensor decoded = tgtEmbedded;
        for (auto& decoder : decoderBlocks) {
            decoded = decoder->forward(decoded, encoded);
        }
        
        // Project to vocabulary
        Tensor output = outputProjection->forward(decoded);
        
        return output;
    }
    
    std::vector<Tensor*> parameters() {
        std::vector<Tensor*> params;
        
        auto srcParams = srcEmbedding->parameters();
        params.insert(params.end(), srcParams.begin(), srcParams.end());
        
        auto tgtParams = tgtEmbedding->parameters();
        params.insert(params.end(), tgtParams.begin(), tgtParams.end());
        
        for (auto& encoder : encoderBlocks) {
            auto encParams = encoder->parameters();
            params.insert(params.end(), encParams.begin(), encParams.end());
        }
        
        for (auto& decoder : decoderBlocks) {
            auto decParams = decoder->parameters();
            params.insert(params.end(), decParams.begin(), decParams.end());
        }
        
        auto outParams = outputProjection->parameters();
        params.insert(params.end(), outParams.begin(), outParams.end());
        
        return params;
    }
};

} // namespace ai
} // namespace nk
```

Suite avec **GANs, Autoencoders, VAE, Diffusion Models** dans le prochain message !

# PARTIE 38 : GANs + Autoencoders + VAE + Diffusion Models

## 1. Autoencoder.hpp - Autoencoders & VAE

```cpp
// Autoencoder.hpp - Autoencoders and Variational Autoencoders
#pragma once

#include "Model.hpp"

namespace nk {
namespace ai {

// ====================================================================
// AUTOENCODER
// ====================================================================

class Autoencoder {
public:
    Sequential encoder;
    Sequential decoder;
    
    int inputDim;
    int latentDim;
    
    Autoencoder(int inDim, int latDim, const std::vector<int>& hiddenDims)
        : inputDim(inDim), latentDim(latDim) {
        
        // Build encoder
        int prevDim = inputDim;
        
        for (int hiddenDim : hiddenDims) {
            encoder.add<Linear>(prevDim, hiddenDim);
            encoder.add<ReLU>();
            prevDim = hiddenDim;
        }
        
        encoder.add<Linear>(prevDim, latentDim);
        
        // Build decoder (mirror of encoder)
        prevDim = latentDim;
        
        for (auto it = hiddenDims.rbegin(); it != hiddenDims.rend(); ++it) {
            decoder.add<Linear>(prevDim, *it);
            decoder.add<ReLU>();
            prevDim = *it;
        }
        
        decoder.add<Linear>(prevDim, inputDim);
        decoder.add<Sigmoid>();  // Output in [0, 1]
    }
    
    Tensor encode(const Tensor& input) {
        return encoder.forward(input);
    }
    
    Tensor decode(const Tensor& latent) {
        return decoder.forward(latent);
    }
    
    Tensor forward(const Tensor& input) {
        Tensor latent = encode(input);
        Tensor reconstruction = decode(latent);
        return reconstruction;
    }
    
    std::vector<Tensor*> parameters() {
        auto encParams = encoder.parameters();
        auto decParams = decoder.parameters();
        
        encParams.insert(encParams.end(), decParams.begin(), decParams.end());
        return encParams;
    }
    
    float reconstructionLoss(const Tensor& input, const Tensor& reconstruction) {
        MSELoss loss;
        return loss.forward(reconstruction, input);
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// VARIATIONAL AUTOENCODER (VAE)
// ====================================================================

class VAE {
public:
    Sequential encoder;
    Sequential decoder;
    
    std::unique_ptr<Linear> muLayer;
    std::unique_ptr<Linear> logVarLayer;
    
    int inputDim;
    int latentDim;
    
    Tensor mu;
    Tensor logVar;
    Tensor z;  // Sampled latent
    
    VAE(int inDim, int latDim, const std::vector<int>& hiddenDims)
        : inputDim(inDim), latentDim(latDim) {
        
        // Build encoder
        int prevDim = inputDim;
        
        for (int hiddenDim : hiddenDims) {
            encoder.add<Linear>(prevDim, hiddenDim);
            encoder.add<ReLU>();
            prevDim = hiddenDim;
        }
        
        // Mean and log variance branches
        muLayer = std::make_unique<Linear>(prevDim, latentDim);
        logVarLayer = std::make_unique<Linear>(prevDim, latentDim);
        
        // Build decoder
        prevDim = latentDim;
        
        for (auto it = hiddenDims.rbegin(); it != hiddenDims.rend(); ++it) {
            decoder.add<Linear>(prevDim, *it);
            decoder.add<ReLU>();
            prevDim = *it;
        }
        
        decoder.add<Linear>(prevDim, inputDim);
        decoder.add<Sigmoid>();
    }
    
    Tensor encode(const Tensor& input) {
        Tensor h = encoder.forward(input);
        
        mu = muLayer->forward(h);
        logVar = logVarLayer->forward(h);
        
        return reparameterize(mu, logVar);
    }
    
    Tensor reparameterize(const Tensor& mu, const Tensor& logVar) {
        // Reparameterization trick: z = mu + std * epsilon
        // where epsilon ~ N(0, 1)
        
        Tensor std = Tensor(logVar.shape);
        for (size_t i = 0; i < logVar.data.size(); i++) {
            std.data[i] = std::exp(0.5f * logVar.data[i]);
        }
        
        // Sample epsilon
        Tensor epsilon = Tensor(mu.shape);
        Random& rng = Random::global();
        for (auto& val : epsilon.data) {
            val = rng.nextGaussian();
        }
        
        // z = mu + std * epsilon
        z = Tensor(mu.shape);
        for (size_t i = 0; i < mu.data.size(); i++) {
            z.data[i] = mu.data[i] + std.data[i] * epsilon.data[i];
        }
        
        return z;
    }
    
    Tensor decode(const Tensor& latent) {
        return decoder.forward(latent);
    }
    
    Tensor forward(const Tensor& input) {
        Tensor latent = encode(input);
        Tensor reconstruction = decode(latent);
        return reconstruction;
    }
    
    float loss(const Tensor& input, const Tensor& reconstruction) {
        // Reconstruction loss
        MSELoss mse;
        float reconLoss = mse.forward(reconstruction, input);
        
        // KL divergence: -0.5 * sum(1 + log(sigma^2) - mu^2 - sigma^2)
        float kldLoss = 0.0f;
        
        for (size_t i = 0; i < mu.data.size(); i++) {
            float muVal = mu.data[i];
            float logVarVal = logVar.data[i];
            
            kldLoss += -0.5f * (1.0f + logVarVal - muVal * muVal - std::exp(logVarVal));
        }
        
        kldLoss /= mu.data.size();
        
        return reconLoss + kldLoss;
    }
    
    std::vector<Tensor*> parameters() {
        auto params = encoder.parameters();
        
        auto muParams = muLayer->parameters();
        params.insert(params.end(), muParams.begin(), muParams.end());
        
        auto logVarParams = logVarLayer->parameters();
        params.insert(params.end(), logVarParams.begin(), logVarParams.end());
        
        auto decParams = decoder.parameters();
        params.insert(params.end(), decParams.begin(), decParams.end());
        
        return params;
    }
    
    // Generate new samples
    Tensor sample(int numSamples) {
        Tensor latent({numSamples, latentDim});
        
        Random& rng = Random::global();
        for (auto& val : latent.data) {
            val = rng.nextGaussian();
        }
        
        return decode(latent);
    }
};

} // namespace ai
} // namespace nk
```

## 2. GAN.hpp - Generative Adversarial Networks

```cpp
// GAN.hpp - Generative Adversarial Networks
#pragma once

#include "Model.hpp"

namespace nk {
namespace ai {

// ====================================================================
// GAN (Generative Adversarial Network)
// ====================================================================

class GAN {
public:
    Sequential generator;
    Sequential discriminator;
    
    int latentDim;
    int outputDim;
    
    GAN(int latDim, int outDim, const std::vector<int>& genHiddenDims,
        const std::vector<int>& discHiddenDims)
        : latentDim(latDim), outputDim(outDim) {
        
        // Build generator
        int prevDim = latentDim;
        
        for (int hiddenDim : genHiddenDims) {
            generator.add<Linear>(prevDim, hiddenDim);
            generator.add<ReLU>();
            generator.add<BatchNorm>(hiddenDim);
            prevDim = hiddenDim;
        }
        
        generator.add<Linear>(prevDim, outDim);
        generator.add<Tanh>();  // Output in [-1, 1]
        
        // Build discriminator
        prevDim = outDim;
        
        for (int hiddenDim : discHiddenDims) {
            discriminator.add<Linear>(prevDim, hiddenDim);
            discriminator.add<ReLU>();
            discriminator.add<Dropout>(0.3f);
            prevDim = hiddenDim;
        }
        
        discriminator.add<Linear>(prevDim, 1);
        discriminator.add<Sigmoid>();  // Output: probability [0, 1]
    }
    
    Tensor generateNoise(int batchSize) {
        Tensor noise({batchSize, latentDim});
        
        Random& rng = Random::global();
        for (auto& val : noise.data) {
            val = rng.nextGaussian();
        }
        
        return noise;
    }
    
    Tensor generate(const Tensor& noise) {
        return generator.forward(noise);
    }
    
    Tensor discriminate(const Tensor& data) {
        return discriminator.forward(data);
    }
    
    std::vector<Tensor*> generatorParameters() {
        return generator.parameters();
    }
    
    std::vector<Tensor*> discriminatorParameters() {
        return discriminator.parameters();
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// GAN TRAINER
// ====================================================================

class GANTrainer {
public:
    GAN* gan;
    Optimizer* generatorOptimizer;
    Optimizer* discriminatorOptimizer;
    
    BCELoss lossFunction;
    
    std::vector<float> genLosses;
    std::vector<float> discLosses;
    
    GANTrainer(GAN* g, Optimizer* genOpt, Optimizer* discOpt)
        : gan(g)
        , generatorOptimizer(genOpt)
        , discriminatorOptimizer(discOpt) {
        
        generatorOptimizer->setParameters(gan->generatorParameters());
        discriminatorOptimizer->setParameters(gan->discriminatorParameters());
    }
    
    void trainStep(const std::vector<Tensor>& realData, int batchSize) {
        // Labels
        Tensor realLabels({batchSize, 1});
        realLabels.ones();
        
        Tensor fakeLabels({batchSize, 1});
        fakeLabels.zeros();
        
        // ============================================================
        // Train Discriminator
        // ============================================================
        
        discriminatorOptimizer->zeroGrad();
        
        // Real data
        float discRealLoss = 0.0f;
        for (int i = 0; i < std::min(batchSize, (int)realData.size()); i++) {
            Tensor prediction = gan->discriminate(realData[i]);
            discRealLoss += lossFunction.forward(prediction, realLabels);
        }
        discRealLoss /= batchSize;
        
        // Fake data
        Tensor noise = gan->generateNoise(batchSize);
        Tensor fakeData = gan->generate(noise);
        
        float discFakeLoss = 0.0f;
        for (int i = 0; i < batchSize; i++) {
            Tensor fakeSample = fakeData;  // Extract single sample
            Tensor prediction = gan->discriminate(fakeSample);
            discFakeLoss += lossFunction.forward(prediction, fakeLabels);
        }
        discFakeLoss /= batchSize;
        
        float discLoss = (discRealLoss + discFakeLoss) * 0.5f;
        
        // Backward discriminator
        Tensor discGrad = lossFunction.backward();
        gan->discriminator.backward(discGrad);
        
        discriminatorOptimizer->step();
        
        discLosses.push_back(discLoss);
        
        // ============================================================
        // Train Generator
        // ============================================================
        
        generatorOptimizer->zeroGrad();
        
        // Generate fake data
        noise = gan->generateNoise(batchSize);
        fakeData = gan->generate(noise);
        
        // Try to fool discriminator (want discriminator to output 1)
        float genLoss = 0.0f;
        for (int i = 0; i < batchSize; i++) {
            Tensor fakeSample = fakeData;
            Tensor prediction = gan->discriminate(fakeSample);
            genLoss += lossFunction.forward(prediction, realLabels);  // Use real labels!
        }
        genLoss /= batchSize;
        
        // Backward generator
        Tensor genGrad = lossFunction.backward();
        gan->discriminator.backward(genGrad);
        gan->generator.backward(genGrad);
        
        generatorOptimizer->step();
        
        genLosses.push_back(genLoss);
    }
    
    void train(const std::vector<Tensor>& dataset, int epochs, int batchSize) {
        for (int epoch = 0; epoch < epochs; epoch++) {
            int numBatches = (dataset.size() + batchSize - 1) / batchSize;
            
            for (int batch = 0; batch < numBatches; batch++) {
                int startIdx = batch * batchSize;
                int endIdx = std::min(startIdx + batchSize, (int)dataset.size());
                
                std::vector<Tensor> batchData(
                    dataset.begin() + startIdx,
                    dataset.begin() + endIdx
                );
                
                trainStep(batchData, batchData.size());
            }
            
            std::cout << "Epoch " << (epoch + 1) << "/" << epochs
                     << " - D loss: " << discLosses.back()
                     << " - G loss: " << genLosses.back() << std::endl;
        }
    }
    
    Tensor generate(int numSamples) {
        Tensor noise = gan->generateNoise(numSamples);
        return gan->generate(noise);
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// CONDITIONAL GAN (cGAN)
// ====================================================================

class ConditionalGAN {
public:
    Sequential generator;
    Sequential discriminator;
    
    int latentDim;
    int outputDim;
    int numClasses;
    
    std::unique_ptr<Embedding> genLabelEmbedding;
    std::unique_ptr<Embedding> discLabelEmbedding;
    
    ConditionalGAN(int latDim, int outDim, int classes,
                   const std::vector<int>& genHiddenDims,
                   const std::vector<int>& discHiddenDims)
        : latentDim(latDim)
        , outputDim(outDim)
        , numClasses(classes) {
        
        // Embeddings for class labels
        genLabelEmbedding = std::make_unique<Embedding>(classes, latDim);
        discLabelEmbedding = std::make_unique<Embedding>(classes, outDim);
        
        // Generator: input = noise + label embedding
        int prevDim = latDim * 2;
        
        for (int hiddenDim : genHiddenDims) {
            generator.add<Linear>(prevDim, hiddenDim);
            generator.add<ReLU>();
            prevDim = hiddenDim;
        }
        
        generator.add<Linear>(prevDim, outDim);
        generator.add<Tanh>();
        
        // Discriminator: input = data + label embedding
        prevDim = outDim * 2;
        
        for (int hiddenDim : discHiddenDims) {
            discriminator.add<Linear>(prevDim, hiddenDim);
            discriminator.add<ReLU>();
            prevDim = hiddenDim;
        }
        
        discriminator.add<Linear>(prevDim, 1);
        discriminator.add<Sigmoid>();
    }
    
    Tensor generate(const Tensor& noise, int classLabel) {
        std::vector<int> labels = {classLabel};
        Tensor labelEmbed = genLabelEmbedding->forward(labels);
        
        // Concatenate noise and label
        Tensor input({1, latentDim * 2});
        for (int i = 0; i < latentDim; i++) {
            input.data[i] = noise.data[i];
            input.data[latentDim + i] = labelEmbed.data[i];
        }
        
        return generator.forward(input);
    }
    
    Tensor discriminate(const Tensor& data, int classLabel) {
        std::vector<int> labels = {classLabel};
        Tensor labelEmbed = discLabelEmbedding->forward(labels);
        
        // Concatenate data and label
        Tensor input({1, outputDim * 2});
        for (int i = 0; i < outputDim; i++) {
            input.data[i] = data.data[i];
            input.data[outputDim + i] = labelEmbed.data[i];
        }
        
        return discriminator.forward(input);
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// WGAN (Wasserstein GAN) - More stable training
// ====================================================================

class WassersteinLoss {
public:
    float forward(const Tensor& prediction, bool isReal) {
        float loss = 0.0f;
        
        for (float val : prediction.data) {
            loss += isReal ? -val : val;
        }
        
        return loss / prediction.data.size();
    }
    
    Tensor backward(const Tensor& prediction, bool isReal) {
        Tensor grad(prediction.shape);
        
        float scale = isReal ? -1.0f : 1.0f;
        scale /= prediction.data.size();
        
        for (auto& val : grad.data) {
            val = scale;
        }
        
        return grad;
    }
};

} // namespace ai
} // namespace nk
```

## 3. DiffusionModel.hpp - Diffusion Models (DDPM)

```cpp
// DiffusionModel.hpp - Denoising Diffusion Probabilistic Models
#pragma once

#include "Model.hpp"

namespace nk {
namespace ai {

// ====================================================================
// NOISE SCHEDULER (for Diffusion)
// ====================================================================

class NoiseScheduler {
public:
    int numTimesteps;
    std::vector<float> betas;
    std::vector<float> alphas;
    std::vector<float> alphaCumprod;
    std::vector<float> sqrtAlphaCumprod;
    std::vector<float> sqrtOneMinusAlphaCumprod;
    
    NoiseScheduler(int timesteps, float betaStart = 0.0001f, float betaEnd = 0.02f) 
        : numTimesteps(timesteps) {
        
        // Linear schedule
        betas.resize(timesteps);
        alphas.resize(timesteps);
        alphaCumprod.resize(timesteps);
        sqrtAlphaCumprod.resize(timesteps);
        sqrtOneMinusAlphaCumprod.resize(timesteps);
        
        for (int t = 0; t < timesteps; t++) {
            float beta = betaStart + (betaEnd - betaStart) * t / (timesteps - 1);
            betas[t] = beta;
            alphas[t] = 1.0f - beta;
        }
        
        // Cumulative product of alphas
        alphaCumprod[0] = alphas[0];
        for (int t = 1; t < timesteps; t++) {
            alphaCumprod[t] = alphaCumprod[t - 1] * alphas[t];
        }
        
        // Precompute square roots for efficiency
        for (int t = 0; t < timesteps; t++) {
            sqrtAlphaCumprod[t] = std::sqrt(alphaCumprod[t]);
            sqrtOneMinusAlphaCumprod[t] = std::sqrt(1.0f - alphaCumprod[t]);
        }
    }
    
    // Add noise to data (forward diffusion)
    Tensor addNoise(const Tensor& x0, const Tensor& noise, int t) {
        Tensor xt(x0.shape);
        
        float sqrtAlpha = sqrtAlphaCumprod[t];
        float sqrtOneMinusAlpha = sqrtOneMinusAlphaCumprod[t];
        
        for (size_t i = 0; i < x0.data.size(); i++) {
            xt.data[i] = sqrtAlpha * x0.data[i] + sqrtOneMinusAlpha * noise.data[i];
        }
        
        return xt;
    }
    
    // Sample previous timestep (reverse diffusion)
    Tensor samplePrevTimestep(const Tensor& xt, const Tensor& predictedNoise, int t) {
        float alpha = alphas[t];
        float alphaCumprodT = alphaCumprod[t];
        float alphaCumprodTPrev = (t > 0) ? alphaCumprod[t - 1] : 1.0f;
        
        float beta = betas[t];
        
        // Mean of reverse process
        Tensor mean(xt.shape);
        
        float coef1 = 1.0f / std::sqrt(alpha);
        float coef2 = beta / std::sqrt(1.0f - alphaCumprodT);
        
        for (size_t i = 0; i < xt.data.size(); i++) {
            mean.data[i] = coef1 * (xt.data[i] - coef2 * predictedNoise.data[i]);
        }
        
        if (t == 0) {
            return mean;
        }
        
        // Add noise
        float variance = beta * (1.0f - alphaCumprodTPrev) / (1.0f - alphaCumprodT);
        float sigma = std::sqrt(variance);
        
        Tensor noise(xt.shape);
        Random& rng = Random::global();
        for (auto& val : noise.data) {
            val = rng.nextGaussian();
        }
        
        Tensor xtPrev(xt.shape);
        for (size_t i = 0; i < xt.data.size(); i++) {
            xtPrev.data[i] = mean.data[i] + sigma * noise.data[i];
        }
        
        return xtPrev;
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// U-NET (Noise Prediction Network for Diffusion)
// ====================================================================

class UNet : public Layer {
public:
    int channels;
    int timeEmbedDim;
    
    std::unique_ptr<Linear> timeEmbedding;
    
    // Encoder
    std::vector<std::unique_ptr<Conv2D>> downConvs;
    std::vector<std::unique_ptr<MaxPool2D>> downPools;
    
    // Bottleneck
    std::unique_ptr<Conv2D> bottleneck;
    
    // Decoder
    std::vector<std::unique_ptr<Conv2D>> upConvs;
    
    // Output
    std::unique_ptr<Conv2D> outConv;
    
    UNet(int ch = 3, int baseChannels = 64)
        : channels(ch)
        , timeEmbedDim(baseChannels * 4) {
        
        // Time embedding
        timeEmbedding = std::make_unique<Linear>(1, timeEmbedDim);
        
        // Simple U-Net structure (simplified)
        downConvs.push_back(std::make_unique<Conv2D>(channels, baseChannels, 3, 1, 1));
        downConvs.push_back(std::make_unique<Conv2D>(baseChannels, baseChannels * 2, 3, 1, 1));
        
        downPools.push_back(std::make_unique<MaxPool2D>(2, 2));
        downPools.push_back(std::make_unique<MaxPool2D>(2, 2));
        
        bottleneck = std::make_unique<Conv2D>(baseChannels * 2, baseChannels * 4, 3, 1, 1);
        
        upConvs.push_back(std::make_unique<Conv2D>(baseChannels * 4, baseChannels * 2, 3, 1, 1));
        upConvs.push_back(std::make_unique<Conv2D>(baseChannels * 2, baseChannels, 3, 1, 1));
        
        outConv = std::make_unique<Conv2D>(baseChannels, channels, 1, 1, 0);
    }
    
    Tensor forward(const Tensor& x, int timestep) {
        // Embed timestep
        Tensor tEmbed({1});
        tEmbed.data[0] = static_cast<float>(timestep);
        tEmbed = timeEmbedding->forward(tEmbed);
        
        // Encoder
        Tensor h = x;
        std::vector<Tensor> skipConnections;
        
        for (size_t i = 0; i < downConvs.size(); i++) {
            h = downConvs[i]->forward(h);
            skipConnections.push_back(h);
            h = downPools[i]->forward(h);
        }
        
        // Bottleneck
        h = bottleneck->forward(h);
        
        // Decoder (simplified - no proper upsampling implemented)
        for (size_t i = 0; i < upConvs.size(); i++) {
            // Skip connection
            // h = concatenate(h, skipConnections[...])
            h = upConvs[i]->forward(h);
        }
        
        // Output
        h = outConv->forward(h);
        
        return h;
    }
    
    Tensor forward(const Tensor& input) override {
        return forward(input, 0);
    }
    
    void backward(const Tensor& gradOutput) override {
        // U-Net backprop
    }
    
    std::vector<Tensor*> parameters() override {
        std::vector<Tensor*> params;
        
        auto timeParams = timeEmbedding->parameters();
        params.insert(params.end(), timeParams.begin(), timeParams.end());
        
        for (auto& conv : downConvs) {
            auto p = conv->parameters();
            params.insert(params.end(), p.begin(), p.end());
        }
        
        auto bottleParams = bottleneck->parameters();
        params.insert(params.end(), bottleParams.begin(), bottleParams.end());
        
        for (auto& conv : upConvs) {
            auto p = conv->parameters();
            params.insert(params.end(), p.begin(), p.end());
        }
        
        auto outParams = outConv->parameters();
        params.insert(params.end(), outParams.begin(), outParams.end());
        
        return params;
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// DIFFUSION MODEL (DDPM)
// ====================================================================

class DiffusionModel {
public:
    std::unique_ptr<UNet> noisePredictor;
    std::unique_ptr<NoiseScheduler> scheduler;
    
    int numTimesteps;
    
    DiffusionModel(int channels, int timesteps = 1000)
        : numTimesteps(timesteps) {
        
        noisePredictor = std::make_unique<UNet>(channels);
        scheduler = std::make_unique<NoiseScheduler>(timesteps);
    }
    
    // Training: predict noise added to image
    float trainStep(const Tensor& x0, Optimizer* optimizer) {
        optimizer->zeroGrad();
        
        // Random timestep
        Random& rng = Random::global();
        int t = rng.nextInt(numTimesteps);
        
        // Sample noise
        Tensor noise(x0.shape);
        for (auto& val : noise.data) {
            val = rng.nextGaussian();
        }
        
        // Add noise to image
        Tensor xt = scheduler->addNoise(x0, noise, t);
        
        // Predict noise
        Tensor predictedNoise = noisePredictor->forward(xt, t);
        
        // Loss (MSE between predicted and actual noise)
        MSELoss loss;
        float lossValue = loss.forward(predictedNoise, noise);
        
        // Backward
        Tensor grad = loss.backward();
        noisePredictor->backward(grad);
        
        optimizer->step();
        
        return lossValue;
    }
    
    // Sampling: denoise from pure noise
    Tensor sample(const std::vector<int>& shape) {
        // Start from pure noise
        Tensor xt(shape);
        
        Random& rng = Random::global();
        for (auto& val : xt.data) {
            val = rng.nextGaussian();
        }
        
        // Iteratively denoise
        for (int t = numTimesteps - 1; t >= 0; t--) {
            Tensor predictedNoise = noisePredictor->forward(xt, t);
            xt = scheduler->samplePrevTimestep(xt, predictedNoise, t);
            
            if (t % 100 == 0) {
                std::cout << "Denoising step " << t << "/" << numTimesteps << std::endl;
            }
        }
        
        return xt;
    }
    
    std::vector<Tensor*> parameters() {
        return noisePredictor->parameters();
    }
};

} // namespace ai
} // namespace nk
```

# PARTIE 39 : Computer Vision - Image Generation + Style Transfer + Object Detection

## 1. ImageGeneration.hpp - Génération d'Images

```cpp
// ImageGeneration.hpp - Image Generation Models
#pragma once

#include "GAN.hpp"
#include "DiffusionModel.hpp"

namespace nk {
namespace ai {

// ====================================================================
// DCGAN (Deep Convolutional GAN) - For Image Generation
// ====================================================================

class DCGAN {
public:
    Sequential generator;
    Sequential discriminator;
    
    int latentDim;
    int imageChannels;
    int imageSize;
    
    DCGAN(int latDim = 100, int channels = 3, int imgSize = 64)
        : latentDim(latDim)
        , imageChannels(channels)
        , imageSize(imgSize) {
        
        // Generator: latent -> image
        // Input: [batch, latentDim] -> Output: [batch, channels, height, width]
        
        int nf = 64;  // Number of filters
        
        // Project and reshape
        generator.add<Linear>(latentDim, nf * 8 * 4 * 4);
        generator.add<ReLU>();
        // Reshape to [batch, nf*8, 4, 4]
        
        // Upsample layers (simplified - would need transposed convolutions)
        generator.add<Conv2D>(nf * 8, nf * 4, 4, 2, 1);  // 4x4 -> 8x8
        generator.add<BatchNorm>(nf * 4);
        generator.add<ReLU>();
        
        generator.add<Conv2D>(nf * 4, nf * 2, 4, 2, 1);  // 8x8 -> 16x16
        generator.add<BatchNorm>(nf * 2);
        generator.add<ReLU>();
        
        generator.add<Conv2D>(nf * 2, nf, 4, 2, 1);      // 16x16 -> 32x32
        generator.add<BatchNorm>(nf);
        generator.add<ReLU>();
        
        generator.add<Conv2D>(nf, channels, 4, 2, 1);    // 32x32 -> 64x64
        generator.add<Tanh>();
        
        // Discriminator: image -> probability
        discriminator.add<Conv2D>(channels, nf, 4, 2, 1);  // 64x64 -> 32x32
        discriminator.add<ReLU>();
        discriminator.add<Dropout>(0.3f);
        
        discriminator.add<Conv2D>(nf, nf * 2, 4, 2, 1);    // 32x32 -> 16x16
        discriminator.add<BatchNorm>(nf * 2);
        discriminator.add<ReLU>();
        discriminator.add<Dropout>(0.3f);
        
        discriminator.add<Conv2D>(nf * 2, nf * 4, 4, 2, 1);  // 16x16 -> 8x8
        discriminator.add<BatchNorm>(nf * 4);
        discriminator.add<ReLU>();
        discriminator.add<Dropout>(0.3f);
        
        discriminator.add<Conv2D>(nf * 4, nf * 8, 4, 2, 1);  // 8x8 -> 4x4
        discriminator.add<BatchNorm>(nf * 8);
        discriminator.add<ReLU>();
        
        discriminator.add<Flatten>();
        discriminator.add<Linear>(nf * 8 * 4 * 4, 1);
        discriminator.add<Sigmoid>();
    }
    
    Tensor generate(const Tensor& noise) {
        return generator.forward(noise);
    }
    
    Tensor discriminate(const Tensor& image) {
        return discriminator.forward(image);
    }
    
    std::vector<Tensor*> generatorParameters() {
        return generator.parameters();
    }
    
    std::vector<Tensor*> discriminatorParameters() {
        return discriminator.parameters();
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// PROGRESSIVE GAN - Generate high resolution images
// ====================================================================

class ProgressiveGAN {
public:
    std::vector<std::unique_ptr<Sequential>> generatorBlocks;
    std::vector<std::unique_ptr<Sequential>> discriminatorBlocks;
    
    int currentResolution;
    int maxResolution;
    int latentDim;
    
    ProgressiveGAN(int latDim = 512, int startRes = 4, int maxRes = 512)
        : latentDim(latDim)
        , currentResolution(startRes)
        , maxResolution(maxRes) {
        
        // Build progressive blocks for each resolution: 4x4, 8x8, 16x16, ..., 512x512
        int res = startRes;
        
        while (res <= maxRes) {
            auto genBlock = std::make_unique<Sequential>();
            auto discBlock = std::make_unique<Sequential>();
            
            // Generator block for this resolution
            // ... (would add layers)
            
            generatorBlocks.push_back(std::move(genBlock));
            discriminatorBlocks.push_back(std::move(discBlock));
            
            res *= 2;
        }
    }
    
    void growNetwork() {
        // Progressively grow the network to higher resolution
        if (currentResolution < maxResolution) {
            currentResolution *= 2;
            std::cout << "Growing network to resolution: " << currentResolution << "x" << currentResolution << std::endl;
        }
    }
    
    Tensor generate(const Tensor& noise) {
        // Generate at current resolution
        Tensor x = noise;
        
        int numBlocks = std::log2(currentResolution / 4) + 1;
        
        for (int i = 0; i < numBlocks && i < (int)generatorBlocks.size(); i++) {
            x = generatorBlocks[i]->forward(x);
        }
        
        return x;
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// PIX2PIX - Image-to-Image Translation
// ====================================================================

class Pix2Pix {
public:
    std::unique_ptr<Sequential> generator;  // U-Net architecture
    std::unique_ptr<Sequential> discriminator;  // PatchGAN
    
    Pix2Pix(int channels = 3) {
        // Generator: U-Net
        generator = std::make_unique<Sequential>();
        
        // Encoder
        generator->add<Conv2D>(channels, 64, 4, 2, 1);
        generator->add<ReLU>();
        
        generator->add<Conv2D>(64, 128, 4, 2, 1);
        generator->add<BatchNorm>(128);
        generator->add<ReLU>();
        
        generator->add<Conv2D>(128, 256, 4, 2, 1);
        generator->add<BatchNorm>(256);
        generator->add<ReLU>();
        
        // ... more layers
        
        // Decoder (with skip connections in full implementation)
        // ... decoder layers
        
        generator->add<Conv2D>(256, 128, 4, 2, 1);
        generator->add<BatchNorm>(128);
        generator->add<ReLU>();
        
        generator->add<Conv2D>(128, 64, 4, 2, 1);
        generator->add<BatchNorm>(64);
        generator->add<ReLU>();
        
        generator->add<Conv2D>(64, channels, 4, 2, 1);
        generator->add<Tanh>();
        
        // Discriminator: PatchGAN (classifies 70x70 patches)
        discriminator = std::make_unique<Sequential>();
        
        discriminator->add<Conv2D>(channels * 2, 64, 4, 2, 1);  // Input + Target concatenated
        discriminator->add<ReLU>();
        
        discriminator->add<Conv2D>(64, 128, 4, 2, 1);
        discriminator->add<BatchNorm>(128);
        discriminator->add<ReLU>();
        
        discriminator->add<Conv2D>(128, 256, 4, 2, 1);
        discriminator->add<BatchNorm>(256);
        discriminator->add<ReLU>();
        
        discriminator->add<Conv2D>(256, 1, 4, 1, 1);
        discriminator->add<Sigmoid>();
    }
    
    Tensor translate(const Tensor& input) {
        return generator->forward(input);
    }
    
    Tensor discriminate(const Tensor& input, const Tensor& target) {
        // Concatenate input and target
        Tensor concatenated = input;  // Simplified - would need proper concatenation
        return discriminator->forward(concatenated);
    }
    
    float loss(const Tensor& input, const Tensor& target, const Tensor& generated) {
        // L1 loss for pixel-wise similarity
        L1Loss l1;
        float l1Loss = l1.forward(generated, target);
        
        // GAN loss
        Tensor discPrediction = discriminate(input, generated);
        Tensor realLabels({1, 1});
        realLabels.ones();
        
        BCELoss bce;
        float ganLoss = bce.forward(discPrediction, realLabels);
        
        // Combined loss
        float lambda = 100.0f;  // Weight for L1 loss
        return ganLoss + lambda * l1Loss;
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// CYCLEGAN - Unpaired Image-to-Image Translation
// ====================================================================

class CycleGAN {
public:
    std::unique_ptr<Sequential> generatorAtoB;
    std::unique_ptr<Sequential> generatorBtoA;
    std::unique_ptr<Sequential> discriminatorA;
    std::unique_ptr<Sequential> discriminatorB;
    
    float cycleLambda = 10.0f;
    float identityLambda = 5.0f;
    
    CycleGAN(int channels = 3) {
        // Build generators (ResNet-based in practice)
        generatorAtoB = buildGenerator(channels);
        generatorBtoA = buildGenerator(channels);
        
        // Build discriminators
        discriminatorA = buildDiscriminator(channels);
        discriminatorB = buildDiscriminator(channels);
    }
    
    std::unique_ptr<Sequential> buildGenerator(int channels) {
        auto gen = std::make_unique<Sequential>();
        
        // Encoder
        gen->add<Conv2D>(channels, 64, 7, 1, 3);
        gen->add<BatchNorm>(64);
        gen->add<ReLU>();
        
        gen->add<Conv2D>(64, 128, 3, 2, 1);
        gen->add<BatchNorm>(128);
        gen->add<ReLU>();
        
        // Residual blocks (would add ResNet blocks here)
        
        // Decoder
        gen->add<Conv2D>(128, 64, 3, 2, 1);
        gen->add<BatchNorm>(64);
        gen->add<ReLU>();
        
        gen->add<Conv2D>(64, channels, 7, 1, 3);
        gen->add<Tanh>();
        
        return gen;
    }
    
    std::unique_ptr<Sequential> buildDiscriminator(int channels) {
        auto disc = std::make_unique<Sequential>();
        
        disc->add<Conv2D>(channels, 64, 4, 2, 1);
        disc->add<ReLU>();
        
        disc->add<Conv2D>(64, 128, 4, 2, 1);
        disc->add<BatchNorm>(128);
        disc->add<ReLU>();
        
        disc->add<Conv2D>(128, 256, 4, 2, 1);
        disc->add<BatchNorm>(256);
        disc->add<ReLU>();
        
        disc->add<Conv2D>(256, 1, 4, 1, 1);
        disc->add<Sigmoid>();
        
        return disc;
    }
    
    Tensor translateAtoB(const Tensor& imageA) {
        return generatorAtoB->forward(imageA);
    }
    
    Tensor translateBtoA(const Tensor& imageB) {
        return generatorBtoA->forward(imageB);
    }
    
    float computeCycleLoss(const Tensor& realA, const Tensor& realB) {
        // Forward cycle: A -> B -> A
        Tensor fakeB = translateAtoB(realA);
        Tensor reconstructedA = translateBtoA(fakeB);
        
        L1Loss l1;
        float cycleA = l1.forward(reconstructedA, realA);
        
        // Backward cycle: B -> A -> B
        Tensor fakeA = translateBtoA(realB);
        Tensor reconstructedB = translateAtoB(fakeA);
        
        float cycleB = l1.forward(reconstructedB, realB);
        
        return cycleLambda * (cycleA + cycleB);
    }
    
    float computeIdentityLoss(const Tensor& realA, const Tensor& realB) {
        // Identity mapping: G_B(A) should be close to A
        Tensor identityA = translateBtoA(realA);
        Tensor identityB = translateAtoB(realB);
        
        L1Loss l1;
        float lossA = l1.forward(identityA, realA);
        float lossB = l1.forward(identityB, realB);
        
        return identityLambda * (lossA + lossB);
    }
};

} // namespace ai
} // namespace nk
```

## 2. StyleTransfer.hpp - Neural Style Transfer

```cpp
// StyleTransfer.hpp - Neural Style Transfer
#pragma once

#include "Model.hpp"

namespace nk {
namespace ai {

// ====================================================================
// VGG FEATURE EXTRACTOR (for style transfer)
// ====================================================================

class VGGFeatureExtractor {
public:
    Sequential features;
    
    // Layers to extract features from
    std::vector<std::string> contentLayers = {"conv4_2"};
    std::vector<std::string> styleLayers = {"conv1_1", "conv2_1", "conv3_1", "conv4_1", "conv5_1"};
    
    VGGFeatureExtractor() {
        // Build VGG-19 feature extractor (simplified)
        
        // Block 1
        features.add<Conv2D>(3, 64, 3, 1, 1);
        features.add<ReLU>();
        features.add<Conv2D>(64, 64, 3, 1, 1);
        features.add<ReLU>();
        features.add<MaxPool2D>(2, 2);
        
        // Block 2
        features.add<Conv2D>(64, 128, 3, 1, 1);
        features.add<ReLU>();
        features.add<Conv2D>(128, 128, 3, 1, 1);
        features.add<ReLU>();
        features.add<MaxPool2D>(2, 2);
        
        // Block 3
        features.add<Conv2D>(128, 256, 3, 1, 1);
        features.add<ReLU>();
        features.add<Conv2D>(256, 256, 3, 1, 1);
        features.add<ReLU>();
        features.add<Conv2D>(256, 256, 3, 1, 1);
        features.add<ReLU>();
        features.add<MaxPool2D>(2, 2);
        
        // Block 4
        features.add<Conv2D>(256, 512, 3, 1, 1);
        features.add<ReLU>();
        features.add<Conv2D>(512, 512, 3, 1, 1);
        features.add<ReLU>();
        
        // ... more blocks
    }
    
    std::unordered_map<std::string, Tensor> extractFeatures(const Tensor& image) {
        std::unordered_map<std::string, Tensor> featuresMap;
        
        Tensor x = image;
        int layerIdx = 0;
        
        for (auto& layer : features.layers) {
            x = layer->forward(x);
            
            std::string layerName = "layer_" + std::to_string(layerIdx);
            featuresMap[layerName] = x;
            
            layerIdx++;
        }
        
        return featuresMap;
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// GRAM MATRIX (for style loss)
// ====================================================================

class GramMatrix {
public:
    static Tensor compute(const Tensor& features) {
        // features: [batch, channels, height, width]
        // Gram matrix: [channels, channels]
        
        if (features.ndim() != 4) {
            throw std::runtime_error("Gram matrix requires 4D tensor");
        }
        
        int batch = features.shape[0];
        int channels = features.shape[1];
        int height = features.shape[2];
        int width = features.shape[3];
        
        // Reshape features to [channels, height*width]
        Tensor reshaped({channels, height * width});
        
        for (int c = 0; c < channels; c++) {
            for (int h = 0; h < height; h++) {
                for (int w = 0; w < width; w++) {
                    int srcIdx = ((batch - 1) * channels + c) * height * width + h * width + w;
                    int dstIdx = c * (height * width) + h * width + w;
                    reshaped.data[dstIdx] = features.data[srcIdx];
                }
            }
        }
        
        // Compute Gram matrix: G = F * F^T
        Tensor reshapedT = reshaped.transpose();
        Tensor gram = reshaped.matmul(reshapedT);
        
        // Normalize by number of elements
        float normalizer = 1.0f / (channels * height * width);
        gram = gram * normalizer;
        
        return gram;
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// NEURAL STYLE TRANSFER
// ====================================================================

class NeuralStyleTransfer {
public:
    std::unique_ptr<VGGFeatureExtractor> vgg;
    
    float contentWeight = 1.0f;
    float styleWeight = 1e6f;
    
    Tensor contentImage;
    Tensor styleImage;
    Tensor generatedImage;
    
    std::unordered_map<std::string, Tensor> contentFeatures;
    std::unordered_map<std::string, Tensor> styleFeatures;
    
    NeuralStyleTransfer() {
        vgg = std::make_unique<VGGFeatureExtractor>();
    }
    
    void setContentImage(const Tensor& image) {
        contentImage = image;
        contentFeatures = vgg->extractFeatures(contentImage);
    }
    
    void setStyleImage(const Tensor& image) {
        styleImage = image;
        styleFeatures = vgg->extractFeatures(styleImage);
    }
    
    void initialize() {
        // Initialize generated image (random or from content)
        generatedImage = contentImage;
        generatedImage.requiresGrad = true;
    }
    
    float computeContentLoss() {
        auto generatedFeatures = vgg->extractFeatures(generatedImage);
        
        MSELoss mse;
        float loss = 0.0f;
        
        for (const auto& layerName : vgg->contentLayers) {
            if (contentFeatures.find(layerName) != contentFeatures.end() &&
                generatedFeatures.find(layerName) != generatedFeatures.end()) {
                
                loss += mse.forward(generatedFeatures[layerName], contentFeatures[layerName]);
            }
        }
        
        return contentWeight * loss;
    }
    
    float computeStyleLoss() {
        auto generatedFeatures = vgg->extractFeatures(generatedImage);
        
        MSELoss mse;
        float loss = 0.0f;
        
        for (const auto& layerName : vgg->styleLayers) {
            if (styleFeatures.find(layerName) != styleFeatures.end() &&
                generatedFeatures.find(layerName) != generatedFeatures.end()) {
                
                Tensor styleGram = GramMatrix::compute(styleFeatures[layerName]);
                Tensor generatedGram = GramMatrix::compute(generatedFeatures[layerName]);
                
                loss += mse.forward(generatedGram, styleGram);
            }
        }
        
        return styleWeight * loss;
    }
    
    float computeTotalLoss() {
        float contentLoss = computeContentLoss();
        float styleLoss = computeStyleLoss();
        
        return contentLoss + styleLoss;
    }
    
    void optimize(int numSteps = 1000, float learningRate = 0.1f) {
        initialize();
        
        for (int step = 0; step < numSteps; step++) {
            float loss = computeTotalLoss();
            
            // Gradient descent on generated image
            // (simplified - would need proper gradient computation)
            
            if (step % 100 == 0) {
                std::cout << "Step " << step << " - Loss: " << loss << std::endl;
            }
        }
    }
    
    Tensor getResult() {
        return generatedImage;
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// FAST STYLE TRANSFER (using trained network)
// ====================================================================

class FastStyleTransfer {
public:
    Sequential transformNetwork;
    
    FastStyleTransfer() {
        // Build transformation network (simplified)
        
        // Encoder
        transformNetwork.add<Conv2D>(3, 32, 9, 1, 4);
        transformNetwork.add<BatchNorm>(32);
        transformNetwork.add<ReLU>();
        
        transformNetwork.add<Conv2D>(32, 64, 3, 2, 1);
        transformNetwork.add<BatchNorm>(64);
        transformNetwork.add<ReLU>();
        
        transformNetwork.add<Conv2D>(64, 128, 3, 2, 1);
        transformNetwork.add<BatchNorm>(128);
        transformNetwork.add<ReLU>();
        
        // Residual blocks (would add ResNet blocks)
        
        // Decoder
        transformNetwork.add<Conv2D>(128, 64, 3, 2, 1);
        transformNetwork.add<BatchNorm>(64);
        transformNetwork.add<ReLU>();
        
        transformNetwork.add<Conv2D>(64, 32, 3, 2, 1);
        transformNetwork.add<BatchNorm>(32);
        transformNetwork.add<ReLU>();
        
        transformNetwork.add<Conv2D>(32, 3, 9, 1, 4);
        transformNetwork.add<Tanh>();
    }
    
    Tensor stylize(const Tensor& contentImage) {
        return transformNetwork.forward(contentImage);
    }
    
    void train(const std::vector<Tensor>& contentImages, const Tensor& styleImage,
              int epochs, Optimizer* optimizer) {
        
        VGGFeatureExtractor vgg;
        auto styleFeatures = vgg.extractFeatures(styleImage);
        
        for (int epoch = 0; epoch < epochs; epoch++) {
            float totalLoss = 0.0f;
            
            for (const auto& contentImage : contentImages) {
                optimizer->zeroGrad();
                
                // Generate stylized image
                Tensor stylized = stylize(contentImage);
                
                // Extract features
                auto contentFeatures = vgg.extractFeatures(contentImage);
                auto stylizedFeatures = vgg.extractFeatures(stylized);
                
                // Content loss
                MSELoss mse;
                float contentLoss = mse.forward(
                    stylizedFeatures["conv4_2"],
                    contentFeatures["conv4_2"]
                );
                
                // Style loss
                float styleLoss = 0.0f;
                for (const auto& layerName : vgg.styleLayers) {
                    Tensor styleGram = GramMatrix::compute(styleFeatures[layerName]);
                    Tensor stylizedGram = GramMatrix::compute(stylizedFeatures[layerName]);
                    
                    styleLoss += mse.forward(stylizedGram, styleGram);
                }
                
                float loss = contentLoss + 1e6f * styleLoss;
                totalLoss += loss;
                
                // Backward
                Tensor grad = mse.backward();
                transformNetwork.backward(grad);
                
                optimizer->step();
            }
            
            std::cout << "Epoch " << (epoch + 1) << " - Loss: " << (totalLoss / contentImages.size()) << std::endl;
        }
    }
};

} // namespace ai
} // namespace nk
```
