# PARTIE 40 : Object Detection + Segmentation + 3D Vision

## 1. ObjectDetection.hpp - Détection d'Objets

```cpp
// ObjectDetection.hpp - Object Detection Models
#pragma once

#include "Model.hpp"

namespace nk {
namespace ai {

// ====================================================================
// BOUNDING BOX
// ====================================================================

struct BoundingBox {
    float x, y, w, h;  // Center x, y, width, height (normalized [0, 1])
    int classId;
    float confidence;
    std::string className;
    
    BoundingBox() : x(0), y(0), w(0), h(0), classId(0), confidence(0) {}
    
    BoundingBox(float x, float y, float w, float h, int cls, float conf)
        : x(x), y(y), w(w), h(h), classId(cls), confidence(conf) {}
    
    // Convert to corner format (x1, y1, x2, y2)
    void toCorners(float& x1, float& y1, float& x2, float& y2) const {
        x1 = x - w * 0.5f;
        y1 = y - h * 0.5f;
        x2 = x + w * 0.5f;
        y2 = y + h * 0.5f;
    }
    
    // IoU (Intersection over Union)
    float iou(const BoundingBox& other) const {
        float x1A, y1A, x2A, y2A;
        float x1B, y1B, x2B, y2B;
        
        toCorners(x1A, y1A, x2A, y2A);
        other.toCorners(x1B, y1B, x2B, y2B);
        
        // Intersection
        float xLeft = std::max(x1A, x1B);
        float yTop = std::max(y1A, y1B);
        float xRight = std::min(x2A, x2B);
        float yBottom = std::min(y2A, y2B);
        
        if (xRight < xLeft || yBottom < yTop) {
            return 0.0f;
        }
        
        float intersectionArea = (xRight - xLeft) * (yBottom - yTop);
        
        // Union
        float boxAArea = (x2A - x1A) * (y2A - y1A);
        float boxBArea = (x2B - x1B) * (y2B - y1B);
        float unionArea = boxAArea + boxBArea - intersectionArea;
        
        return intersectionArea / (unionArea + 1e-6f);
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// NON-MAXIMUM SUPPRESSION
// ====================================================================

class NMS {
public:
    static std::vector<BoundingBox> apply(const std::vector<BoundingBox>& boxes,
                                          float iouThreshold = 0.5f) {
        
        std::vector<BoundingBox> result;
        
        // Sort boxes by confidence
        std::vector<BoundingBox> sorted = boxes;
        std::sort(sorted.begin(), sorted.end(),
                 [](const BoundingBox& a, const BoundingBox& b) {
                     return a.confidence > b.confidence;
                 });
        
        std::vector<bool> suppressed(sorted.size(), false);
        
        for (size_t i = 0; i < sorted.size(); i++) {
            if (suppressed[i]) continue;
            
            result.push_back(sorted[i]);
            
            // Suppress overlapping boxes
            for (size_t j = i + 1; j < sorted.size(); j++) {
                if (suppressed[j]) continue;
                
                if (sorted[i].classId == sorted[j].classId) {
                    float iou = sorted[i].iou(sorted[j]);
                    
                    if (iou > iouThreshold) {
                        suppressed[j] = true;
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        return result;
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// YOLO (You Only Look Once) - Simplified
// ====================================================================

class YOLO {
public:
    Sequential backbone;
    Sequential detectionHead;
    
    int numClasses;
    int gridSize;
    int numAnchors;
    
    std::vector<std::pair<float, float>> anchors;  // Anchor boxes (width, height)
    
    YOLO(int classes = 80, int grid = 13, int anchors = 5)
        : numClasses(classes)
        , gridSize(grid)
        , numAnchors(anchors) {
        
        // Predefined anchors (example values)
        this->anchors = {
            {0.57273f, 0.677385f},
            {1.87446f, 2.06253f},
            {3.33843f, 5.47434f},
            {7.88282f, 3.52778f},
            {9.77052f, 9.16828f}
        };
        
        // Backbone: Feature extractor (like DarkNet)
        buildBackbone();
        
        // Detection head: Predict boxes + classes
        int outputChannels = numAnchors * (5 + numClasses);  // 5 = (x, y, w, h, confidence)
        
        detectionHead.add<Conv2D>(1024, 1024, 3, 1, 1);
        detectionHead.add<BatchNorm>(1024);
        detectionHead.add<ReLU>();
        
        detectionHead.add<Conv2D>(1024, outputChannels, 1, 1, 0);
    }
    
    void buildBackbone() {
        // Simplified Darknet backbone
        
        // Layer 1
        backbone.add<Conv2D>(3, 32, 3, 1, 1);
        backbone.add<BatchNorm>(32);
        backbone.add<ReLU>();
        backbone.add<MaxPool2D>(2, 2);
        
        // Layer 2
        backbone.add<Conv2D>(32, 64, 3, 1, 1);
        backbone.add<BatchNorm>(64);
        backbone.add<ReLU>();
        backbone.add<MaxPool2D>(2, 2);
        
        // Layer 3
        backbone.add<Conv2D>(64, 128, 3, 1, 1);
        backbone.add<BatchNorm>(128);
        backbone.add<ReLU>();
        
        backbone.add<Conv2D>(128, 64, 1, 1, 0);
        backbone.add<BatchNorm>(64);
        backbone.add<ReLU>();
        
        backbone.add<Conv2D>(64, 128, 3, 1, 1);
        backbone.add<BatchNorm>(128);
        backbone.add<ReLU>();
        backbone.add<MaxPool2D>(2, 2);
        
        // More layers...
        backbone.add<Conv2D>(128, 256, 3, 1, 1);
        backbone.add<BatchNorm>(256);
        backbone.add<ReLU>();
        backbone.add<MaxPool2D>(2, 2);
        
        backbone.add<Conv2D>(256, 512, 3, 1, 1);
        backbone.add<BatchNorm>(512);
        backbone.add<ReLU>();
        backbone.add<MaxPool2D>(2, 2);
        
        backbone.add<Conv2D>(512, 1024, 3, 1, 1);
        backbone.add<BatchNorm>(1024);
        backbone.add<ReLU>();
    }
    
    std::vector<BoundingBox> detect(const Tensor& image, float confThreshold = 0.5f) {
        // Forward pass
        Tensor features = backbone.forward(image);
        Tensor predictions = detectionHead.forward(features);
        
        // predictions shape: [1, numAnchors * (5 + numClasses), gridSize, gridSize]
        
        std::vector<BoundingBox> boxes;
        
        int stride = 5 + numClasses;
        
        for (int i = 0; i < gridSize; i++) {
            for (int j = 0; j < gridSize; j++) {
                for (int a = 0; a < numAnchors; a++) {
                    int baseIdx = ((a * stride) * gridSize + i) * gridSize + j;
                    
                    // Extract predictions
                    float tx = predictions.data[baseIdx];
                    float ty = predictions.data[baseIdx + gridSize * gridSize];
                    float tw = predictions.data[baseIdx + 2 * gridSize * gridSize];
                    float th = predictions.data[baseIdx + 3 * gridSize * gridSize];
                    float confidence = predictions.data[baseIdx + 4 * gridSize * gridSize];
                    
                    // Apply sigmoid to tx, ty, confidence
                    tx = 1.0f / (1.0f + std::exp(-tx));
                    ty = 1.0f / (1.0f + std::exp(-ty));
                    confidence = 1.0f / (1.0f + std::exp(-confidence));
                    
                    if (confidence < confThreshold) continue;
                    
                    // Convert to absolute coordinates
                    float bx = (j + tx) / gridSize;
                    float by = (i + ty) / gridSize;
                    float bw = anchors[a].first * std::exp(tw);
                    float bh = anchors[a].second * std::exp(th);
                    
                    // Get class probabilities
                    int maxClass = 0;
                    float maxProb = 0.0f;
                    
                    for (int c = 0; c < numClasses; c++) {
                        int classIdx = baseIdx + (5 + c) * gridSize * gridSize;
                        float prob = predictions.data[classIdx];
                        prob = 1.0f / (1.0f + std::exp(-prob));
                        
                        if (prob > maxProb) {
                            maxProb = prob;
                            maxClass = c;
                        }
                    }
                    
                    float finalConf = confidence * maxProb;
                    
                    if (finalConf >= confThreshold) {
                        boxes.push_back(BoundingBox(bx, by, bw, bh, maxClass, finalConf));
                    }
                }
            }
        }
        
        // Apply NMS
        return NMS::apply(boxes, 0.5f);
    }
    
    std::vector<Tensor*> parameters() {
        auto backboneParams = backbone.parameters();
        auto headParams = detectionHead.parameters();
        
        backboneParams.insert(backboneParams.end(), headParams.begin(), headParams.end());
        return backboneParams;
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// FASTER R-CNN (Region-based CNN)
// ====================================================================

class FasterRCNN {
public:
    Sequential backbone;
    Sequential rpn;  // Region Proposal Network
    Sequential roiHead;  // Region of Interest head
    
    int numClasses;
    
    FasterRCNN(int classes = 80)
        : numClasses(classes) {
        
        // Backbone: ResNet or VGG
        buildBackbone();
        
        // RPN: Generate region proposals
        rpn.add<Conv2D>(512, 512, 3, 1, 1);
        rpn.add<ReLU>();
        
        // Classification (object/not object)
        rpn.add<Conv2D>(512, 18, 1, 1, 0);  // 9 anchors * 2 classes
        
        // Bounding box regression
        rpn.add<Conv2D>(512, 36, 1, 1, 0);  // 9 anchors * 4 coords
        
        // ROI Head: Classify and refine boxes
        roiHead.add<Linear>(7 * 7 * 512, 4096);
        roiHead.add<ReLU>();
        roiHead.add<Dropout>(0.5f);
        
        roiHead.add<Linear>(4096, 4096);
        roiHead.add<ReLU>();
        roiHead.add<Dropout>(0.5f);
        
        // Classification
        roiHead.add<Linear>(4096, numClasses);
        
        // Box regression
        roiHead.add<Linear>(4096, numClasses * 4);
    }
    
    void buildBackbone() {
        // Simplified ResNet-50 backbone
        
        backbone.add<Conv2D>(3, 64, 7, 2, 3);
        backbone.add<BatchNorm>(64);
        backbone.add<ReLU>();
        backbone.add<MaxPool2D>(3, 2);
        
        // ResNet blocks (simplified)
        backbone.add<Conv2D>(64, 256, 1, 1, 0);
        backbone.add<BatchNorm>(256);
        backbone.add<ReLU>();
        
        backbone.add<Conv2D>(256, 512, 3, 2, 1);
        backbone.add<BatchNorm>(512);
        backbone.add<ReLU>();
    }
    
    std::vector<BoundingBox> detect(const Tensor& image) {
        // Extract features
        Tensor features = backbone.forward(image);
        
        // Generate region proposals
        Tensor proposals = rpn.forward(features);
        
        // For each proposal, classify and refine
        std::vector<BoundingBox> detections;
        
        // ... (would implement ROI pooling and classification)
        
        return detections;
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// MASK R-CNN (Instance Segmentation)
// ====================================================================

class MaskRCNN : public FasterRCNN {
public:
    Sequential maskHead;
    
    MaskRCNN(int classes = 80)
        : FasterRCNN(classes) {
        
        // Mask prediction head
        maskHead.add<Conv2D>(256, 256, 3, 1, 1);
        maskHead.add<ReLU>();
        
        maskHead.add<Conv2D>(256, 256, 3, 1, 1);
        maskHead.add<ReLU>();
        
        maskHead.add<Conv2D>(256, 256, 3, 1, 1);
        maskHead.add<ReLU>();
        
        maskHead.add<Conv2D>(256, 256, 3, 1, 1);
        maskHead.add<ReLU>();
        
        // Output mask
        maskHead.add<Conv2D>(256, numClasses, 1, 1, 0);
        maskHead.add<Sigmoid>();
    }
    
    struct Detection {
        BoundingBox box;
        Tensor mask;  // Binary mask [height, width]
    };
    
    std::vector<Detection> detectWithMasks(const Tensor& image) {
        // Detect objects
        auto boxes = detect(image);
        
        std::vector<Detection> results;
        
        for (const auto& box : boxes) {
            Detection det;
            det.box = box;
            
            // Generate mask for this detection
            // ... (would extract ROI and predict mask)
            
            results.push_back(det);
        }
        
        return results;
    }
};

} // namespace ai
} // namespace nk
```

## 2. Segmentation.hpp - Semantic Segmentation

```cpp
// Segmentation.hpp - Semantic Segmentation Models
#pragma once

#include "Model.hpp"

namespace nk {
namespace ai {

// ====================================================================
// U-NET (Semantic Segmentation)
// ====================================================================

class UNetSegmentation {
public:
    int numClasses;
    
    // Encoder
    std::vector<std::unique_ptr<Sequential>> encoderBlocks;
    std::vector<std::unique_ptr<MaxPool2D>> pools;
    
    // Bottleneck
    std::unique_ptr<Sequential> bottleneck;
    
    // Decoder
    std::vector<std::unique_ptr<Sequential>> decoderBlocks;
    
    // Output
    std::unique_ptr<Conv2D> outputConv;
    
    UNetSegmentation(int inputChannels = 3, int classes = 21, int baseFilters = 64)
        : numClasses(classes) {
        
        // Encoder path
        int filters = baseFilters;
        
        for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
            auto block = std::make_unique<Sequential>();
            
            int inChannels = (i == 0) ? inputChannels : filters / 2;
            
            block->add<Conv2D>(inChannels, filters, 3, 1, 1);
            block->add<BatchNorm>(filters);
            block->add<ReLU>();
            
            block->add<Conv2D>(filters, filters, 3, 1, 1);
            block->add<BatchNorm>(filters);
            block->add<ReLU>();
            
            encoderBlocks.push_back(std::move(block));
            pools.push_back(std::make_unique<MaxPool2D>(2, 2));
            
            filters *= 2;
        }
        
        // Bottleneck
        bottleneck = std::make_unique<Sequential>();
        bottleneck->add<Conv2D>(filters / 2, filters, 3, 1, 1);
        bottleneck->add<BatchNorm>(filters);
        bottleneck->add<ReLU>();
        
        bottleneck->add<Conv2D>(filters, filters, 3, 1, 1);
        bottleneck->add<BatchNorm>(filters);
        bottleneck->add<ReLU>();
        
        // Decoder path
        for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
            auto block = std::make_unique<Sequential>();
            
            int inChannels = filters;
            filters /= 2;
            
            // Upsampling (simplified - would use transposed convolution)
            block->add<Conv2D>(inChannels, filters, 3, 1, 1);
            block->add<BatchNorm>(filters);
            block->add<ReLU>();
            
            // After concatenation with skip connection
            block->add<Conv2D>(filters * 2, filters, 3, 1, 1);
            block->add<BatchNorm>(filters);
            block->add<ReLU>();
            
            block->add<Conv2D>(filters, filters, 3, 1, 1);
            block->add<BatchNorm>(filters);
            block->add<ReLU>();
            
            decoderBlocks.push_back(std::move(block));
        }
        
        // Output layer
        outputConv = std::make_unique<Conv2D>(baseFilters, numClasses, 1, 1, 0);
    }
    
    Tensor forward(const Tensor& input) {
        std::vector<Tensor> skipConnections;
        
        // Encoder
        Tensor x = input;
        
        for (size_t i = 0; i < encoderBlocks.size(); i++) {
            x = encoderBlocks[i]->forward(x);
            skipConnections.push_back(x);
            x = pools[i]->forward(x);
        }
        
        // Bottleneck
        x = bottleneck->forward(x);
        
        // Decoder
        for (size_t i = 0; i < decoderBlocks.size(); i++) {
            // Upsample (simplified)
            // x = upsample(x)
            
            // Concatenate with skip connection
            Tensor skip = skipConnections[skipConnections.size() - 1 - i];
            // x = concatenate(x, skip)
            
            x = decoderBlocks[i]->forward(x);
        }
        
        // Output
        x = outputConv->forward(x);
        
        return x;
    }
    
    std::vector<Tensor*> parameters() {
        std::vector<Tensor*> params;
        
        for (auto& block : encoderBlocks) {
            auto p = block->parameters();
            params.insert(params.end(), p.begin(), p.end());
        }
        
        auto bnParams = bottleneck->parameters();
        params.insert(params.end(), bnParams.begin(), bnParams.end());
        
        for (auto& block : decoderBlocks) {
            auto p = block->parameters();
            params.insert(params.end(), p.begin(), p.end());
        }
        
        auto outParams = outputConv->parameters();
        params.insert(params.end(), outParams.begin(), outParams.end());
        
        return params;
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// DEEPLABV3+ (Atrous Convolution + Encoder-Decoder)
// ====================================================================

class DeepLabV3Plus {
public:
    Sequential backbone;
    Sequential aspp;  // Atrous Spatial Pyramid Pooling
    Sequential decoder;
    
    int numClasses;
    
    DeepLabV3Plus(int classes = 21)
        : numClasses(classes) {
        
        // Backbone (ResNet with atrous convolutions)
        buildBackbone();
        
        // ASPP module
        buildASPP();
        
        // Decoder
        decoder.add<Conv2D>(256, 256, 3, 1, 1);
        decoder.add<BatchNorm>(256);
        decoder.add<ReLU>();
        
        decoder.add<Conv2D>(256, numClasses, 1, 1, 0);
    }
    
    void buildBackbone() {
        // Simplified ResNet backbone with atrous convolutions
        
        backbone.add<Conv2D>(3, 64, 7, 2, 3);
        backbone.add<BatchNorm>(64);
        backbone.add<ReLU>();
        backbone.add<MaxPool2D>(3, 2);
        
        // ResNet blocks (with atrous convolutions at later stages)
        backbone.add<Conv2D>(64, 256, 1, 1, 0);
        backbone.add<BatchNorm>(256);
        backbone.add<ReLU>();
        
        // More layers...
    }
    
    void buildASPP() {
        // Atrous Spatial Pyramid Pooling
        // Multiple parallel convolutions with different dilation rates
        
        // Branch 1: 1x1 convolution
        aspp.add<Conv2D>(256, 256, 1, 1, 0);
        aspp.add<BatchNorm>(256);
        aspp.add<ReLU>();
        
        // Branches 2-4: 3x3 convolutions with atrous rates 6, 12, 18
        // (simplified - would need actual atrous convolutions)
        
        // Global average pooling branch
        // ...
        
        // Concatenate and project
        aspp.add<Conv2D>(256 * 5, 256, 1, 1, 0);
        aspp.add<BatchNorm>(256);
        aspp.add<ReLU>();
    }
    
    Tensor forward(const Tensor& input) {
        Tensor features = backbone.forward(input);
        Tensor asppOut = aspp.forward(features);
        Tensor output = decoder.forward(asppOut);
        
        return output;
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// SEGMENTATION METRICS
// ====================================================================

class SegmentationMetrics {
public:
    // Pixel Accuracy
    static float pixelAccuracy(const Tensor& pred, const Tensor& target) {
        int correct = 0;
        int total = pred.data.size();
        
        for (size_t i = 0; i < pred.data.size(); i++) {
            int predClass = static_cast<int>(pred.data[i]);
            int targetClass = static_cast<int>(target.data[i]);
            
            if (predClass == targetClass) {
                correct++;
            }
        }
        
        return static_cast<float>(correct) / total;
    }
    
    // Mean IoU (Intersection over Union)
    static float meanIoU(const Tensor& pred, const Tensor& target, int numClasses) {
        std::vector<int> intersection(numClasses, 0);
        std::vector<int> unionArea(numClasses, 0);
        
        for (size_t i = 0; i < pred.data.size(); i++) {
            int predClass = static_cast<int>(pred.data[i]);
            int targetClass = static_cast<int>(target.data[i]);
            
            if (predClass == targetClass) {
                intersection[predClass]++;
            }
            
            unionArea[predClass]++;
            if (predClass != targetClass) {
                unionArea[targetClass]++;
            }
        }
        
        float totalIoU = 0.0f;
        int validClasses = 0;
        
        for (int c = 0; c < numClasses; c++) {
            if (unionArea[c] > 0) {
                float iou = static_cast<float>(intersection[c]) / unionArea[c];
                totalIoU += iou;
                validClasses++;
            }
        }
        
        return validClasses > 0 ? totalIoU / validClasses : 0.0f;
    }
    
    // Dice Coefficient
    static float diceCoefficient(const Tensor& pred, const Tensor& target, int classId) {
        int intersection = 0;
        int predCount = 0;
        int targetCount = 0;
        
        for (size_t i = 0; i < pred.data.size(); i++) {
            int predClass = static_cast<int>(pred.data[i]);
            int targetClass = static_cast<int>(target.data[i]);
            
            if (predClass == classId) predCount++;
            if (targetClass == classId) targetCount++;
            
            if (predClass == classId && targetClass == classId) {
                intersection++;
            }
        }
        
        return (2.0f * intersection) / (predCount + targetCount + 1e-6f);
    }
};

} // namespace ai
} // namespace nk
```

Suite avec **3D Vision (PointNet, 3D Object Detection, Mesh Generation)** dans le prochain message !

# PARTIE 41 : 3D Vision + PointNet + Mesh Generation

## 1. PointNet.hpp - Point Cloud Deep Learning

```cpp
// PointNet.hpp - Point Cloud Neural Networks
#pragma once

#include "Model.hpp"

namespace nk {
namespace ai {

// ====================================================================
// POINT CLOUD (3D Point Data)
// ====================================================================

struct PointCloud {
    std::vector<Vec3> points;
    std::vector<Vec3> normals;
    std::vector<Vec3> colors;
    
    PointCloud() = default;
    
    void addPoint(const Vec3& point) {
        points.push_back(point);
    }
    
    void addPoint(const Vec3& point, const Vec3& normal, const Vec3& color) {
        points.push_back(point);
        normals.push_back(normal);
        colors.push_back(color);
    }
    
    int size() const {
        return static_cast<int>(points.size());
    }
    
    // Convert to tensor [numPoints, 3] or [numPoints, 6] with normals
    Tensor toTensor(bool includeNormals = false) const {
        int channels = includeNormals ? 6 : 3;
        Tensor tensor({static_cast<int>(points.size()), channels});
        
        for (size_t i = 0; i < points.size(); i++) {
            tensor.data[i * channels + 0] = points[i].x;
            tensor.data[i * channels + 1] = points[i].y;
            tensor.data[i * channels + 2] = points[i].z;
            
            if (includeNormals && i < normals.size()) {
                tensor.data[i * channels + 3] = normals[i].x;
                tensor.data[i * channels + 4] = normals[i].y;
                tensor.data[i * channels + 5] = normals[i].z;
            }
        }
        
        return tensor;
    }
    
    // Sample random points
    PointCloud sample(int numPoints) const {
        PointCloud sampled;
        
        Random& rng = Random::global();
        
        for (int i = 0; i < numPoints; i++) {
            int idx = rng.nextInt(points.size());
            sampled.addPoint(points[idx]);
            
            if (idx < normals.size()) {
                sampled.normals.push_back(normals[idx]);
            }
            
            if (idx < colors.size()) {
                sampled.colors.push_back(colors[idx]);
            }
        }
        
        return sampled;
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// T-NET (Spatial Transformer Network for PointNet)
// ====================================================================

class TNet : public Layer {
public:
    int inputDim;
    
    Sequential mlp;
    std::unique_ptr<Linear> fc1, fc2, fc3;
    
    Tensor identity;  // Identity matrix for regularization
    
    TNet(int dim = 3)
        : inputDim(dim) {
        
        // Shared MLP
        mlp.add<Linear>(dim, 64);
        mlp.add<ReLU>();
        
        mlp.add<Linear>(64, 128);
        mlp.add<ReLU>();
        
        mlp.add<Linear>(128, 1024);
        mlp.add<ReLU>();
        
        // Fully connected layers
        fc1 = std::make_unique<Linear>(1024, 512);
        fc2 = std::make_unique<Linear>(512, 256);
        fc3 = std::make_unique<Linear>(256, dim * dim);
        
        // Initialize identity matrix
        identity = Tensor({dim, dim});
        for (int i = 0; i < dim; i++) {
            identity.data[i * dim + i] = 1.0f;
        }
    }
    
    Tensor forward(const Tensor& input) override {
        // input: [numPoints, inputDim]
        
        int numPoints = input.shape[0];
        
        // Apply MLP to each point
        Tensor x = mlp.forward(input);
        
        // Max pooling across points (global feature)
        Tensor globalFeature({1024});
        
        for (int i = 0; i < 1024; i++) {
            float maxVal = -std::numeric_limits<float>::infinity();
            
            for (int p = 0; p < numPoints; p++) {
                maxVal = std::max(maxVal, x.data[p * 1024 + i]);
            }
            
            globalFeature.data[i] = maxVal;
        }
        
        // Fully connected layers
        Tensor h = fc1->forward(globalFeature);
        h = h.relu();
        
        h = fc2->forward(h);
        h = h.relu();
        
        h = fc3->forward(h);
        
        // Add identity to make it easier to learn identity transform
        Tensor transformMatrix({inputDim, inputDim});
        
        for (int i = 0; i < inputDim * inputDim; i++) {
            transformMatrix.data[i] = h.data[i] + identity.data[i];
        }
        
        return transformMatrix;
    }
    
    void backward(const Tensor& gradOutput) override {
        // Backprop through T-Net
    }
    
    std::vector<Tensor*> parameters() override {
        auto params = mlp.parameters();
        
        auto fc1Params = fc1->parameters();
        params.insert(params.end(), fc1Params.begin(), fc1Params.end());
        
        auto fc2Params = fc2->parameters();
        params.insert(params.end(), fc2Params.begin(), fc2Params.end());
        
        auto fc3Params = fc3->parameters();
        params.insert(params.end(), fc3Params.begin(), fc3Params.end());
        
        return params;
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// POINTNET (Classification & Segmentation)
// ====================================================================

class PointNet : public Layer {
public:
    int numClasses;
    bool segmentation;
    
    std::unique_ptr<TNet> inputTransform;
    std::unique_ptr<TNet> featureTransform;
    
    Sequential mlp1;  // Shared MLP 1
    Sequential mlp2;  // Shared MLP 2
    
    Sequential classifier;  // For classification
    Sequential segmentationHead;  // For segmentation
    
    PointNet(int classes = 10, bool seg = false)
        : numClasses(classes)
        , segmentation(seg) {
        
        // Input transform (3x3)
        inputTransform = std::make_unique<TNet>(3);
        
        // First MLP
        mlp1.add<Linear>(3, 64);
        mlp1.add<ReLU>();
        
        mlp1.add<Linear>(64, 64);
        mlp1.add<ReLU>();
        
        // Feature transform (64x64)
        featureTransform = std::make_unique<TNet>(64);
        
        // Second MLP
        mlp2.add<Linear>(64, 64);
        mlp2.add<ReLU>();
        
        mlp2.add<Linear>(64, 128);
        mlp2.add<ReLU>();
        
        mlp2.add<Linear>(128, 1024);
        mlp2.add<ReLU>();
        
        if (segmentation) {
            // Segmentation head
            segmentationHead.add<Linear>(1088, 512);  // 1088 = 1024 (global) + 64 (local)
            segmentationHead.add<ReLU>();
            
            segmentationHead.add<Linear>(512, 256);
            segmentationHead.add<ReLU>();
            
            segmentationHead.add<Linear>(256, 128);
            segmentationHead.add<ReLU>();
            
            segmentationHead.add<Linear>(128, numClasses);
        } else {
            // Classification head
            classifier.add<Linear>(1024, 512);
            classifier.add<ReLU>();
            classifier.add<Dropout>(0.3f);
            
            classifier.add<Linear>(512, 256);
            classifier.add<ReLU>();
            classifier.add<Dropout>(0.3f);
            
            classifier.add<Linear>(256, numClasses);
        }
    }
    
    Tensor forward(const Tensor& input) override {
        // input: [numPoints, 3]
        
        int numPoints = input.shape[0];
        
        // Input transform
        Tensor transformMatrix = inputTransform->forward(input);
        Tensor transformedInput = input.matmul(transformMatrix);
        
        // First MLP
        Tensor x = mlp1.forward(transformedInput);
        
        // Feature transform
        Tensor featureTransformMatrix = featureTransform->forward(x);
        Tensor transformedFeatures = x.matmul(featureTransformMatrix);
        
        // Second MLP
        Tensor features = mlp2.forward(transformedFeatures);
        
        // Max pooling (global feature)
        Tensor globalFeature({1024});
        
        for (int i = 0; i < 1024; i++) {
            float maxVal = -std::numeric_limits<float>::infinity();
            
            for (int p = 0; p < numPoints; p++) {
                maxVal = std::max(maxVal, features.data[p * 1024 + i]);
            }
            
            globalFeature.data[i] = maxVal;
        }
        
        if (segmentation) {
            // Concatenate global feature with point features
            Tensor combined({numPoints, 1088});
            
            for (int p = 0; p < numPoints; p++) {
                // Copy point feature (64 dim from after feature transform)
                for (int i = 0; i < 64; i++) {
                    combined.data[p * 1088 + i] = transformedFeatures.data[p * 64 + i];
                }
                
                // Copy global feature
                for (int i = 0; i < 1024; i++) {
                    combined.data[p * 1088 + 64 + i] = globalFeature.data[i];
                }
            }
            
            return segmentationHead.forward(combined);
        } else {
            return classifier.forward(globalFeature);
        }
    }
    
    void backward(const Tensor& gradOutput) override {
        // Backprop through PointNet
    }
    
    std::vector<Tensor*> parameters() override {
        std::vector<Tensor*> params;
        
        auto inputTParams = inputTransform->parameters();
        params.insert(params.end(), inputTParams.begin(), inputTParams.end());
        
        auto mlp1Params = mlp1.parameters();
        params.insert(params.end(), mlp1Params.begin(), mlp1Params.end());
        
        auto featureTParams = featureTransform->parameters();
        params.insert(params.end(), featureTParams.begin(), featureTParams.end());
        
        auto mlp2Params = mlp2.parameters();
        params.insert(params.end(), mlp2Params.begin(), mlp2Params.end());
        
        if (segmentation) {
            auto segParams = segmentationHead.parameters();
            params.insert(params.end(), segParams.begin(), segParams.end());
        } else {
            auto classParams = classifier.parameters();
            params.insert(params.end(), classParams.begin(), classParams.end());
        }
        
        return params;
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// POINTNET++ (Hierarchical Point Set Feature Learning)
// ====================================================================

class PointNetPlusPlus {
public:
    struct SetAbstractionLayer {
        int numPoints;
        float radius;
        int numSamples;
        
        Sequential mlp;
        
        SetAbstractionLayer(int nPoints, float r, int nSamples, const std::vector<int>& mlpDims) 
            : numPoints(nPoints), radius(r), numSamples(nSamples) {
            
            int prevDim = 3;  // xyz
            
            for (int dim : mlpDims) {
                mlp.add<Linear>(prevDim, dim);
                mlp.add<ReLU>();
                mlp.add<BatchNorm>(dim);
                prevDim = dim;
            }
        }
    };
    
    std::vector<std::unique_ptr<SetAbstractionLayer>> saLayers;
    Sequential classifier;
    
    int numClasses;
    
    PointNetPlusPlus(int classes = 10)
        : numClasses(classes) {
        
        // Set abstraction layers
        saLayers.push_back(std::make_unique<SetAbstractionLayer>(
            512, 0.2f, 32, std::vector<int>{64, 64, 128}
        ));
        
        saLayers.push_back(std::make_unique<SetAbstractionLayer>(
            128, 0.4f, 64, std::vector<int>{128, 128, 256}
        ));
        
        // Global feature extraction
        saLayers.push_back(std::make_unique<SetAbstractionLayer>(
            0, 0.0f, 0, std::vector<int>{256, 512, 1024}
        ));
        
        // Classifier
        classifier.add<Linear>(1024, 512);
        classifier.add<ReLU>();
        classifier.add<Dropout>(0.5f);
        
        classifier.add<Linear>(512, 256);
        classifier.add<ReLU>();
        classifier.add<Dropout>(0.5f);
        
        classifier.add<Linear>(256, numClasses);
    }
    
    Tensor forward(const Tensor& input) {
        // Hierarchical feature extraction
        Tensor x = input;
        
        for (auto& layer : saLayers) {
            // FPS sampling + Ball query + PointNet
            // (simplified implementation)
            x = layer->mlp.forward(x);
        }
        
        return classifier.forward(x);
    }
};

} // namespace ai
} // namespace nk
```

## 2. MeshGeneration.hpp - Génération de Maillages 3D

```cpp
// MeshGeneration.hpp - 3D Mesh Generation
#pragma once

#include "Model.hpp"
#include "PointNet.hpp"

namespace nk {
namespace ai {

// ====================================================================
// 3D MESH
// ====================================================================

struct Mesh3D {
    std::vector<Vec3> vertices;
    std::vector<Vec3> normals;
    std::vector<Vec2> texCoords;
    std::vector<uint32_t> indices;  // Triangle indices
    
    void addVertex(const Vec3& vertex) {
        vertices.push_back(vertex);
    }
    
    void addTriangle(uint32_t i0, uint32_t i1, uint32_t i2) {
        indices.push_back(i0);
        indices.push_back(i1);
        indices.push_back(i2);
    }
    
    void computeNormals() {
        normals.clear();
        normals.resize(vertices.size(), Vec3::zero());
        
        // Compute face normals and accumulate to vertices
        for (size_t i = 0; i < indices.size(); i += 3) {
            uint32_t i0 = indices[i];
            uint32_t i1 = indices[i + 1];
            uint32_t i2 = indices[i + 2];
            
            Vec3 v0 = vertices[i0];
            Vec3 v1 = vertices[i1];
            Vec3 v2 = vertices[i2];
            
            Vec3 edge1 = v1 - v0;
            Vec3 edge2 = v2 - v0;
            Vec3 faceNormal = edge1.cross(edge2).normalized();
            
            normals[i0] += faceNormal;
            normals[i1] += faceNormal;
            normals[i2] += faceNormal;
        }
        
        // Normalize vertex normals
        for (auto& normal : normals) {
            normal = normal.normalized();
        }
    }
    
    PointCloud toPointCloud(int numSamples = 1000) const {
        PointCloud pc;
        
        Random& rng = Random::global();
        
        for (int i = 0; i < numSamples; i++) {
            // Random triangle
            size_t triIdx = rng.nextInt(indices.size() / 3) * 3;
            
            Vec3 v0 = vertices[indices[triIdx]];
            Vec3 v1 = vertices[indices[triIdx + 1]];
            Vec3 v2 = vertices[indices[triIdx + 2]];
            
            // Random barycentric coordinates
            float u = rng.nextFloat();
            float v = rng.nextFloat();
            
            if (u + v > 1.0f) {
                u = 1.0f - u;
                v = 1.0f - v;
            }
            
            Vec3 point = v0 * (1.0f - u - v) + v1 * u + v2 * v;
            pc.addPoint(point);
        }
        
        return pc;
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// VOXEL GRID (for 3D Shape Representation)
// ====================================================================

class VoxelGrid {
public:
    int resolution;
    std::vector<float> data;  // 1 = occupied, 0 = empty
    
    VoxelGrid(int res = 32)
        : resolution(res) {
        data.resize(res * res * res, 0.0f);
    }
    
    float& at(int x, int y, int z) {
        return data[(z * resolution + y) * resolution + x];
    }
    
    float at(int x, int y, int z) const {
        return data[(z * resolution + y) * resolution + x];
    }
    
    Tensor toTensor() const {
        Tensor tensor({1, 1, resolution, resolution, resolution});
        tensor.data = data;
        return tensor;
    }
    
    void fromTensor(const Tensor& tensor) {
        data = tensor.data;
    }
    
    Mesh3D toMesh() const {
        Mesh3D mesh;
        
        // Marching cubes algorithm (simplified)
        for (int z = 0; z < resolution - 1; z++) {
            for (int y = 0; y < resolution - 1; y++) {
                for (int x = 0; x < resolution - 1; x++) {
                    marchingCubesCell(x, y, z, mesh);
                }
            }
        }
        
        mesh.computeNormals();
        return mesh;
    }
    
private:
    void marchingCubesCell(int x, int y, int z, Mesh3D& mesh) const {
        // Simplified marching cubes for one cell
        
        float threshold = 0.5f;
        
        // Sample 8 corners of cube
        float corners[8] = {
            at(x, y, z),
            at(x+1, y, z),
            at(x+1, y+1, z),
            at(x, y+1, z),
            at(x, y, z+1),
            at(x+1, y, z+1),
            at(x+1, y+1, z+1),
            at(x, y+1, z+1)
        };
        
        // Determine cube index
        int cubeIndex = 0;
        for (int i = 0; i < 8; i++) {
            if (corners[i] > threshold) {
                cubeIndex |= (1 << i);
            }
        }
        
        if (cubeIndex == 0 || cubeIndex == 255) {
            return;  // Empty or fully occupied
        }
        
        // Simplified: just add a triangle at the center
        Vec3 center(
            x + 0.5f,
            y + 0.5f,
            z + 0.5f
        );
        
        uint32_t idx = static_cast<uint32_t>(mesh.vertices.size());
        mesh.addVertex(center);
        mesh.addVertex(center + Vec3(0.1f, 0, 0));
        mesh.addVertex(center + Vec3(0, 0.1f, 0));
        mesh.addTriangle(idx, idx + 1, idx + 2);
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// 3D VAE (Voxel-based)
// ====================================================================

class VoxelVAE {
public:
    Sequential encoder;
    Sequential decoder;
    
    std::unique_ptr<Linear> muLayer;
    std::unique_ptr<Linear> logVarLayer;
    
    int resolution;
    int latentDim;
    
    VoxelVAE(int res = 32, int latDim = 128)
        : resolution(res), latentDim(latDim) {
        
        // 3D Encoder (simplified - would use Conv3D)
        encoder.add<Flatten>();
        encoder.add<Linear>(res * res * res, 512);
        encoder.add<ReLU>();
        
        encoder.add<Linear>(512, 256);
        encoder.add<ReLU>();
        
        muLayer = std::make_unique<Linear>(256, latentDim);
        logVarLayer = std::make_unique<Linear>(256, latentDim);
        
        // 3D Decoder
        decoder.add<Linear>(latentDim, 256);
        decoder.add<ReLU>();
        
        decoder.add<Linear>(256, 512);
        decoder.add<ReLU>();
        
        decoder.add<Linear>(512, res * res * res);
        decoder.add<Sigmoid>();
    }
    
    VoxelGrid generate() {
        Tensor latent({latentDim});
        
        Random& rng = Random::global();
        for (auto& val : latent.data) {
            val = rng.nextGaussian();
        }
        
        Tensor output = decoder.forward(latent);
        
        VoxelGrid grid(resolution);
        grid.fromTensor(output);
        
        return grid;
    }
    
    VoxelGrid reconstruct(const VoxelGrid& input) {
        Tensor inputTensor = input.toTensor();
        Tensor h = encoder.forward(inputTensor);
        
        Tensor mu = muLayer->forward(h);
        Tensor logVar = logVarLayer->forward(h);
        
        // Reparameterize
        Tensor z = mu;  // Simplified
        
        Tensor output = decoder.forward(z);
        
        VoxelGrid result(resolution);
        result.fromTensor(output);
        
        return result;
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// POINT CLOUD TO MESH (using Neural Networks)
// ====================================================================

class PointCloudToMesh {
public:
    std::unique_ptr<PointNet> pointEncoder;
    Sequential meshDecoder;
    
    int maxVertices;
    int maxTriangles;
    
    PointCloudToMesh(int maxVerts = 1000, int maxTris = 2000)
        : maxVertices(maxVerts), maxTriangles(maxTris) {
        
        // Encode point cloud
        pointEncoder = std::make_unique<PointNet>(512, false);
        
        // Decode to mesh (vertices + faces)
        meshDecoder.add<Linear>(512, 1024);
        meshDecoder.add<ReLU>();
        
        meshDecoder.add<Linear>(1024, 2048);
        meshDecoder.add<ReLU>();
        
        // Output vertices (x, y, z for each vertex)
        meshDecoder.add<Linear>(2048, maxVertices * 3);
        meshDecoder.add<Tanh>();
    }
    
    Mesh3D generate(const PointCloud& pointCloud) {
        Tensor pcTensor = pointCloud.toTensor();
        
        // Encode
        Tensor encoding = pointEncoder->forward(pcTensor);
        
        // Decode
        Tensor vertices = meshDecoder.forward(encoding);
        
        // Convert to mesh
        Mesh3D mesh;
        
        for (int i = 0; i < maxVertices; i++) {
            Vec3 vertex(
                vertices.data[i * 3 + 0],
                vertices.data[i * 3 + 1],
                vertices.data[i * 3 + 2]
            );
            mesh.addVertex(vertex);
        }
        
        // Generate faces (simplified - would need face prediction network)
        // For now, just create a simple mesh
        for (int i = 0; i < std::min(100, maxVertices - 2); i++) {
            mesh.addTriangle(i, i + 1, i + 2);
        }
        
        mesh.computeNormals();
        
        return mesh;
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// IMPLICIT FUNCTION NETWORK (for SDF/Occupancy)
// ====================================================================

class ImplicitNet {
public:
    Sequential network;
    
    ImplicitNet(int latentDim = 256) {
        // Input: (x, y, z) position
        // Output: occupancy or SDF value
        
        network.add<Linear>(3, 256);
        network.add<ReLU>();
        
        network.add<Linear>(256, 512);
        network.add<ReLU>();
        
        network.add<Linear>(512, 512);
        network.add<ReLU>();
        
        network.add<Linear>(512, 256);
        network.add<ReLU>();
        
        network.add<Linear>(256, 1);
        network.add<Tanh>();  // Output in [-1, 1]
    }
    
    float query(const Vec3& position) {
        Tensor input({1, 3});
        input.data[0] = position.x;
        input.data[1] = position.y;
        input.data[2] = position.z;
        
        Tensor output = network.forward(input);
        return output.data[0];
    }
    
    Mesh3D extractMesh(int resolution = 64) {
        VoxelGrid grid(resolution);
        
        float step = 2.0f / resolution;
        
        for (int z = 0; z < resolution; z++) {
            for (int y = 0; y < resolution; y++) {
                for (int x = 0; x < resolution; x++) {
                    Vec3 pos(
                        -1.0f + x * step,
                        -1.0f + y * step,
                        -1.0f + z * step
                    );
                    
                    float value = query(pos);
                    grid.at(x, y, z) = (value > 0.0f) ? 1.0f : 0.0f;
                }
            }
        }
        
        return grid.toMesh();
    }
};

} // namespace ai
} // namespace nk
```

# PARTIE 42 : Reinforcement Learning + NLP Avancé

## 1. ReinforcementLearning.hpp - Q-Learning + DQN + Policy Gradient

```cpp
// ReinforcementLearning.hpp - Reinforcement Learning Algorithms
#pragma once

#include "Model.hpp"
#include <deque>
#include <tuple>

namespace nk {
namespace ai {

// ====================================================================
// ENVIRONMENT INTERFACE
// ====================================================================

template<typename State, typename Action>
class Environment {
public:
    virtual ~Environment() = default;
    
    virtual State reset() = 0;
    virtual std::tuple<State, float, bool> step(const Action& action) = 0;
    virtual std::vector<Action> getActionSpace() const = 0;
    virtual int getActionSpaceSize() const = 0;
    virtual int getStateSpaceSize() const = 0;
};

// ====================================================================
// EXPERIENCE REPLAY BUFFER
// ====================================================================

template<typename State, typename Action>
struct Experience {
    State state;
    Action action;
    float reward;
    State nextState;
    bool done;
    
    Experience(const State& s, const Action& a, float r, const State& ns, bool d)
        : state(s), action(a), reward(r), nextState(ns), done(d) {}
};

template<typename State, typename Action>
class ReplayBuffer {
public:
    size_t capacity;
    std::deque<Experience<State, Action>> buffer;
    
    ReplayBuffer(size_t cap = 10000) : capacity(cap) {}
    
    void add(const State& state, const Action& action, float reward,
             const State& nextState, bool done) {
        
        buffer.emplace_back(state, action, reward, nextState, done);
        
        if (buffer.size() > capacity) {
            buffer.pop_front();
        }
    }
    
    std::vector<Experience<State, Action>> sample(size_t batchSize) {
        std::vector<Experience<State, Action>> batch;
        
        Random& rng = Random::global();
        
        for (size_t i = 0; i < batchSize && i < buffer.size(); i++) {
            size_t idx = rng.nextInt(buffer.size());
            batch.push_back(buffer[idx]);
        }
        
        return batch;
    }
    
    size_t size() const {
        return buffer.size();
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// Q-TABLE (Tabular Q-Learning)
// ====================================================================

class QTable {
public:
    int numStates;
    int numActions;
    
    std::vector<std::vector<float>> qValues;
    
    float learningRate = 0.1f;
    float discountFactor = 0.99f;
    float epsilon = 0.1f;  // Exploration rate
    
    QTable(int states, int actions)
        : numStates(states), numActions(actions) {
        
        qValues.resize(numStates, std::vector<float>(numActions, 0.0f));
    }
    
    int selectAction(int state) {
        Random& rng = Random::global();
        
        // Epsilon-greedy
        if (rng.nextFloat() < epsilon) {
            return rng.nextInt(numActions);  // Explore
        } else {
            return getBestAction(state);  // Exploit
        }
    }
    
    int getBestAction(int state) const {
        int bestAction = 0;
        float bestValue = qValues[state][0];
        
        for (int a = 1; a < numActions; a++) {
            if (qValues[state][a] > bestValue) {
                bestValue = qValues[state][a];
                bestAction = a;
            }
        }
        
        return bestAction;
    }
    
    float getQValue(int state, int action) const {
        return qValues[state][action];
    }
    
    void update(int state, int action, float reward, int nextState, bool done) {
        float currentQ = qValues[state][action];
        
        float maxNextQ = 0.0f;
        if (!done) {
            maxNextQ = *std::max_element(
                qValues[nextState].begin(),
                qValues[nextState].end()
            );
        }
        
        // Q-learning update rule
        float targetQ = reward + discountFactor * maxNextQ;
        qValues[state][action] = currentQ + learningRate * (targetQ - currentQ);
    }
    
    void decayEpsilon(float decay = 0.995f, float minEpsilon = 0.01f) {
        epsilon = std::max(epsilon * decay, minEpsilon);
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// DQN (Deep Q-Network)
// ====================================================================

class DQN {
public:
    std::unique_ptr<Sequential> qNetwork;
    std::unique_ptr<Sequential> targetNetwork;
    
    int stateSize;
    int actionSize;
    
    float learningRate = 0.001f;
    float discountFactor = 0.99f;
    float epsilon = 1.0f;
    float epsilonDecay = 0.995f;
    float epsilonMin = 0.01f;
    
    int updateTargetFrequency = 100;
    int stepCount = 0;
    
    ReplayBuffer<Tensor, int> replayBuffer;
    std::unique_ptr<Adam> optimizer;
    
    DQN(int stateDim, int actionDim, int hiddenDim = 128)
        : stateSize(stateDim)
        , actionSize(actionDim)
        , replayBuffer(10000) {
        
        // Q-Network
        qNetwork = std::make_unique<Sequential>();
        qNetwork->add<Linear>(stateDim, hiddenDim);
        qNetwork->add<ReLU>();
        
        qNetwork->add<Linear>(hiddenDim, hiddenDim);
        qNetwork->add<ReLU>();
        
        qNetwork->add<Linear>(hiddenDim, actionDim);
        
        // Target Network (copy of Q-Network)
        targetNetwork = std::make_unique<Sequential>();
        targetNetwork->add<Linear>(stateDim, hiddenDim);
        targetNetwork->add<ReLU>();
        
        targetNetwork->add<Linear>(hiddenDim, hiddenDim);
        targetNetwork->add<ReLU>();
        
        targetNetwork->add<Linear>(hiddenDim, actionDim);
        
        // Copy weights
        updateTargetNetwork();
        
        // Optimizer
        optimizer = std::make_unique<Adam>(learningRate);
        optimizer->setParameters(qNetwork->parameters());
    }
    
    int selectAction(const Tensor& state) {
        Random& rng = Random::global();
        
        // Epsilon-greedy
        if (rng.nextFloat() < epsilon) {
            return rng.nextInt(actionSize);
        } else {
            return getBestAction(state);
        }
    }
    
    int getBestAction(const Tensor& state) {
        qNetwork->eval();
        Tensor qValues = qNetwork->forward(state);
        
        int bestAction = 0;
        float bestValue = qValues.data[0];
        
        for (int a = 1; a < actionSize; a++) {
            if (qValues.data[a] > bestValue) {
                bestValue = qValues.data[a];
                bestAction = a;
            }
        }
        
        return bestAction;
    }
    
    void remember(const Tensor& state, int action, float reward,
                  const Tensor& nextState, bool done) {
        replayBuffer.add(state, action, reward, nextState, done);
    }
    
    void train(int batchSize = 32) {
        if (replayBuffer.size() < batchSize) {
            return;
        }
        
        qNetwork->train();
        
        auto batch = replayBuffer.sample(batchSize);
        
        float totalLoss = 0.0f;
        
        for (const auto& exp : batch) {
            // Predict Q-values for current state
            Tensor qValues = qNetwork->forward(exp.state);
            
            // Compute target Q-value
            float targetQ;
            
            if (exp.done) {
                targetQ = exp.reward;
            } else {
                targetNetwork->eval();
                Tensor nextQValues = targetNetwork->forward(exp.nextState);
                
                float maxNextQ = *std::max_element(
                    nextQValues.data.begin(),
                    nextQValues.data.end()
                );
                
                targetQ = exp.reward + discountFactor * maxNextQ;
            }
            
            // Create target tensor
            Tensor target = qValues;
            target.data[exp.action] = targetQ;
            
            // Compute loss (MSE)
            MSELoss loss;
            float lossValue = loss.forward(qValues, target);
            totalLoss += lossValue;
            
            // Backward
            Tensor grad = loss.backward();
            qNetwork->backward(grad);
        }
        
        // Update weights
        optimizer->step();
        optimizer->zeroGrad();
        
        // Decay epsilon
        epsilon = std::max(epsilon * epsilonDecay, epsilonMin);
        
        // Update target network periodically
        stepCount++;
        if (stepCount % updateTargetFrequency == 0) {
            updateTargetNetwork();
        }
    }
    
    void updateTargetNetwork() {
        auto qParams = qNetwork->parameters();
        auto targetParams = targetNetwork->parameters();
        
        for (size_t i = 0; i < qParams.size(); i++) {
            targetParams[i]->data = qParams[i]->data;
        }
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// POLICY GRADIENT (REINFORCE)
// ====================================================================

class PolicyGradient {
public:
    std::unique_ptr<Sequential> policy;
    
    int stateSize;
    int actionSize;
    
    float learningRate = 0.001f;
    float discountFactor = 0.99f;
    
    std::unique_ptr<Adam> optimizer;
    
    // Episode memory
    std::vector<Tensor> states;
    std::vector<int> actions;
    std::vector<float> rewards;
    
    PolicyGradient(int stateDim, int actionDim, int hiddenDim = 128)
        : stateSize(stateDim), actionSize(actionDim) {
        
        // Policy network
        policy = std::make_unique<Sequential>();
        policy->add<Linear>(stateDim, hiddenDim);
        policy->add<ReLU>();
        
        policy->add<Linear>(hiddenDim, hiddenDim);
        policy->add<ReLU>();
        
        policy->add<Linear>(hiddenDim, actionDim);
        policy->add<Softmax>();
        
        // Optimizer
        optimizer = std::make_unique<Adam>(learningRate);
        optimizer->setParameters(policy->parameters());
    }
    
    int selectAction(const Tensor& state) {
        policy->eval();
        Tensor probabilities = policy->forward(state);
        
        // Sample action from probability distribution
        Random& rng = Random::global();
        float r = rng.nextFloat();
        float cumProb = 0.0f;
        
        for (int a = 0; a < actionSize; a++) {
            cumProb += probabilities.data[a];
            if (r <= cumProb) {
                return a;
            }
        }
        
        return actionSize - 1;
    }
    
    void remember(const Tensor& state, int action, float reward) {
        states.push_back(state);
        actions.push_back(action);
        rewards.push_back(reward);
    }
    
    void train() {
        if (states.empty()) return;
        
        // Compute returns (discounted cumulative rewards)
        std::vector<float> returns(rewards.size());
        float G = 0.0f;
        
        for (int t = static_cast<int>(rewards.size()) - 1; t >= 0; t--) {
            G = rewards[t] + discountFactor * G;
            returns[t] = G;
        }
        
        // Normalize returns
        float mean = 0.0f;
        for (float r : returns) mean += r;
        mean /= returns.size();
        
        float stddev = 0.0f;
        for (float r : returns) stddev += (r - mean) * (r - mean);
        stddev = std::sqrt(stddev / returns.size());
        
        for (float& r : returns) {
            r = (r - mean) / (stddev + 1e-8f);
        }
        
        // Update policy
        policy->train();
        
        for (size_t t = 0; t < states.size(); t++) {
            Tensor probabilities = policy->forward(states[t]);
            
            // Compute log probability of taken action
            float prob = probabilities.data[actions[t]];
            float logProb = std::log(prob + 1e-8f);
            
            // Policy gradient loss: -log(pi(a|s)) * G
            float loss = -logProb * returns[t];
            
            // Backward (simplified)
            Tensor grad({actionSize});
            grad.data[actions[t]] = -returns[t] / (prob + 1e-8f);
            
            policy->backward(grad);
        }
        
        optimizer->step();
        optimizer->zeroGrad();
        
        // Clear episode memory
        states.clear();
        actions.clear();
        rewards.clear();
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// ACTOR-CRITIC (A2C)
// ====================================================================

class ActorCritic {
public:
    std::unique_ptr<Sequential> actor;   // Policy network
    std::unique_ptr<Sequential> critic;  // Value network
    
    int stateSize;
    int actionSize;
    
    float actorLR = 0.001f;
    float criticLR = 0.005f;
    float discountFactor = 0.99f;
    
    std::unique_ptr<Adam> actorOptimizer;
    std::unique_ptr<Adam> criticOptimizer;
    
    ActorCritic(int stateDim, int actionDim, int hiddenDim = 128)
        : stateSize(stateDim), actionSize(actionDim) {
        
        // Actor network
        actor = std::make_unique<Sequential>();
        actor->add<Linear>(stateDim, hiddenDim);
        actor->add<ReLU>();
        actor->add<Linear>(hiddenDim, actionDim);
        actor->add<Softmax>();
        
        // Critic network
        critic = std::make_unique<Sequential>();
        critic->add<Linear>(stateDim, hiddenDim);
        critic->add<ReLU>();
        critic->add<Linear>(hiddenDim, 1);
        
        // Optimizers
        actorOptimizer = std::make_unique<Adam>(actorLR);
        actorOptimizer->setParameters(actor->parameters());
        
        criticOptimizer = std::make_unique<Adam>(criticLR);
        criticOptimizer->setParameters(critic->parameters());
    }
    
    int selectAction(const Tensor& state) {
        actor->eval();
        Tensor probabilities = actor->forward(state);
        
        Random& rng = Random::global();
        float r = rng.nextFloat();
        float cumProb = 0.0f;
        
        for (int a = 0; a < actionSize; a++) {
            cumProb += probabilities.data[a];
            if (r <= cumProb) return a;
        }
        
        return actionSize - 1;
    }
    
    void train(const Tensor& state, int action, float reward,
               const Tensor& nextState, bool done) {
        
        actor->train();
        critic->train();
        
        // Compute value estimates
        Tensor value = critic->forward(state);
        
        Tensor nextValue({1});
        if (!done) {
            critic->eval();
            nextValue = critic->forward(nextState);
            critic->train();
        } else {
            nextValue.data[0] = 0.0f;
        }
        
        // TD error (advantage)
        float advantage = reward + discountFactor * nextValue.data[0] - value.data[0];
        
        // Update critic
        Tensor targetValue({1});
        targetValue.data[0] = reward + discountFactor * nextValue.data[0];
        
        MSELoss criticLoss;
        float criticLossValue = criticLoss.forward(value, targetValue);
        
        Tensor criticGrad = criticLoss.backward();
        critic->backward(criticGrad);
        criticOptimizer->step();
        criticOptimizer->zeroGrad();
        
        // Update actor
        Tensor probabilities = actor->forward(state);
        float prob = probabilities.data[action];
        float logProb = std::log(prob + 1e-8f);
        
        Tensor actorGrad({actionSize});
        actorGrad.data[action] = -advantage / (prob + 1e-8f);
        
        actor->backward(actorGrad);
        actorOptimizer->step();
        actorOptimizer->zeroGrad();
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// PPO (Proximal Policy Optimization)
// ====================================================================

class PPO {
public:
    std::unique_ptr<Sequential> actor;
    std::unique_ptr<Sequential> critic;
    std::unique_ptr<Sequential> oldActor;
    
    int stateSize;
    int actionSize;
    
    float actorLR = 0.0003f;
    float criticLR = 0.001f;
    float discountFactor = 0.99f;
    float gae_lambda = 0.95f;
    float clipEpsilon = 0.2f;
    
    int epochs = 10;
    
    std::unique_ptr<Adam> actorOptimizer;
    std::unique_ptr<Adam> criticOptimizer;
    
    // Episode memory
    std::vector<Tensor> states;
    std::vector<int> actions;
    std::vector<float> rewards;
    std::vector<float> values;
    std::vector<bool> dones;
    
    PPO(int stateDim, int actionDim, int hiddenDim = 128)
        : stateSize(stateDim), actionSize(actionDim) {
        
        // Actor
        actor = std::make_unique<Sequential>();
        actor->add<Linear>(stateDim, hiddenDim);
        actor->add<ReLU>();
        actor->add<Linear>(hiddenDim, actionDim);
        actor->add<Softmax>();
        
        // Old actor (for PPO ratio)
        oldActor = std::make_unique<Sequential>();
        oldActor->add<Linear>(stateDim, hiddenDim);
        oldActor->add<ReLU>();
        oldActor->add<Linear>(hiddenDim, actionDim);
        oldActor->add<Softmax>();
        
        // Critic
        critic = std::make_unique<Sequential>();
        critic->add<Linear>(stateDim, hiddenDim);
        critic->add<ReLU>();
        critic->add<Linear>(hiddenDim, 1);
        
        // Optimizers
        actorOptimizer = std::make_unique<Adam>(actorLR);
        actorOptimizer->setParameters(actor->parameters());
        
        criticOptimizer = std::make_unique<Adam>(criticLR);
        criticOptimizer->setParameters(critic->parameters());
    }
    
    int selectAction(const Tensor& state) {
        actor->eval();
        Tensor probabilities = actor->forward(state);
        
        Random& rng = Random::global();
        float r = rng.nextFloat();
        float cumProb = 0.0f;
        
        for (int a = 0; a < actionSize; a++) {
            cumProb += probabilities.data[a];
            if (r <= cumProb) return a;
        }
        
        return actionSize - 1;
    }
    
    void remember(const Tensor& state, int action, float reward, bool done) {
        states.push_back(state);
        actions.push_back(action);
        rewards.push_back(reward);
        dones.push_back(done);
        
        // Compute value
        critic->eval();
        Tensor value = critic->forward(state);
        values.push_back(value.data[0]);
    }
    
    void train() {
        if (states.empty()) return;
        
        // Compute advantages using GAE
        std::vector<float> advantages = computeGAE();
        
        // Update old policy
        updateOldPolicy();
        
        // PPO epochs
        for (int epoch = 0; epoch < epochs; epoch++) {
            for (size_t t = 0; t < states.size(); t++) {
                trainStep(t, advantages[t]);
            }
        }
        
        // Clear memory
        states.clear();
        actions.clear();
        rewards.clear();
        values.clear();
        dones.clear();
    }
    
private:
    std::vector<float> computeGAE() {
        std::vector<float> advantages(states.size());
        float gae = 0.0f;
        
        for (int t = static_cast<int>(states.size()) - 1; t >= 0; t--) {
            float nextValue = (t == static_cast<int>(states.size()) - 1) ? 0.0f : values[t + 1];
            float delta = rewards[t] + discountFactor * nextValue - values[t];
            
            gae = delta + discountFactor * gae_lambda * gae;
            advantages[t] = gae;
        }
        
        return advantages;
    }
    
    void updateOldPolicy() {
        auto actorParams = actor->parameters();
        auto oldActorParams = oldActor->parameters();
        
        for (size_t i = 0; i < actorParams.size(); i++) {
            oldActorParams[i]->data = actorParams[i]->data;
        }
    }
    
    void trainStep(size_t t, float advantage) {
        actor->train();
        critic->train();
        
        // Old policy probability
        oldActor->eval();
        Tensor oldProbs = oldActor->forward(states[t]);
        float oldProb = oldProbs.data[actions[t]];
        
        // New policy probability
        Tensor newProbs = actor->forward(states[t]);
        float newProb = newProbs.data[actions[t]];
        
        // PPO ratio
        float ratio = newProb / (oldProb + 1e-8f);
        
        // Clipped objective
        float clippedRatio = clamp(ratio, 1.0f - clipEpsilon, 1.0f + clipEpsilon);
        float actorLoss = -std::min(ratio * advantage, clippedRatio * advantage);
        
        // Update actor
        Tensor actorGrad({actionSize});
        actorGrad.data[actions[t]] = -advantage * ratio / (newProb + 1e-8f);
        
        actor->backward(actorGrad);
        actorOptimizer->step();
        actorOptimizer->zeroGrad();
        
        // Update critic
        Tensor value = critic->forward(states[t]);
        Tensor targetValue({1});
        targetValue.data[0] = advantage + values[t];
        
        MSELoss criticLoss;
        criticLoss.forward(value, targetValue);
        
        Tensor criticGrad = criticLoss.backward();
        critic->backward(criticGrad);
        criticOptimizer->step();
        criticOptimizer->zeroGrad();
    }
};

} // namespace ai
} // namespace nk
```

Suite avec **NLP Avancé (BERT, GPT, Text Generation)** dans le prochain message !

# PARTIE 43 : NLP Avancé - BERT + GPT + Text Generation

## 1. Tokenizer.hpp - Tokenisation de Texte

```cpp
// Tokenizer.hpp - Text Tokenization
#pragma once

#include "Embedding.hpp"
#include <sstream>
#include <algorithm>
#include <cctype>

namespace nk {
namespace ai {
namespace nlp {

// ====================================================================
// TOKENIZER BASE CLASS
// ====================================================================

class Tokenizer {
public:
    Vocabulary vocab;
    
    virtual ~Tokenizer() = default;
    
    virtual std::vector<std::string> tokenize(const std::string& text) = 0;
    virtual std::vector<int> encode(const std::string& text) = 0;
    virtual std::string decode(const std::vector<int>& tokens) = 0;
    
    void buildVocabFromTexts(const std::vector<std::string>& texts) {
        for (const auto& text : texts) {
            auto tokens = tokenize(text);
            for (const auto& token : tokens) {
                vocab.addWord(token);
            }
        }
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// WHITESPACE TOKENIZER (Simple)
// ====================================================================

class WhitespaceTokenizer : public Tokenizer {
public:
    bool lowercase = true;
    
    std::vector<std::string> tokenize(const std::string& text) override {
        std::vector<std::string> tokens;
        std::stringstream ss(text);
        std::string token;
        
        while (ss >> token) {
            if (lowercase) {
                std::transform(token.begin(), token.end(), token.begin(), ::tolower);
            }
            
            // Remove punctuation
            token.erase(
                std::remove_if(token.begin(), token.end(),
                              [](char c) { return std::ispunct(c); }),
                token.end()
            );
            
            if (!token.empty()) {
                tokens.push_back(token);
            }
        }
        
        return tokens;
    }
    
    std::vector<int> encode(const std::string& text) override {
        auto tokens = tokenize(text);
        return vocab.encode(tokens);
    }
    
    std::string decode(const std::vector<int>& tokens) override {
        auto words = vocab.decode(tokens);
        
        std::string result;
        for (size_t i = 0; i < words.size(); i++) {
            if (i > 0) result += " ";
            result += words[i];
        }
        
        return result;
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// BPE TOKENIZER (Byte-Pair Encoding)
// ====================================================================

class BPETokenizer : public Tokenizer {
public:
    std::unordered_map<std::string, int> merges;
    int numMerges = 1000;
    
    void train(const std::vector<std::string>& texts) {
        // Build initial vocabulary (characters)
        std::unordered_map<std::string, int> wordFreqs;
        
        for (const auto& text : texts) {
            auto words = splitWords(text);
            for (const auto& word : words) {
                wordFreqs[word]++;
            }
        }
        
        // Learn BPE merges
        for (int i = 0; i < numMerges; i++) {
            auto pair = getMostFrequentPair(wordFreqs);
            if (pair.first.empty()) break;
            
            std::string merged = pair.first + pair.second;
            merges[pair.first + " " + pair.second] = i;
            
            // Update word frequencies
            std::unordered_map<std::string, int> newWordFreqs;
            
            for (const auto& [word, freq] : wordFreqs) {
                std::string newWord = replacePair(word, pair.first, pair.second, merged);
                newWordFreqs[newWord] += freq;
            }
            
            wordFreqs = newWordFreqs;
        }
        
        // Build vocabulary from merged tokens
        for (const auto& [word, freq] : wordFreqs) {
            auto tokens = splitIntoTokens(word);
            for (const auto& token : tokens) {
                vocab.addWord(token);
            }
        }
    }
    
    std::vector<std::string> tokenize(const std::string& text) override {
        std::vector<std::string> result;
        
        auto words = splitWords(text);
        
        for (auto word : words) {
            // Apply BPE merges
            for (const auto& [pair, idx] : merges) {
                size_t pos = pair.find(' ');
                std::string first = pair.substr(0, pos);
                std::string second = pair.substr(pos + 1);
                std::string merged = first + second;
                
                word = replacePair(word, first, second, merged);
            }
            
            auto tokens = splitIntoTokens(word);
            result.insert(result.end(), tokens.begin(), tokens.end());
        }
        
        return result;
    }
    
    std::vector<int> encode(const std::string& text) override {
        auto tokens = tokenize(text);
        return vocab.encode(tokens);
    }
    
    std::string decode(const std::vector<int>& tokens) override {
        auto words = vocab.decode(tokens);
        
        std::string result;
        for (const auto& word : words) {
            result += word;
        }
        
        return result;
    }
    
private:
    std::vector<std::string> splitWords(const std::string& text) {
        std::vector<std::string> words;
        std::stringstream ss(text);
        std::string word;
        
        while (ss >> word) {
            // Add space marker
            word += "</w>";
            words.push_back(word);
        }
        
        return words;
    }
    
    std::vector<std::string> splitIntoTokens(const std::string& word) {
        std::vector<std::string> tokens;
        
        for (char c : word) {
            tokens.push_back(std::string(1, c));
        }
        
        return tokens;
    }
    
    std::pair<std::string, std::string> getMostFrequentPair(
        const std::unordered_map<std::string, int>& wordFreqs) {
        
        std::unordered_map<std::string, int> pairFreqs;
        
        for (const auto& [word, freq] : wordFreqs) {
            auto tokens = splitIntoTokens(word);
            
            for (size_t i = 0; i < tokens.size() - 1; i++) {
                std::string pair = tokens[i] + " " + tokens[i + 1];
                pairFreqs[pair] += freq;
            }
        }
        
        std::string bestPair;
        int maxFreq = 0;
        
        for (const auto& [pair, freq] : pairFreqs) {
            if (freq > maxFreq) {
                maxFreq = freq;
                bestPair = pair;
            }
        }
        
        if (bestPair.empty()) {
            return {"", ""};
        }
        
        size_t pos = bestPair.find(' ');
        return {bestPair.substr(0, pos), bestPair.substr(pos + 1)};
    }
    
    std::string replacePair(const std::string& word, const std::string& first,
                           const std::string& second, const std::string& merged) {
        
        std::string result = word;
        std::string pattern = first + second;
        
        size_t pos = 0;
        while ((pos = result.find(pattern, pos)) != std::string::npos) {
            result.replace(pos, pattern.length(), merged);
            pos += merged.length();
        }
        
        return result;
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// WORDPIECE TOKENIZER (BERT-style)
// ====================================================================

class WordPieceTokenizer : public Tokenizer {
public:
    std::string unkToken = "[UNK]";
    std::string maskToken = "[MASK]";
    std::string clsToken = "[CLS]";
    std::string sepToken = "[SEP]";
    
    int maxInputChars = 100;
    
    WordPieceTokenizer() {
        vocab.addWord(unkToken);
        vocab.addWord(maskToken);
        vocab.addWord(clsToken);
        vocab.addWord(sepToken);
    }
    
    std::vector<std::string> tokenize(const std::string& text) override {
        std::vector<std::string> result;
        
        // Basic whitespace tokenization
        std::stringstream ss(text);
        std::string word;
        
        while (ss >> word) {
            if (word.length() > maxInputChars) {
                result.push_back(unkToken);
                continue;
            }
            
            // WordPiece tokenization
            auto subwords = tokenizeWord(word);
            result.insert(result.end(), subwords.begin(), subwords.end());
        }
        
        return result;
    }
    
    std::vector<std::string> tokenizeWord(const std::string& word) {
        std::vector<std::string> subwords;
        
        size_t start = 0;
        
        while (start < word.length()) {
            size_t end = word.length();
            std::string subword;
            bool found = false;
            
            while (start < end) {
                std::string substr = word.substr(start, end - start);
                
                if (start > 0) {
                    substr = "##" + substr;
                }
                
                if (vocab.getIndex(substr) != vocab.unkToken) {
                    subword = substr;
                    found = true;
                    break;
                }
                
                end--;
            }
            
            if (!found) {
                subwords.push_back(unkToken);
                return subwords;
            }
            
            subwords.push_back(subword);
            start = end;
        }
        
        return subwords;
    }
    
    std::vector<int> encode(const std::string& text) override {
        auto tokens = tokenize(text);
        return vocab.encode(tokens);
    }
    
    std::string decode(const std::vector<int>& tokens) override {
        auto words = vocab.decode(tokens);
        
        std::string result;
        for (const auto& word : words) {
            if (word.substr(0, 2) == "##") {
                result += word.substr(2);
            } else {
                if (!result.empty()) result += " ";
                result += word;
            }
        }
        
        return result;
    }
};

} // namespace nlp
} // namespace ai
} // namespace nk
```

## 2. BERT.hpp - Bidirectional Encoder

```cpp
// BERT.hpp - Bidirectional Encoder Representations from Transformers
#pragma once

#include "Transformer.hpp"
#include "Tokenizer.hpp"

namespace nk {
namespace ai {
namespace nlp {

// ====================================================================
// BERT MODEL
// ====================================================================

class BERT {
public:
    int vocabSize;
    int embedDim;
    int numHeads;
    int numLayers;
    int maxSeqLength;
    
    std::unique_ptr<Embedding> tokenEmbedding;
    std::unique_ptr<Embedding> segmentEmbedding;
    std::unique_ptr<PositionalEncoding> posEncoding;
    
    std::vector<std::unique_ptr<TransformerEncoderBlock>> encoderBlocks;
    
    // For MLM (Masked Language Modeling)
    std::unique_ptr<Linear> mlmHead;
    
    // For NSP (Next Sentence Prediction)
    std::unique_ptr<Linear> nspHead;
    
    BERT(int vocab, int dim, int heads, int layers, int maxLen = 512)
        : vocabSize(vocab)
        , embedDim(dim)
        , numHeads(heads)
        , numLayers(layers)
        , maxSeqLength(maxLen) {
        
        // Embeddings
        tokenEmbedding = std::make_unique<Embedding>(vocab, dim);
        segmentEmbedding = std::make_unique<Embedding>(2, dim);  // A/B segments
        posEncoding = std::make_unique<PositionalEncoding>(maxLen, dim);
        
        // Encoder layers
        for (int i = 0; i < numLayers; i++) {
            encoderBlocks.push_back(
                std::make_unique<TransformerEncoderBlock>(dim, heads, dim * 4)
            );
        }
        
        // Prediction heads
        mlmHead = std::make_unique<Linear>(dim, vocab);
        nspHead = std::make_unique<Linear>(dim, 2);
    }
    
    Tensor forward(const std::vector<int>& tokenIds,
                   const std::vector<int>& segmentIds) {
        
        // Token embeddings
        Tensor tokenEmbed = tokenEmbedding->forward(tokenIds);
        
        // Segment embeddings
        Tensor segmentEmbed = segmentEmbedding->forward(segmentIds);
        
        // Add embeddings
        Tensor embeddings = tokenEmbed + segmentEmbed;
        
        // Add positional encoding
        embeddings = posEncoding->apply(embeddings);
        
        // Pass through encoder layers
        Tensor hidden = embeddings;
```
