```cpp
        for (auto& encoder : encoderBlocks) {
            hidden = encoder->forward(hidden);
        }
        
        return hidden;
    }
    
    // Masked Language Modeling
    Tensor predictMaskedTokens(const std::vector<int>& tokenIds,
                               const std::vector<int>& segmentIds) {
        
        Tensor hidden = forward(tokenIds, segmentIds);
        return mlmHead->forward(hidden);
    }
    
    // Next Sentence Prediction
    Tensor predictNextSentence(const std::vector<int>& tokenIds,
                              const std::vector<int>& segmentIds) {
        
        Tensor hidden = forward(tokenIds, segmentIds);
        
        // Use [CLS] token (first token)
        Tensor clsHidden({embedDim});
        for (int i = 0; i < embedDim; i++) {
            clsHidden.data[i] = hidden.data[i];
        }
        
        return nspHead->forward(clsHidden);
    }
    
    // Get embeddings for downstream tasks
    Tensor getEmbeddings(const std::vector<int>& tokenIds,
                        const std::vector<int>& segmentIds) {
        return forward(tokenIds, segmentIds);
    }
    
    std::vector<Tensor*> parameters() {
        std::vector<Tensor*> params;
        
        auto tokenParams = tokenEmbedding->parameters();
        params.insert(params.end(), tokenParams.begin(), tokenParams.end());
        
        auto segmentParams = segmentEmbedding->parameters();
        params.insert(params.end(), segmentParams.begin(), segmentParams.end());
        
        for (auto& encoder : encoderBlocks) {
            auto encParams = encoder->parameters();
            params.insert(params.end(), encParams.begin(), encParams.end());
        }
        
        auto mlmParams = mlmHead->parameters();
        params.insert(params.end(), mlmParams.begin(), mlmParams.end());
        
        auto nspParams = nspHead->parameters();
        params.insert(params.end(), nspParams.begin(), nspParams.end());
        
        return params;
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// BERT PRETRAINING
// ====================================================================

class BERTPretrainer {
public:
    std::unique_ptr<BERT> model;
    std::unique_ptr<WordPieceTokenizer> tokenizer;
    
    float maskProb = 0.15f;
    
    BERTPretrainer(int vocab, int dim, int heads, int layers)
        : tokenizer(std::make_unique<WordPieceTokenizer>()) {
        
        model = std::make_unique<BERT>(vocab, dim, heads, layers);
    }
    
    // Prepare masked input for MLM
    std::tuple<std::vector<int>, std::vector<int>, std::vector<int>>
    prepareMaskedInput(const std::vector<int>& tokenIds) {
        
        std::vector<int> maskedIds = tokenIds;
        std::vector<int> labels(tokenIds.size(), -1);  // -1 = ignore
        
        Random& rng = Random::global();
        int maskToken = tokenizer->vocab.getIndex("[MASK]");
        
        for (size_t i = 1; i < tokenIds.size() - 1; i++) {  // Skip [CLS] and [SEP]
            if (rng.nextFloat() < maskProb) {
                labels[i] = tokenIds[i];
                
                float r = rng.nextFloat();
                
                if (r < 0.8f) {
                    // 80% replace with [MASK]
                    maskedIds[i] = maskToken;
                } else if (r < 0.9f) {
                    // 10% replace with random token
                    maskedIds[i] = rng.nextInt(tokenizer->vocab.size());
                }
                // 10% keep original
            }
        }
        
        std::vector<int> segmentIds(tokenIds.size(), 0);
        
        return {maskedIds, labels, segmentIds};
    }
    
    float trainStep(const std::vector<std::string>& sentences,
                   Optimizer* optimizer) {
        
        optimizer->zeroGrad();
        
        float totalLoss = 0.0f;
        
        for (const auto& sentence : sentences) {
            // Encode
            auto tokenIds = tokenizer->encode(sentence);
            
            // Prepare masked input
            auto [maskedIds, labels, segmentIds] = prepareMaskedInput(tokenIds);
            
            // Forward
            Tensor predictions = model->predictMaskedTokens(maskedIds, segmentIds);
            
            // Compute loss (only on masked positions)
            CrossEntropyLoss loss;
            
            for (size_t i = 0; i < labels.size(); i++) {
                if (labels[i] != -1) {
                    Tensor pred({static_cast<int>(predictions.shape[1])});
                    for (int j = 0; j < static_cast<int>(predictions.shape[1]); j++) {
                        pred.data[j] = predictions.data[i * predictions.shape[1] + j];
                    }
                    
                    Tensor target({static_cast<int>(predictions.shape[1])});
                    target.zeros();
                    target.data[labels[i]] = 1.0f;
                    
                    totalLoss += loss.forward(pred, target);
                }
            }
        }
        
        // Backward
        optimizer->step();
        
        return totalLoss / sentences.size();
    }
};

} // namespace nlp
} // namespace ai
} // namespace nk
```

## 3. GPT.hpp - Generative Pre-trained Transformer

```cpp
// GPT.hpp - Generative Pre-trained Transformer
#pragma once

#include "Transformer.hpp"
#include "Tokenizer.hpp"

namespace nk {
namespace ai {
namespace nlp {

// ====================================================================
// GPT MODEL (Decoder-only Transformer)
// ====================================================================

class GPT {
public:
    int vocabSize;
    int embedDim;
    int numHeads;
    int numLayers;
    int maxSeqLength;
    
    std::unique_ptr<Embedding> tokenEmbedding;
    std::unique_ptr<PositionalEncoding> posEncoding;
    
    std::vector<std::unique_ptr<TransformerEncoderBlock>> decoderBlocks;
    
    std::unique_ptr<Linear> outputProjection;
    
    GPT(int vocab, int dim, int heads, int layers, int maxLen = 1024)
        : vocabSize(vocab)
        , embedDim(dim)
        , numHeads(heads)
        , numLayers(layers)
        , maxSeqLength(maxLen) {
        
        // Embeddings
        tokenEmbedding = std::make_unique<Embedding>(vocab, dim);
        posEncoding = std::make_unique<PositionalEncoding>(maxLen, dim);
        
        // Decoder layers (using encoder blocks with causal masking)
        for (int i = 0; i < numLayers; i++) {
            decoderBlocks.push_back(
                std::make_unique<TransformerEncoderBlock>(dim, heads, dim * 4)
            );
        }
        
        // Output projection to vocabulary
        outputProjection = std::make_unique<Linear>(dim, vocab);
    }
    
    Tensor forward(const std::vector<int>& tokenIds) {
        // Token embeddings
        Tensor embeddings = tokenEmbedding->forward(tokenIds);
        
        // Add positional encoding
        embeddings = posEncoding->apply(embeddings);
        
        // Pass through decoder layers with causal masking
        Tensor hidden = embeddings;
        
        for (auto& decoder : decoderBlocks) {
            // In practice, would apply causal mask here
            hidden = decoder->forward(hidden);
        }
        
        // Project to vocabulary
        Tensor logits = outputProjection->forward(hidden);
        
        return logits;
    }
    
    // Generate text
    std::vector<int> generate(const std::vector<int>& prompt,
                              int maxNewTokens = 50,
                              float temperature = 1.0f,
                              int topK = 50) {
        
        std::vector<int> generated = prompt;
        
        for (int i = 0; i < maxNewTokens; i++) {
            // Get predictions for current sequence
            Tensor logits = forward(generated);
            
            // Get logits for last token
            int lastTokenIdx = (generated.size() - 1) * vocabSize;
            Tensor lastLogits({vocabSize});
            
            for (int j = 0; j < vocabSize; j++) {
                lastLogits.data[j] = logits.data[lastTokenIdx + j];
            }
            
            // Apply temperature
            if (temperature != 1.0f) {
                for (auto& val : lastLogits.data) {
                    val /= temperature;
                }
            }
            
            // Top-k sampling
            int nextToken = sampleTopK(lastLogits, topK);
            
            generated.push_back(nextToken);
            
            // Check for end token
            if (nextToken == tokenEmbedding->vocabSize - 1) {
                break;
            }
        }
        
        return generated;
    }
    
    std::vector<Tensor*> parameters() {
        std::vector<Tensor*> params;
        
        auto tokenParams = tokenEmbedding->parameters();
        params.insert(params.end(), tokenParams.begin(), tokenParams.end());
        
        for (auto& decoder : decoderBlocks) {
            auto decParams = decoder->parameters();
            params.insert(params.end(), decParams.begin(), decParams.end());
        }
        
        auto outParams = outputProjection->parameters();
        params.insert(params.end(), outParams.begin(), outParams.end());
        
        return params;
    }
    
private:
    int sampleTopK(const Tensor& logits, int k) {
        // Get top-k indices
        std::vector<std::pair<float, int>> scored;
        
        for (int i = 0; i < vocabSize; i++) {
            scored.push_back({logits.data[i], i});
        }
        
        std::partial_sort(scored.begin(), scored.begin() + k, scored.end(),
                         [](const auto& a, const auto& b) { return a.first > b.first; });
        
        // Apply softmax to top-k
        Tensor topKLogits({k});
        for (int i = 0; i < k; i++) {
            topKLogits.data[i] = scored[i].first;
        }
        
        Tensor probs = topKLogits.softmax();
        
        // Sample from distribution
        Random& rng = Random::global();
        float r = rng.nextFloat();
        float cumProb = 0.0f;
        
        for (int i = 0; i < k; i++) {
            cumProb += probs.data[i];
            if (r <= cumProb) {
                return scored[i].second;
            }
        }
        
        return scored[k - 1].second;
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// TEXT GENERATOR
// ====================================================================

class TextGenerator {
public:
    std::unique_ptr<GPT> model;
    std::unique_ptr<BPETokenizer> tokenizer;
    
    TextGenerator(int vocab, int dim, int heads, int layers) {
        model = std::make_unique<GPT>(vocab, dim, heads, layers);
        tokenizer = std::make_unique<BPETokenizer>();
    }
    
    std::string generate(const std::string& prompt,
                        int maxTokens = 50,
                        float temperature = 1.0f) {
        
        // Encode prompt
        auto tokenIds = tokenizer->encode(prompt);
        
        // Generate
        auto generated = model->generate(tokenIds, maxTokens, temperature);
        
        // Decode
        return tokenizer->decode(generated);
    }
    
    void train(const std::vector<std::string>& texts,
              int epochs, Optimizer* optimizer) {
        
        CrossEntropyLoss loss;
        
        for (int epoch = 0; epoch < epochs; epoch++) {
            float totalLoss = 0.0f;
            
            for (const auto& text : texts) {
                optimizer->zeroGrad();
                
                // Encode
                auto tokenIds = tokenizer->encode(text);
                
                // Forward
                Tensor logits = model->forward(tokenIds);
                
                // Compute loss (predict next token)
                for (size_t i = 0; i < tokenIds.size() - 1; i++) {
                    Tensor pred({model->vocabSize});
                    for (int j = 0; j < model->vocabSize; j++) {
                        pred.data[j] = logits.data[i * model->vocabSize + j];
                    }
                    
                    Tensor target({model->vocabSize});
                    target.zeros();
                    target.data[tokenIds[i + 1]] = 1.0f;
                    
                    totalLoss += loss.forward(pred, target);
                }
                
                // Backward
                Tensor grad = loss.backward();
                model->decoderBlocks[0]->backward(grad);
                
                optimizer->step();
            }
            
            std::cout << "Epoch " << (epoch + 1) << " - Loss: "
                     << (totalLoss / texts.size()) << std::endl;
        }
    }
};

} // namespace nlp
} // namespace ai
} // namespace nk
```

Suite avec **Sentiment Analysis, Named Entity Recognition, Question Answering** dans le prochain message !

# PARTIE 44 : NLP Applications - Sentiment Analysis + NER + QA + Summarization

## 1. SentimentAnalysis.hpp - Analyse de Sentiment

```cpp
// SentimentAnalysis.hpp - Sentiment Analysis
#pragma once

#include "BERT.hpp"

namespace nk {
namespace ai {
namespace nlp {

// ====================================================================
// SENTIMENT CLASSIFIER
// ====================================================================

class SentimentClassifier {
public:
    std::unique_ptr<BERT> bert;
    std::unique_ptr<Sequential> classifier;
    std::unique_ptr<WordPieceTokenizer> tokenizer;
    
    int numClasses;  // 2 (positive/negative) or 3 (positive/neutral/negative)
    
    SentimentClassifier(int classes = 3, int embedDim = 768)
        : numClasses(classes) {
        
        // BERT encoder
        bert = std::make_unique<BERT>(30000, embedDim, 12, 12);
        
        // Classification head
        classifier = std::make_unique<Sequential>();
        classifier->add<Dropout>(0.1f);
        classifier->add<Linear>(embedDim, 256);
        classifier->add<ReLU>();
        classifier->add<Dropout>(0.1f);
        classifier->add<Linear>(256, numClasses);
        classifier->add<Softmax>();
        
        // Tokenizer
        tokenizer = std::make_unique<WordPieceTokenizer>();
    }
    
    int predict(const std::string& text) {
        // Encode text
        auto tokenIds = tokenizer->encode(text);
        std::vector<int> segmentIds(tokenIds.size(), 0);
        
        // Get BERT embeddings
        Tensor embeddings = bert->forward(tokenIds, segmentIds);
        
        // Use [CLS] token embedding
        Tensor clsEmbedding({bert->embedDim});
        for (int i = 0; i < bert->embedDim; i++) {
            clsEmbedding.data[i] = embeddings.data[i];
        }
        
        // Classify
        Tensor probs = classifier->forward(clsEmbedding);
        
        // Get argmax
        int prediction = 0;
        float maxProb = probs.data[0];
        
        for (int i = 1; i < numClasses; i++) {
            if (probs.data[i] > maxProb) {
                maxProb = probs.data[i];
                prediction = i;
            }
        }
        
        return prediction;
    }
    
    std::vector<float> predictProba(const std::string& text) {
        auto tokenIds = tokenizer->encode(text);
        std::vector<int> segmentIds(tokenIds.size(), 0);
        
        Tensor embeddings = bert->forward(tokenIds, segmentIds);
        
        Tensor clsEmbedding({bert->embedDim});
        for (int i = 0; i < bert->embedDim; i++) {
            clsEmbedding.data[i] = embeddings.data[i];
        }
        
        Tensor probs = classifier->forward(clsEmbedding);
        
        return probs.data;
    }
    
    void train(const std::vector<std::pair<std::string, int>>& dataset,
              int epochs, Optimizer* optimizer) {
        
        CrossEntropyLoss loss;
        
        for (int epoch = 0; epoch < epochs; epoch++) {
            float totalLoss = 0.0f;
            int correct = 0;
            
            for (const auto& [text, label] : dataset) {
                optimizer->zeroGrad();
                
                // Encode
                auto tokenIds = tokenizer->encode(text);
                std::vector<int> segmentIds(tokenIds.size(), 0);
                
                // Forward
                Tensor embeddings = bert->forward(tokenIds, segmentIds);
                
                Tensor clsEmbedding({bert->embedDim});
                for (int i = 0; i < bert->embedDim; i++) {
                    clsEmbedding.data[i] = embeddings.data[i];
                }
                
                Tensor probs = classifier->forward(clsEmbedding);
                
                // Target
                Tensor target({numClasses});
                target.zeros();
                target.data[label] = 1.0f;
                
                // Loss
                float lossValue = loss.forward(probs, target);
                totalLoss += lossValue;
                
                // Accuracy
                int pred = std::distance(probs.data.begin(),
                                        std::max_element(probs.data.begin(), probs.data.end()));
                if (pred == label) correct++;
                
                // Backward
                Tensor grad = loss.backward();
                classifier->backward(grad);
                
                optimizer->step();
            }
            
            float accuracy = static_cast<float>(correct) / dataset.size();
            
            std::cout << "Epoch " << (epoch + 1) << "/" << epochs
                     << " - Loss: " << (totalLoss / dataset.size())
                     << " - Accuracy: " << (accuracy * 100.0f) << "%" << std::endl;
        }
    }
    
    std::string getSentimentLabel(int prediction) const {
        if (numClasses == 2) {
            return prediction == 0 ? "Negative" : "Positive";
        } else {
            if (prediction == 0) return "Negative";
            if (prediction == 1) return "Neutral";
            return "Positive";
        }
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// ASPECT-BASED SENTIMENT ANALYSIS
// ====================================================================

class AspectSentimentAnalyzer {
public:
    std::unique_ptr<SentimentClassifier> classifier;
    
    struct AspectSentiment {
        std::string aspect;
        int sentiment;
        float confidence;
    };
    
    AspectSentimentAnalyzer() {
        classifier = std::make_unique<SentimentClassifier>(3);
    }
    
    std::vector<AspectSentiment> analyze(const std::string& text,
                                         const std::vector<std::string>& aspects) {
        
        std::vector<AspectSentiment> results;
        
        for (const auto& aspect : aspects) {
            // Extract sentences containing the aspect
            auto sentences = extractAspectSentences(text, aspect);
            
            if (sentences.empty()) {
                results.push_back({aspect, 1, 0.0f});  // Neutral
                continue;
            }
            
            // Analyze sentiment for each sentence
            std::vector<float> sentiments;
            std::vector<float> confidences;
            
            for (const auto& sentence : sentences) {
                auto probs = classifier->predictProba(sentence);
                
                int pred = std::distance(probs.begin(),
                                        std::max_element(probs.begin(), probs.end()));
                float conf = probs[pred];
                
                sentiments.push_back(pred);
                confidences.push_back(conf);
            }
            
            // Aggregate (weighted average)
            float totalWeight = 0.0f;
            float weightedSum = 0.0f;
            
            for (size_t i = 0; i < sentiments.size(); i++) {
                weightedSum += sentiments[i] * confidences[i];
                totalWeight += confidences[i];
            }
            
            int avgSentiment = static_cast<int>(std::round(weightedSum / totalWeight));
            float avgConfidence = totalWeight / sentiments.size();
            
            results.push_back({aspect, avgSentiment, avgConfidence});
        }
        
        return results;
    }
    
private:
    std::vector<std::string> extractAspectSentences(const std::string& text,
                                                    const std::string& aspect) {
        
        std::vector<std::string> sentences;
        std::stringstream ss(text);
        std::string sentence;
        
        while (std::getline(ss, sentence, '.')) {
            // Check if aspect is in sentence
            if (sentence.find(aspect) != std::string::npos) {
                sentences.push_back(sentence);
            }
        }
        
        return sentences;
    }
};

} // namespace nlp
} // namespace ai
} // namespace nk
```

## 2. NER.hpp - Named Entity Recognition

```cpp
// NER.hpp - Named Entity Recognition
#pragma once

#include "BERT.hpp"

namespace nk {
namespace ai {
namespace nlp {

// ====================================================================
// ENTITY TYPES
// ====================================================================

enum class EntityType {
    PERSON,
    ORGANIZATION,
    LOCATION,
    DATE,
    TIME,
    MONEY,
    PERCENT,
    PRODUCT,
    EVENT,
    OTHER
};

struct Entity {
    std::string text;
    EntityType type;
    int startPos;
    int endPos;
    float confidence;
    
    std::string getTypeString() const {
        switch (type) {
            case EntityType::PERSON: return "PERSON";
            case EntityType::ORGANIZATION: return "ORG";
            case EntityType::LOCATION: return "LOC";
            case EntityType::DATE: return "DATE";
            case EntityType::TIME: return "TIME";
            case EntityType::MONEY: return "MONEY";
            case EntityType::PERCENT: return "PERCENT";
            case EntityType::PRODUCT: return "PRODUCT";
            case EntityType::EVENT: return "EVENT";
            default: return "OTHER";
        }
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// NER MODEL (Token Classification)
// ====================================================================

class NERModel {
public:
    std::unique_ptr<BERT> bert;
    std::unique_ptr<Sequential> classifier;
    std::unique_ptr<WordPieceTokenizer> tokenizer;
    
    int numEntityTypes;
    
    // BIO tagging: B-ENTITY, I-ENTITY, O (Outside)
    int numTags;
    
    NERModel(int entityTypes = 10, int embedDim = 768)
        : numEntityTypes(entityTypes)
        , numTags(entityTypes * 2 + 1) {  // B-*, I-*, O
        
        // BERT encoder
        bert = std::make_unique<BERT>(30000, embedDim, 12, 12);
        
        // Token classifier
        classifier = std::make_unique<Sequential>();
        classifier->add<Dropout>(0.1f);
        classifier->add<Linear>(embedDim, numTags);
        classifier->add<Softmax>();
        
        // Tokenizer
        tokenizer = std::make_unique<WordPieceTokenizer>();
    }
    
    std::vector<Entity> extractEntities(const std::string& text) {
        // Tokenize
        auto tokens = tokenizer->tokenize(text);
        auto tokenIds = tokenizer->vocab.encode(tokens);
        std::vector<int> segmentIds(tokenIds.size(), 0);
        
        // Get embeddings
        Tensor embeddings = bert->forward(tokenIds, segmentIds);
        
        // Classify each token
        std::vector<int> predictions;
        
        for (int i = 0; i < static_cast<int>(tokens.size()); i++) {
            Tensor tokenEmbedding({bert->embedDim});
            for (int j = 0; j < bert->embedDim; j++) {
                tokenEmbedding.data[j] = embeddings.data[i * bert->embedDim + j];
            }
            
            Tensor probs = classifier->forward(tokenEmbedding);
            
            int pred = std::distance(probs.data.begin(),
                                    std::max_element(probs.data.begin(), probs.data.end()));
            predictions.push_back(pred);
        }
        
        // Convert BIO tags to entities
        return bioToEntities(tokens, predictions);
    }
    
    void train(const std::vector<std::pair<std::string, std::vector<Entity>>>& dataset,
              int epochs, Optimizer* optimizer) {
        
        CrossEntropyLoss loss;
        
        for (int epoch = 0; epoch < epochs; epoch++) {
            float totalLoss = 0.0f;
            
            for (const auto& [text, entities] : dataset) {
                optimizer->zeroGrad();
                
                // Tokenize
                auto tokens = tokenizer->tokenize(text);
                auto tokenIds = tokenizer->vocab.encode(tokens);
                std::vector<int> segmentIds(tokenIds.size(), 0);
                
                // Convert entities to BIO tags
                auto bioTags = entitiesToBIO(tokens, entities);
                
                // Forward
                Tensor embeddings = bert->forward(tokenIds, segmentIds);
                
                float textLoss = 0.0f;
                
                for (size_t i = 0; i < tokens.size(); i++) {
                    Tensor tokenEmbedding({bert->embedDim});
                    for (int j = 0; j < bert->embedDim; j++) {
                        tokenEmbedding.data[j] = embeddings.data[i * bert->embedDim + j];
                    }
                    
                    Tensor probs = classifier->forward(tokenEmbedding);
                    
                    Tensor target({numTags});
                    target.zeros();
                    target.data[bioTags[i]] = 1.0f;
                    
                    textLoss += loss.forward(probs, target);
                }
                
                totalLoss += textLoss / tokens.size();
                
                // Backward
                Tensor grad = loss.backward();
                classifier->backward(grad);
                
                optimizer->step();
            }
            
            std::cout << "Epoch " << (epoch + 1) << "/" << epochs
                     << " - Loss: " << (totalLoss / dataset.size()) << std::endl;
        }
    }
    
private:
    std::vector<int> entitiesToBIO(const std::vector<std::string>& tokens,
                                   const std::vector<Entity>& entities) {
        
        std::vector<int> bioTags(tokens.size(), numTags - 1);  // O tag
        
        for (const auto& entity : entities) {
            // Find token positions (simplified)
            int tokenPos = 0;
            
            for (size_t i = 0; i < tokens.size(); i++) {
                if (tokenPos == entity.startPos) {
                    bioTags[i] = static_cast<int>(entity.type) * 2;  // B-tag
                } else if (tokenPos > entity.startPos && tokenPos < entity.endPos) {
                    bioTags[i] = static_cast<int>(entity.type) * 2 + 1;  // I-tag
                }
                
                tokenPos += tokens[i].length();
            }
        }
        
        return bioTags;
    }
    
    std::vector<Entity> bioToEntities(const std::vector<std::string>& tokens,
                                     const std::vector<int>& bioTags) {
        
        std::vector<Entity> entities;
        
        int currentStart = -1;
        EntityType currentType = EntityType::OTHER;
        std::string currentText;
        
        for (size_t i = 0; i < tokens.size(); i++) {
            int tag = bioTags[i];
            
            if (tag == numTags - 1) {  // O tag
                if (currentStart != -1) {
                    entities.push_back({currentText, currentType, currentStart, static_cast<int>(i), 1.0f});
                    currentStart = -1;
                    currentText.clear();
                }
            } else if (tag % 2 == 0) {  // B-tag
                if (currentStart != -1) {
                    entities.push_back({currentText, currentType, currentStart, static_cast<int>(i), 1.0f});
                }
                
                currentStart = i;
                currentType = static_cast<EntityType>(tag / 2);
                currentText = tokens[i];
            } else {  // I-tag
                if (currentStart != -1) {
                    currentText += " " + tokens[i];
                }
            }
        }
        
        if (currentStart != -1) {
            entities.push_back({currentText, currentType, currentStart, static_cast<int>(tokens.size()), 1.0f});
        }
        
        return entities;
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// RELATION EXTRACTION
// ====================================================================

class RelationExtractor {
public:
    struct Relation {
        Entity subject;
        std::string predicate;
        Entity object;
        float confidence;
    };
    
    std::unique_ptr<NERModel> nerModel;
    std::unique_ptr<Sequential> relationClassifier;
    
    RelationExtractor() {
        nerModel = std::make_unique<NERModel>();
        
        // Relation classifier
        relationClassifier = std::make_unique<Sequential>();
        relationClassifier->add<Linear>(768 * 3, 256);  // subject + predicate + object embeddings
        relationClassifier->add<ReLU>();
        relationClassifier->add<Linear>(256, 10);  // 10 relation types
        relationClassifier->add<Softmax>();
    }
    
    std::vector<Relation> extractRelations(const std::string& text) {
        // Extract entities
        auto entities = nerModel->extractEntities(text);
        
        std::vector<Relation> relations;
        
        // Find relations between entity pairs
        for (size_t i = 0; i < entities.size(); i++) {
            for (size_t j = i + 1; j < entities.size(); j++) {
                // Extract context between entities
                std::string context = extractContext(text, entities[i], entities[j]);
                
                // Classify relation
                // ... (would use relation classifier)
                
                // For now, simple heuristic
                if (entities[i].type == EntityType::PERSON &&
                    entities[j].type == EntityType::ORGANIZATION) {
                    
                    relations.push_back({
                        entities[i],
                        "works_for",
                        entities[j],
                        0.8f
                    });
                }
            }
        }
        
        return relations;
    }
    
private:
    std::string extractContext(const std::string& text,
                               const Entity& e1, const Entity& e2) {
        
        int start = std::min(e1.endPos, e2.endPos);
        int end = std::max(e1.startPos, e2.startPos);
        
        if (start >= end) return "";
        
        return text.substr(start, end - start);
    }
};

} // namespace nlp
} // namespace ai
} // namespace nk
```

## 3. QuestionAnswering.hpp - Question Answering

```cpp
// QuestionAnswering.hpp - Question Answering System
#pragma once

#include "BERT.hpp"

namespace nk {
namespace ai {
namespace nlp {

// ====================================================================
// EXTRACTIVE QA (SQuAD-style)
// ====================================================================

class ExtractiveQA {
public:
    std::unique_ptr<BERT> bert;
    std::unique_ptr<Linear> startPredictor;
    std::unique_ptr<Linear> endPredictor;
    std::unique_ptr<WordPieceTokenizer> tokenizer;
    
    ExtractiveQA(int embedDim = 768) {
        // BERT encoder
        bert = std::make_unique<BERT>(30000, embedDim, 12, 12);
        
        // Start/End position predictors
        startPredictor = std::make_unique<Linear>(embedDim, 1);
        endPredictor = std::make_unique<Linear>(embedDim, 1);
        
        // Tokenizer
        tokenizer = std::make_unique<WordPieceTokenizer>();
    }
    
    std::string answerQuestion(const std::string& question, const std::string& context) {
        // Tokenize
        auto questionTokens = tokenizer->tokenize(question);
        auto contextTokens = tokenizer->tokenize(context);
        
        // Combine: [CLS] question [SEP] context [SEP]
        std::vector<std::string> tokens;
        tokens.push_back("[CLS]");
        tokens.insert(tokens.end(), questionTokens.begin(), questionTokens.end());
        tokens.push_back("[SEP]");
        
        int contextStart = tokens.size();
        tokens.insert(tokens.end(), contextTokens.begin(), contextTokens.end());
        tokens.push_back("[SEP]");
        
        // Encode
        auto tokenIds = tokenizer->vocab.encode(tokens);
        
        // Segment IDs: 0 for question, 1 for context
        std::vector<int> segmentIds(tokenIds.size());
        for (size_t i = 0; i < tokenIds.size(); i++) {
            segmentIds[i] = (i >= contextStart) ? 1 : 0;
        }
        
        // Get embeddings
        Tensor embeddings = bert->forward(tokenIds, segmentIds);
        
        // Predict start and end positions
        std::vector<float> startLogits(tokens.size());
        std::vector<float> endLogits(tokens.size());
        
        for (size_t i = 0; i < tokens.size(); i++) {
            Tensor tokenEmbedding({bert->embedDim});
            for (int j = 0; j < bert->embedDim; j++) {
                tokenEmbedding.data[j] = embeddings.data[i * bert->embedDim + j];
            }
            
            Tensor startScore = startPredictor->forward(tokenEmbedding);
            Tensor endScore = endPredictor->forward(tokenEmbedding);
            
            startLogits[i] = startScore.data[0];
            endLogits[i] = endScore.data[0];
        }
        
        // Find best start and end positions (only in context)
        int bestStart = contextStart;
        int bestEnd = contextStart;
        float bestScore = -std::numeric_limits<float>::infinity();
        
        for (size_t start = contextStart; start < tokens.size() - 1; start++) {
            for (size_t end = start; end < std::min(start + 30, tokens.size() - 1); end++) {
                float score = startLogits[start] + endLogits[end];
                
                if (score > bestScore) {
                    bestScore = score;
                    bestStart = start;
                    bestEnd = end;
                }
            }
        }
        
        // Extract answer
        std::string answer;
        for (int i = bestStart; i <= bestEnd; i++) {
            if (i > bestStart) answer += " ";
            answer += tokens[i];
        }
        
        return answer;
    }
    
    void train(const std::vector<std::tuple<std::string, std::string, std::string, int, int>>& dataset,
              int epochs, Optimizer* optimizer) {
        
        // dataset: (question, context, answer, startPos, endPos)
        
        MSELoss loss;
        
        for (int epoch = 0; epoch < epochs; epoch++) {
            float totalLoss = 0.0f;
            
            for (const auto& [question, context, answer, startPos, endPos] : dataset) {
                optimizer->zeroGrad();
                
                // Tokenize and encode
                auto questionTokens = tokenizer->tokenize(question);
                auto contextTokens = tokenizer->tokenize(context);
                
                std::vector<std::string> tokens;
                tokens.push_back("[CLS]");
                tokens.insert(tokens.end(), questionTokens.begin(), questionTokens.end());
                tokens.push_back("[SEP]");
                
                int contextStart = tokens.size();
                tokens.insert(tokens.end(), contextTokens.begin(), contextTokens.end());
                tokens.push_back("[SEP]");
                
                auto tokenIds = tokenizer->vocab.encode(tokens);
                
                std::vector<int> segmentIds(tokenIds.size());
                for (size_t i = 0; i < tokenIds.size(); i++) {
                    segmentIds[i] = (i >= contextStart) ? 1 : 0;
                }
                
                // Forward
                Tensor embeddings = bert->forward(tokenIds, segmentIds);
                
                float sampleLoss = 0.0f;
                
                // Train on start position
                Tensor startEmbedding({bert->embedDim});
                for (int j = 0; j < bert->embedDim; j++) {
                    startEmbedding.data[j] = embeddings.data[(contextStart + startPos) * bert->embedDim + j];
                }
                
                Tensor startPred = startPredictor->forward(startEmbedding);
                Tensor startTarget = Tensor::scalar(1.0f);
                
                sampleLoss += loss.forward(startPred, startTarget);
                
                // Train on end position
                Tensor endEmbedding({bert->embedDim});
                for (int j = 0; j < bert->embedDim; j++) {
                    endEmbedding.data[j] = embeddings.data[(contextStart + endPos) * bert->embedDim + j];
                }
                
                Tensor endPred = endPredictor->forward(endEmbedding);
                Tensor endTarget = Tensor::scalar(1.0f);
                
                sampleLoss += loss.forward(endPred, endTarget);
                
                totalLoss += sampleLoss;
                
                // Backward
                Tensor grad = loss.backward();
                startPredictor->backward(grad);
                endPredictor->backward(grad);
                
                optimizer->step();
            }
            
            std::cout << "Epoch " << (epoch + 1) << "/" << epochs
                     << " - Loss: " << (totalLoss / dataset.size()) << std::endl;
        }
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// GENERATIVE QA (with GPT)
// ====================================================================

class GenerativeQA {
public:
    std::unique_ptr<GPT> gpt;
    std::unique_ptr<BPETokenizer> tokenizer;
    
    GenerativeQA() {
        gpt = std::make_unique<GPT>(50000, 768, 12, 12);
        tokenizer = std::make_unique<BPETokenizer>();
    }
    
    std::string answerQuestion(const std::string& question, const std::string& context) {
        // Create prompt
        std::string prompt = "Context: " + context + "\nQuestion: " + question + "\nAnswer:";
        
        // Encode
        auto tokenIds = tokenizer->encode(prompt);
        
        // Generate answer
        auto generated = gpt->generate(tokenIds, 50, 0.7f);
        
        // Decode
        std::string fullAnswer = tokenizer->decode(generated);
        
        // Extract answer part
        size_t answerPos = fullAnswer.find("Answer:");
        if (answerPos != std::string::npos) {
            return fullAnswer.substr(answerPos + 7);
        }
        
        return fullAnswer;
    }
};

} // namespace nlp
} // namespace ai
} // namespace nk
```

Suite avec **Text Summarization + Machine Translation** dans le prochain message !

# PARTIE 44 : NLP Applications - Sentiment Analysis + NER + QA + Summarization

## 1. SentimentAnalysis.hpp - Analyse de Sentiment

```cpp
// SentimentAnalysis.hpp - Sentiment Analysis Models
#pragma once

#include "BERT.hpp"
#include "Model.hpp"

namespace nk {
namespace ai {
namespace nlp {

// ====================================================================
// SENTIMENT CLASSIFIER
// ====================================================================

class SentimentClassifier {
public:
    enum class Sentiment {
        Negative = 0,
        Neutral = 1,
        Positive = 2
    };
    
    std::unique_ptr<Sequential> model;
    std::unique_ptr<Embedding> embedding;
    std::unique_ptr<WhitespaceTokenizer> tokenizer;
    
    int vocabSize;
    int embedDim;
    int numClasses;
    
    SentimentClassifier(int vocab = 10000, int dim = 128, int classes = 3)
        : vocabSize(vocab)
        , embedDim(dim)
        , numClasses(classes) {
        
        embedding = std::make_unique<Embedding>(vocab, dim);
        tokenizer = std::make_unique<WhitespaceTokenizer>();
        
        // Build classifier
        model = std::make_unique<Sequential>();
        
        // Bidirectional LSTM (simplified)
        model->add<LSTM>(dim, 128);
        
        model->add<Linear>(128, 64);
        model->add<ReLU>();
        model->add<Dropout>(0.5f);
        
        model->add<Linear>(64, numClasses);
        model->add<Softmax>();
    }
    
    Sentiment predict(const std::string& text) {
        model->eval();
        
        // Tokenize
        auto tokens = tokenizer->encode(text);
        
        // Embed
        Tensor embedded = embedding->forward(tokens);
        
        // Forward through model
        Tensor output = model->forward(embedded);
        
        // Get predicted class
        int maxIdx = 0;
        float maxVal = output.data[0];
        
        for (int i = 1; i < numClasses; i++) {
            if (output.data[i] > maxVal) {
                maxVal = output.data[i];
                maxIdx = i;
            }
        }
        
        return static_cast<Sentiment>(maxIdx);
    }
    
    std::vector<float> getProbabilities(const std::string& text) {
        model->eval();
        
        auto tokens = tokenizer->encode(text);
        Tensor embedded = embedding->forward(tokens);
        Tensor output = model->forward(embedded);
        
        return output.data;
    }
    
    void train(const std::vector<std::pair<std::string, Sentiment>>& dataset,
              int epochs, Optimizer* optimizer) {
        
        tokenizer->buildVocabFromTexts(
            [&dataset]() {
                std::vector<std::string> texts;
                for (const auto& [text, _] : dataset) {
                    texts.push_back(text);
                }
                return texts;
            }()
        );
        
        CrossEntropyLoss loss;
        optimizer->setParameters(
            [this]() {
                auto params = embedding->parameters();
                auto modelParams = model->parameters();
                params.insert(params.end(), modelParams.begin(), modelParams.end());
                return params;
            }()
        );
        
        for (int epoch = 0; epoch < epochs; epoch++) {
            model->train();
            float totalLoss = 0.0f;
            
            for (const auto& [text, sentiment] : dataset) {
                optimizer->zeroGrad();
                
                // Forward
                auto tokens = tokenizer->encode(text);
                Tensor embedded = embedding->forward(tokens);
                Tensor output = model->forward(embedded);
                
                // Target
                Tensor target({numClasses});
                target.zeros();
                target.data[static_cast<int>(sentiment)] = 1.0f;
                
                // Loss
                float lossVal = loss.forward(output, target);
                totalLoss += lossVal;
                
                // Backward
                Tensor grad = loss.backward();
                model->backward(grad);
                
                optimizer->step();
            }
            
            std::cout << "Epoch " << (epoch + 1) << " - Loss: "
                     << (totalLoss / dataset.size()) << std::endl;
        }
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// ASPECT-BASED SENTIMENT ANALYSIS
// ====================================================================

class AspectSentimentAnalyzer {
public:
    struct AspectSentiment {
        std::string aspect;
        SentimentClassifier::Sentiment sentiment;
        float confidence;
    };
    
    std::unique_ptr<BERT> bert;
    std::unique_ptr<Linear> aspectClassifier;
    std::unique_ptr<Linear> sentimentClassifier;
    
    std::vector<std::string> aspectCategories = {
        "quality", "price", "service", "ambiance", "food", "delivery"
    };
    
    AspectSentimentAnalyzer(int vocab, int dim, int heads, int layers) {
        bert = std::make_unique<BERT>(vocab, dim, heads, layers);
        
        aspectClassifier = std::make_unique<Linear>(dim, aspectCategories.size());
        sentimentClassifier = std::make_unique<Linear>(dim, 3);
    }
    
    std::vector<AspectSentiment> analyze(const std::string& text,
                                         WordPieceTokenizer& tokenizer) {
        
        auto tokens = tokenizer.encode(text);
        std::vector<int> segmentIds(tokens.size(), 0);
        
        // Get BERT embeddings
        Tensor embeddings = bert->forward(tokens, segmentIds);
        
        std::vector<AspectSentiment> results;
        
        // For each token, predict aspect and sentiment
        for (size_t i = 0; i < tokens.size(); i++) {
            Tensor tokenEmbed({bert->embedDim});
            
            for (int j = 0; j < bert->embedDim; j++) {
                tokenEmbed.data[j] = embeddings.data[i * bert->embedDim + j];
            }
            
            // Predict aspect
            Tensor aspectLogits = aspectClassifier->forward(tokenEmbed);
            Tensor aspectProbs = aspectLogits.softmax();
            
            int aspectIdx = std::max_element(aspectProbs.data.begin(),
                                            aspectProbs.data.end()) -
                           aspectProbs.data.begin();
            
            // Predict sentiment
            Tensor sentimentLogits = sentimentClassifier->forward(tokenEmbed);
            Tensor sentimentProbs = sentimentLogits.softmax();
            
            int sentimentIdx = std::max_element(sentimentProbs.data.begin(),
                                               sentimentProbs.data.end()) -
                              sentimentProbs.data.begin();
            
            if (aspectProbs.data[aspectIdx] > 0.5f) {
                AspectSentiment result;
                result.aspect = aspectCategories[aspectIdx];
                result.sentiment = static_cast<SentimentClassifier::Sentiment>(sentimentIdx);
                result.confidence = aspectProbs.data[aspectIdx] * sentimentProbs.data[sentimentIdx];
                
                results.push_back(result);
            }
        }
        
        return results;
    }
};

} // namespace nlp
} // namespace ai
} // namespace nk
```

## 2. NER.hpp - Named Entity Recognition

```cpp
// NER.hpp - Named Entity Recognition
#pragma once

#include "BERT.hpp"

namespace nk {
namespace ai {
namespace nlp {

// ====================================================================
// NAMED ENTITY TYPES
// ====================================================================

enum class EntityType {
    O = 0,        // Outside
    B_PER,        // Begin Person
    I_PER,        // Inside Person
    B_ORG,        // Begin Organization
    I_ORG,        // Inside Organization
    B_LOC,        // Begin Location
    I_LOC,        // Inside Location
    B_MISC,       // Begin Miscellaneous
    I_MISC        // Inside Miscellaneous
};

struct Entity {
    std::string text;
    EntityType type;
    int start;
    int end;
    float confidence;
    
    std::string getTypeName() const {
        switch (type) {
            case EntityType::B_PER:
            case EntityType::I_PER: return "PERSON";
            case EntityType::B_ORG:
            case EntityType::I_ORG: return "ORGANIZATION";
            case EntityType::B_LOC:
            case EntityType::I_LOC: return "LOCATION";
            case EntityType::B_MISC:
            case EntityType::I_MISC: return "MISC";
            default: return "O";
        }
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// NER MODEL (BERT + Token Classification)
// ====================================================================

class NERModel {
public:
    std::unique_ptr<BERT> bert;
    std::unique_ptr<Linear> classifier;
    
    int numEntityTypes = 9;  // O + B/I for PER/ORG/LOC/MISC
    
    NERModel(int vocab, int dim, int heads, int layers) {
        bert = std::make_unique<BERT>(vocab, dim, heads, layers);
        classifier = std::make_unique<Linear>(dim, numEntityTypes);
    }
    
    std::vector<Entity> predict(const std::string& text,
                                WordPieceTokenizer& tokenizer) {
        
        auto tokens = tokenizer.encode(text);
        std::vector<int> segmentIds(tokens.size(), 0);
        
        // Get BERT embeddings
        Tensor embeddings = bert->forward(tokens, segmentIds);
        
        // Predict entity tags for each token
        std::vector<EntityType> tags;
        
        for (size_t i = 0; i < tokens.size(); i++) {
            Tensor tokenEmbed({bert->embedDim});
            
            for (int j = 0; j < bert->embedDim; j++) {
                tokenEmbed.data[j] = embeddings.data[i * bert->embedDim + j];
            }
            
            Tensor logits = classifier->forward(tokenEmbed);
            Tensor probs = logits.softmax();
            
            int maxIdx = std::max_element(probs.data.begin(), probs.data.end()) -
                        probs.data.begin();
            
            tags.push_back(static_cast<EntityType>(maxIdx));
        }
        
        // Extract entities from tags
        return extractEntities(text, tokens, tags, tokenizer);
    }
    
    std::vector<Tensor*> parameters() {
        auto params = bert->parameters();
        auto classParams = classifier->parameters();
        params.insert(params.end(), classParams.begin(), classParams.end());
        return params;
    }
    
private:
    std::vector<Entity> extractEntities(const std::string& text,
                                        const std::vector<int>& tokens,
                                        const std::vector<EntityType>& tags,
                                        WordPieceTokenizer& tokenizer) {
        
        std::vector<Entity> entities;
        
        int start = -1;
        EntityType currentType = EntityType::O;
        std::string currentText;
        
        for (size_t i = 0; i < tags.size(); i++) {
            EntityType tag = tags[i];
            
            if (tag == EntityType::O) {
                if (start != -1) {
                    // End current entity
                    Entity entity;
                    entity.text = currentText;
                    entity.type = currentType;
                    entity.start = start;
                    entity.end = i - 1;
                    entity.confidence = 1.0f;
                    
                    entities.push_back(entity);
                    
                    start = -1;
                    currentText.clear();
                }
            } else if (isBeginTag(tag)) {
                // Start new entity
                if (start != -1) {
                    // Save previous entity
                    Entity entity;
                    entity.text = currentText;
                    entity.type = currentType;
                    entity.start = start;
                    entity.end = i - 1;
                    entity.confidence = 1.0f;
                    
                    entities.push_back(entity);
                }
                
                start = i;
                currentType = tag;
                currentText = tokenizer.vocab.getWord(tokens[i]);
            } else if (isInsideTag(tag) && start != -1) {
                // Continue current entity
                currentText += " " + tokenizer.vocab.getWord(tokens[i]);
            }
        }
        
        // Add last entity if any
        if (start != -1) {
            Entity entity;
            entity.text = currentText;
            entity.type = currentType;
            entity.start = start;
            entity.end = tags.size() - 1;
            entity.confidence = 1.0f;
            
            entities.push_back(entity);
        }
        
        return entities;
    }
    
    bool isBeginTag(EntityType tag) {
        return tag == EntityType::B_PER || tag == EntityType::B_ORG ||
               tag == EntityType::B_LOC || tag == EntityType::B_MISC;
    }
    
    bool isInsideTag(EntityType tag) {
        return tag == EntityType::I_PER || tag == EntityType::I_ORG ||
               tag == EntityType::I_LOC || tag == EntityType::I_MISC;
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// RELATION EXTRACTION
// ====================================================================

class RelationExtractor {
public:
    enum class RelationType {
        None,
        EmployedBy,
        LocatedIn,
        FoundedBy,
        OwnedBy,
        PartnerOf
    };
    
    struct Relation {
        Entity subject;
        Entity object;
        RelationType type;
        float confidence;
    };
    
    std::unique_ptr<BERT> bert;
    std::unique_ptr<Linear> relationClassifier;
    
    int numRelations = 6;
    
    RelationExtractor(int vocab, int dim, int heads, int layers) {
        bert = std::make_unique<BERT>(vocab, dim, heads, layers);
        relationClassifier = std::make_unique<Linear>(dim * 2, numRelations);
    }
    
    std::vector<Relation> extractRelations(const std::string& text,
                                          const std::vector<Entity>& entities,
                                          WordPieceTokenizer& tokenizer) {
        
        std::vector<Relation> relations;
        
        // For each pair of entities
        for (size_t i = 0; i < entities.size(); i++) {
            for (size_t j = i + 1; j < entities.size(); j++) {
                auto relation = predictRelation(text, entities[i], entities[j], tokenizer);
                
                if (relation.type != RelationType::None && relation.confidence > 0.5f) {
                    relations.push_back(relation);
                }
            }
        }
        
        return relations;
    }
    
private:
    Relation predictRelation(const std::string& text,
                            const Entity& entity1,
                            const Entity& entity2,
                            WordPieceTokenizer& tokenizer) {
        
        auto tokens = tokenizer.encode(text);
        std::vector<int> segmentIds(tokens.size(), 0);
        
        // Get BERT embeddings
        Tensor embeddings = bert->forward(tokens, segmentIds);
        
        // Extract entity embeddings
        Tensor entity1Embed({bert->embedDim});
        Tensor entity2Embed({bert->embedDim});
        
        for (int i = 0; i < bert->embedDim; i++) {
            entity1Embed.data[i] = embeddings.data[entity1.start * bert->embedDim + i];
            entity2Embed.data[i] = embeddings.data[entity2.start * bert->embedDim + i];
        }
        
        // Concatenate entity embeddings
        Tensor combined({bert->embedDim * 2});
        
        for (int i = 0; i < bert->embedDim; i++) {
            combined.data[i] = entity1Embed.data[i];
            combined.data[bert->embedDim + i] = entity2Embed.data[i];
        }
        
        // Predict relation
        Tensor logits = relationClassifier->forward(combined);
        Tensor probs = logits.softmax();
        
        int maxIdx = std::max_element(probs.data.begin(), probs.data.end()) -
                    probs.data.begin();
        
        Relation relation;
        relation.subject = entity1;
        relation.object = entity2;
        relation.type = static_cast<RelationType>(maxIdx);
        relation.confidence = probs.data[maxIdx];
        
        return relation;
    }
};

} // namespace nlp
} // namespace ai
} // namespace nk
```

## 3. QuestionAnswering.hpp - Question Answering

```cpp
// QuestionAnswering.hpp - Question Answering Systems
#pragma once

#include "BERT.hpp"

namespace nk {
namespace ai {
namespace nlp {

// ====================================================================
// EXTRACTIVE QA (BERT-based)
// ====================================================================

class ExtractiveQA {
public:
    std::unique_ptr<BERT> bert;
    std::unique_ptr<Linear> startClassifier;
    std::unique_ptr<Linear> endClassifier;
    
    ExtractiveQA(int vocab, int dim, int heads, int layers) {
        bert = std::make_unique<BERT>(vocab, dim, heads, layers);
        
        // Predict start and end positions
        startClassifier = std::make_unique<Linear>(dim, 1);
        endClassifier = std::make_unique<Linear>(dim, 1);
    }
    
    std::string answer(const std::string& question,
                      const std::string& context,
                      WordPieceTokenizer& tokenizer) {
        
        // Encode question and context
        auto questionTokens = tokenizer.encode(question);
        auto contextTokens = tokenizer.encode(context);
        
        // Combine: [CLS] question [SEP] context [SEP]
        std::vector<int> tokens;
        tokens.push_back(tokenizer.vocab.getIndex("[CLS]"));
        tokens.insert(tokens.end(), questionTokens.begin(), questionTokens.end());
        tokens.push_back(tokenizer.vocab.getIndex("[SEP]"));
        
        int contextStart = tokens.size();
        tokens.insert(tokens.end(), contextTokens.begin(), contextTokens.end());
        tokens.push_back(tokenizer.vocab.getIndex("[SEP]"));
        
        // Segment IDs: 0 for question, 1 for context
        std::vector<int> segmentIds(tokens.size(), 0);
        for (size_t i = contextStart; i < tokens.size(); i++) {
            segmentIds[i] = 1;
        }
        
        // Get BERT embeddings
        Tensor embeddings = bert->forward(tokens, segmentIds);
        
        // Predict start and end positions
        std::vector<float> startLogits(tokens.size());
        std::vector<float> endLogits(tokens.size());
        
        for (size_t i = 0; i < tokens.size(); i++) {
            Tensor tokenEmbed({bert->embedDim});
            
            for (int j = 0; j < bert->embedDim; j++) {
                tokenEmbed.data[j] = embeddings.data[i * bert->embedDim + j];
            }
            
            Tensor startScore = startClassifier->forward(tokenEmbed);
            Tensor endScore = endClassifier->forward(tokenEmbed);
            
            startLogits[i] = startScore.data[0];
            endLogits[i] = endScore.data[0];
        }
        
        // Find best span in context
        int bestStart = contextStart;
        int bestEnd = contextStart;
        float bestScore = -std::numeric_limits<float>::infinity();
        
        for (size_t start = contextStart; start < tokens.size() - 1; start++) {
            for (size_t end = start; end < std::min(start + 15, tokens.size() - 1); end++) {
                float score = startLogits[start] + endLogits[end];
                
                if (score > bestScore) {
                    bestScore = score;
                    bestStart = start;
                    bestEnd = end;
                }
            }
        }
        
        // Extract answer
        std::vector<int> answerTokens(
            tokens.begin() + bestStart,
            tokens.begin() + bestEnd + 1
        );
        
        return tokenizer.decode(answerTokens);
    }
    
    std::vector<Tensor*> parameters() {
        auto params = bert->parameters();
        
        auto startParams = startClassifier->parameters();
        params.insert(params.end(), startParams.begin(), startParams.end());
        
        auto endParams = endClassifier->parameters();
        params.insert(params.end(), endParams.begin(), endParams.end());
        
        return params;
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// GENERATIVE QA (GPT-based)
// ====================================================================

class GenerativeQA {
public:
    std::unique_ptr<GPT> gpt;
    
    GenerativeQA(int vocab, int dim, int heads, int layers) {
        gpt = std::make_unique<GPT>(vocab, dim, heads, layers);
    }
    
    std::string answer(const std::string& question,
                      const std::string& context,
                      BPETokenizer& tokenizer,
                      int maxTokens = 50) {
        
        // Format prompt: Context: ... Question: ... Answer:
        std::string prompt = "Context: " + context + "\n" +
                           "Question: " + question + "\n" +
                           "Answer:";
        
        auto promptTokens = tokenizer.encode(prompt);
        
        // Generate answer
        auto generated = gpt->generate(promptTokens, maxTokens, 0.7f, 40);
        
        // Extract only the generated part (after prompt)
        std::vector<int> answerTokens(
            generated.begin() + promptTokens.size(),
            generated.end()
        );
        
        return tokenizer.decode(answerTokens);
    }
};

} // namespace nlp
} // namespace ai
} // namespace nk
```

## 4. Summarization.hpp - Text Summarization

```cpp
// Summarization.hpp - Text Summarization
#pragma once

#include "GPT.hpp"
#include "Transformer.hpp"

namespace nk {
namespace ai {
namespace nlp {

// ====================================================================
// EXTRACTIVE SUMMARIZATION (TextRank)
// ====================================================================

class ExtractiveSummarizer {
public:
    int numSentences = 3;
    
    struct ScoredSentence {
        std::string text;
        float score;
        int position;
    };
    
    std::string summarize(const std::string& text) {
        // Split into sentences
        auto sentences = splitSentences(text);
        
        if (sentences.size() <= numSentences) {
            return text;
        }
        
        // Compute sentence similarities
        auto similarities = computeSimilarities(sentences);
        
        // Run TextRank
        auto scores = textRank(similarities);
        
        // Select top sentences
        std::vector<ScoredSentence> scored;
        for (size_t i = 0; i < sentences.size(); i++) {
            scored.push_back({sentences[i], scores[i], static_cast<int>(i)});
        }
        
        std::partial_sort(scored.begin(),
                         scored.begin() + numSentences,
                         scored.end(),
                         [](const auto& a, const auto& b) {
                             return a.score > b.score;
                         });
        
        // Sort by original position
        std::sort(scored.begin(),
                 scored.begin() + numSentences,
                 [](const auto& a, const auto& b) {
                     return a.position < b.position;
                 });
        
        // Combine sentences
        std::string summary;
        for (int i = 0; i < numSentences; i++) {
            summary += scored[i].text + " ";
        }
        
        return summary;
    }
    
private:
    std::vector<std::string> splitSentences(const std::string& text) {
        std::vector<std::string> sentences;
        
        size_t start = 0;
        
        for (size_t i = 0; i < text.length(); i++) {
            if (text[i] == '.' || text[i] == '!' || text[i] == '?') {
                if (i + 1 < text.length() && text[i + 1] == ' ') {
                    sentences.push_back(text.substr(start, i - start + 1));
                    start = i + 2;
                }
            }
        }
        
        if (start < text.length()) {
            sentences.push_back(text.substr(start));
        }
        
        return sentences;
    }
    
    std::vector<std::vector<float>> computeSimilarities(
        const std::vector<std::string>& sentences) {
        
        int n = sentences.size();
        std::vector<std::vector<float>> similarities(n, std::vector<float>(n, 0.0f));
        
        // Simple word overlap similarity
        for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
            for (int j = i + 1; j < n; j++) {
                float sim = sentenceSimilarity(sentences[i], sentences[j]);
                similarities[i][j] = sim;
                similarities[j][i] = sim;
            }
        }
        
        return similarities;
    }
    
    float sentenceSimilarity(const std::string& s1, const std::string& s2) {
        auto words1 = splitWords(s1);
        auto words2 = splitWords(s2);
        
        // Jaccard similarity
        std::set<std::string> set1(words1.begin(), words1.end());
        std::set<std::string> set2(words2.begin(), words2.end());
        
        std::vector<std::string> intersection;
        std::set_intersection(set1.begin(), set1.end(),
                            set2.begin(), set2.end(),
                            std::back_inserter(intersection));
        
        std::vector<std::string> unionSet;
        std::set_union(set1.begin(), set1.end(),
                      set2.begin(), set2.end(),
                      std::back_inserter(unionSet));
        
        if (unionSet.empty()) return 0.0f;
        
        return static_cast<float>(intersection.size()) / unionSet.size();
    }
    
    std::vector<std::string> splitWords(const std::string& text) {
        std::vector<std::string> words;
        std::stringstream ss(text);
        std::string word;
        
        while (ss >> word) {
            std::transform(word.begin(), word.end(), word.begin(), ::tolower);
            words.push_back(word);
        }
        
        return words;
    }
    
    std::vector<float> textRank(const std::vector<std::vector<float>>& similarities,
                                int iterations = 100) {
        
        int n = similarities.size();
        std::vector<float> scores(n, 1.0f / n);
        float damping = 0.85f;
        
        for (int iter = 0; iter < iterations; iter++) {
            std::vector<float> newScores(n, 0.0f);
            
            for (int i = 0; i < n; i++) {
                float sum = 0.0f;
                
                for (int j = 0; j < n; j++) {
                    if (i != j && similarities[i][j] > 0) {
                        float totalOut = 0.0f;
                        for (int k = 0; k < n; k++) {
                            totalOut += similarities[j][k];
                        }
                        
                        if (totalOut > 0) {
                            sum += similarities[i][j] / totalOut * scores[j];
                        }
                    }
                }
                
                newScores[i] = (1.0f - damping) / n + damping * sum;
            }
            
            scores = newScores;
        }
        
        return scores;
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// ABSTRACTIVE SUMMARIZATION (Seq2Seq)
// ====================================================================

class AbstractiveSummarizer {
public:
    std::unique_ptr<Transformer> transformer;
    
    AbstractiveSummarizer(int vocab, int dim, int heads,
                         int encLayers, int decLayers) {
        
        transformer = std::make_unique<Transformer>(
            vocab, dim, heads, encLayers, decLayers, dim * 4
        );
    }
    
    std::string summarize(const std::string& text,
                         BPETokenizer& tokenizer,
                         int maxLength = 50) {
        
        auto inputTokens = tokenizer.encode(text);
        
        // Start with [SOS] token
        std::vector<int> outputTokens = {tokenizer.vocab.sosToken};
        
        for (int i = 0; i < maxLength; i++) {
            // Forward through transformer
            Tensor output = transformer->forward(inputTokens, outputTokens);
            
            // Get last token prediction
            int lastTokenIdx = (outputTokens.size() - 1) * transformer->vocabSize;
            
            int maxIdx = 0;
            float maxVal = output.data[lastTokenIdx];
            
            for (int j = 1; j < transformer->vocabSize; j++) {
                if (output.data[lastTokenIdx + j] > maxVal) {
                    maxVal = output.data[lastTokenIdx + j];
                    maxIdx = j;
                }
            }
            
            // Add predicted token
            outputTokens.push_back(maxIdx);
            
            // Check for [EOS]
            if (maxIdx == tokenizer.vocab.eosToken) {
                break;
            }
        }
        
        return tokenizer.decode(outputTokens);
    }
};

} // namespace nlp
} // namespace ai
} // namespace nk
```
