# PARTIE 44 : Exemples d'Applications Complètes

## 1. Example_NeuralNetwork.cpp - Entraînement d'un MLP

```cpp
// Example_NeuralNetwork.cpp - Train a simple neural network
#include "AI/Model.hpp"
#include "AI/Loss.hpp"
#include "AI/Optimizer.hpp"
#include <iostream>

using namespace nk::ai;

int main() {
    std::cout << "=== Neural Network Training Example ===" << std::endl;
    
    // Create XOR dataset
    std::vector<Tensor> X_train = {
        Tensor({1, 2}, {0, 0}),
        Tensor({1, 2}, {0, 1}),
        Tensor({1, 2}, {1, 0}),
        Tensor({1, 2}, {1, 1})
    };
    
    std::vector<Tensor> y_train = {
        Tensor({1, 1}, {0}),
        Tensor({1, 1}, {1}),
        Tensor({1, 1}, {1}),
        Tensor({1, 1}, {0})
    };
    
    // Build model
    Sequential model;
    model.add<Linear>(2, 8);
    model.add<ReLU>();
    model.add<Linear>(8, 8);
    model.add<ReLU>();
    model.add<Linear>(8, 1);
    model.add<Sigmoid>();
    
    model.summary();
    
    // Loss and optimizer
    MSELoss loss;
    Adam optimizer(0.01f);
    
    // Training
    Trainer trainer(&model, &loss, &optimizer);
    
    TrainingConfig config;
    config.epochs = 1000;
    config.batchSize = 4;
    config.validationSplit = 0.0f;
    config.verbose = true;
    
    trainer.fit(X_train, y_train, config);
    
    // Test predictions
    std::cout << "\n=== Testing ===" << std::endl;
    
    for (size_t i = 0; i < X_train.size(); i++) {
        Tensor prediction = trainer.predict(X_train[i]);
        
        std::cout << "Input: [" << X_train[i].data[0] << ", " << X_train[i].data[1] << "] "
                  << "-> Prediction: " << prediction.data[0]
                  << " (Target: " << y_train[i].data[0] << ")" << std::endl;
    }
    
    return 0;
}
```

## 2. Example_ImageClassification.cpp - CNN pour MNIST

```cpp
// Example_ImageClassification.cpp - CNN for image classification
#include "AI/Model.hpp"
#include "AI/ConvLayer.hpp"
#include "AI/Loss.hpp"
#include "AI/Optimizer.hpp"
#include <iostream>

using namespace nk::ai;

// Generate simple synthetic image data (simplified MNIST-like)
std::vector<Tensor> generateSyntheticImages(int numSamples, int width, int height) {
    std::vector<Tensor> images;
    Random& rng = Random::global();
    
    for (int i = 0; i < numSamples; i++) {
        Tensor image({1, 1, height, width});
        
        // Create simple patterns (vertical or horizontal lines)
        int pattern = i % 2;
        
        for (int h = 0; h < height; h++) {
            for (int w = 0; w < width; w++) {
                int idx = h * width + w;
                
                if (pattern == 0 && w == width / 2) {
                    image.data[idx] = 1.0f;  // Vertical line
                } else if (pattern == 1 && h == height / 2) {
                    image.data[idx] = 1.0f;  // Horizontal line
                } else {
                    image.data[idx] = 0.0f;
                }
            }
        }
        
        images.push_back(image);
    }
    
    return images;
}

int main() {
    std::cout << "=== Image Classification with CNN ===" << std::endl;
    
    int imageSize = 16;
    int numClasses = 2;
    
    // Generate synthetic dataset
    auto X_train = generateSyntheticImages(100, imageSize, imageSize);
    
    std::vector<Tensor> y_train;
    for (int i = 0; i < 100; i++) {
        Tensor label({1, numClasses});
        label.zeros();
        label.data[i % 2] = 1.0f;  // One-hot encoding
        y_train.push_back(label);
    }
    
    // Build CNN
    Sequential model;
    
    // Conv layers
    model.add<Conv2D>(1, 16, 3, 1, 1);
    model.add<ReLU>();
    model.add<MaxPool2D>(2, 2);
    
    model.add<Conv2D>(16, 32, 3, 1, 1);
    model.add<ReLU>();
    model.add<MaxPool2D>(2, 2);
    
    // Flatten
    model.add<Flatten>();
    
    // Dense layers
    model.add<Linear>(32 * 4 * 4, 128);
    model.add<ReLU>();
    model.add<Dropout>(0.5f);
    
    model.add<Linear>(128, numClasses);
    model.add<Softmax>();
    
    model.summary();
    
    // Loss and optimizer
    CrossEntropyLoss loss;
    Adam optimizer(0.001f);
    
    Trainer trainer(&model, &loss, &optimizer);
    
    TrainingConfig config;
    config.epochs = 20;
    config.batchSize = 10;
    config.validationSplit = 0.2f;
    
    trainer.fit(X_train, y_train, config);
    
    // Test
    std::cout << "\n=== Testing ===" << std::endl;
    
    for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
        Tensor prediction = trainer.predict(X_train[i]);
        
        int predictedClass = 0;
        float maxProb = prediction.data[0];
        
        for (int c = 1; c < numClasses; c++) {
            if (prediction.data[c] > maxProb) {
                maxProb = prediction.data[c];
                predictedClass = c;
            }
        }
        
        std::cout << "Sample " << i << ": Predicted class " << predictedClass
                  << " (Confidence: " << maxProb << ")" << std::endl;
    }
    
    return 0;
}
```

## 3. Example_TextGeneration.cpp - GPT Text Generation

```cpp
// Example_TextGeneration.cpp - Generate text with GPT
#include "AI/NLP/GPT.hpp"
#include <iostream>

using namespace nk::ai::nlp;

int main() {
    std::cout << "=== Text Generation with GPT ===" << std::endl;
    
    // Training corpus
    std::vector<std::string> trainingTexts = {
        "the quick brown fox jumps over the lazy dog",
        "a journey of a thousand miles begins with a single step",
        "to be or not to be that is the question",
        "all that glitters is not gold",
        "where there is a will there is a way"
    };
    
    // Create tokenizer and build vocabulary
    BPETokenizer tokenizer;
    tokenizer.train(trainingTexts);
    
    std::cout << "Vocabulary size: " << tokenizer.vocab.size() << std::endl;
    
    // Create GPT model
    int vocabSize = tokenizer.vocab.size();
    int embedDim = 128;
    int numHeads = 4;
    int numLayers = 4;
    
    TextGenerator generator(vocabSize, embedDim, numHeads, numLayers);
    generator.tokenizer = std::make_unique<BPETokenizer>(tokenizer);
    
    // Train
    std::cout << "\n=== Training ===" << std::endl;
    
    Adam optimizer(0.001f);
    generator.train(trainingTexts, 100, &optimizer);
    
    // Generate text
    std::cout << "\n=== Generating Text ===" << std::endl;
    
    std::vector<std::string> prompts = {
        "the quick",
        "a journey",
        "to be"
    };
    
    for (const auto& prompt : prompts) {
        std::string generated = generator.generate(prompt, 20, 0.8f);
        std::cout << "Prompt: \"" << prompt << "\"" << std::endl;
        std::cout << "Generated: \"" << generated << "\"" << std::endl << std::endl;
    }
    
    return 0;
}
```

## 4. Example_ReinforcementLearning.cpp - Q-Learning pour GridWorld

```cpp
// Example_ReinforcementLearning.cpp - Q-Learning for GridWorld
#include "AI/ReinforcementLearning.hpp"
#include <iostream>

using namespace nk::ai;

// Simple GridWorld environment
class GridWorld : public Environment<int, int> {
public:
    int gridSize = 5;
    int agentPos;
    int goalPos;
    
    GridWorld() {
        reset();
    }
    
    int reset() override {
        agentPos = 0;  // Top-left
        goalPos = gridSize * gridSize - 1;  // Bottom-right
        return agentPos;
    }
    
    std::tuple<int, float, bool> step(const int& action) override {
        // Actions: 0=up, 1=right, 2=down, 3=left
        
        int row = agentPos / gridSize;
        int col = agentPos % gridSize;
        
        // Move
        if (action == 0 && row > 0) row--;           // Up
        else if (action == 1 && col < gridSize - 1) col++;  // Right
        else if (action == 2 && row < gridSize - 1) row++;  // Down
        else if (action == 3 && col > 0) col--;      // Left
        
        agentPos = row * gridSize + col;
        
        // Reward
        float reward = -0.1f;  // Small penalty for each step
        bool done = false;
        
        if (agentPos == goalPos) {
            reward = 1.0f;  // Goal reached
            done = true;
        }
        
        return {agentPos, reward, done};
    }
    
    std::vector<int> getActionSpace() const override {
        return {0, 1, 2, 3};
    }
    
    int getActionSpaceSize() const override {
        return 4;
    }
    
    int getStateSpaceSize() const override {
        return gridSize * gridSize;
    }
    
    void render() const {
        std::cout << "\n";
        for (int r = 0; r < gridSize; r++) {
            for (int c = 0; c < gridSize; c++) {
                int pos = r * gridSize + c;
                
                if (pos == agentPos) {
                    std::cout << "A ";
                } else if (pos == goalPos) {
                    std::cout << "G ";
                } else {
                    std::cout << ". ";
                }
            }
            std::cout << std::endl;
        }
        std::cout << std::endl;
    }
};

int main() {
    std::cout << "=== Q-Learning for GridWorld ===" << std::endl;
    
    GridWorld env;
    
    // Create Q-Table
    QTable agent(env.getStateSpaceSize(), env.getActionSpaceSize());
    agent.learningRate = 0.1f;
    agent.discountFactor = 0.99f;
    agent.epsilon = 0.3f;
    
    // Training
    int numEpisodes = 500;
    
    for (int episode = 0; episode < numEpisodes; episode++) {
        int state = env.reset();
        float totalReward = 0.0f;
        int steps = 0;
        
        while (steps < 100) {
            // Select action
            int action = agent.selectAction(state);
            
            // Take action
            auto [nextState, reward, done] = env.step(action);
            
            // Update Q-table
            agent.update(state, action, reward, nextState, done);
            
            totalReward += reward;
            state = nextState;
            steps++;
            
            if (done) break;
        }
        
        agent.decayEpsilon();
        
        if (episode % 100 == 0) {
            std::cout << "Episode " << episode << ": Total reward = " << totalReward
                     << ", Steps = " << steps << ", Epsilon = " << agent.epsilon << std::endl;
        }
    }
    
    // Test learned policy
    std::cout << "\n=== Testing Learned Policy ===" << std::endl;
    
    int state = env.reset();
    env.render();
    
    for (int step = 0; step < 20; step++) {
        int action = agent.getBestAction(state);
        
        auto [nextState, reward, done] = env.step(action);
        
        env.render();
        
        std::cout << "Step " << step << ": Action = " << action
                  << ", Reward = " << reward << std::endl;
        
        state = nextState;
        
        if (done) {
            std::cout << "Goal reached!" << std::endl;
            break;
        }
    }
    
    return 0;
}
```

## 5. Example_GAN.cpp - Generate Images with GAN

```cpp
// Example_GAN.cpp - Generate images with GAN
#include "AI/GAN.hpp"
#include <iostream>

using namespace nk::ai;

int main() {
    std::cout << "=== Image Generation with GAN ===" << std::endl;
    
    int latentDim = 100;
    int imageDim = 28 * 28;  // Flattened 28x28 images
    
    // Create GAN
    GAN gan(
        latentDim,
        imageDim,
        {256, 512},  // Generator hidden dims
        {512, 256}   // Discriminator hidden dims
    );
    
    // Generate fake training data (simple patterns)
    std::vector<Tensor> realImages;
    
    for (int i = 0; i < 100; i++) {
        Tensor image({1, imageDim});
        
        // Create simple pattern (diagonal line)
        for (int j = 0; j < 28; j++) {
            image.data[j * 28 + j] = 1.0f;
        }
        
        // Add noise
        Random& rng = Random::global();
        for (auto& val : image.data) {
            val += rng.nextGaussian(0.0f, 0.1f);
            val = clamp(val, -1.0f, 1.0f);
        }
        
        realImages.push_back(image);
    }
    
    // Optimizers
    Adam genOptimizer(0.0002f, 0.5f, 0.999f);
    Adam discOptimizer(0.0002f, 0.5f, 0.999f);
    
    GANTrainer trainer(&gan, &genOptimizer, &discOptimizer);
    
    // Train
    std::cout << "\n=== Training GAN ===" << std::endl;
    
    trainer.train(realImages, 100, 10);
    
    // Generate samples
    std::cout << "\n=== Generating Samples ===" << std::endl;
    
    Tensor generated = trainer.generate(5);
    
    std::cout << "Generated " << generated.shape[0] << " samples" << std::endl;
    std::cout << "Sample pixel values (first 10): ";
    for (int i = 0; i < 10; i++) {
        std::cout << generated.data[i] << " ";
    }
    std::cout << std::endl;
    
    return 0;
}
```

// Example_ObjectDetection.cpp - Object detection with YOLO
#include "AI/ObjectDetection.hpp"
#include <iostream>

using namespace nk::ai;

int main() {
    std::cout << "=== Object Detection with YOLO ===" << std::endl;
    
    int numClasses = 10;
    
    // Create YOLO model
    YOLO yolo(numClasses);
    
    std::cout << "YOLO model created with " << numClasses << " classes" << std::endl;
    std::cout << "Total parameters: ";
    
    int totalParams = 0;
    for (auto* param : yolo.parameters()) {
        totalParams += param->getSize();
    }
    std::cout << totalParams << std::endl;
    
    // Create dummy image (416x416x3)
    Tensor image({1, 3, 416, 416});
    
    Random& rng = Random::global();
    for (auto& val : image.data) {
        val = rng.nextFloat(-1.0f, 1.0f);
    }
    
    // Detect objects
    std::cout << "\n=== Running Detection ===" << std::endl;
    
    auto detections = yolo.detect(image, 0.5f);
    
    std::cout << "Found " << detections.size() << " objects" << std::endl;
    
    for (size_t i = 0; i < detections.size(); i++) {
        const auto& box = detections[i];
        
        std::cout << "Object " << i << ":" << std::endl;
        std::cout << "  Class: " << box.classId << std::endl;
        std::cout << "  Confidence: " << box.confidence << std::endl;
        std::cout << "  BBox: [" << box.x << ", " << box.y << ", "
                  << box.w << ", " << box.h << "]" << std::endl;
    }
    
    return 0;
}

## 7. Example_PointCloud.cpp - 3D Point Cloud Classification

```cpp
// Example_PointCloud.cpp - Classify 3D point clouds with PointNet
#include "AI/PointNet.hpp"
#include <iostream>

using namespace nk::ai;

// Generate synthetic point cloud (sphere or cube)
PointCloud generateSyntheticPointCloud(int numPoints, bool isSphere) {
    PointCloud pc;
    Random& rng = Random::global();
    
    for (int i = 0; i < numPoints; i++) {
        Vec3 point;
        
        if (isSphere) {
            // Random point on sphere
            point = rng.nextUnitVector3();
        } else {
            // Random point in cube
            point = Vec3(
                rng.nextFloat(-1.0f, 1.0f),
                rng.nextFloat(-1.0f, 1.0f),
                rng.nextFloat(-1.0f, 1.0f)
            );
        }
        
        pc.addPoint(point);
    }
    
    return pc;
}

int main() {
    std::cout << "=== Point Cloud Classification with PointNet ===" << std::endl;
    
    int numClasses = 2;  // Sphere or Cube
    int numPoints = 1024;
    
    // Create PointNet
    PointNet pointnet(numClasses, false);
    
    std::cout << "PointNet model created" << std::endl;
    
    // Generate training data
    std::vector<Tensor> X_train;
    std::vector<Tensor> y_train;
    
    for (int i = 0; i < 100; i++) {
        bool isSphere = (i % 2 == 0);
        
        PointCloud pc = generateSyntheticPointCloud(numPoints, isSphere);
        X_train.push_back(pc.toTensor());
        
        Tensor label({numClasses});
        label.zeros();
        label.data[isSphere ? 0 : 1] = 1.0f;
        y_train.push_back(label);
    }
    
    std::cout << "Generated " << X_train.size() << " training samples" << std::endl;
    
    // Train
    CrossEntropyLoss loss;
    Adam optimizer(0.001f);
    
    Trainer trainer(nullptr, &loss, &optimizer);  // Simplified
    
    std::cout << "\n=== Training ===" << std::endl;
    std::cout << "Training point cloud classifier..." << std::endl;
    
    // Test
    std::cout << "\n=== Testing ===" << std::endl;
    
    for (int i = 0; i < 4; i++) {
        bool isSphere = (i % 2 == 0);
        PointCloud testPC = generateSyntheticPointCloud(numPoints, isSphere);
        
        Tensor prediction = pointnet.forward(testPC.toTensor());
        
        int predictedClass = prediction.data[0] > prediction.data[1] ? 0 : 1;
        
        std::cout << "Sample " << i << ": "
                  << "Predicted " << (predictedClass == 0 ? "Sphere" : "Cube")
                  << " (Actual: " << (isSphere ? "Sphere" : "Cube") << ")"
                  << std::endl;
    }
    
    return 0;
}
```

Nous avons maintenant un **FRAMEWORK ML/AI COMPLET FROM SCRATCH** ! Voici ce que je propose pour la suite :

### **Option 1: Applications Pratiques Avancées** 🎯
- **Chatbot conversationnel** avec mémoire contextuelle
- **Système de recommandation** (collaborative filtering + deep learning)

### **Option 3: Architectures Avancées** 🚀
- **Vision Transformer (ViT)** pour images
- **CLIP** (vision + language)

### **Option 4: Tools & Pipeline** 🛠️

- **Metrics Dashboard** (tensorboard-like)

# PARTIE 45 : Applications Pratiques Avancées (1/4) - Chatbot + Recommandation

## 1. Chatbot.hpp - Chatbot Conversationnel avec Mémoire

```cpp
// Chatbot.hpp - Conversational Chatbot with Context
#pragma once

#include "AI/NLP/GPT.hpp"
#include "AI/NLP/BERT.hpp"
#include "AI/Embedding.hpp"
#include <deque>

namespace nk {
namespace ai {
namespace nlp {

// ====================================================================
// CONVERSATION MEMORY
// ====================================================================

struct Message {
    std::string role;      // "user" or "assistant"
    std::string content;
    float timestamp;
    
    Message(const std::string& r, const std::string& c, float t = 0.0f)
        : role(r), content(c), timestamp(t) {}
};

class ConversationMemory {
public:
    std::deque<Message> messages;
    int maxMessages = 20;
    
    void addMessage(const std::string& role, const std::string& content) {
        float timestamp = static_cast<float>(messages.size());
        messages.emplace_back(role, content, timestamp);
        
        if (messages.size() > maxMessages) {
            messages.pop_front();
        }
    }
    
    std::string getContext(int lastN = 5) const {
        std::string context;
        
        int start = std::max(0, static_cast<int>(messages.size()) - lastN);
        
        for (size_t i = start; i < messages.size(); i++) {
            context += messages[i].role + ": " + messages[i].content + "\n";
        }
        
        return context;
    }
    
    void clear() {
        messages.clear();
    }
    
    std::vector<Message> searchByKeyword(const std::string& keyword) const {
        std::vector<Message> results;
        
        for (const auto& msg : messages) {
            if (msg.content.find(keyword) != std::string::npos) {
                results.push_back(msg);
            }
        }
        
        return results;
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// INTENT CLASSIFIER
// ====================================================================

enum class Intent {
    Greeting,
    Question,
    Command,
    Goodbye,
    Chitchat,
    Unknown
};

class IntentClassifier {
public:
    std::unique_ptr<Sequential> classifier;
    std::unique_ptr<Embedding> embedding;
    
    int maxSeqLength = 50;
    int embedDim = 128;
    
    IntentClassifier(int vocabSize, int numIntents = 6) {
        embedding = std::make_unique<Embedding>(vocabSize, embedDim);
        
        classifier = std::make_unique<Sequential>();
        classifier->add<Linear>(embedDim, 64);
        classifier->add<ReLU>();
        classifier->add<Dropout>(0.3f);
        classifier->add<Linear>(64, numIntents);
        classifier->add<Softmax>();
    }
    
    Intent predict(const std::vector<int>& tokenIds) {
        // Average embeddings
        Tensor embeddings = embedding->forward(tokenIds);
        
        Tensor avgEmbedding({embedDim});
        avgEmbedding.zeros();
        
        for (size_t i = 0; i < tokenIds.size() && i < maxSeqLength; i++) {
            for (int j = 0; j < embedDim; j++) {
                avgEmbedding.data[j] += embeddings.data[i * embedDim + j];
            }
        }
        
        for (int j = 0; j < embedDim; j++) {
            avgEmbedding.data[j] /= std::min(tokenIds.size(), (size_t)maxSeqLength);
        }
        
        // Classify
        Tensor probs = classifier->forward(avgEmbedding);
        
        int maxIdx = 0;
        float maxProb = probs.data[0];
        
        for (int i = 1; i < 6; i++) {
            if (probs.data[i] > maxProb) {
                maxProb = probs.data[i];
                maxIdx = i;
            }
        }
        
        return static_cast<Intent>(maxIdx);
    }
    
    void train(const std::vector<std::pair<std::vector<int>, Intent>>& data,
              Optimizer* optimizer, int epochs = 10) {
        
        CrossEntropyLoss loss;
        
        for (int epoch = 0; epoch < epochs; epoch++) {
            float totalLoss = 0.0f;
            
            for (const auto& [tokens, intent] : data) {
                optimizer->zeroGrad();
                
                // Forward
                Intent pred = predict(tokens);
                
                // Loss (simplified)
                totalLoss += (pred == intent) ? 0.0f : 1.0f;
                
                // Backward
                // ... (gradient computation)
                
                optimizer->step();
            }
            
            if (epoch % 2 == 0) {
                std::cout << "Epoch " << epoch << " - Loss: " << totalLoss / data.size() << std::endl;
            }
        }
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// SENTIMENT ANALYZER
// ====================================================================

enum class Sentiment {
    Positive,
    Neutral,
    Negative
};

class SentimentAnalyzer {
public:
    std::unique_ptr<Sequential> analyzer;
    std::unique_ptr<Embedding> embedding;
    
    int embedDim = 128;
    
    SentimentAnalyzer(int vocabSize) {
        embedding = std::make_unique<Embedding>(vocabSize, embedDim);
        
        analyzer = std::make_unique<Sequential>();
        analyzer->add<Linear>(embedDim, 64);
        analyzer->add<ReLU>();
        analyzer->add<Linear>(64, 3);
        analyzer->add<Softmax>();
    }
    
    Sentiment predict(const std::vector<int>& tokenIds) {
        // Average embeddings
        Tensor avgEmbedding({embedDim});
        avgEmbedding.zeros();
        
        Tensor embeddings = embedding->forward(tokenIds);
        
        for (size_t i = 0; i < tokenIds.size(); i++) {
            for (int j = 0; j < embedDim; j++) {
                avgEmbedding.data[j] += embeddings.data[i * embedDim + j];
            }
        }
        
        for (int j = 0; j < embedDim; j++) {
            avgEmbedding.data[j] /= tokenIds.size();
        }
        
        Tensor probs = analyzer->forward(avgEmbedding);
        
        int maxIdx = 0;
        float maxProb = probs.data[0];
        
        for (int i = 1; i < 3; i++) {
            if (probs.data[i] > maxProb) {
                maxProb = probs.data[i];
                maxIdx = i;
            }
        }
        
        return static_cast<Sentiment>(maxIdx);
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// CONVERSATIONAL CHATBOT
// ====================================================================

class ConversationalChatbot {
public:
    std::unique_ptr<GPT> languageModel;
    std::unique_ptr<IntentClassifier> intentClassifier;
    std::unique_ptr<SentimentAnalyzer> sentimentAnalyzer;
    std::unique_ptr<BPETokenizer> tokenizer;
    
    ConversationMemory memory;
    
    std::string systemPrompt = "You are a helpful AI assistant.";
    
    ConversationalChatbot(int vocabSize, int embedDim, int numHeads, int numLayers) {
        languageModel = std::make_unique<GPT>(vocabSize, embedDim, numHeads, numLayers);
        intentClassifier = std::make_unique<IntentClassifier>(vocabSize);
        sentimentAnalyzer = std::make_unique<SentimentAnalyzer>(vocabSize);
        tokenizer = std::make_unique<BPETokenizer>();
    }
    
    std::string chat(const std::string& userMessage) {
        // Add user message to memory
        memory.addMessage("user", userMessage);
        
        // Tokenize
        auto tokens = tokenizer->encode(userMessage);
        
        // Classify intent
        Intent intent = intentClassifier->predict(tokens);
        
        // Analyze sentiment
        Sentiment sentiment = sentimentAnalyzer->predict(tokens);
        
        // Handle special intents
        if (intent == Intent::Greeting) {
            std::string response = generateGreeting();
            memory.addMessage("assistant", response);
            return response;
        }
        
        if (intent == Intent::Goodbye) {
            std::string response = "Goodbye! Have a great day!";
            memory.addMessage("assistant", response);
            memory.clear();
            return response;
        }
        
        // Generate response with context
        std::string context = memory.getContext(5);
        std::string prompt = systemPrompt + "\n" + context + "assistant: ";
        
        auto promptTokens = tokenizer->encode(prompt);
        auto generatedTokens = languageModel->generate(promptTokens, 50, 0.8f);
        
        std::string response = tokenizer->decode(generatedTokens);
        
        // Clean up response
        response = cleanResponse(response);
        
        // Add to memory
        memory.addMessage("assistant", response);
        
        return response;
    }
    
    void loadPersonality(const std::string& personalityPrompt) {
        systemPrompt = personalityPrompt;
    }
    
    void setTemperature(float temp) {
        // Would set generation temperature
    }
    
private:
    std::string generateGreeting() {
        std::vector<std::string> greetings = {
            "Hello! How can I help you today?",
            "Hi there! What can I do for you?",
            "Greetings! How may I assist you?",
            "Hey! What's on your mind?"
        };
        
        Random& rng = Random::global();
        return greetings[rng.nextInt(greetings.size())];
    }
    
    std::string cleanResponse(const std::string& response) {
        // Remove extra whitespace, truncate at sentence end, etc.
        std::string cleaned = response;
        
        // Truncate at first newline or period
        size_t pos = cleaned.find('\n');
        if (pos != std::string::npos) {
            cleaned = cleaned.substr(0, pos);
        }
        
        return cleaned;
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// RETRIEVAL-AUGMENTED GENERATION (RAG)
// ====================================================================

class RAGChatbot {
public:
    std::unique_ptr<GPT> languageModel;
    std::unique_ptr<Embedding> documentEmbedding;
    
    struct Document {
        std::string content;
        Tensor embedding;
        std::string metadata;
    };
    
    std::vector<Document> knowledgeBase;
    
    RAGChatbot(int vocabSize, int embedDim, int numHeads, int numLayers) {
        languageModel = std::make_unique<GPT>(vocabSize, embedDim, numHeads, numLayers);
        documentEmbedding = std::make_unique<Embedding>(vocabSize, embedDim);
    }
    
    void addDocument(const std::string& content, const std::string& metadata = "") {
        Document doc;
        doc.content = content;
        doc.metadata = metadata;
        
        // Compute embedding (simplified)
        // In practice, would use BERT or similar
        doc.embedding = Tensor({128});
        doc.embedding.randomNormal();
        
        knowledgeBase.push_back(doc);
    }
    
    std::string chat(const std::string& query) {
        // Retrieve relevant documents
        auto relevantDocs = retrieveDocuments(query, 3);
        
        // Build context from retrieved documents
        std::string context = "Relevant information:\n";
        for (const auto& doc : relevantDocs) {
            context += doc.content + "\n";
        }
        
        // Generate response with context
        std::string prompt = context + "\nQuestion: " + query + "\nAnswer: ";
        
        BPETokenizer tokenizer;
        auto tokens = tokenizer.encode(prompt);
        auto generated = languageModel->generate(tokens, 100);
        
        return tokenizer.decode(generated);
    }
    
private:
    std::vector<Document> retrieveDocuments(const std::string& query, int topK) {
        // Compute query embedding
        Tensor queryEmbed({128});
        queryEmbed.randomNormal();
        
        // Compute similarities
        std::vector<std::pair<float, int>> scores;
        
        for (size_t i = 0; i < knowledgeBase.size(); i++) {
            float similarity = cosineSimilarity(queryEmbed, knowledgeBase[i].embedding);
            scores.push_back({similarity, static_cast<int>(i)});
        }
        
        // Sort by similarity
        std::sort(scores.begin(), scores.end(),
                 [](const auto& a, const auto& b) { return a.first > b.first; });
        
        // Return top-K
        std::vector<Document> results;
        for (int i = 0; i < topK && i < static_cast<int>(scores.size()); i++) {
            results.push_back(knowledgeBase[scores[i].second]);
        }
        
        return results;
    }
    
    float cosineSimilarity(const Tensor& a, const Tensor& b) {
        float dot = 0.0f;
        float normA = 0.0f;
        float normB = 0.0f;
        
        for (size_t i = 0; i < a.data.size(); i++) {
            dot += a.data[i] * b.data[i];
            normA += a.data[i] * a.data[i];
            normB += b.data[i] * b.data[i];
        }
        
        return dot / (std::sqrt(normA) * std::sqrt(normB) + 1e-8f);
    }
};

} // namespace nlp
} // namespace ai
} // namespace nk
```

## 2. RecommendationSystem.hpp - Système de Recommandation

```cpp
// RecommendationSystem.hpp - Recommendation System
#pragma once

#include "AI/Model.hpp"
#include "AI/Embedding.hpp"

namespace nk {
namespace ai {

// ====================================================================
// COLLABORATIVE FILTERING (Matrix Factorization)
// ====================================================================

class MatrixFactorization {
public:
    int numUsers;
    int numItems;
    int embedDim;
    
    Tensor userEmbeddings;   // [numUsers, embedDim]
    Tensor itemEmbeddings;   // [numItems, embedDim]
    Tensor userBias;         // [numUsers]
    Tensor itemBias;         // [numItems]
    float globalBias;
    
    MatrixFactorization(int users, int items, int dim = 50)
        : numUsers(users)
        , numItems(items)
        , embedDim(dim)
        , userEmbeddings({users, dim}, true)
        , itemEmbeddings({items, dim}, true)
        , userBias({users}, true)
        , itemBias({items}, true)
        , globalBias(0.0f) {
        
        // Initialize embeddings
        userEmbeddings.randomNormal(0.0f, 0.1f);
        itemEmbeddings.randomNormal(0.0f, 0.1f);
        userBias.zeros();
        itemBias.zeros();
    }
    
    float predict(int userId, int itemId) {
        float score = globalBias;
        score += userBias.data[userId];
        score += itemBias.data[itemId];
        
        // Dot product of embeddings
        for (int d = 0; d < embedDim; d++) {
            score += userEmbeddings.data[userId * embedDim + d] *
                    itemEmbeddings.data[itemId * embedDim + d];
        }
        
        return score;
    }
    
    void train(const std::vector<std::tuple<int, int, float>>& ratings,
              int epochs = 100, float learningRate = 0.01f, float regularization = 0.01f) {
        
        // SGD training
        for (int epoch = 0; epoch < epochs; epoch++) {
            float totalLoss = 0.0f;
            
            for (const auto& [userId, itemId, rating] : ratings) {
                // Predict
                float prediction = predict(userId, itemId);
                float error = rating - prediction;
                
                totalLoss += error * error;
                
                // Update embeddings
                for (int d = 0; d < embedDim; d++) {
                    float userEmbed = userEmbeddings.data[userId * embedDim + d];
                    float itemEmbed = itemEmbeddings.data[itemId * embedDim + d];
                    
                    userEmbeddings.data[userId * embedDim + d] += 
                        learningRate * (error * itemEmbed - regularization * userEmbed);
                    
                    itemEmbeddings.data[itemId * embedDim + d] += 
                        learningRate * (error * userEmbed - regularization * itemEmbed);
                }
                
                // Update biases
                userBias.data[userId] += learningRate * (error - regularization * userBias.data[userId]);
                itemBias.data[itemId] += learningRate * (error - regularization * itemBias.data[itemId]);
            }
            
            if (epoch % 10 == 0) {
                std::cout << "Epoch " << epoch << " - Loss: " << totalLoss / ratings.size() << std::endl;
            }
        }
    }
    
    std::vector<std::pair<int, float>> recommendForUser(int userId, int topK = 10) {
        std::vector<std::pair<int, float>> scores;
        
        for (int itemId = 0; itemId < numItems; itemId++) {
            float score = predict(userId, itemId);
            scores.push_back({itemId, score});
        }
        
        // Sort by score
        std::partial_sort(scores.begin(), scores.begin() + topK, scores.end(),
                         [](const auto& a, const auto& b) { return a.second > b.second; });
        
        return std::vector<std::pair<int, float>>(scores.begin(), scores.begin() + topK);
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// NEURAL COLLABORATIVE FILTERING
// ====================================================================

class NeuralCollaborativeFiltering {
public:
    std::unique_ptr<Embedding> userEmbedding;
    std::unique_ptr<Embedding> itemEmbedding;
    std::unique_ptr<Sequential> mlp;
    
    int numUsers;
    int numItems;
    int embedDim;
    
    NeuralCollaborativeFiltering(int users, int items, int dim = 64)
        : numUsers(users), numItems(items), embedDim(dim) {
        
        userEmbedding = std::make_unique<Embedding>(users, dim);
        itemEmbedding = std::make_unique<Embedding>(items, dim);
        
        // MLP layers
        mlp = std::make_unique<Sequential>();
        mlp->add<Linear>(dim * 2, 128);
        mlp->add<ReLU>();
        mlp->add<Dropout>(0.2f);
        
        mlp->add<Linear>(128, 64);
        mlp->add<ReLU>();
        mlp->add<Dropout>(0.2f);
        
        mlp->add<Linear>(64, 1);
        mlp->add<Sigmoid>();
    }
    
    float predict(int userId, int itemId) {
        // Get embeddings
        std::vector<int> userIds = {userId};
        std::vector<int> itemIds = {itemId};
        
        Tensor userEmbed = userEmbedding->forward(userIds);
        Tensor itemEmbed = itemEmbedding->forward(itemIds);
        
        // Concatenate
        Tensor combined({embedDim * 2});
        for (int i = 0; i < embedDim; i++) {
            combined.data[i] = userEmbed.data[i];
            combined.data[embedDim + i] = itemEmbed.data[i];
        }
        
        // Forward through MLP
        Tensor output = mlp->forward(combined);
        
        return output.data[0];
    }
    
    void train(const std::vector<std::tuple<int, int, float>>& ratings,
              Optimizer* optimizer, int epochs = 10) {
        
        MSELoss loss;
        
        for (int epoch = 0; epoch < epochs; epoch++) {
            float totalLoss = 0.0f;
            
            for (const auto& [userId, itemId, rating] : ratings) {
                optimizer->zeroGrad();
                
                float prediction = predict(userId, itemId);
                
                Tensor pred = Tensor::scalar(prediction);
                Tensor target = Tensor::scalar(rating);
                
                float lossValue = loss.forward(pred, target);
                totalLoss += lossValue;
                
                // Backward
                Tensor grad = loss.backward();
                
                optimizer->step();
            }
            
            std::cout << "Epoch " << epoch << " - Loss: " << totalLoss / ratings.size() << std::endl;
        }
    }
    
    std::vector<std::pair<int, float>> recommendForUser(int userId, int topK = 10) {
        std::vector<std::pair<int, float>> scores;
        
        for (int itemId = 0; itemId < numItems; itemId++) {
            float score = predict(userId, itemId);
            scores.push_back({itemId, score});
        }
        
        std::partial_sort(scores.begin(), scores.begin() + topK, scores.end(),
                         [](const auto& a, const auto& b) { return a.second > b.second; });
        
        return std::vector<std::pair<int, float>>(scores.begin(), scores.begin() + topK);
    }
    
    std::vector<Tensor*> parameters() {
        auto params = userEmbedding->parameters();
        
        auto itemParams = itemEmbedding->parameters();
        params.insert(params.end(), itemParams.begin(), itemParams.end());
        
        auto mlpParams = mlp->parameters();
        params.insert(params.end(), mlpParams.begin(), mlpParams.end());
        
        return params;
    }
};

// ====================================================================
// CONTENT-BASED FILTERING
// ====================================================================

class ContentBasedRecommender {
public:
    std::vector<Tensor> itemFeatures;  // Feature vectors for each item
    
    int numItems;
    int featureDim;
    
    ContentBasedRecommender(int items, int dim = 100)
        : numItems(items), featureDim(dim) {
        
        itemFeatures.resize(items, Tensor({dim}));
    }
    
    void addItem(int itemId, const Tensor& features) {
        if (itemId >= 0 && itemId < numItems) {
            itemFeatures[itemId] = features;
        }
    }
    
    std::vector<std::pair<int, float>> recommend(const Tensor& userProfile, int topK = 10) {
        std::vector<std::pair<int, float>> scores;
        
        for (int itemId = 0; itemId < numItems; itemId++) {
            float similarity = cosineSimilarity(userProfile, itemFeatures[itemId]);
            scores.push_back({itemId, similarity});
        }
        
        std::partial_sort(scores.begin(), scores.begin() + topK, scores.end(),
                         [](const auto& a, const auto& b) { return a.second > b.second; });
        
        return std::vector<std::pair<int, float>>(scores.begin(), scores.begin() + topK);
    }
    
    Tensor buildUserProfile(const std::vector<int>& likedItems) {
        Tensor profile({featureDim});
        profile.zeros();
        
        for (int itemId : likedItems) {
            if (itemId >= 0 && itemId < numItems) {
                for (int d = 0; d < featureDim; d++) {
                    profile.data[d] += itemFeatures[itemId].data[d];
                }
            }
        }
        
        // Normalize
        float norm = 0.0f;
        for (float val : profile.data) {
            norm += val * val;
        }
        norm = std::sqrt(norm);
        
        if (norm > 0.0f) {
            for (float& val : profile.data) {
                val /= norm;
            }
        }
        
        return profile;
    }
    
private:
    float cosineSimilarity(const Tensor& a, const Tensor& b) {
        float dot = 0.0f;
        float normA = 0.0f;
        float normB = 0.0f;
        
        for (size_t i = 0; i < a.data.size(); i++) {
            dot += a.data[i] * b.data[i];
            normA += a.data[i] * a.data[i];
            normB += b.data[i] * b.data[i];
        }
        
        return dot / (std::sqrt(normA) * std::sqrt(normB) + 1e-8f);
    }
};

} // namespace ai
} // namespace nk
```
